Genesis1:1 Pa citendekelo Lesa abumbile umulu ne sonde.
Genesis1:2 Isonde lyalifye icimfulumfulu
Genesis1:3 Elyo Lesa atile
Genesis1:4 Lesa amona nokuti ulubuuto lwawama. Elyo Lesa alekanya ulubuuto ne mfifi.
Genesis1:5 Lesa ainika ulubuuto
Genesis1:6 Kabili Lesa atile
Genesis1:7 Lesa apanga ulwelele ulwakulekanya amenshi
Genesis1:8 Lesa ainika ulwelele “Umulu.” Kabili bwaila
Genesis1:9 Kabili Lesa atile
Genesis1:10 Lesa ainike umushili uwauma ati
Genesis1:11 Kabili Lesa atile
Genesis1:12 Elyo pa mulundu papuuka ifimena ifya misango yonse
Genesis1:13 Kabili bwaila
Genesis1:14 Kabili Lesa atile
Genesis1:15 kabili fibe ifisaniko mu mulu ifyakuleta ulubuuto pesonde.” Kanshi efyo cali.
Genesis1:16 Lesa epakupanga ifisaniko fibili ifikalamba. Icisaniko cakulilepo cakuteeka akasuba
Genesis1:17 Ifisaniko Lesa afibika mu mulu pakuti fileleta ulubuuto pesonde
Genesis1:18 fileteeka akasuba no bushiku
Genesis1:19 Kabili bwaila
Genesis1:20 Kabili Lesa atile
Genesis1:21 Kanshi Lesa epakubumba ifibumbwa ifyabumi ifikalamba nganshi ifyaba muli bemba
Genesis1:22 Lesa afipaala
Genesis1:23 Kabili bwaila
Genesis1:24 Kabili Lesa atile
Genesis1:25 Lesa epakupanga inama sha mpanga mu misango yashiko
Genesis1:26 Elyo Lesa atile
Genesis1:27 Kanshi Lesa epakubumba umuntu mu cata cakwe. Amubumba mu cata cakwe. Ababumba umwaume no mwanakashi.
Genesis1:28 Lesa abapaala
Genesis1:29 Elyo Lesa atile
Genesis1:30 Kabili ku finama fya mpanga fyonse ifya pano isonde
Genesis1:31 Lesa amona ifintu fyonse ifyo apangile ukuti nafiwama nganshi. Kabili bwaila
Genesis2:1 Kanshi efyo umulu ne sonde ne fintu fyonse ifyabamo fyapwililile ukupangwa.
Genesis2:2 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali Lesa ninshi napwisha imilimo alebomba. Kanshi pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali Lesa alituushishe
Genesis2:3 Elyo Lesa apaala ubushiku bwalenga cine lubali
Genesis2:4 Ubu e butantiko bwa ntendekelo ya mulu ne sonde ilyo fyapangilwe. Ilyo Yawe Lesa abumbile umulu ne sonde
Genesis2:5 pesonde tapali icimpusa nelyo cimo kabili tapali nelyo cimo icamenenepo
Genesis2:6 Lelo kwali amenshi ayalefuma mu mushili no kulatapilila umushili mpanga yonse.
Genesis2:7 Elyo Yawe Lesa abumba umuntu ukufuma ku lukungu lwa kwiloba. Kabili amuputilisha umupu wabumi mu myona no muntu aba umumi.
Genesis2:8 Kabili Yawe Lesa alima ibala lwa ku kabanga mu Edeni. Elyo mulya mwine abikamo no muntu uo abumbile.
Genesis2:9 Yawe Lesa amesha pa mushili imiti iya misango yonse
Genesis2:10 Mu Edeni mwafumine umumana uwakutapilila ibala. Ukufuma mulya walekene mu milonga ine.
Genesis2:11 Ishina lya mumana wakubalilapo ni Pishoni. Uyu mumana wapita uwashokana mu calo conse ica Hafila umusangwa golide.
Genesis2:12 Kabili golide wa muli cilya calo musuma. Elyo mulasangwa ne finyamuti ifyanunka ubusaka na mabwe ya onikisi.
Genesis2:13 Ishina lya mumana walenga ibili ni Gihoni. Uyu mumana wapita uwashokana mu calo conse ica Kushi.
Genesis2:14 Ishina lya mumana walenga itatu ni Tigilisi. Uyu wena wapita lwa ku kabanga ka musumba wa Ashuri. Elyo umumana walenga ine ni Yufurate.
Genesis2:15 Yawe Lesa abuulile umuntu amubika na mwibala lya Edeni pakuti alelimamo no kulalisunga.
Genesis2:16 Elyo Yawe Lesa akonkomesha umuntu ati
Genesis2:17 lelo umuti wakwishiba ifisuma ne fibi
Genesis2:18 Elyo Yawe Lesa asosele ati
Genesis2:19 Kanshi Yawe Lesa abumbile ukufuma ku mushili inama shonse isha mu mpanga ne fyuni fyonse ifya mu lwelele. Elyo afitwala fyonse ku muntu pakuti amone amashina alefinika. Kanshi ishina lintu aitile conse icabumi
Genesis2:20 Kanshi umuntu epakwinika amashina ifitekwa fyonse
Genesis2:21 Kanshi Yawe Lesa epakulenga umuntu apone mu tulo utwingi. Ilyo umuntu acili mu tulo
Genesis2:22 Ku lubafu afumishe ku muntu umwaume
Genesis2:23 Elyo umwaume asosa ati
Genesis2:24 Kanshi eco umwaume ashiila wishi na nyina auminkana no mukashi wakwe
Genesis2:25 Umwaume no mukashi wakwe bali ubwamba
Genesis3:1 Nomba insoka yali incenjeshi nganshi ukucila pa nama shonse isha mpanga isho Yawe Lesa apangile. Elyo yaipusha umwanakashi aiti
Genesis3:2 Umwanakashi ayasuka insoka ati
Genesis3:3 lelo Lesa atile
Genesis3:4 Insoka yayasuka umwanakashi aiti
Genesis3:5 Pantu Lesa alishiba ukuti ilyo mukalyako
Genesis3:6 Ilyo umwanakashi amona ukuti ifitwalo fya muti fisuma ukulya
Genesis3:7 Elyo bonse babili amenso yabo yaisuka
Genesis3:8 Cilya caba ku cungulo umwaume no mukashi wakwe baumfwa uko Yawe Lesa aleenda mwibala. Batiina Yawe Lesa babelama mu miti ya mwibala.
Genesis3:9 Lelo Yawe Lesa epakwita umwaume ati
Genesis3:10 Umwaume ayasuka ati

Genesis3:14 Elyo Yawe Lesa aebele insoka ati

Genesis3:16 Ku mwanakashi atile

Genesis4:2 Panuma Efa afyele umwana umwaume Abeli
Genesis4:3 Mu kuya kwa nshiku
Genesis4:4 Lelo Abeli ena aletele ifyamafuta ya mabeli ya fitekwa fyakwe atuula kuli Yawe. Yawe asekelele muli Abeli no mutuulo wakwe
Genesis4:5 lelo tasekelele muli Kaini no mutuulo wakwe. Kanshi Kaini epakufulwa nganshi
Genesis4:6 Elyo Yawe epakweba Kaini ati

Genesis4:17 Kaini akumene no mukashi wakwe
Genesis4:18 Enoki ewafyele Iradi. Elyo Iradi e wishi wakwa Meuyaeli. Meuyaeli nao e wishi wakwa Metushaeli
Genesis4:19 Lameki aupile abanakashi babili
Genesis4:20 Ada ewafyele Yabali. Yabali ali e cikolwe ca bantu abateka ifitekwa
Genesis4:21 Munyina kwa Yabali
Genesis4:22 Sila ewafyele Tuba Kaini. Tuba Kaini ewalefula ifibombelo fyalekana lekana ifya fyela no mukuba. Nkashi yakwa Tuba Kaini ali ni Naama.
Genesis4:23 Lameki aebele abakashi bakwe ati
Genesis4:24 Nga cakuti icilandushi pali Kaini miku cine lubali
Genesis4:25 Adamu akumene no mukashi wakwe nakabili
Genesis4:26 Seti nao afyele umwana umwaume amwinika ne shina lya Enoshi. Ni pa nshita ine ilya elyo abantu batampile ukupepa Yawe.

Genesis5:2 Ababumbile umwaume no mwanakashi elyo abapaala. Ilyo ababumbile abetile nokuti

Genesis5:4 Panuma ya kufyalwa kwakwa Seti

Genesis6:1 Ilyo abantu batendeke ukulafula pesonde
Genesis6:2 abana baume bakwa Lesa bamona ukuti abana banakashi aba bantu bali abayemba. Kanshi epakulaupa onse uo umwine alefwaya.
Genesis6:3 Elyo Yawe atile
Genesis6:4 Banefilimu bali pesonde mu nshiku shilya elyo na panuma ilyo abana baume bakwa Lesa baleupa abana abanakashi ba bantu kabili bafyalamo na bana. Bali ni mpalume sha pakale
Genesis6:5 Yawe amona ukuti bwafulisha ububi bwa muntu pano isonde
Genesis6:6 Yawe alanguluka pali ico abumbile umuntu pesonde
Genesis6:7 Elyo Yawe asosa ati
Genesis6:8 Lelo Noa asanga ukusekelelwa pa cinso cakwa Yawe.
Genesis6:9 Ubu e butantiko bwa lupwa lwakwa Noa. Noa ali umuntu umololoke
Genesis6:10 Noa ali na bana abaume batatu
Genesis6:11 Nomba isonde lyalubana pa cinso cakwa Lesa kabili pesonde paiswilefye icimfulunganya.
Genesis6:12 Lesa amona ifyo isonde lyalubana
Genesis6:13 Kanshi Lesa epakweba Noa ati
Genesis6:14 Iwe uipangile icibwato ica mbao isha miti iyakosa iya saipulasi. Mukati ka cibwato upangemo imiputule. Elyo ushingule amanenekela mukati na kunse ya cibwato.
Genesis6:15 Ifi efyo uli nokupanga icibwato. Cili nokuba amakubiti imyanda itatu (300) mubutali
Genesis6:16 Ukapangilepo umutenge pa cibwato. Elyo mupepi no mutenge ukashemo insolokoto iyilepele kubiti umo ukushinguluka ubwato. Umwinshi ukaubike mu mbali ya cibwato. Ukapange icibwato ica fiputulwa fitatu ifyatuntikana
Genesis6:17 Nalaleta ilyeshi pano isonde kukonaula conse icabumi pesamba lya mulu
Genesis6:18 Nomba iwe nkapangana nobe icipangano candi. Iwe uli nokwingila mu cibwato pamo na bana bobe abaume
Genesis6:19 Uli nokwingisha mu cibwato ifyabumi fyonse fibili fibili
Genesis6:20 Fibili pa misango yonse iya fyuni
Genesis6:21 Ukasende imisango yonse iya fyakulya fyonse ifili nokuliwa
Genesis6:22 Noa epakucita fyonse ifyo Lesa amukonkomeshe.

Genesis7:2 Pa nama ishishakowela ubuule pali cila musango washiko ishilume cine lubali ne shikota nasho cine lubali. Pa nama ishakowela ubuule pali cila musango washiko inama shibili
Genesis7:3 Kabili pa misango yonse iya fyuni
Genesis7:4 Kwashala inshiku cine lubali elyo nkalokesha imfula pesonde pa nshiku amakumi yane
Genesis7:5 Kabili Noa acitile fyonse ifyo Yawe amukonkomeshe.
Genesis7:6 Noa ali ne myaka imyanda mutanda (600) ilyo ilyeshi lyaishile pesonde.
Genesis7:7 Noa
Genesis7:8 Inama shibili shibili ishishakowela ne shakowela
Genesis7:9 icilume ne cikota
Genesis7:10 Kabili panuma ya nshiku cine lubali (17) ne lyeshi lyaisa pesonde.
Genesis7:11 Mu mwaka Noa afikile pa myaka imyanda mutanda (600)
Genesis7:12 Kabili imfula epakuloka pesonde akasuba no bushiku
Genesis7:13 Pali bulya bwine bushiku Noa
Genesis7:14 Baingilemo ne misango yonse iya nama sha mpanga
Genesis7:15 Kanshi fyonse ifyabumi fibili fibili
Genesis7:16 Kanshi inama ishaingile mu cibwato shali ishilume ne shikota mu misango yonse iya fyabumi ngefyo Lesa akonkomeshe Noa. Elyo Yawe amwisalila mu cibwato.
Genesis7:17 Pa nshiku amakumi yane
Genesis7:18 Amenshi yalafulilako ukwimina pa mulu we sonde ne cibwato calaelela pa menshi.
Genesis7:19 Kanshi amenshi yaima icine cine pa mulu we sonde icakuti ne mpili shonse ishalepa pesamba lya mulu shasukile shaibila.
Genesis7:20 Amenshi yakonkenyepofye ukwima yasukile yacila pa mpili ishaibile mu menshi amakubiti ikumi limo na yasano (15).
Genesis7:21 Kanshi ifintu fyonse ifyabumi ifyenda pesonde fyaloba
Genesis7:22 Ifintu fyonse ifikala ku mulundu
Genesis7:23 Kanshi Lesa aonawile pesonde ifintu fyonse ifyaba no bumi
Genesis7:24 Ilyeshi lyaiswile pesonde inshiku umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150).
Genesis8:1 Lelo Lesa aibukishe Noa ne nama shonse isha mpanga ne fitekwa fyonse ifyali nankwe mu cibwato. Elyo aimya icimwela calapupa pesonde
Genesis8:2 Pali iyi nshita utumfukumfuku twali muli bemba washika ne fipunda fya mu mulu fyacilikwa
Genesis8:3 Amenshi pesonde yalakama buce buce. Panuma ya nshiku umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150) amenshi yasuka yacepa.
Genesis8:4 Pa bushiku bwalengele ikumi limo na cine lubali (17)
Genesis8:5 Amenshi yakonkenyepo ukukama mpaka na mu mweshi walenga ikumi. Elyo pa bushiku bwakubalilapo mu mweshi walenga ikumi
Genesis8:6 Panuma ya nshiku amakumi yane (40)
Genesis8:7 elyo atuma mwankole
Genesis8:8 Kabili Noa atuma inkunda pakuti imone amenshi nga nayakama pa mushili.
Genesis8:9 Nomba inkunda yafilwa ukusanga apakwikala
Genesis8:10 Noa apembelako na shimbi inshiku cine lubali elyo nakabili atuma inkunda ukufuma mu cibwato.
Genesis8:11 Ilyo inkunda yabwela mu cungulo
Genesis8:12 Kabili Noa apembelako inshiku na shimbi cine lubali elyo nakabili atuma inkunda
Genesis8:13 Kanshi amenshi yakamine pesonde pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi mu mweshi wakubalilapo ilyo Noa ali ne myaka imyanda mutanda na umo (601). Elyo Noa afumyapo umutenge pa cibwato
Genesis8:14 Pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na cine lubali (27) mu mweshi walenga ibili
Genesis8:15 Elyo Lesa aebele Noa ati

Genesis9:2 Inama shonse isha mpanga
Genesis9:3 Fyonse ifyabumi ifyenda fikaba ifyakulya kuli imwe. Namupeela fyonse nga filya fine namupeele imisalu.
Genesis9:4 Lelo tamufwile ukulya inama umuli umulopa
Genesis9:5 Kabili pa mulopa wenu uwabumi nkafwaya ukulubwililapo. Na pa mulopa wa nama wine nkafwaya ukulubulwilapo. Kabili nkalandula pa muntu onse uwasumya umulopa mukwipaya umuntu munankwe.
Genesis9:6 “Uyo onse uwasumya umulopa wa muntu
Genesis9:7 “Nomba imwe

Genesis9:9 “Na ine nomba nalapangana na imwe icipangano pamo na ba mu ndupwa shenu abakafyalwa kuntanshi
Genesis9:10 na ku fyabumi fyonse ifyo muli nafyo
Genesis9:11 Ine napangana na imwe icipangano ukuti
Genesis9:12 Elyo Lesa atile
Genesis9:13 Nabika umukolamfula wandi mu makumbi
Genesis9:14 Ilyo lyonse nalonganika amakumbi pa mulu we sonde
Genesis9:15 nakulaibukisha icipangano candi napangana na imwe ne misango yonse iya fyabumi. Amenshi tayakabale nakabili ayaba ilyeshi ilyakonaula ifintu fyonse ifyabumi.
Genesis9:16 Ilyo lyonse umukolamfula ukalamoneka mu makumbi
Genesis9:17 Elyo Lesa aeba Noa ati
Genesis9:18 Abana baume bakwa Noa abo afumine nabo mu cibwato ni Shemu
Genesis9:19 Aba ebali abana baume batatu abakwa Noa
Genesis9:20 Noa ali mulimi
Genesis9:21 Ilyo anweneko umwangashi
Genesis9:22 Hamu wishi wakwa Kenani amwene ukuti wishi ali ubwamba
Genesis9:23 Shemu na Yafeti bena epakubuula insalu babika pa mabeya yabo. Elyo balaya cimfutyanuma
Genesis9:24 Ilyo Noa umwangashi wamukololoka
Genesis9:25 Noa epakutila
Genesis9:26 Noa kabili atile
Genesis9:27 Lesa engalundako impanga ku calo cakwa Yafeti. Yafeti engalaikala mu matenti yakwa Shemu. Kabili Kenani akaleba umusha wakwe.”
Genesis9:28 Panuma ya lyeshi

Genesis10:1 Ubu e butantiko bwa ndupwa sha bana baume bakwa Noa: Shemu

Genesis10:4 Bamwana Yafani abaume ni Elisha
Genesis10:5 Ukufuma muli aba bantu emwatuntunka abasalanganina mu lulamba lwa bemba mu mipaka yabo
Genesis10:6 Bamwana Hamu abaume ni Kushi
Genesis10:7 Bamwana Kushi abaume ni Seba
Genesis10:8 Kushi ali e wishi wakwa Nimurodi. Nimurodi ewabalilepo ukuba icita icamaka pano isonde.
Genesis10:9 Nimurodi ali ni fundi uwamaka pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Kanshi ekwatula ne nsonselo yakuti
Genesis10:10 Imisumba iyo Nimurodi abalilepo ukuteeka ni Babiloni
Genesis10:11 Ilyo afumine muli ici calo ca Shina
Genesis10:12 elyo na Reseni
Genesis10:13 Misraimu e cikolwe ca bena Ludi
Genesis10:14 abena Patulusi na bena Kaselu ukwatuntuka Abafilisiti elyo na bena Kafuto.
Genesis10:15 Kenani ewali wishi wakwa Sidoni
Genesis10:16 abena Yebusi
Genesis10:17 abena Hifi
Genesis10:18 abena Afadi
Genesis10:19 Kabili imipaka ya bena Kenani yatampile ukufuma ku Sidoni ukulola ku Gela ukufika na ku Gasa. Elyo kabili ukulola ku Sodoma
Genesis10:20 Aba e bana baume bakwa Hamu mu mikowa yabo na mu ndimi shabo
Genesis10:21 Shemu umukalamba wakwa Yafeti nao alifyele abana abaume. Kabili Shemu e cikolwe ca bana baume bakwa Eberi.
Genesis10:22 Abana abaume abakwa Shemu ni Elamu
Genesis10:23 Abana abaume abakwa Aramu ni Usi
Genesis10:24 Afakisadi ewafyele Shela
Genesis10:25 Eberi afyele abana abaume babili. Umo ishina lyakwe ni Pelegi

Genesis10:27 Hadoramu
Genesis10:28 Obali
Genesis10:29 Ofiri
Genesis10:30 Bonse aba baleikala mu citungu ca mpili icabelele ku kabanga ukufuma ku Mesha ukulola ku Sefali.
Genesis10:31 Aba e bana baume bakwa Shemu mu mikowa na mu ndimi shabo
Genesis10:32 Iyi e mikowa ya bana baume bakwa Noa ukukonka ifyo batantama mukufyalwa na mu mishobo yabo. Ni kuli aba bantu ekwafuma imishobo yasalanganina pano isonde panuma ya lyeshi.

Genesis12:3 Nkapaala abo abakakupaala
Genesis12:4 Kanshi Abramu epakuya ngefyo Yawe amwebele. Loti nao aile nankwe. Abramu ali ne myaka amakumi cine lubali (75) ilyo afumine ku Harani.
Genesis12:5 Abramu asendele umukashi wakwe Sarai na Loti mwana munyina. Asendele ifyuma fyonse anonkele mu Harani na basha bonse akwete. Bonse baima ukulaya ku calo ca Kenani

Genesis12:9 Kabili Abramu epakwima akonkanyapo ubulendo ukulaya ku matololo ya Negebu.

Genesis12:17 Lelo Yawe aletele Farao na ba mu ŋanda mumwakwe amalwele ayabipisha pa mulandu wakwa Sarai muka Abramu.

Genesis13:4 kabili apo akuulile ubulambo bwantanshi. Pali iyi incende epo Abramu apepele Yawe.

Genesis13:6 Lelo impanga baleikalapo yacepa ilyo bali pamo pantu icuma bakwete califulishe icakuti bafilwa no kwikala pamo.
Genesis13:7 Bakacema ba fitekwa fyakwa Abramu balaumana na bakacema ba fitekwa fyakwa Loti. Pali iyo nshita ninshi abena Kenani na bena Perisi nabo bene baleikala muli ici calo.

Genesis39:19 Ilyo shikulu wakwa Yosefu aumfwile ifyo umukashi amushimikile ati
Genesis39:20 Shikulu wakwa Yosefu amuposa mu cifungo
Genesis39:21 Lelo Yawe ali na Yosefu kabili amukwatila icitemwiko icishipwa. Alenga nokuti atemwikwe ku cinso cakwa kasunga wa bafungwa.
Genesis39:22 Kanshi nomba kasunga wa bafungwa apeela Yosefu umulimo wakulaangalila bonse abali mu cifungo
Genesis39:23 Kasunga wa bafungwa aleka no kulasakamana pa milimo iyo apeele Yosefu ukulabomba
Genesis40:1 Ilyo papitile inshita
Genesis40:2 Farao epakufulilwa aba babomfi babili
Genesis40:3 Kanshi epakubaposa mu cifungo mu ŋanda ya waleyangalila ifita fyalelonda kwisano
Genesis40:4 Kangalila wa bamalonda apeela Yosefu umulimo wakubasunga
Genesis40:5 Ubushiku bumo
Genesis40:6 Ulucelo cilya Yosefu aingilamo asanga ukuti bali abasakamana.
Genesis40:7 Kanshi aipusha ababomfi bakwa Farao abo ali nabo mu cifungo mu ŋanda yakwa shikulu wakwe ati
Genesis40:8 Bamwasuka abati
Genesis40:9 Kanshi umukalamba wa bakatumika aebele Yosefu iciloto cakwe. Amweba ati
Genesis40:10 uyu mwangashi waciba ne misambo itatu. Cilya amabula yafuma
Genesis40:11 Ulukombo lwakwa Farao lwaciba mu minwe
Genesis40:12 Yosefu amweba ati
Genesis40:13 Mu nshikufye shitatu
Genesis40:14 Lelo ilyo ukekala bwino
Genesis40:15 Pantu ine bamfumishefye ku maka mu calo ca Bahibulu
Genesis40:16 Ilyo umukalamba wa balepanga imikate amona ukuti Yosefu ailwila umunankwe ifyakumuwamina
Genesis40:17 Mu museke waciba pamulu
Genesis40:18 Yosefu amweba ati
Genesis40:19 Mu nshiku shitatu
Genesis40:20 Nomba ubushiku bwalengele shitatu bwali e bushiku Farao afyelwemo. Kanshi Farao acitila ababomfi bakwe imitebeto. Afumya mu cifungo
Genesis40:21 Umukalamba wa bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu amubwesesha ku mulimo wakwe
Genesis40:22 Lelo umukalamba wa balepanga imikate wena
Genesis40:23 Umukalamba wa bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu wena taibukishe kuli Yosefu iyoo
Genesis41:1 Ilyo papitile imyaka ibili iyituntulu Farao alotele iciloto. Alotele eminine pa lulamba lwa mumana wa Nailo.
Genesis41:2 Awe iŋombe ishikota cine lubali ishatuuluka kabili ishaina ubusaka shafuma mu mumana
Genesis41:3 Kabili panuma
Genesis41:4 Elyo iŋombe isho ishibi kabili ishaonda shalya iŋombe ishatuuluka kabili ishaina ubusaka. Awe Farao ashibuka mu tulo.
Genesis41:5 Kabili Farao apona mu tulo
Genesis41:6 Elyo panuma ulupimbili lwatwala imisonso imbi cine lubali
Genesis41:7 Imisonso iyapapa yamina imisonso cine lubali iya nseke ishatuuluka ishisuma. Farao elyo ashibuka mu tulo
Genesis41:8 Ulucelo Farao alifye uwasakamana. Kanshi epakwita abalecita amalele na bamano bonse mu Egupto. Farao abebako ifiloto alotele
Genesis41:9 Elyo umukalamba wa bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu aebele Farao ati
Genesis41:10 Limo Farao alifulilwe ababomfi bakwe
Genesis41:11 Cila umo pali ifwe babili alilotele iciloto pa bushiku bumo bwinefye. Cila ciloto cali nomo calolele.
Genesis41:12 Twalimo no mulumendo umo Umuhibulu
Genesis41:13 Kabili ifintu fyaishile citikafye ngomo mwine atwilwilile. Ine nalibwelele pa mulimo wandi
Genesis41:14 Kanshi Farao alitumine abakwita Yosefu. Baya mufumya mu cifungo bamuletafye bwangu bwangu. Yosefu atala abeya
Genesis41:15 Farao aebele Yosefu ati
Genesis41:16 Yosefu amwasuka ati
Genesis41:17 Elyo Farao aebele Yosefu ati
Genesis41:18 Elyo mu mumana mwafuma iŋombe ishikota cine lubali ishatuuluka kabili ishaina ubusaka
Genesis41:19 Elyo panuma ya ishi
Genesis41:20 Isho iŋombe ishaonda kabili ishibi shalya iŋombe cine lubali ishaina
Genesis41:21 Lelo panuma yakulya iŋombe ishaina
Genesis41:22 Kabili mu ciloto candi namona imisonso ya ŋanu cine lubali iyaisulamo inseke ishisuma ishatuuluka
Genesis41:23 Elyo panuma lwatwala imisonso imbi cine lubali
Genesis41:24 Iyo misonso iyapapa yamina imisonso cine lubali iya nseke ishisuma. Nalishimikila abacita amalele ifi filoto
Genesis41:25 Elyo Yosefu aebele Farao ati
Genesis41:26 Isho ŋombe ishikota ishisuma cine lubali myaka cine lubali
Genesis41:27 Elyo ne ŋombe ishikota isho cine lubali ishaonda kabili ishibi ishafumine mu mumana panuma
Genesis41:28 Kanshi efilya nacilanda kuli Farao ukuti
Genesis41:29 Imyaka cine lubali iyalaisa
Genesis41:30 Lelo panuma
Genesis41:31 Abantu tabakebukishe ukuti mu calo mwali ifyakulya ifingi
Genesis41:32 Umulandu Farao alotele iciloto cimo cine imiku ibili
Genesis41:33 “Kanshi nomba Farao nafwaye umuntu uwacenjela kabili uwamano
Genesis41:34 Farao nasonte na bakangalila mu calo abakupoka icipande ca fisabo cimo pa fipande fisano fya fisabo bakalasombola mu myaka cine lubali ilyo kukaba ifisabo ifingi.
Genesis41:35 Farao abapeele amaka yakulonganika ifyakulya fya myaka iyi isuma no kututila iŋanu mu misumba umo bakalasungila ifyakulya.
Genesis41:36 Ifi fyakulya fyakubika mu matala ya misumba
Genesis41:37 Aya matontonkanyo yamoneke bwino kuli Farao na babomfi bakwe bonse.
Genesis41:38 Elyo Farao asosele ku babomfi bakwe ati
Genesis41:39 Farao epakweba Yosefu ati
Genesis41:40 Kanshi niwe wine walaba cilolo mukalamba we sano lyandi
Genesis41:41 Elyo Farao aebele Yosefu ati
Genesis41:42 Farao epakufuula imbalaminwe yakwe iyabufumu iyakufwatikilako
Genesis41:43 Amuninika mwiceleta lyakwe ilyabubili nge nkonkani yakwe
Genesis41:44 Elyo Farao aebele Yosefu ati
Genesis41:45 Farao ainika Yosefu ishina lya Sefenati Panea. Kabili apeela Yosefu umukashana Asenati umwana wakwa Potifera shimapepo wa ku Oni ukuti abe umukashi wakwe. Yosefu nao aya alepitana mu calo conse ica Egupto.
Genesis41:46 Yosefu ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ilyo atampile ukulabombela Farao imfumu ya calo ca Egupto. Yosefu epakusha Farao aya aletandala mu calo conse ica Egupto.
Genesis41:47 Mu myaka ilya cine lubali iya fisabo ifingi
Genesis41:48 Yosefu alongenye ifyakulya fyonse ifyasombwelwe mu Egupto muli iyo myaka ya fisabo ifingi
Genesis41:49 Yosefu atutile iŋanu ishingi nganshi
Genesis41:50 Ilyo imyaka ya cipowe tailaisa
Genesis41:51 Yosefu ainike ibeli lyakwe ishina lya Manase nokusosa ati
Genesis41:52 Cikonkebeli wena amwinike ishina lya Efulemu
Genesis41:53 Cilya imyaka cine lubali iya fyakulya ifingi yapita
Genesis41:54 elyo imyaka cine lubali iya cipowe nayo yatampa ngefyo Yosefu asosele. Mu fyalo fyonse fimbi mwapona icipowe
Genesis41:55 Cilya abena Egupto bonse batampa ukumfwa icipowe
Genesis41:56 Cilya icipowe cakumana icalo conse elyo Yosefu aisula amayanda yonse batutilemo iŋanu
Genesis41:57 Abantu mu fyalo fyonse nabo balaisa kukushita iŋanu kuli Yosefu pantu icipowe icibi caponene pesonde lyonse.
Genesis42:1 Ilyo Yakobo aumfwile ukuti mu Egupto mwena iŋanu emo shali
Genesis42:2 Ine nalyumfwa ukuti mu Egupto mwena iŋanu emo shili. Kanshi eko muye
Genesis42:3 Kanshi bamunyina kwa Yosefu ikumi limo epakwima balaya ku Egupto kukushita iŋanu.

Genesis42:5 Kanshi bamwana Israeli pamo na bantu bambi balile kukushita iŋanu

Genesis42:7 Cilya Yosefu abamona
Genesis42:8 Nangu Yosefu wena aishibe bamunyina

Genesis42:14 Yosefu abeba ati

Genesis43:20 Bamweba abati

Genesis44:1 Elyo Yosefu akonkomeshe kasunga wa ŋanda yakwe ati

Genesis44:22 Elyo ifwe shikulu twamwebele atuti

Genesis44:24 Ilyo twabwelelemo kuli shifwe
Genesis44:25 “Kabili shifwe aishile tweba ati
Genesis44:26 Lelo ifwe twamwebele ukuti
Genesis44:27 Kabili umubomfi wenu
Genesis44:28 Umo tatwaba nankwe aliya. Ine nasosele nati cine cine ciswango ca mpanga ecimulepawile. Ukufuma ilyo line nshatala mumona.
Genesis44:29 Nga cakuti nao mwamusenda
Genesis44:30 “Kanshi nomba nga cakuti nabwelelemo kuli batata umubomfi wenu no mwaice tatuli nankwe
Genesis44:31 Pantu batata no mwaice balikatana nganshi mu bumi bwabo
Genesis44:32 Ne mubomfi wenu nalaile kuli batata ukuti te cakutwishika nkabwesha umwaice umumi. Nasosele nati
Genesis44:33 Eico nomba napapata
Genesis44:34 Nga ine kuti nabwekelamo shani kuli batata nga nshili na mwaice? Awe iyoo! Mwikaleka nkamoneko ubulanda bukeshila batata.”
Genesis45:1 Kanshi Yosefu asukile afilwa ukushipikisha pa cinso ca bantu abalemubombela. Elyo aikatisha ishiwi ati
Genesis45:2 Kabili alikatishe nganshi pakulila icakuti na bena Egupto balyumfwile uko alelila. Neci cintu casukile caumfwika na kwisano kwa Farao.

Genesis45:4 Elyo Yosefu aeba bamunyina ati
Genesis45:5 Nomba mwiba na bulanda
Genesis45:6 Nomba imyaka yaba ibili iya cipowe mu calo
Genesis45:7 Lelo Lesa antumine ukumutangilila pakumupusushishako ku cipowe abakashala pano isonde
Genesis45:8 Kanshi teimwe mwandetele kuno iyoo
Genesis45:9 “Kanshi kabiyeni bwangu bwangu kuli batata
Genesis45:10 Mukesa ikala mu mpanga ya Gosheni. Kabili mukabafye mupepi na ine
Genesis45:11 Nine wine nkalamufwaila ifyakulya mu Gosheni pantu kucili na imbi imyaka isano iya cipowe iyili nokwisa. Pantu nga teifyo ninshi imwe na bantu muli nabo ne fitekwa fyenu fyonse mukaponena mu bupina.’
Genesis45:12 “Awe mwaimwena mwe bene
Genesis45:13 Mukaye shimikila batata umucinshi bampeela muno Egupto
Genesis45:14 Elyo Yosefu akumbatila Benjamini munyina alalila no kulila. Benjamini nao akumbata Yosefu
Genesis45:15 Kabili Yosefu alatomona bamunyina pakubaposha

Genesis45:21 Kanshi bamwana Israeli nabo efyo bacitile. Yosefu abapeele amaceleta ngefyo Farao akonkomeshe. Kabili abapeele ne fyakulya pa bulendo.

Genesis46:1 Kanshi Israeli alimine asenda na fyonse ifyo akwete. Ilyo afikile ku Beresheba atuula amalambo kuli Lesa wakwa Isaki wishi.
Genesis46:2 Elyo ubushiku mu cimonwa Lesa alandile kuli Israeli ati
Genesis46:3 Lesa amweba ati
Genesis46:4 Ine nkaya nobe ku Egupto kabili nine wine nkakubwesesha muli cino calo. Elyo kabili ni Yosefu wine eukakonga pakufwa.”
Genesis46:5 Elyo Yakobo afumine ku Beresheba. Bamwana Israeli abaume baninika Yakobo na bana babo na bakashi babo mu maceleta Farao atumine kukwisa basenda.
Genesis46:6 Basendela kumo ne fitekwa fyabo ne fyuma banonkele mu calo ca Kenani. Yakobo epakuya ku Egupto pamo no lupwa lwakwe lonse.
Genesis46:7 Akukile ku Egupto pamo na bamwane abaume na beshikulu abaume
Genesis46:8 Aya e mashina ya bena Israeli
Genesis46:9 Abana abaume abakwa Rubeni
Genesis46:10 Bamwana Simeoni abaume ni Yemueli
Genesis46:11 Bamwana Levi abaume ni Geshoni
Genesis46:12 Bamwana Yuda abaume ni Ere
Genesis46:13 Bamwana Isaka abaume
Genesis46:14 Bamwana Sebuloni abaume ni Seredi
Genesis46:15 Aba e bana abaume abo Leya afyele kuli Yakobo ilyo bali mu calo ca Padani Aramu
Genesis46:16 Bamwana Gadi abaume
Genesis46:17 Bamwana Asheri abaume ni Imina
Genesis46:18 Aba e bana na beshikulu abakwa Yakobo na Silipa. Silipa eulya musha Labani apeele kuli mwane Leya. Bonse pamo bali ikumi limo na mutanda (16).
Genesis46:19 Yosefu na Benjamini e bana abaume bakwa Rakeli umukashi wakwa Yakobo.
Genesis46:20 Mu calo ca Egupto
Genesis46:21 Bamwana Benjamini abaume
Genesis46:22 Aba e bana abaume na beshikulupo abakwa Rakeli na Yakobo. Bonse pamo bali ikumi limo na bane (14).
Genesis46:23 Mwana Dani umwaume
Genesis46:24 Bamwana Naftali abaume
Genesis46:25 Aba e bana abaume na beshikulu abakwa Yakobo na Bilua. Bilua eulya musha Labani apeele kuli mwane Rakeli. Bonse bali pamo cine lubali.
Genesis46:26 Kanshi aba mu lupwa lwakwa Yakobo
Genesis46:27 Yosefu afyele abana abaume babili mu Egupto. Kanshi bonse pamo
Genesis46:28 Nomba Yakobo atangishe Yuda kuli Yosefu pakuti abatangilile mu nshila ya ku Gosheni. Ilyo bafikile mu mpanga ya Gosheni
Genesis46:29 Yosefu apekanye iceleta lyakwe
Genesis46:30 Israeli aeba Yosefu ati
Genesis46:31 Elyo Yosefu aebele bamunyina na ba mu ŋanda yakwa wishi ati
Genesis46:32 Aba bantu ni bakacema balateka ifitekwa. Kanshi beshile ne mpaanga ne mbushi
Genesis46:33 Ilyo Farao akamwita
Genesis46:34 Mukasuke amuti
Genesis47:1 Kanshi Yosefu aile kuli Farao amweba ati
Genesis47:2 Elyo Yosefu abuulapo bamunyina basano (5) abatwala kuli Farao.
Genesis47:3 Farao aipusha bamunyina Yosefu ati
Genesis47:4 Kabili bamweba nokuti
Genesis47:5 Farao epakweba Yosefu ati
Genesis47:6 Cino calo ca Egupto calo cobe
Genesis47:7 Kabili Yosefu aile buula wishi
Genesis47:8 Farao aipusha Yakobo ati
Genesis47:9 Yakobo ayasuka Farao ati
Genesis47:10 Elyo Yakobo apaala Farao
Genesis47:11 Kanshi Yosefu epakulanga wishi na bamunyina apakwikala mu calo ca Egupto. Ukulingana ne fyakonkomeshe Farao
Genesis47:12 Kabili Yosefu alapeela ifyakulya kuli wishi na bamunyina na ba lupwa bonse abakwa wishi ukulingana no bwingi bwa bana bakwete.
Genesis47:13 Nomba ifyakulya mu calo conse tamwali pantu icipowe calikulishe nganshi. Abantu mu calo ca Egupto na mu calo ca Kenani amaka yalacepelakofye ku mulandu wa cipowe.
Genesis47:14 Yosefu alelonganika indalama isho abantu ba mu Egupto na ba mu Kenani baleshitamo iŋanu. Kabili aletwala ishi ndalama kwisano kwa Farao.
Genesis47:15 Ilyo indalama abena Egupto na bena Kenani shapwile
Genesis47:16 Yosefu abasuka ati
Genesis47:17 Kanshi abantu nabo balaleta ifitekwa fyabo kuli Yosefu
Genesis47:18 Ilyo uyo mwaka wapwile
Genesis47:19 Cinshi twingalobela pamo na mabala yesu
Genesis47:20 Kanshi efyo Yosefu ashitile Farao amabala yonse mu calo ca Egupto. Umwina Egupto onse alishitishe amabala yakwe pantu icipowe calibipishe nganshi. Awe casuka icalo conse caba cuma cakwa Farao.
Genesis47:21 Abantu bena Yosefu abacita abasha
Genesis47:22 Amabala ya bashimapepo yena Yosefu tayashitile iyoo
Genesis47:23 Elyo Yosefu aebele abantu ati
Genesis47:24 Lelo ukulobolola nga kwaisa
Genesis47:25 Abantu bamwasuka abati
Genesis47:26 Kanshi Yosefu epakupanga ifunde ilyabako ukufika na lelo ilyo abena Egupto bali nokulakonka. Ili funde lyakuti umwina Egupto onse ali nokupeela kuli Farao icipande cimo pa fipande fisano fya fisabo fyonse alobolola. Amabala ya bashimapepo yena eyashasangwike amabala yakwa Farao.
Genesis47:27 Abena Israeli baikele mu Egupto mu mpanga ya Gosheni. Muli iyi mpanga abena Israeli balinonkelemo ifyuma
Genesis47:28 Yakobo aikele mu calo ca Egupto imyaka ikumi limo na cine lubali (17)
Genesis47:29 Ilyo inshita ya kufwa kwakwa Israeli yapaleme
Genesis47:30 Ilyo nkaya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyandi
Genesis47:31 Israeli amweba ati

Genesis48:2 Cilya baeba Yakobo abati
Genesis48:3 Elyo Yakobo alaeba Yosefu ati
Genesis48:4 Kabili anjebele nokuti
Genesis48:5 Kanshi abana benu abaume babili abo wafyele muno Egupto nshilati njise kuno
Genesis48:6 Lelo abana bambi abo wafyala panuma ya aba
Genesis48:7 Pantu naliketwe no bulanda ilyo nalefuma ku calo ca Padani Aramu. Ni pali ubo bulendo elyo Rakeli afwile ninshi tulifye mupepi na ku Efulata. Kanshi namushiikile kulya kwine mumbali ya musebo uwalola ku Efulata
Genesis48:8 Ilyo Israeli amwene bamwana Yosefu abaume
Genesis48:9 Yosefu aeba wishi ati
Genesis48:10 Nomba Israeli alefifitilafye ku mulandu wa bukote
Genesis48:11 Elyo Israeli aeba Yosefu ati
Genesis48:12 Elyo Yosefu afumya bamwane mu ceni cakwa Israeli
Genesis48:13 Kabili Yosefu alibuulile bamwane bonse babili. Efulemu amupisha ku kulyo kwakwe pakuti alungatane no kuboko kwa kuso ukwakwa Israeli. Manase nao amupisha ku kuso kwakwe
Genesis48:14 Lelo Israeli apusanya amaboko yakwe. Kanshi epakubika icisansa cakwe ica ku kulyo pa mutwe wakwa Efulemu
Genesis48:15 Elyo apaala Yosefu ati
Genesis48:16 Malaika uwampususha ku fikali fyonse
Genesis48:17 Ilyo Yosefu amwene ukuti wishi abikile icisansa cakwe ica ku kulyo pa mutwe wakwa Efulemu

Genesis48:19 Lelo wishi akaana ati
Genesis48:20 Kanshi epakubapaala ubo bwine bushiku ati

Genesis50:1 Elyo Yosefu akumbatile wishi alelila
Genesis50:2 Kabili Yosefu akonkomesha bashiŋanga abalemubombela ukuti bomike icitumbi cakwa wishi. Kanshi efyo bashiŋanga baumike icitumbi cakwa Israeli.
Genesis50:3 Bashiŋanga pakumika icitumbi cakwa Israeli bapwile inshiku ishituntulu amakumi yane (40)
Genesis50:4 Ilyo inshiku shakuloosha Israeli shapwile
Genesis50:5 ‘Batata banengele ukuti ndape umulapo. Basosele ukuti
Genesis50:6 Farao ayasuka ati
Genesis50:7 Yosefu kanshi alimine nokulaya kukushiika wishi. Ababomfi bonse bakwa Farao
Genesis50:8 Aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yosefu na bamunyina na bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yakobo nabo baile nankwe. Abashele mu Gosheni bana babo
Genesis50:9 Abantu ba maceleta na baninine pali bakabalwe nabo bene baile na Yosefu. Kanshi lyali ibumba ilikalamba nganshi.
Genesis50:10 Ilyo bafikile pa lubansa lwa Atadi ulo balepuminapo iŋanu ulwali mupepi na ku mumana wa Yordani
Genesis50:11 Ilyo abena Kenani abaleikala kulya bamona icililo batekele mu lubansa lwa Atadi ulwakupuminapo iŋanu
Genesis50:12 Kanshi bamwana Yakobo bacitile fyonse ngefyo shibo abakonkomeshe.
Genesis50:13 Balisendele icitumbi cakwe ku calo ca Kenani. Bacishiika na mu lucengo lwa mwibala lya Makipela mupepi na ku Mamure. E lucengo pamo pene ne bala Abrahamu ashitile kuli Efuloni umwina Hiti pakuti akwate incende ya nshinshi.
Genesis50:14 Panuma yakushiika wishi
Genesis50:15 Ilyo bamunyina kwa Yosefu bamwene ukuti shibo afwa
Genesis50:16 Kanshi bamunyina epakutuma amashiwi kuli Yosefu abati
Genesis50:17 mukebe Yosefu amuti
Genesis50:18 Elyo bamunyina baishile kuli Yosefu baiposa panshi
Genesis50:19 Lelo Yosefu abeba ati
Genesis50:20 Kwena imwe mwali na mapange yakuncita icibi
Genesis50:21 Kanshi mwilatiina nelyo cimo. Nine wine nakulamufwaila ifyakulya imwe na bana benu.” Efyo Yosefu abatekele imitima mukubalandila amashiwi ayasuma.
Genesis50:22 Yosefu aikele mu Egupto pamo pene na bonse ba lupwa lwakwa wishi. Aikele umumi imyaka umwanda umo ne kumi limo (110).
Genesis50:23 Yosefu amwene abana bakwa Efulemu na beshikulu bakwa Efulemu bene. Ilyo bamwana Makiri umwana wakwa Manase balefyalwa
Genesis50:24 Kabili Yosefu aebele bamunyina ati
Genesis50:25 Kabili Yosefu aebele bamwana Israeli ati
Genesis50:26 Kanshi Yosefu afwile ninshi ali ne myaka umwanda umo ne kumi limo (110). Elyo panuma yakumika icitumbi cakwe

Exodus1:4 Dani

Exodus8:8 Farao epakwita Mose na Aroni abeba ati
Exodus8:9 Mose aeba Farao ati
Exodus8:10 Farao amwasuka ati
Exodus8:11 Ifyula fikataluka kuli iwe
Exodus8:12 Ilyo Mose na Aroni bafuma kuli Farao
Exodus8:13 Yawe acitile ifyo Mose alombele. Ifyula ifyali mu mayanda
Exodus8:14 Abena Egupto bafilonganya mu mina
Exodus8:15 Ilyo Farao amwene ukuti ifyula fyafwa
Exodus8:16 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus8:17 Nabo bacita ifyo fine. Aroni atambalika ukuboko kwakwe ne nkonto yakwe
Exodus8:18 Abamalele nabo baesha ukuleta bamuŋwiŋwi ku malele yabo
Exodus8:19 Abamalele epakweba Farao abati
Exodus8:20 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus8:21 Nga taulekele ukuti abantu bandi baleya
Exodus8:22 Nomba muli ubo bushiku
Exodus8:23 Nkalekanya pa bantu bandi na bantu bobe. Icisungusho ici cikacitika mailo.’”
Exodus8:24 Yawe acitile ifyo fine. Kwaishile amabumba ya tusembele utwingi nganshi
Exodus8:25 Elyo Farao aitile Mose na Aroni abeba ati
Exodus8:26 Mose nao amwasuka ati
Exodus8:27 Tufwilefye ukuya ulwendo lwa nshiku shitatu mu matololo kukutuula Yawe
Exodus8:28 Farao nao amweba ati
Exodus8:29 Mose nao amwasuka ati
Exodus8:30 Mose atifye ashifuma pali Farao
Exodus8:31 Nao Yawe aumfwa ukupapata kwakwe
Exodus8:32 Lelo nalyo line umutima wakwa Farao wali uwaumalala
Exodus9:1 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus9:2 Nga wabakaanya ukuti baleya kabili watwalilila no kubasunga
Exodus9:3 ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kukaleta icinkunka pa fitekwa fyenu
Exodus9:4 Lelo Yawe akalekanya pakati ka fitekwa fya bena Israeli na bena Egupto
Exodus9:5 Yawe napingula inshita
Exodus9:6 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo Yawe acitile ifyo asosele. Ifitekwa fya bena Egupto fyonse fyalifwile lelo ifitekwa fya bena Israeli fyena tapafwile nelyo cimo.
Exodus9:7 Ilyo Farao atumine abantu kukumona ifyacitike. Nabo bamwebele ukuti tapali inama nangu imo iya mwina Israeli iyifwilepo. Lelo umutima wakwa Farao walifye waumalala
Exodus9:8 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati
Exodus9:9 Imito ikaba e lukungu pa calo conse ca Egupto. Kabili icalofye conse imito ikalenga abantu ne fitekwa ukulwala ifipute ifikalasanguka ifilonda fya mafina.”
Exodus9:10 Kanshi epakubuula imito ukufuma mwilungu
Exodus9:11 Abamalele bafililwe ukwisa kuli Mose pantu nabo bene ifipute fyalibatumbile nga filya fine fyatumbile bonse abena Egupto.
Exodus9:12 Lelo Yawe alengele ukumalala umutima wakwa Farao
Exodus9:13 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus9:14 Pantu ino nshita ndetuma ifikuko ifyabipisha nganshi pali iwe na bacilolo bobe
Exodus9:15 Kwena nga cakuti ine njimya ukuboko kwandi no kukanda iwe na bantu bobe ku cinkunka
Exodus9:16 Ni pakukulanga amaka yandi eco nakubikila pa bufumu
Exodus9:17 Ucili uleitutumuna pa bantu bandi
Exodus9:18 Kanshi mu bushiku bwa mailo pa nshita nga ino ine nkalokesha imfula yacitalawe iya mabwe iyishatala ailoka mu Egupto ukutulafye apo ici calo catendekele ukufika na nomba.
Exodus9:19 Kanshi ubile imbila iyakutila ifitekwa fyenu fyonse ne fintu fimbi fyonse ifyaba mu mpanga mukafilete mu ncende umwakuuba imfula. Pantu umuntu onse ne nama yonse ifikaba mu mpanga ukwabula ukufileta umwakuuba imfula yacitalawe iya mabwe fikafwa.’”
Exodus9:20 Bacilolo bakwa Farao
Exodus9:21 Lelo abo abashaposeleko mano kwishiwi Yawe asosele
Exodus9:22 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus9:23 Cilya Mose aimisha inkonto yakwe mumulu
Exodus9:24 Amabwe ya mfula yalapona
Exodus9:25 Imfula ya mabwe yaonawile ifintu fyonse ifyali mu mpanga mu calo conse ica Egupto
Exodus9:26 Incendefye imfula ya mabwe ishalokelemo ni mu Gosheni umwaleikala abena Israeli.
Exodus9:27 Elyo Farao aitile Mose na Aroni aisa beba ati
Exodus9:28 Papateni kuli Yawe pantu ukupanta ne mfula ya mabwe fyatucusha pafula. Na ine ndemulekako muleya kabili tamwaikale kabili muno iyoo.”
Exodus9:29 Mose nao amweba ati
Exodus9:30 Lelo ninjishiba ukuti iwe na bacilolo bobe tamulati mukwate akatiina kakwa Yawe Lesa nakalya.”
Exodus9:31 Imfula yacitalawe iya mabwe yaonawile utumiti twa kolokondwe ne mbuto sha bale
Exodus9:32 Lelo iŋanu na masaka fyena tafyaonaike pantu tafipakula bwangu.
Exodus9:33 Elyo Mose afumine kuli Farao
Exodus9:34 Ilyo Farao amona ukuti imfula ya mabwe no kupanta fyaleka
Exodus9:35 Awe umutima wakwa Farao waumalala
Exodus10:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus10:2 Epakuti ukaleshimikilako abana bobe na beshikulu bobe ifyo nafulwile abena Egupto ilyo nalecita ifipeshamano uko bali
Exodus10:3 Kanshi Mose na Aroni baile kuli Farao bamweba abati
Exodus10:4 Nga wabalesha ukuti baleya
Exodus10:5 Makanta akakupafye ponse pa mushili icakuti no mushili tawakalemoneka. Akesa lya fyonse ifyapuswikeko ku mfula ya mabwe
Exodus10:6 Akesula mwisano lyobe na mu mayanda ya bacilolo bobe na mu mayanda ya bena Egupto bonse. Ici cena bashinwe ne fikolwe fyenu tabacimonapo apo baishile pesonde lino ukufika na lelo.’” Awe Mose apilibuka alaya asha Farao.
Exodus10:7 Bacilolo bakwa Farao bamweba abati
Exodus10:8 Elyo babweseshe Mose na Aroni kuli Farao
Exodus10:9 Mose ayasuka ati
Exodus10:10 Farao abatumfya ati
Exodus10:11 Awe iyoo! Abaumefye beka ebo baye kukupepa Yawe pantu efyo mwalelomba.” Awe batamfya Mose na Aroni ukufuma ku cinso cakwa Farao.
Exodus10:12 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus10:13 Awe Mose atambalikila inkonto pa calo ca Egupto. Yawe nao aimya umwela ku kabanga walapupa pa calo ca Egupto akasubafye konse no bushikufye bonse. Cilya buleca ulucelo ninshi umwela waleta makanta
Exodus10:14 akupafye icalo conse ca Egupto. Kabili makanta asalanganinefye mpanga yonse mu calo. Awe takwatalile akuba makanta uwafula ifi
Exodus10:15 Akupile pa mushili ponse pasuka pafiita na fititi. Alya fyonse ifyapuswike ku mfula ya mabwe. Alya fyonse ifyalepuka mu mabala ne fitwalo fya ku miti. Mu calo conse ca Egupto tamwashele ibula nelyo limo ku miti nangu ku fimena panshi fyonse.
Exodus10:16 Elyo Farao aitile Mose na Aroni bwangu bwangu
Exodus10:17 Mbeleleniko uluse uno winefye muku
Exodus10:18 Elyo Mose afuma pali Farao alapapata Yawe.
Exodus10:19 Yawe nao epakwalula umwela walapupa na maka nganshi ukufuma ku masamba. Awe waulula makanta onse no kumutwala muli Bemba Wakashika. Tamwashele makanta nelyo umo mu calo ca Egupto.
Exodus10:20 Lelo Yawe alengele umutima wakwa Farao ukumalala
Exodus10:21 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus10:22 Mose nao aimisha ukuboko kwakwe mu mulu
Exodus10:23 Abena Egupto balafilwa ukumona ababiye
Exodus10:24 Elyo Farao aitile Mose

Exodus11:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus11:2 Kanshi eba abena Israeli
Exodus11:3 Kabili Yawe alengele abena Egupto ukukwatila abena Israeli umucinshi. Mose nao ali umuntu mucindami nganshi mu calo ca Egupto
Exodus11:4 Elyo Mose aebele Farao ati
Exodus11:5 Amabeli yonse ayaume mu calo ca Egupto yalefwa. Ukutendekelafye pebeli lyakwa Farao
Exodus11:6 Kabili mu calo conse ica Egupto mukaba ukuloosha ukukalamba ukushatala akubamo kabili takwakatale akubamo.
Exodus11:7 Lelo mu bena Israeli mwena nangufye ni mbwa tayakabosele pa muntu nelyo umo nelyo pa citekwa.’ Elyo mukeshiba ukuti Yawe alalekanya pakati ka bena Egupto na bena Israeli.
Exodus11:8 Kabili bacilolo bobe bonse bakesa kuli ine no kumfukamina
Exodus11:9 Yawe aebele Mose ati

Exodus12:1 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni mu calo ca Egupto ati
Exodus12:2 “Uno mweshi ewakulaba kuli imwe uwakubalilapo
Exodus12:3 Mwebe ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli amuti
Exodus12:4 Aba mu ŋanda imo nga bacepa icakuti bafilwa ukupwa umwana wa mpaanga
Exodus12:5 Inama muli nokusala shili nokuba ishilume isha mwaka umo
Exodus12:6 Mukashisunge mpaka no bushiku ubwalenga ikumi na shine (14) ubwa uno mweshi. Elyo ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse lukashipaye lilya akasuba kaba kukuwa.
Exodus12:7 Elyo abantu bakabuulepo umulopa umo
Exodus12:8 Mu nshita ya bushiku bwine ubo bakoca inama pa mulilo no kuilila pamo ne mikate iyishatutumuka ne misalu iyalula.
Exodus12:9 Mwikalya inama iyibishi nangu iyaipikwa lelo mukalyefye yonse iyaocewa
Exodus12:10 Kabili mwikaleka nelyo cimo cikafike ku lucelo. Ifikashalapo fyonse ukufika ulucelo mukoce.
Exodus12:11 Kanshi ifi efyo muli nokulya iyi nama namupimpa insalu shenu mushifyantike mu mushipi
Exodus12:12 Pali bulya bwine ubushiku
Exodus12:13 Umulopa eukaba icishibilo cenu pa mayanda umo muli. Nkalacilila nga namona umulopa. Imwe icinkunka tacakamonaule ico nkaponesha pa bena Egupto.
Exodus12:14 “Mukaleibukisha ubu bushiku mu nkulo shenu shonse. Mukalebusefya nge nshikunkulu yakwa Yawe. Ili lifunde lyakubelelela.
Exodus12:15 Pa nshiku cine lubali mukalelya imikate iyabulamo intutumushi. Pa bushiku bwakubalilapo mukafumye intutumushi yonse mu mayanda yenu. Nga cakuti umo alya icilimo intutumushi mu nshiku ishi cine lubali
Exodus12:16 Mukakwata ukulongana kwamushilo pa bushiku bwakubalilapo elyo na pa bwalenga cine lubali. Mwikalabombamo umulimo nelyo umo muli ishi nshiku
Exodus12:17 Muli nokulasefya inshikunkulu ya Mikate Ishatutumuka pantu ni pali ubu bushiku nafumishe impuka shenu shonse mu calo ca Egupto. Mukalasefya ubu bushiku mu nkulo shenu shonse
Exodus12:18 Mu mweshi wakubalilapo
Exodus12:19 Muli ishi nshiku cine lubali
Exodus12:20 Mwikalya cintu nangu cimo umuli intutumushi. Konse uko muli
Exodus12:21 Elyo Mose aitile abakalamba bonse aba mu bena Israeli abeba ati
Exodus12:22 Mubuule utumisambo twa hisopo mutumpike mu mulopa uuli mu lunweno
Exodus12:23 Ilyo Yawe akalapita mu calo conse ica Egupto kukwipaya abena Egupto
Exodus12:24 Mukalebaka ifi fyonse mwebele nge funde lyakubelelela kuli imwe ne ndupwa shenu.
Exodus12:25 Nga mwafika mu calo Yawe alaya ukumupeela
Exodus12:26 Ilyo abana benu bakamwipusha abati
Exodus12:27 Mukalebeba mwati
Exodus12:28 Abena Israeli baya cita ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose na Aroni.
Exodus12:29 Pakati ka bushiku
Exodus12:30 Farao na bacilolo bakwe bonse na bena Egupto bonse balibukile ubushiku. Awe mwali misowa iyikalamba mu calo ca Egupto
Exodus12:31 Ilyo line ubushiku Farao aita Mose na Aroni abeba ati
Exodus12:32 Pamo ngefyo mwasosele
Exodus12:33 Abena Egupto balapamfya abena Israeli ukuti bafume mu calo bwangu bwangu abati
Exodus12:34 Kanshi abena Israeli babikile umufuba uwabulamo intutumushi mu fyakukashilamo
Exodus12:35 Kabili abena Israeli bacitile ifyo Mose abebele
Exodus12:36 Kabili Yawe alengele abena Egupto ukukwatila abena Israeli umucinshi
Exodus12:37 Abena Israeli baendele ukufuma ku Ramesesi
Exodus12:38 Kabili ibumba ilikalamba ilya bantu bambi lyaile nabo pamo ne fitekwa
Exodus12:39 Bapangile imikate iyishatutumuka ku mufuba untu bafumine nao mu Egupto. Mu mufuba tamwali ntutumushi iyoo
Exodus12:40 Inshita abena Israeli baikele mu calo ca Egupto yali imyaka imyanda ine na makumi yatatu (430).
Exodus12:41 Pali ubo bwine bushiku bwakupwa kwa myaka imyanda ine na makumi yatatu (430)
Exodus12:42 Pali ubo bushiku Yawe alolele bushiku bonse pakuti abafumye mu Egupto. Kanshi
Exodus12:43 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati
Exodus12:44 Lelo umusha onse uo washita kuti alyako nga cakuti walimusembulula.
Exodus12:45 Lelo umweni na uyo waingisha incito
Exodus12:46 Mufwile ukuliilafye inama yonse mu ŋanda imo
Exodus12:47 Ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse lukalesefya inshikunkulu ye Pasaka
Exodus12:48 Umwinafyalo onse uwaikala na imwe nga alefwaya ukulyako Ipasaka lyakucindika Yawe
Exodus12:49 Umwana calo no mweni mwikala nao bonse bali nokusunga ifunde limo line.”
Exodus12:50 Abena Israeli bonse bacitile fyonse ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose na Aroni.
Exodus12:51 Kabili muli bulya bwine bushiku Yawe afumishe abena Israeli bonse mu calo ca Egupto mu mpuka mu mpuka shabo.
Exodus13:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus13:2 “Usangulule ibeli lyonse ilyaume. Ibeli lyonse ilya mwifumo mu bena Israeli lyandi
Exodus13:3 Elyo Mose aebele abantu ati
Exodus13:4 Mu bushiku bwa lelo ubwa mu mweshi Abibu
Exodus13:5 Ilyo Yawe akamufisha mu calo ca bena Kenani
Exodus13:6 Mwikalalya mikate iyabamo intutumushi pa nshiku cine lubali. Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali epo mukalesefya inshikunkulu yakucindika Yawe.
Exodus13:7 Mukalelya imikate iyabulamo intutumushi pa nshiku cine lubali
Exodus13:8 Pali ubo bushiku ukebe umwana obe umwaume auti
Exodus13:9 Ukusefya iyi nshikunkulu kukaba kuli imwe kwati cishibilo ca pa kuboko kwenu nangu kwati cakwibukishishako pa mpumi shenu
Exodus13:10 Muli nokusunga ili funde cila mwaka pa nshita iyasontwa.”
Exodus13:11 “Ilyo Yawe akamufisha mu calo ca bena Kenani
Exodus13:12 mufwile mukaletuula na mabeli yonse kuli Yawe. Kabili amabeli yonse ayalume aya fitekwa fyenu yakwa Yawe.
Exodus13:13 Pebeli lyonse ilyakwa punda
Exodus13:14 Nomba mu nshiku sha kuntanshi ngo mwana obe umwaume akwipusha umo cilolele
Exodus13:15 Ilyo Farao akaanininefye ukuleka fwe bena Israeli ukuti tuye
Exodus13:16 Ukusefya iyi nshikunkulu kukaba kuli imwe kwati cishibilo ca pa kuboko nangu icakukakila pa mpumi shenu. Pantu Yawe ewamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto no kuboko kwakwe ukwamaka.”
Exodus13:17 Ilyo Farao alekele abena Israeli ukuti baleya
Exodus13:18 Eico Lesa atungulwile abantu mu nshila iyashokela mu matololo ukulola kuli Bemba Wakashika. Abena Israeli bali abaipangasha ku bulwi ilyo bafumine mu calo ca Egupto.
Exodus13:19 Mose alisendele amafupa yakwa Yosefu. Pantu Yosefu alengele abana bakwa Israeli ukulapa umulapo. Abebele ati
Exodus13:20 Abena Israeli bafumine ku Sukoti
Exodus13:21 Mu nshita ya kasuba Yawe alebatangilila mu ntumba ye kumbi pakubalanga inshila. Mu nshita ya bushiku alebatangilila mu lubingu lwa mulilo pakubasanikila pakuti baleenda akasuba no bushiku.
Exodus13:22 Intumba ye kumbi akasuba nelyo ulubingu lwa mulilo ubushiku

Exodus14:2 “Eba abena Israeli ukuti babwelelemo bacite inkambi ukulungatana na Pi Hairoti
Exodus14:3 Farao akatontonkanya ukuti abena Israeli balelulumbafye mu calo
Exodus14:4 Nkalenga umutima wakwa Farao ukumalala
Exodus14:5 Nomba ilyo baebele imfumu ya calo ca Egupto ukuti abena Israeli nabafyuka
Exodus14:6 Kanshi Farao epakupekanya iceleta lyakwe
Exodus14:7 Asendele amaceleta ayawamisha imyanda mutanda (600) na maceleta yonsefye aya mu Egupto
Exodus14:8 Yawe alenga umutima wakwa Farao ukumalala
Exodus14:9 Abena Egupto emukutila bakabalwe bonse abakwa Farao
Exodus14:10 Ilyo Farao apaleme
Exodus14:11 Balailishanya kuli Mose abati
Exodus14:12 Bushe tatwakwebele ilyo twali mu Egupto ukuti utulekefye tulebombela abena Egupto? Ifwe cawamishapo ukubombela abena Egupto ukucila ukufwila muno mu matololo.”
Exodus14:13 Mose nao ayasuka abantu ati
Exodus14:14 Yawe ewalamulwishishako. Imwe mwikalefye.”
Exodus14:15 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus14:16 Imya inkonto yobe
Exodus14:17 Na ine ndelenga imitima ya bena Egupto ukumalala nabo bengilemo kukubasupila pakuti babakonke panuma. Kabili na ine ndeilenga ukucindama pakucimfya Farao ne fita fyakwe fyonse
Exodus14:18 Nga nailanga ukucindama pakucimfya Farao
Exodus14:19 Elyo malaika wakwa Lesa uwaletungulula ifita fya bena Israeli afumine kuntanshi no kuselela kunuma. Kabili ne ntumba ye kumbi nayo yafuma kuntanshi yaselela kunuma
Exodus14:20 yaisa ba pakati ka fita fya bena Egupto ne fita fya bena Israeli. Ubushiku bonse yaletele mfifi
Exodus14:21 Elyo Mose atambalikile ukuboko kwakwe pali bemba. Yawe alenga umwela wa ku kabanga uwakosa ukupupila pali bemba ubushiku bonse. No mwela waseshapo amenshi
Exodus14:22 Kanshi na bena Israeli epakupita muli bemba pa mushili uwauma. Amenshi yali kwati cibumba ku kulyo na ku kuso kwabo.
Exodus14:23 Abena Egupto pamo na bakabalwe bakwa Farao
Exodus14:24 Cilya bwalaya kukuca Yawe
Exodus14:25 Yawe alengele imipeto ya maceleta yabo ukukanaenda bwino
Exodus14:26 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus14:27 Mose atambalikila ukuboko kwakwe pali bemba. Kabili cilya cabafye ku macaca
Exodus14:28 Amenshi yabwela umo yalepita
Exodus14:29 Lelo abena Israeli bena bapitile muli bemba pa mushili uwauma
Exodus14:30 Muli ubo bushiku Yawe apuswishe abena Israeli mu minwe ya bena Egupto. Na bena Israeli bamwene ifitumbi fya bena Egupto mu lulamba lwa bemba.
Exodus14:31 Abena Israeli pakumona ifyo Yawe akwatisha amaka yantu alangile pakucimfya abena Egupto

Exodus15:2 Yawe e maka yandi
Exodus15:3 Yawe cita ca bulwi
Exodus15:4 “Yawe naposa muli bemba amaceleta yakwa Farao ne fita fyakwe
Exodus15:5 Amatenga ayashika nayabebisha. Bebile panshi ya matenga kwati libwe.
Exodus15:6 “We Yawe ukuboko kobe kwa ku kulyo maka ayakupapisha
Exodus15:7 Ku kucindamisha kobe eko ucimfisha abalwani bobe
Exodus15:8 Wafumya umupu mu myona yobe na menshi yatuntumana
Exodus15:9 Umulwani epakutila
Exodus15:10 Lelo
Exodus15:11 Nani
Exodus15:12 Watambalike ukuboko kobe kwa ku kulyo no mushili wabamina.
Exodus15:13 Ku citemwiko cobe icishipwa watangilila abantu abo walubula. Ku maka yobe ubatungulula ku cifulo cobe icamushilo.
Exodus15:14 Imitundu ya bantu yaumfwa
Exodus15:15 Imfumu sha bena Edomu shatiina nganshi. Intungulushi sha bena Moabu shalakankafye ku mwenso. Abena Kenani bafwa umutombo ku mwenso.
Exodus15:16 Baikatwa no mwenso uukalamba no kutiinisha nganshi. Ku maka ya kuboko kobe babafye tondolo nge libwe
Exodus15:17 Ulebengishamo nokuleka bekale pa lupili lobe
Exodus15:18 We Yawe ukateeka imyaka ne myaka pe.”
Exodus15:19 Abena Israeli bapitile muli bemba pa mushili uwauma. Lelo Yawe abweseshe amenshi no kwibisha bakabalwe bakwa Farao na maceleta ne fita fya pali bakabalwe ilyo baile muli bemba.

Exodus15:21 Miriamu asamuna no lwimbo ati

Exodus15:23 Ilyo bafikile ku Mara

Exodus15:26 Abebele ati

Exodus16:2 Awe

Exodus16:5 Pa bushiku bwalenga mutanda pena bakalelonganika ifyakulya fya nshiku shibili.”

Exodus16:7 Mailo ulucelo mukamona ubucindami bwakwa Yawe

Exodus25:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus25:2 “Eba abena Israeli bansangwile umusangulo. Umpokele umusangulo ku muntu onse uyo uuli no mutima wakupeela.
Exodus25:3 Uyu e musangulo ufwile ukumpokela kuli bena: ni golide
Exodus25:4 no bushishi ubwacifufya
Exodus25:5 ne mpapa sha basukusuku ishatumpwa mu muti uwakashika
Exodus25:6 na mafuta ya miolifa ayakusanika mu cisaniko
Exodus25:7 no tumabwe twa onikisi
Exodus25:8 Kabili bakapange icifulo camushilo pakuti ndeikala nabo.
Exodus25:9 Mukapange Itenti lyakwa Lesa ne fipe fyaliko ukulingana nefyo nkakulanga.”
Exodus25:10 Bakapange Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ku cimuti ca akasia. Mubutali ikalepe amakubiti yabili na citika
Exodus25:11 Ukalambatike golide wine wine mukati na kunse ya mbokoshi kabili ukabikeko no mushingo wa golide ukushinguluka.
Exodus25:12 Ukapange imikobelo ine kuli golide uwalopolwa
Exodus25:13 Elyo ukabase ifimuti fyakupingilako ku cimuti ca akasia
Exodus25:14 Ukapishe ifimuti fyakupingilako mu mikobelo ya ku mbali ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano pakupingilako Imbokoshi.
Exodus25:15 Ifimuti fyakupingilako fikaleba mu mikobelo ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano
Exodus25:16 Mu Mbokoshi ukabikemo amabwe yabili ayapapatala apalembwa icipangano nkakupeela.
Exodus25:17 “Ukapangilepo ne Nkupiko ya golide wine wine
Exodus25:18 Ukafulilepo na bamalaika babili aba golide abetwa bakerubi ku mpela shonse shibili sha nkupiko.
Exodus25:19 Ukapangilepo kerubi ku mpela imo
Exodus25:20 Bakerubi bakabe na mapindo ayayansa ukulola mumulu ayacinga pa Nkupiko. Bakerubi bakaloshanye amenso
Exodus25:21 Mu Mbokoshi ya Cipangano ukabikemo amabwe ya cipangano yabili ayapapatala ayo nkakupeela
Exodus25:22 Palya pene pa Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi
Exodus25:23 “Ukapange itebulo ku cimuti ca akasia. Mubutali likabe amakubiti yabili
Exodus25:24 Ukalambatikeko na golide wine wine kabili ukabikeko no mushingo wa golide ukushinguluka.
Exodus25:25 Mu mpela ye tebulo ukashingulushemo imbao ishapapatala mubufumo ngo lupi lwa muntu. Ku mbao ukashingulusheko umushingo wa golide.
Exodus25:26 Kabili ukapange imikobelo ya golide ine
Exodus25:27 Imikobelo yakupishamo ifimuti fyakupingilako itebulo ilingile ukubela mupepi ne mbao yapapatala.
Exodus25:28 Ukabase ifimuti fyakupingilako itebulo ku cimuti ca akasia
Exodus25:29 Ukapangilepo ne mbale elyo ne misambilo
Exodus25:30 Ukalebika imikate yakuba pa cinso candi pali ili tebulo pakuti ikaleba pa cinso candi inshita yonse.”
Exodus25:31 “Ukapange icakutekapo ifisaniko ica golide wine wine. Icikalilo caciko pamo no mukonso waciko ukafifule ku nondo. Tukapu utwapala amaluba ya alumondi
Exodus25:32 Mu cakutekapo ifisaniko mukafuma imisambo mutanda
Exodus25:33 Ku musambo umo kuli nokuba tukapu tutatu utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line. Elyo na pa musambo wakonkapo ukacita ifyo fine. Kabili na ku misambo mutanda iya cakutekapo ifisaniko napo ukacite ifyo fine.
Exodus25:34 Pa cakutekapo ifisaniko pali nokuba tukapu tune utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line.
Exodus25:35 Kabili ifitutu fye luba limo fili nokuba mwisamba lya misambo ibili iyapakubala
Exodus25:36 Ifitutu ne misambo fili nokuba icintu cimofye ne cakutekapo ifisaniko ifyo bafula ku nondo ukufuma kuli golide wine wine.
Exodus25:37 Kabili ukapange ifisaniko cine lubali no kufibika pa cakutekapo ifisaniko pakuti fikalesanikila lwa pantanshi.
Exodus25:38 Ukapange ifyakushimishako nangu ukukushishako ulubuuto pamo no tubale utwasenama kuli golide wine wine.
Exodus25:39 Ukabomfye golide wine wine uwe talanta limo pakupanga icakutekapo ifisaniko ne fibombelo fyaciko fyonse.
Exodus25:40 Kabili mona ukafipange ukulingana nefyo nakulangile pa lupili.”
Exodus26:1 “Ukapange Itenti lyakwa Lesa ku nsalu ikumi limo ishabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka no bushishi bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee. Kabili pali isho nsalu ukapikwilepo bakerubi ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi ukupikula.
Exodus26:2 Insalu shonse shikalingane mubutali na mubwipi. Mubutali shikabe amakubiti amakumi yabili na cine konse konse (28) elyo mubwipi namo amakubiti yane.
Exodus26:3 Ukalundinkanye insalu shisano elyo na shimbi shisano nasho shine ukashilundinkanye.
Exodus26:4 Ku mpela ya nsalu ubalilepo ukulundinkanya ukabikeko imikobelo yacifufya konse konse mumbali yafiko lwa mubwipi
Exodus26:5 Ku nsalu wacibalilapo ukulundinkanya ukabikeko imikobelo amakumi yasano (50)
Exodus26:6 Elyo ukapanga no twakukofyamo twa golide amakumi yasano pakulunda ifyo fipande fibili
Exodus26:7 “Kabili ukapikule insalu ikumi na imo (11) ku masako ya mbushi ishakufimba kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus26:8 Insalu shonse ikumi na imo (11) shikabe ishalingana mubutali na mubwipi. Mubutali shikabe amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30) elyo mubwipi namo amakubiti yane.
Exodus26:9 Ukalundinkanye insalu shisano shikabe cimo
Exodus26:10 Ukabike imikobelo amakumi yasano (50) ku mpela ya nsalu ulundinkenye
Exodus26:11 Kabili ukapange utwakukofyamo utwa mukuba amakumi yasano (50) pakulunda Itenti lyakwa Lesa ukuba icintu cimofye.
Exodus26:12 Icipande pakati ica nsalu she Tenti ishikalepapo cena ukacikopwele panuma ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus26:13 Kabili insalu she Tenti mu mbali shonse shikapulako kubiti umo
Exodus26:14 Ukapange icakufimba pe Tenti ku mpapa sha basukusuku
Exodus26:15 “Ukapange impanda sha cimuti ca akasia ishakwimikilako Itenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus26:16 Cila lupanda luli nokulepa amakubiti ikumi limo elyo mubufumo namo kubiti umo na citika.
Exodus26:17 Ku mpela ya cila lupanda ukabaseko utuntu tubili utwakulundinkanishishako ku lupanda lunankwe. Ifi efyo uli nokupanga impanda shonse isha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus26:18 Ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa ukapangileko impanda amakumi yabili (20).
Exodus26:19 Kabili ukapange utwakwimikamo impanda amakumi yane (40) utwa silifa
Exodus26:20 Ku lubali lubiye ku kapinda ka ku kuso ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa ukapangileko impanda amakumi yabili (20)
Exodus26:21 elyo no twakwimikamo impanda utwa silifa amakumi yane (40)
Exodus26:22 Ku numa ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa lwa ku masamba ukapangileko impanda mutanda
Exodus26:23 elyo mu matungi ya kunuma yabili aye Tenti lyakwa Lesa ukapangilemo impanda shibili.
Exodus26:24 Impanda sha mu matungi aya yabili shikabe shapapikana ukufuma panshi ukufika na pamulu pa mukobelo umo uwakushikasha. Efyo impanda sha mu matungi yonse yabili shikabe.
Exodus26:25 Kanshi kukaba ne mpanda cine konse konse
Exodus26:26 “Kabili ukapange imyalo ku cimuti ca akasia. Isano ikabe ya ku lubali lumo ku mpanda sha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus26:27 Imyalo imbi isano ikabe ku mpanda sha ku lubali lubiye
Exodus26:28 Umwalo wa pakati ka mpanda uli nokufuma ku lutwe lumo ukufika ku lubiye.
Exodus26:29 Ku mpanda ukalambatikeko golide
Exodus26:30 Ukapange Itenti lyakwa Lesa nga fintu nakulangile pa lupili.
Exodus26:31 “Ukapange icisalu ku nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka na ku bushishi bwacifufya
Exodus26:32 Ukakobeke ico cisalu ku mikofyo ya golide ku nceshi sha fimuti fya akasia ifyalambatikwako na golide. Kabili ukashimike mu twakushimikamo utwa silifa tune.
Exodus26:33 Ukakobeke ico cisalu ku mikofyo
Exodus26:34 Pa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano ukabikepo Inkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi. Iyi Mbokoshi ikabe mu Muputule wamushilo icine cine.
Exodus26:35 Ukabike itebulo kunse ya cisalu lubali lwa ku kapinda ka kuso ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa
Exodus26:36 “Pa mwinshi wakwingililapo mwi Tenti ukapangilepo icisalu ku nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka na ku bushishi bwacifufya
Exodus26:37 Ukapange ne mikofyo ya ku cisalu iya golide
Exodus27:1 “Ukapange ubulambo ku cimuti ca akasia. Bukabe ubwalingana mubutali na mubufumo. Bukabe amakubiti yasano mubutali na mubufumo
Exodus27:2 Ku matungi yane aya bulambo ukabikeko cile tungi ulusengo lumo
Exodus27:3 Ukapange ifyakubomfya ku bulambo fyonse ku mukuba. Inongo shakukushilapo imito ya mafuta
Exodus27:4 Ukapangilepo ica mukuba icafipunda ngo lunyungo. Ukapange ne mikobelo ya mukuba ine iyakwikasha ku matungi ya capikulwa.
Exodus27:5 Kabili ukabike icafipunda ngo lunyungo pesamba lye tabo lya bulambo pakuti cikafike pakati.
Exodus27:6 Ukabase ifimuti fya akasia ifyakupingilako ubulambo
Exodus27:7 Ukalepisha ifyo fimuti fyakupingilako mu mikobelo ya ku mbali shibili sha bulambo pakubusenda.
Exodus27:8 Ukapange ubulambo bwa mbao ubwacenama pamulu nga fintu nakulangile pa lupili.”
Exodus27:9 “Ukabikeko ulupango ku lubansa lwa kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa. Ulubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo lukabe amakubiti umwanda umo (100) mubutali
Exodus27:10 Kukabe ne nceshi amakumi yabili isha mukuba ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba amakumi yabili (20)
Exodus27:11 Ulubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso nako kwine lukabe amakubiti umwanda umo (100) mubutali
Exodus27:12 Ulubali lwa ku masamba ya lupango lwa lubansa lukabe amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) mubwipi
Exodus27:13 Lwa ku kabanga ukutulila akasuba ulupango lwa lubansa lukabe amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) mubwipi.
Exodus27:14 Ku lubali lumo ulwa pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa kukaba ne nsalu yakukupako iyalepa amakubiti ikumi limo na yasano (15). Kukabe ne nceshi shitatu ne fyakushimikamo nafyo fitatu.
Exodus27:15 Kabili ku lubali lubiye nako kwine kukabe inceshi shitatu ne fyakushimikamo nafyo fitatu ne nsalu yakukupako ilyalepa amakubiti ikumi limo na yasano (15).
Exodus27:16 Pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa ukabikepo icisalu icalepa amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) icabuuta ubusaka icapikulwa ku bushishi bwacifufya
Exodus27:17 Inceshi sha lupango lwa lubansa shonse shikakwate utufyela twa ku nceshi utwa silifa ne mikobelo ya silifa elyo ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba.
Exodus27:18 Ulupango lwa lubansa lukabe amakubiti umwanda umo (100) mubutali
Exodus27:19 Ifipe fyonse ifyakubomfya mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa ku milimo iyalekana lekana yonse fikabe ifya mukuba
Exodus27:20 “Ukakonkomeshe abena Israeli ukuleta amafuta ya miolifa ayalengama ayakusanika pakuti ifisaniko fikaleyakafye lyonse.
Exodus27:21 Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bakabike ifisaniko mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Exodus28:1 “Leka bakuletele munonko Aroni na bana bakwe abaume Nadabu
Exodus28:2 Ukabilile munonko Aroni ifyakufwala fyamushilo ifyakumucindamika no kumuyemfya.
Exodus28:3 Ukebe abacenjela ukubila ifyakufwala bonse abo napeela amano yakubomba uyu mulimo ukuti bakabilile Aroni ifyakufwala pakumutuula pakuti alemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo.
Exodus28:4 Ifi efyo bakamubilile: tumba wakufwala pa cifuba
Exodus28:5 Abacenjela muli uyu mulimo bakabomfye ubushishi bwa golide no bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee ne nsalu iyabuuta ubusaka.”
Exodus28:6 “Bakabile efodi icakufwala pa mulu wa mwingila wakwa shimapepo ku bushishi bwa golide no bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee elyo ne nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi ukupikula.
Exodus28:7 Cikabe ne mikobelo ku mpela shibili iyakupisha pa mabeya pakucikaka.
Exodus28:8 Umushipi ukabe nga efodi uwapikulwa ubusaka ku bushishi bwa golide no bwacifufya
Exodus28:9 Ukabuule amabwe ya onikisi yabili
Exodus28:10 Ukayafukule ukulingana nomo bakonkanine mukufyalwa
Exodus28:11 Nga filya uwakufukula pa mabwe afukula ifilembo pa cifwatiko efyo na iwe ukafukule
Exodus28:12 Elyo ukekashe aya mabwe pa mishipi ya pa mabeya ya cakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi
Exodus28:13 Kabili ukapange utwapikulwa na waya ya golide
Exodus28:14 ne minyololo ibili iya golide wine wine iyakoswa ngo mwando
Exodus28:15 “Ukabile tumba wa pa cifuba uwakwishibilako pakupingula. Umuntu uwacenjela nganshi eo akapikule. Tumba akabe nga efodi uwapikulwa ku bushishi ubwa golide no bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee elyo ne nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka.
Exodus28:16 Tumba nga apetwa pakati akalingana ukulepa monse mubutali na mubwipi
Exodus28:17 Ukekashepo utumabwe twamutengo imitande ine. Mu mutande wantanshi muli nokuba akalibwe ka rubi na ka topasi na ka bereli
Exodus28:18 Mu mutande wabubili muli nokuba akalibwe ka tokisi na ka safile na ka emeradi.
Exodus28:19 Mu mutande wabutatu muli nokuba akalibwe ka yasinti na ka agate na ka amefisiti
Exodus28:20 na mutande wabune muli nokuba akalibwe ka kirisaliti na ka onikisi na ka yasipeli. Uto tumabwe ukatubikeko no twapikulwa na waya ya golide.
Exodus28:21 Utumabwe tukabe ikumi na tubili (12). Pali cila kalibwe pakabe ishina lyakwa mwana Israeli limo
Exodus28:22 Ukapange utuminyololo twa golide wine wine utwapyatwa ngo mwando utwa kuli tumba wa pa cifuba.
Exodus28:23 Kabili ukapangileko imikobelo ibili iya golide elyo ukaikashe ku mpela shibili isha tumba wa pa cifuba.
Exodus28:24 Elyo ukakakile uto tuminyololo twa golide tubili ku mikobelo ya ku mpela sha tumba wa pa cifuba.
Exodus28:25 Impela shimbi shibili isha tuminyololo ukashikakile ku fyapikulwa na waya ya golide. Kabili ukashikakile lwa pantanshi ku mishipi ibili iya pa mabeya ya cakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi.
Exodus28:26 Elyo ukapange imikobelo ya golide ibili. Ukaikashe na ku mpela shibili ishabela lwa mukati ka tumba mupepi ne cakufwala ca efodi.
Exodus28:27 Ukapange imikobelo ya golide na imbi ibili. Ukaikashe mwisamba lya mishipi ibili iya pa mabeya iyabela pantanshi ya efodi
Exodus28:28 Ukakakile imikobelo ya tumba wa pa cifuba ku mikobelo ya efodi no mwando wa bushishi ubwacifufya ukulundinkanya na tumba wa pa cifuba
Exodus28:29 “Ilyo lyonse Aroni akalaingila mu Muputule wamushilo
Exodus28:30 Muli tumba wa pa cifuba uwakwishibilako pakupingula ukabikemo Urimu na Tumimu
Exodus28:31 “Ukabile umwingila wakufwala mukati ka efodi ku nsalu yacifufyafye.
Exodus28:32 Mu mwingila ukashemo icipunda icakupishamo umutwe. Pa cipunda apakupisha umutwe ukapikulepo ukushinguluka pakulesha umwingila ukulepuka.
Exodus28:33 Ku mufukilo wa mwingila ukapikwilemo ifitwalo ifyapala amateke ku bushishi bwacifufya no bwakashikila elyo no bwakashika cee. Pakati ka fitwalo ifyapala mateke ukekashepo utunyenjele twa golide.
Exodus28:34 Ukafikonkanye ukushinguluka umufukilo wa mwingila onse utunyenjele twa golide ne teke ifyo fine.
Exodus28:35 “Aroni akalefwala umwingila uyu pakubomba umulimo wa bushimapepo. Ukulila kwa tunyenjele kukalaumfwika nga aingila mu Muputule wamushilo pa cinso cakwa Yawe na pakufumamo
Exodus28:36 “Ukapange akalilata ka golide wine wine
Exodus28:37 Ukakakakilile akatambo kacifufya ku nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe. Kakalebela lwa pa mpumi ku nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe.
Exodus28:38 Kakalebela pa mpumi yakwa Aroni
Exodus28:39 “Ukapikule ilaya ku bushishi ubwabuuta ubusaka
Exodus28:40 “Bamwana Aroni nabo ukababilile imingila
Exodus28:41 Ilyo ukapwisha ukufwika munonko Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ifyo fyakufwala
Exodus28:42 Kabili ukababilile bakaputula ba mukati aba nsalu ishabuuta abakufuma mu musana ukufika na mu matanta pakuti bekalashala ubwamba.
Exodus28:43 Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bakalefwala bakaputula ilyo lyonse balaingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo nangu ilyo balapalama ku bulambo kukubomba umulimo wa bushimapepo mu Muputule wamushilo
Exodus29:1 “Ifi efyo uli nokucita kuli Aroni na bana bakwe abaume pakubasangulula pakuti bakalemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo. Ukabuule iciponti na basukusuku babili ababula akalema.
Exodus29:2 Kabili ku bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ukapangeko imikate iyabulamo intutumushi. Elyo ukapangeko utumikate utwasakanishiwamo na mafuta
Exodus29:3 Ukaibike mu museke no kuletela pamo ne ciponti na basukusuku babili.
Exodus29:4 “Elyo ukalete Aroni na bana bakwe abaume pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kubasamba na menshi.
Exodus29:5 Ukabuule ne fyakufwala
Exodus29:6 Ukamupombe ne nsalu ya ku mutwe
Exodus29:7 Ukabuule amafuta yakumusuba pakuba shimapepo
Exodus29:8 “Ukalete na bana bakwe abaume
Exodus29:9 Kabili ukabafwike amalamba ya mu musana no kubapomba insalu ku mitwe. Bushimapepo bwabo bukaba ukukonkana umwabela ifunde lyakubelelela. Muli uyo musango emo ukapeelela Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bushimapepo.
Exodus29:10 “Ukalete ne ciponti pa ntanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Exodus29:11 Mukacipaile pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa mwinshi wakwingilila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Exodus29:12 Ukabuule umulopa umo uwa ciponti icilume ukaushinge ku nsengo sha bulambo ku munwe. Umulopa ukashalapo onse ukawitile mwisamba lya bulambo.
Exodus29:13 Elyo ukabuule amafuta ayaba ku fya munda
Exodus29:14 Lelo umunofu wa ciponti icilume
Exodus29:15 “Ukabuulepo sukusuku umo
Exodus29:16 Elyo ukamwipaye
Exodus29:17 Ukaputaule sukusuku fipimfya fipimfya
Exodus29:18 Elyo ukoce sukusuku onse pa bulambo. Ili e lambo ilyakocela Yawe
Exodus29:19 “Ukabuule sukusuku na umbi
Exodus29:20 Ukamwipaye
Exodus29:21 Elyo ukabuulepo umulopa umo uuli pa bulambo
Exodus29:22 “Kabili kuli sukusuku uyu ukabuuleko amafuta
Exodus29:23 Mu museke wa mikate iyabulamo intutumushi iyili pa cinso cakwa Yawe ukabuulemo umukate umo na kamukate kamo akasakanishiwamo amafuta elyo na kamukate akapapatala.
Exodus29:24 Ifyakulya fyonse ifyo ukafibike mu minwe yakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume
Exodus29:25 Elyo kabili ukafibuule mu minwe
Exodus29:26 “Ukabuule icisao cakwa sukusuku uo ukepaya pakupeela Aroni bushimapepo
Exodus29:27 Ukasangulule icisao no mwendo ifyakwa sukusuku ifikemishiwa mumulu ngo mutuulo wakutambika pakupeela bushimapepo
Exodus29:28 Ifi e fipande fili nokuba icakaniko cakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ifyo bali nokulapoka lyonse ku bena Israeli. E bupe ubukalafuma ku bena Israeli pafyo bakalatuula kuli Yawe
Exodus29:29 “Aroni nga afwa
Exodus29:30 Umwana uwamupyana pali bushimapepo
Exodus29:31 “Ukabuule inama ya sukusuku iyakupeelelapo bushimapepo no kuipikila mu cifulo camushilo.
Exodus29:32 Aroni na bana bakwe bakalile inama ya sukusuku pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pamo no mukate ukaba mu museke.
Exodus29:33 Bakalye ifyo fintu babomfeshe pakufuta pa bubifi bwabo ilyo balepeelwa amaka ya bushimapepo kabili no kusangululwa. Umuntu umbi nelyo umo tafwile kulyako kuli ifi pantu fyamushilo.
Exodus29:34 Lelo nga cakuti inama ya sukusuku iyakupeelelapo bushimapepo nangu umukate fyashalapo ukufika ulucelo
Exodus29:35 “Ukabombe umulimo wakupeela Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bushimapepo ukulingana ngefyo nakukonkomesha. Ukubapeela bushimapepo kukapwe inshiku cine lubali.
Exodus29:36 Cila bushiku ukaleleka cilume wa ŋombe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi pakufuta pa fyabubifi. Ukasangulule ubulambo ku mutuulo wa pa bubifi pakufuta pa fyabubifi. Kabili ukabusube amafuta pakubutuula.
Exodus29:37 Pa nshiku cine lubali ukaleleka pa bulambo ilambo lyakufuta pa fyabubifi no kubusangulula. Elyo ubulambo bukaba ubwamushilo nganshi
Exodus29:38 “Ifi efyo uli nokutuula pa bulambo cila bushiku
Exodus29:39 Ukaletuula umwana wa mpaanga umo ulucelo elyo umbi nao icungulo.
Exodus29:40 Pakutuula umwana wa mpaanga uwakubalilapo
Exodus29:41 Ukaletuula ilambo lya mwana wa mpaanga uwabubili icungulo mu musango umo wine ngo lucelo pamo no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. E lambo lyakocela Yawe ilya cena cisuma icimusekesha.
Exodus29:42 Mu nkulo shenu shonse mukaleleka ili lambo lyakoca inshita yonse pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Apopene epo ine nkalamukumanya no kulalanda na imwe.
Exodus29:43 Apo pene kabili epo nkalakumanya abena Israeli
Exodus29:44 Nkalenga Itenti Lyakukumaninamo pamo pene no bulambo ukuba ifyamushilo kabili nkalenga Aroni na bana bakwe ukuba abamushilo
Exodus29:45 Elyo nkacita icifulo candi pakati ka bena Israeli kabili nkaba Lesa wabo.
Exodus29:46 Bakeshiba nokuti nine Yawe
Exodus30:1 “Ukapange ubulambo bwakocelapo ububani ku mbao sha cimuti ca akasia.
Exodus30:2 Ubulambo bufwile ukuba ubwalingana monse monse mubutali na mubwipi kubiti umo
Exodus30:3 Ukalambatikeko pamulu ponse
Exodus30:4 Ukapangileko ne mikobelo ya golide ibili iyakusendelako. Pesamba lya mushingo ku mbali shibili isha bulambo ishalolenkana
Exodus30:5 Ukabase ifimuti fyakupingilako ku muti wa akasia
Exodus30:6 Ukabike ubo bulambo pa ntanshi ya cisalu cakucinga ukuli Mbokoshi ya Cipangano
Exodus30:7 Inshiku shonse ulucelo Aroni afwile akaleoca pa bulambo ububani ubwanunka ubusaka
Exodus30:8 Kabili afwile akaleoca ububani ubwanunka ubusaka na mu cungulo
Exodus30:9 Tekwesha ukocelapo pali buno bulambo ububani ubwaleshiwa nangu ilambo lyakoca nangu umutuulo wa cabunga. Kabili tekwesha ukwitilapo mutuulo onse uwa fyakunwa.
Exodus30:10 Umuku umo cila mwaka Aroni akalefutila pa nsengo sha bulambo. Uku kufuta pa fyabubifi ukwa cila mwaka kufwile ukucitwa no mulopa wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi ku nkulo shonse ishikakonkapo. Ubu bulambo bwamushilo nganshi kuli Yawe.”
Exodus30:11 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus30:12 “Ilyo ukalapenda abena Israeli pakwishiba impendwa yabo
Exodus30:13 Umuntu onse uwapitila ku bapendelwe afwile ukupeela citika wa ndalama ya shekeli iyapimwa ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Shekeli imo yafina amagera amakumi yabili. Citika wa iyi ndalama
Exodus30:14 Uyo onse uwapitila ku bapendelwe uuli ne myaka amakumi yabili nangu ukucilapo
Exodus30:15 Umukankala tali nakupeela ukucisha pa cipimo ca citika wa shekeli
Exodus30:16 Ukapoke isho ndalama ku bena Israeli ishakufuta pa fyabubifi
Exodus30:17 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus30:18 “Ukapange umusambilo wa mukuba elyo ne cakutekapo ica mukuba umwakusambila. Ukaciteke pakati ke Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no bulambo
Exodus30:19 Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bakalesamba muli aya menshi ku maboko na ku makasa.
Exodus30:20 Bakalesamba aya menshi ilyo lyonse balaingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo nelyo balapalamina ku bulambo kukubomba umulimo wakupeela umutuulo wakoca kuli Yawe
Exodus30:21 Bakalesamba amaboko na makasa pakuti bekafwa. Ili likaba e funde lyakubelelela kuli Aroni na ba lupwa lwakwe ku nkulo shabo shonse ishikakonkapo.”
Exodus30:22 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus30:23 “Ukabuule ifi ifyakwata akacena kasuma: muri wa menshi uwafina amakilo mutanda (6kg)
Exodus30:24 elyo na kasia uwafina amakilo mutanda. Fyonse fikafine ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Elyo kabili na mafuta ya miolifa icipimo ca hini umo.
Exodus30:25 Kuli ifyo ukapangeko amafuta yamushilo ayakusuba ayasakanishiwa ubusaka no muntu wacenjela ukusakanya ifyanunka ubusaka. Yakaba mafuta ayamushilo ayakusuba.
Exodus30:26 Elyo mukaleyabomfya mukusuba Itenti Lyakukumaninamo
Exodus30:27 itebulo ne fibombelo fyaliko fyonse
Exodus30:28 ubulambo bwakocelapo amalambo pamo pene ne fibombelo fyabuko fyonse
Exodus30:29 Ukafisangulule
Exodus30:30 Ukasube Aroni na bana bakwe abaume amafuta no kubasangulula pakuti bakalemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo.
Exodus30:31 Ukebe abena Israeli auti
Exodus30:32 Tekwesha ukuyetila pa mubili wa muntu kabili tekwesha ukupanga amafuta ayapalako ayasakanishiwamo ne fintu fimo fine mu musango umo wine. Yena mafuta yamushilo
Exodus30:33 Onse uyo uukapanga amafuta ayapala nga aya
Exodus30:34 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus30:35 Ifi efyo ukafisakanye. Ukapangemo ububani nga filya ficita umuntu uwacenjela ukusakanya ifyanunka ubusaka. Mu bubani ukabikemo umucele
Exodus30:36 Ukabuulepo ububani bumo ukabupele ngo bunga
Exodus30:37 Tekwesha ukupanga ububani bwenu ubwapalako ubwasakanishiwamo ne fintu fimo fine mu musango umo wine. Bwena mukabucite ububani bwamushilo kuli Yawe.
Exodus30:38 Onse uyo uukapanga ububani ubwapala nga bulya

Exodus31:2 “Mona ninsala Besaleli mwana Uri
Exodus31:3 Nimwisushamo Umupashi wakwa Lesa kabili nimupeela ukucenjela
Exodus31:4 Akalaelenganya bwino mukupanga ifya golide ne fya silifa ne fya mukuba
Exodus31:5 ukuputula amabwe no kuyekasha
Exodus31:6 Kabili ninsonta na Oliabu umwana mwaume wakwa Aisamaki uwa mu luko lwakwa Dani
Exodus31:7 Bali nokupanga Itenti Lyakukumaninamo

Exodus31:9 ubulambo bwakocelapo amalambo yakoca ne fibombelo fyabuko
Exodus31:10 Elyo kabili bakapikule ifyakufwala ifyamushilo fyakwa Aroni shimapepo ne fya bana bakwe abaume fintu bakalafwala nga balabomba umulimo wa bushimapepo.
Exodus31:11 Bakapange na mafuta yakusuba no bubani ubwanunka ubusaka ubwa mu Muputule wamushilo. Ifi fyonse bakafipange ukulingana nomo nakonkomeshe.”

Exodus31:17 Ubushiku bwe Sabata bukaba e cishibilo ca pe kuli ine na ku bena Israeli. Pantu mu nshiku mutanda emo Yawe acitile umulu ne sonde
Exodus31:18 Ilyo Lesa apwile ukulanda na Mose pa lupili lwa Sinai

Exodus34:2 Ukaipekanye mailo ulucelo
Exodus34:3 Wikaleka muntu nangu umo akakukonke nangu ukumonekela apali ponse pa lupili. Ne fitekwa fine ifinono ne fikulu fikalaliila mupepi no lupili.”
Exodus34:4 Kanshi Mose epakubasa amabwe yabili ayapapatala ayali nga yalya yene ayantanshi. Kabili ulucelocelo aya nina no lupili lwa Sinai nga fintu Yawe amukonkomeshe
Exodus34:5 Yawe nao aikile mwikumbi

Exodus34:9 “We Mfumu nga cingakusekesha

Exodus34:11 Mulesunga ifyo namukonkomesha mu bushiku bwa lelo. Ine nkamufulumwina abena Amoli
Exodus34:12 Mukabe abacenjela
Exodus34:13 Mukabongolole ifibumbili fya malambo fyabo
Exodus34:14 Tecakwesha ukulapepa umulungu umbi
Exodus34:15 “Mukabe abacenjela

Exodus34:17 “Mwilapanga imilungu iyaengwa ku cela.
Exodus34:18 “Mukalesefya inshikunkulu ya Mikate Ishatutumuka. Pa nshiku cine lubali mukalelya umukate umushaba intutumushi ngefyo namukonkomeshe. Mukalecita ici pa nshita yasontwa mu mweshi wa Abibu
Exodus34:19 “Conse icabalilapo ukufyalwa kuli nyina candi
Exodus34:20 Ibeli lyakwa punda mukalilubule pakuleka umwana wa mpaanga. Nga tamulilubwile ninshi mukalifune umukoshi. Mukalelubula abana benu bonse abaume amabeli. “Kabili pekalaba muntu nelyo umo uwakumonekela pa cinso candi iminwe nkutwa.
Exodus34:21 “Ulebomba mu nshiku mutanda shonse
Exodus34:22 “Ukalesefya inshikunkulu ya milungu mukutuula iŋanu shantanshi mwalobolola
Exodus34:23 Imiku itatu cila mwaka abaume benu bonse bafwile ukwisa monekela pa cinso ca Mfumu Yawe
Exodus34:24 Nkafulumunamo imishobo ku cinso cenu no kukushako icalo cenu. Ilyo mukalaya mukumonekela ku cinso candi ne Yawe Lesa wenu imiku itatu pa mwaka
Exodus34:25 “Wilantuula mulopa we lambo pamo pene na conse icilimo intutumushi. Kabili wikalaleka icipande ca nama ye lambo ye Pasaka
Exodus34:26 “Ukaleleta ifisabo fyantanshi ifyawamishapo ifya mu mabala yobe ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe Lesa obe. “Wikalaipikila akana ka mbushi mu mukaka wakwa nyina.”
Exodus34:27 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus34:28 Mose ali kulya pamo na Yawe inshiku amakumi yane (40) akasuba no bushiku
Exodus34:29 Ilyo Mose atentemwike ulupili lwa Sinai
Exodus34:30 Aroni na bena Israeli bonse pakumona impumi yakwa Mose ilebengeshima
Exodus34:31 Lelo Mose epakubeta. Kanshi Aroni ne ntungulushi sha mu lukuta epakuya mupalama
Exodus34:32 Panuma abena Israeli bonse baisa mupalamina
