Exodus35:1 Mose alongenye ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli pamo
Exodus35:2 Mukalebomba imilimo mu nshiku mutanda
Exodus35:3 Mwikalakosha mulilo konse uko muleikala pa bushiku bwe Sabata.”
Exodus35:4 Mose aeba ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli ati
Exodus35:5 Ukufuma pafyo mwakwata musangwilepo Yawe umutuulo. Uyo onse uuli no mutima wakupeela kuli Yawe umutuulo kuti aleta golide
Exodus35:6 kabili ubushishi ubwacifufya
Exodus35:7 impapa sha basukusuku ishatumpwa mu muti uwakashika
Exodus35:8 elyo na mafuta ya miolifa ayakusanika mu cisaniko
Exodus35:9 kabili no tumabwe twa onikisi elyo no tumabwe tumbi utwamutengo utwakubilila pa cakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi na pakati ka tumba wa pa cifuba.”
Exodus35:10 “Abo bonse muli imwe abacenjela mukupanga ifintu
Exodus35:11 Bakapange Itenti lyakwa Lesa
Exodus35:12 kabili Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ne fimuti fyakuipingilako ne Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi ne cisalu cakucingako
Exodus35:13 elyo itebulo kumo kwine ne fimuti fyakulipingilako
Exodus35:14 icakutekapo ifisaniko fyakupeela ulubuuto ne fibombelo fyaciko fyonse
Exodus35:15 kabili no bulambo bwakocelapo ububani ne fimuti fyakubupingila
Exodus35:16 elyo no bulambo bwakulekelapo amalambo yakoca ne ca mukuba icafipunda ngo lunyungo
Exodus35:17 insalu shakukupa ku lupango lwa lubansa
Exodus35:18 impopo sha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa ne sha ku lupango lwa lubansa ne myando yashiko
Exodus35:19 insalu ishapikulwa ubusaka shakwa shimapepo ishakufwala ilyo alebomba mu Muputule wamushilo
Exodus35:20 Elyo ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse lwafumine apali Mose.
Exodus35:21 Kabili uyo onse uwaipeelesha
Exodus35:22 Abo bonse abali no mutima wakupeela
Exodus35:23 Onse uwakwete ubushishi ubwacifufya
Exodus35:24 Abo abakwete silifa nangu mukuba baliletele ngo mutuulo wakwa Yawe
Exodus35:25 Abanakashi bonse abacenjela ukupyata ubushishi ku minwe baletele ubushishi bapyatile ubwacifufya
Exodus35:26 Elyo abanakashi bonse abali no mutima wakubomba kabili abacenjela nganshi bapyatile amasako ya mbushi.
Exodus35:27 Intungulushi nasho shaletele utumabwe twa onikisi no tumabwe twamutengo tumbi utwakwikasha pali efodi na pali tumba wa pa cifuba.
Exodus35:28 Kabili shaletele ifya cena icisuma na mafuta ya miolifa yakusanika mu cisaniko no kubika mu mafuta ya kusuba no kubika mu bubani ubwanunka ubusaka.
Exodus35:29 Abena Israeli
Exodus35:30 Elyo Mose aebele abena Israeli ati
Exodus35:31 Kabili alimwisushamo Umupashi wakwa Lesa
Exodus35:32 Akalaelenganya ifyakupanga bwino ifya golide ne fya silifa ne fya mukuba
Exodus35:33 elyo ne fyakuputula amabwe no kuyekasha
Exodus35:34 Kabili Yawe alipeela bonse babili Besaleli na Oliabu mwana Aisamaki uwa mu luko lwakwa Dani amano yakufundako bambi.
Exodus35:35 Yawe alibesushamo amano ayakubomba imilimo iya misango yonse
Exodus36:1 “Eico Besaleli
Exodus36:2 Elyo Mose aitile Besaleli
Exodus36:3 Mose abapeele umutuulo abena Israeli baletele uwakubomfya ku mulimo wakupanga icifulo camushilo. Awe abena Israeli abali no mutima wakupeela bakonkenyepofye ukuleta imituulo yakuitemenwa cila lucelo.
Exodus36:4 Kanshi balya bantu bonse abacenjela mu fyakupanga panga
Exodus36:5 no kuya kuli Mose bamweba abati
Exodus36:6 Elyo Mose akonkomeshe abantu
Exodus36:7 pantu ifyo bapeele kale fyalicilile pa fyalefwaikwa ku mulimofye onse.
Exodus36:8 Abantu bonse abacenjeleseshe pali abo abalebomba
Exodus36:9 Insalu shonse shali ishalingana mubutali na mubwipi. Mubutali shalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili na cine konse konse (28) elyo mubwipi namo amakubiti yane.
Exodus36:10 Insalu shisano balishilundinkenye
Exodus36:11 Elyo ku mpela ya nsalu babalilepo ukulundinkanya bapangileko imikobelo yacifufya konse konse mumbali yafiko lwa mubwipi
Exodus36:12 Ku nsalu babalilepo ukulundinkanya babikileko imikobelo amakumi yasano (50)
Exodus36:13 Kabili bapangile no twakukofyamo twa golide amakumi yasano (50)
Exodus36:14 Bapikwile ne nsalu ikumi na imo (11) ku masako ya mbushi ishakufimba kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus36:15 Insalu shonse ikumi na imo shali ishalingana mubutali na mubwipi. Mubutali shali amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30) elyo mubwipi namo amakubiti yane.
Exodus36:16 Insalu shisano balundinkanya ukuba cimo
Exodus36:17 Kabili bapangileko imikobelo amakumi yasano (50) kumpela ya nsalu babalilepo ukulundinkanya
Exodus36:18 Bapangile utwakukofyamo utwa mukuba amakumi yasano (50) utwakulundinkanya ifipande fibili pakuti Itenti libe icintu cimofye.
Exodus36:19 Kabili bapangile icakufimba pe Tenti ku mpapa sha basukusuku no kushitumpa mu muti uwakashikafye. Kabili bapangilepo icakufimbapo na cimbi ku mpapa ishisuma ishatelela.
Exodus36:20 Bapangileko impanda sha cimuti ca akasia ishakwimikilako Itenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus36:21 Cila lupanda lwalepele amakubiti ikumi limo
Exodus36:22 Ku mpela ya cila lupanda babashileko utuntu tubili utwakulundinkanishishako ku lupanda lunankwe. Ifi efyo babashile impanda shonse ishe Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus36:23 Ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa babashileko impanda amakumi yabili.
Exodus36:24 Kabili bapangilemo no twakwimikamo impanda utwa silifa amakumi yane. Kuli cila lupanda tubili
Exodus36:25 Ku kapinda ka ku kuso ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa ku lubali lubiye babashileko impanda amakumi yabili (20).
Exodus36:26 Kabili bapangile no twakwimikamo impanda utwa silifa amakumi yane (40)
Exodus36:27 Kunuma ye Tenti lwa ku masamba babashileko impanda mutanda
Exodus36:28 elyo mu matungi ya kunuma yabili ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa namo babashilemo impanda shibili.
Exodus36:29 Impanda sha mu matungi aya yabili shali ishapapikana ukufuma panshi ukufika na pamulu pa mukobelo uwakushikasha. Impanda sha mu matungi yonse yabili efyo shali.
Exodus36:30 Kanshi kwali ne mpanda cine konse konse no twakushimikamo utwa silifa ikumi limo na mutanda (16)
Exodus36:31 Kabili babashile imyalo ku cimuti ca akasia. Isano yali lubali lumo ku mpanda sha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus36:32 Imyalo imbi isano yali ku lubali lubiye ulwe Tenti lyakwa Lesa
Exodus36:33 Bapanga umwalo wa pakati uwakucilinganya pa mpanda ukufuma ku lutwe lumo no kufika ku lubiye.
Exodus36:34 Ku mpanda shonse balambatikeko golide
Exodus36:35 Bapikwile ne cisalu icakucingako ku bushishi bwacifufya
Exodus36:36 Bacipangile inceshi shine ku cimuti ca akasia kabili balambatikeko na golide. Bapangileko ne mikofyo ya golide
Exodus36:37 Pa mwinshi wakwingililapo mwi Tenti
Exodus36:38 Kabili babashile inceshi shisano
Exodus37:1 Besaleli apangile Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ku cimuti ca akasia. Mubutali yali amakubiti yabili na citika
Exodus37:2 Alambatikeko na golide wine wine mukati na kunse
Exodus37:3 Apanga imikobelo ine kuli golide uwalopolwa no kuyengelela ku mikonso ine
Exodus37:4 Elyo abashile ifimuti fyakupingilako ku cimuti ca akasia kabili alambatikeko na golide.
Exodus37:5 Apishishe ifi fimuti mu mikobelo ya ku mbali ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano pakupingilako Imbokoshi.
Exodus37:6 Apangilepo ne Nkupiko ya golide wine wine apakufutilwa ifyabubifi. Mubutali yali amakubiti yabili na citika
Exodus37:7 Elyo afulilepo na bakerubi babili aba golide ku mpela shonse isha Nkupiko.
Exodus37:8 Umo amwengelele ku mpela imo elyo na umbi ku mpela ibiye. Abengelele ku mpela shibili isha Nkupiko pakuti bakerubi babefye cimo ne nkupiko.
Exodus37:9 Bakerubi bali na mapindo ayayansa ukulola mumulu ayacinga pa Nkupiko. Bakerubi baloshenye amenso
Exodus37:10 Besaleli kabili apangile itebulo ku cimuti ca akasia. Mubutali lyali amakubiti yabili
Exodus37:11 Elyo alambatikeko na golide wine wine
Exodus37:12 Mu mpela ye tebulo ashingulwishemo imbao ishapapatala mubufumo ngo lupi lwa muntu. Ku mbao ashingulwishisheko umushingo wa golide.
Exodus37:13 Kabili apangile imikobelo ine kuli golide uwalopolwa
Exodus37:14 Imikobelo yakupishamo ifimuti fyakupingilako itebulo yabelele mupepi ne mbao yapapatala.
Exodus37:15 Abashile ifimuti fyakupingilako itebulo ku cimuti ca akasia
Exodus37:16 Kabili apangile ifipe fyakubomfya kwitebulo
Exodus37:17 Apangile ne cakutekapo ifisaniko ica golide wine wine. Icikalilo caciko pamo no mukonso waciko afifulilefye ku nondo. Tukapu utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line fili nokuba icintu cimofye ne cikalilo.
Exodus37:18 Icakutekapo ifisaniko cali ne misambo mutanda
Exodus37:19 Ku musambo umo kwali tukapu tutatu utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line. Elyo na pa musambo wakonkelepo acita ifyo fine. Kabili na ku misambo mutanda iya cakutekapo ifisaniko napo acitile ifyo fine.
Exodus37:20 Pa cakutekapo ifisaniko pali tukapu tune utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line.
Exodus37:21 Kabili ifitutu fye luba limo fyali mwisamba lya misambo ibili iyapakubala
Exodus37:22 Ifitutu pamo pene ne misambo fyali icintu cimofye ne cakutekapo ifisaniko ifyafulwa ku nondo kuli golide wine wine.
Exodus37:23 Apangile ifisaniko cine lubali pamo ne fyakushimishako nangu ukukushishako ulubuuto no tubale utwasenama kuli golide wine wine
Exodus37:24 Apangile ne cakutekapo ifisaniko ne fibombelo fyaciko fyonse kuli golide wine wine uwe talanta limo.
Exodus37:25 Apangile ubulambo bwakocapo ububani ku cimuti ca akasia. Bwali ubwalingana monse monse mubutali na mubwipi kubiti umo
Exodus37:26 Alambatikeko golide wine wine pamulu ponse
Exodus37:27 Apangileko ne mikobelo ya golide ibili. Pesamba lya mushingo ku mbali shibili sha bulambo ishalolenkene aikesheko imikobelo ibili umwakupisha ifimuti fyakupingilako.
Exodus37:28 Abashileko ne fimuti fyakupingilako ku cimuti ca akasia
Exodus37:29 Apangile na mafuta yamushilo ayakusuba
Exodus38:1 Besaleli apangile no bulambo bwa malambo yakoca ku cimuti ca akasia. Bwali ubwalingana mubutali na mubufumo amakubiti yasano
Exodus38:2 Apangile insengo mu matungi yane ya bulambo
Exodus38:3 Apangile ne fyakubomfya ku bulambo fyonse ku mukuba: Inongo
Exodus38:4 Kabili apangile ica mukuba icafipunda ngo lunyungo
Exodus38:5 Apangile ne mikobelo ine ku mukuba uwalopolwa
Exodus38:6 Abashile ifyakupingilako ku cimuti ca akasia
Exodus38:7 Apishishe ne fimuti fyakupingilako mu mikobelo pakuti fileba mumbali ya bulambo pakubusenda. Apangile ubulambo bwa mbao ubwacenama.
Exodus38:8 Kabili Besaleli apangile umusambilo ne cakuutekapo ifyakufuma ku milolani ya mukuba iya banakashi balebombela pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Exodus38:9 Kabili apangileko no lubansa ku cipango ce Tenti lyakwa Lesa. Ulubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo lwalepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100). Abikileko ne nsalu shabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka.
Exodus38:10 Abikileko ne nceshi amakumi yabili (20) isha mukuba ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba amakumi yabili
Exodus38:11 Lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso nako kwine lwalepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100). Kwali ne nceshi amakumi yabili isha mukuba ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba amakumi yabili
Exodus38:12 Lubali ku masamba lwalepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50). Kabili lwakupilweko ne nsalu
Exodus38:13 Lwa ku kabanga ukutulila akasuba
Exodus38:14 Ku lubali lumo ulwa ku mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa kwali nceshi shitatu ne fyakushimikamo nafyo fitatu ne nsalu yakupileko iyalepele amakubiti ikumi limo na yasano (15).
Exodus38:15 Kabili ku lubali lubiye lwa lupango lwa lubansa pa mwinshi kwali inceshi shitatu ne fyakushimikamo fitatu
Exodus38:16 Insalu shakupile ku lupango lwa lubansa shonse shali ishabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka.
Exodus38:17 Ifyakwimikamo inceshi fyali ifya mukuba. Imikofyo no tufyela twa ku nceshi twali utwa silifa
Exodus38:18 Icisalu ca pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa capangilwe ku bushishi bwacifufya
Exodus38:19 Cakwete ne nceshi shine ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba nafyo fine. Imikofyo no tufyela twa ku nceshi fyali ifya silifa
Exodus38:20 Impopo shonse isha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa pamo pene ne sha ku lubansa lwa ku cipango ukushinguluka shali isha mukuba.
Exodus38:21 Ifi e fintu fyonse babomfeshe pakupanga Itenti lyakwa Lesa
Exodus38:22 Besaleli mwana Uri umwishikulu wakwa Huri
Exodus38:23 Besaleli ali na Oholiabu mwana Aisamaki uwa mu luko lwakwa Dani uwacenjela mu fyakupanga panga no kwelenganya umwakucitila ifintu
Exodus38:24 Golide onsefye uo babomfeshe mu mulimo wakukuulila icifulo camushilo
Exodus38:25 Silifa balonganike ukufuma ku ba lukuta abapendelwe afinine amatalanta umwanda umo (100) na mashekeli ikana limo imyanda cine lubali na makumi cine lubali na yasano (1
Exodus38:26 Umuntu apeele indalama beka umo
Exodus38:27 Besaleli abomfeshe silifa uwafina amatalanta umwanda umo (100) pakwenga utwakwimikamo inceshi umwanda umo isha cifulo camushilo ne sha ku cisalu cakucinga. Ku kakwimikamo kamo alebomfya silifa uwafina italanta limo.
Exodus38:28 Kuli silifa uwashelepo uwafinine amashekeli ikana limo imyanda cine lubali na makumi cine lubali na yasano (1
Exodus38:29 Umukuba uwafumine ku mutuulo wa cakutambika wafinine amatalanta amakumi cine lubali (70) na mashekeli amakana yabili ne myanda ine (2
Exodus38:30 Abomfeshe umukuba kukupanga utwakwimikamo inceshi sha ku mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no bulambo bwa mukuba
Exodus38:31 elyo ne fyakwimikamo inceshi sha ku lupango lwa lubansa ne sha pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa ne mpopo sha kwi Itenti lyakwa Lesa shonse ne sha ku lubansa lonse ulwa cipango.
Exodus39:1 Kabili Besaleli abilile ne fyakufwala ifyapikulwa no bushishi bwacifufya
Exodus39:2 Apangile efodi icakufwala pa mulu wa mwingila ku bushishi bwa golide
Exodus39:3 Bafulile utumalata twa golide utwayangukisha
Exodus39:4 Kuli efodi babilileko ne mikobelo ku mpela shibili iyakupisha pa mabeya pakucikakanya.
Exodus39:5 Umushipi wali nga efodi uwapikulwa ubusaka ku bushishi bwa golide
Exodus39:6 Babikile ku mabwe ya onikisi utwapikulwa na waya ya golide kabili afukwilepo amashina ya bamwana Israeli abaume
Exodus39:7 Elyo aikeshe aya mabwe pa mishipi ya pa mabeya ya efodi pakuti yaleba ayakwibukishishapo bamwana Israeli
Exodus39:8 Besaleli apikwile na tumba wa pa cifuba ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi ukupikula. Tumba amupikwile nga efodi ku bushishi bwa golide no bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee mu nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka.
Exodus39:9 Tumba nga apetwa ali uwalingana mubutali na mubwipi
Exodus39:10 Kabili baikeshe pali tumba utumabwe twamutengo mu mitande ine. Mu mutande wantanshi babikilemo akalibwe ka rubi na ka topasi na ka bereli.
Exodus39:11 Mu mutanda wabubili babikilemo akalibwe ka tokisi na ka safile na ka emeradi.
Exodus39:12 Mu mutande wabutatu abikilemo akalibwe ka yasinti
Exodus39:13 Mu mutande wabune babikilemo akalibwe ka kirisaliti
Exodus39:14 Utumabwe twali ikumi limo na tubili (12). Kabili pali cila kalibwe pali ishina limo ilyakwa mwana Israeli. Cila kalibwe pafukwilwe kwati cifwatiko ishina limo pa nko ikumi limo na shibili (12) isha bena Israeli.
Exodus39:15 Bapangile no tuminyololo twa golide wine wine utwapyatwa ngo mwando utwa kuli tumba wa pa cifuba.
Exodus39:16 Bapangile utwapikwilwe na waya ya golide tubili ne mikobelo ya golide ibili
Exodus39:17 Elyo bakakilile uto tuminyololo twa golide tubili ku mikobelo ya ku mpela sha tumba.
Exodus39:18 Impela shibili isha tuminyololo bashikakilile ku mikobelo ibili iya ku twapikwilwe na waya ya golide
Exodus39:19 Elyo bapangile imikobelo ya golide ibili
Exodus39:20 Kabili bapangile imikobelo ya golide na imbi ibili. Baikeshe mwisamba lya mishipi ya pa mabeya ya efodi lwa pantanshi mupepi na pa mulu wa palundikanina efodi no mushipi wapikulwa bwino.
Exodus39:21 Bakakile imikobelo ya tumba wa pa cifuba ku mikobelo ya efodi no mwando wa bushishi ubwacifufya pakuti tumba wa pa cifuba alebela pa mulu wa mushipi
Exodus39:22 Besaleli apangile no mwingila wakufwala mukati ka efodi uo bapikwile ku bushishi bwacifufya bweka bwekafye.
Exodus39:23 Pa cipunda cakupishishamo umutwe alipikwilepo ukushinguluka pakulesha umwingila ukulepuka.
Exodus39:24 Mu mufukilo wa mwingila bapikwililemo ifitwalo ifyapala amateke ku bushishi bwacifufya no bwakashikila elyo no bwakashika cee
Exodus39:25 Kabili bapangile no tunyenjele twa golide wine wine batwikasha na pakati ka fitwalo ifyapala amateke ukushinguluka umufukilo wa mwingila.
Exodus39:26 Ukushingulukafye umufukilo wa mwingila wakufwala pakubomba umulimo wa bushimapepo balepushanya apa kanyenjele apa icapala amateke ukushinguluka
Exodus39:27 Kabili bapangile Aroni na bana bakwe abaume imingila ku nsalu ishabuuta ubusaka
Exodus39:28 ne nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe
Exodus39:29 Ilamba lyapikwilwe ku nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka na ku bushishi bwacifufya
Exodus39:30 Bapangile akalilata ka golide wine wine akamushilo
Exodus39:31 Elyo bakakakile ku katambo kacifufya no kukekasha ku nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe
Exodus39:32 Kanshi imilimo yonse iyakupanga Itenti lyakwa Lesa ilyakukumaninamo yalipwile. Abena Israeli bacitilefye fyonse ukulingana ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.
Exodus39:33 Kabili baletele kuli Mose Itenti lyakwa Lesa
Exodus39:34 icakufimba pe tenti ica mpapa sha basukusuku ishatumpwa mu muti uwakashika
Exodus39:35 Imbokoshi ya Cipangano
Exodus39:36 itebulo ne fibombelo fyaliko fyonse elyo ne mikate yakuba pa cinso cakwa Lesa
Exodus39:37 icakutekapo ifisaniko ica golide wine wine ne fisaniko fyaciko
Exodus39:38 ubulambo bwa golide
Exodus39:39 ubulambo bwa mukuba ne cafipunda ngo lunyungo cabuko ica mukuba
Exodus39:40 insalu sha ku lupango lwa lubansa
Exodus39:41 insalu ishapikulwa ubusaka shakufwala pakubomba mu Muputule wamushilo
Exodus39:42 Abena Israeli balibombele imilimo yonse ukulingana ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.
Exodus39:43 Elyo Mose alondele imilimo yonse amwene nokuti bacitile fyonse ngefyo umwine Yawe akonkomeshe. Kanshi nao Mose epakubapaala.
Exodus40:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Exodus40:2 “Ukemike Itenti lyakwa Lesa Ilyakukumaninamo
Exodus40:3 Ukabikemo ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano elyo ukacingeko icisalu ku Mbokoshi ya Cipangano.
Exodus40:4 Ukaletelemo itebulo kabili ukabikepo ne fibombelo fyaliko. Elyo ukaletelemo ne cakutekapo ifisaniko
Exodus40:5 Ukabikemo no bulambo bwa golide bwakufutumwinapo ububani lwa pantanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano. Ukacinge ne nsalu pa mwinshi we Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus40:6 Ubulambo bwakocelapo amalambo yakoca ukabubike mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Exodus40:7 Umusambilo ukaubike pakati
Exodus40:8 Ukashingulusheko no lupango lwa lubansa
Exodus40:9 “Elyo ukabuule amafuta yakusuba
Exodus40:10 Kabili ukasube amafuta ku bulambo bwakocelapo amalambo na ku fibombelo fyabuko fyonse. Efyo ukantuula ubulambo nabo bukaba ubwamushilo icine cine.
Exodus40:11 Ukasube no musambilo ne cakuutekapo no kufintuula.
Exodus40:12 “Elyo ukalete Aroni na bana bakwe abaume pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo ukabasambe na menshi.
Exodus40:13 Ukafwike Aroni insalu shamushilo
Exodus40:14 Ukalete na bana bakwe abaume
Exodus40:15 Nabo bene ukabasube amafuta nga filya wasubile shibo pakuti bakalemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo. Nga basubwa bakaba na bushimapepo bwa pe mu nkulo shabo shonse.”
Exodus40:16 Awe Mose epakucita fyonse ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe.
Exodus40:17 Pa bushiku bwapakubala mu mweshi wakubalilapo mu mwaka wabubili
Exodus40:18 Mose aimike Itenti
Exodus40:19 Elyo akupa insalu pe Tenti lyakwa Lesa
Exodus40:20 Abuula na mabwe ya Cipangano yabili ayabika na mu Mbokoshi ya Cipangano. Apishisha ne fimuti fyakupingilako mu mikobelo ya Mbokoshi. Akupikapo ne Nkupiko ya kufutilwapo ifyabubifi.
Exodus40:21 Elyo aleta ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa
Exodus40:22 Kabili Mose abika ne tebulo mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Exodus40:23 Abikapo ne mikate yakuba pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Exodus40:24 Abikile ne cakutekapo ifisaniko mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Exodus40:25 Abikapo ne fisaniko pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Exodus40:26 Abika no bulambo bwa golide wine wine mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo lwa pantanshi ya cisalu cakucingako.
Exodus40:27 Kabili afutumwinapo no bubani ubwanunka ubusaka ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.
Exodus40:28 Elyo akobeka ne cisalu ca pa mwinshi we Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Exodus40:29 Abika no bulambo bwakocelapo amalambo mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa mupepi no mwinshi wa pe Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Alekelapo ilambo lyakoca
Exodus40:30 Abika no musambilo pakati
Exodus40:31 Umu emo Mose na Aroni na bana bakwa Aroni balesamba iminwe na makasa.
Exodus40:32 Lyonse pakwingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo na pakupalama ku bulambo baletala basamba
Exodus40:33 Elyo Mose acitile ulupango lwa lubansa ukushingulusha Itenti lyakwa Lesa no bulambo
Exodus40:34 Elyo ikumbi lyakupile Itenti Lyakukumaninamo
Exodus40:35 Awe Mose afilwa no kwingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pantu ikumbi lyalikelepo
Exodus40:36 Abena Israeli mu nyendo shabo shonse
Exodus40:37 Nomba ikumbi nga talifuminepo tabaleima no kulaya mpakafye no bushiku likafumapo.
Exodus40:38 Ikumbi lyakwa Yawe lyaleba pe Tenti lyakwa Lesa mu nshita ya kasuba
Leviticus1:1 Yawe aitile Mose ukufuma mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Leviticus1:2 “Sosa ku bena Israeli utile
Leviticus1:3 “Ngo mutuulo uli lilambo lyakoca ilya ŋombe
Leviticus1:4 Kabili natambalike ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe we lambo lyakoca
Leviticus1:5 Elyo panuma yakwipaya cilume wa ŋombe pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Leviticus1:6 Uuletele inama ye lambo lyakoca
Leviticus1:7 Bamwana Aroni shimapepo abaume bali nokukosha umulilo pa bulambo no kupekanya inkuni shakukoseshapo.
Leviticus1:8 Bamwana Aroni abaume bashimapepo bali nokubikapo ifipimfya elyo no mutwe ne fya mafuta pa cininkwa ca mulilo wa nkuni icili pa bulambo.
Leviticus1:9 Kabili ifya munda fyonse pamo pene na molu afisamfye no kufyocela pamo pa bulambo kuli shimapepo. Nili line ilambo lyakoca
Leviticus1:10 “Ngo mutuulo alepeela uli lilambo lyakoca ilyafuma pa mukuni wa mpaanga
Leviticus1:11 Uuletele nama ye lambo afwile aipaila ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka bulambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Bashimapepo bamwana Aroni abaume bali nokukana umulopa waiko mu mbali shonse isha bulambo.
Leviticus1:12 Ilyo uyu muntu apwisha ukuputaula iyi nama
Leviticus1:13 Kabili ifya munda fyonse
Leviticus1:14 “Ngo mutuulo alepeela kuli Yawe uli lilambo lyakoca ilya cuni
Leviticus1:15 Shimapepo ali nokucileta ku bulambo
Leviticus1:16 Uyu shimapepo
Leviticus1:17 Kabili ali nokucipansa pakati
Leviticus2:1 “Umuntu nga alefwaya ukuleta umutuulo wa cabunga kuli Yawe
Leviticus2:2 Kabili atwale ifi fyonse kuli bashimapepo bamwana Aroni abaume. Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuula ulupi lwa bunga bwa ŋanu
Leviticus2:3 Umutuulo wa cabunga onse uwashalapo wakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume. Uyu mutuulo
Leviticus2:4 “Nga uletuula umutuulo wa cabunga uwaocewa mwibuku
Leviticus2:5 Nga ulepanga umukate wa mutuulo wa cabunga mukubomfya ilata lyakocelapo
Leviticus2:6 Mokaula uyu mukate no kwitilapo amafuta. Uyu e mutuulo wa cabunga.
Leviticus2:7 Ngo mutuulo wa cabunga upangilwe mu cakupangilamo
Leviticus2:8 Uli nokuleta kuli Yawe umutuulo wa cabunga uwapekanishiwa muli uyu musango. Ukese leta kuli shimapepo elyo ena euli nokutwala ku bulambo.
Leviticus2:9 Shimapepo ali nokubuulapo akaputulwa pa mutuulo wa cabunga ukuba e cibukisho
Leviticus2:10 Umutuulo wa cabunga onse uwashalapo
Leviticus2:11 “Mu mutuulo wa cabunga onse uo muletuula kuli Yawe
Leviticus2:12 Ifi mulefileta kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa fisabo fyakubalilapo lelo fyena tafili fyakutuula pa bulambo nge cakusekesha ku cena cisuma.
Leviticus2:13 Mu mutuulo wa cabunga onse
Leviticus2:14 “Nga mutuulo wa fisabo fyakubalilapo kuli Yawe uwa fya nseke
Leviticus2:15 Sansheniko amafuta pamo pene ne cinyamuti icanunka ubusaka ica fulankinisenshi. Uyu e mutuulo wa cabunga.
Leviticus2:16 Elyo shimapepo ali nokocapo icipande ca cibukisho ica ŋanu icapeleka bwino na mafutamo
Leviticus3:1 “Umuntu nga alepeela umutuulo wakwampana
Leviticus3:2 Natambalike ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa nama ya mutuulo wakwe nokuipaila pa mwinshi wa mpongolo ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Elyo bamwana Aroni abaume bashimapepo bali nokukana umulopa mu mbali shonse isha bulambo.
Leviticus3:3 Kabili atuule icipande ce lambo lyakwampana ukuba umutuulo wacakoca kuli Yawe
Leviticus3:4 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu
Leviticus3:5 Bamwana Aroni abaume bali nokocela fyonse ifi pa bulambo
Leviticus3:6 “Nga cakuti umuntu atuula impaanga nangu imbushi imo iya mu mukuni wakwe ukuba umutuulo wakwampana kuli Yawe
Leviticus3:7 Nga atuula umwana wa mpaanga
Leviticus3:8 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mutuulo no kuipaila pantanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Elyo bamwana Aroni abaume bakane umulopa wa mwana wa mpaanga mu mbali shonse isha bulambo.
Leviticus3:9 Ukufuma ku mutuulo uwakwampana
Leviticus3:10 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu
Leviticus3:11 Shimapepo ali nokoca fyonse pa bulambo nge cakulya ce lambo lyakoca icatuulwa kuli Yawe.
Leviticus3:12 “Nga cakuti umutuulo wakwe ni mbushi
Leviticus3:13 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mbushi nokuipaila pantanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Elyo bamwana Aroni abaume bakane umulopa waiko mu mbali shonse isha bulambo.
Leviticus3:14 Ukufuma ku mutuulo uyu
Leviticus3:15 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu

Leviticus3:17 “Ili lifunde ilyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo shonse ishili nokulakonkapo
Leviticus4:1 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati
Leviticus4:2 “Eba abena Israeli ukuti
Leviticus4:3 “‘Nga ni shimapepo uwasubwa ewacita ubu bubifi no kulenga na bambi abantu balebifya
Leviticus4:4 Nalete uyu cilume wa ŋombe ku mpongolo ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa ciponti no kucipaila pa menso yakwa Yawe.
Leviticus4:5 Elyo shimapepo uwasubwa na mafuta
Leviticus4:6 Natumpike umunwe mu mulopa no kukana imiku cine lubali pa cinso cakwa Yawe kuntanshi ya cisalu icicinga ku cifulo camushilo.
Leviticus4:7 Elyo shimapepo akashinge umulopa ku nsengo sha bulambo bocelapo ububani ubwanunka ubusaka
Leviticus4:8 Ali nokufumya yonse amafuta kuli cilume wa ŋombe ya mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus4:9 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana
Leviticus4:10 pamo ngefyo bafumya amafuta ku mutuulo wa ŋombe yaocewa uwakwampana. Elyo shimapepo ali nokufyocela pa mulu wa bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca.
Leviticus4:11 Nomba umukupo wakwa cilume wa ŋombe ne minofu yakwe
Leviticus4:12 emukutila fyonse ifyashala kuli uyu cilume wa ŋombe
Leviticus4:13 “Nga cakuti ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli lwacita icabubifi cimo mukukanaishiba ico Yawe alesha mu mafunde yakwe
Leviticus4:14 Ilyo ububifi bacitile bwaishibikwa
Leviticus4:15 Abakalamba ba lukuta bali nokutambalika amaboko yabo pa mutwe wakwa cilume wa ŋombe pa cinso cakwa Yawe elyo nokumwipaya.
Leviticus4:16 Elyo shimapepo uwasubwa ali nokusendapo umulopa umo uwa cilume wa ŋombe mukati ke Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Leviticus4:17 Atumpike umunwe mu mulopa no kukana imiku cine lubali pa cinso cakwa Yawe kuntanshi ya cisalu icicinga ku muputule wamushilo.
Leviticus4:18 Umulopa umbi aushinge ku nsengo sha bulambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Kabili umulopa uwashalapo ali nokuwitila mwisamba lya bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca pa mpongolo ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Leviticus4:19 Shimapepo
Leviticus4:20 Ifi efyo alingile ukucita kuli cilume wa ŋombe uyu
Leviticus4:21 Elyo shimapepo ali nokufumisha cilume wa ŋombe kunse ya nkambi no kumoca nga fintu aocele cilume wa ŋombe uwantanshi. Kanshi uyu e mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwe bumba lyonse.
Leviticus4:22 “Nga ni ntungulushi yabifya mukukanaishiba
Leviticus4:23 Eico kanshi ngoyu mulandu acita waishibikwa kuli ena
Leviticus4:24 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mbushi no kuipaila pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa ncende ye lambo lyakoca. Uyu e mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi.
Leviticus4:25 Kabili shimapepo ali nokutumpika umunwe wakwe mu mulopa wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus4:26 Ifi efyo alingile ukucita ukoca amafuta yonse pa bulambo pamo nga fintu engacita ku mafuta ya mutuulo wakwampana. Iyi e nshila shimapepo ali nokutuulilamo umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa iyi ntungulushi
Leviticus4:27 “Nga cakuti umuntu umo umwikalacalo abifya mukukanaishiba no kucita ifyo Yawe alesha mu mafunde yakwe
Leviticus4:28 Uyu muntu nga aishibishiwa ukuti nabifya
Leviticus4:29 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi no kwipaila pa ncende iyo bepailapo ilambo lyakoca.
Leviticus4:30 Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuulapo umulopa ku munwe no kushinga ku nsengo sha bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca
Leviticus4:31 Ali nokufumyako yonse amafuta
Leviticus4:32 “Kabili nga aleta umwana wa mpaanga ukuba umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus4:33 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus4:34 Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuulapo umulopa pa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi ku munwe no kushinga ku nsengo sha ku bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca. Umulopa washalapo ali nokuwitila mwisamba lya bulambo.
Leviticus4:35 Ali nokufumyako yonse amafuta
Leviticus5:1 “Umuntu nga abifya pakukanapeela bukambone ukulingana no mulandu aumfwile
Leviticus5:2 “Nangu umuntu akumya ku fyakowela
Leviticus5:3 “Nangu umuntu akumya ku fyakowela fyabumuntu na kuli conse icingamulenga ukuba uwakowela
Leviticus5:4 “Nangu uyu muntu mukuilekelesha mukulanda
Leviticus5:5 “Ilyo lyonse umuntu acita umulandu umo pali iyi tulumbwile
Leviticus5:6 Uyu muntu pa bubifi acitile
Leviticus5:7 “Nga cakuti umuntu takwete umwana wa mpaanga ali nokuleta utupele tubili nangu utubondo twa nkunda tubili kuli Yawe icifuta mulandu pa bubifi acita. Kamo ka mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi acitile elyo na kambi ke lambo lyakoca.
Leviticus5:8 Ali nokuleta kuli shimapepo tonse uuli nokututuula
Leviticus5:9 Umulopa wa uyu mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus5:10 Elyo nomba shimapepo ali nokutuula akapele nangu akabondo kashele nge lambo lyakoca ukulingana na mafunde. Shimapepo ali nokumutuulilako umutuulo wakufuta pa bubifi
Leviticus5:11 “Nga cakuti umuntu afilwa ukumona utupele tubili nangu utubondo twa nkunda tubili
Leviticus5:12 Alingile nokuleta kuli shimapepo
Leviticus5:13 “Ifi efyo shimapepo ali nokumutuulilako umutuulo wakufuta pa bubifi
Leviticus5:14 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati
Leviticus5:15 “Ilyo lyonse umuntu alufyanya acita ne cabubifi mukukanaishiba muli fyonse ifyamushilo ifyakwa Yawe
Leviticus5:16 Uyu muntu ali nokubwekeshapo ifyo ashatuulile kabili alundepo cimo muli cila fisano ukulingana ne cipimo casuminishiwa no kupeela kuli shimapepo. Shimapepo ali nokumutuulilako sukusuku ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi
Leviticus5:17 “Nga cakuti umuntu abifya no kucita ifyo Yawe ashifwaya mu mafunde yakwe
Leviticus5:18 Ali nokuleta kuli shimapepo sukusuku wa pa mukuni wakwe
Leviticus5:19 “Uyu e mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi pantu uyu muntu aliba no mulandu pakucita icilubo kuli Yawe.”
Leviticus6:1 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati
Leviticus6:2 “Umuntu nga abifya mukukanaba uwacishinka kuli Yawe kufyo acenjesha umunankwe pa fintu asekesheko nangu ukumusungilako nangu ukumwibila
Leviticus6:3 Nangu ngo muntu umo atola icintu icilubile nomba akaana ati teutolele
Leviticus6:4 nangu abifya muli uyu musango uwa bucenjeshi
Leviticus6:5 elyo na conse ico alapilepo umulapo wabufi. Fyonse ifyo asendele alingile ukubwesha no kulundapo cimo pali cila fisano no kubwesesha ku mwine pa bushiku bumo bwine ali nokutuula umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi.
Leviticus6:6 Nge cifuta mulandu alete kuli shimapepo
Leviticus6:7 Na muli iyi nshila
Leviticus6:8 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati
Leviticus6:9 “Eba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ifyebo ifi
Leviticus6:10 Elyo Shimapepo ali nokufwala umwingila wa nsalu iyatelela elyo na kaputula wa nsalu iyatelela mukati ka mwingila no kukusa imito ye lambo lyakoca ilipiile ku bulambo no kuibika mu mbali ya bulambo.
Leviticus6:11 Elyo ali nokufuula ifi fyakufwala no kufwala fimbi pakutwala imito kunse ya nkambi ku ncende iyasangululwa.
Leviticus6:12 Umulilo wa pa bulambo uli nokulaaka lyonse
Leviticus6:13 Umulilo wena ufwile ukulayaka lyonse pa bulambo
Leviticus6:14 “Aya nayo e mafunde yakukonka pakutuula umutuulo wa cabunga. Bamwana Aroni abaume
Leviticus6:15 Elyo Shimapepo ali nokubuulapo ulupi lwa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino na mafutamo
Leviticus6:16 Ifyashalapo
Leviticus6:17 Pakupanga umukate tabafwile ukubikamo intutumushi. Nabapeela ifi ifya pa mituulo yandi iya cakoca cibe cabo. Ifi filyo
Leviticus6:18 Umwaume onse uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Aroni ali nokulyako. Ici e cipande cakwe pa mutuulo kuli Yawe uwa cakoca icili nokutwalilila ku nkulo shonse. Na conse icili nokukumyako
Leviticus6:19 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati
Leviticus6:20 “Uyu e mutuulo Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bafwile ukutuula kuli Yawe pa bushiku bwakusubwa. Bali nokulatuula icapekumi cimo ca cipimo ca efa ca bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino pamo ngo mutuulo wa cabunga uo batuula lyonse. Bali nokubwakanya pakati no kutuula bumo ulucelo
Leviticus6:21 Bali nokusankanya ubunga na mafuta pakukandawila no koca pelata lyakocelapo no kutuula ngo mutuulo wa cabunga uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe.
Leviticus6:22 Umwana mwaume onse uwakwa Aroni uuli nokupyana nga shimapepo uwasubwa
Leviticus6:23 Umutuulo wa cabunga onse uo shimapepo atuula
Leviticus6:24 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati
Leviticus6:25 “Sosa kuli Aroni pamo na bana bakwe abaume
Leviticus6:26 Shimapepo uuli nokutuula uyu mutuulo e ulifye no kulyako. Afwile aliila mu ncende iyamushilo iya mu lubansa lwe Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Leviticus6:27 Na conse icili nokukumya ku munofu waciko cili nokuba icamushilo. Kabili umulopa nga watonena ku cakufwala
Leviticus6:28 Inongo umwipikilwe iyi nama
Leviticus6:29 Umwaume onse uwa muli bashimapepo euli nokulyako uyu mutuulo
Leviticus6:30 Lelo ilyo umulopa wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi waletwa kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo mukufuta pa bubifi mu Muputule wamushilo
Leviticus7:1 “Aya e mafunde yakukonka pakutuula umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi
Leviticus7:2 Umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi uli nokwipaiwa pa ncende iyo bepailapo ilambo lyakoca. Elyo umulopa wena bali nokuukana mu mbali shonse isha bulambo.
Leviticus7:3 Yonse amafuta yali nokutuulwa
Leviticus7:4 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu
Leviticus7:5 Shimapepo ali nokocela fyonse pa bulambo ngo mutuulo wacakoca kuli Yawe. Uyu e mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi.
Leviticus7:6 Umwaume onse uwa muli bashimapepo euli nokulyako uyu mutuulo. Lelo bali nokuuliila mu ncende imo iyamushilo
Leviticus7:7 “Ifunde limo line e lyakukonka pa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi elyo no mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. Umutuulo washalapo pakubafutilako wakwa shimapepo.
Leviticus7:8 Umukupo uushele ku nama ye lambo lyakoca ilya uuli onse
Leviticus7:9 Umutuulo onse uwa cabunga uo baoca mwibuku nangu basalula pali pani
Leviticus7:10 Kabili umutuulo wa cabunga onse uwasakaniwamo na mafuta
Leviticus7:11 “Aya e mafunde yakukonka pakutuula umutuulo wakwampana uo umuntu onse ali nokutuula kuli Yawe.
Leviticus7:12 “Umuntu nga atuula umutuulo wakulanga ukutotela
Leviticus7:13 Ukukonka pa mutuulo wakwampana uwakutotela
Leviticus7:14 Ali nokutuulapo cila umo ngo musangulo kuli Yawe. Uyu musangulo wakwa shimapepo uukana umulopa wa mituulo yakwampana ku bulambo.
Leviticus7:15 Inama ya mutuulo wakwampana kabili iyakutotela
Leviticus7:16 “Nga cakuti umutuulo we lambo lya muntu wa cilayo nangu wakuitemenwafye
Leviticus7:17 Umunofu wa nama nga washalako ku mutuulo mu bushiku bwalenga shitatu
Leviticus7:18 Nga cakuti uyu mutuulo wakwampana waliwa mu bushiku bwalenga shitatu
Leviticus7:19 “Umunofu wa nama onse uwakumya ku cintu icakowela
Leviticus7:20 Nga cakuti umuntu uushasangululwa alyako ku nama ya mutuulo wakwampana uwakwa Yawe
Leviticus7:21 Kabili umuntu onse uwakumya ku cintu icili conse icakowela ica muntu nangu inama iyakowela nangufye icintu icili conse icakowela
Leviticus7:22 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati
Leviticus7:23 “Eba abena Israeli utile
Leviticus7:24 Kabili tecakwesha ukulya mafuta ya nama yonsefye iyaifwila
Leviticus7:25 Umuntu onse uwalya amafuta ya nama iyo batuulile kuli Yawe iya cakoca
Leviticus7:26 Konsefye uko mukekala
Leviticus7:27 Umuntu onse uwalya umulopa
Leviticus7:28 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati
Leviticus7:29 “Eba abena Israeli utile
Leviticus7:30 Alingile ukuiletelafye umwine uyu mutuulo wa cakoca kuli Yawe. Ali nokuleta ifyamafuta pamo ne cisao elyo atambike icisao kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika.
Leviticus7:31 Shimapepo ali nokoca amafuta pa bulambo
Leviticus7:32 Ku mutuulo we lambo lyakwampana
Leviticus7:33 Mwana Aroni umwaume uwatuula umulopa na mafuta nge fya mutuulo wakwampana
Leviticus7:34 Ukufuma ku mutuulo wakwampana wa bena Israeli
Leviticus7:35 “Ici cili cipande ca mutuulo wa cakoca icipeelwa kuli Yawe ico Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bapeelwe mu bushiku bapalamikwemo mukutumika Yawe nga bashimapepo.
Leviticus7:36 Pa bushiku basubilwe
Leviticus7:37 Kanshi aya
Leviticus7:38 Yawe ewapeele Mose aya mafunde pa lupili lwa Sinai
Leviticus8:1 Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati
Leviticus8:2 “Leta Aroni na bana bakwe abaume
Leviticus8:3 Kabili ulonganike ulukuta lonse pa mwinshi wa mpongolo kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.”
Leviticus8:4 Awe Mose acitilafye umo Yawe amukonkomeshe
Leviticus8:5 Mose alaeba ulukuta ati
Leviticus8:6 Elyo Mose apalamika Aroni na bana bakwe abaume kuntanshi no kubasamba na menshi.
Leviticus8:7 Mose afwika Aroni ilaya
Leviticus8:8 Amufwika na tumba pa cifuba
Leviticus8:9 Akaka ne nsalu ku mutwe wakwa Aroni
Leviticus8:10 Elyo Mose abuula amafuta yakusuba no kusuba Itenti lyakwa Lesa ne fipe fyonse ifyalimo pakuti fibe ifyamushilo.
Leviticus8:11 Kabili akana amafuta yamo ku bulambo imiku cine lubali
Leviticus8:12 Epakubuula amafuta yakusuba no kwitulwila pa mutwe wakwa Aroni no kumusuba pakuti abe uwamushilo.
Leviticus8:13 Elyo Mose apalamike bamwana Aroni abaume
Leviticus8:14 Kabili Mose aleta iciponti ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi. Elyo Aroni na bana bakwe abaume batambalika amaboko yabo pa mutwe wa ciponti ca ŋombe.
Leviticus8:15 Elyo Mose nao aipaya iciponti ca ŋombe
Leviticus8:16 Mose kabili abuula amafuta yonse ayatabilila ifya munda na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu lya ciponti
Leviticus8:17 Abuula fyonse ifyashala
Leviticus8:18 Kabili apalamika sukusuku uwe lambo lya cakoca
Leviticus8:19 Nao Mose epakwipaya uyu sukusuku no kukana umulopa mu mbali shonse isha bulambo.
Leviticus8:20 Aputaula inama fipimfya fipimfya
Leviticus8:21 Asamfya ifya munda ne myendo na menshi no kocela sukusuku onse pa bulambo nge lambo lyakoca
Leviticus8:22 Elyo kabili Mose abuula sukusuku wacibili
Leviticus8:23 Mose nao aipaya uyu sukusuku no kubuula umulopa umo
Leviticus8:24 Mose elyo apalamika abana baume bakwa Aroni
Leviticus8:25 Abuula amafuta no mucila uwanona
Leviticus8:26 Ukufuma mu museke uwa mikate iyishatutumuka
Leviticus8:27 Mose abuula fyonse ifi
Leviticus8:28 Elyo Mose afipoka ukufuma ku maboko yabo no kufyocela fyonse pa bulambo pa mulu we lambo lyakoca ngo mutuulo wa cakoca kuli Yawe
Leviticus8:29 Elyo kabili Mose abuula inama ya cisao
Leviticus8:30 Elyo kabili Mose abuula amafuta yakusuba no mulopa umo ukufuma pa bulambo
Leviticus8:31 Mose kabili epakweba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ukuti
Leviticus8:32 Elyo inama no mukate ifyashalapo moce.
Leviticus8:33 Mwilafuma
Leviticus8:34 Icacitwa lelo
Leviticus8:35 Mufwilefye ukwikala pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Leviticus8:36 Awe Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bacitile fintu fyonse ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.
Leviticus9:1 Nomba pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse
Leviticus9:2 Mose asosa kuli Aroni ati
Leviticus9:3 Elyo eba abena Israeli auti
Leviticus9:4 Kabili buulenipo cilume wa ŋombe na sukusuku ngo mutuulo wakwampana uwe lambo kuli Yawe
Leviticus9:5 Elyo baleta ifintu fyonse ifyo Mose akonkomeshe kuntanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Leviticus9:6 Mose alabeba ati
Leviticus9:7 Kabili Mose aeba Aroni ati
Leviticus9:8 Awe Aroni apalama ku bulambo
Leviticus9:9 Abana bakwe abaume epakumuletela umulopa
Leviticus9:10 Pa bulambo aocelapo na mafuta
Leviticus9:11 Lelo inama yonse kumo kwine ne mpapa
Leviticus9:12 Elyo kabili Aroni aipaya ne nama ya mutuulo we lambo lyakoca. Abana bakwe abaume bamutambika umulopa
Leviticus9:13 Kabili batambika kuli ena icipimfya cimo cimo ice lambo lyakoca
Leviticus9:14 Awe asamfya fyonse ifya munda ne myendo no kufyocela pa mulu we lambo lyakoca pa bulambo.
Leviticus9:15 Aroni nomba aleta umutuulo wali nokuba uwa pa bantu. Abuula imbushi ukuba umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwa bantu
Leviticus9:16 Kabili aleta inama ye lambo lyakoca no kutuula ukulingana ne nshila yakulilekelamo.
Leviticus9:17 Aletele kabili umutuulo wa cabunga
Leviticus9:18 Aipaya na cilume wa ŋombe elyo na sukusuku
Leviticus9:19 Aroni abuula amafuta yakwa cilume wa ŋombe na sukusuku
Leviticus9:20 Ifi fyonse afibika pa mulu wa cisao elyo Aroni aocela amafuta pa bulambo.
Leviticus9:21 Elyo Aroni atambika icisao no mwendo wa ku kulyo kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika kuli Yawe
Leviticus9:22 Elyo nomba Aroni atambalika amaboko yakwe pa bantu no kubapaala. Panuma ya kutuula umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus9:23 Elyo Mose na Aroni nomba baya ingila na mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Cilya bafumamo
Leviticus9:24 Awe apopene
Leviticus10:1 Bamwana Aroni abaume Nadabu na Abihu babuula cila muntu icifukilisho cakwe
Leviticus10:2 Awe apopene
Leviticus10:3 Mose epakweba Aroni ati
Leviticus10:4 Elyo Mose aita Mishaeli na Elisafani
Leviticus10:5 Nabo baisa no kusenda iyi mibili ya bafwa
Leviticus10:6 Kabili Mose aeba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume
Leviticus10:7 Imwe tecakwesha ukufuma pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Leviticus10:8 Kabili Yawe aeba Aroni ati
Leviticus10:9 “Iwe na bana bobe abaume tecakwesha ukunwa umwangashi nangufye conse icikola lyonse ilyo mwaingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Leviticus10:10 Mufwile no kulalekanya ku fintu fyamushilo elyo ne fishili fyamushilo
Leviticus10:11 Kabili mufwile ukufunda abena Israeli amafundefye yonse ayo ine ne Yawe napeele ukupitila muli Mose.”
Leviticus10:12 Mose aeba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume abashalapo
Leviticus10:13 Muuliilefye mu ncende yamushilo pantu iwe na bana bobe abaume
Leviticus10:14 Nomba iwe
Leviticus10:15 Umwendo uwacituulwa ne cisao icacitambikwa
Leviticus10:16 Elyo kabili Mose aipusha palwa mbushi ya mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus10:17 “Bushe cinshi mushililile umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi mu cifulo camushilo? Ala uyu mutuulo wamushilo nganshi. Wapeelwe kuli imwe ukusendelako imilandu ya lukuta lwa bena Israeli ukubafutilako pa cinso cakwa Yawe.
Leviticus10:18 Apo umulopa wa ili lambo tautwelwe mukati ka cifulo camushilo
Leviticus10:19 Lelo Aroni ayasuka Mose ati
Leviticus10:20 Ilyo Mose aumfwa ifi
Leviticus11:1 Yawe aeba Mose na Aroni ati
Leviticus11:2 “Soseni ku bena Israeli mutile
Leviticus11:3 Mulelya inama ishapwililika ukupanduka ifibondo
Leviticus11:4 “Kuli inama shimo ishibukula nangu ishapanduka ifibondo isho mushilingile ukulalya. Ingamila nangu ibukula ifyakulya tayaba na fibondo ifyapanduka. Iyi yena
Leviticus11:5 Imbi inama iyibukula ifyakulya
Leviticus11:6 Kalulu nangu abukula ifyakulya tapanduka ifibondo
Leviticus11:7 Inkumba nangu yaba ne fibondo ifyapanduka
Leviticus11:8 Tamufwile ukulya ishi nama nangufye ukukumya ku fitumbi fyashiko
Leviticus11:9 “Pali fyonse ifikala mu menshi muli babemba ne mimana kuti mwalaya fyonse ifyakwata utulebelebe na mamba.
Leviticus11:10 Lelo conse icishili na tulebelebe nangu amamba ica mu menshi mu mimana nangu muli bemba
Leviticus11:11 Kanshi apo mwakulataluka kuli ifi fintu
Leviticus11:12 Icintu conse icisangwa mu menshi icamweo icishakwata tulebelebe na mamba cena mufwile ukutalukako.
Leviticus11:13 “Kabili ifi e fyuni mufwile ukutalukako no kukanalya. Ifyakutalukako nifi: kapumpe
Leviticus11:14 akapata makanga na bapungwa abali bonse
Leviticus11:15 na bamwankole ba misango yonse
Leviticus11:16 imbuni
Leviticus11:17 akapululu kanono
Leviticus11:18 swelelele
Leviticus11:19 icipansankola
Leviticus11:20 “Kabili ifishishi fyonse ifipupuka no kwendela ku molu yane
Leviticus11:21 Kwena eko fili fimo ifyakwata amapindo ifyendela ku molu yonse yane ifyo mwingalya. Ifi fyena fyalikwata amolu ya mpingu ayakutolokelako pa mushili.
Leviticus11:22 Muli ifi
Leviticus11:23 Lelo utushishi tonse utwakwata na molu yane
Leviticus11:24 “Eico na imwe mukaikowesha kuli ifi nga mwalaikatako. Uyo onse ukakumya ku fyafwa fyonse
Leviticus11:25 Kabili uyo onse uukasenda icafwa
Leviticus11:26 “Kabili inama shonse ishapanduka ifibondo ukwabula ukupwililika
Leviticus11:27 Muli ishi nama shonse ishendela ku molu yane
Leviticus11:28 Kabili uyo onse uwasenda ifitumbi fyashiko
Leviticus11:29 “Ku nama shonse ishenda pa mushili
Leviticus11:30 kolokombwa
Leviticus11:31 Kuli ifi fyonse ifikulika pa mushili
Leviticus11:32 Ilyo lyonse cimo pali ifi fyafwa caponena pa cintu cimo
Leviticus11:33 Lelo cimo pali ifi nga caponena ku cipe ce bumba
Leviticus11:34 Icakulya conse icikwete amenshi ayafumine muli ico cipe ce bumba
Leviticus11:35 Ponsefye apo ifitumbi fyaponena napo pene ninshi pakowela
Leviticus11:36 Lelo kwena akamfukumfuku ka menshi nangu icishima ca menshi
Leviticus11:37 Nga cakuti icitumbi caponena pa mbuto shakubyala
Leviticus11:38 Lelo nalyo line nga cakutila namwitilapo amenshi pa mbuto
Leviticus11:39 “Inama imo pasho mulya nga yaifwila
Leviticus11:40 Na uyo onse uwalyakofye ku nama iyaifwila
Leviticus11:41 “Icintu conse icisenya pa mushili cena cakutalukako
Leviticus11:42 Mwilalya ne cintu conse icikulika
Leviticus11:43 Mwilaikowesha mwe bene kuli ifi fintu. Mwiilenga ukuba abakowela mwe bene kuli ifi fintu
Leviticus11:44 Ine nine Yawe Lesa wenu. Eico kanshi isangululeni no kuba abamushilo
Leviticus11:45 Ine nine Yawe uwamufumya imwe mu Egupto no kuba Lesa wenu. Eico kanshi beni abamushilo pantu ine ndi wamushilo.
Leviticus11:46 “Kanshi aya e mafunde yakukonka palwa nama
Leviticus11:47 Mulelekanya pa fintu ifyakowela ne fishili fyakowela
