Leviticus12:2 “Sosa ku bena Israeli auti
Leviticus12:3 Na pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse
Leviticus12:4 Elyo umwanakashi ali nokupembela pa nshiku amakumi yatatu na shitatu (33)
Leviticus12:5 Lelo nga cakuti apapa umwana umwanakashi
Leviticus12:6 “Inshiku shakwe ishakusanguluka nga shapwa isho apapilepo umwana umwaume nangu umwanakashi
Leviticus12:7 Shimapepo ali nokumutuulilako kuli Yawe pakumufutilako
Leviticus12:8 “Nga cakuti umwanakashi uyu takwete umwana wa mpaanga
Leviticus13:1 Yawe aeba Mose na Aroni ati
Leviticus13:2 “Umuntu umo nga alafimba
Leviticus13:3 Shimapepo ali nokupima icilonda bwino bwino kuli uyu muntu. Nga asanga no kumona ukuti amapipi ayali pa cilonda nayabuuta
Leviticus13:4 Nga cakuti pa nkanda apalesebeka pabuuta nomba icilonda tacipitilile mu nkanda
Leviticus13:5 Shimapepo kabili panuma ya nshiku cine lubali
Leviticus13:6 Elyo kabili panuma ya nshiku na shimbi cine lubali
Leviticus13:7 Nomba panuma yakwa shimapepo ilyo amweba ati nasangululwa
Leviticus13:8 Shimapepo ali nokumupima bwino bwino nakabili. Nga cakuti asanga ubulwele nabulunduluka mu nkanda
Leviticus13:9 “Ngo muntu umo alwala ubulwele ubwambukila ubwankanda
Leviticus13:10 Shimapepo nao ali nokumupima bwino bwino. Nga asanga ukuti pa nkanda apafimbile napabuuta elyo na mapipi nayo nayabuuta
Leviticus13:11 awe ubu bulwele bwankanda ubushiputuka
Leviticus13:12 “Nga cakuti ubulwele bwakumana umubili onse
Leviticus13:13 Nga asanga ukuti cine cine ubulwele nabukumana umubili onse
Leviticus13:14 Nomba ilyo lyonse icilonda icipya capuka pa mubili wakwe
Leviticus13:15 Kabili ilyo lyonse shimapepo amona ici cilonda icipya icamupuka
Leviticus13:16 Lelo ici cilonda icibishi nga cayaluka icabuuta
Leviticus13:17 Elyo shimapepo ali nokumuceceta bwino bwino. Nga amona icilonda cine cine cili icabuutuluka
Leviticus13:18 “Nga cakuti umuntu umo icipute capuka pa mubili wakwe no kupola capola
Leviticus13:19 elyo apo pene apali icipute pafimba
Leviticus13:20 Shimapepo nao ali nokumuceceta. Nga asanga ukuti ubulwele bwalingila kale mu mubili no bupipi nabubuutuluka
Leviticus13:21 Lelo nga cakuti ilyo shimapepo amuceceta
Leviticus13:22 Nomba nga cakuti ubulwele bwalalundulukilakofye
Leviticus13:23 Icilonda nga tacilundulwike no kukumana monse monse mu mubili
Leviticus13:24 “Nga cakuti umuntu umo apya umulilo
Leviticus13:25 shimapepo ali nokuceceta uyu muntu. Nga asanga ukuti amapipi yalipo nayabuuta
Leviticus13:26 Nomba amapipi ayalipo nga tayali ayabuuta no kutobonkela nako tapatobonkele ne cilonda naco naceluka
Leviticus13:27 Panuma ya nshiku cine lubali
Leviticus13:28 Lelo
Leviticus13:29 “Nga cakuti umwaume nangu umwanakashi ali ne cilonda mu mutwe
Leviticus13:30 shimapepo ali nokuceceta ici cilonda. Nga camoneka ukuti apo apali ici cilonda napatobonkela
Leviticus13:31 Lelo shimapepo ali nokuceceta ici cilonda
Leviticus13:32 Na pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali nga bwafika
Leviticus13:33 uyu mulwele ninshi bali nokumubeya umushishifye onse ukushinguluka icilonda ukushafye pa cilonda peka. Elyo shimapepo ali nokusunga uyu mulwele eka pa nshiku na shimbi cine lubali.
Leviticus13:34 Kabili ishi nshiku nga shapwa
Leviticus13:35 Nomba nga cakuti icilonda calunduluka ilyo naebwa kale ati
Leviticus13:36 ninshi shimapepo ali nokumuceceta nakabili. Icilonda nga cakuti calilundulukako
Leviticus13:37 Nga cakuti nalimo shimapepo amona ifyo icilonda tacilundulwike cilifye umo cabela
Leviticus13:38 “Ngo mwaume napamo umwanakashi akwata ubulwele bwa cisongo pa mubili wakwe
Leviticus13:39 shimapepo alingile ukumuceceta bwino bwino. Nga amona ukuti ifibala fili eyefilyako mukubuutulukila
Leviticus13:40 “Ngo muntu umushishi wapwa ukunukuka ukushinguluka umutwe wakwe
Leviticus13:41 Nga cakuti umushishi waseseka lwa ku mpumi eko ili ipala lyabelafye
Leviticus13:42 Lelo nga cakuti uyu umuntu pepala palemoneka icilonda icakashikila no kubuutuluka nangu ni pa mpumi pene
Leviticus13:43 Shimapepo ali nokumuceceta uyu muntu. Kabili nga amona ukuti icilonda icifimbile mu mutwe wakwe nangu pa mpumi cili icakashikila no kubuutuluka nga ca bulwele bwambukila ubwankanda
Leviticus13:44 uyu muntu mulwele
Leviticus13:45 “Umuntu uulwele ubu bulwele ubwambukila wena ali nokufwalafye insalu ishalepauka. Imishishi yakwe mu mutwe taili nakusakulwa
Leviticus13:46 Uyu muntu ali nokuba uushasangululwa mpakafye apo ubulwele bwakwe bukapolela. Kabili ali nokwikalafye ku nse ya nkambi.”
Leviticus13:47 “Nga cakuti insalu isho umulwele afwala shili ishakowela no kufufuma
Leviticus13:48 yonse insalu iyapikulwa nangu ibe iyabilwa no kutelela bwino nangufye ya butonge
Leviticus13:49 nga cakuti icisemba mu fyakufwala
Leviticus13:50 Shimapepo ali nokuceceta no kumona ifyo cifufwime no kucifumya pa fibiye ukucibika ceka pa nshiku cine lubali.
Leviticus13:51 Ubushiku bwa cine lubali nga bwafika
Leviticus13:52 Kanshi shimapepo afwile ukucocafye ici cakufwala
Leviticus13:53 “Nomba nga cakuti shimapepo aceceta ici cintu
Leviticus13:54 shimapepo ali nokupeela icipope cakuti ici cintu icakowela cifwile ukucapwa no kucisunga ceka pa nshiku cine lubali.
Leviticus13:55 Elyo panuma ya nshiku cine lubali
Leviticus13:56 Lelo nga ilyo shimapepo aceceta ici cintu
Leviticus13:57 Nomba nga cakuti ukufufuma kwa cakufwala kwayamba nakabili
Leviticus13:58 Icakufwala
Leviticus13:59 Kanshi aya e mafunde yakukonka pa mulandu wa fyakufwala nga fyalafufuma. Nangufye cibe cakufwala capikulwa na masako
Leviticus14:1 Yawe aeba Mose ati
Leviticus14:2 “Aya e mafunde yakukonka umulwele walwala amalwele yankanda ayambukila ilyo lyonse aleleka umutuulo wakusangululwa kuli shimapepo.
Leviticus14:3 Eico
Leviticus14:4 shimapepo ali nokukonkomesha umulwele uyu ukupeela ifyuni fibili ifyamweo ifishakowela
Leviticus14:5 Elyo shimapepo ali nokukonkomesha uyu uwikete ifyuni ukuti epaile cimo pa mbale ye bumba umuli amenshi ayasuma.
Leviticus14:6 Ali nokusenda ici coni icituntulu icishelepo
Leviticus14:7 Elyo shimapepo akane umulopa pa muntu uyu uulesangululwa imiku cine lubali no kusosa ukuti uyu muntu nasangululwa ku bulwele bwankanda ubwambukila. Shimapepo epakuleka icuni icituntulu ukuti cileya mu mpanga.
Leviticus14:8 Umuntu uulesangululwa ali nokusamba ifyakufwala fyakwe
Leviticus14:9 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali
Leviticus14:10 “Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse
Leviticus14:11 Shimapepo uusangile uyu muntu ukuti nasangululwa
Leviticus14:12 Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuulapo akana ka mpaanga kamo akalume aka mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. Ali nokubikapo no musukupala umo uwa mafuta
Leviticus14:13 Shimapepo ali nokwipaila akana ka mpaanga pa ncende iyamushilo apo bepaila inama sha mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi ne lambo lyakoca. Umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi cimo nge fyaba umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus14:14 Shimapepo ali nokubuulapo umulopa umo uwa kana ka mpaanga akali nokutuulwa ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi
Leviticus14:15 Kabili shimapepo ali nokubuulamo amafuta mu musukupala no kwitulwila pa lupi lwakwe ulwa ku kuboko kwa ku kuso.
Leviticus14:16 Elyo shimapepo atumpike umunwe wakwe uwa ku kulyo uyu wakonkapo icikumo mu mafuta ayali pa lupi. Umulopa uli ku munwe
Leviticus14:17 Kabili ali nokubuulapo amafuta yamo pa yashele pa lupi lwakwe no kuyashinga ku kalebelebe ka ku kutwi kwa ku kulyo ukwa uyu muntu uulesangululwa. Yambi amafuta ali nokuyashinga ku cikumo ca kuboko kwa ku kulyo
Leviticus14:18 Amafuta yonse ayashala pa lupi lwakwa shimapepo
Leviticus14:19 “Elyo kabili shimapepo ali nokuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. Uyu mutuulo wakwimininako umuntu uyu uwakowela pakuti abe uwasangululwa ku fyamukowesha. Na panuma ya ifi
Leviticus14:20 no kuyatuula pa bulambo
Leviticus14:21 “Nga cakuti uyu muntu mulanda
Leviticus14:22 no twana twa fipele tubili nangu utubondo twa nkunda tubili ifyo engakwatapo
Leviticus14:23 “Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse uyu muntu alingile aleta ifi fyonse kuli shimapepo kukumusangulwilako pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo ku cinso cakwa Yawe.
Leviticus14:24 Shimapepo ali nokubuula umwana wa mpaanga wa mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi
Leviticus14:25 Shimapepo ali nokwipaya akana ka mpaanga akakutuula umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi no kubuulako umulopa umo no kuushinga ku kalebelebe ka ku kutwi kwa kulyo ukwa muntu uuli nokusangululwa. Kabili nao aushinge ku cikumo ca kuboko kwa ku kulyo elyo na ku cikondo cikalamba ca lukasa lwa ku kulyo.
Leviticus14:26 Elyo kabili abike amafuta mu lupi lwakwe ulwa ku kuso
Leviticus14:27 elyo mukubomfya umunwe wakonkapo icikumo uwa ku kulyo
Leviticus14:28 Amafuta yamo ayali mu lupi ali nokusuba umo mwine acisuba pakubala umulopa uwa mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi
Leviticus14:29 Amafuta yonse ayashala mu lupi
Leviticus14:30 Elyo nomba shimapepo ali nokutuulapo akana kamo ka cipele
Leviticus14:31 Elyo ukulingana napo akwatile
Leviticus14:32 Kanshi aya e mafunde yakukonka ku muntu onse uwalwala ubulwele ubwambukila ubwankanda
Leviticus14:33 Yawe aeba Mose na Aroni ati
Leviticus14:34 “Ilyo mukengila mu calo ca Kenani
Leviticus14:35 umwine wa ŋanda iyi ali nokweba shimapepo ukuti
Leviticus14:36 Shimapepo ilyo talati aye kukumona ifyo iyi ŋanda ifufwime
Leviticus14:37 Ali nokumona bwino ifyo icibumba cifufwime. Nga amona icibumba cili icakatapa katapa nangu icakashikila umo citobonkele ukucila ifyo icibumba cili nokuba kunse
Leviticus14:38 ninshi shimapepo ali nokufumina panse ya ŋanda
Leviticus14:39 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali
Leviticus14:40 ali nokubakonkomesha ukufumya amabwe yonse ayafufwime no kuyaposa kunse ya musumba uko baposa ifyakowela fyonse.
Leviticus14:41 Afwile ukumona ukuti icibumba conse ica mukati ka ŋanda capalwa
Leviticus14:42 Elyo bali nokubuula amabwe yambi no kuyapyanikishapo elintu bashingule cipya cipya icibumba.
Leviticus14:43 “Nga cakuti ukufufuma takupwile muli iyi ŋanda panuma yakufumyako amabwe no kupala kwa cibumba elyo no kushingwililako iloba limbi
Leviticus14:44 shimapepo ali nokuya mona elyo nga cakuti ukufufuma nakulunduluka mu ŋanda
Leviticus14:45 Iyi ŋanda ili nokuba yakubongololafye yonse
Leviticus14:46 Kanshi umuntu onse uwaingila muli iyi ŋanda ilyo icili iyaisalwa
Leviticus14:47 Kabili no muntu onse uwasendamamo nangufye ukulilamo ifyakulya
Leviticus14:48 “Lelo nga cakuti shimapepo ayamona iyi ŋanda ukuti ilifye bwino
Leviticus14:49 Pakusangulula iyi ŋanda shimapepo ali nokubuula ifyuni fibili
Leviticus14:50 Shimapepo ali nokwipaila icuni cimo pa nongo ye bumba umuli amenshi ayalengama.
Leviticus14:51 Elyo ali nokubuula ulukuni lwa keda
Leviticus14:52 Shimapepo ali nokusangulula iŋanda ku mulopa wa cuni
Leviticus14:53 Panuma ya ifi fyonse shimapepo nomba ali nokuleka icuni icili icituntulu cileya mu mpanga. Na muli uyu musango
Leviticus14:54 Kanshi aya e mafunde yakukonka palwa malwele ya nkanda ayambukila
Leviticus14:55 ukufufuma kwa nsalu nangu iŋanda
Leviticus14:56 nangu ukulafimba
Leviticus14:57 pakulangilila ukuti icintu calisangululwa nangu cintu cakowela. Aya e mafunde palwa malwele ya nkanda ayambukila elyo no kufufuma.
Leviticus15:1 Yawe aeba Mose na Aroni ati
Leviticus15:2 “Ebeni abena Israeli no kutila kuli bena
Leviticus15:3 Umubili wakwe nangufye utwalilile ukupompa
Leviticus15:4 “Ubusanshi bonse ubo uyu muntu uulepompa asendamapo
Leviticus15:5 Umuntu onse uwaikata ku busanshi bwakwe afwile acapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi
Leviticus15:6 Kabili uyo onse uwaikala apo uyu muntu uulepompa acikala
Leviticus15:7 “Umuntu onse uwaikata kuli uyu muntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa
Leviticus15:8 Nalimo nga cakuti umuntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa asaka umuntu umo amate
Leviticus15:9 “Icintu conse ico uyu muntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa aikalapo pa lwendo naco cine ninshi cakowela.
Leviticus15:10 Kabili uyo onse uwaikata kuli ico uyu muntu acikalapo
Leviticus15:11 “Uyo onse uo umuntu umubili wakwe ulepompa
Leviticus15:12 “Inongo ye bumba iyaikatwako no muntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa
Leviticus15:13 “Nga cakuti uyu muntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa apola
Leviticus15:14 Na pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse
Leviticus15:15 Shimapepo nao ali nokufituula ilambo
Leviticus15:16 “Umuntu onse umwaume nga apemena panshi
Leviticus15:17 Eico kanshi
Leviticus15:18 Kabili nga cakuti umwaume nga asendama no mwanakashi
Leviticus15:19 “Umwanakashi nga aba kumpepo
Leviticus15:20 “Icintu conse ico uyu mwanakashi alalapo ilyo acili kumpepo naco cine ninshi cakowela
Leviticus15:21 Eico kanshi
Leviticus15:22 Noyo onse uwaikata ku cintu ico ekelepo
Leviticus15:23 Nangu cibefye busanshi nelyo icintu conse ico ekelepo
Leviticus15:24 “Eico kanshi
Leviticus15:25 “Umwanakashi nga alapompa pa nshiku ishingi pa nshita ashili kumpepo nangu ukupompa kwakwe kwapitilila ilyo aba kumpepo
Leviticus15:26 Ubusanshi bonse asendamapo ilyo ukupompa kwatwalilila
Leviticus15:27 Umuntu onse uwaikata kuli ifi fintu
Leviticus15:28 “Ilyo uyu mwanakashi asanguluka
Leviticus15:29 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse
Leviticus15:30 Shimapepo nao ali nokutuulapo kamo
Leviticus15:31 “Kanshi muli nokutalusha abena Israeli ku fintu ifingabalenga ukuba abakowela
Leviticus15:32 Aya e mafunde yakukonka ku mwaume uo umubili wakwe ulepompa
Leviticus15:33 ku mwanakashi uuli kumpepo
Leviticus16:1 Yawe aebele Mose panuma ya mfwa ya bana baume bakwa Aroni ilyo bapalamine ku cinso cakwa Yawe ati
Leviticus16:2 “Eba munonko Aroni ukuti elaisa mu muputule wamushilo icine cine pa nshita iyo umwine alefwailapo ukwishila kunuma ya cisalu cacingako pa ntanshi ya Nkupiko apakufutilwapo ifyabubi iyaba pa mulu wa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano
Leviticus16:3 “Ifi efyo Aroni afwile ukulaingila mu cifulo camushilo. Ali nokuleta iciponti ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi elyo na sukusuku nge lambo lya cakoca.
Leviticus16:4 Ali nokufwala umwingila wamushilo uwatelela na kaputula wa nsalu iyatelela mukati. Ali nokukaka ilamba lya nsalu iyatelela mu musana no kupomba insalu iyatelela ku mutwe. Fyonse ifi ifyakufwala
Leviticus16:5 Kabili ku lukuta lwa bena Israeli kuli nokufuma imbushi ishilume shibili isha mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus16:6 “Aroni nao ali nokutuula cilume wa ŋombe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus16:7 Eico kanshi
Leviticus16:8 Elyo apendule no kumona ifyo ishi mbushi shibili shili nokwakanishiwa. Ukupendula kumo kube kwakwa Yawe elyo kumbi nako kuli Asaseli.
Leviticus16:9 Aroni ali nokuleta imbushi iyo ukupendula kwawila kuli Yawe no kuileka ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi.
Leviticus16:10 Lelo imbushi iyo ukupendula kwawila kuli Asaseli
Leviticus16:11 “Aroni ali nokuleka cilume wa ŋombe umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwakwe mukuifutila kuli Yawe umwine pamo pene na ba ŋanda yakwe. Kabili ali nokwipaya uyu cilume wa ŋombe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi.
Leviticus16:12 Ali nokubuula icifukilisho icaisulapo amalasha ya mulilo ukufuma pa bulambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe no bubani indupi shibili no kutwala kunuma ya cisalu icacingako umuputule wamushilo icine cine.
Leviticus16:13 Ali nokubika ububani pa mulilo ukuba icakusekesha Yawe. Elyo nomba icushi ca bubani cili nokufisa Inkupiko apakufutilwapo ifyabubifi iyili pa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano
Leviticus16:14 Aroni ali nokutumpika umunwe wakwe mu mulopa wakwa cilume wa ŋombe no kuukana pa Nkupiko ya Mbokoshi apakufutilwapo ifyabubifi. Elyo na umbi ali nokuukana imiku cine lubali pantanshi ya Nkupiko apakufutilwapo ifyabubifi.
Leviticus16:15 “Elyo lyena Aroni ali nokwipaya imbushi ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwa bantu no kutwala umulopa waiko kunuma ya cisalu icicingako Imbokoshi ya Cipangano
Leviticus16:16 Kanshi na mu nshila iyi
Leviticus16:17 Takuli muntu nelyo umo uwakuba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pa nshita Aroni aingilamo mukufuta mu cifulo camushilo
Leviticus16:18 “Kabili ali nokufuma no kuya ku bulambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe no mulopa umo uwakwa cilume wa ŋombe na umo uwa mbushi no kuushinga ku nsengo shonse isha bulambo pakubusangulula.
Leviticus16:19 Elyo atumpike umunwe mu mulopa no kukana ku bulambo imiku cine lubali ukuti busangululwe ukufuma ku kukowela kwa bena Israeli bonse.
Leviticus16:20 “Ilyo Aroni apwisha ukufutilako Umuputule wamushilo icine cine
Leviticus16:21 Aroni ali nokutambalikilapo amaboko yakwe pa mutwe wa mbushi iyituntulu no kulumbula ifibi fyonse na bucisanguka bwa bena Israeli
Leviticus16:22 Imbushi ine iyi eili nokusenda ububifi bonse mu ncende umushaba bantu
Leviticus16:23 “Elyo Aroni ali nokuya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kufuula ifyakufwala fya bushimapepo
Leviticus16:24 Aroni ali nokowa umubili onse na menshi mu ncende yamushilo elyo nokufwala ifyakufwala fyakwe. Nga apwisha ukufwala
Leviticus16:25 Kabili ali nokoca aya mafuta pa bulambo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi.
Leviticus16:26 “Uyu muntu uwasendele imbushi no kuya ileka ileya kuli Asaseli
Leviticus16:27 Cilume wa ŋombe pamo pene ne mbushi ifyalekelwe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus16:28 Umuntu uwaoca ifi fyonse afwile ukucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi. Elyo nomba panuma kuti aingila mu nkambi.”
Leviticus16:29 Kabili Yawe akonkomesha ukuti
Leviticus16:30 Pantu pa bushiku bwine ubu
Leviticus16:31 Ubu bushiku bwe Sabata ubwakutuusha no kuikanya
Leviticus16:32 Shimapepo uwasubwa kabili uwalashikwa kukuba shimapepo
Leviticus16:33 no kufutilako icifulo camushilo
Leviticus16:34 “Ili lili nokuba e funde ilyamuyayaya kuli imwe
Leviticus17:1 Yawe atile kuli Mose
Leviticus17:2 “Eba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume na bonse abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena
Leviticus17:3 onse umwina Israeli uwaipaya iŋombe nangu impaanga nangu imbushi
Leviticus17:4 ukwabula ukuti ailete pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kupeela ngo mutuulo kuli Yawe
Leviticus17:5 Ifi emukutila abena Israeli baleke ukuleta inama isho bepaile kumbi ukuba ishe lambo
Leviticus17:6 Shimapepo nao ali nokukana umulopa ku bulambo bwakwa Yawe
Leviticus17:7 Ifi ni pakuti tabafwile kabili ukutuula imituulo imbi iya malambo ku tulubi twa mbushi uto baicitileko bucilende pakutukonka. Ili e funde lyamuyayaya kuli bena na ku nkulo shonse ishili nokukonkapo.’
Leviticus17:8 “Sosa kuli bene auti
Leviticus17:9 nomba nga taletele ifi ku mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kutuula ili lambo kuli Yawe
Leviticus17:10 “Uyo onse umwina Israeli nangufye mwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe uulya umulopa onse
Leviticus17:11 Pantu ubumi bwa cibumbwa conse bwaba mu mulopa
Leviticus17:12 Eico ndeeba abena Israeli ukuti
Leviticus17:13 “Umwina Israeli onse
Leviticus17:14 Pantu ubumi bwa cintu conse icamweo bwaba mu mulopa. Uyu wine e mulandu naebela abana ba Israeli ukuti
Leviticus17:15 “Uyo onse umwikalacalo nangufye mwinafyalo uwalya inama iyaifwila
Leviticus17:16 Nga cakuti tacapile ifyakufwala fyakwe elyo no kowa umubili onse
Leviticus18:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus18:2 “Eba abana ba Israeli nokutila kuli bena
Leviticus18:3 Imwe nomba mwilacita nga filya ficita abena Egupto kulya mwaikele
Leviticus18:4 Mufwilefye ukulabeela amafunde yandi no kucita ifyo mfwaya. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu.
Leviticus18:5 Mulebaka ifyo ine mfwaya na mafunde yandi yonse
Leviticus18:6 “Umuntu onse talingile ukusendama no wa mu lupwa lwakwe nelyo umo. Nine Yawe.
Leviticus18:7 “Tecakwesha ukusebanya wiso mukusendama na noko. Uyu wena ni noko. Wiyesha ukusendama nankwe.
Leviticus18:8 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na bambi bamukawiso
Leviticus18:9 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na nkashi yobe fumamfume
Leviticus18:10 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mwishikulu obe umwana wa mwana obe umwaume
Leviticus18:11 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mwana umwanakashi wa bamukawiso
Leviticus18:12 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na banokosenge ba nkashi ya bawiso. Uyu wena ni munyina bawiso uwacine cine.
Leviticus18:13 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na bamunyina ba banoko. Aba bena nabo e bamunyina ba banoko icine cine.
Leviticus18:14 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na bamuka bamunyina wa bawiso. Ala aba bena nabo
Leviticus18:15 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na nokofyala
Leviticus18:16 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mukashi wakwa munonko bukwe bobe. Ici cikaleta umusebanya kuli munonko.
Leviticus18:17 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mwanakashi pamo no mwana wakwe. Kabili tecakwesha ukusendama no mwana umwanakashi uwafyalwa ku mwana wakwe umwaume
Leviticus18:18 “Tecakwesha ukubuula munyina wa mukashi obe
Leviticus18:19 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mwanakashi ilyo acili uwakowela pa nshita ilyo ali kumpepo.
Leviticus18:20 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na muka mubiyo umwina mupalamano
Leviticus18:21 “Tecakwesha ukubuula abana benu ukuti ebo muletuulilapo umulungu Moleki ilambo
Leviticus18:22 “Tecakwesha ukulasendama no mwaume mubiyo ngefyo mwingasendama no mwanakashi. Ici camakankamike.
Leviticus18:23 “Tecakwesha umuntu onse umwaume ukusendama ne nama no kuikowesha umwine kuco acita. E cimo cine no mwanakashi onse tafwile kusendama ne nama
Leviticus18:24 “Tecakwesha ukuikowesha mu nshila sha misango iyi. Pantu iyi ine e misango iyakoweseshe imishobo ya bantu bonse
Leviticus18:25 Kanshi ne calo casangwike icakowela
Leviticus18:26 Nomba imwe mufwile mulebaka amafunde yandi ne fipope fyandi. Tamufwile kucita ifyamakankamike
Leviticus18:27 Ifi fintu fyonse fyacitilwe na bantu abaikele mu calo ici ilyo imwe tamulaisamo. Ici calo elyo cakowelele.
Leviticus18:28 Eico na imwe nga mwakowesha ici calo
Leviticus18:29 “Umuntu onse uwacitapo cimo pali ifi ifyamakankamike
Leviticus18:30 Eico kanshi imwe mufwilefye ukucita ifyo ine mfwaya. Tecakwesha ukukonkelela intambi ishamuselu ishalekonkwa ilyo tamulaisa. Kabili tecakwesha ukuikowesha mwe bene kuli ifi. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu.”
Leviticus19:1 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus19:2 “Eba ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli ukutila kuli bena
Leviticus19:3 “Onsefye uwa muli imwe afwile ukulacindika nyina pamo na wishi
Leviticus19:4 “Tecakwesha nangu panono ukufuma ku cinso candi no kuya mukupepa utulubi utwaengwa ne fyela
Leviticus19:5 “Ilyo mwalatuula umutuulo we lambo lyakwampana kuli Yawe
Leviticus19:6 Ubushiku bwine ilambo lyatuulilwapo elyo mufwile ukulya
Leviticus19:7 Lelo nga cakuti mwalyako kamo pali ubu bwine bushiku bwacitatu
Leviticus19:8 Eico uyo onse uwalyako
Leviticus19:9 “Ilyo lyonse mwalasombola ifilyo mu mabala yenu
Leviticus19:10 Tecakwesha ukuya mwibala lya myangashi umuku wacibili mukutola no kusaba ifitwalo fya myangashi ifyashele. Ifi fyonse filekeleni abalanda pamo na benafyalo. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu.
Leviticus19:11 “Mwilaiba. “Mwilabepa bufi. “Mwilacenjeshanya.
Leviticus19:12 “Mwilalapa mwishina lyandi umulapo wabufi no kusebanya ishina lyakwa Lesa wenu. Nine Yawe.
Leviticus19:13 “Wilaliila umunobe pa mutwe nangu ukumwibila. “Wilasunga malipilo ya muntu uwakubombela ukushinta na ku bushiku bwakonkapo.
Leviticus19:14 “Wilalapisha nkomamatwi
Leviticus19:15 “Wilaba na lufyengo mu bupingushi. Wilawililila ku lubali lwa mulanda nangufye ukutiina umukankala no kumusekesha
Leviticus19:16 “Wilaamba munobe mukusabankanya ifyabufi. Kabili tecakwesha ukucita icintu cimo icakuleta ubusanso ku bumi bwa mubiyo. Nine Yawe.
Leviticus19:17 “Wilakwatila munonko impatila mu mutima obe. Ulingilefye ukukalipila munonko ukwabula ukupita mumbali
Leviticus19:18 “Wilalandula pa cintu conse icabipa
Leviticus19:19 “Mulebaka amafunde yandi. “Mwilalenga ifitekwa fibili ifya misango iyapusana kutamfyanya. “Tecakwesha ukubyala imbuto sha misango ibili mwibala limo. “Tecakwesha ukufwala insalu yapikulwa no bushishi bwa misango ibili.
Leviticus19:20 “Nga cakuti umwaume umo asendama no mwanakashi uucili umusha
Leviticus19:21 Lelo umwaume afwile ukuleta sukusuku pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi kuli Yawe.
Leviticus19:22 Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuula sukusuku wa mutuulo wakufutila pa fyabubifi nokufutilako uyu muntu pafyo acita kuli Yawe. Elyo no bubifi bwakwe bukelelwa.
Leviticus19:23 “Ilyo mukengila mu calo ca Kenani no kulimba umuti uuli onse uwa fitwalo
Leviticus19:24 Mu mwaka walenga bune
Leviticus19:25 Lelo mu mwaka walenga busano
Leviticus19:26 “Tecakwesha ukulya inama iyicilimo no mulopa. Tecakwesha ukulabuka nangufye ukulowa.
Leviticus19:27 “Tecakwesha ukubeya mu mbali ya mutwe
Leviticus19:28 “Tecakwesha ukulatetaula imibili yenu umuntu nga afwa
Leviticus19:29 “Tecakwesha ukusebanya abana benu abanakashi mukubacita bacilende
Leviticus19:30 “Mulingile ukulasunga no kucindika inshiku shandi she Sabata. Mulecindika ne cifulo candi icamushilo. Nine Yawe.
Leviticus19:31 “Tecakwesha ukuya kuli bakabuka nangu ababomba ne mipashi. Nga efyo mwalacita
Leviticus19:32 “Mufwile lyonse ukuicefya apali abakalamba. Langeni umucinshi ku bamucilile no kukwatila Lesa wenu akatiina. Nine Yawe.
Leviticus19:33 “Ilyo lyonse muleikala no mweni mu calo cenu
Leviticus19:34 Umweni uo muleikala nankwe aleba ngo wafyalilwa mu calo mumwenu. Mulemutemwa ngefyo mwaitemwa
Leviticus19:35 “Mwilacita bucenjeshi ilyo mulepimina abanenu ifintu mu ntamfu
Leviticus19:36 Bomfyeni ifipimo fyacine cine ne fyakupiminako ifyacishinka. Efa uwacishinka na hini uwacishinka. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu
Leviticus19:37 Bakeni amafunde yandi yonse ne fipope fyandi fyonse
Leviticus20:1 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus20:2 “Eba abena Israeli utile
Leviticus20:3 Nkafutatila uyu muntu
Leviticus20:4 Nga cakuti ibumba lya bantu lyasuula umulandu uo uyu muntu acita pakutuula umwana wakwe kuli Moleki no kufilwa ukuti bamwipaye
Leviticus20:5 ine nkamufutatila pamo no lupwa lwakwe
Leviticus20:6 “Nkafutatila uyo onse uukangalukila no kuya kuli bakabuka nangu ababomba ne mipashi
Leviticus20:7 Muleba abasanguluka no kuba abamushilo
Leviticus20:8 Mulebaka amafunde yandi no kuyakonka. Nine Yawe ne umulenga ukuba abamushilo.
Leviticus20:9 “Nga cakuti umuntu alapisha wishi nangufye ni nyina
Leviticus20:10 “Kabili umuntu umwaume nga acita ubucende na muka mwine
Leviticus20:11 “Umwaume onse uwasendama na muka wishi
Leviticus20:12 “Umwaume onse uwasendama na nafyala
Leviticus20:13 “Kabili umwaume nga asendama no mwaume mubiye
Leviticus20:14 “Umwaume nga aupa umwanakashi kabili aupa na nyinafyala kumo
Leviticus20:15 “Umwaume onse uwasendama ne citekwa
Leviticus20:16 “Umwanakashi onse nga apalama ku citekwa conse kukusendama naco
Leviticus20:17 “Nga cakuti umwaume aupa nkashi yakwe
Leviticus20:18 “Umwaume onse nga cakuti asendama no mwanakashi uuli kumpepo
Leviticus20:19 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na bamunyina banoko nangufye ni banokosenge
Leviticus20:20 “Umwaume onse uwasendama na muka nalume
Leviticus20:21 “Kabili umwaume onse uwaupa muka munyina acita icakowela
Leviticus20:22 “Mulebaka amafunde yandi yonse ne fipope fyandi fyonse no kufikonka
Leviticus20:23 Tecakwesha ukukonkelela intambi ne mikalile ya mitundu ndetamfya muli ici calo muli nokuyamo
Leviticus20:24 “Lelo ine namwebele ukuti
Leviticus20:25 “Eico kanshi mufwile ukulalekanya inama ishasangululwa ne shakowela
Leviticus20:26 Mufwile ukuba abamushilo kuli ine pantu ine ne Yawe ndi wamushilo
Leviticus20:27 “Umwaume onse nangu umwanakashi onse uubuka nangu uubomba ne mipashi afwile ukwipaiwa. Mulingile ukubatobafye amabwe. No mulopa wabo uli nokuba pa mitwe yabo.”
Leviticus21:1 Yawe atile kuli Mose
Leviticus21:2 Kanofye nga wa mu lupwa
Leviticus21:3 nangu nkashi yakwe uo bafyalwa nankwe kabili uushatala opwapo uo asunga
Leviticus21:4 Tafwile ukuikowesha umwine pakuya ku cililo ca ba mu lupwa lwa uko aupila pantu kuti aba uwakowela.’
Leviticus21:5 “Bashimapepo bonse tabafwile kubeya imishishi ya mu mitwe yabo
Leviticus21:6 Bafwile ukuba abamushilo kuli Lesa wabo kabili tabafwile kusebanya ishina lyakwa Lesa wabo iyoo. Pantu batuula umutuulo wacakoca kuli Yawe
Leviticus21:7 “Bashimapepo tabalingile ukuupa abanakashi abakoweshiwa muli bucilende nangu abanakashi abo balekapo
Leviticus21:8 Bamoneni ukuti bamushilo
Leviticus21:9 “Mwana shimapepo umwanakashi nga cakuti ailenga ukukanaba uwamushilo mukuba cilende
Leviticus21:10 “Shimapepo mukalamba umo pali bamunyina
Leviticus21:11 Tafwile ukufika apali umuntu wafwa. Tafwile ukuikowesha umwine iyoo
Leviticus21:12 Kabili tafwile nakufuma mu cifulo camushilo cakwa Lesa wakwe nangu ukucikowesha
Leviticus21:13 “Shimapepo mukalamba afwile ukuupa umwanakashi uushatala asendamapo no mwaume.
Leviticus21:14 Kabili tafwile kuupa mukamfwilwa
Leviticus21:15 Lyena takakoweshe abana bakwe mu bantu bakwe. Nine Yawe
Leviticus21:16 Kabili Yawe atile kuli Mose
Leviticus21:17 “Eba Aroni no kutila
Leviticus21:18 Tapali nelyo umo uwakwisa mupepi uwakwata akalema: Impofu
Leviticus21:19 uwalemana ulukasa nangu ukuboko
Leviticus21:20 uwaŋongo nangu intuse
Leviticus21:21 Tapali uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Aroni uuli na kalema uwakupalama no kutuula umutuulo wa cakoca kuli ine ne Yawe. Ali na kalema
Leviticus21:22 Lelo kuti alya icakulya icamushilo nganshi icakwa Lesa wakwe pamo pene ne camushilofye.
Leviticus21:23 Pa mulandu wakuti wena muntu wakalema
Leviticus21:24 Awe Mose epakweba Aroni ifi fyonse pamo na bana bakwe abaume na bena Israeli bonse.
Leviticus22:1 Yawe atile kuli Mose
Leviticus22:2 “Eba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ukuti balesunga no mucinshi imituulo yonse iyamushilo iyo abena Israeli bantuula ne Yawe ukuti tabasebenye ishina lyandi ilyamushilo. Nine Yawe.
Leviticus22:3 Bebe auti
Leviticus22:4 “Umuntu onse uwa mu luko lwakwa Aroni nga alilwala ubulwele bwankanda ubwambukila
Leviticus22:5 Akaba uwakowela nga akumya ku cikulika panshi conse
Leviticus22:6 Umuntu uwakumyako kuli ifi
Leviticus22:7 Ilyo akasuba kawa
Leviticus22:8 Tafwile kulya icaifwila
Leviticus22:9 “Bashimapepo bonse bali nokucita ifyo nabakonkomesha epakuti bekaba mu milandu no kufwila mu cifulo camushilo pa mulandu wakusuula amafunde yandi. Nine Yawe uubalenga ukuba abamushilo.
Leviticus22:10 “Umuntu onse uushili wa mu lupwa lwa bushimapepo tali nakulyako umutuulo wamushilo. Nangufye mweni wine uwakwa shimapepo no mubomfifye wakwe wine tali nakulyako.
Leviticus22:11 Lelo shimapepo nga cakuti ashita umusha no lupiya lwakwefye
Leviticus22:12 Umwana umwanakashi uwakwa shimapepo nga aupwa ku mwaume uushili shimapepo
Leviticus22:13 Lelo uyu mwana umwanakashi wakwa shimapepo nga aba mukamfwilwa
Leviticus22:14 “Umuntu uuli onse nga cakuti alya icakulya ca mutuulo icamushilo mukukanaishiba
Leviticus22:15 Bashimapepo tabafwile ukusaalula imituulo yamushilo iyo abena Israeli batuula kuli Yawe
Leviticus22:16 pakusuminisha abantu ukulalya kuli iyi mituulo yamushilo
Leviticus22:17 Kabili Yawe atile kuli Mose
Leviticus22:18 “Eba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume na bena Israeli bonse utile kuli bena
Leviticus22:19 afwile ukupeela inama iyilume iyabula akalema ukufuma pa mukuni wakwe uwa ŋombe
Leviticus22:20 Tecakwesha ukuleta conse icili na kalema
Leviticus22:21 Ilyo lyonse umuntu aleta ice lambo lyakwe ukufuma pa mukuni wa ŋombe nangu impaanga kukuba umutuulo wakwampana kuli Yawe
Leviticus22:22 Tecakwesha ukutuula inama ye lambo iyishimona
Leviticus22:23 Nalimo kuti mwatuula inama ye lambo lyakuitemenwa iŋombe nangu impaanga iyatusa
Leviticus22:24 Tecakwesha ukutuula kuli Yawe inama ilume iyo intoyo shakwebululwa
Leviticus22:25 Kabili tamufwile kulapoka inama sha musango uyu ukufuma ku benafyalo no kushituula ngo mutuulo wa fyakulya kuli Lesa wenu. Tafyakapokelelwe mukumwimininako pantu fyalibamo no bulema.’”
Leviticus22:26 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus22:27 “Ilyo lyonse iŋombe
Leviticus22:28 Tecakwesha ukwipaya iŋombe atemwa impaanga no twana twashiko mu bushiku bumo bwine.
Leviticus22:29 “Ilyo lyonse muletuula umutuulo wakutotela kuli Yawe
Leviticus22:30 Ufwile ukuliwa pa bushiku bwine ubo mwautuula. Tewakushako nangu kamo mpaka ulucelo. Nine Yawe.
Leviticus22:31 “Mulebaka amafunde yandi nokuyakonka. Nine Yawe.
Leviticus22:32 Tecakwesha ukusebanya ishina lyandi ilyamushilo. Mfwile ukwishibikwa kuli imwe mwe bena Israeli ukuti ine ndi wamushilo. Nine Yawe
Leviticus22:33 kabili uwamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto no kuba Lesa wenu. Nine Yawe.”
Leviticus23:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus23:2 “Eba abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena
Leviticus23:3 “Kwabafye inshiku mutanda isho mwingabombamo imilimo
Leviticus23:4 “Ishi ni nshikunkulu ishasontwa ishakwa Yawe
Leviticus23:5 “Ipasaka lyakwa Yawe
Leviticus23:6 Lelo mu bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15)
Leviticus23:7 Pa bushiku bwantanshi mukakwata ukulongana kwamushilo
Leviticus23:8 Mu nshiku cine lubali mukaletuula umutuulo we lambo lya cakoca no mulilo kuli Yawe. Na pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali mukakwata ukulongana kwamushilo
Leviticus23:9 Yawe aebelele Mose ati
Leviticus23:10 “Eba abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena
Leviticus23:11 Shimapepo ali nokutambika uyu mwanshi kuli Yawe pakuti upokelelwe mukumwimininako. Shimapepo ali nokuutambika pa bushiku ilyo Isabata lyapita.
Leviticus23:12 Pa bushiku bwakutuula umwanshi
Leviticus23:13 Mufwile ukuutuula pamo pene no mutuulo wa cabunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwa twapekumi tubili twa ku cipimo ca efa
Leviticus23:14 Tecakwesha ukulya umukate uuli onse
Leviticus23:15 Yawe akonkenyepo nokuti
Leviticus23:16 Kabili mukapende inshiku amakumi yasano (50) ukufika pa bushiku bukakonkapo panuma ye Sabata lyalenga cine lubali
Leviticus23:17 Ukufumafye konse uko mukekala
Leviticus23:18 Ukulunda pa mikate
Leviticus23:19 Kabili muli nokutuula sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi
Leviticus23:20 Shimapepo ali nokutambika utwana twa mpaanga tubili kuli Yawe
Leviticus23:21 Pali bulya bwine bushiku muli nokubilisha ukulongana kwamushilo kabili takuli nakubombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku. Ili lifunde lyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo
Leviticus23:22 “Ilyo lyonse mwalasombola ifilyo mu mabala yenu
Leviticus23:23 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus23:24 “Eba abena Israeli utile
Leviticus23:25 Tecakwesha ukulabombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku
Leviticus23:26 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus23:27 “Ubushiku bwalenga ikumi limo mu mweshi walenga cine lubali
Leviticus23:28 Tecakwesha ukubomba umulimo nelyo umo pali ubu bushiku
Leviticus23:29 Umuntu onse uushikanya umwine pa bushiku ubu
Leviticus23:30 Ndi nokonaula umuntu onse uwa mu bantu bakwe uyo uwabomba umulimo pali ubu bushiku.
Leviticus23:31 Tamulingile kubombapo umulimo nangufye panono. Ili lifunde lyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo
Leviticus23:32 Ubu bukaba bushiku bwenu bwakutuusha bwe Sabata
Leviticus23:33 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus23:34 “Eba abena Israeli utile
Leviticus23:35 Ubushiku bwakutampilapo
Leviticus23:36 Pa nshiku cine lubali mukaletuula kuli Yawe ilambo lya cakoca. Kabili pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse mukalekwata ukulongana kwamushilo no kutuula kuli Yawe ilambo lya cakoca. Uku kuli nokuba ekulongana kwa kwisalila. Tecakwesha ukubombapo umulimo wa cila bushiku nangu umo.’
Leviticus23:37 “Kanshi ishi e nshikunkulu isho Yawe asonta
Leviticus23:38 Iyi mituulo yonse
Leviticus23:39 “Eico ukwamba pa bushiku bwe kumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi wa cine lubali
Leviticus23:40 Pa bushiku bwine bwakubalilapo
Leviticus23:41 Mukalesefya ici nge nshikunkulu kuli Yawe pa nshiku cine lubali cila mwaka. Ili lifunde lyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo. Eico mulesefya mu mweshi wa cine lubali.
Leviticus23:42 Kabili muli nokulaikala mu nsakwe pa nshiku cine lubali. Abena Israeli bonse bali nokwikala mu nsakwe
Leviticus23:43 epakuti abana benu abakamukonkapo bakeshibe ukuti nine nalengele abena Israeli ukwikala mu nsakwe
Leviticus23:44 Kanshi efyo Mose aebele abena Israeli pa nshikunkulu shasontwa ishakwa Yawe.
Leviticus24:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus24:2 “Konkomesha abena Israeli pakuti baleleta amafuta kuli iwe ayo bengulula ku miolifa ayalengama
Leviticus24:3 Kunse ya cisalu cakucinga ku Mbokoshi ya Cipangano mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Leviticus24:4 Ifi fisaniko ifyaba pa cakutekapo ica golide wine wine pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Leviticus24:5 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus24:6 Iyi mikate mukalebika mu mitande ibili pamulu we tebulo ilyapangilwa na golide wine wine pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Cila mutande muleba imikate mutanda.
Leviticus24:7 Pa mutande onse ulebikapo icinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi icisuma icine cine
Leviticus24:8 Uyu mukate Aroni ali nokuubika pa cinso cakwa Yawe lyonsefye cila bushiku bwe Sabata
Leviticus24:9 Ifi fyonse fili nokuba ifyakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume lyonsefye
Leviticus24:10 Nomba kwali umwaume
Leviticus24:11 Elyo uyu mwana wa mwanakashi umwina Israeli asaalwile Yawe icine cine ilyo atukile ishina lyakwe. Awe abantu bamutwele kuli Mose. Ishina lyakwa nyina ni Shelomiti
Leviticus24:12 Elyo bamubikile mukulindwa mpaka bakomfwe ifyo Yawe akabeba ukucita.
Leviticus24:13 Yawe aeba Mose ati
Leviticus24:14 “Fumyeni uyo muntu wamusaalula kunse ya nkambi. Kabili lekeni onse uumfwileko ku musaalula atambike amaboko yakwe pa mutwe wakwe no kuleka nomba ulukuta lonse lumutobe amabwe.
Leviticus24:15 Elyo webe na bena Israeli utile
Leviticus24:16 Umuntu onse uwasaalula ishina lyakwa Yawe afwilefye ukwipaiwa. Ulukuta lonse luli nokumulasa amabwe. Nelyo abefye umweni nangufye umwina Israeli
Leviticus24:17 “Umuntu uuli onse nga cakuti aipaya umuntu munankwe
Leviticus24:18 Uyo onse uwaipaya icitekwa ca munankwe
Leviticus24:19 “Umuntu uuli onse nga cakuti acena umunankwe
Leviticus24:20 Nga akontwele umunankwe ifupa
Leviticus24:21 Umuntu onse uwaipaya icitekwa ca mwine
Leviticus24:22 Ala mufwilefye ukukwata ifunde limo line
Leviticus24:23 Eico Mose aebele abena Israeli ifi
Leviticus25:1 Yawe alandile kuli Mose pa lupili lwa Sinai ati
Leviticus25:2 “Eba abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena
Leviticus25:3 Pa myaka mutanda mulebyala imbuto mu mabala yenu. Kabili pa myaka mutanda ine
Leviticus25:4 Lelo mu mwaka walenga cine lubali
Leviticus25:5 Tecakwesha no kusombola icintu nelyo cimo icikaimenenafye icine
Leviticus25:6 Conse icaimenena mu mabala yenu mu mwaka wakutuusha uwe Sabata
Leviticus25:7 Kabili na ku fitekwa fyenu fine pamo pene na ku nama sha mu mpanga yenu
Leviticus25:8 Yawe aeba Mose ati
Leviticus25:9 Lyena ubushiku bwalenga ikumi mu mweshi walenga cine lubali
Leviticus25:10 Mukaleshisha umwaka walenga amakumi yasano no kulashimikila icebo cakulubuka mu calofye conse ku bekashi abekalamo. Uyu uli nokuba e mwaka wakusefya kuli imwe. Onsefye umuntu ali nokubwelelamo ku mpanga ya fikolwe fyakwe kabili na ku lupwa lwakwe.
Leviticus25:11 Umwaka walenga amakumi yasano kuli imwe wakusefya. Muli uyu mwaka tecakwesha ukubyalamo nangu ukusombola fyonse ifilyo ifyaimenena ifine
Leviticus25:12 Pantu umwaka walenga amakumi yasano uwakusefya
Leviticus25:13 “Muli uyu mwaka wakusefya
Leviticus25:14 “Nga cakutila washita impanga ku mwikalacalo munobe
Leviticus25:15 Uli nokushita iyi mpanga ku mubiyo pakumona imyaka yapitapo ilyo umwaka walenga amakumi yasano uwakusefya wapitile. Kabili ali nokushitisha iyi mpanga pakumona imyaka iyashalako iyakulobololamo ifisabo mu mabala.
Leviticus25:16 Nga cakuti imyaka yashalako ingi
Leviticus25:17 Tecakwesha ukulafyengana
Leviticus25:18 “Mulingile ukukonka amafunde yandi no kusakamana ukubeela ifipope fyandi fyonse
Leviticus25:19 No mushili wabamo ukalatwala ifitwalo fisuma
Leviticus25:20 “Limo kuti mwaipusha
Leviticus25:21 Ine
Leviticus25:22 Ilyo mukalabyala ifisabo mu mwaka walenga cine konse konse
Leviticus25:23 Kabili Yawe aeba Mose ati
Leviticus25:24 Impanga yonse iyo mwapeelwa nge cikwatwa
Leviticus25:25 Nga cakuti umwina Israeli munenu umo aba umulanda elyo ashitishako impanga yakwe
Leviticus25:26 Nga cakuti nalimo takwetepo nelyo umo uwakumwafwilisha mukulubula iyi mpanga
Leviticus25:27 ali nokupenda imyaka iyo impanga yali nokushala mu minwe ya washitile. Kabili ali nokulipila indalama ukulingana ne myaka iyashala ku mwaka wakusefya. Awe lyena uyu uwali e mwine wa mpanga kale
Leviticus25:28 Lelo nga cakuti
Leviticus25:29 “Nga cakuti umuntu ashitisha iŋanda iyaba mwilinga lya musumba
Leviticus25:30 Nomba nga cakuti talubwile iyi ŋanda
Leviticus25:31 Lelo amayanda aya mu mishi ukushashinguluka amalinga
Leviticus25:32 Lelo abena Levi nabakwata insambu shakulubula amayanda yabo mu misumba yabo yonse iyo bapeelwa.
Leviticus25:33 Eico kanshi icuma ca mwina Levi cena calisuminishiwa ukucilubula
Leviticus25:34 Lelo incende shakucemenamo ifitekwa ishashinguluka imisumba yabo tashifwile kushitishiwa
Leviticus25:35 “Nga cakuti umwina Israeli munenu umo aba umulanda kabili afilwa ukuisunga umwine pakati kenu
Leviticus25:36 Tecakwesha ukupoka ukufuma kuli ena nsonsela iyili yonse
Leviticus25:37 Tecakwesha ukumukongwesha indalama pakuti akalundepo kansonsela ilyo akabwesha
Leviticus25:38 Nine Yawe Lesa wenu
Leviticus25:39 “Nga cakuti umo pa bekalacalo banenu aba umulanda pakati kenu
Leviticus25:40 Mufwilefye ukumubomfya ngo mubomfi wa malipilo
Leviticus25:41 Lyena uyu muntu pamo na bana bakwe ali nokulekelwako no kubwelelamo ku ba lupwa ku mpanga sha bashibo.
Leviticus25:42 Pantu abena Israeli babomfi bandi
Leviticus25:43 Tecakwesha ukulabasunga buluku buluku
Leviticus25:44 “Abasha benu abaume na banakashi abo mwingakwata
Leviticus25:45 Kabili kuti mwashita abasha bamo ukufuma mu benafyalo abo mwikala nabo
Leviticus25:46 Kabili kuti mwabashila na ku bana benu nge fyuma fyacishilano no kubacita abasha mpaka ne mfwa yabo. Lelo tamufwile kusunga buluku buluku abena Israeli banenu.
Leviticus25:47 “Umwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe nga aisa ba umukankala
Leviticus25:48 uyu muntu ali ne nsambu yakuilubula umwine panuma yakuishitisha umwine. Na umo uwa muli bamunyina kuti amulubula
Leviticus25:49 nangu ni nalume
Leviticus25:50 Umwine no wamushitile bakapende imyaka ukufuma apo aishitishe ukufika ku mwaka walenga amakumi yasano (50) uwakusefyamo. Umutengo wakulubwilwamo uli nokulingana na malipilo ya mubomfi uwacibalo
Leviticus25:51 Nga cakuti imyaka yashalako yafula
Leviticus25:52 Lelo nga cakuti imyaka yashalako inono apo mwaka wakusefya taulafika
Leviticus25:53 Alingile ukusungwa ngo mubomfi wamalipilo cila mwaka. Mushininkishe ukuti shikulu wakwe talemusunga buluku buluku.
Leviticus25:54 Nangu cingati uyu muntu talubwike muli ishi nshila shonse
Leviticus25:55 pantu abena Israeli babomfi bandi. Bena
Leviticus26:1 “Tecakwesha ukulapanga utulubi
Leviticus26:2 “Mulebaka Amasabata yandi
Leviticus26:3 “Nga mwalakonka amafunde yandi no kulabeela ifipope fyandi
Leviticus26:4 ine nkalamutumina imfula pa nshita iyalinga no kuleka umushili ukakwate ifisabo fisuma ne miti ikaletwala ifisabo ifisuma.
Leviticus26:5 Ukusokola kwenu ukwa ŋanu kuli nokutwalilila mpaka inshita yakusombola umwangashi
Leviticus26:6 “Ine
Leviticus26:7 Imwe mukalafulumuna abalwani benu
Leviticus26:8 Basano muli imwe bakafulumuna abali umwanda umo (100). Abali umwanda umo (100) bakafulumuna abali imyanda ikumi limo (1
Leviticus26:9 “Ine nkamutulanyako ku balwani benu no kumulenga ukuti mukasandane no kufula mu mpendwa. Kabili ine nkabaka icipangano candi na imwe.
Leviticus26:10 Mukalalya ifilyo mwatutile umwaka wapita ilyo mukalafitutulula mu matala yenu no kusha incende ya busomboshi ubupya.
Leviticus26:11 Elyo nkabika ne cifulo candi pakati kenu
Leviticus26:12 Lyonse nkalaba na imwe no kuba Lesa wenu
Leviticus26:13 Nine Yawe Lesa wenu uwamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto pakuti mwiba abasha nakabili ku bena Egupto. Nine naputawile ifikakilo fya makoli ya busha bwenu no kulenga ukuti muleyendelafye.
Leviticus26:14 “Nomba nga cakuti mwakaana ukumbeela no kukonka amafunde yandi yonse aya namukonkomesha
Leviticus26:15 elyo nga cakuti mwakaana no kunakila amafunde yandi
Leviticus26:16 lyena ine nkacita ifi kuli imwe. Nkamuponesha amasakamika ayakumupulikisha
Leviticus26:17 Nkamwalukila pakuti abalwani benu bakamucimfye. Abamupata ebakalamuteeka. Kabili mukalaibutukilafye nangu tapali nelyo umo uulemubutusha.
Leviticus26:18 “Nga cakuti na panuma yakucita ifi fyonse tamunakile
Leviticus26:19 Ine
Leviticus26:20 Amaka mukalabomfya mu milimo yenu yakaba yakuicushafye
Leviticus26:21 “Nalyo line imwe nga mwatwalililafye ukutalama no kukanaumfwa
Leviticus26:22 Nkatuma ifiswango fya mpanga ukumwimina
Leviticus26:23 “Nalyo line ifi fyonse nga tafimwalulwile
Leviticus26:24 na ine wine nomba ndi nokumutalamina
Leviticus26:25 Kabili nkaleta pali imwe ulupanga ulwacilandushi pa mulandu wakonaula icipangano candi. Elyo nga mukalabutukila mu misumba yenu kukupusuka
Leviticus26:26 Ilyo ndi nokucefyako impendwa ya mikate mulya
Leviticus26:27 “Nalyo line ine nga nacita ifi fyonse tamuŋumfwile
Leviticus26:28 lyena nkamutalamina kabili nkamukanda pa bubifi bwenu pa miku cine lubali ukucilapo.
Leviticus26:29 Mukaba ne cipowe icikalamba icakuti mukalelya imibili ya bana benu abaume ne mibili ya bana benu abanakashi.
Leviticus26:30 Ndi nokonaula incende shenu ishakupepelamo isho mwacindamika no kubongolola ifibumbili fya malambo fyenu ifyakufutumwinapo ububani. Nkatulika ifitumbi fyenu pa mulu wa tulubi twenu utushipema
Leviticus26:31 Nkalenga imisumba yenu ukuba ifibolya no konaula ififulo fyenu ifyamushilo
Leviticus26:32 Nkonaula icalo cenu
Leviticus26:33 Ine nkamulenga ukusalanganina mu mishobo iyalekana lekana. Kabili nkaleta pali imwe ulupanga no kumulimuna bonse. Icalo cenu cikonaulwa
Leviticus26:34 Elyo lyena icalo cikashala cilesekela mu Masabata imyaka yonse mu nshita cikashala icatalalilwa
Leviticus26:35 Pantu pa nshita yonse ilyo icalo cikatalalilwa
Leviticus26:36 “Bonse abakashalapo aba muli imwe
Leviticus26:37 Bakalainyantaulafye no kuipununa kwati balefulumuka ku lupanga
Leviticus26:38 Ala kwena
Leviticus26:39 Pali imwe abakapusunsukako mu calo ca balwani benu bakaloba pa mulandu wa bubifi bwabo na pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa bashibo.
Leviticus26:40 “Lelo nga cakuti bakayebelela no kupapata pa bubifi bwabo
Leviticus26:41 icalengele na ine mbatalamine no kubatuma mu calo ca balwani babo
Leviticus26:42 awe na ine lyena nkebukisha icipangano candi ico nacitile kuli Yakobo
Leviticus26:43 Icalo cena cili nokushala pakuti cikasekele Amasabata pantu cikaba amatololo. Bali nokukandwa pa mulandu wakusangukila amafunde yandi ne Yawe
Leviticus26:44 Lelo nangu cibe ifyo fine
Leviticus26:45 Kabili pa mulandu wabo wine
Leviticus26:46 Kanshi aya e mafunde
Leviticus27:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Leviticus27:2 “Eba abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena
Leviticus27:3 Umwaume uuli pakati ka myaka amakumi yabili (20) nokufika pa myaka amakumi mutanda (60)
Leviticus27:4 Lelo nga cakuti mwanakashi
Leviticus27:5 Nga cakuti umuntu ali pakati ka myaka isano no kufika pa myaka amakumi yabili (20)
Leviticus27:6 Kabili nga cakuti mwana mwaume uwa mweshi umo ukufika pa myaka isano
Leviticus27:7 Elyo nga muntu uuli pakati ka myaka amakumi mutanda no kucilapo
Leviticus27:8 “Nga cakuti umuntu uwalaya icilayo mulanda nganshi kabili teti alipile icipendo capimwa
Leviticus27:9 “Nga cakuti uyu muntu alaya ukupeela icitekwa ca nama icingasuminishiwa ngo mutuulo kuli Yawe
Leviticus27:10 Tafwile kukabusha no kutwalilamo inama imbi iyoo
Leviticus27:11 Kabili ico alaya nga cintu icakowela icishingapokelelwa ngo mutuulo kuli Yawe
Leviticus27:12 Shimapepo nao euli nokupima iyi nama nga isuma nangu ibi. Umutengo onse shimapepo engapingula
Leviticus27:13 Lelo nga cakuti umwine uwatuula alefwaya ukulubula iyi nama
Leviticus27:14 “Umuntu nga apeela iŋanda yakwe kuli Yawe ukuba iyamushilo
Leviticus27:15 Lelo nga cakuti umuntu uupeele iyi ŋanda alefwaya ukubwesha
Leviticus27:16 “Umuntu nga apeelako iciputulwa cimo ica mpanga ya lupwa lwakwe kuli Yawe
Leviticus27:17 Nga cakuti apeela kuli Yawe mu mwaka wakusefya
Leviticus27:18 Lelo nga cakuti apeela ibala lyakwe kuli Yawe panuma ya mwaka wakusefya
Leviticus27:19 Lelo umuntu uwapeele ibala nga alefwaya ukulibwesha
Leviticus27:20 Uyu muntu nga cakuti takwete icakulubwilako ili ibala
Leviticus27:21 Eico ili ibala ilyo likalubulwa mu mwaka wakusefya nga wafika
Leviticus27:22 “Nga cakuti umuntu apeela ibala kuli Yawe ilyo ashita
Leviticus27:23 shimapepo ali nokupingula umutengo ukulingana ne myaka yashalako kukusefya umwaka walenga amakumi yasano. Kabili umuntu uuleshita ali nokuleta indalama shonse pali ubu bwine bushiku
Leviticus27:24 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yasano uwakusefya
Leviticus27:25 “Imitengo yonse ilingile ukuba nge mitengo ya mashekeli ya mu cifulo camushilo
Leviticus27:26 “Takuli umuntu nangu umo uufwile ukupeela amabeli ya fitekwa fya nama
Leviticus27:27 Lelo nga citekwa icakowela
Leviticus27:28 “Takuli icintu nelyo cimo pafyo umuntu akwata nangu ico apeela kuli Yawe kukucilofya icingashitishiwa nangu ukulubulwa
Leviticus27:29 Takuli umuntu nelyo umo uyo uwapeelwa kukonaulwa uwingalubulwa
Leviticus27:30 “Icapekumi conse ica mu busomboshi bonse
Leviticus27:31 Nga cakuti umuntu alubula icintu conse icapekumi
Leviticus27:32 Kabili icapekumi conse pa mukuni wa ŋombe no wa mpaanga
Leviticus27:33 Umwine wa fitekwa talingile kupatulula ifitekwa pakuti asalepo icisuma ukufuma pa fishili bwino elyo apyanikishepo iyisuma. Nga cakuti apyanikishapo cimbi
Leviticus27:34 Ifi fyonse e fipope ifyo Yawe apeele Mose ku lupili lwa Sinai
Numbers1:1 Pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi wabubili
Numbers1:2 “Penda ulukuta lonse lwa bena Israeli mu mikowa na mu ndupwa shabo. Mulembe amashina ya baume bonse
Numbers1:3 abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo
Numbers1:4 Kuli cila luko mukabuuleko umwaume umo umukalamba wa lupwa lwakwe uwakumwafwako.
Numbers1:5 Na mashina ya baume abakumwafwilishako ni aya. Ku luko lwakwa Rubeni
Numbers1:6 Ku luko lwakwa Simeoni
Numbers1:7 Ku luko lwakwa Yuda
Numbers1:8 Ku luko lwakwa Isaka
Numbers1:9 Ku luko lwakwa Sebuloni
Numbers1:10 Ku bana bakwa Yosefu ni aba. Ku luko lwakwa Efulemu
Numbers1:11 Ku luko lwakwa Benjamini
Numbers1:12 Ku luko lwakwa Dani
Numbers1:13 Ku luko lwakwa Asheri
Numbers1:14 Ku luko lwakwa Gadi
Numbers1:15 Ku luko lwakwa Naftali
Numbers1:16 Aba e baume basalilwe ukufuma ku lukuta
Numbers1:17 Mose na Aroni babuulile amashina ya aba bantu basontelwe
Numbers1:18 elyo balonganya ulukuta lwa bena Israeli bonse pamo
Numbers1:19 pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. Kanshi efyo Mose apendele abantu mu matololo ya Sinai.

Numbers1:21 Mu luko lwakwa Rubeni

Numbers1:23 Mu luko lwakwa Simeoni

Numbers1:27 Mu luko lwakwa Yuda

Numbers1:30 Mu luko lwakwa Sebuloni
Numbers1:31 Mu luko lwakwa Sebuloni
Numbers1:32 Ku bana bakwa Yosefu ni aba. Mu luko lwakwa Efulemu
Numbers1:33 Mu luko lwakwa Efulemu
Numbers1:34 Mu luko lwakwa Manase
Numbers1:35 Mu luko lwakwa Manase
Numbers1:36 Mu luko lwakwa Benjamini
Numbers1:37 Mu luko lwakwa Benjamini
Numbers1:38 Mu luko lwakwa Dani
Numbers1:39 Mu luko lwakwa Dani
Numbers1:40 Mu luko lwakwa Asheri
Numbers1:41 Mu luko lwakwa Asheri
Numbers1:42 Mu luko lwakwa Naftali
Numbers1:43 Mu luko lwakwa Naftali
Numbers1:44 Kanshi efyo bali abaume Mose na Aroni balembele. Babombele pamo ne ntungulushi sha bena Israeli ikumi limo na babili (12) ishaiminineko indupwa shashiko.
Numbers1:45 Abena Israeli bonse pamo abaume abalembelwe mu ndupwa
Numbers1:46 bonse pamo bali amakana imyanda mutanda na itatu ne myanda isano na makumi yasano (603
Numbers1:47 Nomba aba mu luko lwa bena Levi tabapendelwe pamo ne nko shimbi iyoo.
Numbers1:48 Pantu Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers1:49 “Wikapendelako uluko lwakwa Levi nangu ukusansha ku mpendwa ya nko shimbi isha bena Israeli.
Numbers1:50 Lelo
Numbers1:51 Ilyo lyonse mwasesha inkambi
Numbers1:52 Abena Israeli bakemike amatenti yabo mu mpuka mu mpuka
Numbers1:53 Lelo abena Levi bena bali nokwimika amatenti yabo ukushinguluka Itenti lya cipangano
Numbers1:54 Kanshi abena Israeli bacitile fyonse ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.
Numbers2:1 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati
Numbers2:2 “Abena Israeli bali nokulaimika amatenti yabo ukushinguluka Itenti Lyakukumaninamo pa nkambi
Numbers2:3 “Ku kabanga kulya kutulila akasuba
Numbers2:4 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:5 “Uluko lwakwa Isaka elukabakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Isaka ni Netaneli mwana Suari.
Numbers2:6 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:7 “Uluko lwakwa Sebuloni elukakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Sebuloni ni Eliabu mwana Eloni.
Numbers2:8 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:9 Abaume bonse abapendelwe mu ciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Yuda
Numbers2:10 “Ku kapinda ka ku kulyo lubali kukaba iciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Rubeni no luunga lwabo. Cikaba mu mpuka mu mpuka sha mikowa yabo. Intungulushi ya bena Rubeni ni Elisuri mwana Shedeuri.
Numbers2:11 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:12 “Uluko lwakwa Simeoni elukabakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Simeoni ni Shelumieli mwana Surishadai.
Numbers2:13 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:14 “Uluko lwakwa Gadi elukakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Gadi ni Eliasafu mwana Reueli
Numbers2:15 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:16 Abaume bonse abapendelwe mu ciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Rubeni
Numbers2:17 “Elyo abena Levi pakusenda Itenti Lyakukumaninamo bali nokulaendela pakati
Numbers2:18 “Ku masamba ekukaba iciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Efulemu no luunga lwabo. Cikaba mu mpuka mu mpuka sha mikowa yabo. Intungulushi ya bena Efulemu ni Elishama mwana Amiudi.
Numbers2:19 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:20 “Uluko lwakwa Manase elukabakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Manase ni Gamalieli mwana Pedasuri.
Numbers2:21 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:22 “Uluko lwakwa Benjamini elukakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Benjamini ni Abidani mwana Gideoni.
Numbers2:23 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:24 Abaume bonse abapendelwe mu ciputuluwa ca nkambi icakwa Efulemu
Numbers2:25 “Ku kapinda ka ku kuso lubali ekukaba iciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Dani no luunga lwabo. Cikaba mu mpuka mu mpuka sha mikowa yabo. Intungulushi ya bena Dani ni Ahieseri mwana Amishadai.
Numbers2:26 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:27 “Uluko lwakwa Asheri elukabakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Asheri ni Pagieli mwana Okirani.
Numbers2:28 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:29 “Uluko lwakwa Naftali nao elukakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Naftali ni Aira mwana Enani.
Numbers2:30 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe
Numbers2:31 Abaume bonse abapendelwe mu ciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Dani
Numbers2:32 Aba e bena Israeli bonse abapendelwe mu ndupwa shabo. Bonse aba bali mu fiputulwa fya nkambi mu mpuka mu mpuka kabili ne mpendwa yabo yali amakana imyanda mutanda na yatatu ne myanda isano na makumi yasano (603
Numbers2:33 Nga filya fine Yawe akonkomeshe Mose
Numbers2:34 Kanshi abena Israeli bacitile fyonse ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. Baikele mu nkambi mu mpuka mu mpuka. Kabili na pakufuma pa nkambi cila muntu aleba mu mukowa wakwe ukulingana no lupwa lwakwe.
Numbers3:1 Ifi efyali ulupwa lwakwa Aroni na Mose pa nshita Yawe alandile na Mose pa lupili lwa Sinai.
Numbers3:2 Bamwana Aroni abaume bali Nadabu
Numbers3:3 Aya e mashina ya bamwana Aroni
Numbers3:4 Lelo Nadabu na Abihu bafwilile pa cinso cakwa Yawe mu matololo ya Sinai
Numbers3:5 Yawe aebele Mose
Numbers3:6 “Palamika aba luko lwa bena Levi no kubapeela kuli Aroni shimapepo
Numbers3:7 Bafwile ukulaafwa Aroni imilimo ya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pamo ne milimo ya lukuta lonse mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Numbers3:8 Bali nokulasunga ifipe fyonse ifya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo
Numbers3:9 Ukalubwile abena Levi kuli Aroni na bana bakwe abaume. Bena e bena Israeli bapeelwafye onse kuli ena.
Numbers3:10 Usonte Aroni na bana bakwe abaume kukubomba imilimo ya bushimapepo. Umuntu umbifye nga apalama ku milimo iyi wena akepaiwe.”
Numbers3:11 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose
Numbers3:12 “Pa bena Israeli nimbuulapo abena Levi kukuba abandifye pa malo ye beli lyonse ilyaume ilyafyalwa mu bena Israeli. Bena aba baleba bandifye.
Numbers3:13 Pantu abana abaume bonse amabeli ala bandi. Ilyo naipeye amabeli yonse aya mu calo ca Egupto
Numbers3:14 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose mu matololo ya Sinai
Numbers3:15 “Penda abena Levi mu ndupwa na mu mpuka shabo. Penda abaume bonse ukutampila pa bali no mweshi umo no ukucilapo.”
Numbers3:16 Mose nao aya bapenda ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe amukonkomeshe.
Numbers3:17 Levi ali na bana abaume batatu
Numbers3:18 Geshoni ali na bana abaume babili
Numbers3:19 Koati ali na bana abaume bane
Numbers3:20 Merari ali na bana abaume babili
Numbers3:21 Mu lupwa lwakwa Geshoni emwatuntuka abena Libini na bena Shimei. Ishi e ndupwa shakwa Geshoni.
Numbers3:22 Impendwa yonse pamo iya baume abapendelwe
Numbers3:23 Indupwa shakwa Geshoni shali nokwikalila ku masamba kunuma ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Numbers3:24 Intungulushi ya bena Geshoni ni Eliasafu mwana Laeli.
Numbers3:25 Imilimo abena Geshoni balebomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo: Kusunga Itenti lyakwa Lesa
Numbers3:26 ifisalu fyakucingilila ulubansa ulwashinguluka Itenti lyakwa Lesa no bulambo
Numbers3:27 Mu lupwa lwakwa Koati emwatuntuka abena Amuramu
Numbers3:28 Impendwa yonse pamo iya baume abena Koati abalebomba umulimo wakusunga icifulo camushilo
Numbers3:29 Indupwa shakwa Koati shali nokwikala ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ake Tenti lyakwa Lesa.
Numbers3:30 Intungulushi ya bena Koati ni Elisafani
Numbers3:31 Imilimo abena Koati balebomba
Numbers3:32 Eleasa mwana shimapepo Aroni ewali intungulushi nkalamba ya bena Levi. Ewasontelwe uwakwangalila abalebomba umulimo wakusunga icifulo camushilo.
Numbers3:33 Mu lupwa lwakwa Merari emwatuntuka abena Mali na bena Mushi. Ishi eshali ndupwa sha bena Merari.
Numbers3:34 Impendwa yonse pamo iya baume
Numbers3:35 Indupwa sha bena Merari eshali nokwikalila ku kapinda ka ku kuso ake Tenti lyakwa Lesa
Numbers3:36 Ishi e ndupwa shasontelwe ukusunga impanda she Tenti lyakwa Lesa
Numbers3:37 ukusunga inceshi sha cakucinga ulubansa lwe Tenti
Numbers3:38 Mose na Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bena mu nkambi bali nokulaikalila lwa ku kabanga ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa
Numbers3:39 Impendwa yonse pamo iya bena Levi abaume abapendelwe ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose na Aroni ukubapendela mu ndupwa
Numbers3:40 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose
Numbers3:41 Na pa malo ya bana baume bonse abena Israeli amabeli ubikepo abena Levi ukuba abandi. Kabili naibuulila ifitekwa fya bena Levi pa malo ya mabeli yonse ya fitekwa ifya bena Israeli. Nine Yawe!”
Numbers3:42 Awe Mose epakupenda amabeli abaume bonse ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe.
Numbers3:43 Impendwa yonse pamo iya baume amabeli abali no mweshi umo nangu ukucilapo
Numbers3:44 Kabili Yawe aeba Mose ati
Numbers3:45 “Nomba bika abena Levi pa malo ya mabeli yonse abaume abena Israeli
Numbers3:46 Apo kanshi abana abaume amabeli ya bena Israeli bacilako abena Levi imyanda ibili na makumi cine lubali na batatu (273)
Numbers3:47 ukuleka impiya amashekeli yasano pali cila umo ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo icafina amagera amakumi yabili.
Numbers3:48 Kabili isho mpiya shakulubula abo bena Israeli abapulilepo upeele Aroni na bana bakwe abaume.”
Numbers3:49 Mose nao apokele impiya kuli balya bapulile pa mpendwa yalubwilwe na bena Levi.
Numbers3:50 Apokele impiya isha mashekeli ikana limo ne myanda itatu na makumi mutanda na shisano (1
Numbers3:51 Neshi mpiya shakulubwila amabeli ashipeela kuli Aroni na bana bakwe abaume
Numbers4:1 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni
Numbers4:2 “Pendeni abena Koati aba mu luko lwakwa Levi
Numbers4:3 Mupende abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50)
Numbers4:4 Umulimo wa bena Koati mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo wakusunga ifintu ifyamushilo nganshi.
Numbers4:5 “Ilyo mwalasela pa nkambi
Numbers4:6 Elyo kabili bafwile ukufimbapo ne cakufimbapo na cimbi ica mpapa ishisuma ishatelela
Numbers4:7 “Petebulo lya mikate yakuba pa cinso candi
Numbers4:8 Pali ifi balefimbapo insalu iyakashika pamulu
Numbers4:9 “Balebuula insalu yacifufya
Numbers4:10 Elyo balepomba icakutekapo ifisaniko pamo pene ne fibombelo fyonse mu cakufimbapo ica mpapa ishisuma ishatelela
Numbers4:11 “Pa bulambo bwa golide balefimbapo insalu yacifufya
Numbers4:12 Balebuula ne fipe fyonse ifyo babomfya mu cifulo camushilo
Numbers4:13 Bali nokukusa imito pa bulambo bwa mukuba no kwansapo insalu iyakashikila.
Numbers4:14 Nga bayanshikapo
Numbers4:15 Ilyo Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bapwisha umulimo wakukupilisha bwino icifulo camushilo pamo pene ne fipe fya mu cifulo camushilo
Numbers4:16 “Eleasa mwana Aroni shimapepo
Numbers4:17 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni
Numbers4:18 “Mwikaleka aba mu ndupwa shakwa Koati ukuti bakalobe ukufuma ku bena Levi.
Numbers4:19 Kanshi pakuti aba bantu tabafwile ilyo bapalama ku fipe fyamushilo
Numbers4:20 Lelo aba mu ndupwa shakwa Koati tabafwile kwingila mu cifulo camushilo kukumona uko bashimapepo balelonga ifipe fyamushilo
Numbers4:21 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers4:22 “Penda abena Geshoni aba mu luko lwakwa Levi
Numbers4:23 Upende abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50)
Numbers4:24 Iyi e milimo abena Geshoni bakalabomba pamo no kulasenda ifipe.
Numbers4:25 Ebakalasenda ifisalu fyakucinga kwi Itenti lyakwa Lesa
Numbers4:26 Ebakalasenda ne fisalu fyakucinga ulubansa lwa kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa no bulambo
Numbers4:27 Imilimo bakalabomba yonse
Numbers4:28 Iyi e milimo bakalabomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo aba mu ndupwa shakwa Geshoni. Itama mwana shimapepo Aroni ewakulabangalila mu milimo yabo.”

Numbers4:30 Upende abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50)

Numbers4:32 Kabili ebakalasenda ne nceshi shakucinga ulubansa
Numbers4:33 Iyi e milimo indupwa sha bena Merari shili nokulabomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Itama mwana shimapepo Aroni ewakulabangalila mu milimo yabo.”
Numbers4:34 Kanshi Mose na Aroni ne ntungulushi sha lukuta lwa bena Israeli epakupenda abena Koati

Numbers4:38 Abena Geshoni nabo bapendelwe mu ndupwa na mu mayanda yabo.

Numbers5:1 Yawe aebele Mose ukuti
Numbers5:2 “Konkomesha abena Israeli ukulatamfya umuntu onse mu nkambi uwalwala ubulwele bonse ubwambukila pa nkanda
Numbers5:3 Muletamfya aba bantu bonse abakowela abaume na banakashi mu nkambi
Numbers5:4 Abena Israeli balyumfwilile no kutamfya bonse abakowela ukufuma pa nkambi. Bacitilefye umo mwine Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.
Numbers5:5 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers5:6 “Eba abena Israeli ukuti
Numbers5:7 Uyu muntu afwile ukuyebelela no kufuta pa bubifi acitile. Afwile kabili alundepo cimo ica pali fisano pali ifyo alefuta ifyakupeela umuntu abifishe.
Numbers5:8 Lelo uyo muntu babifishe nga cakuti afwa elyo takwete ba lupwa bakufutako
Numbers5:9 Onse umutuulo wamushilo untu abena Israeli baleta kuli shimapepo wakulaba wakwe.
Numbers5:10 Ifyabupe fyamushilo fyonse ifyo umuntu atuula fyakwe
Numbers5:11 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers5:12 “Landa ku bena Israeli no kubeba ukuti ngo mwanakashi apondokela umulume wakwe no kukanaba uwacishinka
Numbers5:13 alala no mwaume umbi mu bumfisolo
Numbers5:14 nga cakuti umwaume aikatwa no bufuba
Numbers5:15 kanshi umwaume uyo ali nokutwala umukashi wakwe kuli shimapepo. Pakuya kuli shimapepo
Numbers5:16 “Shimapepo nao ali nokubuula uyu mwanakashi no kumwiminika pa cinso cakwa Yawe.
Numbers5:17 Elyo shimapepo akabuule amenshi yamushilo no kuyabika mu mutondo we bumba
Numbers5:18 Ilyo shimapepo aiminika umwanakashi pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Numbers5:19 Elyo shimapepo akalenga umwanakashi ukulapa nokutila kuli ena
Numbers5:20 Lelo
Numbers5:21 Yawe nalenge abantu bonse bakulapishe no kukuseluka. Nalenge icisa cabufyashi cobe cisalwe ne fumo lyobe lifimbe.
Numbers5:22 Amenshi aya ayaleta ukulapishiwa nayengile mu mubili obe
Numbers5:23 “Elyo shimapepo afwile ukulemba ishi ntipu mu citabo icipombwa
Numbers5:24 Shimapepo akapeela umwanakashi amenshi yakantuka ayaleta ukulapishiwa
Numbers5:25 Shimapepo ali nokupoka ubunga ku mwanakashi ubwa mutuulo wa bufuba
Numbers5:26 Elyo abuulepo ulupi lumo ulwa bunga ngo mutuulo wacibukisho no kubocela pa bulambo
Numbers5:27 Nga cakuti aliikowesha no kukanaba uwacishinka nga anwa amenshi ayaleta ukulapishiwa
Numbers5:28 Nomba nga cakuti uyu mwanakashi wakaele
Numbers5:29 “Kanshi ili e funde lya pa bufuba
Numbers5:30 nangu umwaume alatunganya umukashi wakwe no kuba no bufuba. Umwanakashi ali nokwimikwa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Numbers5:31 Umwaume tali nakukwata mulandu nangu panono
Numbers6:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers6:2 “Landa ku bena Israeli no kubeba ukuti
Numbers6:3 afwile ukuleka ukunwa ubwalwa bwa mwangashi ne cakunwa conse icikola. Elanwa icakunwa nangu cimo icakantuka icakamwa ku myangashi nangu icikola ca fintu fimbi. Tafwile kunwa icakunwa ca fitwalo fya myangashi nangu kulya imyangashi iyauma nangu iyishauma.
Numbers6:4 Apofye acili Munasiliti
Numbers6:5 “Uyu muntu pa nshiku shonsefye isha cilayo cakwe icakuipatula
Numbers6:6 Inshita yonse iyo aipatwila kuli Yawe tali nakupalama ku citumbi ca muntu.
Numbers6:7 Nangufye cakwa wishi nangu nyina
Numbers6:8 Yonse inshita iyo ailubwila kuli Yawe aba uwamushilo.
Numbers6:9 “Kabili nga cakuti umuntu afwa imfwa yakupumikishafye pa menso ya Munasiliti
Numbers6:10 Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse ali nokuleta utubondo twa nkunda tubili nangu utupele tubili kuli shimapepo pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Numbers6:11 Shimapepo nao ali nokuleka kamo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi
Numbers6:12 Afwile ailubwila umwine kuli Yawe inshita yonse ilya aipatula
Numbers6:13 “Nomba ili e funde lyakukonka Umunasiliti inshita yakwe iyakuipatwila nga yapwa. Bafwile ukumuleta pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Numbers6:14 Palya epo ali nokupeelela imituulo yakwe iyi kuli Yawe: Akana ka mpaanga akalume aka mwaka umo akabula akalema akakuleka ilambo lyakoca
Numbers6:15 Alundepo umutuulo wa cabunga no wa cakunwa
Numbers6:16 “Shimapepo ali nokutuula fyonse ifi pa cinso cakwa Yawe kabili atuulile umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi ne lambo lyakoca.
Numbers6:17 Ali nokutuula umutuulo wakwampana pamo no kutuula ilambo lya sukusuku kuli Yawe
Numbers6:18 Elyo pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo Umunasiliti abeye imishishi apatwilile kuli Yawe no kuiposa mu mulilo apalepya umutuulo wakwampana pamo.
Numbers6:19 “Umunasiliti nga apwisha ukubeya umushishi wakuipatwilapo
Numbers6:20 Shimapepo ali nokutambika ifi fyonse kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika. Fyena fyamushilo ifyo shimapepofye eka ewingasendako pamo ne cisao icatambikwa ne tanta ilituulilwe. Panuma ya ifi
Numbers6:21 “Kanshi ili e funde lya Munasiliti uwalaya icilayo kuli Yawe ukulingana no kupatulwa kwakwe
Numbers6:22 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers6:23 “Webe Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ukuti
Numbers6:24 “Yawe alemupaala no kumubaka.
Numbers6:25 Yawe alenge icinso cakwe cimusanikile
Numbers6:26 Yawe namulange icinso cakwe kabili amupeele no mutende.
Numbers6:27 “Ifi efyo bakalalumbula ishina lyandi

Numbers8:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers8:2 “Landa na Aroni
Numbers8:3 Aroni nao efyo acitile. Atekele ifisaniko apakuti filesanikila pantanshi ya cakutekapo ifisaniko ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.
Numbers8:4 Ifi efyo icakutekapo ifisaniko capangilwe. Capangilwe na golide iyo bafulila ku nondo
Numbers8:5 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers8:6 “Buula abena Levi no kubapatula ku bena Israeli bonse
Numbers8:7 Ucite ifi pakubasangulula. Ubasanse amenshi yakubasangulwila
Numbers8:8 Babuule iciponti cimo
Numbers8:9 Ukeminike abena Levi pa ntanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kulonganika ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli bonse.
Numbers8:10 Ukalete abena Levi pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Numbers8:11 Aroni akalubwile abena Levi kuli ine ne Yawe ngo mutuulo wakutambika untu abena Israeli bantuula. Epakuti balebomba imilimo yakwa Yawe.
Numbers8:12 Abena Levi nga batambalika amaboko pa mitwe ya bacilume wa ŋombe babili
Numbers8:13 “Leka abena Levi beminine pantanshi yakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume no kubatuula ngo mutuulo wakutambika kuli Yawe.
Numbers8:14 Ifi efyo ukapatula abena Levi ukufuma ku bena Israeli bambi
Numbers8:15 Nga wapwisha ukusangulula abena Levi no kubatuula ngo mutuulo wakutambika
Numbers8:16 Bena mu bena Israeli ebafwile ukupeelwa onse kuli ine. Nalibacita abandi pa malo ya mabeli ya bana abaume aba mwanakashi onse umwina Israeli.
Numbers8:17 Ibeli lyonse ilyaume mu Israeli
Numbers8:18 Lelo nalibuula abena Levi pa malo ya bana abaume bonse amabeli ya bena Israeli.
Numbers8:19 Pali bonse abena Israeli napeela abena Levi kuli Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ngo bupe
Numbers8:20 Mose
Numbers8:21 Abena Levi nabo baisangulula
Numbers8:22 Panuma ya ifi
Numbers8:23 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers8:24 “Ifi efyo cili nokuba ku bena Levi. Abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili na isano (25) no kucilapo ebali nokulabombela mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Numbers8:25 Lelo bakalaleka ukubomba imilimo ya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo nga bafisha imyaka amakumi yasano (50).
Numbers8:26 Nga baleka
Numbers9:1 Mu matololo ya Sinai mu mweshi wakubalilapo
Numbers9:2 “Uleke abena Israeli basefye Ipasaka
Numbers9:3 Mukasefye pa nshita iyalinga pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) mu mweshi wine uyu
Numbers9:4 Kanshi Mose epakweba abantu ukuti basefye inshikunkulu ye Pasaka.
Numbers9:5 Abena Israeli epakusefya inshikunkulu ye Pasaka mu matololo ya Sinai lilya akasuba kawa
Numbers9:6 Lelo abaume bamo tabasefesheko Ipasaka pali ubo bushiku pantu bali abakowela ico bakumishe ku citumbi ca muntu. Kanshi abo bantu epakuya kuli Mose na Aroni pa bushiku bwine bulya
Numbers9:7 no kumweba abati
Numbers9:8 Mose abasuka ati
Numbers9:9 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers9:10 “Eba abena Israeli ati
Numbers9:11 Mu mweshi wabubili emo bafwile ukusefya pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) cilya akasuba kawa. Bali nokulya umwana wa mpaanga
Numbers9:12 Beshapo nelyo kamo akakuti kafika ku ulucelo
Numbers9:13 Nomba umuntu nga ali uwasanguluka

Numbers18:1 Yawe aebele Aroni ati
Numbers18:2 Ulete abena Levi banobe ukufuma mu luko lwa cikolwe cobe ukuba na iwe
Numbers18:3 Bali nokukutumika
Numbers18:4 Bakulabomba na imwe
Numbers18:5 Muli nokubaka icifulo camushilo pamo no bulambo
Numbers18:6 Nine winefye nasala aba mu lupwa lwa bena Levi banobe ukufuma pa bena Israeli nge cabupe kuli iwe. Kabili nabalubwila kuli Yawe

Numbers18:8 Yawe aebele Aroni ati
Numbers18:9 Pa mituulo yamushilo icine cine iyo mushocele pa mulilo
Numbers18:10 Mulelya ifi fintu nge fyamushilo icine cine. Kabili baumefye balingile ukulyako. Mufwile ukufimona nge fyamushilo.
Numbers18:11 “Fimbi nafyo pa fyabupe ne mituulo nakupeela nifi. Icilifye conse icapatulwapo pa mutuulo wakutambika uwa bena Israeli
Numbers18:12 “Ine nakupeela amafuta ya miolifa ayawamisha no mwangashi uwawamisha ne ŋanu
Numbers18:13 Fyonsefye ifisabo fyantanshi ifyo batuula Yawe fili nokuba fyobe. Umuntu onse uwa mu ŋanda yobe nga ali uwasangululwa
Numbers18:14 “Ifintufye fyonse ifyo balubwilile Yawe mu calo ca Israeli fyobe.
Numbers18:15 “Abana amabeli ne nama amabeli
Numbers18:16 Abana bakulalubulwa ilyo baba no mweshifye umo pa mutengo wapimwa
Numbers18:17 Lelo amabeli ya ŋombe
Numbers18:18 Iminofu yashiko yena yobe pamo nge cisao ca mutuulo wakutambika no mwendo wa ku kulyo.
Numbers18:19 “Ifyashalako ku mituulo yamushilo yonse iyo abena Israeli bakalatuula ine ne Yawe
Numbers18:20 Yawe aebele Aroni ati
Numbers18:21 “Ine napeela ku bena Levi ifintu fyonse ifyapekumi ifya mu Israeli nge fyacishilano fyabo ukuba amalipilo pa milimo babomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.
Numbers18:22 Ukufumafye nombaline
Numbers18:23 Abena Levi ebakulabomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo kabili ebakulaba no mulandu pali conse icalubanamo. Ili e funde lya pe umukakonkanina inkulo. Tabakaikwatile fyacishilano mu Israeli iyoo.
Numbers18:24 Lelo
Numbers18:25 Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers18:26 “Landa ku bena Levi ubebe auti
Numbers18:27 Umutuulo wenu uli nokubafye nga filya shibulimi atuula iŋanu shipya bafumya pa lubansa batwila
Numbers18:28 Kanshi muli uyu wine musango emo na imwe mwakulatuulilamo kuli Yawe
Numbers18:29 Ifyabupe fyonse bamupeela
Numbers18:30 Kabili eba abena Levi auti
Numbers18:31 Iwe na ba ŋanda yobe kuti mwalya ifyashalapo konse uko muli
Numbers18:32 Tamwakabe no mulandu nga mwatuula iciputulwa iciwamishepo. Epakuti mwikasaalula mituulo yamushilo iya bena Israeli
Numbers19:1 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati
Numbers19:2 “Ici ecilefwaikwa mwifunde ilyo Yawe akonkomesha. Ebeni abena Israeli ukuleta umusepela wa ŋombe iyikota uwakashika uwabula akalema nangu akabi kabili uushatala ausendapo ikoli.
Numbers19:3 Mupeele kuli Eleasa shimapepo. Ufumishiwe kunse ya nkambi no kuipaya pa menso yakwe.
Numbers19:4 Elyo Eleasa shimapepo atumpike umunwe mu mulopa wauko
Numbers19:5 Ilyo Eleasa shimapepo alemonako
Numbers19:6 Shimapepo abuule ulusansu lwa cimuti icalepesha ica keda no tumisambo twa hisopo ne nsalu iyakashika cee
Numbers19:7 Panuma ya ifyo
Numbers19:8 Uyo muntu uuleoca umusepela wa ŋombe nao ali nokucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe
Numbers19:9 Kabili umuntu uwasangululwa akuse imito ya musepela wa ŋombe
Numbers19:10 No muntu uwakusa imito ya musepela wa ŋombe
Numbers19:11 “Uyo onse uwakumya ku citumbi ca muntu uuli onse
Numbers19:12 Afwile ukuisangulula na menshi pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu no bwalenga cine lubali. Elyo akaba uwasangululwa. Lelo nga taisangulwile pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu no bwalenga cine lubali
Numbers19:13 Uyo onse uwakumya ku citumbi ca muntu uuli onse
Numbers19:14 “Ili e funde lili nokukonkwa umuntu nga afwila mwi tenti. Uyo onse uwaingila mwi tenti na onse uuli mwi tenti
Numbers19:15 Kabili icipe conse icili apabula icakukupikapo
Numbers19:16 Onse uuli kunse uwakumya ku muntu baipaila ku lupanga
Numbers19:17 Ku muntu uwakowela
Numbers19:18 Elyo umuntu uwasangululwa abuule utumisambo twa hisopo
Numbers19:19 Umuntu wasanguluka euli nokusansa uwakowela amenshi pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu na pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali. Kanshi pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali bwine amusangulula. Elyo umuntu uulesangululwa afwile ukucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa mu menshi. Na mu cungulo cine ico ninshi asangululwa.
Numbers19:20 “Lelo umuntu wakowela nga akaana ukuisangulula
Numbers19:21 Ili e funde lyabo ilyamuyayaya. Umuntu uulesansa amenshi yakusangululwa

Numbers35:1 Mu mawanga ya Moabu
Numbers35:2 “Konkomesha abena Israeli ukupeelako abena Levi imisumba iyakwikalamo mu ca cishilano bali nokupeelwa. Kabili muli nokubapeela ne fitungu fyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo ukushinguluka imisumba.
Numbers35:3 Elyo bakakwata imisumba iyakwikalamo
Numbers35:4 Ifitungu fyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo
Numbers35:5 Kunse ya musumba
Numbers35:6 “Imisumba mutanda muli nokupeela abena Levi ikaba misumba yakufisamamo nga cakuti umuntu aipaya umuntu mubiye. Kabili mukalundepo ne misumba imbi amakumi yane na ibili (42).
Numbers35:7 Yonse pamo iyo muli nokupeela abena Levi ili nokuba amakumi yane na cine konse konse (48)
Numbers35:8 Imisumba iyo muli nokupeela abena Levi
Numbers35:9 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati
Numbers35:10 “Landa ku bena Israeli utile kuli bena. Ilyo mukabuka umumana wa Yordani no kuya mu calo ca Kenani
Numbers35:11 mukasale imisumba imo
Numbers35:12 Shikaba ni ncende shakufisamamo ukufuma ku wacilandushi
Numbers35:13 Iyi misumba mutanda iyikapeelwa
Numbers35:14 Mukapeele imisumba itatu kwishilya lya Yordani
Numbers35:15 Iyi misumba mutanda ikaba ni ncende shakufisamamo abena Israeli
Numbers35:16 “Nomba
Numbers35:17 Nangu nga cakuti umuntu ali ne libwe mu minwe yakwe ilingepaya umuntu
Numbers35:18 Nangu nga cakuti umuntu ali ne cimuti mu minwe yakwe icingepaya umuntu
Numbers35:19 Kalandula wa mulopa euli nokwipaya ntalamisoka. Nga amukumanya ali nokumwipaya.
Numbers35:20 “Nga cakuti umuntu umo alipata umubiye
Numbers35:21 nangu amuma ikofi mu lupato pakuti afwe
Numbers35:22 “Lelo nga cakuti ukwabula ulupato umuntu asunka umubiye mukupumikisha
Numbers35:23 nangu tamumwene
Numbers35:24 ulukuta lufwile ukupingula umulandu pakati kakwe na kalandula wa mulopa ukukonka na mafunde aya.
Numbers35:25 Ulukuta luli nokucingilila uwapeelwa umulandu wakwipaya umubiye kuli kalandula wa mulopa
Numbers35:26 Lelo uuli no mulandu nga afuma mu mipaka ya musumba abutukileko
Numbers35:27 elyo na kalandula wa mulopa amukumanya kunse ya musumba
Numbers35:28 Uwamulandu afwile ukwikala mu musumba afisamamo
Numbers35:29 Aya e mafunde yenu ne fipope ifyo mwakulakonka umukakonkanina inkulo
Numbers35:30 “Umuntu onse uwaipaya mubiye
Numbers35:31 Tecakwesha ukusumina ukupoka icakulubwilapo ntalamisoka uulingile ukufwa. Uyu ena mu cinefye afwile ukwipaiwa.
Numbers35:32 Tecakwesha kusumina ukupoka icakulubwilapo onse uwafulumukila mu musumba wakufisamamo
Numbers35:33 Tecakwesha kukowesha icalo muleikalamo. Ukusumya umulopa kulakowesha icalo
Numbers35:34 Tecakwesha kukowesha calo umo mwikala
Numbers36:1 Abakalamba ba lupwa lwa mu mikowa yakwa Gileadi
Numbers36:2 Batile
Numbers36:3 Nomba nga cakuti baupwa ku baume ba mu nko sha bena Israeli shimbi
Numbers36:4 Ilyo umwaka wakusefya ku bena Israeli ukafika
Numbers36:5 Kanshi ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe amukonkomeshe
Numbers36:6 Ifi efyo Yawe akonkomesha pa mulandu wa bana banakashi abakwa Selofeadi
Numbers36:7 Ifyuma fya cishilano mu bena Israeli
Numbers36:8 Umwana umwanakashi onse uwapeelwa impanga mu luko lonse ulwa bena Israeli
Numbers36:9 Takuli icuma ca cishilano icikafuma ku luko ulu no kuya kuli lumbi iyoo. Pantu cila luko lwa bena Israeli lwakulaikwatilafye impanga bapeelwa ukuba iya cishilano.”

Numbers36:11 Abana banakashi bakwa Selofeadi

Numbers36:13 Aya e mafunde ne fipope Yawe apeele Mose ku bena Israeli mu mawanga ya Moabu ku Yordani ukulungatana na Yeriko.

Deuteronomy12:23 Lelo tecakwesha kulya kumo no mulopa pantu ubumi bwaba mu mulopa. Mwikalalya ubumi kumo ne nama.
Deuteronomy12:24 Kanshi mwilalya mulopa. Wena mukalewitila panshi nga menshi.

Deuteronomy16:1 Kabili Mose atile
Deuteronomy16:2 Mukaleleka ilambo nge Pasaka kuli Yawe Lesa wenu ilya nama ukufuma pa mpaanga nangu imbushi shenu pa ncende iyo Yawe akasala nge cifulo ce shina lyakwe.
Deuteronomy16:3 Mwikalalya iyo nama kumo ne mikate iyatutumuka
Deuteronomy16:4 Pa nshiku cine lubali mwikalasangwa intutumushi mu calo cenu conse. Mwikalaleka inama mwalekela ilambo pa bushiku bwakubalilapo icungulo ishaleko mpaka ulucelo.
Deuteronomy16:5 “Mwikalalekela ilambo lye Pasaka mu musumba uuli onse Yawe Lesa wenu alemupeela
Deuteronomy16:6 kanofye pa ncende iyo Yawe Lesa wenu akasala nge cifulo ce shina lyakwe. Epantu mukalalekela ilambo lye Pasaka mu cungulo
Deuteronomy16:7 Muli nokoca inama no kuilya pa ncende ine Yawe Lesa wenu akasala. Elyo akacelo mwabwelelamo ku matenti yenu.
Deuteronomy16:8 Pa nshiku mutanda mukalelya imikate iyishatutumuka
Deuteronomy16:9 “Mukalependa imilungu cine lubali ukufuma ubushiku mwatampa ukulobolola iŋanu.
Deuteronomy16:10 Elyo mukalesefya inshikunkulu ya milungu
Deuteronomy16:11 Kabili mukalesansamuka pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wenu
Deuteronomy16:12 Muleibukisha ukuti mwali abasha mu calo ca Egupto

Deuteronomy16:14 Mukalesansamuka mu nshikunkulu shenu
Deuteronomy16:15 Pa nshiku cine lubali mukalesefya inshikunkulu mukucindika Yawe Lesa wenu

Deuteronomy16:17 Cila muntu ali nokusenda icabupe ukulingana ngefyo Yawe Lesa wenu amupaala.”

Deuteronomy17:3 elyo mukukanakonka amafunde yandi apepa imilungu imbi
Deuteronomy17:4 Ilyo ici caishibikwa kuli imwe
Deuteronomy17:5 mukafumishe kunse ya mpongolo yenu uyo mwaume nangu umwanakashi
Deuteronomy17:6 Umuntu pakumwipaya kano bakambone bali babili nangu batatu ebamushinina
Deuteronomy17:7 Bakambone ebafwile ukubalilapo ukumupola amabwe pakumwipaya
Deuteronomy17:8 “Nga cakuti kwaba imilandu iyaletwa ku filye fyenu iyingamukosela ukupingula

Deuteronomy17:10 Mukalecita ukulingana nefyo ubupingushi buli pa ncende iyo Yawe akasala. Mube abacenjela mukucita fyonse ifyo bamwebele.
Deuteronomy17:11 Mukalecita ifintu ukulingana na mafunde bamufunda kabili no kukonka bwino ubupingushi. Mwikalafuma kufyo bamweba
Deuteronomy17:12 Umuntu onse uwacita imisuula pakukanaumfwila bakapingula nangu shimapepo uuletumika Yawe Lesa wenu
Deuteronomy17:13 Abantu bonse bakomfwako no kutiina

Deuteronomy18:5 Pantu Yawe Lesa wenu alibasala pamo ne ndupwa shabo ukufuma mu nko shenu shonse pakuti baleiminina no kubomba mwishina lyakwa Yawe inshiku shonse.
