Deuteronomy26:1 Kabili Mose atile
Deuteronomy26:2 mukabuule ifisabo fyantanshi fimo pafyo mukasombola mu mushili wa mu calo Yawe Lesa wenu alemupeela. Kabili mukafilonge na mu museke mukafitwale ku ncende Yawe Lesa wenu akasala nge cifulo ce shina lyakwe.
Deuteronomy26:3 Elyo mukatile kuli shimapepo alipo pali iyo nshita
Deuteronomy26:4 “Shimapepo akapoka umuseke mu minwe yenu no kuubika pa ntanshi ya bulambo bwakwa Yawe Lesa wenu.
Deuteronomy26:5 Elyo mukasose amashiwi aya pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wenu amuti
Deuteronomy26:6 Lelo abena Egupto baletusunga buluku buluku no kulenga ukuti tucule kukubomba imilimo yacibe.
Deuteronomy26:7 Kanshi na ifwe epakulilila kuli Yawe Lesa wa fikolwe fyesu
Deuteronomy26:8 Kanshi Yawe epakutufumya mu Egupto ku maka yakwe ayabulamba no kuboko kwakwe ukwatambalala
Deuteronomy26:9 Ewatuleta kuli cino cifulo kabili atupeela na cino calo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci.
Deuteronomy26:10 Eico nomba nakuletela ifisabo fyantanshi ifya mu mushili uo we Yawe wampeela.’ Ukateke umuseke pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa obe elyo ukamupepe no kumupepa.
Deuteronomy26:11 Kanshi iwe na bena Levi na benafyalo abo mwikala nabo mukasansamukile capamo pa fintu ifisuma ifyo Yawe Lesa obe akupeela pamo na ba mu ŋanda yobe.
Deuteronomy26:12 “Ilyo mwapwisha ukufumyapo icapekumi pafyo mukasombola fyonse mu mwaka wabutatu

Deuteronomy26:14 Ine nshalyapo nelyo kamo pa cipande camushilo ilyo naleloosha
Deuteronomy26:15 Lolesha ukufuma ku mulu
Deuteronomy26:16 “Ubushiku bwe lelo Yawe Lesa wenu amukonkomesha ukulakonka amafunde ne fipope ifi. Mulefibaka bwino ne mitima yenu yonse ne myeo yenu yonse.

Deuteronomy27:5 Mukakuule palya pene ubulambo bwakwa Yawe Lesa wenu ubwa mabwe. Mwikabomfya icibombelo ca cela pali aya mabwe.
Deuteronomy27:6 Mukakuule ubulambo bwakwa Yawe Lesa wenu na mabwe ayashaputulwa ayatuntulu
Deuteronomy27:7 Palya pene epo mukalekele amalambo yakwampana
Deuteronomy27:8 Pali ayo mabwe mukemika
Deuteronomy27:9 Elyo Mose na bashimapepo abena Levi baebele Israeli onse ati

Deuteronomy28:3 “Mukapaalwa mu musumba kabili mukapaalwa na mu mpanga.
Deuteronomy28:4 “Ubufyashi bwa mwifumo lyenu bukaba ubwapaalwa pamo ne fisabo fya mu mushili wenu
Deuteronomy28:5 “Imiseke yenu ne fyakukashilamo imifuba fili nokupaalwa.
Deuteronomy28:6 “Muli nokupaalwa ilyo mukalaingila

Deuteronomy28:8 “Yawe akatuma ipaalo pa matala yenu na pa cintu conse ico mukekatako ne minwe yenu. Yawe Lesa wenu akamupaala mu calo alamupeela.

Deuteronomy28:26 Ifitumbi fyenu fikaba ifyakulya fya fyuni fya mu lwelele ne fiswango fya mu mpanga. Kabili takwakaleba nangu umo uwakufitamfyapo.

Deuteronomy28:50 Mushobo wa bantu abakatama ifinso

Deuteronomy34:1 Elyo Mose aninine ulupili lwa Nebo ukufuma ku mawanga ya Moabu ukufikafye na pa mulu wa lupili lwa Pisiga
Deuteronomy34:2 icalo conse icakwa Naftali
Deuteronomy34:3 ku matololo ya Negebu ne citungu conse ukufuma kwishika lya Yeriko

Deuteronomy34:6 Yawe nao amushiika mu Moabu
Deuteronomy34:7 Mose ali ne myaka umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120) ilyo afwile
Deuteronomy34:8 Abena Israeli bamulooseshe mu mawanga ya Moabu inshiku amakumi yatatu (30)
Deuteronomy34:9 Nomba Yoshua mwana Nuni aisushiwa no Mupashi wamano
Deuteronomy34:10 Ukufuma lilya line
Deuteronomy34:11 Kabili takwatala akuba uwacitile ifipeshamano ne finjelengwe nga filya Yawe atumine Mose ukuti aye acite mu Egupto
Deuteronomy34:12 Kabili takwaba kasesema nangu umo uwatala acita ifintu ifyamaka kabili ifyakutiinya nga filya Mose alecita pa cinso ca bena Israeli bonse.
Joshua1:1 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Mose
Joshua1:2 “Umubomfi wandi Mose nafwa. Eico kanshi nomba ima
Joshua1:3 Ndi nokumupeela icifulo conse apo mukanyanta amakasa yenu
Joshua1:4 Icalo cenu cikatampila ukufuma ku matololo ukufika na ku Lebanoni
Joshua1:5 Takuli nangu umo uukaba na maka yakukulwisha
Joshua1:6 Ube uwakosa kabili uwashipa
Joshua1:7 Eico
Joshua1:8 Tecakwesha ukulaba icitabo ca Mafunde ukuti cikalefuma pa kanwa kobe. Lelo ukaletontonkanyapo akasuba no bushiku
Joshua1:9 Bushe nshikukonkomeshe? Iwe ukosefye kabili ube uwashipa? Tecakwesha ukuba no mwenso. Kabili tecakwesha ukubwelela inuma
Joshua1:10 Elyo Yoshua apeele icipope kuli bacilolo ba bantu ati
Joshua1:11 “Pitaneni monse mu nkambi no kweba abantu bonse ukuti
Joshua1:12 Lelo ku bena Rubeni na bena Gadi kabili na citika wa luko lwa bena Manase
Joshua1:13 “Ibukisheni amashiwi ayo Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe amukonkomeshe ayakuti
Joshua1:14 Abakashi benu
Joshua1:15 mpakafye nabo bene Yawe akabapeele ukutuusha
Joshua1:16 Nabo bayasuka Yoshua abati
Joshua1:17 Twakulakubeela pamo ngefyo twalebeela Mose. Cikulufye
Joshua1:18 Kabili umuntu onse uwatalamina amashiwi yobe elyo nokukanabeela ifyo wakonkomesha
Joshua2:1 Kabili Yoshua umwana mwaume wakwa Nuni atumine mu bumfisolo inengu shibili ukufuma mu Shitimu no kusheba ati
Joshua2:2 Imfumu ya mu musumba wa Yeriko baliyebele abati
Joshua2:3 Elyo imfumu ya mu Yeriko yatuma amashiwi kuli Rahabu ayakutila
Joshua2:4 Lelo uyu mwanakashi abuulile aba bantu babili no kubafisa. Elyo atile
Joshua2:5 Elyo lilya paya palefitulukila
Joshua2:6 Kanshi ninshi uyu mwanakashi abafishile pa mutenge mwisamba lya mwina wa bukonge uo alongele palya pa mutenge.
Joshua2:7 Kanshi abaume abo imfumu yatumine epakukonka inengu mu musebo uwalola ku cabu ca mumana wa Yordani. Elyo cilyafye abakukonka inengu bafuma
Joshua2:8 Ilyo inengu tashilati shisendame
Joshua2:9 no kubeba ati
Joshua2:10 Twalyumfwa ifyo Yawe akamishe amenshi muli Bemba Wakashika
Joshua2:11 Eico ilyo twaumfwile ifi
Joshua2:12 Eico kanshi
Joshua2:13 icakuti muli nokupususha imyeo ya batata
Joshua2:14 Inengu epakumwasuka ati
Joshua2:15 Elyo Rahabu afumishe inengu ku ntambo pa windo
Joshua2:16 Abeba nokuti
Joshua2:17 Elyo inengu shaeba Rahabu ashiti
Joshua2:18 ilyo tukafika mu calo cino ukakake uyu mwando wakashika watwishisheko pa windo
Joshua2:19 Elyo cikaba ukuti umuntu umo nga afumina panse ya ŋanda yobe no kuya mu musebo
Joshua2:20 Lelo nga cakuti wasokolola icintu twaishila kuno
Joshua2:21 Rahabu asumina ati
Joshua2:22 Ilyo baile balungeme ku mpili
Joshua2:23 Elyo ishi inengu shibili shatentemwike ulupili no kwabuka umumana ukubwelelamo kuli Yoshua mwana Nuni no kumweba fyonse ifyabacitikile.
Joshua2:24 Shamwebele ashiti
Joshua3:1 Awe ulucelocelo Yoshua na bena Israeli bonse bafumine mu Shitimu no kulungama ku Yordani

Joshua3:3 balaeba abantu ifyebo abati
Joshua3:4 Ili lyena elyo mukeshiba inshila muli nokuyamo

Joshua4:1 Ilyo umushobo onse wapwile ukwabuka umumana wa Yordani

Joshua4:3 Elyo ubakonkomeshe auti
Joshua4:4 Elyo Yoshua aitile abantu abaume ikumi limo na babili abo asalile ukufuma muli cila luko lwa bena Israeli
Joshua4:5 alabeba ati

Joshua4:7 Mukalabasuka amuti

Joshua4:9 Elyo Yoshua kabili aimike amabwe na yambi ikumi limo na yabili pakati ka mumana wa Yordani
Joshua4:10 Nomba bashimapepo bena abalesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano bashele nabeminina palya pene pakati ka mumana wa Yordani

Joshua6:1 Nomba umusumba wa Yeriko wali uwaisalwa nganshi pa mulandu wakutiina abena Israeli. Takwali muntu nelyo umo uwakufumamo
Joshua6:2 Elyo Yawe aebele Yoshua ati
Joshua6:3 Kanshi iwe ne fita fyankondo fyonse mwakulaenda ukushinguluka umusumba umuku umo. Mukacite ifi pa nshiku mutanda.
Joshua6:4 Mulingile ukuba na bashimapepo cine lubali bakatangilile Imbokoshi ya Cipangano
Joshua6:5 Ilyo bakaputa mu lusengo lwakwa sukusuku
Joshua6:6 Kanshi Yoshua mwana Nuni epakwita bashimapepo no kubeba ati
Joshua6:7 Elyo kabili aeba abantu ati
Joshua6:8 Cilyafye Yoshua apwisha ukulanda ku bantu
Joshua6:9 Ifita fyankondo fyena efyali pa ntanshi ya bashimapepo abalelisha amapenga elyo abalinshi nabo ebaleshalila balekonka panuma ya balesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano
Joshua6:10 Lelo Yoshua akonkomesha abantu ati
Joshua6:11 Kanshi Yoshua epakuleka bashimapepo basenda Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe bashinguluka nayo umusumba umuku umo. Elyo babwelela ku nkambi eko basendama.
Joshua6:12 Yoshua abuuka ulucelo
Joshua6:13 Bashimapepo cine lubali aba mapenga ya nsengo sha basukusuku ebaletangilila Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe
Joshua6:14 Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga shibili baile baleenda ukushinguluka umusumba umuku umo no kubwelela ku nkambi. Bacitile ifi pa nshiku mutanda.
Joshua6:15 Nomba pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali
Joshua6:16 Pa muku walenga cine lubali bashimapepo balisha amapenga
Joshua6:17 Nomba umusumba na fyonse ifilimo fili nokupeelwa kuli Yawe ukuti fyonaulwe. Kanofye Rahabu cilende
Joshua6:18 Eico kanshi imwe muisunge bwino ku fintu ifyapeelwa kukonaulwa
Joshua6:19 Lelo silifa na golide yonse ne fipe ifya mukuba ne fya fyela fyena fyamushilo kuli Yawe
Joshua6:20 Kanshi abantu epakuwelesha
Joshua6:21 Bapeela kuli Yawe umusumba onse kukuonaula
Joshua6:22 Kabili Yoshua aebele abaume babili abali inengu sha calo ici ati
Joshua6:23 Awe aba balumendo inengu baingile mu ŋanda no kufumya Rahabu
Joshua6:24 Elyo baoca no musumba onsefye
Joshua6:25 Lelo Rahabu uwali cilende elyo na ba mu ŋanda yakwa wishi na bonse abo ali nabo Yoshua tafyonawile. Eico ukushinta na pa bushiku bwe lelo
Joshua6:26 Pa nshita ilya Yoshua alanda umulapo wakuti
Joshua6:27 Kanshi lyonsefye Yawe ali na Yoshua

Joshua8:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Yoshua ati
Joshua8:2 Ifyo uli nokucita ku musumba wa Ai ne mfumu yauko ni filya fine wacitile ku musumba wa Yeriko ne mfumu yauko. Lelo uno muku
Joshua8:3 Kanshi Yoshua pamo pene ne fita epakwima
Joshua8:4 Elyo abakonkomesha ati
Joshua8:5 Ine pamo na bonse abo tuli nabo twakulapalamina ku musumba. Nomba ilyo abalwani bakesa tufumina
Joshua8:6 Nabo bali nokutukonka mpakafye tukasuke atubatalusha ukufuma ku musumba. Elyo bena bakatila
Joshua8:7 elintu nomba na imwe mukeme apo mukabelama no kupoka umusumba. Na Yawe Lesa wenu ali nokuupeela mu maboko yenu.
Joshua8:8 Ilyo mukapoka umusumba
Joshua8:9 Kanshi Yoshua epakubatuma baya ku ncende yakubelaminapo mukupembela iyali pakati ka Betele na Ai
Joshua8:10 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo
Joshua8:11 Fyonse ifita ifyali pamo na Yoshua fyaya fileenda kabili fyafikile mupepi no musumba no kupitila kuntanshi yauko. Elyo fyacitile ne nkambi ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka musumba wa Ai
Joshua8:12 Elyo Yoshua abuulapo ifita ni cikanga na makana yasano (5

Joshua8:14 Ilyo imfumu ya mu musumba wa Ai yaumfwile ifi
Joshua8:15 Elyo Yoshua na bena Israeli bonse bacita kwati bafulumuka
Joshua8:16 Abekala musumba bonse bakutene no kukunkunika abena Israeli no kubatamfishafye ukutali ukufuma ku musumba wa Ai. Kanshi ilyo balebutusha Yoshua na bantu bakwe

Joshua8:23 Lelo kwashelefye imfumu yabo iyo baikete no kuitwala kuli Yoshua.
Joshua8:24 Ilyo abena Israeli bapwishishe ukwipaya abena Ai abali mu mapanga na mu matololo umo babutukile

Joshua9:2 shali no mutima umo mukulwisha Yoshua na bena Israeli.
Joshua9:3 Lelo ilyo abena Gibeoni baumfwile ifyo Yoshua acitile ku Yeriko na ku Ai
Joshua9:4 bacita ubucenjeshi. Baya kuli Yoshua nga batuminwe
Joshua9:5 Bafwele ifisamu elyo ne ndyato ishafikamba fikamba ku makasa yabo. Umukate onse untu basendele wali uwakosa
Joshua9:6 Elyo baya kuli Yoshua ku nkambi ya ku Giligali

Joshua9:8 Nabo baeba Yoshua abati
Joshua9:9 Nabo bayaswike abati

Joshua9:11 Kanshi eico abakalamba besu elyo na bonse abekala mu calo cesu batile kuli ifwe
Joshua9:12 Uyu mukate wesu wali uwakaba ilyo twalelonga ku mushi pa bushiku twaleisa kuno kuli imwe. Nomba pali ino inshita
Joshua9:13 Kabili ilyo twabikile imyangashi no kwisusha ishi inyambi
Joshua9:14 Abena Israeli epakuibuulilapo ifilyo abene ukwabula ukwipusha ukulanda kwakwa Yawe.
Joshua9:15 Yoshua epakucita icipangano camutende na ba bantu abena Gibeoni no kulaikala nabo pamo
Joshua9:16 Cilya papitafye inshiku shitatu apo bapangile icipangano na bena Gibeoni
Joshua9:17 Elyo abena Israeli epakwima
Joshua9:18 Lelo abena Israeli tababalwishishe iyoo
Joshua9:19 Elyo abakalamba nabo babasuka ukuti
Joshua9:20 Ifi efyo tuli nokucita pali kano kashita kuli bena
Joshua9:21 Kabili abakalamba balundilepo no kubeba ati
Joshua9:22 Elyo Yoshua atumine abakuya ita abena Gibeoni
Joshua9:23 Ala nomba imwe mwalapishiwa. Tamwakatale amuleka ukuba abasha abakulatapa amenshi no kulateba inkuni mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wandi.”
Joshua9:24 Abena Gibeoni nabo bayasuka Yoshua abati
Joshua9:25 Eco nomba ifwe
Joshua9:26 Kanshi Yoshua nao epakubapususha ku bena Israeli

Joshua10:1 Nomba Adoni Sedeki imfumu ya mu Yerusalemu yaumfwile ukuti Yoshua napoka umusumba wa Ai no kuonaula
Joshua10:2 Elyo natiina apakalamba pali ici cicitike
Joshua10:3 Eico Adoni Sedeki imfumu ya mu Yerusalemu yatumine inkombe ku mfumu shibiye
Joshua10:4 Abebele ati
Joshua10:5 Awe imfumu shisano isha bena Amoli
Joshua10:6 Awe abena Gibeoni batumine amashiwi kuli Yoshua kuntu ali ku nkambi ya ku Giligali abati
Joshua10:7 Awe Yoshua epakwima ku Giligali pamo pene ne fita fyabulwi
Joshua10:8 Elyo Yawe aebele Yoshua ati
Joshua10:9 Panuma yakwenda ubushiku bonse ukufuma ku Giligali
Joshua10:10 Elyo Yawe nao abafulungenye amano ku cinso ca bena Israeli
Joshua10:11 Ilyo balefulumuka abena Israeli
Joshua10:12 Mu bushiku bwine bulya Yawe apeele abena Amoli mu maboko ya bena Israeli
Joshua10:13 Ne cacine akasuba kaimininafye
Joshua10:14 Ukufumafye ku kale takwatalile akuba ubushiku ngobu ubo Yawe aumfwilile umuntu
Joshua10:15 Elyo Yoshua pamo na bena Israeli bonse babwelelamo ku nkambi ku Giligali.
Joshua10:16 Nomba imfumu ishi shisano shabutwike no kuya fisama mu ninga ya ku Makeda.
Joshua10:17 Lelo ilyo baebele Yoshua ukuti imfumu ishi shisano nabashisanga uko shibeleme mu ninga ya ku Makeda
Joshua10:18 nao atile
Joshua10:19 Lelo imwe mwileka ukusupila abalwani benu
Joshua10:20 Eico Yoshua na bena Israeli ilyo bakomawile abalwani babo mupepi no kubapwisha. Bamo bamo ebashele baile fika ku misumba yabo
Joshua10:21 ne fita fyonse fyabwelele kuli Yoshua ku nkambi ya ku Makeda umutende. Takwali umuntu nelyo umo uwasoselepo ishiwi ilibi pa bena Israeli.
Joshua10:22 Panuma ya ifi elyo Yoshua atile
Joshua10:23 Awe nabo bafumishe imfumu shisano ukufuma mu ninga
Joshua10:24 Ilyo bafishishe ishi mfumu kuli Yoshua
Joshua10:25 Kabili Yoshua abebele ati
Joshua10:26 Elyo Yoshua akomaula ishi mfumu
Joshua10:27 Cilya akasuba kawa
Joshua10:28 Pa bushiku ubo bwine
Joshua10:29 Kabili panuma ya ifi fyonse
Joshua10:30 Kabili Yawe apeela uyu musumba pamo ne mfumu yauko mu maboko ya bena Israeli. Kabili Yoshua aonawile umusumba no kwipaya abaleikalamo bonse ku lupanga. Tamwali uwashelemo nangu umo. Acitile kuli iyi imfumu ya musumba wa Libina pamo ngefyo acitile ku mfumu ya musumba wa Yeriko.
Joshua10:31 Yoshua nakabili pamo na bena Israeli bonse bafuma mu musumba wa Libina no kuya ku musumba wa Lakishi. Baya ushinguluka no kuulwisha.
Joshua10:32 Kabili Yawe abalwishishako no kupeela uyu musumba mu maboko ya bena Israeli
Joshua10:33 Elintu Holamu imfumu ya musumba wa Gesa aisa mukutulanyako umusumba wa Lakishi lelo Yoshua alimucimfishe pamo pene ne fita fyakwe. Tapashele nelyo umo.
Joshua10:34 Yoshua nakabili pamo na bena Israeli bonse bafuma mu musumba wa Lakishi no kuya ku musumba wa Egiloni
Joshua10:35 Bapokele uyu musumba pali ubu bwine bushiku
Joshua10:36 Yoshua nakabili pamo na bena Israeli bonse bafuma ku Egiloni baya ku Hebuloni no kuya lwisha uyu musumba.
Joshua10:37 Awe nao wine baliupokele no kwipaya abantu bonse ku lupanga
Joshua10:38 Yoshua nakabili pamo na bena Israeli bonse balungama no kuya lwisha umusumba wa Debi.
Joshua10:39 Bapoka uyu musumba pamo ne mfumu yauko ne mishi yauko
Joshua10:40 Kanshi efyo Yoshua acimfishe icalo conse
Joshua10:41 Yoshua abacimfishe ukufuma ku Kadeshi Banea ukufikafye na ku Gasa. Kabili ukufuma ku calo conse ica Gosheni ukufikafye na ku Gibeoni.
Joshua10:42 Yoshua acimfishe shonse imfumu no kupoka ifyalo fyashiko pa nshita imo ine. Pantu Yawe
Joshua10:43 Elyo Yoshua na bena Israeli bonse babwelela na ku nkambi ya ku Giligali.
Joshua11:1 Nomba ilyo Yabini imfumu ya musumba wa Hasoli aumfwile ifyacitike
Joshua11:2 Kabili atumine inkombe ku mfumu sha ku kapinda ka ku kuso
Joshua11:3 Elyo kabili atumine inkombe ku bena Kenani ba ku kabanga na ba ku masamba
Joshua11:4 Imfumu shonse shaishile ne mpuka ya fita fyashiko
Joshua11:5 Shonse ishi mfumu shasankenye pamo ifita fyabo no kucita inkambi imo pa menshi ya Meromu pakuti balwishe bwino abena Israeli.
Joshua11:6 Elyo Yawe aeba Yoshua ati
Joshua11:7 Awe Yoshua ne fita fyonse bafika uko bali nokubapumikisha mu bulwi pa menshi ya Meromu.
Joshua11:8 Na Yawe nao abapeela mu maboko ya bena Israeli. Nabo bacimfya no kubabutusha bonse ku nshila yaya ku Sidoni Mukulu
Joshua11:9 Na Yoshua acitile ngefyo Yawe amwebele. Alemanika bakabalwe babo
Joshua11:10 Pa nshita ilya ine
Joshua11:11 Onsefye umuntu uwali muli uyu musumba
Joshua11:12 Yoshua acimfya no kupoka yonse imisumba ne mfumu yashiko
Joshua11:13 Nangu cali ifi
Joshua11:14 Abena Israeli balisendele abene fyonse ifyo batapile
Joshua11:15 Pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe umubomfi wakwe Mose
Joshua11:16 Kanshi Yoshua epakupokafye icalo conse cilya. Icalo ca mpili
Joshua11:17 Kabili alipokele ne calo conse ukufuma ku lupili lwa Halaki
Joshua11:18 Yoshua alwishishe ishi mfumu pa nshita iyitali.
Joshua11:19 Takwali umusumba nelyo umo uwacitile icipangano ca cibote na bena Israeli
Joshua11:20 Pantu ni Yawe umwine ewabakoseshe imitima pakulwisha abena Israeli pakuti bonaulwe no kwipaiwa
Joshua11:21 Kabili mu nshita ilya ine
Joshua11:22 Takwali umwina Anakimu uwasheleko mu calo ca bena Israeli
Joshua11:23 Kanshi Yoshua epakupoka icalo conse
Joshua12:1 Kanshi ishi e mfumu sha mu calo isho abena Israeli bacimfishe
Joshua12:2 Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli
Joshua12:3 Kabili ateekele no lubali lwa ku kabanga ka Araba ukufika kuli bemba wa Kinereti lwa ku kabanga elyo no kufika kuli bemba wa Araba wine
Joshua12:4 Na umbi uwasheleko ni Ogi
Joshua12:5 Ewaleteeka no lupili lwine lwa Hemoni
Joshua12:6 Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe pamo na bena Israeli ebacimfishe isho mfumu. Kabili Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe apeele ne calo cabo ku bena Rubeni
Joshua12:7 Kanshi ishi e mfumu isho Yoshua na bena Israeli bacimfishe ishaleikala kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani ukufuma ku musumba wa Baali Gadi kwishika lya Lebanoni ukufika ku lupili lwa Halaki
Joshua12:8 Icalo ca mpili
Joshua12:9 Imfumu ya mu Yeriko imo
Joshua12:10 Imfumu ya mu Yerusalemu imo
Joshua12:11 Imfumu ya mu Yamuti imo
Joshua12:12 Imfumu ya ku Egiloni imo
Joshua12:13 Imfumu ya ku Debi imo
Joshua12:14 Imfumu ya ku Homa imo
Joshua12:15 Imfumu ya ku Libina imo
Joshua12:16 Imfumu ya ku Makeda imo
Joshua12:17 Imfumu ya ku Tapua imo
Joshua12:18 Imfumu ya ku Afeki imo
Joshua12:19 Imfumu ya ku Madoni imo
Joshua12:20 Imfumu ya ku Shimuroni Meroni imo
Joshua12:21 Imfumu ya ku Tanaki imo
Joshua12:22 Imfumu ya ku Kadeshi imo
Joshua12:23 Imfumu ya ku Dori mu Nafoti Dori imo
Joshua12:24 Imfumu ya ku Tirisa imo. Shonse pamo shali amakumi yatatu na imo (31).
Joshua13:1 Ilyo Yoshua akotele nganshi
Joshua13:2 Iyi e ncende iyisheleko: Yonsefye impanga ya bena Filisiti elyo na bena Geshuri
Joshua13:3 itulilefye ku mumana wa Shihori ku kabanga ka calo ca Egupto ukuya fika na ku mupaka wa Ekironi ku kapinda ka ku kuso
Joshua13:4 iya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Joshua13:5 Elyo incende yonse iya bena Gebali
Joshua13:6 Bonse abekala mu calo ca mpili ukufumafye ku Lebanoni ukufika ku Misilefoti Maimu
Joshua13:7 Eico nomba cakanye ku nko pabula kukuba icakaniko ca cishilano cashiko
Joshua13:8 Elyo umbi citika wa luko lwakwa Manase
Joshua13:9 Abashilile icalo ukufuma ku Aroeli icaba mu lulamba lwa mukonko wa Alinoni
Joshua13:10 Kabili abashilile ne misumba yonse iyo Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli
Joshua13:11 Elyo kuli ici cine calo
Joshua13:12 Kwalundilweko icalo conse ica mfumu Ogi ku Bashani
Joshua13:13 Lelo abena Israeli tabafulumwinemo abena Geshuri na bena Maakati
Joshua13:14 Kanofye uluko lwakwa Levi lwena Mose talupeeleko icakaniko ca cishilano ca calo. Pantu abena Levi bena imituulo ye lambo iyakoca iyo baletuula kuli Yawe
Joshua13:15 Ifi efyo Mose ayakenye icalo ku luko lwakwa Rubeni
Joshua13:16 Icalo cafumine ku Aroeli iyabela mu lulamba lwa mukonko wa Alinoni
Joshua13:17 ukufika ku Heshiboni ne misumba yonse iyaciko iyaba apabatama
Joshua13:18 Yahasi
Joshua13:19 Kiriataimu
Joshua13:20 Beti Peori
Joshua13:21 Ekutila misumba yonse iyaba apabatama
Joshua13:22 Ukusansha kubo baipeye mu bulwi ku bena Israeli
Joshua13:23 Umumana wa Yordani ewali e mupaka wa calo ca bena Rubeni. Imisumba pamo ne mishi yabo eyali e cishilano ca bena Rubeni
Joshua13:24 Ifi efyo Mose ayakenye icalo ku luko lwakwa Gadi
Joshua13:25 Icalo ca Yaseri
Joshua13:26 Kabili ukufuma ku Heshiboni ukufikafye na ku Ramati Misipa na Betonimu. Elyo kabili ukufuma ku Manaimu ukufikafye na ku mupaka wa calo ca Debi.
Joshua13:27 Elyo na mwishika Beti Haramu
Joshua13:28 Kanshi ici calo kumo kwine ne misumba ne mishi yaciko
Joshua13:29 Ifi efyo Mose ayakenye icalo kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase
Joshua13:30 Icalo catendekelefye ukufuma ku Manaimu ukubikako icitungu conse ica Bashani ne calo conse icakwa Ogi imfumu ya ku Bashani
Joshua13:31 elyo citika wa calo ca Gileadi
Joshua13:32 Ifi e fyalo ifyo Mose ayakenye ukuba icishilano ilyo ali mu mawanga ya Moabu
Joshua13:33 Lelo uluko lwa bena Levi
Joshua14:1 Nomba ishi e ncende ishapeelwe ku bena Israeli nge cakaniko ca cishilano cabo mu calo ca Kenani
Joshua14:2 Ifyakaniko fya cishilano cabo fyapeelwe ukulingana no kupendula ku nko pabula elyo na citika wa luko lumo
Joshua14:3 Inko shibili na citika wa luko lumo
Joshua14:4 Pantu abana bakwa Yosefu abaume bali inko shibili
Joshua14:5 Kanshi abena Israeli epakwakana icalo ukulingana nomo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.
Joshua14:6 Nomba abantu aba mu luko lwakwa Yuda baile kuli Yoshua ku Giligali
Joshua14:7 Ine nali ne myaka amakumi yane iyakufyalwa lintu Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe antumine ukufuma ku Kadeshi Banea mukufwailisha no kulengula icalo. Elyo na ine ilyo nabwelulwikeko
Joshua14:8 Nomba bamunyinane abo naile nabo
Joshua14:9 Eico kanshi pali bulya bushiku bwine
Joshua14:10 Eico nomba
Joshua14:11 Na lelo line ine ncili uwamaka nga filya fine nali mu bushiku Mose antuminemo. Na ndakai line ncili na maka yakuya ku bulwi no kubwela
Joshua14:12 Eico kanshi nomba mpeela ici calo ca ku mpili ico Yawe andaile pa bushiku bulya. Pantu walyumfwile we mwine pali ilya inshita ukuti abena Anaki eko bacili
Joshua14:13 Awe Yoshua epakupaala Kalebu umwana mwaume wakwa Yefune no kupeela icalo ca Hebuloni ukuba icakaniko ca cishilano cakwe.
Joshua14:14 Eico icalo ca Hebuloni ukushinta na pali lelo ecaba icishilano cakwa Kalebu
Joshua14:15 Ishina lyakale ilya Hebuloni ni Kiriati Ariba
Joshua15:1 Icitungu icapendwilwe capeelwe ku ba mu luko lwakwa Yuda
Joshua15:2 Uyu mupaka wabo uwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Joshua15:3 Waile abukila ku kapinda ka ku kulyo pa mupaka wa Akilabimu ukutwalilila ukufika na ku Sini. Kabili wayafye na ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ka Kadeshi Banea. Elyo uyu mupaka wapitilila Hesroni ukwisa ku Adali no kushokela ku Kaka.
Joshua15:4 Kabili waile na ku Asimoni no kusuntinkana na kamana mainsa aka pa mupaka wa calo ca Egupto
Joshua15:5 Ku kabanga nako umupaka ni Bemba Wamucele
Joshua15:6 Uyu mupaka nao walipitilile mpakafye na ku Beti Hogula no kufika ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka Beti Araba ku Cilibwe cakwa Boani mwana Rubeni.
Joshua15:7 Kabili umupaka waya ku Debi ukufuma kwishika lya Ako no kushokela ku kapinda ka ku kuso ku Giligali
Joshua15:8 Elyo kabili umupaka wanina ukufuma mu mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu ukukonka ku kapinda ka ku kulyo mwisamba lya lupili lwa musumba wa Yebusi
Joshua15:9 Elyo kabili ukufuma pa mulu wa lupili
Joshua15:10 Kabili ukufuma ku Bala
Joshua15:11 Umupaka kabili waya ku mutentemuko wa lupili lwa Ekironi ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kwalukila ku Shikeroni no kucilinganya ulupili lwa Bala no kuya fika ku Yabineli. Uyu mupaka wapelele muli bemba.
Joshua15:12 Umupaka wa ku masamba wali lulamba lwa Bemba Mukulu wine. Iyi e mipaka iyashingulwike abantu bakwa Yuda ukulingana ne ndupwa shabo.
Joshua15:13 Ukulingana nefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Yoshua
Joshua15:14 Kabili Kalebu afulumwine ukufuma ku Hebuloni bamwana Anaki batatu: Sheshai
Joshua15:15 Kabili aimine no kuya lwisha abantu abaleikala mu Debi
Joshua15:16 Elyo Kalebu atile “Nkapeela umwana wandi umwanakashi Akisa kukuba umukashi ku mwaume onse uukalwisha no kupoka umusumba wa Kiriati Sefe.”
Joshua15:17 Awe Otinieli umwana mwaume wakwa Kenasi
Joshua15:18 Ubushiku ilyo Akisa akuukile
Joshua15:19 Nao mwane ayasuka ati
Joshua15:20 Kanshi ici e cakaniko ca cishilano ca ba nko sha bena Yuda
Joshua15:21 Imisumba iyabelele ku kapinda ka ku kulyo iya bena Yuda mu calo ca Negebu lwa ku mupaka wa Edomu yali niyi: Kabiseli
Joshua15:22 Kina
Joshua15:23 Kadeshi
Joshua15:24 Sifu
Joshua15:25 Hasoli Hadata
Joshua15:26 Amami
Joshua15:27 Hazali Gada
Joshua15:28 Hasa Shuali
Joshua15:29 Baala
Joshua15:30 Elitoladi
Joshua15:31 Sikilagi
Joshua15:32 Labaoti
Joshua15:33 Imisumba yabela lwa pesamba lya mpili nayo yali niyi: Eshitaoli
Joshua15:34 Sanoa
Joshua15:35 Yamuti
Joshua15:36 Shaaraimu
Joshua15:37 Imisumba na imbi ni Senani
Joshua15:38 Dileani
Joshua15:39 Lakishi
Joshua15:40 Kaboni
Joshua15:41 Gedaloti
Joshua15:42 Imisumba na imbi ni Libina
Joshua15:43 Ifuta
Joshua15:44 Keila Akisibi na Malesha
Joshua15:45 Na imbi misumba ni Ekironi
Joshua15:46 ukufuma ku masamba ya Ekironi
Joshua15:47 Imisumba na imbi ni Ashidodi
Joshua15:48 Mu calo ca mpili namo mwali imisumba na imbi: Shami
Joshua15:49 Dana
Joshua15:50 Anabi
Joshua15:51 Gosheni
Joshua15:52 Kabili mwali na Alabu
Joshua15:53 Yanimu
Joshua15:54 Humita
Joshua15:55 Kabili mwali na Maoni
Joshua15:56 Yesireli
Joshua15:57 Kaini
Joshua15:58 Na imbi imisumba yali ni Halihuli
Joshua15:59 Malati
Joshua15:60 Umusumba wa Kiriati Bali
Joshua15:61 Mu matololo namo mwali imisumba na imbi
Joshua15:62 Nibushani
Joshua15:63 Nomba abena Yuda balifililwe ukutamfya abena Yebusi
Joshua16:1 Umupaka wa citungu capeelwe ku bana bakwa Yosefu wayambile ku mumana wa Yordani ku Yeriko
Joshua16:2 Uyu mupaka watwalilile ukufuma ku Betele
Joshua16:3 Kabili watentemukile lwa ku masamba ku mupaka wa calo ca bena Yafuleti no kuya fikafye na ku mupaka wa mwishika lya Beti Haloni no kushinta ku Gesa
Joshua16:4 Kanshi ici e calo Manase na Efulemu bamwana Yosefu bapokelele ukuba icakaniko ca cishilano cabo.
Joshua16:5 Kanshi ici ecali icalo ca bamwana Efulemu
Joshua16:6 no kupitilila ukuya fika kuli bemba. Kabili ukufuma ku Mikimetati lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kushokela ku kabanga walungama ku Tanati Shilo
Joshua16:7 Elyo kabili watentemukile ukufuma ku Yanoa ukuya ku Ataloti na ku Nala
Joshua16:8 Ukufuma ku Tapua
Joshua16:9 Elyo kabili kwalundilwe ne misumba yonsefye ne mishi yabo iyali mu mbali iyapatwililwe ku bena Efulemu mukati ka cakaniko ca cishilano ca bena Manase.
Joshua16:10 Na muli ici calo tabatamfishemo abena Kenani abaleikala mu Gesa. Na mu bushiku bwe lelo bwine abena Kenani bekalafye pakati ka bena Efulemu
Joshua17:1 Kabili ici ecali icitungu icapeelwe ku luko lwakwa Manase
Joshua17:2 Kanshi abana abaume bambi abakwa Manase nabo bapeelwe impanga umwabela indupwa shabo: Abana bakwa Abiesa
Joshua17:3 Nomba Selofeadi umwana mwaume wakwa Heferi mwana Gileadi
Joshua17:4 Awe bonse baile kuli shimapepo Eleasa na Yoshua mwana Nuni elyo na ku ntungulushi no kuyatila
Joshua17:5 Kanshi abena Manase bapeelwe ifiputulwa ikumi limo ifya calo ukwabula ukubikako icalo ca Gileadi ne ca Bashani ifyabela kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani.
Joshua17:6 Pantu bamwana Manase abanakashi aba mu luko lwakwe balipeelweko icakaniko ca cishilano pamo ne ndume shabo. Eico kanshi icalo ca Gileadi icasheleko naco cali ca bana bambi abasheleko abakwa Manase.
Joshua17:7 Icalo cakwa Manase catampile ukufuma ku Asheri no kuya fika ku Mikimetati icali ku kabanga ka Shekemu. Umupaka walalenye ukufuma ku kapinda ka ku kuso ukuya kuminkanyako na bekashi ba mu Eni Tapua.
Joshua17:8 Manase akwete icalo ca Tapua
Joshua17:9 Elyo kabili umupaka watwalilile ukulola ku kapinda ka kulyo ku mumana wa Kana. Uku nako kwaliko imisumba iya bena Efulemu iyashintene ne misumba ya bena Manase
Joshua17:10 Ku kapinda ka ku kulyo kwali icalo cakwa Efulemu
Joshua17:11 Mu calo cakwa Isaka na Asheri
Joshua17:12 Lelo abena Manase balifililwe ukupoka iyi misumba
Joshua17:13 Eico
Joshua17:14 Elyo ulupwa lwakwa Yosefu baebele Yoshua abati
Joshua17:15 Nao Yoshua epakubasuka ati
Joshua17:16 Elyo ulupwa lwakwa Yosefu nalo lwayaswike aluti
Joshua17:17 Elyo Yoshua aebele aba ŋanda yakwa Yosefu ukufika ku ba ŋanda yakwa Efulemu na Manase ati
Joshua17:18 lelo icalo ica mpili naco cili nokuba cenu. Nangu cabamo imiti nomba ciwamyenifye
Joshua18:1 Kabili ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli lwalongene ku Shilo no kwimika Itenti lyakukumaninamo kulya kwine
Joshua18:2 Kuli ilya ncende kwashele aba nko cine lubali isha bena Israeli abashali tabalapeelwako icakaniko ca cishilano cabo.
Joshua18:3 Eico Yoshua atile ku bena Israeli
Joshua18:4 Kanshi saleni ukufuma muli cila luko abantu batatu
Joshua18:5 Mulingile ukwakanya icalo mu fiputulwa cine lubali. Icalo cakwa Yuda cili nokushala filya fine ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Joshua18:6 Panuma yakulemba bwino bwino iyi mipaka cine lubali ya ici calo
Joshua18:7 Pantu abena Levi bena tabakapeelweko iciputulwa ca muli ici calo cenu
Joshua18:8 Awe abaume baya mukulengula icalo ico Yoshua abebele ukuyako ati
Joshua18:9 Nabo abantu epakwima no kulapitana mu calo conse. Kabili balembele mu citabo fyonse ifyo basangile mu musumba no musumba
Joshua18:10 Yoshua nao epakubapendwilako mu Shilo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Elyo ayakenye ne calo ku bena Israeli ukulingana nomo inko shabo shabelele.
Joshua18:11 Icitungu icakubalilapo icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Benjamini
Joshua18:12 Ku kapinda ka ku kuso umupaka watampila ku mumana wa Yordani
Joshua18:13 Ukufuma uku
Joshua18:14 Ukufuma pa lupili ulwalungatana na Beti Horoni lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Joshua18:15 Lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Joshua18:16 Umupaka kabili waikila ku mutentemuko wa lupili ukulungatana no mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu
Joshua18:17 Walola ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kuya ku Eni Shemeshi
Joshua18:18 Kabili walambata Beti Araba ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kutentemukila panshi ku Araba.
Joshua18:19 Elyo kabili umupaka walolele ku mutentemuko wa ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwa Beti Hogila no kutuntukila kuli Bemba Wamucele ku kapinda ka ku kuso
Joshua18:20 Umumana wa Yordani nao ewali e mupaka lubali lwa ku kabanga. Iyi e mipaka ya luko lwakwa Benjamini umwabela indupwa shabo ukulingana no mwapelele imipaka ukushinguluka.
Joshua18:21 Nomba imisumba ya luko lwakwa Benjamini umwabelele ndupwa shabo yali ni Yeriko
Joshua18:22 Beti Araba
Joshua18:23 Afimu
Joshua18:24 Kefa Amoni
Joshua18:25 Kabili Gibeoni
Joshua18:26 Misipa
Joshua18:27 Rekemu
Joshua18:28 Sela
Joshua19:1 Icitungu cabubili icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Simeoni
Joshua19:2 Casanshisheko na Beresheba
Joshua19:3 Hasa Shuali
Joshua19:4 Elitoladi
Joshua19:5 Sikilagi
Joshua19:6 Beti Labaoti na Shaluheni. Imisumba yali ikumi limo na itatu (13) pamo ne mishi yaiko.
Joshua19:7 Imisumba na imbi ni Aini
Joshua19:8 Elyo imishi yonsefye iyashinguluka iyi misumba ukufikafye na ku Baalati Bele na Rama mu Negebu. Kanshi ici e cakaniko ca cishilano ca luko lwakwa Simeoni umwabelele indupwa shabo.
Joshua19:9 Icalo ca cakaniko ca cishilano ca bamwana Simeoni caputwilwe ukufuma ku calo ca bana bakwa Yuda
Joshua19:10 Icitungu cabutatu icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Sebuloni
Joshua19:11 Ukuya lwa ku masamba
Joshua19:12 Waishile yalukila na ku kabanga
Joshua19:13 Kabili watwalilile ukuya ku kabanga
Joshua19:14 Kulya nako umupaka washokela ku kapinda ka ku kuso ku Hanatoni
Joshua19:15 Imisumba iyalundilweko ni Katati
Joshua19:16 Iyi misumba ne mishi yaiko eyali e cakaniko ca cishilano ca bana bakwa Sebuloni
Joshua19:17 Icitungu cabune icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Isaka umwabelele indupwa shabo.
Joshua19:18 Icalo cabo cafikile ku Yesireli elyo no kulundapo na imbi misumba yabikilweko ni Kesuloti
Joshua19:19 Afalaimu
Joshua19:20 Rabiti
Joshua19:21 Remeti
Joshua19:22 Umupaka wapitile ku Tabo
Joshua19:23 Neyi misumba pamo ne mishi yaiko efyali e cakaniko ca cishilano ca luko lwakwa Isaka
Joshua19:24 Icitungu cabusano icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Asheri
Joshua19:25 Icalo cabo calundilweko ne misumba na imbi: Helikati
Joshua19:26 Alameleki
Joshua19:27 Kabili umupaka washokele ku kabanga ku Beti Dagoni
Joshua19:28 Umupaka wapitilile no kuya ku Ebuloni
Joshua19:29 Kabili uyu mupaka wabwelulukile ku Rama no kuya ku musumba we linga lya Turi no kushokela ku Hosa
Joshua19:30 Uma
Joshua19:31 Iyi misumba ne mishi yaiko eyali e cakaniko ca cishilano ca luko lwakwa Asheri
Joshua19:32 Icitungu ca mutanda icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Naftali
Joshua19:33 Umupaka wa calo cabo wafumine ku Helefi na pa cimuti icikulu nganshi ica oki icali mu Sananimu
Joshua19:34 Umupaka walungeme ku masamba ukupita mu Asinoti Tabo no kutuntukila ku Hukoki. Waisa lambata Sebuloni ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Joshua19:35 Elyo imisumba ya malinga nayo yali ni Sidimu
Joshua19:36 Adama
Joshua19:37 Kedeshi
Joshua19:38 Iloni

Joshua20:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Yoshua ati

Joshua20:4 Ilyo uyu muntu afulumukila kuli umo uwa muli iyi misumba
Joshua20:5 Lelo uwacilandushi ca mulopa nga amusupila nalyo line bacilolo tabafwile kumulekelamo
Joshua20:6 Uyu muntu ali nokwikala mu musumba mpaka ilyo icintubwingi cikamupingula. Nga cakuti asangwa uwakaele

Joshua21:1 Elyo intungulushi sha ndupwa shakwa Levi shaile kuli shimapepo Eleasa

Joshua21:5 Lelo bonse aba lupwa lwakwa Koati abasheleko

Joshua21:7 Ku ba lupwa lwakwa Melali nabo
Joshua21:8 Kanshi ifi efyo abena Israeli bapeele ifitungu fya misumba ku bena Levi pamo pene ne fitungu fyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo
Joshua21:9 Ukufumafye ku nko shakwa Yuda na Simeoni bapeele ifitungu fya misumba iyi mu mashina.
Joshua21:10 Iyi misumba yapeelwe ku ba lupwa lwakwa Aroni
Joshua21:11 Babapeele Kiriati Ariba

Joshua21:20 Kabili imikowa iyasheleko iyakwa Koati iya bena Levi yapeelwe ifitungu fya misumba fyapendwilwe ukufuma ku ncende ya luko lwakwa Efulemu.

Joshua21:26 Kanshi yonse imisumba iyi ikumi limo ne fitungu fyonse ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo yalipeelwe ku mikowa iyasheleko iyakwa Koati.

Joshua21:33 Kanshi imisumba yonse iya mikowa yakwa Geshoni yali ikumi limo na itatu
Joshua21:34 Kabili imikowa ya bena Melali iyasheleko ku bena Levi nayo yapeelwe ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Sebuloni imisumba ya Yokineamu

Joshua21:36 Ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Rubeni
Joshua21:37 Kedemoti na Mefati

Joshua21:39 Heshiboni na Yaseri
Joshua21:40 Yonse imisumba iyapeelwe ku mikowa yakwa Melali abasheleko ku bena Levi yali imisumba ikumi limo na ibili.
Joshua21:41 Eico kanshi
Joshua21:42 Cila musumba waliikwatile incende iyashinguluka iyakucemenamo ifitekwa. Kanshi ifi fine efyo cali ku misumba iyi yonse.
Joshua21:43 Efyo Yawe apeele icalo conse ku bena Israeli
Joshua21:44 Kabili Yawe alekele ukuti baletuusha mu nshilafye shonse
Joshua21:45 Pa fintu fyonse ifisuma ifyo Yawe alaile aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli tapashele nangu cimo icishafikilishiwe. Fyonse fyalifikilishiwe.

Joshua22:8 nokutila kuli bena

Joshua22:19 Nga cakutila icalo mwakwata cintu cakowela

Joshua23:1 Palipitile inshita iyitali apo Yawe apeelele abena Israeli ukutuusha ukufuma ku balwani babo bonse ababashingulwike. Yoshua pali iyi nshita ninshi nakota

Joshua23:3 Imwe mwe bene mwaliimwena na menso yenu ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe

Joshua23:5 Ala Yawe
Joshua23:6 Kanshi mube abakosa nganshi. Mube abasakamana nganshi ukubeela fyonse ifyalembwa mu citabo ca mafunde yakwa Mose
Joshua23:7 Tecakwesha ukulaampana neyi mishobo iyo mwashala nayo pakati kenu. Tecakwesha nangufye panono ukulalumbula amashina ya milungu yabo
Joshua23:8 Lelo mufwilefye ukushangila kuli Yawe Lesa wenu
Joshua23:9 Pantu Yawe alifulumuna ku ntanshi yenu imishobo iyikalamba nganshi kabili iyamaka
Joshua23:10 Umo pali imwe kuti alwisha abalwani ikana limo
Joshua23:11 Eico kanshi mufwilefye ukusakamana nganshi ukutemwa Yawe Lesa wenu.

Joshua24:19 Elyo Yoshua aeba abantu ati

Judges1:7 Elyo Adoni Beseki atile

Judges1:16 Balupwa bakwa shifyala wakwa Mose

Judges1:18 Abena Yuda kabili bapokolwele ne misumba itatu
Judges1:19 Awe Yawe alyafwilishe abena Yuda kabili balicimfishe no kupokolola icalo ca ku mpili. Lelo balifililwe ukufulumuna abantu abaikala mu mawanga pa mulandu wa maceleta ayo bakwete yali aya fyela.

Judges3:1 Iyi e mishobo Yawe ashile iyakweseshako bonse abena Israeli abo abashabalile abalwako inkondo mu calo ca Kenani.
Judges3:2 Yawe acitile ifi pakusambilisha indupwa sha bena Israeli ishishaishibe ifyakulwa inkondo.
Judges3:3 Neyi imishobo yali ni bakateeka basano bonse aba bena Filisiti
Judges3:4 Aba bonse babashile mukwesha abena Israeli pakumona nga cakuti kuti banakila ifipope fyakwa Yawe ifyo akonkomeshe kuli bashibo
Judges3:5 Kanshi abena Israeli baleikala pakati ka bena Kenani
Judges3:6 Baleupa abana banakashi ba iyi mitundu kabili no kuufya abana babo abanakashi ku bana abaume ba iyi mitundu
Judges3:7 Abena Israeli bacitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kulaba kuli Yawe Lesa wabo
Judges3:8 Ecalengele ubukali bwakwa Yawe ukwisa pa bena Israeli
Judges3:9 Lelo ilyo abena Israeli balilile kuli Yawe
Judges3:10 Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile pali ena elyo nao atendeka no kulapingula pa bena Israeli. Aile na ku nkondo
Judges3:11 Kanshi icalo conse caikele mu cibote pa myaka amakumi yane mpaka ilyo Otinieli mwana Kenasi afwile.
Judges3:12 Kabili abena Israeli balibwekeshepo ukucita ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Judges3:13 Egiloni bauminkene pamo na bena Amoli elyo na bena Amaleki
Judges3:14 Abena Israeli bateekelwe ubusha ku mfumu Egiloni iya mu Moabu pa myaka ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18).
Judges3:15 Lelo ilyo abena Israeli balilile kuli Yawe
Judges3:16 Nomba Ehudi alifulile ulupanga ulwatwa konse konse
Judges3:17 Awe atwele umusonko kuli Egiloni imfumu ya mu Moabu. Iyi mfumu yali iyaina nganshi.
Judges3:18 Cilya Ehudi apwisha ukutuula umusonko
Judges3:19 Nomba ena abweluluka ilyo bafikafye ku tulubi twa mabwe mupepi na ku Giligali
Judges3:20 Elyo Ehudi aya umo imfumu yaikele yeka mu muputule wa pamulu uwakupupwamo umwela
Judges3:21 Elyo Ehudi abuulila ulupanga ku kuboko kwakwe ukwa kuso ukufuma mu lutungu lwe tanta lya ku kulyo
Judges3:22 Icitubo ca lupanga naco cine caliingile pamo ne cilimi. Amafuta yacilikapo
Judges3:23 Kanshi Ehudi epakufumina kunuma ya ŋanda
Judges3:24 Panuma ninshi naya
Judges3:25 Kanshi epakwikala balapembela pa nshitafye iyitali mpaka cabapesha amano. Lelo ilyo bamwene ukuti teswileko ku ciibi ca muputule
Judges3:26 Ehudi afyukile ninshi bena bacili balepembela
Judges3:27 Na lintu afikile kulya
Judges3:28 Elyo abeba ati
Judges3:29 Pali iyo ine nshita baipeye ifita fyabulamba
Judges3:30 Pali bulya bwine bushiku abena Israeli bacimfishe abena Moabu bonse. Kabili ukutula pali ilya nshita

Judges4:4 Debora
Judges4:5 Wena aleikala mwisamba lya kancindu kakwa Debora pakati ka Rama na Betele mu Calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu. Kabili abena Israeli baleya kuli ena kukupingulwa.
Judges4:6 Ubushiku bumo atumine abakuya ita Baraki mwana Abinoamu
Judges4:7 Ine ndi nokulenga Sisera umukalamba wa fita fya bena Yabini pamo na maceleta elyo ne fita fyakwe ukukwimina ku mumana wa Kishoni
Judges4:8 Elyo Baraki atile kuli ena
Judges4:9 Elyo Debora nao amwasuka ati
Judges4:10 Elyo Baraki aitile abena Sebuloni elyo na bena Naftali ifita amakana ikumi limo (10
Judges4:11 Nomba elyo Heberi umwina Keni apatwike ukufuma ku babiye abena Keni
Judges4:12 Ilyo baebele Sisera ukuti Baraki mwana Abinoamu ali ku lupili lwa Tabo
Judges4:13 Sisera nao epakulonganika pamo amaceleta yakwe imyanda pabula (900) aya fyela
Judges4:14 Elyo Debora aebele Baraki ati
Judges4:15 Kutifye cilya Baraki apalama
Judges4:16 Baraki asupile amaceleta ne fita mpakafye na ku Harosheti Ha Goimu. Ifita fyakwa Sisera fyonse fyalifwile ku lupanga
Judges4:17 Sisera ena afulumukile ulubilo panshi kwitenti lyakwa Yaeli
Judges4:18 Awe Yaeli afumine panse mukukumanya Sisera no kumweba ati
Judges4:19 Elyo Sisera atile
Judges4:20 Elyo amweba ukuti
Judges4:21 Lelo Yaeli
Judges4:22 Cilya Baraki apalama ninshi eshile alesupila Sisera
Judges4:23 Na pali bulya bwine bushiku Lesa alengele Yabini imfumu ya bena Kenani ukucimba ku bena Israeli.
Judges4:24 Elyo abena Israeli baile balekoselakofye mukulwisha Yabini
Judges5:1 Na pali bulya bwine bushiku Debora pamo na Baraki mwana Abinoamu baimbile ulwimbo ulu ulwakuti
Judges5:2 “Paaleni Yawe na matotelo! Pantu intungulushi nashitungulula Israeli
Judges5:3 Umfweni ifi
Judges5:4 “Mwe Yawe
Judges5:5 Impili shalisunkene pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Judges5:6 “Mu nshiku shakwa Shamuga mwana Anati
Judges5:7 Ukwikala mu mishi kwalipwile
Judges5:8 Ilyo basalile imilungu iyipya
Judges5:9 Umutima wandi naupilibukila ku bakalamba ba fita fya mu Israeli
Judges5:10 “Imbeni imwe mwe bendela pali bapunda ababuuta
Judges5:11 Kutikeni ku bemba ne nsansa ku mbali ya fishima fya menshi. Pantu eko bena balondolola ifyo Yawe aba kacimfya
Judges5:12 ‘Buka
Judges5:13 “Elyo abantu abasheleko batentemukile ku bacindami
Judges5:14 Bafumine muli Efulemu
Judges5:15 Intungulushi sha bena Isaka ebali pamo na Debora. Ee
Judges5:16 Bushe mulandu nshi wikalile mu macinka
Judges5:17 Gileadi aikele kwishilya lya Yordani. Kabili Dani
Judges5:18 Abantu bakwa Sebuloni tabatiinine mfwa
Judges5:19 “Imfumu shalishile
Judges5:20 Ukufuma mu mulu intanda nasho shalalwisha
Judges5:21 Umukuku wa mumana wa Kishoni walibasendele
Judges5:22 Elyo inshindo sha bakabalwe shanyantaula umushili
Judges5:23 “Malaika wakwa Yawe asosa ati
Judges5:24 “Abe uwapaalwa ukucila mu banakashi bonse
Judges5:25 Sisera alombele amenshi yakunwa
Judges5:26 Atambika ukuboko kwakwe ukwa kuso pakwikata ulupopo lwe tenti
Judges5:27 Pa makasa yakwa Yaeli epo abotelele
Judges5:28 “Nyina wakwa Sisera alengele pa nsolokoto
Judges5:29 Abacenjeleshepo pa bakashana bakwe nabo bamwasuka ati
Judges5:30 ‘Bushe tabasangile no kulaakanya ifyakutapa? Umukashana umo umo nangu babili babili ku mwaume umo. Kabili bacili balesalila Sisera insalu shisuma ishabalala
Judges5:31 “Eico kanshi shilengeni bonse abalwani benu balobelele
Judges6:1 Nakabili abena Israeli balibwekeshepo ukucita ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Judges6:2 Pantu abena Midiani bali na maka nganshi ayakucusha abena Israeli. Na pa mulandu wa ici abena Israeli balipekenye incende ishakuya belamako ishali mu mpili
Judges6:3 Ilyo lyonse abena Israeli babyala imbuto mu mabala yabo
Judges6:4 Balekuula inkambi shabo mulya mwine no kubonawila ifilime fyabo fyonse mpakafye na ku Gasa. Kabili takwaleba icitekwa nelyo cimo ico balesha ica bena Israeli
Judges6:5 Pantu abene baleisa ne fitekwa fyabo na matenti yabo
Judges6:6 Kanshi abena Midiani efyo baposele abena Israeli mu bulanda ubukalamba
Judges6:7 Ilyo abena Israeli balilile kuli Yawe pakucushiwa na bena Midiani
Judges6:8 Yawe nao alibatumine kasesema
Judges6:9 Nine namupokolwele ukufuma ku maka ya bena Egupto
Judges6:10 Nalimwebele nati
Judges6:11 Elyo malaika wakwa Yawe aisa ikala mwisamba lya cimuti ca oki icali ku Ofira
Judges6:12 Ilyo malaika wakwa Yawe amonekele kuli Gideoni
Judges6:13 Elyo Gideoni ayaswike ati
Judges6:14 Elyo Yawe apilibukile kuli ena no kutila
Judges6:15 Elyo nao Gideoni aipwishe ati
Judges6:16 Yawe amweba ati
Judges6:17 Gideoni ayaswike ati
Judges6:18 Napapata
Judges6:19 Awe Gideoni aingile mu ŋanda
Judges6:20 Elyo Malaika wakwa Lesa aebele Gideoni ati
Judges6:21 Elyo Malaika wakwa Yawe abuulile inkonto iyo akwete mu minwe yakwe
Judges6:22 Elyo Gideoni ailwike ukuti aciba ni malaika wakwa Yawe
Judges6:23 Lelo Yawe nao atile kuli ena
Judges6:24 Awe Gideoni akuulile Yawe ubulambo pali ilya ncende no kulabwita ati
Judges6:25 Muli bulya bwine bushiku
Judges6:26 Elyo iwe nomba ukakuulepo ubulambo bwakwa Yawe Lesa obe ubusuma pa mulu wa ciputu pene. Ulingile ukubomfya inkuni sha luceshi ukaputaula ulwa mulungu Ashera mukutuula ilambo lyakwa cilume wa ŋombe uwacibili nge lambo lyakoca.”
Judges6:27 Elyo Gideoni abuulile ababomfi bakwe ikumi limo
Judges6:28 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo mu nshita ya lucelo
Judges6:29 Awe cila umo aipusha umunankwe ati
Judges6:30 Elintu abantu bonse aba mu musumba baile kuli Yoashi abati
Judges6:31 Elyo nao Yoashi epakwasuka abamushingulwike ati
Judges6:32 Elyo Gideoni pali bulya bwinefye bushiku bayambile ukulamwita ati ni Yerubibaali
Judges6:33 Elyo nomba bonse abena Midiani
Judges6:34 Awe Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile pali Gideoni
Judges6:35 Atumine ne nkombe ku bena Manase iyakubeta pakuti nabo bamukonke ku bulwi. Kabili aita na bena Asheri
Judges6:36 Elyo Gideoni atile kuli Lesa
Judges6:37 ine nalayansa impapa iyanyukwa pa lubansa lwakutwilapo. Nga cakuti ulucelo umume wabafye pa mpapa peka
Judges6:38 Kanshi ifi fine
Judges6:39 Elyo Gideoni atile kuli Lesa
Judges6:40 Awe Lesa nao
Judges7:1 Lucelocelo Yerubibaali (emukutila Gideoni) ne fita fyakwe fyonse baile cita inkambi yabo pa kamfukumfuku kakwa Harodi. Elyo inkambi ya bena Midiani nayo yali ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwabo
Judges7:2 Elyo Yawe aebele Gideoni ati
Judges7:3 Eico bila imbila ku fita fyonse utile
Judges7:4 Kabili Yawe atile kuli Gideoni
Judges7:5 Awe Gideoni atwele ifita ku menshi. Elyo Yawe atile kuli ena
Judges7:6 Abantu ukulingana ne myanda itatu (300) ebaletapwila amenshi ku lupi lwabo pakunwa. Lelo bonse abashala bafukeme panshi na makufi pakunwa amenshi.
Judges7:7 Elyo Yawe atile kuli Gideoni
Judges7:8 Gideoni abweseshemo bonse abashele abena Israeli ku matenti yabo
Judges7:9 Mu nshita ine ilya iya bushiku
Judges7:10 Lelo nga cakuti uletiina ukusansa
Judges7:11 pantu panuma yakuya umfwa ifyo balelanda
Judges7:12 Abena Midiani
Judges7:13 Ilyo Gideoni afikile
Judges7:14 Elyo umunankwe ayasuka ati
Judges7:15 Ilyo Gideoni aumfwile ici ciloto no musango umunankwe acilondolwelelemo
Judges7:16 Kabili ayakenye abantu imyanda itatu (300) mu mpuka shitatu. Elyo apeele amapenga mu maboko yacila umo ne mitondo umwabula amenshi elyo mukati ka mitondo emwali ifisaniko.
Judges7:17 Kabili atile kuli bena
Judges7:18 Ilyo ine pamo na bonse abo tuli nabo twalisha amapenga yesu
Judges7:19 Awe Gideoni na bantu bakwe umwanda umo (100) abo ali nabo
Judges7:20 Kabili ilyo linefye aba mu mpuka shitatu balilishishe amapenga yabo no kutobaula imitondo. Baikete ifisaniko mu minwe yabo iya ku kuso elyo amapenga yakulisha mu maboko ya ku kulyo
Judges7:21 Kabili cila umo aiminine pa ncende apo ali
Judges7:22 Kabili ilyo balishishe amapenga imyanda itatu (300)
Judges7:23 Kabili abena Israeli mu nko shonse baitilwe ukufuma ku bena Naftali
Judges7:24 Gideoni epakutuma inkombe monse mu calo ca mpili ica bena Efulemu
Judges7:25 Kabili baiketepo ne ntungulushi sha fita shibili isha bena Midiani
Judges8:1 Elyo abena Efulemu baipwishe Gideoni abati
Judges8:2 Nao Gideoni alibaswike ati
Judges8:3 Ala ni Lesa ewamupeele Orebu na Seebu
Judges8:4 Gideoni na bantu bakwe imyanda itatu (300)
Judges8:5 Elyo atile ku bantu ba mu musumba wa Sukoti
Judges8:6 Nomba bacilolo ba mu musumba wa Sukoti batile
Judges8:7 Elyo Gideoni ayaswike ati
Judges8:8 Awe alifuminepo aile ku Penieli
Judges8:9 Eico kanshi asosele ku bena Penieli ati
Judges8:10 Nomba Seba na Salimuna bali mu Kakori pamo ne fita fya nkondo ukulingana na makana ikumi na yasano (15
Judges8:11 Awe Gideoni aile alekonka inshila iyalambata amatololo
Judges8:12 Ishi mfumu shibili Seba na Salimuna isha ku Midiani shalifulumwike
Judges8:13 Ilyo ubulwi bwapwile
Judges8:14 Mu nshila aikete umulumendo umwina Sukoti no kumwipusha
Judges8:15 Elyo Gideoni aile ku bena Sukoti no kutila
Judges8:16 Elyo abuulile abakalamba ba mu musumba wa Sukoti no kuboma ifikoti ku membya ya myunga ya mu matololo na kuli nkololo.
Judges8:17 Elyo abongolwele ulupungu lwa Penieli no kwipaya bonse abaume ba mu musumba.
Judges8:18 Kabili Gideoni aipwishe Seba na Salimuna ati
Judges8:19 Elyo Gideoni abaswike no kutila
Judges8:20 Elintu apilibukile ku mwana wakwe ibeli
Judges8:21 Elyo Seba na Salimuna batile
Judges8:22 Na panuma ya ifi fyonse ifyacitike
Judges8:23 Lelo Gideoni abaswike ati
Judges8:24 Kabili atile
Judges8:25 Awe nabo balyaswike batile
Judges8:26 Kabili ukufina kwa aya masikiyo aya golide Gideoni alombele kwafikile amashekeli ikana limo ne myanda cine lubali (1
Judges8:27 Awe Gideoni afibuulile
Judges8:28 Kanshi ifi efyo abena Midiani babacimfishe ku bena Israeli
Judges8:29 Panuma ya ifi Yerubibaali mwana Yoashi abwelelemo ku mushi kumwabo kukwikala.
Judges8:30 Gideoni akwete abana abaume amakumi cine lubali (70)
Judges8:31 Mu mukashi uo ashaupile mu bwinga
Judges8:32 Awe Gideoni mwana Yoashi afwile pa myaka isuma nganshi iya mu bukote bwakwe. Kabili ashiikilwe mu nindi yakwa wishi Yoashi mu musumba wa Ofira uwa bena Abiesi.
Judges8:33 Awe tapapitile inshita apo Gideoni afwilile
Judges8:34 Balilabile ukwibukisha Yawe
Judges8:35 Kabili bafililwe no kulanga ukutasha ku lupwa lwakwa Yerubibaali
Judges9:1 Abimeleki mwana Yerubibaali aile kuli ba lupwa lwakwa nyina ku Shekemu
Judges9:2 “Shisoseni nokuti bomfwe abekashi bonse aba mu Shekemu mutile
Judges9:3 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa nyina epakulanda amashiwi yonse no kumfwika ku ntungulushi sha mu Shekemu icakuti na bonse imitima yabo yapilibukila kuli ena
Judges9:4 Awe bamupeele indalama ukulingana na mashekeli amakumi cine lubali (70) isha silifa ukufuma mwitempele lyakwa Baali Beliti. Neshi ndalama Abimeleki ashibomfeshe mukukunkumba abantu abawelewele kabili abaonaika abasumine ukulamukonka.
Judges9:5 Elyo aile ku mushi kuli wishi Yerubibaali ku Ofira no kuya ipaya bamunyina amakumi cine lubali (70) pelibwe limo line. Lelo Yotamu
Judges9:6 Elyo intungulushi shonse isha mu Shekemu na mu Beti Milo shalongene pa mbali ya cimuti ca oki pa luceshi lwa mu Shekemu kukuya sonta Abimeleki ukuba imfumu yabo.
Judges9:7 Ilyo Yotamu bamwebele pali uyu mulandu aninine pa mulu wa lupili lwa Gerisimu no kubilikisha ne shiwi ilikalamba ati
Judges9:8 “Ubushiku bumo imiti yaile kukuya sonta imfumu yaiko. Elyo yaebele umuti wa miolifa aiti
Judges9:9 “Nao umuolifa watile
Judges9:10 “Icakonkelepo imiti yaebele umukunyu aiti
Judges9:11 “Nao umukunyu watile
Judges9:12 “Elyo imiti yatile ku mwangashi
Judges9:13 “Nao umwangashi watile
Judges9:14 “Elyo pakulekelesha imiti yonse yatile ku cimuti ca myunga
Judges9:15 “Naco icimuti ca myunga cayaswike imiti imbi aciti
Judges9:16 “Nomba nga cakuti ni mu cishinka kabili mu bufumacumi mwasontele Abimeleki ukuba imfumu
Judges9:17 tontonkanyeni ifyo tata amulwishishe. Apeele umweo wakwe kukumupususha ukufuma ku maboko ya bena Midiani.
Judges9:18 Nomba imwe ilelo namusangukila ulupwa lwakwa tata
Judges9:19 Kanshi ifyo mwacita ilelo nga fyacishinka kabili mu bufumacumi kuli Yerubibaali no lupwa lwakwe
Judges9:20 Lelo nga teifyo
Judges9:21 Elyo Yotamu afulumwike
Judges9:22 Abimeleki ateekele Israeli pa myaka itatu.
Judges9:23 Lesa atumine umupashi ubifi pakati kakwa Abimeleki ne ntungulushi sha mu Shekemu
Judges9:24 Lesa acitile ifi pakuti akande Abimeleki pa lufyengo acitile pamo na bena Shekemu abamwafwile ukwipaya bamwana Yerubaali amakumi cine lubali (70). Epakuti umulopa wabo ulandulwe pali munyinabo na bena Shekemu.
Judges9:25 Pa mulandu wa fyacitike
Judges9:26 Nomba ilyo Gali mwana Ebedi pamo na bamunyina bakuukile ku Shekemu
Judges9:27 Nomba Gali na bamunyina baile mu mabala yabo no kuyaswamo ifitwalo fya myangashi
Judges9:28 Elyo Gali mwana Ebedi atile
Judges9:29 Nga cakutifye aba bantu bapeelwe mu maboko yandi
Judges9:30 Awe ilyo Sebuli kateeka wa musumba aumfwile ifyasosele Gali mwana Ebedi
Judges9:31 Mukuicingililako atumine inkombe kuli Abimeleki ku Aruma no kutila
Judges9:32 Eico kanshi
Judges9:33 Elyo ulucelocelo pa kutula kwa kasuba
Judges9:34 Kanshi nao Abimeleki pamo ne fita fyakwe fyonse epakwima ubushiku no kushinguluka umusumba
Judges9:35 Ilyo Gali mwana Ebedi afumine no kuya iminina pa mwinshi wa mpongolo ya musumba
Judges9:36 Cilyafye Gali ati abamone
Judges9:37 Kabili Gali abwekeshepo ukulanda ati
Judges9:38 Elyo Sebuli atile kuli ena
Judges9:39 Kanshi Gali epakwimya intungulushi sha mu Shekemu no kulwisha Abimeleki.
Judges9:40 Lelo Gali alifulumwike
Judges9:41 Elyo Abimeleki abwelelemo ku Aruma no kwikala kulya kwine. Sebuli nao atamfya Gali na bamunyina ukufuma mu Shekemu.
Judges9:42 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo abekashi ba mu musumba wa Shekemu balifumine baya mu mabala
Judges9:43 nao Abimeleki aimya ifita fyakwe
Judges9:44 Nomba Abimeleki ne mpuka imo babutuka bwangu bwangu baya ikala pa mwinshi wa mpongolo
Judges9:45 Abimeleki wena akasuba konsefye
Judges9:46 Ilyo abekashi ba ku lupungu lwa Shekemu baumfwile icacitike
Judges9:47 Lintu Abimeleki aumfwile ukuti eko belelongana
Judges9:48 ena pamo ne fita fyakwe baile ku lupili lwa Salimoni. Abuulile isembe no kutetelako imisambo ya fimiti
Judges9:49 Cila muntu pa fita fyakwe atetele imisambo ya fimiti
Judges9:50 Icakonkelepo
Judges9:51 Nomba mukati ka musumba mwali ulupungu ulwakosa
Judges9:52 Abimeleki ilyo aile ku lupungu
Judges9:53 Nomba umwanakashi umo amuponesha umwana wa mpelo pa mutwe no kumutobaula akapanga ka mutwe.
Judges9:54 Bwangu bwangufye aitile uwalesenda ifyanso fyakwe
Judges9:55 Abena Israeli pakumona ukuti Abimeleki afwa
Judges9:56 Kanshi ifi efyo Lesa alandwile pa bubi ubo Abimeleki acitile kuli wishi
Judges9:57 Kabili Lesa abweseshe ububi bonse ubwa bena Shekemu pa mitwe yabo. Icitipu cakwa Yotamu mwana Yerubibaali caishile pali bena.
Judges10:1 Panuma yakwa Abimeleki kwaimine Tola mwana Pua
Judges10:2 Atungulwile abena Israeli pa myaka amakumi yabili na itatu
Judges10:3 Elyo pakonkele Yairi umwina Gileadi
Judges10:4 Yairi ali na bana amakumi yatatu (30) abaleendela pali bapunda amakumi yatatu (30). Aba bana baleyangalila imisumba amakumi yatatu (30) mu Gileadi
Judges10:5 Ilyo Yairi afwile ashiikilwe mu Kamoni.
Judges10:6 Kabinge abena Israeli babwekeshepo ukubifya ku cinso cakwa Yawe. Batendeke ukulabombela imilungu ba Baali na ba Ashitoreti
Judges10:7 Ici calengele Yawe ukufulilwa abena Israeli icakuti abaposa na mu maboko ya Bafilisiti pamo na bena Amoni.
Judges10:8 Muli ulya mwaka balipeye no kucusha nganshi abana bakwa Israeli. Pa myaka ikumi limo na cine konse konse balicushishe abena Israeli abaleikalila ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani
Judges10:9 Abena Amoni nabo bayabwike umumana wa Yordani kukulwisha abena Yuda
Judges10:10 Elyo abena Israeli balilile kuli Yawe abati
Judges10:11 Nao Yawe aebele abena Israeli ati
Judges10:12 Elyo abena Sidoni
Judges10:13 Nomba imwe namunsuula no kulabombela imilungu imbi eico kanshi na ine nshakatale mupususha nakabili.
Judges10:14 Kabiyenifye mukulilila ku milungu iyo mwe bene mwasala. Iyo ine eyo nomba muleke ilemupususha mu mafya yonse mwakulakwata.”
Judges10:15 Elyo abena Israeli batile
Judges10:16 Elyo bafumishe amano ku milungu ya benafyalo pakati kabo no kwamba ukulapepa Yawe
Judges10:17 Kabili abena Amoni balikutene ku bulwi no kucita inkambi mu Gileadi
Judges10:18 Intungulushi sha bantu abena Gileadi batile kuli cila umo “Uyo onse uuleya tampilapo ukulwisha abena Amoni euli nokuba umutwe wa bonse abekashi ba mu Gileadi.”
Judges11:1 Nomba kwali umushilika uwapambana nganshi
Judges11:2 Muka Gileadi nao alikwete abana abaume. Ilyo bakulile
Judges11:3 Yefuta epakufulumuka ukufuma kuli bamunyina no kuya ikala mu calo ca Tobi. Kulya kwine aile ikala eko alonganike abantu abengi ifiwelewele abo ayambile ukubomba nabo mukutapa icuma.
Judges11:4 Ilyo papitile inshita
Judges11:5 Ilyo abena Amoni baimine ukulwisha abena Israeli
Judges11:6 Baya mweba ukuti
Judges11:7 Elyo nao Yefuta atile kuli bena
Judges11:8 Nabo bacilolo batile kuli ena
Judges11:9 Yefuta epakweba abakalamba ba bena Gileadi ati
Judges11:10 Bacilolo nabo batile
Judges11:11 Elyo nomba Yefuta aile na bakalamba ba bena Gileadi. Kabili abekalamushi bamucitile ukuba intungulushi yabo
Judges11:12 Elyo Yefuta atumine inkombe ku mfumu ya bena Amoni mukuya ipusha ukuti
Judges11:13 Nayo imfumu ya bena Amoni yayaswike inkombe shakwa Yefuta
Judges11:14 Kabili Yefuta abwekeshepo ukutuma inkombe ku mfumu ya bena Amoni
Judges11:15 no kuyeba ati
Judges11:16 Ilyo abena Israeli bafumine mu Egupto
Judges11:17 Elyo batumine inkombe ku mfumu ya bena Edomu no kutila
Judges11:18 “Icakonkelepo
Judges11:19 Elyo abena Israeli batumine inkombe ku mfumu Sihoni iya bena Amoli uwaleteeka ku Heshiboni no kutila kuli ena
Judges11:20 Sihoni ena tamwenemo icishinka mu bena Israeli mukubaleka bapite mu mpanga yabo. Kanshi ena epakulonganika abantu bakwe bonse no kuya cita inkambi ku Yahasi
Judges11:21 Elyo Yawe
Judges11:22 Kanshi efyo abena Israeli bapokele no kwikala mu calo conse ica bena Amoli ukufuma ku Alinoni no kufika na ku Yaboku
Judges11:23 “Apo nomba Yawe
Judges11:24 Bushe tekuti upokolole ico umulungu wenu Kemoshi wapeela ukuba icikwatwa kuli imwe? Ngefyo na ifwe
Judges11:25 Bushe iwe waliwamapo ukucila Balaki mwana Sipo imfumu ya bena Moabu? Bushe ena alibalile aumanapo na bena Israeli
Judges11:26 Napapita imyaka imyanda itatu (300) apo abena Israeli baikalila mu Heshiboni na mu Aroe na mu mishi iya bashinguluka
Judges11:27 Ine nshamulufyanyapo icintu nelyo cimo
Judges11:28 Lelo imfumu ya bena Amoni yakaana ukuposako amano ku mashiwi Yefuta amutumine.
Judges11:29 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile pali Yefuta. Apitana monse mu bena Gileadi na bena Manase
Judges11:30 Kabili Yefuta acitile umulapo kuli Yawe ati
Judges11:31 conse icikafuma mu ŋanda yandi no kwisa mukunkumanya ilyo nkabwela
Judges11:32 Elyo Yefuta ayabukile mukulwisha abena Amoni
Judges11:33 Abacimfishe ku maka ayakalamba no kubapokolola imisumba amakumi yabili ukufuma ku Aroe ukufikafye na ku Miniti mpaka na ku Abeli Kalamini. Abena Israeli balyanshishe abena Amoni
Judges11:34 Elyo Yefuta abwelelamo kumwakwe ku Misipa
Judges11:35 Bwangu bwangufye ilyo amumwene
Judges11:36 Umwana nao alyaswike wishi no kutila
Judges11:37 Kabili aebele wishi ati
Judges11:38 Awe wishi atile
Judges11:39 Panuma ya myeshi ibili abwelele kuli wishi
Judges11:40 cila mwaka abana abakashana bafwile ukuya mu mpanga inshiku shine mukulila umwana mwanakashi wakwa Yefuta umwina Gileadi.
Judges12:1 Kabili abena Efulemu balongenye ifita fyabo
Judges12:2 Elyo Yefuta atile kuli bena
Judges12:3 Eico ilyo namwene ukuti imwe mwakaana ukungafwa
Judges12:4 Elyo Yefuta nao alonganike abena Gileadi mukulwisha abena Efulemu. Elyo abena Gileadi bacimfishe abanabo pantu abena Efulemu batile
Judges12:5 Abena Gileadi epakuya pokolola ifyabu fya mumana wa Yordani ifyakwabukilapo pakuya ku bena Efulemu. Kabili uyo onse uwapusuka wa mu bena Efulemu nga atila
Judges12:6 elyo bali nokutila
Judges12:7 Yefuta ali mupingushi wa bena Israeli pa myaka mutanda. Elyo Yefuta uwali umwina Gileadi afwile
Judges12:8 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Yefuta
Judges12:9 Akwete abana abaume amakumi yatatu (30)
Judges12:10 Ibisani ilyo afwile
Judges12:11 Kabili uwamukonkelepo ni Eloni umwina Sebuloni
Judges12:12 Elyo Eloni afwile
Judges12:13 Kabili uwamukonkelepo ni Abidoni mwana Hileli
Judges12:14 Abidoni ali na bana amakumi yane (40) abaume
Judges12:15 Ilyo nao Abidoni mwana Hileli umwina Piratoni afwile
Judges13:1 Kabinge abena Israeli babwekeshepo ukubifya ku cinso cakwa Yawe
Judges13:2 Mu Sora mwali umuntu umo uwe shina lya Manoa
Judges13:3 Elyo malaika wakwa Yawe amonekele ku mwanakashi no kumweba ati
Judges13:4 Eico nomba mona ukuti wilanwa umwangashi nangufye icikola conse. Kabili tecakwesha ukulya icakowela
Judges13:5 pantu iwe nomba uli nokwimita kabili ukafyala umwana umwaume. Tecakwesha ukumubeya ku mutwe wakwe
Judges13:6 Elyo umwanakashi epakuya ku mulume wakwe no kuya mweba ati
Judges13:7 Nomba acinjeba ukuti
Judges13:8 Elyo Manoa apepele kuli Yawe no kutila
Judges13:9 Lesa nao alyumfwile ukupapata kwakwa Manoa. Kabili na malaika wakwa Lesa alishile ku mwanakashi ilyo acili ku mabala. Manoa umulume wakwe ninshi talipo.
Judges13:10 Awe umwanakashi bwangu bwangufye abutwike no kuya eba umulume no kutila
Judges13:11 Manoa nao alimine no kukonka umukashi. Ilyo afikile kuli uyu muntu
Judges13:12 Elyo Manoa atile kuli ena
Judges13:13 Elyo Malaika wakwa Yawe atile
Judges13:14 Tafwile ukulalya icintu conse icili nokufuma ku myangashi
Judges13:15 Elyo Manoa atile kuli malaika wakwa Yawe
Judges13:16 Nao malaika wakwa Yawe atile
Judges13:17 Elyo Manoa aipwishe malaika wakwa Yawe ati
Judges13:18 Malaika wakwa Yawe nao atile
Judges13:19 Elyo Manoa abuulile akabushi
Judges13:20 Awe kutifye cilya ulubingu lwa mulilo lwalafuma pa bulambo no kulaya mumulu
Judges13:21 Awe ukufuma palya penefye malaika wakwa Yawe tabalile amonekela kuli Manoa no mukashi wakwe. Elyo Manoa ashininkishe ukuti kanshi ni malaika wakwa Yawe.
Judges13:22 Elyo Manoa atile ku mukashi wakwe
Judges13:23 Elintu umukashi wakwe atile
Judges13:24 Awe asukile umwanakashi apapa umwana umwaume
Judges13:25 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe watampile ukumucincisha ilyo acili aleikala mu Mane Dani pakati ka Sora na Eshitaoli.
Judges14:1 Inshita imo Samsoni aile ku Timuna no kumona kulya kwine umukashana Umufilisiti.
Judges14:2 Ilyo abwelulwikeko
Judges14:3 Wishi na nyina batile
Judges14:4 Abafyashi bakwe bena tabaishibe ukuti ifi fyonse fyali bupekanyo ukufuma kuli Yawe
Judges14:5 Elyo Samsoni pamo na wishi na nyina bonse pamo baile ku Timuna. Ilyo bafikile mupepi na ku mabala ya myangashi ya Timuna
Judges14:6 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile na maka pali Samsoni
Judges14:7 Awe Samsoni alitentemwike no kuya landa no mwanakashi
Judges14:8 Ilyo papitilepo inshiku shimo shimo
Judges14:9 Atapwilemo ubuci abika pa lupi no kuya alelya. Ilyo abwelele kuli wishi na nyina
Judges14:10 Elyo wishi kwa Samsoni aile mukumona umwanakashi. Kabili Samsoni acitile amatebeto kulya kwine
Judges14:11 Ilyo Samsoni aile monekela kulya
Judges14:12 Elyo Samsoni abebele ati
Judges14:13 Lelo nga cakuti tamunjebele ifyo cilepilibula
Judges14:14 Samsoni nao atile
Judges14:15 Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga shine
Judges14:16 Elyo muka Samsoni akobwela umukoshi wakwe ku mulume no kulalila
Judges14:17 Awe umukashi nao abikilepofye ukulamulilila pa nshiku cine lubali isha mutebeto. Elintu pali ubu bwine bushiku bwakulenga cine lubali elyo amulondolwelele umo ubwile bwalolele
Judges14:18 Ilyo akasuba kali takalawa pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali bwine
Judges14:19 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile na maka pali Samsoni. Awe aile na ku Ashikeloni
Judges14:20 Kabili umukashi wakwa Samsoni bamupeele na ku mubiye cibusa uwamupalamine pa bwinga bwakwe.
Judges15:1 Panuma ya ifi fyonse ifyacitike
Judges15:2 Shifyala atile

Judges15:5 Ilyo ayashishe ifisaniko no kuleka bamumbwe baleya mu mabala ya ŋanu ya Bafilisiti
Judges15:6 Elyo Abafilisiti batile
Judges15:7 Elyo Samsoni epakubeba ati
Judges15:8 Awe alibasanshile bukali bukali no kwipaya abengi. Elyo atentemukile mwishika lya lupili no kuya ikala mu lucengo lwa cilibwe ca Etamu.
Judges15:9 Elyo Abafilisiti baile cita inkambi mu calo ca bena Yuda
Judges15:10 Elyo abaume ba mu Yuda batile
Judges15:11 Elyo abaume abena Yuda amakana yatatu (300) baile no kutentemukila ku lucengo lwa cilibwe ca Etamu
Judges15:12 Nabo batile kuli ena
Judges15:13 Nabo batile
Judges15:14 Cilya bafika ku Leyi

Judges15:20 Kanshi Samsoni ali mupingushi wa bena Israeli pa myaka amakumi yabili (20)
Judges16:1 Mu bushiku bumo Samsoni alile ku Gasa
Judges16:2 Ilyo abekashi ba mu Gasa babebele ukuti
Judges16:3 Lelo Samsoni asendeme ukufikafye inshita ya bushiku pakati. Elintu aishile ima no kwikata ifiibi fya ku mpongolo pamo pene ne nceshi shibili
Judges16:4 Ilyo papitile inshita
Judges16:5 Elyo bakateeka ba Bafilisiti baile kuli ena nokutila
Judges16:6 Awe nao Delila atile kuli Samsoni
Judges16:7 Elyo Samsoni atile kuli Delila
Judges16:8 Elyo bakateeka ba Bafilisiti baletele inshinga ishibishi cine lubali kabili ishishauma kuli Delila
Judges16:9 ilyo ninshi Delila ali na baume bamo ababeleme mu muputule wa mukati ka mu ŋanda. Elyo atile kuli Samsoni
Judges16:10 Elyo Delila atile kuli Samsoni
Judges16:11 Samsoni atile
Judges16:12 Awe Delila abuulile imyando iyipya no kumukakilako. Ninshi Delila ali na baume bamo abafiseme mu muputule wa mukati ka ŋanda. Elyo atile kuli Samsoni
Judges16:13 Elyo Delila atile kuli Samsoni
Judges16:14 Nomba ilyo acili mu tulo
Judges16:15 Elyo Delila atile kuli ena
Judges16:16 Awe Delila mu kupatikisha kwakwe akonkenyepofye ubushiku no bushiku ukulaipusha Samsoni
Judges16:17 Na pakulekelesha Samsoni mu cifukushi asukile asokolwela Delila inkaama yonsefye. Samsoni atile
Judges16:18 Ilyo Delila amwene ukuti nomba namweba inkaama yonse
Judges16:19 Elyo Delila alengele Samsoni asendama mu tulo pa makufi yakwe. Aitapo umwaume umo no kumweba ukuti abeye Samsoni umushishi untu apikwile cine lubali
Judges16:20 Elyo Delila atile kuli Samsoni
Judges16:21 Kabili Abafilisiti balimwikete no kumutonkola amenso
Judges16:22 Lelo umushishi wa mu mutwe wakwe watendeke ukulamena
Judges16:23 Nomba bakateeka ba Bafilisiti balongene mukutuula ilambo ilikankala ku mulungu wabo Dagoni elyo nokuti basangalale
Judges16:24 Nomba ilyo abantu bamwene Samsoni
Judges16:25 Ilyo imitima yabo ninshi icili ne nsansa ishingi nganshi
Judges16:26 Elyo Samsoni aebele umubomfi uwamwikete pa kuboko kwakwe ati
Judges16:27 Nomba mwitempele mwali cinkupiti wa bantu
Judges16:28 Elyo Samsoni apepele kuli Yawe no kutila
Judges16:29 Elyo Samsoni apalamine ku nceshi shibili isha pakati ishaikeshe ili tempele. Aikete ukuboko kwa kulyo kuli lumo elyo no kuboko kwa kuso kuli lumbi kabili ashintililako na maka ayakalamba nganshi.
Judges16:30 Atile
Judges16:31 Awe bamunyina pamo no lupwa lonse ulwakwa wishi baile kukusenda icitumbi cakwe. Baciletele no kucishiika pakati ka musumba wa Sola na Eshitaoli mu nindi yakwa wishi Manoa. Samsoni atungulwile abena Israeli pa myaka amakumi yabili.

Judges17:2 Kabili atile kuli nyina
Judges17:3 Ilyo abweseshe ishi indalama amashekeli ikana limo no mwanda umo (1
Judges17:4 Eico kanshi
Judges17:5 Nomba uyu wine muntu Mika alikwete ne ŋanda yakupepelamo utulubi. Kabili alipangile icakufwala ca bushimapepo ica efodi no tulubi twakupendwilako pa ŋanda
Judges17:6 Pantu mu nshiku shilya
Judges17:7 Kwali no mulumendo uwafumine ku Betelemu mu calo cakwa Yuda
Judges17:8 Uyu muntu ashile icifulo cakwe mu Betelemu mu calo ca Yuda no kuya alefwaya fwaya icifulo cimbi icakwikalapo. Ilyo acili pa lwendo
Judges17:9 Awe Mika atile kuli ena

Judges17:13 Kabili Mika atile
Judges18:1 Mu nshiku shilya abena Israeli tabakwete imfumu. Kabili mu nshiku shilya uluko lwa bena Dani lwalefwaya fwaya icifulo icingaba icabofye icakulaikalamo. Pantu bena tabali tabalapeelwa icifulo ca cakaniko ca cishilano pakati ka nko sha bena Israeli.
Judges18:2 Eico abena Dani batumine abantu basano abakalabana ukufuma pa mpendwa ya bantu babo ku Sora na ku Eshitaoli mukaya lengula icalo no kucifwailisha. Babebele ukuti
Judges18:3 Ninshi bali mupepi ne ŋanda yakwa Mika
Judges18:4 Nao atile kuli bena
Judges18:5 Nabo batile kuli ena
Judges18:6 Shimapepo nao atile
Judges18:7 Elyo aba bantu basano baimine no kuya ku Laishi
Judges18:8 Kabili ilyo aba bantu basano babwelelemo ku Sora na ku Eshitaoli
Judges18:9 Nabo batile
Judges18:10 Kabili ilyo mukafika kulya
Judges18:11 Elyo abaume imyanda mutanda (600) aba mu luko lwakwa Dani
Judges18:12 Ilyo bacili mu nshila bacitile inkambi pa Kiriati Yarimu mu calo cakwa Yuda. Uyu wine e mulandu ici cifulo icabela ku masamba ya Kiriati Yarimu bacitila Mane Dani ukufika no bushiku bwa lelo line.
Judges18:13 Kabili ukufuma kulya
Judges18:14 Elyo balya bantu basano abaile mukulengula icalo ca Laishi batile kuli bamunyina
Judges18:15 Kanshi nabo epakwaluluka palya pene
Judges18:16 Ninshi abaume imyanda mutanda (600) abaipangeshe ku bulwi nabo beminine pa mwinshi wa mpongolo.
Judges18:17 Balya abaume basano abaile lengula icalo baingile mu ŋanda no kusenda icimpashanya icabaswa ne cakufwala ca bushimapepo ca efodi
Judges18:18 Ilyo aba bantu baingile mu ŋanda mwa Mika no kubuulamo icimpashanya icabaswa ne cakufwala ca bushimapepo ca efodi
Judges18:19 Nabo batile
Judges18:20 Awe shimapepo nao alitemenwe nganshi. Abuulile icakufwala ca bushimapepo ca efodi
Judges18:21 Elyo bayalulwike
Judges18:22 Kutifye cilya baendako panono ukufuma pa ŋanda yakwa Mika
Judges18:23 Elyo babilikisha abena Dani
Judges18:24 Mika nao atile
Judges18:25 Elyo abena Dani batile kuli ena
Judges18:26 Awe abena Dani bakonkenyepo ulwendo lwabo. Kabili ilyo Mika abamwene ukuti nabakwatisha amaka ukumucila
Judges18:27 Ilyo abena Dani basendele ifyo Mika apangile
Judges18:28 Takwali umuntu nelyo umo uwakubatulako
Judges18:29 Uyu musumba bawinike Dani
Judges18:30 Awe abena Dani baimike ne cilubi icabaswa pakuti balecipepa. Elyo babuulile Yonatani mwana Geshomu
Judges18:31 Kanshi batwalilile ukulabomfya utulubi uto Mika abashilile inshitafye yonse ilyo iŋanda yakwa Lesa yali mu Shilo.
Judges19:1 Mu nshiku shilya
Judges19:2 Lelo uyu mukashana tali uwacetekelwa ku mulume wakwe iyoo. Ashile umulume wakwe no kubwelelamo kuli wishi ku Betelemu ku calo cakwa Yuda
Judges19:3 Elyo umulume wakwe amukonkela kukumupapata pakuti engabweluluka. Ilyo aileko
Judges19:4 Elyo shifyala
Judges19:5 Pa bushiku bwalenga shine
Judges19:6 Kanshi bonse babili epakwikala balalya no kunwena pamo. Na panuma wishi wa mukashana atile
Judges19:7 Kanshi ilyo uyu muntu aipekanya ukuti eme aleya
Judges19:8 Ulucelocelo ubushiku bwalenga shisano
Judges19:9 Kabili ilyo uyu muntu no mukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga
Judges19:10 Lelo tasumine ukusendama nakabili
Judges19:11 Ilyo bafika mupepi no musumba wa Yebusi ilyo akasuba kaba kukuwa
Judges19:12 Lelo shikulu wakwe akaana ati
Judges19:13 Elyo amweba nokuti
Judges19:14 Kanshi epakutwalililafye no lwendo lwabo
Judges19:15 Kulya eko baiminine no kusendama. Baile no kuya ikala mu lubansa ulwabelele pakati ka musumba
Judges19:16 Mu cungulo cine cilya
Judges19:17 Ilyo amwene abalendo pakati ka lubansa lwa musumba aile no kuya bepusha ati
Judges19:18 Nao umulendo ayasuka ati
Judges19:19 Natukwatafye fyonse
Judges19:20 Elyo umuntu umukote atile
Judges19:21 Elyo abasenda mu ŋanda yakwe no kuliisha bapunda babo. Kabili panuma yakusamba amakasa yabo
Judges19:22 Ilyo bacilifye balesansamuka
Judges19:23 Awe umukote asukile afumina panse
Judges19:24 Moneni
Judges19:25 Lelo ifi fibantu ifyaume fyalikene ukumfwa kuli uyu umukote. Elyo uyu umwina Levi abuulile umukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga no kumufumisha panse kuli bena
Judges19:26 Ilyo bwacele ulucelo uyu mwanakashi elyo abwelele ku ŋanda ukwali shikulu wakwe
Judges19:27 Ilyo shikulu wakwe abukile ulucelo
Judges19:28 Elyo amweba ukuti
Judges19:29 Ilyo bafikile kumwabo abuulile umwele no kuputaula umukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga mu fipimfya fipimfya ukulingana ikumi limo na fibili (12)
Judges19:30 Lelo abantu bonse abamweneko batile
Judges20:1 Elyo abena Israeli bonse baimine ukufuma kuli Dani ukufikafye na ku Beresheba
Judges20:2 Intungulushi shonse isha bantu aba nko sha bena Israeli
Judges20:3 Awe abena Benjamini baumfwile ukuti abena Israeli nabaya ku Misipa. Elyo abena Israeli batile ku mwina Levi
Judges20:4 Umwina Levi umulume wa mwanakashi baipeye
Judges20:5 Na mu nshita ya bushiku
Judges20:6 Ine nalisendele uyu mwanakashi wandi
Judges20:7 Eico nomba
Judges20:8 Awe abantu bonse baimine capamo nga bana aba ŋanda imo no kutila
Judges20:9 Nomba ifi efyo tuli nokucita ku bena Gibea
Judges20:10 Tuli nokubuulapo abantu ikumi limo ukufuma pali cila mwanda umo (100) uwa nko sha bena Israeli. Elyo umwanda umo (100) ukufuma pekana limo (1
Judges20:11 Eico bonse abaume abena Israeli balongene pamo nga ba ŋanda imo
Judges20:12 Elyo aba nko sha bena Israeli batumine abantu mu calo conse ica mutundu wakwa Benjamini no kutila
Judges20:13 Eico nomba tupeeleni ifyo ifiwelewele fya bantu ifya bena Gibea
Judges20:14 Nabo abena Benjamini balonganike abantu pamo ukufuma mu misumba yabo yonse
Judges20:15 Pali ubu bwine bushiku
Judges20:16 Pali ifi fine ifita fyonse pali imyanda cine lubali (700) abaume abasalilwe
Judges20:17 Abena Israeli
Judges20:18 Elyo abena Israeli baile ku Betele kukuya ipusha kuli Lesa abati
Judges20:19 Awe ulucelo abena Israeli balimine no kuya cita inkambi mupepi no musumba wa Gibea.
Judges20:20 Elyo abena Israeli baile kukulwisha abena Benjamini no kutantika ifita fyabo ifyabulwi ukulungatana no musumba wa Gibea.
Judges20:21 Awe ifita fya bena Benjamini nafyo fyafumine mu musumba wa Gibea no kusansa abena Israeli no kwipaya ifita amakana amakumi yabili na yabili (22
Judges20:22 Lelo abena Israeli baikoselesha umuntu no muntu. Kabili babwekeshepo ukutantika ifita fyabulwi umo fyatanteme pakabala ntanshi pa bushiku bayambile ukulwa.
Judges20:23 Elyo abena Israeli baile no kuya lila pa cinso cakwa Yawe mpakafye icungulo. Kabili baipwishe Yawe no kutila
Judges20:24 Kabili abena Israeli bafikile mupepi na bena Benjamini mu bushiku bwalenga shibili.
Judges20:25 Abena Benjamini nabo baishile ukufuma ku Gibea pa bushiku bwalenga shibili kukubakumanya
Judges20:26 Abena Israeli bonse baile ku Betele
Judges20:27 Kabili abena Israeli baipwishe Yawe pantu mu nshiku shilya Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Lesa eko yali.
Judges20:28 Pantu mu nshiku shilya Fineasi mwana Eleasa
Judges20:29 Elyo abena Israeli babelamike ifita fyabulwi ukushinguluka umusumba wa Gibea.
Judges20:30 Awe pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu abena Israeli baile sansa abena Benjamini nabatantika ifita fyabulwi ukulungatana no musumba wa Gibea pamo ngefyo bacitile pakutendeka.
Judges20:31 Ilyo nabo abena Benjamini bafumine mukuya bakumanya
Judges20:32 Abena Benjamini batampile ukutontonkanya ukuti
Judges20:33 Bonse abena Israeli bafumine pa cifulo cakulwilapo no kuya tantama ku Bali-Tama. Elyo abena Israeli ababelamine abanabo basokoloka lubali lwa ku masamba ya Gibea.
Judges20:34 Elyo ifita ifyasalilwe amakana ikumi limo (10
Judges20:35 Awe Yawe acimfishe abena Benjamini pa cinso ca bena Israeli. Kabili pali bulya bwine bushiku
Judges20:36 Elyo abena Benjamini epakumona ukuti nabacimfiwa. Nabo abena Israeli epakufuntukako ku bena Benjamini pantu balishibe bwino ukuti nabakwata ifita fyabulwi ifyabeleme mupepi no musumba wa Gibea.
Judges20:37 Ifita ifyabeleme nafyo fyapumikishe ukwingila mu musumba wa Gibea
Judges20:38 Abena Israeli ababulwi balyumfwene ne fita ifyabeleme ukuti
Judges20:39 elyo nomba ifita fyabulwi ifya bena Israeli fili nokupilibuka no kwamba ukulwa. Na pali iyi nshita ninshi abena Benjamini balyambileko ukulaipaulula abena Israeli ukufikafye na pa bantu amakumi yatatu (30). Pantu batontonkenye ukuti
Judges20:40 Lelo ilyo intumba ya cushi yatampile ukwimina mu mulu ukufuma mu musumba
Judges20:41 Elyo nomba nabo abena Israeli bayalulwike mukusansa abalwani babo. Kabili abena Benjamini calibapeseshe amano
Judges20:42 Kanshi ici ecalengele bafulumuke ku cinso ca bena Israeli no kulungama ku matololo. Lelo nalyo line ubulwi tabwapwile iyoo
Judges20:43 Bashingulwike abena Benjamini no kubabutusha ulubilo no kubasangila apalungatene no musumba wa Gibea
Judges20:44 Kanshi ifita fyacenjele icine cine ifya bena Benjamini ifyo baipeye fyali amakana ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18
Judges20:45 Awe nelyo bayalulukile lwa ku matololo mu kufulumuka kwabo pakuti baye fisama ku cilibwe ca Limoni
Judges20:46 Kabili pali bulya bwine bushiku amakana amakumi yabili na yasano (25
Judges20:47 Nomba abaume imyanda mutanda (600) ebabwelulwike no kufulumukila mu matololo ku cilibwe ca Rimoni
Judges20:48 Elyo abena Israeli babwelulukile abena Benjamini no kwipaya bonse abantu ba mu misumba ukubomfya impanga. Kabili takwashele citekwa nelyo cimo
Judges21:1 Ilyo abena Israeli balongene ku Misipa
Judges21:2 Elyo abantu baya ku Betele
Judges21:3 Batile
Judges21:4 Ulucelo pa bushiku bwakonkelepo
Judges21:5 Elyo abena Israeli bayambile ukwipushanya abati
Judges21:6 Eico nomba abena Israeli balangulukile bamunyinabo aba mu luko lwa bena Benjamini. Elyo batile
Judges21:7 Bushe twalacita shani pakusanga abanakashi abakuti bakoope kuli aba abashalapo? Apo ifwe twalilapa umulapo kuli Yawe uwakuti tatwakapeele abana abakashana besu kukuupwa ku bena Benjamini.”
Judges21:8 Kabili bayambile ukwipushanya abati
Judges21:9 Pantu ilyo bapendele abantu
Judges21:10 Eico kanshi icilonganino catumine ifita amakana ikumi limo na yabili (12
Judges21:11 Ifi efyo mulingile muye mucite. Muye peela umwaume onse kukonaulwa pamo no mwanakashi onse uushili nacisungu.”
Judges21:12 Elyo baile sanga pa bekashi ba mu Yabeshi Gileadi abanakashi banacisungu imyanda ine (400) abashatala abalalapo no mwaume. Awe babasendele ku nkambi ku Shilo mu calo ca Kenani.
Judges21:13 Elyo icilonganino catumine amashiwi yakulenga icibote pakati ka bena Benjamini abali ku cilibwe ca Rimoni.
Judges21:14 Kanshi abena Benjamini nabo epakubweluluka pa nshita ine ilya elyo baisa bapeela abanakashi abashelepo ilyo baipeye abantu ba ku Yabeshi Gileadi. Lelo aba abanakashi tabakumanine kuli bonse iyoo.
Judges21:15 Awe abantu balangulukile abena Benjamini apakalamba
Judges21:16 Elyo abakalamba ba cilonganino batile
Judges21:17 Kabili batile
Judges21:18 Lelo ifwe tatwingapeela abana besu abanakashi mukuupwa kuli bena
Judges21:19 Nomba moneni
Judges21:20 Kabili bakonkenyepo ukweba abena Benjamini abati
Judges21:21 no kulolela. Kabili ilyo abakashana ba bena Shilo baisa no kwamba ukucinda
Judges21:22 Lelo ilyo bashibo nangu bandume shabo bakesa mukulailishanya kuli ifwe
Judges21:23 Kanshi nabo abena Benjamini bacitile umo mwine baebelwe. Ilyofye abakashana bayambile ukucinda
Judges21:24 Na pa nshita ilya ine
Judges21:25 Kabili pa nshita ilya
