Ruth1:2 Ishina lya uyu muntu ni Elimeleki
Ruth1:3 Nomba Elimeleki
Ruth1:4 Aba bana baume baupile abanakashi abena Moabu. Umwanakashi umo ishina lyakwe ni Opa no mubiye nao ali ni Ruti. Panuma yakwikala kulya pa myaka nalimo ikumi limo
Ruth1:5 bonse babili Maloni na Kilioni wine nabo balifwile. Eico kanshi
Ruth1:6 Ilyo Naomi aumfwile ku Moabu ukuti Yawe naisa kukwafwilisha abantu bakwe mukubapeela ifyakulya
Ruth1:7 Kanshi ena pamo na banafyala bonse babili epakutendeka ubulendo bwakufuma ku cifulo kulya baleikala no kwamba ukubwelelamo
Ruth1:8 Elyo Naomi atile kuli banafyala bonse babili
Ruth1:9 Kabili Yawe engamwafwako pakuti mukasange ubwikalo ubusuma
Ruth1:10 Elyo nabo baeba nafyala abati
Ruth1:11 Lelo Naomi abasuka ati
Ruth1:12 Bwelelenimofye ku mushi mwe bakashana bana bandi. Ine nomba ninkota uwakukwata na umbi umulume. Nangufye cingaba cakuti naba no mulume no kuba na bana abaume
Ruth1:13 bushe kuti mwapembela mpaka nabo bakakule elyo bakese muupa? Bushe mukekala ifyo fine ukwabula ukuupwa? Awe iyoo bakashana
Ruth1:14 Kabili nabo babwekeshapofye ukulalila. Elyo Opa ena atomona nafyala abwelelamo na kumwabo
Ruth1:15 Elyo Naomi atile kuli Ruti
Ruth1:16 Ruti nao atile
Ruth1:17 Uko imwe mukafwila
Ruth1:18 Naomi ilyo amona ukuti Ruti ali uwashangila mukuya nankwe
Ruth1:19 Eico bonse babili batendeke ukuya
Ruth1:20 Naomi nao alebeba ati
Ruth1:21 Ine nafumine kuno umukankala
Ruth1:22 Kanshi ifi efyo Naomi abwelelemo ukufuma ku Moabu
Ruth2:1 Nomba Naomi alipo na umo uwa mu lupwa lwa mulume uwa mu mukowa wakwa Elimeleki
Ruth2:2 Elyo Ruti umwina Moabu atile kuli Naomi
Ruth2:3 Awe Ruti aliile no kwamba ukusotasota imbuto mu mabala mukukonka panuma ya balesombola. Elyo cabafye nkuma aisanga alebomba mwibala lyakwa Boasi. Boasi ali wa mu mukowa wakwa Elimeleki.
Ruth2:4 Kabili ilyo linefye
Ruth2:5 Elyo Boasi aipwishe umubomfi wakwe uwaleyangalila abasomboshi ati
Ruth2:6 Kangalila wa basomboshi nao atile
Ruth2:7 Ena acisa lomba ati
Ruth2:8 Elyo Boasi atile kuli Ruti
Ruth2:9 Uposeko amano no kwishiba ibala ilyo balesombolamo
Ruth2:10 Ruti ilyo aumfwile aya mashiwi
Ruth2:11 Boasi atile
Ruth2:12 Yawe engakulambwilapo pali fyonse ifyo wacita. Kabili Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli akakupeelelepo icilambu icituntulu
Ruth2:13 Elyo Ruti asosele ati
Ruth2:14 Awe pa nshita yakulya Boasi atile kuli Ruti
Ruth2:15 Ilyo Ruti aimine ukuya mukusotasota imbuto mwibala
Ruth2:16 Kabili mulesomonamo imbuto shimo mu myanshi no kushisha pakuti ilyo aleisa alesotasota
Ruth2:17 Eico kanshi
Ruth2:18 Alisendele no kubwelelamo ku musumba
Ruth2:19 Nao nyinafyala atile kuli wene
Ruth2:20 Naomi atile kuli nafyala
Ruth2:21 Elyo Ruti umwina Moabu atile
Ruth2:22 Nao Naomi atile kuli Ruti nafyala
Ruth2:23 Awe Ruti epakulaba mupepi na babomfi abakashana bakwa Boasi mukusombola imbuto
Ruth3:1 Ubushiku bumo Naomi nafyala wakwa Ruti amwebele ati
Ruth3:2 Nomba mona Boasi untu walebomba na bakashana bakwe bushe te muntu wesu? Ilelo icungulo akulasokola imbuto sha bale pa cipulilo ca pa lubansa lwakwe.
Ruth3:3 Eico kanshi
Ruth3:4 Ilyo aleya sendama
Ruth3:5 Ruti atile
Ruth3:6 Awe Ruti aile ku cipulilo cakwa Boasi ica bale no kucita fyonse ifyo nyinafyala amwebele.
Ruth3:7 Ilyo Boasi apwile ukulya no kunwa
Ruth3:8 Nomba pakati ka bushiku Boasi acilimuka no kupilibuka
Ruth3:9 Elyo Boasi atile
Ruth3:10 Nao Boasi atile
Ruth3:11 Kanshi nomba mwana wandi witiina. Ine nkakucitilafye conse ico uli nokunjeba. Ala bonse abena musumba banandi balishibafye bwino ukuti uli mwanakashi wacishinka.
Ruth3:12 Kwena nangu cacine cine ukuti ndi wa mu lupwa lobe
Ruth3:13 Lelo ikala kuno kwine muno cungulo mpaka ulucelo

Ruth3:15 Kabili Boasi amweba ati
Ruth3:16 Ilyo Ruti afikile kuli nyinafyala
Ruth3:17 Elyo Ruti alundapo nokuti
Ruth3:18 Elyo Naomi atile

Ruth4:2 Kabili Boasi aitile abakalamba ikumi limo aba mu musumba no kutila
Ruth4:3 Elyo aeba ndubulwila uwali ne nsambu ati
Ruth4:4 Ine ntontonkenye ukuti cawama ukukwishibisha pali uyu mulandu. Kabili nga cakuti ulefwaya ukushita ushitile pa menso ya bantu aba bekele pano elyo na ya bakalamba ba bantu bandi. Nga ulefwaya ukulilubula
Ruth4:5 Elyo Boasi asosele ati
Ruth4:6 Ilyo ndubulwila uwali ne nsambu aumfwile ifi

Ruth4:8 Eico ilyo ndubulwila atile kuli Boasi

Ruth4:20 Aminadabu ali ni wishi wakwa Nashoni
Ruth4:21 Salimoni ali ni wishi wakwa Boasi
Ruth4:22 Obedi ali ni wishi wakwa Yese
1Samuel1:1 Nomba kwali umuntu umo umwina Sufu uwafumine ku musumba wa Ramataimu Sofimu mu calo ca mpili cakwa Efulemu
1Samuel1:2 Uyu Elikana ali na bakashi babili. Umukashi umo ishina lyakwe ni Hana
1Samuel1:3 Nomba cila mwaka
1Samuel1:4 Ilyo lyonse ubushiku bwakupelelapo ilambo bwafika
1Samuel1:5 Lelo Hana ena alemupeela imipusa ibili pantu alimutemenwe nganshi
1Samuel1:6 Pa mulandu wakuti Yawe alimwisalile ubufyashi
1Samuel1:7 Ifi efyo alecita cila mwaka. Ilyo lyonse Hana aleya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe kukupepa
1Samuel1:8 Elikana umulume wakwe atile kuli ena
1Samuel1:9 Ubushiku bumo ilyo bapwile ukulya no kunwa mu Shilo
1Samuel1:10 Hana mu kushikitika kwa mutima wakwe
1Samuel1:11 Kabili acitile umulapo nokutila
1Samuel1:12 Ilyo Hana atwalilile ukupepa kuli Yawe
1Samuel1:13 Hana ninshi nao alepepafye mu mutima wakwe. Kanshi imilomo yakwe eyaletentafye
1Samuel1:14 Eico Eli epakumweba ati
1Samuel1:15 Lelo Hana nao amwasuka ati
1Samuel1:16 Mwintunganya ine ne mubomfi wenu ukuba umwanakashi iciwelewele. Ine nacilapepa kuli Yawe pa mulandu wa masakamika ayakalamba nkwete elyo no kushikitika kwa mutima wandi.”
1Samuel1:17 Eli nao atile
1Samuel1:18 Hana nao ayasuka ati
1Samuel1:19 Mu lucelo lwakonkelepo
1Samuel1:20 Eico mu kuya kwa nshiku Hana alimite no kukwata umwana umwaume. Uyu mwana Hana amwinike ishina lya Samwele
1Samuel1:21 Kanshi lyonse uyu muntu Elikana no lupwa lwakwe lonse baleya kukutuula ilambo lya pa mwaka kuli Yawe no kufikilisha umulapo wakwe alapile.
1Samuel1:22 Lelo Hana wena taileko. Atile ku mulume wakwe
1Samuel1:23 Elyo Elikana umulume wakwe atile
1Samuel1:24 Ilyo umwana asumwike
1Samuel1:25 Elyo baipaya cilume wa ŋombe
1Samuel1:26 Elyo Hana atile kuli Eli
1Samuel1:27 Ine napepele no kulomba uyu mwana
1Samuel1:28 Eico kanshi na ine nomba namupeela kuli Yawe. Mu bumi bwakwe bonse ubwa pano calo namupeela kuli Yawe.” Elyo kulya kwine apepa na kuli Yawe.
1Samuel2:1 Elyo Hana apepele kuli Yawe ati
1Samuel2:2 “Takwaba uwamushilo nelyo umo
1Samuel2:3 Tecakwesha nakabili ukulanda ifyakuitakisha
1Samuel2:4 “Amata ya bamaka nayakontaika
1Samuel2:5 Abo abalelya no kwikuta
1Samuel2:6 “Yawe eulenga ukufwa
1Samuel2:7 Yawe eulenga ubupina
1Samuel2:8 Ewimya abapina ukubafumya mu mito. Ewimya umulanda ukufuma mu lukungu
1Samuel2:9 “Yawe ali nokubaka abamushilo bakwe
1Samuel2:10 Bonse abapinkana na Yawe bena bakonaulwa. Akabatumina iciunda cakubulukuta ukufuma mu mulu. Yawe akapingula abantu bonse aba pano isonde. Eukapeela imfumu amaka yakwe
1Samuel2:11 Elyo Elikana abwelelamo kumwabo ku Rama
1Samuel2:12 Nomba abana baume bakwa Eli bali ifiwelewele
1Samuel2:13 nangu ukwishiba imilimo ya bashimapepo iyo bali nokubomba pakati ka bantu. Nomba cali lutambi lwa bashimapepo ulwakuti inshita yonse ilyo umuntu aletuula ilambo
1Samuel2:14 Uyu mubomfi ali nokulasa muli conse ico bepikemo inama
1Samuel2:15 Kabili balecita ifi ukuti ilyo tabalaoca amafuta
1Samuel2:16 Lelo uyu muntu nga atila kuli ena
1Samuel2:17 Kanshi ububifi bwa bana baume bakwa Eli bwali ubukalamba nganshi pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Pantu tabapeele umucinshi kuli conse icaletuulwa kuli Yawe.
1Samuel2:18 Umulumendo Samwele alefwala insalu isha kolokondwe pakubomba imilimo pa cinso cakwa Yawe.
1Samuel2:19 Elyo cila mwaka nyina nao alemubilila umwingila unono
1Samuel2:20 Awe Eli alepaala Elikana no mukashi wakwe mu mashiwi ayakuti
1Samuel2:21 Awe Yawe akwatile Hana icikuuku
1Samuel2:22 Nomba Eli alikotele nganshi
1Samuel2:23 Eli epakweba abana bakwe ati
1Samuel2:24 Iyoo
1Samuel2:25 Ala nga cakuti umuntu abembukila umuntu munankwe
1Samuel2:26 Kabili umulumendo Samwele
1Samuel2:27 Nomba umuntu wakwa Lesa umo aishile kuli Eli no kumweba ati

1Samuel2:29 Bushe cinshi ushulukila ifye lambo fyandi ne fya mutuulo wandi ifyo nakonkomesha abantu ukulantuula ku cifulo candi? Bushe mulandu nshi wacindikila abana bobe abaume ukucila ine mukulalya ifisuma pakuti muleina mwe bene mweka
1Samuel2:30 Eico kanshi Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli
1Samuel2:31 “Mona
1Samuel2:32 Mukucucutika ukalalolesha no lunkumbwa mu menso yobe pa kushuka konse uko ndi nokupeela abena Israeli. Elyo na mu lupwa lobe tamwakatale amuba umuntu umwaume uwakufika ku bukote.
1Samuel2:33 No muntu obe onse uo nshakaleshe ukufika ku bulambo bwandi
1Samuel2:34 Kabili ici ecikaba icishibilo kuli iwe icili nokuponena abana bobe babili abaume
1Samuel2:35 Ine ne mwine nkaifwaila shimapepo uwacishinka

1Samuel4:1 Kabili amashiwi yakwa Samwele yaumfwike kuli bonse abena Israeli. Muli shilya nshiku abena Israeli baile kukulwisha Abafilisiti. Abena Israeli bacitile inkambi pa Ebenesa
1Samuel4:2 Abafilisiti batantike ifita fyabo kukukumanya abena Israeli. Ilyo batendeke ukulwa
1Samuel4:3 Ilyo ifita fyabwelelamo ku nkambi
1Samuel4:4 Abantu epekutuma abaume ku Shilo mukuya buula Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe umwine wa fita
1Samuel4:5 Ilyo bafishishe Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe mu nkambi
1Samuel4:6 Pakumfwa ukuwelesha kwa congo icikalamba nganshi
1Samuel4:7 Abafilisiti baikatwa umwenso
1Samuel4:8 Akalanda kuli ifwe! Bushe nani akatupokololako ukufuma ku maboko ya iyi milungu iyamaka yonse? Eiyi ine milungu yakomawile abena Egupto ku fikuko ifyalekana lekana mu matololo.
1Samuel4:9 Eico kanshi kosenifye mwe Bafilisiti! Mube abaume
1Samuel4:10 Kanshi Abafilisiti balilwishishe no kucimfya abena Israeli
1Samuel4:11 Awe bapokolola ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa. Kabili bonse babili abana baume bakwa Eli
1Samuel4:12 Pa bushiku bumo bwine umwina Benjamini umo afulumwike ukufuma kuntu balelwila

1Samuel4:14 Ilyo Eli nao aumfwa ukupunda kwa misowa
1Samuel4:15 Pali iyi nshita Eli ali ne myaka amakumi pabula na cine konse konse (98). Kabili na menso yakwe ninshi nayanaka

1Samuel6:1 Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe yali mu calo ca Bafilisiti imyeshi cine lubali.
1Samuel6:2 Abafilisiti baita bashimapepo na bakabuka babo no kutila kuli bena
1Samuel6:3 Nabo bayasuka abati
1Samuel6:4 Abafilisiti baipusha abati
1Samuel6:5 Kanshi eico pangeni ifyapala ifipute ne fyapala bakwindi ifileonaula icalo
1Samuel6:6 Bushe cinshi mwalafwaila ukukosha imitima yenu nga filya abena Egupto pamo na Farao bacitile? Panuma yakubaletela ubucushi
1Samuel6:7 Nomba kanshi pekanyeni iceleta ilipya
1Samuel6:8 Mubuule Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe no kuibika pa mulu we celeta kabili mu fyakusendelamo fya mumbali mubikemo ifipe ifya golide mule mutumina ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. Elyo mulitume no kuleka lileya.
1Samuel6:9 Lelo mulelimona ilyo lileya. Nomba nga cakuti lyalaya ku calo caliko
1Samuel6:10 Awe nabo bacita ifyo fine babebele. Babuula iŋombe shibili no kushikakila kwiceleta elyo bayaisalila no twana twashiko mwitanga.
1Samuel6:11 Babika ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe pa mulu we celeta
1Samuel6:12 Iŋombe shalungamafye ku Beti Shemeshi
1Samuel6:13 Nomba abantu ba mu Beti Shemeshi baleseepa iŋanu shabo mwishika. Cilya bati benuke bamona Imbokoshi ya Cipangano
1Samuel6:14 Iceleta lyaisa na mwibala lyakwa Yoshua umwina Beti Shemeshi no kwiminina ku mbali ya cilibwe icikalamba. Abantu balepaula inkuni ukufuma kwiceleta no kutuula iŋombe shine kuli Yawe nge lambo lyakoca.
1Samuel6:15 Elyo abena Levi baisha Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe
1Samuel6:16 Ilyo intungulushi shisano isha Bafilisiti shamwene ifi fyonse
1Samuel6:17 Aba e bagolide abapala ifipute abo Abafilisiti batumine ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi kuli Yawe. Umo kuli Ashidodi
1Samuel6:18 Kabili impendwa ya golide iyapala bakwindi
1Samuel6:19 Lelo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Yekonia bena tabasekelele capamo na bena Beti Shemeshi
1Samuel6:20 Elyo abaume abena Beti Shemeshi baipusha abati
1Samuel6:21 Elyo batuma inkombe ku bantu ba ku Kiriati Yarimu nokutila

1Samuel8:12 Bamo akabalenga ukuba intungulushi sha pa fita amakana (1
1Samuel8:13 Ali nokusenda abana benu abanakashi ukuba bakenga wa mafuta yanunka ubusaka
1Samuel8:14 Ali nokumupoka amabala yenu ayasuma
1Samuel8:15 Ali nokubuulapo cimo pa capekumi cenu pa fisabo na pa fya myangashi no kupeela kuli bacilolo elyo na babomfi bakwe.

1Samuel8:17 Ali nokubuulapo cimo pa capekumi ca fitekwa fyenu
1Samuel8:18 Ilyo bulya bushiku bukafika
1Samuel8:19 Lelo abantu bakaanininafye ukumfwa kwishiwi lyakwa Samwele
1Samuel8:20 pakuti na ifwe tukabe nge mishobo imbi. Tulefwaya na ifwe tukwate mfumu yakututungulula kabili nokututangilila pakufuma ilyo tulelwa ubulwi.”
1Samuel8:21 Ilyo Samwele aumfwa fyonse ifyo abantu basosele
1Samuel8:22 Yawe nao ayasuka ati
1Samuel9:1 Mu bena Benjamini mwali umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Kishi umwana mwaume wakwa Abieli
1Samuel9:2 Alikwete umwana umwaume uwe shina lya Saulo
1Samuel9:3 Nomba bapunda bakwa Kishi wishi wakwa Saulo balilubile. Elyo Kishi aeba umwana wakwe Saulo ati
1Samuel9:4 Kanshi nabo epakulalanya icalo ca mpili ica bena Efulemu elyo apulinkanya na mu calo ca Shalisha
1Samuel9:5 Ilyo bafikile ku Sufi
1Samuel9:6 Elyo umubomfi amwasuka ati
1Samuel9:7 Elyo Saulo ayaswike umubomfi wakwe ati
1Samuel9:8 Umubomfi abwekeshapo ukwasuka Saulo nakabili ati
1Samuel9:9 Mu nshita shakale mu Israeli umuntu nga aya kukwipusha fimo kuli Lesa
1Samuel9:10 Saulo atile ku mubomfi wakwe
1Samuel9:11 Ilyo baleninika ulupili pakuya ku musumba
1Samuel9:12 Nabo bayasuka abati
1Samuel9:13 Nga mwaingilafye mu musumba
1Samuel9:14 Elyo baile ku musumba
1Samuel9:15 Nomba mu bushiku bwa kunuma ilyo Saulo talaisa
1Samuel9:16 “Mailo pa nshita nga ino ine
1Samuel9:17 Ilyo Samwele amwene Saulo
1Samuel9:18 Elyo Saulo apalamina kuli Samwele mukati ka mpongolo nokutila
1Samuel9:19 Elyo Samwele ayasuka Saulo ati
1Samuel9:20 Lelo pa mulandu wa bapunda balya baluba pali ishi nshiku shitatu shapita
1Samuel9:21 Saulo ayasuka ati
1Samuel9:22 Elyo Samwele asenda Saulo no mubomfi wakwe mu ŋanda ya maliila
1Samuel9:23 Samwele atile ku waleipika
1Samuel9:24 Uwaleipika nao abuula umwendo na fyonse ifyaliko no kufipalamika ku ntanshi yakwa Saulo. Elyo Samwele atile
1Samuel9:25 Ilyo babwelele ukufuma ku ncende yakupepelapo ukwisa ku musumba
1Samuel9:26 Bonse babuka lucelocelo
1Samuel9:27 Cilyafye bafika lwa ku mpela ya musumba
1Samuel10:1 Elyo Samwele abuulile umusukupala wa mafuta no kwitila pa mutwe wakwa Saulo elyo amutomona
1Samuel10:2 Ilyo walaya ukufuma kuli ine ilelo
1Samuel10:3 Elyo uli nokutwalilila ukuya ukufuma palya mpaka ukafike ku cimuti icikalamba ica oki ica Tabo. Abantu batatu abaume abalenina mukuya tuula amalambo kuli Lesa ku Betele ebali nokukukumanya palya pene. Umo ninshi nasenda utwana twa mbushi tutatu
1Samuel10:4 Bali nokuya kuposha no kukupeela imikate ibili iyo uli nokupokelela ukufuma kuli bena.
1Samuel10:5 “Elyo panuma ya ifyo
1Samuel10:6 Umupashi wakwa Yawe uli nokwisa pali iwe mu maka elyo na iwe uleisa yamba ukulasesema pamo nabo. Kabili uli nokusanguka umuntu umbi.
1Samuel10:7 Elyo ifi fishibilo nga fyaba pali iwe
1Samuel10:8 Kabili wambeko utangile ukuya ku Giligali
1Samuel10:9 Ilyo Saulo apilibwike ukufuma kuli Samwele
1Samuel10:10 Ilyo bafikile pa Gibea
1Samuel10:11 Ilyo bonse abo ali nabo kale abamwishibe bamwene alesesema pamo na bakasesema
1Samuel10:12 Elyo umuntu umo uwaleikala kulya ayankula ati
1Samuel10:13 Ilyo Saulo alekele ukusesema aile fika ku ncende yakupepelapo.
1Samuel10:14 Nomba nalume wakwa Saulo alimwipwishe pamo no mubomfi wakwe ati
1Samuel10:15 Nalume kwa Saulo atile
1Samuel10:16 Saulo atile
1Samuel10:17 Panuma ya ifi Samwele alonganike abena Israeli kuli Yawe ku Misipa
1Samuel10:18 elyo atile kuli bena
1Samuel10:19 Nomba imwe ilelo mwakaana Lesa wenu
1Samuel10:20 Elyo Samwele apalamike aba nko sha bena Israeli mupepi
1Samuel10:21 Elyo apalamika kuntanshi aba luko lwa bena Benjamini
1Samuel10:22 Ecalengele bepushe kuli Yawe nakabili abati
1Samuel10:23 Elyo babutuka no kuya musenda. Nomba ilyo aiminine pakati ka bantu
1Samuel10:24 Samwele atile ku bantu bonse
1Samuel10:25 Samwele alondolwele abantu insambu elyo ne milimo yaba pa bufumu. Epakulemba fyonse mu citabo no kubika pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Elyo Samwele asalanganya abantu
1Samuel10:26 Saulo nao aile kumwakwe ku Gibea
1Samuel10:27 Lelo bamo bantalamisoka batile
1Samuel11:1 Panuma ya mweshi umo
1Samuel11:2 Lelo Nahashi umwina Amoni ayaswike ati
1Samuel11:3 Abakalamba ba mu Yabeshi epakumweba abati
1Samuel11:4 Ilyo inkombe shaishile ku Gibea umushi wakwa Saulo no kutula umulandu onse ku bantu
1Samuel11:5 Califye ilyo Saulo alebwela ukufuma ku mabala
1Samuel11:6 Ilyo Saulo aumfwile amashiwi yabo
1Samuel11:7 Abuulile iŋombe shibili ishakuliminako ashiputaula mu fipimfya
1Samuel11:8 Ilyo Saulo abalongenye abantu ku Beseki
1Samuel11:9 Baebele inkombe ishaishile abati
1Samuel11:10 Kanshi abaleikala ku Yabeshi epakweba abena Amoni ati
1Samuel11:11 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo Saulo ayakanya abaume bakwe mu fipani fitatu. Elyo ulucelo ku macaca baingilile abena Amoni mu nkambi yabo no kubakomaula mpaka ukufika na pa nshita akasuba kabalikishe. Kabili bonse abapusunswikeko balisalangene icakuti nangufye babili tabashele pamo iyoo.
1Samuel11:12 Abantu epakwipusha Samwele abati
1Samuel11:13 Lelo Saulo atile

1Samuel11:15 Kanshi abantu bonse epakuya ku Giligali no kuya bilisha Saulo nge mfumu pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Kulya kwine eko baile tuula imutuulo yakwampana pa cinso cakwa Yawe
1Samuel12:1 Elyo Samwele aebele abena Israeli bonse ati
1Samuel12:2 Moneni
1Samuel12:3 Ine naiminina pano

1Samuel12:9 Lelo bena balaba kuli Yawe Lesa wabo
1Samuel12:10 Elyo balilile kuli Yawe nokutila
1Samuel12:11 Elyo Yawe atumine Yerubibaali

1Samuel12:13 Nomba moneni
1Samuel12:14 Eico nomba nga cakuti muli nokuba na katiina kuli Yawe

1Samuel12:16 “Eico nomba
1Samuel12:17 Bushe ino te nshita yakusombola iŋanu? Ine nalalomba kuli Yawe alete ukubulukuta ne mfula. Kabili muli nokushininkisha no kwishiba ukuti cintu icibi mwacita ku cinso cakwa Yawe icakwipusha ukumupeela imfumu.”
1Samuel12:18 Elyo Samwele alombele kuli Yawe
1Samuel12:19 Elyo abantu bonse batile kuli Samwele
1Samuel12:20 Samwele nao atile kuli bena
1Samuel12:21 Mwiyalukila ukukonka ifyaciwelewele ifilubi ifishingamwafwa. Tafibomba busuma nakalya
1Samuel12:22 Pa mulandu we shina lyakwe ilicindami
1Samuel12:23 Elyo palwa ine
1Samuel12:24 Lelo imwe mukwatilefye Yawe akatiina no kulamubombela mu cishinka ne mitima yenu yonse. Mufwile ukuba abakwibukisha ifintu ifikankala ifyo amucitila.
1Samuel12:25 Nomba nga cakuti mwakonkanyapo ukulabifya
1Samuel13:1 Saulo ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ilyo bamusontele pa bufumu
1Samuel13:2 Saulo asalile abaume amakana yatatu (3
1Samuel13:3 Yonatani acimfishe impuka ya Bafilisiti abali pa nkambi ya ku Geba
1Samuel13:4 Kanshi bonse abena Israeli balyumfwile amashiwi yonse ayakuti Saulo nasansa inkambi ya Bafilisiti elyo nomba Israeli asangwike umulwani wa Bafilisiti. Kabili abantu balongene mukuba pamo na Saulo ku Giligali.
1Samuel13:5 Abafilisiti nabo balongana pamo pakulwisha abena Israeli
1Samuel13:6 Ilyo abaume abena Israeli bamwene ukuti bakwata ubwafya ubushaibipila
1Samuel13:7 Bamo Abahibulu balyabwike umumana wa Yordani ukuya mu calo ca Gadi na Gileadi. Saulo ashele ku Giligali ne mpuka shonse isha fita isho ali nasho shilekankafye ku mwenso.
1Samuel13:8 Apembele pa nshiku cine lubali
1Samuel13:9 Eico Saulo atile
1Samuel13:10 Kanshi cilya apwafye ukupeela ilambo lyakoca
1Samuel13:11 Samwele aipusha ati
1Samuel13:12 eco nasosele nati
1Samuel13:13 Samwele epakweba Saulo ati
1Samuel13:14 Lelo nomba ubufumu bobe tabwatwalilile. Yawe nafwaya umuntu uwa mibeele iyisansamusha umutima wakwe
1Samuel13:15 Elyo Samwele afumine ku Giligali no kuya ku Gibea wa muli Benjamini. Elyo Saulo apendele abaume abashele nankwe asanga ati bali nalimo imyanda mutanda (600).
1Samuel13:16 Saulo no mwana wakwe umwaume Yonatani na baume bali nabo baikele mu Geba wakwa Benjamini
1Samuel13:17 Elyo ibumba lya bantu abonaushi lyafumine ku nkambi ya Bafilisiti mu mpuka shitatu. Impuka imo yalungeme ku Ofira mu calo cakwa Shuali
1Samuel13:18 imbi yalungeme ku Beti Horoni elyo iyacitatu nayo yalolele ku mpanga ya mupaka walungatana ne shika lya Seboyimu ukulolenkana ku matololo.
1Samuel13:19 Nomba takwali uwakufula ifyela mu calo conse ica Israeli
1Samuel13:20 Kanshi bonse abena Israeli baleya ku Bafilisiti mukunonesha inkasu sha ŋombe
1Samuel13:21 Umutengo wakunonesha inkasu sha ŋombe na bapiki wali ukucila citika wa shekeli umo
1Samuel13:22 Kanshi pa bushiku bwa bulwi takwasangilwe mu fita fyakwa Saulo na Yonatani uwali no lupanga nangu ifumo mu minwe yakwe
1Samuel13:23 Nomba impuka imo iya Bafilisiti yaile ku mupokapoka wa ku Mikimashi.
1Samuel14:1 Ubushiku bumo Yonatani umwana mwaume wakwa Saulo atile ku mulumendo uwalesenda ifyanso fyakwe
1Samuel14:2 Saulo aleikala kunse ya Gibea mwisamba lya cimuti ca mateke mu Migironi. Ali ne fita ukulingana nalimo imyanda mutanda (600)
1Samuel14:3 apo apali na Ahiya uwalefwala icakufwala cabushimapepo ica efodi. Ali mwana mwaume wakwa Aitubu munyina Ikabodi uwali mwana Fineasi
1Samuel14:4 Ku mbali shonse isha mupokapoka apo Yonatani alefwaya ukwabukila ukufika ku nkambi ya Bafilisiti kwali ifimabwe ifyacenjemana
1Samuel14:5 Icilibwe cimo icacenjemana cabelele ku kapinda ka ku kuso ku ntanshi ya ku Mikimashi
1Samuel14:6 Elyo Yonatani atile ku mubomfi uwalesenda ifyanso
1Samuel14:7 Umubomfi walesenda ifyanso fyakwe atile
1Samuel14:8 Yonatani atile
1Samuel14:9 Nga cakuti batweba abati
1Samuel14:10 Lelo nga cakuti batila
1Samuel14:11 Bonsefye babili baisokolwele ku nkambi ya Bafilisiti. Abafilisiti batile
1Samuel14:12 Abantu ba pa nkambi ya Bafilisiti bapundile kuli Yonatani no mubomfi walesenda ifyanso fyakwe ati
1Samuel14:13 Yonatani pakunina ukuya pamulu
1Samuel14:14 Muli uku kusansa kwantanshi Yonatani no mubomfi walesenda ifyanso fyakwe baipeye nalimo abantu amakumi yabili (20) mu ncende iyinono ukulingana na citika wa ekare (0:5 acre).
1Samuel14:15 Kabili umwenso waikata ifita fyonse ifyali mu nkambi
1Samuel14:16 Inengu shakwa Saulo mu Gibea wa mu Benjamini shaletamba uko ifita filesalanganina mu ncendefye shonse.
1Samuel14:17 Elyo Saulo aebele ifita ali nafyo ati
1Samuel14:18 Saulo aebele Ahiya ati
1Samuel14:19 Ilyo Saulo acili alelanda kuli shimapepo
1Samuel14:20 Elyo Saulo na bantu bonse abo ali nabo balongana no kuya ku bulwi. Basangile Abafilisiti mu cimfulunganya icikalamba
1Samuel14:21 Nomba icacitike cakuti Abahibulu bamo abali kale ku lubali lwa Bafilisiti kabili abaile ikala na ku nkambi yabo
1Samuel14:22 Kabili
1Samuel14:23 Kanshi Yawe alipuswishe Israeli mu bushiku bulya
1Samuel14:24 Nomba muli bulya bushiku abaume abena Israeli baliculile nganshi

1Samuel14:26 Ilyo bafikile apali ubuci
1Samuel14:27 Nomba Yonatani taumfwileko ukuti wishi ebakakile abantu ku mulapo
1Samuel14:28 Elyo umo uwa mu fita atile kuli ena
1Samuel14:29 Yonatani atile
1Samuel14:30 Bushe nga tacaciwama icakuti abantu abalyapo ifitapwa fimo ilelo ifyo bafumishe ku balwani babo? Nga cakuti abalya
1Samuel14:31 Pa numa ya bena Israeli ukwipaya Abafilisiti pali bulya ubushiku
1Samuel14:32 Kanshi ifita epakomokela pa fitapwa
1Samuel14:33 Elyo baebele Saulo abati
1Samuel14:34 Saulo epakubeba ati
1Samuel14:35 Elyo Saulo akuulile ubulambo bwakwa Yawe. E bulambo bwantanshi ubo akuulile Yawe.

1Samuel14:37 Kanshi Saulo aipwishe Lesa ati
1Samuel14:38 Saulo epakulanda ati
1Samuel14:39 Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo uupususha imyeo ya bena Israeli
1Samuel14:40 Saulo elyo aebele bonse abena Israeli ati
1Samuel14:41 Elyo Saulo apepele kuli Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli ati
1Samuel14:42 Saulo atile
1Samuel14:43 Elyo Saulo atile kuli Yonatani
1Samuel14:44 Saulo atile
1Samuel14:45 Elyo abantu batile kuli Saulo
1Samuel14:46 Elyo Saulo alekele no ukusupila Abafilisiti
1Samuel14:47 Panuma lintu Saulo ayambile ukuteeka Israeli
1Samuel14:48 Alwishishe no bulamba no kucimfya abena Amaleki
1Samuel14:49 Abana abaume abakwa Saulo bali ni Yonatani
1Samuel14:50 Ishina lya mukashi wakwa Saulo lyali ni Ainoamu umwana mwanakashi wakwa Aimasi. Ishina lya mukalamba wa fita fyakwe lyali ni Abune umwana mwaume wakwa Neri
1Samuel14:51 Wishi wakwa Saulo ali ni Kishi. Elyo wishi wakwa Abune ni Neri uwali umwana mwaume wakwa Abieli.
1Samuel14:52 Inshiku shonse ishakwa Saulo shali isha bulwi bwabipisha na Bafilisiti. Kanshi ilyo lyonse Saulo amona umwaume uwamaka nganshi nangu uwashipa

1Samuel15:4 Saulo aitile abantu no kubapenda mu Telaimu
1Samuel15:5 Saulo aile ku musumba wa bena Amaleki
1Samuel15:6 Elyo Saulo aebele abena Keni ati

1Samuel16:1 Yawe aebele Samwele ati
1Samuel16:2 Elyo Samwele ayaswike ati

1Samuel16:4 Awe Samwele acitile ifyo Yawe asosele. Ilyo afikile ku Betelemu
1Samuel16:5 Samwele nao ayaswike ati
1Samuel16:6 Ilyo bafikile
1Samuel16:7 Lelo Yawe aebele Samwele ati
1Samuel16:8 Kanshi Yese aitile Abinadabu kabili nao amupishishe na ku ntanshi yakwa Samwele. Lelo Samwele atile
1Samuel16:9 Yese kabili apisha Shamaya ku ntanshi yakwa Samwele
1Samuel16:10 Yese apishishe abana cine lubali ku cinso cakwa Samwele
1Samuel16:11 Elyo Samwele aipusha Yese ati
1Samuel16:12 Elyo Yese atumine uwakuya mubuula kabili bamuleta mukati. Ali uwakashikila
1Samuel16:13 Kanshi Samwele abuulile ulusengo lwa mafuta no kumusuba pa cinso ca bamunyina
1Samuel16:14 Nomba Yawe afumishe Umupashi wakwe pali Saulo
1Samuel16:15 Elyo ababomfi bakwa Saulo bamwebele abati
1Samuel16:16 Eico peelafye icipope ku babomfi aba pano pesano ukuti bafwaye umuntu uwacenjela ukulisha iseese
1Samuel16:17 Kanshi Saulo epakweba ababomfi bakwe ati
1Samuel16:18 Umubomfi wakwe umo ayasuka ati
1Samuel16:19 Elyo Saulo atumine inkombe shakwe kuli Yese nokutila
1Samuel16:20 Yese epakubuula punda uo batwikile imikate
1Samuel16:21 Davidi afikile kuli Saulo no kwamba imilimo yakwe. Saulo alimutemenwe nganshi
1Samuel16:22 Elyo Saulo atumine ishiwi kuli Yese nokutila
1Samuel16:23 Ilyo lyonse umupashi ubi uwalefuma kuli Lesa waleisa pali Saulo
1Samuel17:1 Kabili Abafilisiti baitile ifita fyabo ku bulwi no kufilonganika ku Sokoyo iyali ncende ya ku Yuda. Bacitile inkambi ku Efesi Damimu
1Samuel17:2 Saulo na bena Israeli balongene pamo no kucita inkambi mwishika lya Elaya
1Samuel17:3 Abafilisiti balongene ku lubali lumbi ulwa lupili elyo abena Israeli nabo balongana ku lubali lubiye
1Samuel17:4 Elyo kwafumine ipaka lya mushilika limo ilyacilile ababiye amaka mu nkambi ya Bafilisiti uwe shina lya Goliati umwina Gati. Ukuya pamulu alepele ukucila pali bamita batatu.
1Samuel17:5 Ali ne cisote ca mukuba ku mutwe elyo afwele ne laya lya mukuba ilyatikama pa cifuba ilyafinine amakilo amakumi mutanda (60).
1Samuel17:6 Ku molu yakwe afwele ifyakucingilila imikonso ifya mukuba
1Samuel17:7 Umusako we fumo lyakwe wali kwati mulando wakwa kapikula wa nsalu
1Samuel17:8 Elyo Goliati aiminine no kulabilikisha ku bena Israeli abali mu milongo yabo aletila
1Samuel17:9 Nga cakuti alekwata amaka yakulwa na ine no kunjipaya
1Samuel17:10 Elyo Umufilisiti alundilepo nokutila
1Samuel17:11 Pakumfwa amashiwi ya Mufilisiti
1Samuel17:12 Nomba Davidi ali umwana mwaume wakwa Yese umwina Efulati uwa ku Betelemu mu calo ca Yuda. Yese ali na bana abaume cine konse konse. Kabili mu nshita yakwa Saulo ali umukote ne myakafye iyingi.
1Samuel17:13 Abana bakwa Yese batatu abaume abakalamba baile na Saulo ku bulwi. Uwali ibeli ni Eliabu. Uwacibili ni Abinadabu elyo uwacitatu ali ni Shamaya.
1Samuel17:14 Davidi ewali umwaice pali bonse. Elyo batatu abali abakalamba ebakonkele Saulo
1Samuel17:15 lelo Davidi aleya no kubwelelamo ukufuma kuli Saulo mukucema impaanga shakwa wishi ku Betelemu.
1Samuel17:16 Pa nshiku amakumi yane (40)
1Samuel17:17 Nomba Yese atile ku mwana wakwe Davidi
1Samuel17:18 Elyo utwalileko no mukalamba wabo uwa pa fita ikana limo uyu mukaka uwakosa ikumi limo. Uye mona nefyo bamunonko bali
1Samuel17:19 Nomba Saulo na bamunonko elyo na bantu bonse abena Israeli bali mwishika lya Elaya
1Samuel17:20 Davidi abuukile lucelocelo no kushila umukuni kuli kacema
1Samuel17:21 Abena Israeli na Bafilisiti batanteme imilongo yabo iyakulwilamo nabalungatana.
1Samuel17:22 Davidi ashile ifyakulya mu minwe ya walesunga ifyakulya
1Samuel17:23 Ilyo acili alelanda na bamunyina
1Samuel17:24 Ilyo abena Israeli bonse bamwene uyu muntu
1Samuel17:25 Abena Israeli balalanda abati
1Samuel17:26 Elyo Davidi aipwishe abaume abaiminine mupepi nankwe ati
1Samuel17:27 Abantu babwekeshapo ukusosa kuli ena fintu baciba balesosa intanshi
1Samuel17:28 Ilyo Eliabu umukalamba wakwa Davidi aumfwile alelanda na bantu
1Samuel17:29 Elyo Davidi atile
1Samuel17:30 Elyo apilibuka ukufuma kuli ena aya ku muntu umbi uwaibelele no kumweba umulandu umo wine. Kabili abantu bamwaswikefye ngefyo bacisosa intanshi.
1Samuel17:31 Ilyo amashiwi yalandile Davidi yaumfwikike
1Samuel17:32 Davidi epakweba Saulo ati
1Samuel17:33 Saulo alyaswike ati
1Samuel17:34 Lelo Davidi atile kuli Saulo
1Samuel17:35 ndacikonka mpaka naya cikomaula no kupokolola impaanga ukufuma ku kanwa kaciko. Nga cakuti canjimina bwangu bwangu ncikatafye ku mwefu waciko
1Samuel17:36 Umubomfi obe alipayapo fyonse fibili
1Samuel17:37 Yawe uwampuswishe ku maka ya nkalamo na ku maka ya cibea
1Samuel17:38 Elyo Saulo afwikile Davidi ifyakufwala fyabulwi. Amufwika icisote ca mukuba ku mutwe
1Samuel17:39 Davidi akakile ulupanga lwakwa Saulo ku fyakufwala fyakwe elyo aesha ukuti ende
1Samuel17:40 Elyo asendele inkonto yakwe mu minwe
1Samuel17:41 Umufilisiti nao ayamba ukupalamina ukwali Davidi
1Samuel17:42 Ilyo Umufilisiti alolekesha Davidi
1Samuel17:43 Elyo Umufilisiti aeba Davidi ati
1Samuel17:44 Umufilisiti aeba Davidi ati
1Samuel17:45 Davidi nao aeba Umufilisiti ati
1Samuel17:46 Buno bwine bushiku Yawe alakupeela mu minwe yandi
1Samuel17:47 Na bonse abalongene pano balaishiba ukuti te ku lupanga nangu ifumo eko Yawe apusushisha iyoo. Pantu Yawe e mwine wa bulwi kabili alapeela imwe mu minwe yesu.”
1Samuel17:48 Nomba ilyo Umufilisiti apalamina kukumulwisha
1Samuel17:49 Davidi apisha iminwe muli tumba wakwe
1Samuel17:50 Davidi acimfishe Umufilisiti kwilekeni ne libwe
1Samuel17:51 Davidi abutuka
1Samuel17:52 Elyo ifita fya bena Israeli pamo na bena Yuda baimine no kusowesha apakalamba
1Samuel17:53 Elyo abena Israeli babwelele ukufuma kukutamfya Abafilisiti
1Samuel17:54 Davidi asendele umutwe wa Mufilisiti no kuutwala ku Yerusalemu

1Samuel17:56 Imfumu yatile

1Samuel17:58 Saulo aipusha ati
1Samuel18:1 Ilyo Davidi apwile ukulanda na Saulo
1Samuel18:2 Ukufuma bulya bwine ubushiku
1Samuel18:3 Elyo Yonatani apangile icipangano na Davidi pantu alimutemenwe pamo ngefyo aitemenwe umwine.
1Samuel18:4 Yonatani afulile umwingila alefwala no kuupela kuli Davidi
1Samuel18:5 Davidi aleya konse uko Saulo alemutuma no kuya bombafye bwino
1Samuel18:6 Ilyo abantu balebwela ku mushi panuma Davidi aipeye Umufilisiti
1Samuel18:7 Lintu balecinda batendeke ukwimba ulwimbo abati
1Samuel18:8 Saulo epakufulwa nganshi
1Samuel18:9 Kanshi ukufumafye pali ilya nshita ukuya na kuntanshi
1Samuel18:10 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo umupashi ubi ukufuma kuli Lesa waishile na maka pali Saulo
1Samuel18:11 elyo asukusa ifumo
1Samuel18:12 Kanshi Saulo epakwamba ukutiina Davidi pantu Lesa ali na Davidi
1Samuel18:13 Elyo Saulo atalusha Davidi pa cinso cakwe
1Samuel18:14 Muli conse ico alecita ali uwashuka mukubomba bwino pantu Yawe ali nankwe.
1Samuel18:15 Ilyo Saulo amwene ukuti Davidi aba uwashuka mu kubomba kwakwe
1Samuel18:16 Lelo abena Israeli na bena Yuda bonse balitemenwe Davidi pantu ewaletungulula ifita konse uko fileya na pakubwela.
1Samuel18:17 Elyo Saulo aebele Davidi ati
1Samuel18:18 Davidi nao ayaswike Saulo ati
1Samuel18:19 Lelo ilyo inshita yafikile iyakwa Merabi umwana mwanakashi wakwa Saulo ukuti apeelwe kuli Davidi
1Samuel18:20 Nomba Mika umwana umwanakashi wakwa Saulo atemenwe Davidi elyo baebele Saulo pali ici
1Samuel18:21 Atontonkenye ati
1Samuel18:22 Elyo Saulo akonkomeshe ababomfi bakwe ati
1Samuel18:23 Ababomfi babwekeshepo ukulanda amashiwi yamo yene aya mu nkaama kuli Davidi. Davidi nao atile kuli bena
1Samuel18:24 Ilyo ababomfi bakwa Saulo baebele Saulo ifyo Davidi asosele
1Samuel18:25 Saulo ayaswike ati
1Samuel18:26 Kanshi ilyo ababomfi bakwa Saulo baebele Davidi ifi fyonse
1Samuel18:27 Davidi na bantu bakwe baimine no kuya ipaya Abafilisiti imyanda ibili (200). Aletele inkanda shabo isha pa mpela ya bwaume no kutuula impendwa yonse ku mfumu pakuti nomba abe lumbwe wa mfumu. Elyo Saulo amupeele umwana wakwe umwanakashi Mika kukuba umukashi wakwe.
1Samuel18:28 Nomba ilyo Saulo aishibe ukuti Yawe ali na Davidi
1Samuel18:29 lyena Saulo alundilepo ukutiina Davidi no kumucita umulwani wakwe mu nshiku shakwe shonse.
1Samuel18:30 Elyo abakalamba ba fita fya Bafilisiti baishile ku bulwi
1Samuel19:1 Saulo aebele umwana wakwe umwaume Yonatani elyo na bonse ababomfi ukuti bepaye Davidi. Lelo Yonatani alitemenwe Davidi nganshi.
1Samuel19:2 Elyo amucenjeshako ati
1Samuel19:3 Ine ndi nokuya iminina pamo na batata mwibala umo ukafisama. Ndi nokulanda na batata pa mulandu obe kabili nkakweba fyonse ifikacitika.”
1Samuel19:4 Yonatani asosele ifisuma palwakwa Davidi kuli Saulo wishi nokutila kuli ena
1Samuel19:5 Tatiinine ukulufya umweo wakwe ilyo aipeye Umufilisiti
1Samuel19:6 Nao Saulo alyumfwile ifyasosele Yonatani. Elyo acitile no mulapo atila
1Samuel19:7 Kanshi Yonatani epakwita Davidi no kumweba ilyashi lyonse. Amuletele na kuli Saulo. Kabili Davidi alamutumika ngefyo alecita kale.
1Samuel19:8 Ilyo inkondo nakabili yatampile
1Samuel19:9 Elyo umupashi ubi ukufuma kuli Yawe waishile pali Saulo ninshi naikala mu ŋanda yakwe ne fumo lyakwe mu minwe. Nomba ilyo Davidi acili alelisha iseese
1Samuel19:10 Saulo alefwaya ukulasa Davidi ifumo ilyakuti amushintilishe ku cibumba
1Samuel19:11 Saulo atumine abaume abakuya mukulinda iŋanda yakwa Davidi pakuti bakamwipaye ulucelo. Lelo Mika umukashi wakwa Davidi amucenjeshako amweba ati
1Samuel19:12 Elyo Mika aishisha Davidi panshi ukupitila pa windo nao afulumuka pakuti apusuke.
1Samuel19:13 Elyo Mika abuula icilubi icakupangafye no kucilalika pa busanshi
1Samuel19:14 Ilyo Saulo atumine abantu abakuya ikata Davidi
1Samuel19:15 Kabili Saulo abwekeshepo ukutuma abantu kukumona Davidi abeba nokuti
1Samuel19:16 Lelo ilyo aba bantu baingile mu ŋanda
1Samuel19:17 Elyo Saulo atile kuli Mika
1Samuel19:18 Ilyo Davidi afulumwike pakuti apusuke
1Samuel19:19 Saulo aishile umfwa ukuti
1Samuel19:20 Kanshi Saulo epakutuma abantu abakuya mwikata. Lelo ilyo bamwene bakasesema balesesema
1Samuel19:21 Ilyo bamwebele Saulo pa fyacitike
1Samuel19:22 Pakulekelesha
1Samuel19:23 Lelo Umupashi wakwa Lesa waishile pali ena nao wine no kuya alesesema ilyo aleenda mpaka ku Naioti.
1Samuel19:24 Afumisheko ifyakufwala fyakwe ifyabufumu ayamba no kusesema pa cinso cakwa Samwele. Alele panshi muli kalya kasuba no bushiku bonse. E mulandu wine abantu basosela abati
1Samuel20:1 Elyo Davidi afyukile ukufuma mu Naioti ku Rama no kuya kuli Yonatani mukwipusha ukutila
1Samuel20:2 Yonatani epakumweba ati
1Samuel20:3 Lelo Davidi alapile umulapo nokutila
1Samuel20:4 Yonatani atile kuli Davidi
1Samuel20:5 Davidi epakweba Yonatani ati
1Samuel20:6 Bawiso nga bamona nshilipo
1Samuel20:7 Nga cakuti batila
1Samuel20:8 Eico iwe langafye uluse ku mubomfi obe
1Samuel20:9 Yonatani atile
1Samuel20:10 Davidi nao amwipwishe ati
1Samuel20:11 Elyo Yonatani amweba ati
1Samuel20:12 Kabili Yonatani aeba Davidi ati
1Samuel20:13 Lelo nga cakuti batata bakonenafye mukuti bakucitile ububi
1Samuel20:14 Lelo unkwatile uluse nga lulya ulwakwa Yawe ilyo ncili umumi
1Samuel20:15 Kanshi tecakwesha ukuleka ukutemwa aba mu lupwa lwandi
1Samuel20:16 Kanshi Yonatani epakupanga icipangano na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Davidi icakuti
1Samuel20:17 Elyo Yonatani aeba Davidi ukubwekeshapo umulapo wakwe uwa pa citemwiko amukwatile pantu alimutemenwe pamo ngefyo aitemenwe umwine.
1Samuel20:18 Elyo Yonatani aebele Davidi ati
1Samuel20:19 Pa bushiku bukalenga shitatu ilyo ciletwala mu cungulo
1Samuel20:20 Na ine nkalasa imifwi itatu kulya kwine ku ncende
1Samuel20:21 Elyo ndi nokutuma umulumendo nokumweba ati
1Samuel20:22 Lelo nga cakuti nasosa ku mulumendo natila
1Samuel20:23 Kabili pa mulandu uo iwe na ine twalanshenyepo
1Samuel20:24 Kanshi Davidi epakuya fisama mwibala. Kabili ilyo inshikunkulu ya mweshi upya yafikile
1Samuel20:25 Ukulingana no lutambi imfumu yaikele mu cifulo caiko lwa ku cibumba
1Samuel20:26 Saulo tasosele nangu cimo pali bulya bushiku
1Samuel20:27 Lelo mu bushiku bwakonkelepo
1Samuel20:28 Yonatani ayasuka ati
1Samuel20:29 Atile
1Samuel20:30 Saulo epakufulilwa Yonatani apakalamba nokutila kuli wena
1Samuel20:31 Iwe
1Samuel20:32 Elyo Yonatani aipusha wishi ati
1Samuel20:33 Elyo Saulo asumbula ifumo lyakwe pakuti amulase Yonatani. Neci ecalengele Yonatani ukuti eshibe ati caliba mapange yakwa wishi ukufwaya ukwipaya Davidi.
1Samuel20:34 Awe Yonatani aima afuma kwitebulo nafulwa nganshi. Na pali bulya bushiku bwacibili ubwa mweshi talilepo akantu nelyo kamo
1Samuel20:35 Ulucelo

1Samuel21:2 Davidi atile kuli Aimeleki shimapepo

1Samuel21:7 Nomba umubomfi wakwa Saulo umo alisangilwepo pali ubu bushiku uwalindikwe kuli Yawe. Ishina lyakwe ni Doegi umwina Edomu

1Samuel21:14 Elyo Akishi atile ku babomfi bakwe

1Samuel22:1 Elyo Davidi afumine ku Gati no kufyukila ku lucengo lwa Adulamu. Ilyo bamunyina pamo na ba mu ŋanda ya bantu bonse bakwa wishi baumfwile pali ifi fintu
1Samuel22:2 Bonse abantu abakwete ubulanda
1Samuel22:3 Ukufuma kulya Davidi aile ku musumba wa ku Misipa mu Moabu no kuya eba imfumu ya ku Moabu ati
1Samuel22:4 Kanshi epakubasha ku mfumu ya mu Moabu
1Samuel22:5 Lelo kasesema Gadi atile kuli Davidi
1Samuel22:6 Nomba Saulo alyumfwile ukuti Davidi na bantu bakwe nababasanga. Kabili Saulo ninshi ali ne fumo mu minwe yakwe naikala mwisamba lya cimuti ca Tamarisiki pa lupili lwa Gibea
1Samuel22:7 Elyo Saulo aeba bacilolo bakwe ati
1Samuel22:8 Bushe ifi fine e fintu filengele imwe mumfwane mukunsangukila? Pantu takwaba nangu umo uwanjeba ilyo umwana wandi acita icipangano no mwana wakwa Yese. Pali imwe
1Samuel22:9 Elyo Doegi umwina Edomu
1Samuel22:10 Aimeleki acimwipushishako kuli Yawe. Elyo amupeele ne mpao no lupanga lwakwa Goliati Umufilisiti.”
1Samuel22:11 Elyo imfumu yatuma uwakwita shimapepo Aimeleki mwana Ahitubu elyo no lupwa lwakwa wishi lonse
1Samuel22:12 Saulo abeba ati
1Samuel22:13 Saulo atile kuli wena
1Samuel22:14 Aimeleki ayaswike imfumu ati
1Samuel22:15 Bushe bulya bushiku ebwali ubwantanshi namwipushisheko kuli Lesa? Cacinefye teifyo iyoo! Mwileka imfumu ipeele umulandu umubomfi waiko
1Samuel22:16 Lelo imfumu yatile
1Samuel22:17 Elyo imfumu yaeba abalinshi abali ku lubali lwaiko aiti
1Samuel22:18 Elyo imfumu yaebele Doegi aiti
1Samuel22:19 Kabili mu musumba wa Nobu umwaleikala bashimapepo
1Samuel22:20 Lelo Abiyata umwana wakwa Aimeleki mwana Ahitubu
1Samuel22:21 Abiyata aya eba Davidi ukuti Saulo naipaya bashimapepo bakwa Yawe.
1Samuel22:22 Elyo Davidi atile kuli Abiyata
1Samuel22:23 Ikala na ine wine. Umuntu uyo uulefwaya ubumi bobe ninshi alefwaya no bumi bwandi bwine. Uli nokubafye uwasungwa bwino mukwikala na ine.”
1Samuel23:1 Nomba baebele Davidi ukuti
1Samuel23:2 Eico Davidi aipwishe kuli Yawe nokutila
1Samuel23:3 Lelo abantu bakwa Davidi batile kuli ena
1Samuel23:4 Kabili Davidi abwekeshapo ukwipusha Yawe
1Samuel23:5 Kanshi Davidi na bantu bakwe epakuya ku Keila. Balalwisha Abafilisiti no kusenda ifitekwa fyabo. Davidi acimfya Abafilisiti apakalamba no kupususha abena Keila.
1Samuel23:6 Nomba ilyo Abiyata mwana Aimeleki afulumukile kuli Davidi ku Keila nasenda ne cakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila wa bushimapepo ica efodi.
1Samuel23:7 Saulo alyumfwile ukuti Davidi ali ku Keila
1Samuel23:8 Elyo Saulo aita fyonse ifita fyakwe ku bulwi
1Samuel23:9 Ilyo Davidi aishibe ukuti Saulo alemupangila
1Samuel23:10 Elyo Davidi atile
1Samuel23:11 Bushe abekashi ba mu Keila bakampeela mu minwe yakwe? Bushe Saulo ali nokwisa kuno ukulingana nefyo umubomfi obe omfwile? Mwe Yawe
1Samuel23:12 Kabili Davidi aipusha ati
1Samuel23:13 Elyo Davidi na bantu bakwe ukulingana ne mpendwa imyanda mutanda (600)
1Samuel23:14 Davidi aikele mu ncengo sha mu matololo
1Samuel23:15 Davidi ilyo ali ku matololo ya Sifu
1Samuel23:16 Elyo Yonatani mwana Saulo aya kuli Davidi ku Horeshi no kumukoselesha pakuti abe uwashipa muli Lesa.
1Samuel23:17 Amwebele ati
1Samuel23:18 Bonse babili bacitile icipangano pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Elyo Yonatani aile kumwakwe
1Samuel23:19 Elyo abena Sifu baile kuli Saulo ku Gibea no kuya mweba ati
1Samuel23:20 Nomba we mfumu nga wasanga cakusekesha kuti waisa
1Samuel23:21 Elyo Saulo ayasuka ati
1Samuel23:22 Kabiyeni no kuyashininkisha bwino. Muye ishiba uko Davidi lyonse aya kabili ni nani uwamumonapo kulya kwine. Balinjeba ukuti Davidi muntu uwacenjela nganshi.
1Samuel23:23 Muye fwailisha bwino incende shonse isho abomfya elyo mukabweluluke ne cishinka icine cine kuli ine. Lyena tuli nokwisa ya na imwe. Nga cakuti ali mu ncende ine iyi
1Samuel23:24 Kanshi epakuya
1Samuel23:25 Saulo na bantu bakwe bayambile ukufwayafwaya. Kabili ilyo Davidi aumfwile pali ici
1Samuel23:26 Saulo alefwaila ku lubali lumbi ulwa lupili
1Samuel23:27 Nomba pali ilya ine nshita kwaishile inkombe imo kuli Saulo nokutila
1Samuel23:28 Elyo Saulo alekele ukufwaya Davidi no kubwelulukako aya mukukumanya Abafilisiti. Uyu e mulandu wine betila icifulo ici ukuti ni Sela Hamalekoti.
1Samuel23:29 Kabili Davidi alifumineko kulya no kuya ikala mu ncengo sha Eni Gedi.
1Samuel24:1 Ilyo Saulo abwelele ukufuma mukukunkunika Abafilisiti
1Samuel24:2 Saulo epakusenda abaume amakana yatatu (3
1Samuel24:3 Saulo afikile pa ncende apali macinka ya mpaanga ayali mu mbali ya nshila
1Samuel24:4 Abantu bakwa Davidi bamweba abati
1Samuel24:5 Davidi panuma yakucita ifi
1Samuel24:6 Atile ku bantu bakwe
1Samuel24:7 Ilyo apwa ukulanda aya mashiwi
1Samuel24:8 Panuma Davidi nao epakufuma mu lucengo no kubilikisha Saulo ati
1Samuel24:9 Davidi atile kuli Saulo
1Samuel24:10 Buno bushiku nauimwena we mwine ifyo Yawe akulubwilile mu maboko yandi mu lucengo. Bamo abantu bacinjeba abati
1Samuel24:11 Mona tata wandi
1Samuel24:12 Shi Yawe nabe kapingula pakati kobe na ine. Kabili Yawe nalandule ububifi bonse wacita kuli ine
1Samuel24:13 Pamo ngefyo insoselo shakale shitila
1Samuel24:14 Bushe ni kukulwisha nani imfumu ya Israeli yafumina? Nani uo mulekonka umusango uyu? Bushe ni mbwa iyafwa? Bushe lupantila?
1Samuel24:15 Lekeni Yawe umwine eo abe kapingula pakati ka iwe na ine. Umwine eo akashininkishe pa mulandu wandi no kuncitila umulinganya wakumfumya mu minwe yobe.”
1Samuel24:16 Ilyo Davidi apwile ukusosa ifi
1Samuel24:17 Saulo aeba Davidi ati
1Samuel24:18 Mona wanjeba ifisuma ifyo wancitila nombaline. Yawe ewacimpeela mu maboko yobe
1Samuel24:19 Ilyo lyonse umuntu asanga umulwani wakwe
1Samuel24:20 Ine ninjishibafye bwino bwino nomba ukuti iwe uli nokuba imfumu
1Samuel24:21 Nomba lapa kuli ine muli Yawe ukuti tawakonaule abana bandi nangu ukulofya ishina lyandi ukufuma mu lupwa lwakwa tata.”
1Samuel24:22 Davidi epakucita umulapo kuli Saulo. Elyo Saulo abwelelamo kumwabo
1Samuel25:1 Nomba ilyo Samwele afwile
1Samuel25:2 Umuntu umo uwa mu Maoni
1Samuel25:3 Ishina lyakwe ali ni Nabali. Elyo ishina lya mukashi wakwe ali ni Abigaili. Ali umwanakashi uwashilimuka nganshi kabili uwayemba mukumoneka
1Samuel25:4 Ilyo Davidi acili mu matololo
1Samuel25:5 Atuma abalumendo ikumi limo no kubeba ati
1Samuel25:6 Mutile kuli wena
1Samuel25:7 Nomba ningumfwa ukuti pali ino nshita ulebeya impaanga. Ilyo bakacema bobe bali na ifwe
1Samuel25:8 Ipusha ababomfi bobe
1Samuel25:9 Ilyo abantu bafikile
1Samuel25:10 Nabali pakwasuka ababomfi bakwa Davidi atile ati
1Samuel25:11 Bushe mulandu nshi ningalasendela umukate wandi pamo na menshi elyo ne nama njipeye ishakupeela bakabeya wandi
1Samuel25:12 Elyo abantu bakwa Davidi bapilibwike no kubwelelamo. Ilyo bafikile basosa yonse amashiwi kuli Davidi.
1Samuel25:13 Kabili Davidi nao atila ku bantu bakwe
1Samuel25:14 Nomba umubomfi umo uwakwa Nabali aebele Abigaili muka Nabali ati
1Samuel25:15 Nomba aba bantu bena bali abasuma nganshi kuli ifwe. Tabatalile abatucushapo nelyo limo pa nshita yonse twaleya mu mabala mupepi na bena
1Samuel25:16 Bali e linga lyesu ubushiku na kasuba ilyo lyonse twalecema impaanga mupepi nabo.
1Samuel25:17 Nomba tontonkanyenipo bwino no kumona ifyo mwingacitapo
1Samuel25:18 Awe Abigaili taposele inshita. Abuulile imikate imyanda ibili (200)
1Samuel25:19 Elyo aeba ababomfi bakwe ati
1Samuel25:20 Ilyo acili nanina pali punda wakwe aletentemuka ulupili
1Samuel25:21 Pali iyi nshita
1Samuel25:22 Nalapa ukuti Lesa nakacitile Davidi icili conse
1Samuel25:23 Ilyo Abigaili amwene Davidi
1Samuel25:24 Awa pa makasa yakwe elyo atile
1Samuel25:25 Ala we mfumu yandi wiposa amano kuli ilya mbifi ya muntu Nabali. Ulya muntu abafye ngefyo ishina lyakwe lipilibula. Ishina lyakwe lipilibula ukuti cipuba
1Samuel25:26 Nomba apo Yawe alikupokolola
1Samuel25:27 Kanshi nomba lekeni ubu bupe ubo umubomfi aletele kuli shikulu wandi
1Samuel25:28 Napapata belela kanakashi obe uluse pa bubi ubuli bonse
1Samuel25:29 Nangufye kube umuntu uulefwaya ukukwipaya
1Samuel25:30 Ilyo Yawe akafikilisha ukucita ifi fyonse kuli shikulu
1Samuel25:31 shikulu wandi takabe na matontokanyo yakulanguluka icisendo cakusumya umulopa apabula umulandu
1Samuel25:32 Elyo Davidi atile kuli Abigaili
1Samuel25:33 Naube uwapaalwa pa bupingushi bobe ubusuma elyo na pakundesha ukusumya umulopa muli buno bushiku
1Samuel25:34 Pantu mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo
1Samuel25:35 Elyo Davidi apokelele ukufuma ku maboko yakwa Abigaili ifyo amuletele
1Samuel25:36 Ilyo Abigaili afikikile kuli Nabali
1Samuel25:37 Elyo ulucelo
1Samuel25:38 Panuma ya nshiku ikumi limo Yawe apuma Nabali
1Samuel25:39 Ilyo Davidi aumfwile ukuti Nabali nafwa
1Samuel25:40 Ababomfi bakwa Davidi baya na ku Kameli ukwali Abigaili nokutila
1Samuel25:41 Awe Abigaili aima akontamina panshi nokutila
1Samuel25:42 Abigaili bwangu bwangu anina pali punda. Ababomfi bakwe abanakashi basano bamukonka. Awe nao akonka inkombe shakwa Davidi no kuya ba umukashi wakwe.
1Samuel25:43 Davidi ninshi alyupa Ainoamu uwa ku Yesireli kabili bonse baba abakashi bakwe.
1Samuel25:44 Lelo Saulo ninshi alipeela umwana wakwe umwanakashi Mika
1Samuel26:1 Abena Sifu baile kuli Saulo ku Gibea nokutila
1Samuel26:2 Kanshi Saulo epakwima
1Samuel26:3 Saulo acitile inkambi lubali lumbi ulwa musebo pa lupili lwa Hakila ukulolenkana na Yeshimoni. Lelo Davidi aikele mu matololo. Ilyo amona ukuti Saulo amukonka na kulya kwine
1Samuel26:4 atuma inengu kabili nasho shashininkisha ukuti Saulo cine cinefye nafika.
1Samuel26:5 Elyo Davidi aima no kuya uko Saulo acitile inkambi. Davidi amona apo Saulo na Abune umwana wakwa Neri
1Samuel26:6 Elyo Davidi aipwishe Aimeleki umwina Hiti elyo na Abishai umwana wakwa Seruiya
1Samuel26:7 Kanshi Davidi na Abishai epakuya ku fita ubushiku
1Samuel26:8 Elyo Abishai atile kuli Davidi
1Samuel26:9 Lelo Davidi atile
1Samuel26:10 Kabili Davidi asosa nokutila
1Samuel26:11 Yawe alindesha ukutambalika ukuboko pa wasubwa wakwe. Nomba kanshi buula ifumo ilili ku mutwe no lukunku lwa menshi ululi mupepi na ku mutwe wakwe
1Samuel26:12 Kanshi Davidi epakubuula ulukunku lwa menshi ne fumo mupepi no mutwe wakwa Saulo elyo baya. Tapali umuntu nangu umo uwamwene nangu uwaishibe pali ici
1Samuel26:13 Elyo Davidi ayabukila bushilya bubiye no kwiminina pa mulu wa lupili akatalamukila. Pali intamfu iyikalamba pa kati kabo.
1Samuel26:14 Davidi abilikisha ku fita na kuli Abune mwana Neri ati
1Samuel26:15 Davidi atile
1Samuel26:16 Ico mucitile te cisuma iyoo. Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo
1Samuel26:17 Awe Saulo aishiba ishiwi lyakwa Davidi
1Samuel26:18 Kabili alundapo nokutila
1Samuel26:19 Nomba shi lekeni shikulu imfumu yandi yumfwe ku mashiwi ya mubomfi wakwe. Nga cakuti ni Yawe ewamulenga ukuti munjimine
1Samuel26:20 Nomba wileka umulopa wandi witikile panshi ukutalwike ku cinso cakwa Yawe. Imfumu ya bena Israeli naifuma ilefwaya ine ngo lupantila
1Samuel26:21 Elyo Saulo atile
1Samuel26:22 Davidi ayasuka ati
1Samuel26:23 Ala Yawe apeela icilambu ukulingana no bulungami elyo ne cisumino ca muntu. Yawe acikupeela mu maboko yandi ilelo
1Samuel26:24 Ala mu cine ngefyo nacipeela umucinshi ku bumi bobe ilelo
1Samuel26:25 Elyo Saulo atile kuli Davidi
1Samuel27:1 Elyo Davidi atontonkanya mu mutima wakwe ati
1Samuel27:2 Kanshi Davidi pamo na bantu imyanda mutanda (600) abali nankwe baima nokuya kuli Akishi mwana Maoki imfumu ya ku Gati.
1Samuel27:3 Davidi pamo na bantu bakwe epakwikala mu Gati kuli Akishi. Cila muntu aikele no lupwa lwakwe. Elyo Davidi nao ali na bakashi bakwe babili Ainoamu uwa ku Yesireli elyo na Abigaili uwa ku Kameli
1Samuel27:4 Ilyo bamwebele Saulo ukuti Davidi nafyukila ku Gati
1Samuel27:5 Elyo Davidi aebele Akishi ati
1Samuel27:6 Kanshi pa bushiku bwine ubu
1Samuel27:7 Davidi aikele mu calo ca Bafilisiti umwaka umo ne myeshi ine.
1Samuel27:8 Elyo Davidi na bantu bakwe bafumine baya sansa abena Geshuri
1Samuel27:9 Kanshi lyonse ilyo Davidi alesansa incende
1Samuel27:10 Ilyo lyonse Akishi amwipusha ati
1Samuel27:11 Davidi tapuswishepo nangu umo umwaume nangu umwanakashi umutuntulu uwakusenda ku Gati
1Samuel27:12 Akishi alicetekele Davidi
1Samuel28:1 Mu nshiku shilya Abafilisiti balongenye ifita fyabo kukulwisha abena Israeli. Akishi atile kuli Davidi
1Samuel28:2 Davidi nao atile
1Samuel28:3 Nomba Samwele alifwile
1Samuel28:4 Abafilisiti balongene pamo mukucita inkambi ku Shunemu
1Samuel28:5 Ilyo Saulo amona impuka ya Bafilisiti
1Samuel28:6 Saulo epakwipusha Yawe
1Samuel28:7 Elyo Saulo atile ku babomfi bakwe
1Samuel28:8 Kanshi Saulo epakuifulunganya afwala insalu shimbi. Elyo ubushiku
1Samuel28:9 Lelo umwanakashi atile kuli ena
1Samuel28:10 Saulo epakulapa kuli ena muli Yawe ati
1Samuel28:11 Elyo umwanakashi aipusha ati
1Samuel28:12 Ilyo umwanakashi amwene Samwele
1Samuel28:13 Elyo imfumu yatile ku mwanakashi
1Samuel28:14 Asosa ku mwanakashi ati
1Samuel28:15 Samwele epakutila kuli Saulo
1Samuel28:16 Samwele nao atile
1Samuel28:17 Yawe ena nabomba ifyo asobele ukupitila muli ine. Yawe napokolola ubufumu mu maboko yobe no kubupeela kuli umo umwina mupalamano obe
1Samuel28:18 Pa mulandu wakukanabeela ifyo Yawe akwebele
1Samuel28:19 Yawe ali nokupeela bonse abena Israeli pamo na iwe mu maboko ya Bafilisiti. Kabili mailo iwe pamo na bana bobe muli nokuba pamo na ine. Yawe kabili ali nokupeela ifita fya bena Israeli ku Bafilisiti.”
1Samuel28:20 Awe bwangu bwangu Saulo awa panshi atambalala ku mwenso ukalamba
1Samuel28:21 Ilyo umwanakashi aishile kuli Saulo no kumona ifyo ali uwacushiwa nganshi
1Samuel28:22 Nomba napapata umfwa ku mubomfi obe no kuleka nkupeelekofye utwakulya tumo
1Samuel28:23 Nao alikene ati
1Samuel28:24 Umwanakashi ali ne ciponti icaina pa ŋanda pamwakwe
1Samuel28:25 Elyo apalamika kuli Saulo pamo na babomfi bakwe
1Samuel29:1 Abafilisiti balongenye ifita fyonse ku Afeki
1Samuel29:2 Ilyo bakateeka wa Bafilisiti baleenda mu milongo
1Samuel29:3 Elyo abakalamba ba fita ba Bafilisiti baipusha abati
1Samuel29:4 Lelo abakalamba ba Bafilisiti bakalipa nokutila
1Samuel29:5 Bushe teuyu wine Davidi bemba na mu lwimbo ilyo balecinda ulwakuti
1Samuel29:6 Kanshi Akishi epakwita Davidi nokutila kuli wena
1Samuel29:7 Kanshi nomba bwelelamo kabili wende umutende. Tecakwesha ukucita icintu nelyo cimo icishingasekesha bakateeka ba Bafilisiti!”
1Samuel29:8 Davidi atile
1Samuel29:9 Akishi ayasuka Davidi ati
1Samuel29:10 Eico mailo mukeme bwangu bwangu pamo na babomfi bakwa sokulu abaisa na iwe
1Samuel29:11 Kanshi Davidi na bantu bakwe baimine lucelocelo babwelelamo ku calo ca Bafilisiti. Abafilisiti nabo baimine baya ku Yesireli.
1Samuel30:1 Davidi na bantu bakwe bafikile ku Sikilagi mu bushiku bwalenga shitatu. Nomba ninshi abena Amaleki nabesa sansa mu matololo ya Negebu elyo na mu Sikilagi. Basansa Sikilagi elyo baoca no musumba.
1Samuel30:2 Kabili basenda na bankole abanakashi na bonse abali mu mushi
1Samuel30:3 Ilyo Davidi na bantu bakwe baishile ku Sikilagi basanga umusumba naocewa ku mulilo. Elyo abakashi babo
1Samuel30:4 Kanshi Davidi na bantu bakwe balalooshafye apakalamba mpaka na maka yakuloosha yapwa.
1Samuel30:5 Na bakashi bonse babili abakwa Davidi balibasendele muli bunkole
1Samuel30:6 Davidi aumfwile ubulanda nganshi pantu abantu balalanda pakumulasaula amabwe. Cila muntu ali uwakalipwa pa mulandu wa bana babo abaume elyo na bakashana. Lelo Davidi asangile amaka muli Yawe Lesa wakwe.
1Samuel30:7 Elyo Davidi aebele Abiyata shimapepo mwana Aimeleki ati
1Samuel30:8 Kabili Davidi aipusha Yawe ati
1Samuel30:9 Davidi elyo na bantu imyanda mutanda ali nabo bafikile ku kamana ka Beso
1Samuel30:10 Pantu imyanda ibili (200) iya bantu balinakile sana bafilwa no kwabuka umumana. Lelo Davidi na bantu imyanda ine (400) batwalilila ukuya balebafwaya.
1Samuel30:11 Awe basanga umwina Egupto umo mwibala bamuleta kuli Davidi. Bamupeelako amenshi yakunwa ne fyakulya.
1Samuel30:12 Bamupeelako akacipande ka mukate wa mukunyu uwakamwa
1Samuel30:13 Elyo Davidi atampa ukumwipusha ati
1Samuel30:14 Twasanshile aba mu matololo ya Negebu wa ku Kereti elyo ne calo ca bena Yuda na Negebu wakwa Kalebu. Elyo twasha twaoca na Sikilagi.”
1Samuel30:15 Davidi amwipusha ati
1Samuel30:16 Elyo atungulula Davidi uko baile. Ilyo bafikile
1Samuel30:17 Davidi abalwishishe ukufuma ulucelo mpaka ukufika na ku cungulo ca bushiku bwakonkelepo. Kanshi tapali nelyo umo pali bena uwafulumwike kanofye abalumendo imyanda ine (400) abaninine pa ngamila no kufulumuka.
1Samuel30:18 Davidi apokolwele icintu conse ico abena Amaleki basendele
1Samuel30:19 Tapali icintu nelyo cimo icabulilepo
1Samuel30:20 Davidi apokolwele ifitekwa ne ŋombe shonse isho batangishe ukucema pantanshi ya fitekwa fibiye
1Samuel30:21 Elyo Davidi afikile pa bantu imyanda ibili (200) abanakile nganshi mukumukonka
1Samuel30:22 Lelo abantu imbifi kabili abawelewele bonse abo bali nabo kabili abakonkele Davidi batila
1Samuel30:23 Elyo Davidi ayasuka ati
1Samuel30:24 Nga kanshi
1Samuel30:25 Kanshi Davidi acitile ici ukuba ifunde ne cebo ku bena Israeli
1Samuel30:26 Ilyo Davidi afikile mu Sikilagi
1Samuel30:27 Awe afituma na ku bali ku Betele
1Samuel30:28 Kabili atuma na ku Aroeli
1Samuel30:29 elyo na ku Rakali. Kabili atuma na kuli bonse abaleikala mu misumba ya bena Yerameli na ku bena Keni.
1Samuel30:30 Atuma na ku bali mu Homa
1Samuel30:31 elyo na ku Hebuloni. Kabili atuma na kuli bonse abali mu fifulo fimbi uko Davidi na bantu bakwe baendawike.
1Samuel31:1 Nomba ilyo Abafilisiti balwile na bena Israeli
1Samuel31:2 Abafilisiti bakonkele Saulo pamo na bana bakwe abaume pa maka nganshi. Kabili baipaya abana bakwe Yonatani
1Samuel31:3 Awe ubulwi bwabipisha nganshi pali Saulo. Elyo abamata basuka bamusanga no kumucena bubi bubi.
1Samuel31:4 Elyo Saulo aeba kasenda wa fyanso fyakwe ati
1Samuel31:5 Ilyo kasenda wa fyanso fyakwe amona ukuti Saulo afwa
1Samuel31:6 Kanshi Saulo
1Samuel31:7 Ilyo abena Israeli abali ku lubali lumbi ulwe shika na bonse abalungatene na Yordani bamona ukuti ifita fya bena Israeli fyafulumuka
1Samuel31:8 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo
1Samuel31:9 Baputula umutwe wakwa Saulo no kumufuula ifyanso fyakwe elyo batuma intumi mu calo conse ica Bafilisiti mukubila imbila mu matempele ya tulubi twabo
1Samuel31:10 Babika ifyanso fyakwe mwitempele lyakwa Ashitoreti
1Samuel31:11 Nomba ilyo abantu ba ku Yabeshi Gileadi baumfwile ifyo Abafilisiti bacitile kuli Saulo
1Samuel31:12 abantu babo bonse ababulamba balimine no kwenda ubushiku bonse ukuya ku Beti Shani. Basenda ifitumbi fyonse ifyakwa Saulo elyo ne fya bana bakwe abaume ukufuma ku cibumba ca Beti Shani no kuya ku Yabeshi
1Samuel31:13 Elyo basendele amafupa yabo no kuya yashiika mwisamba lya cimuti ca Tamarisiki ku Yabeshi. Kabili bafungile ukulya pa nshiku cine lubali.
2Samuel1:1 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Saulo
2Samuel1:2 Ubushiku bwalenga shitatu
2Samuel1:3 Elyo Davidi amwipusha ati
2Samuel1:4 Davidi amwipusha ati
2Samuel1:5 Elyo Davidi atile ku mulumendo uwamuletele ilyashi
2Samuel1:6 Umulumendo ayasuka ati
2Samuel1:7 Ilyo acipilibuka amona
2Samuel1:8 Elyo anjipusha ati
2Samuel1:9 Epakunjeba ati
2Samuel1:10 Kanshi efyo naciya palama pali ena no kumwipaya
2Samuel1:11 Awe Davidi na bantu bakwe bonse abo ali nabo babuula ifyakufwala fyabo no kulepaula.
2Samuel1:12 Baloosha no kulila elyo bafunga ukulya mpaka icungulo
2Samuel1:13 Elyo Davidi aipusha umulumendo uwamuletele ilyashi ati
2Samuel1:14 Elyo Davidi amwipusha ati
2Samuel1:15 Elyo Davidi aita umo pa bantu bakwe nokutila
2Samuel1:16 Elyo Davidi amweba ati
2Samuel1:17 Elyo Davidi aimbile ulwimbo lwa cililo pali Saulo no mwana wakwe Yonatani.
2Samuel1:18 Kabili akonkomeshe abena Yuda ukuti bafwile ukusambilisha ulu lwimbo lwakufwa ku buta
2Samuel1:19 “Ubucindami bobe we Israeli bwaipailwa pa mpili shobe. Iye impalume ifyo shafwa!
2Samuel1:20 Tecakwesha ukucilandapo mu Gati
2Samuel1:21 “Imwe mwe mpili sha Giliboa
2Samuel1:22 Ukufuma ku mulopa wa abo baipeye
2Samuel1:23 “Saulo na Yonatani abatemwikwa kabili abantu abasuma
2Samuel1:24 “Imwe mwe bana banakashi bakwa Israeli loosheni Saulo
2Samuel1:25 “Yangu ifyo impalume shafwila mu bulwi ee! Yonatani alala uwafwa pa mulu wa mpili shenu.
2Samuel1:26 Ndi no bulanda pa mulandu wa iwe Yonatani we munyinane. Wali umusuma nganshi kuli ine. Icitemwiko cobe kuli ine cali icawamisha
2Samuel1:27 “Yangu ifyo impalume shafwa ee! Ne fyanso fyabulwi nafiloba.”
2Samuel2:1 Nomba panuma ya ifi Davidi aipwishe Yawe ati
2Samuel2:2 Kanshi Davidi epakusenda abakashi bakwe bonse babili
2Samuel2:3 Elyo Davidi na bantu ali nabo
2Samuel2:4 Elyo abantu bakwa Yuda baya ku Hebuloni
2Samuel2:5 atumine inkombe ku bantu ba ku Yabeshi Gileadi no kubeba ati
2Samuel2:6 Nacibe ukuti Yawe amulange icitemwiko icishipwa na bucishinka bwakwe
2Samuel2:7 Kanshi nomba beni abakosa kabili abashipa apo Saulo imfumu yenu alifwa. Kabili iŋanda yakwa Yuda nainsuba ukuba imfumu pali bena.”
2Samuel2:8 Lelo Abune mwana Neri
2Samuel2:9 Aya cita Ishi Bosheti ukuba imfumu pa bena Gileadi
2Samuel2:10 Ishi Bosheti mwana Saulo ali ne myaka amakumi yane (40) ilyo aishile ba imfumu ya bena Israeli kabili ateekelepofye imyaka ibili. Nomba aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda bena bakonkele Davidi.
2Samuel2:11 Inshita iyo Davidi aikele pa bufumu mu Hebuloni pa ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda yakumene imyaka cine lubali na citika.
2Samuel2:12 Nomba Abune mwana Neri na babomfi bakwa Ishi Bosheti mwana Saulo bafuma ku Manaimu no kuya ku Gibeoni.
2Samuel2:13 Elyo Yoabu mwana Seruiya na babomfi bakwa Davidi nabo bafuma no kuya bakumanya pa cishiba ca Gibeoni. Akabungwe kamo kaikala bushilya bumo ubwa cishiba
2Samuel2:14 Elyo Abune atile kuli Yoabu
2Samuel2:15 Kanshi abalumendo epakwima no kubapenda. Abakwa Benjamini na Ishi Bosheti bali ikumi limo na babili (12)
2Samuel2:16 Cila umo aikata umulwani wakwe mu mutwe no kulasa ulupanga mu lubafu lwa mubiye no kuwa panshi bonse bafwa. Kanshi eco palya pa cifulo ca mu Gibeoni petilwa Helikati Hasulimu.
2Samuel2:17 Ubulwi pa bushiku bulya bwali ubwabipisha. Abune na bantu bakwe abena Israeli babacimfya ku bantu bakwa Davidi.
2Samuel2:18 Nomba abana batatu abakwa Seruiya eko bali Yoabu
2Samuel2:19 Asaeli epakukunkunika Abune
2Samuel2:20 Elyo Abune alolesha kunuma nokutila kuli ena
2Samuel2:21 Elyo Abune amweba ati
2Samuel2:22 Kabili Abune asoka Asaeli ati
2Samuel2:23 Nalyo line Asaeli akaanininafye ukuleka ukumukonka. Kanshi Abune epakulasa coco we fumo lyakwe cimfutyanuma mwifumo lyakwa Asaeli
2Samuel2:24 Lelo Yoabu na Abishai bena bakonkanyapofye ukukunkunika Abune. Kabili akasuba ilyo kalaba mukuwa
2Samuel2:25 Elyo abantu bakwa Benjamini balongana kunuma yakwa Abune bapanga akabungwe no kuya iminina abene pa mulu wa lupili.
2Samuel2:26 Abune abilikisha kuli Yoabu ati
2Samuel2:27 Yoabu ayasuka ati
2Samuel2:28 Elyo Yoabu alisha ipenga
2Samuel2:29 Abune na bantu bakwe baenda bushiku bonse nokulalanya Araba
2Samuel2:30 Elyo Yoabu abwelulwike kukukunkunika Abune
2Samuel2:31 Lelo abantu bakwa Davidi ninshi nabepayapo imyanda itatu elyo na makumi mutanda (360) abena Benjamini abali na Abune.
2Samuel2:32 Basenda icitumbi cakwa Asaeli no kuya mushiika mu nshinshi yakwa wishi ku Betelemu. Elyo Yoabu na bantu bakwe baenda nabatantama bushiku bonse nokuya fika ku Hebuloni ilyo bwaca.
2Samuel3:1 Ubulwi bwalitantalile pakati ka ŋanda yakwa Saulo ne yakwa Davidi. Davidi wena alekoselakofye nganshi
2Samuel3:2 Davidi atendeke ukukwata abana abaume ilyo ali ku Hebuloni
2Samuel3:3 Uwali uwacibili ni Kileabu nyina ali ni Abigaili mukamfwilwa wakwa Nabali umwina Kameli. Uwabutatu ni Abusalomu
2Samuel3:4 Umwana uwakulenga bune ni Adoniya nyina ali ni Hagiti. Uwalenga busano
2Samuel3:5 Elyo uwalenga mutanda ni Itilemu
2Samuel3:6 Mu nshita ya bulwi pakati ka ŋanda yakwa Saulo ne ŋanda yakwa Davidi
2Samuel3:7 Nomba Saulo ali no mukashi uo ashaupile mu bwinga
2Samuel3:8 Awe Abune afulwa nganshi pafyo Ishi Bosheti amwebele
2Samuel3:9 Shi Lesa nacitepo cimo pali Abune
2Samuel3:10 Alapile ukusesha ubufumu ukufuma ku ŋanda yakwa Saulo
2Samuel3:11 Ishi Bosheti afilwa ukuti alandeko amashiwi na yambi kuli Abune
2Samuel3:12 Elyo Abune atuma inkombe kuli Davidi ati
2Samuel3:13 Nao Davidi atila
2Samuel3:14 Elyo Davidi atuma inkombe kuli Ishi Bosheti
2Samuel3:15 Kanshi Ishi Bosheti epakutuma abakuya mupokolola ukufuma ku mulume wakwe Paliteli mwana Laishi.
2Samuel3:16 Lelo umulume wakwe akonkele panuma alelila nshila yonse mpaka ku Bahurimu. Elyo Abune atila kuli ena
2Samuel3:17 Elyo Abune aebele abakalamba ba mu Israeli nokutila
2Samuel3:18 Eico nomba citeni ici cintu! Pantu Yawe ewalaile Davidi ukutila
2Samuel3:19 Abune umwine aebako na bena Benjamini kabili aya na ku Hebuloni kukwebako Davidi fyonse ifyo abena Israeli ne ŋanda yonse iyakwa Benjamini balefwaya ukucita.
2Samuel3:20 Elyo Abune uwakwete abantu amakumi yabili (20) afikile kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni
2Samuel3:21 Elyo Abune atila kuli Davidi
2Samuel3:22 Tapapitile nshita
2Samuel3:23 Ilyo Yoabu ne fita fyonse ali nafyo bafika
2Samuel3:24 Kanshi Yoabu epakuya ku mfumu nokutila
2Samuel3:25 Walimwishiba Abune mwana Neri
2Samuel3:26 Ilyo Yoabu afumine kuli Davidi
2Samuel3:27 Nomba ilyo Abune abwelele ku Hebuloni
2Samuel3:28 Panuma ilyo Davidi aumfwile pali ici
2Samuel3:29 Shi umulopa wakwe wingapongolokela pa mutwe wakwa Yoabu na pali bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa wishi! Shi mu ŋanda yakwa Yoabu mwikalabula muntu ushikwete ifilonda ififumwa mafina nangu ifibashi
2Samuel3:30 Yoabu na munyina Abishai baipeye Abune pa mulandu wakuti nao aipeye Asaeli munyinabo mu bulwi bwa ku Gibeoni.
2Samuel3:31 Elyo Davidi aebele Yoabu na bantu bonse abo ali nabo ati
2Samuel3:32 Abune bamushiikile mu Hebuloni
2Samuel3:33 Imfumu epakwimba ulwimbo lwa malilo pali Abune ulwakuti
2Samuel3:34 Amaboko yobe tayakakilwe
2Samuel3:35 Elyo abantu bonse baishile nokupapata Davidi pakuti alye icakulya ilyo akasuba kaciliko. Nomba Davidi nao epakulapa ati
2Samuel3:36 Awe abantu bonse baishiba no kutemwa icine cine ngefyo conse ico imfumu yacitile calibasekeshe.
2Samuel3:37 Kanshi pali bulya bushiku abantu bonse
2Samuel3:38 Elyo imfumu yaebele abantu baiko ati
2Samuel3:39 Ilelo nshikwete amaka
2Samuel4:1 Ilyo Ishi Bosheti mwana Saulo aumfwile ukuti Abune nafwa mu Hebuloni
2Samuel4:2 Nomba uyu umwana wakwa Saulo umwaume ali na bantu babili abali intungulushi sha mpuka ishalesansa. Umo ni Baanaya umbi nao ni Rekabu. Bonse aba
2Samuel4:3 Pantu abantu ba mu Beroti bafulumukile ku Gitaimu no kuya ikala kulya kwine nga beni ukufika na mu bushiku bwa lelo.
2Samuel4:4 Nomba Yonatani mwana Saulo ali no mwana umwaume uwalemene amolu yonse. Ali ne myaka isano ilyo ilyashi lyakufwa kwakwa Saulo na Yonatani lyaishile ukufuma ku Yesireli. Umuleshi wakwe amusendele no kufulumuka
2Samuel4:5 Nomba Rekabu na Baanaya bamwana Rimoni umwina Beroti
2Samuel4:6 Baile mukati nankati ka ŋanda kwati nalimo balefwaya ukubula iŋanu shimo
2Samuel4:7 Nomba ilyo baingile mu ŋanda
2Samuel4:8 Awe bafisha umutwe wakwa Ishi Bosheti kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni nokutila ku mfumu
2Samuel4:9 Elyo Davidi epakwasuka Rekabu na ndume nankwe Baanaya bamwana Rimoni umwina Beroti ati
2Samuel4:10 ilyo umuntu umo anjebele ukuti
2Samuel4:11 Pali bufi ilyo ababifi ba bantu nga imwe baipaya umuntu uwakaele mu ŋanda yakwe kabili pa musengele wakwe
2Samuel4:12 Elyo Davidi apeela icipope ku bantu bakwe
2Samuel5:1 Elyo inko shonse isha bena Israeli shaishile kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni no kumweba ati
2Samuel5:2 Mu nshita shapita
2Samuel5:3 Elyo abakalamba ba bena Israeli bonse baishile kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni
2Samuel5:4 Davidi ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ilyo aishile pa bufumu
2Samuel5:5 Mu Hebuloni ateekele icalo ca Yuda imyaka cine lubali na citika. Elyo mu Yerusalemu ateekele Israeli pamo na Yuda pa myaka amakumi yatatu na itatu (33).
2Samuel5:6 Elyo imfumu Davidi na bantu baiko baile ku Yerusalemu kukulwisha abena Yebusi
2Samuel5:7 Lelo Davidi apokolwele ilinga lya Sioni
2Samuel5:8 Pali bulya bushiku
2Samuel5:9 Awe Davidi epakuya ikala mukati ke linga nokulaita umusumba ukuti wakwa Davidi. Akuulamo umusumba ukushinguluka
2Samuel5:10 Kabili amaka yakwa Davidi yaleya yalecililakofye
2Samuel5:11 Nomba Hiramu imfumu ya ku Turi yatumine inkombe kuli Davidi
2Samuel5:12 Elyo nao Davidi aishiba nokuti Yawe namusuminisha ukuba imfumu pa bena Israeli kabili nasansabalika ubufumu bwakwe pa mulandu wa bantu bakwe abena Israeli.
2Samuel5:13 Panuma
2Samuel5:14 Aya e mashina ya bana abo afyele kulya: Shamua
2Samuel5:15 Ibihali
2Samuel5:16 Elishama
2Samuel5:17 Ilyo Abafilisiti baumfwile ukuti nabasuba Davidi ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli
2Samuel5:18 Nomba Abafilisiti baisa no kusalanganina mwishika lya Refaimu.
2Samuel5:19 Elyo Davidi epakwipusha Yawe ati
2Samuel5:20 Kanshi Davidi epakuya ku Baali Perasimu no kuya bacimfya kulya kwine. Asosa nokuti
2Samuel5:21 Awe Abafilisiti basha no tulubi twabo kulya kwine
2Samuel5:22 Kabili Abafilisiti babwekeshapo ukwisa tantama mwishika lya Refaimu.
2Samuel5:23 Kanshi Davidi epakwipusha Yawe
2Samuel5:24 Eico bwangu bwangu nga waumfwa inshindo pa mulu wa fimuti fya basamu
2Samuel5:25 Davidi nao epakucita ifyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. Davidi aipeye Abafilisiti inshila yonse ukufuma ku Gibeoni ukufikafye na ku Gesa.
2Samuel6:1 Kabili Davidi alonganike pamo ifita ifyasalilwe ukufuma mu bena Israeli amakana amakumi yatatu (30
2Samuel6:2 Elyo Davidi na bantu bonse abasalilwe baima ukufuma ku Baala wa mu calo cakwa Yuda kukuya buula ukufuma kulya Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa
2Samuel6:3 Babika Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa peceleta ilipya pakupekanya ukuifumya mu ŋanda yakwa Abinadabu iyali pa mulu wa lupili. Usa na Ahio abana baume bakwa Abinadabu ebaletungulula ili celeta.
2Samuel6:4 Bafumisha iceleta panse ukufuma mu ŋanda yakwa Abinadabu iyali pa mulu wa lupili ninshi Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa ili pamulu. Elyo Ahio ewaletangila ku ntanshi ye celeta.
2Samuel6:5 Davidi ne ŋanda yonse iya bena Israeli ninshi bena balesefya na maka yabo yonse pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Samuel6:6 Ilyo bafikile ku lubansa batwilapo iŋanu ulwakwa Nakoni
2Samuel6:7 Awe Yawe afulilwa nganshi Usa
2Samuel6:8 Elyo Davidi nao afulwa pa mulandu wa cipyu cakwa Yawe pali Usa. Kanshi ukufika na mu bushiku bwa lelo cilya cifulo eco citilwa Peresi Usa.
2Samuel6:9 Davidi muli bulya bushiku atiinine Yawe nokutila
2Samuel6:10 Davidi tasuminisha ukuti Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe ifike kuli ena mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Lelo aitwalafye ku ŋanda yakwa Obedi Edomu umwina Gati.
2Samuel6:11 Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe yashele mu ŋanda yakwa Obedi Edomu umwina Gati pa myeshi itatu. Awe Yawe nao epakumupaala pamo na ba ŋanda yakwe bonse.
2Samuel6:12 Nomba imfumu Davidi yaumfwile ukuti
2Samuel6:13 Kanshi epakutila ati lyonse ilyo abakusenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe nga batampula intampulo mutanda
2Samuel6:14 Davidi ninshi afwele icakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi
2Samuel6:15 Kanshi Davidi na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli yonse
2Samuel6:16 Nomba ilyo baleingisha Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe mu musumba wakwa Davidi
2Samuel6:17 Ifi efyo baletele Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe no kuibika mu cifulo mukati ke tenti lintu Davidi aimike umwakwisa ifikilisha. Elyo Davidi acitile amalambo ya cakoca ne mituulo yakwampana pa cinso cakwa Yawe.
2Samuel6:18 Elyo panuma yakupwisha ukutuula amalambo ya cakoca ne mituulo yakwampana
2Samuel6:19 Elyo apeela umukate umo umo
2Samuel6:20 Nomba ilyo Davidi abwelele kukupaala aba mu ŋanda yakwe
2Samuel6:21 Davidi atile kuli Mikali
2Samuel6:22 Ndi nokubafye uwaicefya nganshi ukucila pali fino ndi. Kabili ndi nokuba uwasuulwa nganshi mu menso yandi ne mwine. Lelo kuli aba banakashi abasha ulandilepo
2Samuel6:23 Mikali nao umwana umwanakashi wakwa Saulo takwetepo abana ukufika na pa bushiku bwa mfwa yakwe.
2Samuel7:1 Panuma ya ifi
2Samuel7:2 Elyo Davidi atile kuli Natani kasesema
2Samuel7:3 Elyo Natani atile ku mfumu
2Samuel7:4 Lelo bulya bwine bushiku
2Samuel7:5 “Kabiye kebe umubomfi wandi Davidi
2Samuel7:6 Ine nshatala njikala mu ŋanda ukutula pa bushiku nafumishe abena Israeli mu Egupto ukushinta pa bushiku bwa lelo. Ine naikalilafye ukwendauka
2Samuel7:7 Monse umo nyendauka pamo na bena Israeli bonse
2Samuel7:8 “Eico nomba
2Samuel7:9 Lyonse mbafye na iwe konse uko wapitila
2Samuel7:10 Kabili nkapekanya incende iya bantu bandi abena Israeli
2Samuel7:11 Cili nokuba ukufumafye pa nshita nasontele abapingushi pakati ka bantu bandi abena Israeli. Kabili ndi nokulenga ukakwate ukutuusha ukufuma ku balwani bobe bonse. Kabili Yawe nasosa kuli iwe ati
2Samuel7:12 Ilyo inshiku shobe shikapwa kabili waya lala ukwalala ne fikolwe fyobe
2Samuel7:13 Uyu wine euli nokukuula iŋanda iye shina lyandi
2Samuel7:14 Ine nkaba wishi
2Samuel7:15 Lelo icitemwiko candi cena tacakatale acifuma pali ena
2Samuel7:16 Iŋanda yobe elyo no bufumu fili nokubelelela pe na pe pa cinso candi. Icipuna cabufumu cobe cili nokukoshiwa pe na pe.’”
2Samuel7:17 Awe Natani epakuya sosa amashiwi aya yonse kuli Davidi no kumulondolwela ubusokololo bonse.
2Samuel7:18 Elyo imfumu Davidi yaingile mukati no kwikala ku cinso cakwa Yawe
2Samuel7:19 Kabili kwati ifi fyacepa mu kumona kobe we Mfumu Yawe
2Samuel7:20 “Bushe finshi fimbi ificilile apa Davidi engasosa kuli iwe? Pantu umubomfi obe walimwishiba
2Samuel7:21 Pa mulandu we shiwi lyobe elyo ukulingana no bufwayo bobe
2Samuel7:22 “Kwena uli mukulu we Mfumu Yawe! Takuli umbi uwalingana na iwe. Kabili takuli Lesa umbi lelo kanofye iwe
2Samuel7:23 Kabili ni bani ababa nga bantu bobe abena Israeli pano isonde? Bushe kwaliba umushobo na umbi uo Lesa wabo aile lubula nga bantu abakwe umwine
2Samuel7:24 Pantu naushimpa abantu bobe abena Israeli nga bantu bobefye pe na pe. Kabili niwe Yawe waisa ba Lesa wabo.
2Samuel7:25 “Nomba kabili
2Samuel7:26 pakuti ishina lyobe licindamishe pe na pe. Elyo abantu bakatila
2Samuel7:27 “We Yawe umwine wa fita
2Samuel7:28 We Mfumu Yawe
2Samuel7:29 Nomba ube uwasekela mukupaala iŋanda ya mubomfi obe
2Samuel8:1 Nomba panuma ya ifi fyonse
2Samuel8:2 Kabili Davidi acimfya na bena Moabu. Abalalika panshi mu milongo
2Samuel8:3 Kabili Davidi alwishishe no kucimfya Hadadesa mwana Reobu imfumu ya ku Soba
2Samuel8:4 Davidi amupokolola amaceleta yakwe ikana limo (1
2Samuel8:5 Ilyo abena Aramu ba ku Damasiko baishile kukwafwilisha Hadadesa imfumu ya ku Soba
2Samuel8:6 Davidi epakubika utwamba twa bashilika bakwe mu calo ca bena Aramu wa ku Damasiko. Elyo abena Aramu nabo baba ababomfi bakwa Davidi
2Samuel8:7 Davidi apokolwele inkwela sha golide isha bakangalila ba fita bakwa Hadadesa no kushileta ku Yerusalemu.
2Samuel8:8 Ukufuma ku Beta na Berotai
2Samuel8:9 Kabili ilyo imfumu Toi iya ku Hamati yaumfwile ukuti Davidi nacimfya ifita fyonse ifyakwa Hadadesa
2Samuel8:10 yatuma umwana wakwe Yoramu ku mfumu Davidi mukumuposha no kumutasha pa kucimfya kwakwe mu bulwi na Hadadesa
2Samuel8:11 Elyo imfumu Davidi afituulile kuli Yawe
2Samuel8:12 Yafumine ku bena Edomu na bena Moabu
2Samuel8:13 Kanshi Davidi epakuba uwaishibikwa nganshi panuma yakubwela ukufuma kukulwisha abena Edomu amakana ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18
2Samuel8:14 Awe Davidi abikile utwamba twa bashilika mu ncende ishalekana lekana mu Edomu monse. Elyo na bonse abena Edomu baba ababomfi bakwa Davidi. Yawe alengele Davidi ukucimfya konse uko aya.
2Samuel8:15 Davidi ateekele icalo ca bena Israeli conse mu mulinganya. Alecita ubupingushi ubwacishinka ku bantu bakwe bonse.
2Samuel8:16 Yoabu umwana wakwa Seruiya ali e mukalamba wa fita. Yehoshafati umwana wakwa Ailudi ewali kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo.
2Samuel8:17 Sadoki umwana wakwa Aitubu elyo na Aimeleki umwana wakwa Abiyata ebali bashimapepo. Seraya nao ali ni kalemba wa milandu.
2Samuel8:18 Benaya umwana wakwa Yehoiyada ali e ntungulushi ya bena Kereti elyo na bena Peleti. Elyo bamwana Davidi nabo bali ni bampandamano ba mfumu.
2Samuel9:1 Elyo Davidi aipwishe ati
2Samuel9:2 Nomba kwaliko umubomfi umo uwa mu ŋanda yakwa Saulo
2Samuel9:3 Kabili imfumu yaipwishe ati
2Samuel9:4 Imfumu aiti
2Samuel9:5 Kanshi imfumu Davidi epakutuma abakumubuula ukufuma mu ŋanda yakwa Makiri umwana wakwa Amieli.
2Samuel9:6 Ilyo Mefibosheti umwana wakwa Yonatani
2Samuel9:7 Elyo Davidi amweba ati
2Samuel9:8 Elyo Mefibosheti akontama amupeela umucinshi nokusosa ati
2Samuel9:9 Elyo imfumu yaitile Siba
2Samuel9:10 Kanshi iwe pamo na bana bobe abaume elyo na babomfi bobe mwakulamulimina no kumuletela ifisabo pakuti umwishikulu wakwa sokulu elabulwa icakulya. Nomba Mefibosheti ena
2Samuel9:11 Elyo Siba epakwasuka imfumu ati
2Samuel9:12 Mefibosheti alikwetepo umwana umwaume umwaice uwe shina lya Mika. Elyo bonse abaleikala ku ŋanda kwa Siba balifye ababomfi bakwa Mefibosheti.
2Samuel9:13 Kabili Mefibosheti aikele mu Yerusalemu
2Samuel10:1 Ilyo ifi fyonse fyapitile
2Samuel10:2 Elyo Davidi atontonkanya ati
2Samuel10:3 bacilolo ba bena Amoni basosa kuli Hanuni abati
2Samuel10:4 Kanshi Hanuni epakwikata abantu bakwa Davidi
2Samuel10:5 Ilyo Davidi bamwebele pa fyacitike
2Samuel10:6 Ilyo abena Amoni bamona ukuti nabaleta ulupato pakati kabo na Davidi
2Samuel10:7 Ilyo Davidi aumfwa ifi
2Samuel10:8 Abena Amoni nabo epakufuma mu nkambi no kutantama mu mpuka shakulwilamo pa mpongolo ya musumba wabo. Lelo abena Aramu ba ku Soba na ku Rehobu na bantu ba ku Tobi elyo na Maaka
2Samuel10:9 Ilyo Yoabu amona ukuti kuli imilongo yabulwi kuntanshi elyo na ku numa yakwe
2Samuel10:10 Ifita fimbi ifyashala apeela mu maboko yakwa munyina Abishai kukufyangalila. Kabili afitantika ukulungamana na bena Amoni.
2Samuel10:11 Elyo Yoabu asosa ati
2Samuel10:12 Natube abakosa kabili abashangila pakuti tulwileko na maka abantu besu pamo ne misumba yakwa Lesa wesu. Shi Yawe nacitepo icilewama mu menso yakwe.”
2Samuel10:13 Kanshi Yoabu na bashilika ali nabo bafuma mukulwisha abena Aramu
2Samuel10:14 Cilya abena Amoni bamona ukuti abena Aramu balafulumuka
2Samuel10:15 Panuma ilyo abena Aramu bamwene ukuti babacimfya ku bena Israeli
2Samuel10:16 Hadadesa aita abena Aramu abaleta ukufuma kwishilya lya mumana wa Yufurate. Baya ku Helamu
2Samuel10:17 Ilyo Davidi bamwebele pali ici
2Samuel10:18 Lelo abena Aramu bafulumuka pantanshi ya bena Israeli. Kabili Davidi nao epakwipaya abali pa maceleta yabo imyanda cine lubali (700) elyo ifita fyabo ifya pa makasa amakana amakumi yane (40
2Samuel10:19 Ilyo imfumu shonse ishali ishinono kuli Hadadesa shamona ukuti nabacimfiwa ku bena Israeli
2Samuel11:1 Kabili pakwaluka kwa mwaka pa nshita ilya imfumu shifuma ukuya ku nkondo
2Samuel11:2 Icungulo cimo Davidi aima pa busanshi bwakwe no kwamba ukwendauka pa mutenge wa ŋanda ye sano. Lintu acili pa mutenge
2Samuel11:3 Elyo Davidi atuma uwakwipusha pali uyu mwanakashi. Umwaume asosa ati
2Samuel11:4 Elyo Davidi atuma abakuya mubuula. Awe nao aisa kuli Davidi no kulala nankwe. Pali iyi nshita ninshi Batisheba ali uwasanguluka ku kukowela kwakwe. Elyo abwelela kumwakwe.
2Samuel11:5 Umwanakashi uyu
2Samuel11:6 Davidi kanshi epakutuma amashiwi kuli Yoabu ati
2Samuel11:7 Ilyo Uria afikile kuli Davidi
2Samuel11:8 Elyo Davidi aeba Uria ati
2Samuel11:9 Lelo Uria taile kumwakwe ngefyo bamwebele
2Samuel11:10 Ilyo Davidi aumfwa ukuti Uria taciya ku ŋanda
2Samuel11:11 Uria atile kuli Davidi
2Samuel11:12 Elyo Davidi atila kuli ena
2Samuel11:13 Elyo Davidi aita Uria kukulya no kunwa nankwe
2Samuel11:14 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo ulucelo
2Samuel11:15 Muli kalata alemba atila
2Samuel11:16 Kanshi cilya Yoabu aba pakushinguluka uyu musumba
2Samuel11:17 Ilyo abantu ba mu musumba bafuma mukulwisha Yoabu
2Samuel11:18 Elyo Yoabu atumine kuli Davidi amashiwi yonse aya pa mulandu wa bulwi.
2Samuel11:19 Akonkomesha kapaso ati
2Samuel11:20 limbi aya mashiwi kuti yaimya ubukali ku mfumu
2Samuel11:21 Nga uwaipaye Abimeleki mwana Yerubesheti nani? Bushe te mwanakashi amulashile impelo ye libwe ukufuma pelinga pakuti afwe mu Tebeshi? Mulandu nshi mwaikalile mupepi ne linga?’ Nga cakuti yakwipusha pali ici
2Samuel11:22 Awe inkombe yalile
2Samuel11:23 Inkombe yaeba Davidi aiti
2Samuel11:24 Elyo abali na mata balashile ababomfi benu ne mifwi ukufuma pa cibumba no kwipayapo bamo abantu ba mfumu. Nakabili no mubomfi wenu Uria umwina Hiti nao nafwa.”
2Samuel11:25 Elyo Davidi aeba inkombe ati
2Samuel11:26 Ilyo muka Uria aumfwile ukuti umulume wakwe nafwa
