2Samuel12:1 Elyo Yawe atuma Natani kuli Davidi. Ilyo afika kuli ena
2Samuel12:2 Umukankala alikwete iŋombe ne mpaanga ishingi.
2Samuel12:3 Lelo umupina takwetefye nangu cimo kanofye akakota ka mpaanga ako ashitile. Alekakusha bwino no kukulila pamo nankwe elyo na bana bakwe. Kalepeelwako ifilyo fimo fine
2Samuel12:4 “Nomba kwaishile umulendo ku mukankala lelo umukankala afilwa ukubuulapo imo impaanga nangu iŋombe iyakuti apekanishishepo umulendo uwamufikilile. Mu nshita yakubuula impaanga yakwe
2Samuel12:5 Elyo Davidi aikatwa no bukali kuli uyu muntu
2Samuel12:6 Afwilefye ukubweseshapo impaanga shine pa kapaanga akakota kamo pa mulandu wa ici acitile
2Samuel12:7 Elyo Natani atile kuli Davidi
2Samuel12:8 Nine napeela iŋanda yakwa sokulu kuli iwe pamo pene na bakashi bakwa sokulu mu maboko yobe. Nine nakupeele iŋanda yakwa Israeli ne yakwa Yuda. Kanshi nga cakuti ifi fyonse naficepesha
2Samuel12:9 Bushe cinshi wasuulile ishiwi lyakwa Yawe nokucita icabubifi pa cinso cakwe? Iwe walipaya Uria umwina Hiti no kusenda umukashi wakwe
2Samuel12:10 Nomba ecalenga ulupanga talwakatale alufuma mu ŋanda mumobe pantu walinsuula no kusenda muka Uria umwina Hiti mukuba umukashi obe?’
2Samuel12:11 “Ifi efyo Yawe asosele
2Samuel12:12 Iwe wacitile mu bumfisolo
2Samuel12:13 Elyo Davidi aeba Natani ati
2Samuel12:14 Nomba pa mulandu wakuti naucita ici
2Samuel12:15 Panuma ilyo Natani aile kumwakwe
2Samuel12:16 Davidi nao epakupapata kuli Lesa pa mulandu wa mwana. Afungile ukulya no kuya mu ŋanda yakwe
2Samuel12:17 Elyo abakalamba ba mwisano lyakwe baisa iminina mu mbali yakwe pakuti bamwimye panshi
2Samuel12:18 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali
2Samuel12:19 Davidi amona ukuti ababomfi bakwe baletotoshanya elyo ailuka ukuti umwana nafwa. Aipusha ati
2Samuel12:20 Awe Davidi aima ukufuma panshi. Panuma yakowa
2Samuel12:21 Ababomfi bakwe epakumwipusha abati
2Samuel12:22 Davidi ayasuka ati
2Samuel12:23 Lelo nomba apo nafwa
2Samuel12:24 Elyo Davidi alakoselesha umukashi wakwe Batisheba
2Samuel12:25 Pantu Yawe amutemwa nganshi
2Samuel12:26 Kabili Yoabu ali pa bulwi ku Raba umusumba ukalamba ku bena Amoni no kupokolola uyu musumba wa mfumu.
2Samuel12:27 Elyo Yoabu atuma inkombe kuli Davidi nokutila
2Samuel12:28 Nomba longanikeni impuka ya fita fyonse no kwisa shinguluka
2Samuel12:29 Elyo Davidi alonganika impuka ya fita fyonse no kuya ku Raba kukulwisha no kupokolola umusumba.
2Samuel12:30 Abuula ne cisote cabufumu ukufuma ku mutwe wa mfumu yabo. Ukufina kwaciko kwali italanta lya golide limo
2Samuel12:31 Elyo afumya abantu abali mu musumba
2Samuel13:1 Ilyo ifi fyonse fyapitile
2Samuel13:2 Awe Amunoni tepakucululuka mu mutima
2Samuel13:3 Nomba Amunoni alikwetepo umunankwe ishina lyakwe ni Yonadabu umwana wakwa Shimeya
2Samuel13:4 Awe aipusha Amunoni ati
2Samuel13:5 Elyo Yonadabu amweba ati
2Samuel13:6 Awe Amunoni aya lambalala pa musengele apashanya kwati mulwele. Ilyo imfumu yaisa mukumumona
2Samuel13:7 Elyo Davidi atumine ishiwi kuli Tama kwisano ati
2Samuel13:8 Awe Tama epakuya ku ŋanda yakwa ndume yakwe Amunoni
2Samuel13:9 Epakubuula pani afumyapo umukate nokupeela Amunoni ukuti alye
2Samuel13:10 Elyo Amunoni aeba Tama ati
2Samuel13:11 Lelo ilyo atwala kuli ena ukuti alye
2Samuel13:12 Nao Tama atila kuli Amunoni
2Samuel13:13 Nomba ine
2Samuel13:14 Lelo Amunoni akaana ukumfwa kuli Tama
2Samuel13:15 Elyo Amunoni apata Tama nganshi
2Samuel13:16 Tama nao akaana
2Samuel13:17 Amunoni epakwita umubomfi wakwe nokumweba ati
2Samuel13:18 Awe umubomfi wakwe amufumya elyo aisalako ne ciibi panuma ilyo Tama afuma. Tama afwele umwingila wa maboko ayatali uwamutengo
2Samuel13:19 Tama epakuisuba imito mu mutwe no kulepula insalu ya mwingila wakwe afwele. Abika na maboko pa mutwe wakwe
2Samuel13:20 Elyo ndume yakwe Abusalomu asosele kuli Tama ati
2Samuel13:21 Ilyo imfumu yaumfwile fyonse ifi
2Samuel13:22 Lelo Abusalomu tatalile alanda ishiwi nangu limo kuli Amunoni
2Samuel13:23 Panuma ya myaka ibili
2Samuel13:24 Abusalomu epakuya ku mfumu nokutila
2Samuel13:25 Imfumu yamwasuka aiti
2Samuel13:26 Elyo Abusalomu atile
2Samuel13:27 Nomba mu mupatikisha wakwa Abusalomu
2Samuel13:28 Elyo Abusalomu apeela icipope ku babomfi bakwe ati
2Samuel13:29 Eico kanshi ababomfi bakwa Abusalomu bacitile ifyo Abusalomu abakonkomeshe ukucita kuli Amunoni. Elyo abana ba mfumu abaume bonse baima
2Samuel13:30 Ilyo bacili mu nshila baleya
2Samuel13:31 Awe imfumu yaima apo yaikele no kulepaula ifyakufwala fyaiko no kulambalala panshi. Kabili bonse ababomfi baiko abaiminine pantu yali
2Samuel13:32 Lelo Yonadabu mwana Shimeya
2Samuel13:33 Mwe shikulu wandi
2Samuel13:34 Ninshi pali iyi nshita Abusalomu nafulumuka. Nomba umulinshi umo uwaiminine ainuna amenso lwa pamulu elyo amona abantu abengi bali mu musebo
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabu nao asosa ku mfumu ati
2Samuel13:36 Ilyofye apwa ukulanda
2Samuel13:37 Lelo Abusalomu afulumwike no kuya kuli Talimai mwana Amihudi
2Samuel13:38 Panuma yakufulumuka kwakwa Abusalomu aile ikala ku Geshuri pa myaka itatu.
2Samuel13:39 Kabili umupashi wa mfumu Davidi walefuluka ukuya kuli Abusalomu
2Samuel14:1 Nomba Yoabu umwana wakwa Seruiya alishibe ukuti mu mutima wa mfumu muli ukufuluka Abusalomu.
2Samuel14:2 Kanshi Yoabu epakutumapo umuntu umo ku Tekoa no kuya letako umwanakashi uwamano ukufuma kulya kwine
2Samuel14:3 Elyo nomba uye ku mfumu no kuya landa aya mashiwi.” Elyo Yoabu epakumweba amashiwi yakuya landa.
2Samuel14:4 Ilyo umwanakashi uwafumine ku Tekoa aile ku mfumu
2Samuel14:5 Elyo imfumu yamwipusha aiti
2Samuel14:6 Ine ne mubomfi wenu nali na bana baume babili nomba ilyo bali mu mpanga balelwa no wakubalamununa tapali. Umo akomene umunankwe no kumwipaya.
2Samuel14:7 Nomba ulupwa lonse lwaimina umubomfi wenu
2Samuel14:8 Elyo imfumu yatile ku mwanakashi
2Samuel14:9 Lelo umwanakashi uwafumine ku Tekoa nao atila kuli ena
2Samuel14:10 Elyo imfumu nayo yayaswike aiti
2Samuel14:11 Elyo umwanakashi asosa ati
2Samuel14:12 Elyo umwanakashi asosa ati
2Samuel14:13 Umwanakashi atile
2Samuel14:14 Pantu tuli benakufwa
2Samuel14:15 “Kanshi nomba ninjisa kuli imwe mwe shikulu imfumu yandi ukuti nsose ici
2Samuel14:16 Pantu imfumu yalaumfwa
2Samuel14:17 “Eico nomba umubomfi wenu atontonkenye ukuti
2Samuel14:18 Elyo imfumu yatile ku mwanakashi
2Samuel14:19 Elyo imfumu yaipusha aiti
2Samuel14:20 Umubomfi wenu Yoabu ewacitile ifi pakuti umulandu ubele mu musango umbi. Shikulu wandi alikwata amano kwati ni malaika wakwa Lesa. Aleshiba conse icilecitika mu calo conse.”
2Samuel14:21 Elyo imfumu yatila kuli Yoabu
2Samuel14:22 Yoabu alambalala panshi ubukupeme panshi mukupeela umucinshi
2Samuel14:23 Elyo Yoabu aile ku Geshuri nokuya buula Abusalomu ukumubwesesha ku Yerusalemu.
2Samuel14:24 Lelo imfumu yasosa aiti
2Samuel14:25 Kanshi mu calo conse ica bena Israeli
2Samuel14:26 Inshita yonse ilyo amona ukuti umushishi wa ku mutwe wakwe wafulisha
2Samuel14:27 Abusalomu afyele abana batatu elyo no mwanakashi umo. Ishina lya mwana umwanakashi ali ni Tama. Tama ali umusuma nganshi mukumoneka.
2Samuel14:28 Abusalomu aikele imyaka ibili mu Yerusalemu ukwabula ukumonanapo ne mfumu.
2Samuel14:29 Elyo Abusalomu aita Yoabu pakuti engamutuma ku mfumu. Lelo Yoabu akaana ubwite bwakuya kuli ena. Kabili epakutumako intumi na imbi iyacibili
2Samuel14:30 Elyo asosa ku babomfi bakwe ati
2Samuel14:31 Elyo Yoabu aima aya ku ŋanda yakwa Abusalomu nokutila kuli ena
2Samuel14:32 Abusalomu ayasuka ati
2Samuel14:33 Kanshi Yoabu epakuya ku mfumu no kuyeba ici. Elyo imfumu yaita Abusalomu
2Samuel15:1 Ilyo ifi fyonse fyapitile
2Samuel15:2 Abusalomu aleima ulucelo no kwiminina pa mbali ya musebo uwaya ku mpongolo. Ilyo lyonse umuntu aisa na kasebo akakutwala ku mfumu kukupingulwa
2Samuel15:3 Elyo Abusalomu ali nokusosa kuli ena ati
2Samuel15:4 Abusalomu alundapo nokutila
2Samuel15:5 Elyo kabili umuntu onse ilyo aya kuli ena ukuti amukontamine pakumuposha
2Samuel15:6 Abusalomu efyo alecita ku bena Israeli bonse
2Samuel15:7 Nomba pa mpela ya myaka ine
2Samuel15:8 Ilyo umubomfi wenu aleikala ku Geshuri mu Aramu
2Samuel15:9 Elyo imfumu yamweba ati
2Samuel15:10 Elyo Abusalomu mu nkaama atuma inkombe monse mu nko sha bena Israeli mukusosa ati
2Samuel15:11 Kanshi abantu imyanda ibili (200) ebashindike Abusalomu ukufuma ku Yerusalemu. Aba bonse ebalalikwe nga bashimucindikwa. Kabili bena bali abakaele abashaishibe nangufye kamo pali uyu mulandu.
2Samuel15:12 Ilyo Abusalomu acili aletuula amalambo
2Samuel15:13 Kabili kwaishile umo uwakweba Davidi ukuti
2Samuel15:14 Elyo Davidi aeba ababomfi bakwe abo ali nabo mu Yerusalemu ati
2Samuel15:15 Elyo bacilolo ba mfumu bamwasuka abati
2Samuel15:16 Awe imfumu epakufuma na baŋanda bonse bamukonka. Lelo ashakofye abakashi bakwe abo asaupile mu bwinga ikumi limo kukusunga isano lya mfumu.
2Samuel15:17 Kanshi imfumu epakufuma na bantu bonse bamukonka. Elyo baya iminina pa ŋanda yakulekelesha.
2Samuel15:18 Abantu bonse baleenda balemupita mumbali
2Samuel15:19 Elyo imfumu yasosa kuli Itai umwina Gati aiti
2Samuel15:20 Iwe ni mailo waishilefye. Elyo ilelo wati tube abakwendauka bonse
2Samuel15:21 Elyo Itai ayasuka imfumu ati
2Samuel15:22 Elyo Davidi aeba Itai ati
2Samuel15:23 Abantu bonse mu calo bapumunapo imisowa ikalamba balalila ilyo balepita. Awe imfumu nayo epakwabuka umukonko wa Kidironi
2Samuel15:24 Abiyata epo ali pamo na Sadoki
2Samuel15:25 Elyo imfumu yaeba Sadoki aiti
2Samuel15:26 Lelo nga cakuti atila
2Samuel15:27 Imfumu nayo epakusosa kuli Sadoki shimapepo aiti
2Samuel15:28 Ndi nokuya mukulolela mu mawanga ya mu matololo mpaka ishiwi likafume kuli imwe mukanjebe.”
2Samuel15:29 Kanshi Sadoki na Abiyata epakusenda Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa no kuibwesesha ku Yerusalemu. Kabili eko baikala no kwikala.
2Samuel15:30 Lelo Davidi atwalilila ukunina ulupili lwa Miolifa. Ilyo alenina ulupili ninshi aleya alelila nokulila. Ku mutwe wakwe kwalifimbilwe kabili aleendafye ukwabula indyato ku makasa. Bonse abantu abo ali nabo
2Samuel15:31 Nomba Davidi bamweba ukuti
2Samuel15:32 Ilyo Davidi afikile pa mulu wa lupili
2Samuel15:33 Davidi asosa kuli ena ati
2Samuel15:34 Lelo nga cakuti wabwelelamo ku musumba no kusosa kuli Abusalomu auti
2Samuel15:35 Bushe bashimapepo Sadoki na Abiyata tabakabe na iwe kulya? Ulebeba conse ico uli nokumfwa mwisano lya mfumu.
2Samuel15:36 Abana babo abaume babili
2Samuel15:37 Kanshi Hushai umunankwe wakwa Davidi
2Samuel16:1 Ilyo Davidi acilile panono pa mulu wa lupili apo balepepela
2Samuel16:2 Elyo imfumu yaipusha Siba aiti
2Samuel16:3 Elyo imfumu yaipusha aiti
2Samuel16:4 Elyo imfumu yasosa kuli Siba aiti
2Samuel16:5 Ilyo imfumu Davidi yafikile ku Bahurimu
2Samuel16:6 Shimei aleposela Davidi pamo na bacilolo ba mfumu bonse amabwe
2Samuel16:7 Ilyo Shimei alelapisha alesosa ati
2Samuel16:8 Yawe nakulandula pa mulopa onse wasumya mu ŋanda yakwa Saulo
2Samuel16:9 Elyo Abishai mwana Seruiya atile ku mfumu
2Samuel16:10 Lelo imfumu yasosa aiti
2Samuel16:11 Elyo Davidi atile kuli Abishai na bacilolo bakwe bonse
2Samuel16:12 Nalimo kuti Yawe alolesha pa bulanda bwandi no kunambwilapo ubusuma pakulapishiwa ndepokelela ilelo.”
2Samuel16:13 Awe Davidi na bantu bakwe bakonkanyapo ukulaya mu musebo
2Samuel16:14 Imfumu na bantu yali nabo bonse bafika pa cifulo cakulalapo ninshi nabanaka nganshi. Kabili apa epo atuushishe.
2Samuel16:15 Nomba Abusalomu na bantu bakwe bonse aba mu Israeli baile ku Yerusalemu
2Samuel16:16 Elyo Hushai umwina Aki
2Samuel16:17 Elyo Abusalomu aipusha Hushai ati
2Samuel16:18 Hushai asosa kuli Abusalomu ati
2Samuel16:19 Elyo kabili
2Samuel16:20 Elyo Abusalomu atile kuli Aitofeli
2Samuel16:21 Aitofeli ayasuka ati
2Samuel16:22 Kanshi abantu epakwanshika itenti lyakwa Abusalomu pa mulu wa mutenge. Elyo nao Abusalomu alalala na bakashi abashaupilwe mu bwinga abakwa wishi mu menso ya bena Israeli bonse.
2Samuel16:23 Nomba mu nshiku shilya bumpandamano Aitofeli apeele bwali kwati muntu umo uuleipusha kuli Lesa. Ifi efyo bonse Davidi na Abusalomu balemona fyonse ifya bumpandamano bwakwa Aitofeli.
2Samuel17:1 Elyo Aitofeli atile kuli Abusalomu
2Samuel17:2 Ndeya mulwisha ilyo acili uwatompoka no kunaka. Kabili ndeya mutiinya. Elyo abantu bakwe nabo bali nokufulumuka. Elyo ndi nokukoma imfumu yekafye
2Samuel17:3 kabili nkabwesesha na bantu bonse kuli iwe. Imfwa ya muntu uo ufwaya ikalenga ukubwela kwa bonse. Abantu bonse bakaba umutende.”
2Samuel17:4 Ubupekanyo ubu bwaba busuma kuli Abusalomu pamo na bakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli.
2Samuel17:5 Lelo Abusalomu asosele ati
2Samuel17:6 Ilyo Hushai aisa kuli ena
2Samuel17:7 Nao Hushai epakwasuka Abusalomu ati
2Samuel17:8 Kabili atila
2Samuel17:9 Moneni na nombaline wena nafisama mu lucengo nangu ku ncende imbi. Nga cakuti Davidi na bantu bakwe ebabalilapo ukusansa ifita fyobe
2Samuel17:10 Ici cikalenga ukuti ne cita conse icashipa nganshi
2Samuel17:11 Kanshi ine ndekupanda amano yakutila
2Samuel17:12 Nomba ilyo tukamusansa konse uko akasangwa
2Samuel17:13 Nga cakuti abutukila mu musumba umo
2Samuel17:14 Abusalomu na bantu bonse abena Israeli epakusosa abati
2Samuel17:15 Elyo Hushai aebele Sadoki na Abiyata bashimapepo ati
2Samuel17:16 Eico nombalinefye tuma ishiwi no kweba Davidi auti
2Samuel17:17 Nomba Yonatani na Aimasi baleikala ku Eni Rogeli. Awe umubomfi umukashana eko aleya no kubeba
2Samuel17:18 Lelo akalumendo kamo kena kabamona no kweba Abusalomu. Kanshi bonse babili baima bwangu no kuya ku ŋanda ya umo mulumendo mu Bahurimu. Uyu muntu alikwete icishima mu lubansa lwa ŋanda yakwe
2Samuel17:19 Awe umukashi epakubuula icakukupika pa cishima
2Samuel17:20 Ilyo abantu bakwa Abusalomu baisa pa ŋanda ya uyu mwanakashi
2Samuel17:21 Panuma ya aba bantu ilyo baya
2Samuel17:22 Kanshi Davidi na bantu bonse abalemukonka baima no kwabuka umumana wa Yordani. Elyo na pakuca ulucelo
2Samuel17:23 Nomba Aitofeli ilyo amona ukuti tabakonkele ifyo abapandile amano
2Samuel17:24 Davidi aile ku Mahanaimu
2Samuel17:25 Elyo Abusalomu abikile Amasa ukuba umukalamba wa fita mu cifulo cakwa Yoabu. Amasa ali mwana wa muntu umo uo baleita ishina lya Yete umwina Israeli. Yete aupile Abigaili
2Samuel17:26 Abena Israeli na Abusalomu bacita inkambi mu calo ca bena Gileadi.
2Samuel17:27 Ilyo Davidi aishile ku Mahanaimu
2Samuel17:28 baleta ifyakusendamapo
2Samuel17:29 Baletele ubuci

2Samuel18:4 Elyo imfumu nayo yayasuka aiti
2Samuel18:5 Elyo imfumu yakonkomesha Yoabu
2Samuel18:6 Kabili ifita fyakwa Davidi fyaile mu mpanga mukulwisha abena Israeli. Elyo ubulwi bwabelele mu mutengo wa Efulemu.
2Samuel18:7 Abena Israeli babacimfya ku bantu bakwa Davidi. Kabili kwali impendwa iyikulu nganshi iya bantu abo baipeye ukulingana na bantu amakana amakumi yabili (20
2Samuel18:8 Ubulwi bwasalangenefye mu calo conse. Elyo umutengo nao waipeye abantu abengi ukucila na bafwile ku lupanga.

2Samuel18:10 Ilyo umuntu umo amona ici

2Samuel19:1 Elyo Yoabu aishile umfwa ukuti
2Samuel19:2 Kabili ukucimfya kwa fita fyonse pali bulya bushiku kwasangwike ukuloosha ku bantu bonse
2Samuel19:3 Awe abantu basokelele mu musumba pali bulya bushiku kwati ni filya abantu basokelela ne nsoni nga bafuma ku bulwi.
2Samuel19:4 Imfumu yafimbile ku menso no kulila umusowa uukalamba ileti
2Samuel19:5 Awe Yoabu aingila mu ŋanda umwali mfumu nokutila
2Samuel19:6 Pantu iwe watemwa abakupata elyo wapata abakutemwa. Ilelo walanga apabuuta ukuti abakalamba ba fita na bantu babo tabali cintu kuli iwe. Ine namona ukuti iwe nga wacisansamuka ilelo
2Samuel19:7 Nomba kabiye
2Samuel19:8 Kanshi imfumu epakwima no kwikala pa cipuna caiko pa mpongolo. Ilyo baeba abantu ukuti
2Samuel19:9 Mu ncendefye monse umwali inko sha bena Israeli
2Samuel19:10 Nomba Abusalomu
2Samuel19:11 Imfumu Davidi epakutuma ishiwi kuli Sadoki na Abiyata bashimapepo ati
2Samuel19:12 Imwe nimwe bamunyinane
2Samuel19:13 Kabili sosa kuli Amasa auti
2Samuel19:14 Awe Amasa epakwalula imitima ya bantu bonse abena Yuda kwatifye mutima wa muntu umo. Elyo batuma ne shiwi ku mfumu abati
2Samuel19:15 Elyo imfumu nayo yabwelela no kuya lwa ku Yordani. Abena Yuda nabo bonse eko baya mukukonkela imfumu ku Giligali no kuileta ku Yordani.
2Samuel19:16 Shimei umwana wakwa Gera
2Samuel19:17 Kabili ali na bena Benjamini ikana limo (1
2Samuel19:18 Elyo bonse bayabuka kukwabusha abana ba mfumu elyo no kubomba fyonse ifyo yalekabila. Ilyo Shimei umwana wakwa Gera ayabwike Yordani awile panshi ku cinso ca mfumu
2Samuel19:19 nokutila kuli ena
2Samuel19:20 Pantu ine ngo mubomfi wenu nalishiba ukuti nalibifya
2Samuel19:21 Elyo Abishai umwana wakwa Seruiya atile
2Samuel19:22 Elyo Davidi nao ayaswike ati
2Samuel19:23 Kanshi imfumu epakutila kuli Shimei
2Samuel19:24 Mefibosheti
2Samuel19:25 Ilyo afikile ukufuma ku Yerusalemu ukukonkela imfumu
2Samuel19:26 Nao ayasuka ati
2Samuel19:27 Kabili nabepesha no mubomfi wenu kuli shikulu imfumu yandi. Shikulu imfumu yandi aba kwati ni malaika wakwa Lesa
2Samuel19:28 Pantu ulupwa lwakwa tata lonse lwalingilefye ukuti shikulu imfumu yandi ilwipaye. Lelo mwapeele umubomfi wenu incende pali abo abalya petebulo lyenu. Bushe ni nsambu nshi ndi nasho ishakupapata ku mfumu nakabili?”
2Samuel19:29 Elyo imfumu yatila kuli ena
2Samuel19:30 Nao Mefibosheti atile ku mfumu
2Samuel19:31 Basilai umwina Gileadi
2Samuel19:32 Nomba Basilai ali mukote nganshi
2Samuel19:33 Elyo imfumu epakweba Basilai aiti
2Samuel19:34 Lelo Basilai nao ayasuka imfumu ati
2Samuel19:35 Ine nomba ndi ne myaka cine konse konse (80). Bushe ine kuti naishiba ukulekanya pakati kakuti ici cisuma nangu ukuti ici naco cibi? Bushe umubomfi obe kuti asonda icilyo ico ndyako neco nwako? Bushe na nombaline ncili ndeumfwa amashiwi ya bakemba abaume nangu abanakashi? Cinshi umubomfi wenu engabela icakufinya shikulu imfumu yandi?
2Samuel19:36 Umubomfi wenu alifye nokwabuka ne mfumu umumana wa Yordani intamfu iyinono. Nomba mulandu nshi imfumu inganambwila no kumpeela icilambu muli uyu musango?
2Samuel19:37 Shi umubomfi wenu lekeni abwelelemofye
2Samuel19:38 Elyo imfumu yatile
2Samuel19:39 Kanshi abantu epakwabuka no mumana wa Yordani
2Samuel19:40 Ilyo imfumu yayabukila ku Giligali
2Samuel19:41 Kabili moneni bwangu bwangu abantu bonse abena Israeli baleisa ku mfumu no kulasosa kuli yena abati
2Samuel19:42 Elyo abantu bonse abena Yuda bayasuka abena Israeli abati
