2Samuel20:1 Elyo kwali intalamisoka yamuntu
2Samuel20:2 Kanshi bonse abena Israeli epakusha Davidi nokulakonka Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri. Lelo abena Yuda bena mu cishinka bashala ne mfumu yabo
2Samuel20:3 Ilyo Davidi abwelele kwisano lyakwe mu Yerusalemu
2Samuel20:4 Elyo imfumu yasosa kuli Amasa ati
2Samuel20:5 Lelo ilyo Amasa aya mukwita Yuda
2Samuel20:6 Elyo Davidi atila kuli Abishai
2Samuel20:7 Kanshi abantu bakwa Yoabu
2Samuel20:8 Ilyo bacili pa cilibwe icikalamba icaba mu Gibeoni
2Samuel20:9 Elyo Yoabu asosa kuli Amasa ati
2Samuel20:10 Nomba Amasa tamwene ukuti Yoabu ali no lupanga mu minwe yakwe. Yoabu epakumulasa mwifumo
2Samuel20:11 Awe umo uwa mu bantu bakwa Yoabu aiminina pambali ya citumbi cakwa Amasa nokusosa ati
2Samuel20:12 Ninshi icitumbi cakwa Amasa cilefuntaukafye mu mulopa waciko mukati ka musebo. Uyu muntu amona nokuti fyonse ifita fyaimiminafye palya pene. Ilyo amona ukuti onse umuntu naiminina
2Samuel20:13 Na panuma ilyo Amasa aseshiwa mu musebo
2Samuel20:14 Uyu Sheba ninshi napita kale mu nko shonse isha bena Israeli ukufika na ku Abeli Beti Maka no kupitilila ukuya ku mpanga yonse iya bena Beri
2Samuel20:15 Bonse abantu pamo na Yoabu bashinguluka umusumba wa Abeli Beti Maka umwali Sheba. Batulumanika imina ya fisoso fya maloba ukufika ku musumba
2Samuel20:16 Umwanakashi wamano uwali mu musumba alabilikisha ati
2Samuel20:17 Nao aya kuli ena elyo amwipusha ati
2Samuel20:18 Awe umwanakashi atwalilila mukusosa ati
2Samuel20:19 Ifwe tuli aba mutende kabili aba cishinka mu Israeli. Imwe mulefwayafye ukonaula umusumba uuli e nyina mu Israeli. Cinshi ico mulefwaila ukumina icuma ca cishilano cakwa Yawe?”
2Samuel20:20 Yoabu nao epakwasuka ati
2Samuel20:21 Uyo teo e mulandu iyoo. Umuntu uwe shina lya Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri ukufuma ku calo ca mpili ica Efulemu
2Samuel20:22 Elyo umwanakashi aya ku bantu bonse no kubalondolwela amano yakwe. Nabo epakuputula umutwe wakwa Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri no kuuposela kuli Yoabu. Kanshi nao epakulisha ipenga
2Samuel20:23 Yoabu ali e mukalamba wa fita fyonse ifya bena Israeli. Benaya umwana wakwa Yehoiyada ali nao e mukalamba pa bena Kereti na bena Peleti.
2Samuel20:24 Adoramu nao ali kangalila wa bamulaasa. Yehoshafati umwana wakwa Ailudi nao ali ni kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo.
2Samuel20:25 Shefa ali ni kalemba wa milandu. Sadoki na Abiyata bali ni bashimapepo.
2Samuel20:26 Elyo Ira umwina Yairi nao ali shimapepo wakwa Davidi.
2Samuel21:1 Mu nshiku sha kuteeka kwakwa Davidi
2Samuel21:2 Awe imfumu epakwita abena Gibeoni no kulanda nabo. Nomba abena Gibeoni tabali ba mu bena Israeli iyoo
2Samuel21:3 Davidi epakwipusha abena Gibeoni ati
2Samuel21:4 Abena Gibeoni nabo bamwasuka abati
2Samuel21:5 Nabo kabili bayasuka imfumu ati
2Samuel21:6 shi tulubwilenifye abana abaume bakwe cine lubali tukabepaye no kubatwala pa lwalala mukubakulikila pa cinso cakwa Yawe ku Gibea icifulo cakwa Saulo uo Yawe asalile.” Nayo imfumu epakusumina aiti
2Samuel21:7 Lelo imfumu yalangulukila Mefibosheti umwana wakwa Yonatani mwana Saulo pa mulandu wa mulapo bacitile pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Samuel21:8 Lelo imfumu epakubuula Amoni
2Samuel21:9 Aba bonse imfumu Davidi yabalubwila na mu maboko ya bena Gibeoni
2Samuel21:10 Risipa umwana umwanakashi wakwa Aia abuula insalu shabulanda no kuyanshikila icakwikalapo pa mwalala. Ukufuma pa kwamba kwa kusombola mpaka imfula yaloboka ukufuma ku mulu yalokela na pa fitumbi
2Samuel21:11 Baebele Davidi ifyo Risipa umwana wakwa Aia acitile
2Samuel21:12 Ilyo Davidi aumfwileko
2Samuel21:13 Davidi epakuleta amafupa yakwa Saulo no mwana wakwe Yonatani ukuyafumya kulya
2Samuel21:14 Bashiikile amafupa yakwa Saulo na yakwa Yonatani umwana wakwe mu nshinshi yakwa Kishi
2Samuel21:15 Kabili kwali ubulwi pakati ka Bafilisiti na bena Israeli. Davidi atentemwike na bantu bakwe kukulwisha Abafilisiti. Davidi alinakile nganshi pali ubu bulwi.
2Samuel21:16 Elyo Ishibi Benobu
2Samuel21:17 Lelo Abishai mwana Seruiya epakwisa kuli Davidi kukumupususha. Awe alasapo Umufilisiti uyo
2Samuel21:18 Nomba umuyila inshiku
2Samuel21:19 Nakabili kwali ubulwi na Bafilisiti ku Gobu
2Samuel21:20 Nakabili ku bulwi na bumbi ubwacitike ku cifulo ca Gati
2Samuel21:21 Kanshi ilyo ena asebenye abena Israeli
2Samuel21:22 Aba bonse bane bali ba mu lupwa lwakwa Rafa mu Gati
2Samuel22:1 Davidi aimbile amashiwi ya muli ulu lwimbo kuli Yawe
2Samuel22:2 “Yawe e cilibwe candi
2Samuel22:3 Lesa wandi e cilibwe candi
2Samuel22:4 Ndekuuta kuli Yawe uwalinga ukulumbanya
2Samuel22:5 “Pantu amatamba ya mfwa yalinshingulwike
2Samuel22:6 Imyando ya ku calo ca bafwa yalimpombele. Elyo ne fiteyo fya mfwa fyali pa ntanshi yandi.
2Samuel22:7 Mu kupelelwa kwandi nalilile kuli Yawe
2Samuel22:8 “Isonde lyalitenkene no kusunkana
2Samuel22:9 Mu myona yakwe mwafumine icushi. Mu kanwa kakwe mwafumine umulilo uoca
2Samuel22:10 Afumine ku mulu no kwisa ikila pano panshi
2Samuel22:11 Kabili aninine na pali kerubi no kupupuka. Amonekele ninshi ali pa mapindo ya mwela.
2Samuel22:12 Alengele imfifi ukumushinguluka monse monse
2Samuel22:13 Ukufuma mu lubuuto lwa pa ntanshi yakwe
2Samuel22:14 Yawe abulukuta nge mfula mu mulu
2Samuel22:15 Aposa imifwi no kusalanganya abalwani
2Samuel22:16 Kabili panshi ya bemba palamoneka
2Samuel22:17 “Elyo atambalike ukuboko kwakwe ukufuma mu mulu
2Samuel22:18 Ampokolwele ku balwani bandi abamaka
2Samuel22:19 Banjimine mu bushiku bwa cinkunka candi
2Samuel22:20 Amfumishemo no kumbika apapabuka
2Samuel22:21 “Yawe nancitila ukulingana no bulungami bwandi. Ukulingana na bukaele bwa maboko yandi
2Samuel22:22 Pantu ine ndacita ififwaya Yawe
2Samuel22:23 Nshafumako ku mafunde yakwe yonse ayaba ku ntanshi yandi
2Samuel22:24 Kanshi ine ndi uwabula akalema ku cinso cakwa Yawe
2Samuel22:25 Eico Yawe nanambula ukulingana no bulungami bwandi. Kabili ukulingana no bukaele ubo amona muli ine pa cinso cakwe.
2Samuel22:26 “Ku wacishinka
2Samuel22:27 Kuli abo abapwililika
2Samuel22:28 Iwe upususha abaicefya
2Samuel22:29 Mu cinefye ala niwe cisaniko candi
2Samuel22:30 Ku maka yobe kuti nasansa impuka ya mulalo
2Samuel22:31 Lelo Lesa ena
2Samuel22:32 “Nga Lesa umbi nani
2Samuel22:33 Ala ni Lesa eumpangasha amaka
2Samuel22:34 Eulenga makasa yandi ukuba nga makasa ya nsebula
2Samuel22:35 Alasambilisha ne minwe yandi ku bulwi
2Samuel22:36 Kabili walimpeela inkwela ye pusukilo. Elyo ukwafwilisha kobe kuli ine ekwalenga ukuti njishibikwe.
2Samuel22:37 Kabili walikusha inshila umwakupita intampulo shandi
2Samuel22:38 Nakunkunike abalwani bandi no kubonaula
2Samuel22:39 Napwishishefye bonse umupwilapo
2Samuel22:40 Pantu walimpangeshe amaka yakulwilako
2Samuel22:41 Walengele na balwani bandi bamfutatile inuma shabo pakufulumuka
2Samuel22:42 Bafwaile uwakubafwa
2Samuel22:43 Nalibonawile baba ngo lukungu lwa panshi. Kabili nabanyantaula no kubakandawila baba kwati matipa ya mu musebo.
2Samuel22:44 “Walimpuswishe ukufuma ku bantu bandi abansangukila. Wansungilile kwati nine mukalamba wa mishobo. Abantu abo nshaishiba
2Samuel22:45 Abenafyalo baisa mukumpakata. Ilyo lyonse baumfwa cimo kuli ine
2Samuel22:46 Bena bonse baba abatompoka imitima
2Samuel22:47 “Nakalebalika kuli Yawe! Napaalwe na matotelo Icilibwe candi! Asumbulwe Lesa Icilibwe ce pusukilo lyandi!
2Samuel22:48 E Lesa uunandwilako
2Samuel22:49 Kabili uumpususha ku balwani bandi. We Yawe nimwe unsumbula mu mulu ukucila abalwani bandi. Wandubula ukufuma ku balwani bandi abafimfulunganya.
2Samuel22:50 “Eico kanshi ine ndifye nokulalumbanya iwe we Yawe pakati ka mishobo ya benafyalo. Ine ndifye no kulakwimbila ishamalumbo ishe shina lyobe.
2Samuel22:51 Ulalenga imfumu yobe ukucimfya
2Samuel23:1 Aya e mashiwi yakulekelesha ayakwa Davidi. “Ubusesemo bwakwa Davidi mwana Yese
2Samuel23:2 “Umupashi wakwa Yawe ulandila muli ine. Kabili amashiwi yakwe yabafye pa lulimi lwandi.
2Samuel23:3 Lesa wakwa Israeli nalanda
2Samuel23:4 aba kwati lubuuto lwa kacelo
2Samuel23:5 “Bushe iŋanda yandi tayaba ifi kuli Lesa? Pantu alipangana na ine icipangano ca pe na pe? Alicilondolola bwino muli fyonse kabili icakosa. Bushe takalete ipusukilo lyandi no kucita conse ico mfwaya?
2Samuel23:6 Lelo abantu babifi bena baba nge myunga ya mu matololo iyakuposafye
2Samuel23:7 Elyo umuntu onse pakuikatako
2Samuel23:8 Aya e mashina ya mpalume shabulwi shakwa Davidi: Yoshebu Basebeti umwina Takemoni
2Samuel23:9 Kabili uwamukonkelepo pali bumpalume ali ni Eleasa umwana umwaume wakwa Dodo umwina Ahoyi. Pamo nga umo uwali pa mpalume shitatu
2Samuel23:10 Awe Eleasa wena ashipa
2Samuel23:11 Uwakonka pali Eleasa ni Shamaya umwana mwaume wakwa Age umwina Harari. Ilyo Abafilisiti balongene pamo mu mpuka shabo pa cifulo cimo apali ibala lye landa
2Samuel23:12 Lelo Shamaya wena ashipa
2Samuel23:13 Elyo batatu pa ntungulushi amakumi yatatu (30)
2Samuel23:14 Pa nshita ilya Davidi ali mwilinga
2Samuel23:15 Awe Davidi nao alefwaisha amenshi elyo asosa ati
2Samuel23:16 Awe impalume shitatu shaima
2Samuel23:17 Atile ati
2Samuel23:18 Abishai munyina wakwa Yoabu umwana mwaume wakwa Seruiya ewali umukalamba pali ishi mpalume shitatu. Ena ewaimishe ifumo lyakwe alasaula abalwani imyanda itatu (300) no kubepaya. Elyo aisa ba ne shina ilyalumbuka nga aba bene batatu.
2Samuel23:19 Bushe ena tewalumbwike nganshi ukucila pali batatu? Icakuti aisa ba no mukalamba wabo
2Samuel23:20 Benaya umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoiyada
2Samuel23:21 Kabili aipaya no mwina Egupto uwalunduka nganshi. Nangu umwina Egupto akwete ifumo mu minwe yakwe
2Samuel23:22 Efintu ifyo Banaya umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoiyada acitile. Uyu nao wine ishina lyakwe lyali ilyaishibikwa kwati ni mpalume shitatu isha bantu.
2Samuel23:23 Ali uwacindikwa nganshi ukucila pali onse uwa pa makumi yatatu (30)
2Samuel23:24 Impalume shimbi isha mu ba makumi yatatu (30) ni aba: Asaeli munyina wakwa Yoabu
2Samuel23:25 Shamaya umwina Harodi
2Samuel23:26 Helesi umwina Paliti
2Samuel23:27 Abiesa umwina Anatoti
2Samuel23:28 Salimoni umwina Ahoyi
2Samuel23:29 Helebu umwana mwaume wakwa Baanaya umwina Netofa
2Samuel23:30 Benaya umwina Piratoni
2Samuel23:31 Abi Aliboni umwina Aribati
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba umwina Shaaliboni abana baume bakwa Yesheni
2Samuel23:33 Yonatani umwana mwaume wakwa Shamaya umwina Harari
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti umwana mwaume wakwa Ahasibai umwina Maakati
2Samuel23:35 Hesiro umwina Kameli
2Samuel23:36 Igali umwana mwaume wakwa Natani umwina Soba
2Samuel23:37 Seleki umwina Amoni
2Samuel23:38 Ira umwina Itira
2Samuel23:39 elyo na Uria umwina Hiti. Bonse pamo bali amakumi yatatu na cine lubali (37).
2Samuel24:1 Kabili ubukali bwakwa Yawe bwabwekeshepo ukwisa pa bena Israeli. Awe aluminisha Davidi pakuti abaletelele
2Samuel24:2 Elyo Davidi epakweba Yoabu ne ntungulushi sha fita fyali nankwe ati
2Samuel24:3 Lelo Yoabo nao ayasuka imfumu ati
2Samuel24:4 Awe imfumu yapatikisha Yoabu ne ntungulushi sha fita
2Samuel24:5 Panuma yakwabuka umumana wa Yordani
2Samuel24:6 Elyo baya ku Gileadi na ku calo ca Talitimu Hodishi
2Samuel24:7 Kabili baile ukulungama ku musumba we linga wa Turi elyo na kuli yonse imisumba ya bena Hifi na bena Kenani. Mukulekelesha elyo baile ku Beresheba mu matololo ya Negebu mu calo ca bena Yuda.
2Samuel24:8 Cilya bapwa ukupitana mu calo conse pa myeshi pabula ne nshiku amakumi yabili (20) babwelelamo ku Yerusalemu.
2Samuel24:9 Yoabu nao apeela ku mfumu impendwa ya bantu abo bapendele. Mu bena Israeli ababulamba bali amakana imyanda cine konse konse (800
2Samuel24:10 Davidi aumfwile umutima wakunta panuma yakupenda abantu ababulamba. Elyo asosa kuli Yawe ati
2Samuel24:11 Ilyo Davidi ashibwike mu lucelo lwakonkelepo
2Samuel24:12 “Kabiye kebe Davidi auti
2Samuel24:13 Kanshi nao Gadi epakuya kuli Davidi no kumweba ati
2Samuel24:14 Elyo Davidi ayasuka Gadi ati
2Samuel24:15 Kanshi Yawe epakutuma icikuko pa bena Israeli
2Samuel24:16 Lelo ilyo malaika atambalike ukuboko pa Yerusalemu kukuonaula
2Samuel24:17 Ilyo Davidi amona malaika uwaleipaya abantu
2Samuel24:18 Pa bushiku bwine ubu
2Samuel24:19 Davidi nao epakuya
2Samuel24:20 Ilyo Arauna alolesha no kumona imfumu na bantu baiko baleisa kuli ena
2Samuel24:21 Elyo Arauna asosa ati
2Samuel24:22 Awe Arauna ayasuka Davidi ati
2Samuel24:23 Moneni fyonse ifi
2Samuel24:24 Lelo imfumu yayasuka Arauna aiti
2Samuel24:25 Davidi akuulile Yawe ubulambo kulya no kutuula amalambo ya cakoca na yakwampana. Elyo Yawe aumfwile amapepo mwipunda lya calo
1Kings1:1 Imfumu Davidi yakota no kuba ne myaka iyingi icakuti yalakaana no kumfwa icikabilila nangu baifimba ifyakufimbana.
1Kings1:2 Eico ababomfi baiko batila kuli ena
1Kings1:3 Elyo bafwailisha mu calo conse ica Israeli mpaka basanga umukashana umusuma nganshi uwe shina lya Abishagi
1Kings1:4 Uyu mukashana ali umusuma nganshi kanshi ewayambile ukulabomba umulimo wakusunga imfumu
1Kings1:5 Nomba Adoniya
1Kings1:6 Lelo wishi tatalile amwipusha ukuti
1Kings1:7 Adoniya ayambile ukumfwana na Yoabu mwana Seruiya elyo na shimapepo ishina lyakwe ni Abiyata. Aba ebamupeele icikoselesho.
1Kings1:8 Lelo shimapepo uwe shina lya Sadoki
1Kings1:9 Elintu Adoniya atuula ilambo lya mpaanga
1Kings1:10 Nomba Natani kasesema
1Kings1:11 Elyo Natani aipwishe Batisheba no kumweba ati
1Kings1:12 Eico nomba leka nkupandeko amano pakuti upusushe umweo obe elyo no mweo wa mwana obe Solomoni.
1Kings1:13 Kabiye ku mfumu Davidi uye wipushe auti
1Kings1:14 Na ine nalaisa lingafye lilya line ucili ulelanda ne mfumu elyo nyingile nokwisa suminisha fyonse ifyo ulelanda.”
1Kings1:15 Nao Batisheba epakwingila mu muputule umwali imfumu umo umukashana Abishagi alesungila imfumu. Pali iyi nshita ninshi yalikota nganshi.
1Kings1:16 Ilyo aingila Batisheba afukama no kutota ku mfumu. Elyo imfumu yamwipusha aiti
1Kings1:17 Nao ayasuka ati
1Kings1:18 Nomba moneni
1Kings1:19 Adoniya natuula ne lambo lya ŋombe ishingi
1Kings1:20 Kanabesa we mfumu yandi
1Kings1:21 Pantu
1Kings1:22 Ilyo Batisheba acili alelondolwela imfumu amashiwi
1Kings1:23 Elyo ababomfi baeba imfumu abati
1Kings1:24 Natani elyo asosa ati
1Kings1:25 Lelo line acima no kuya tuula ilambo lya ŋombe ishingi
1Kings1:26 Lelo ine ne musha wenu
1Kings1:27 Bushe ici cintu niwe kanabesa we mfumu ucitile ukwabula ukwishibisha ababomfi bobe umuntu uuli nokwikala pa cipuna cobe we mfumu?”
1Kings1:28 Elyo imfumu Davidi yatila
1Kings1:29 Elyo imfumu yalanda amashiwi yamulapo aiti
1Kings1:30 ine pa bushiku bwa lelo nalafikilishapo ifyo nakulaile mwishina lyakwa Yawe
1Kings1:31 Awe Batisheba akontamika icinso cakwe panshi
1Kings1:32 Elyo imfumu Davidi yatila
1Kings1:33 “Buuleni ababomfi bandi bonse
1Kings1:34 Kulya eko Sadoki shimapepo na Natani kasesema baye musuba ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli. Muye lisha ne penga no kupunda amuti
1Kings1:35 Na pakwisa mwise nankwe pakuti eo ese ekale pa cipuna candi no kwamba ukuteeka. Nimusonta ukuti abe mfumu ya calo ca Israeli elyo na Yuda.”
1Kings1:36 Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ayasuka imfumu ati
1Kings1:37 Ngefyo Yawe ali na kanabesa imfumu yandi efyo abe na kuli Solomoni
1Kings1:38 Awe Sadoki shimapepo
1Kings1:39 Sadoki shimapepo epakubuula amafuta ayali mu lusengo ukufuma mwitenti lyakwa Lesa no kusuba Solomoni. Elyo baisa lisha ne penga na bantu bonse baisa punda abati
1Kings1:40 Elyo na bantu bonse baima bayamba no kumukonka
1Kings1:41 Cilyafye baba mukupwa ukulya
1Kings1:42 Lintu Yoabu talapwisha no kulanda
1Kings1:43 Yonatani ayasuka ati
1Kings1:44 Imfumu itumine pamo nankwe Sadoki shimapepo
1Kings1:45 Elyo Sadoki shimapepo na Natani kasesema nabaya musuba ukuba imfumu ku Gihoni. Ukufuma uko euko beshile baleyaula utupundu
1Kings1:46 Ne cikulishepo nomba cakuti Solomoni naya ikala na pa cipuna cabufumu.
1Kings1:47 Elyo na bacilolo bonse aba kwisano nabesa mukutasha kanabesa imfumu Davidi abati
1Kings1:48 Akonkanyapo no kupepa ati
1Kings1:49 Pakumfwa ifi fyonse abantu bonse abo Adoniya aitile baikatwa no mwenso
1Kings1:50 Lelo Adoniya pa mulandu wakutiina Solomoni
1Kings1:51 Elyo Solomoni baisa mweba abati
1Kings1:52 Solomoni epakwasuka ati
1Kings1:53 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yatumine abantu
1Kings2:1 Ilyo Davidi apalamine ku nshita yakufwa aitile umwana wakwe Solomoni no kumweba amashiwi aya ati
1Kings2:2 “Ine nomba napalamina ukuya ku nshila iyilolako ifikolwe fyonse. Eico ndefwaya ube umuntu uwakosa kabili umwaume uwashipa.
1Kings2:3 Ufwile ukuba umuntu uwakucita ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe Lesa obe afwaya. Uleenda mu nshila shakwe no kubaka amafunde yakwe ne fyebo fyakwe ne fipope fyakwe
1Kings2:4 Kabili ni pakuti Yawe akabe uwakufikilisha ubulayo bwakwe kuli ine
1Kings2:5 “Nomba iwe walishiba bwino ifintu ifyo Yoabu mwana Seruiya acitile kuli ine ilyo aipeye abakalamba ba fita fya nkondo ifya bena Israeli babili
1Kings2:6 Eico ukamucitile umwabela amano yobe
1Kings2:7 “Lelo ukalange uluse kuli bamwana Basilai uwa ku Gileadi
1Kings2:8 “Eico ibukisha Shimei mwana Gera umwina Benjamini uwa ku Baharumi ulya uwantukile insele ishingi nganshi bulya bushiku naile ku Manaimu ukuti epo acili. Ilyo aishile mukunkumanya pa mumana wa Yordani
1Kings2:9 Lelo nomba wimulinga ukuba uwakaele. Iwe uli muntu uwamano nganshi eico uli nokwishiba ifya kumucitila. Ukamonefye ukuti akengile mu calo ca bafwa ku mfwa yakusuuma umulopa.”
1Kings2:10 Elyo Davidi afwile no kuya lala ukwalola ifikolwe fyakwe
1Kings2:11 Ateekele icalo ca Israeli pa myaka amakumi yane (40). Imyaka cine lubali yali mu Hebuloni elyo imyaka amakumi yatatu na itatu (33) ateekele mu Yerusalemu.
1Kings2:12 Efyo Solomoni abuulile amalo yakwa wishi Davidi no buteeko bwakwe bwakwata amaka nganshi.
1Kings2:13 Nomba Adoniya
1Kings2:14 Elyo amweba ati
1Kings2:15 Asosa ati
1Kings2:16 Lelo ine ninkwatakofye icintu cimo ico ndelomba ukufuma kuli iwe
1Kings2:17 Nao akonkanyapo ati
1Kings2:18 Batisheba nao ayasuka ati
1Kings2:19 Batisheba nao aya na ku mfumu Solomoni mukuya landilako Adoniya. Ilyo afika
1Kings2:20 Batisheba nyina alanda ati
1Kings2:21 Elyo Batisheba nyina ati
1Kings2:22 Imfumu Solomoni yayasuka nyina aiti
1Kings2:23 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yalapa peshina lyakwa Yawe ati
1Kings2:24 Eico mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe umumi uwambika bwino pa cipuna cakwa tata Davidi kabili ampeela ne ŋanda ngefyo alaile
1Kings2:25 Apopene imfumu Solomoni yapeela ne cipope kuli Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ukuya ipaya Adoniya
1Kings2:26 Elyo imfumu yaebele Abiyata shimapepo ukuti
1Kings2:27 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yafumya Abiyata pa milimo ya bushimapepo bwakwa Yawe mukufikilisha amashiwi yakwa Yawe ayasoselwe ku Shilo palwa ŋanda yakwa Eli.
1Kings2:28 Ilyo amashiwi ya fyacitike yafika kuli Yaobu
1Kings2:29 Baisa eba imfumu Solomoni ukuti Yoabu nabutukila mwi Tenti lyakwa Yawe emo ekele kumbali ya bulambo. Elyo imfumu Solomoni yapeela icipope kuli Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ukuti
1Kings2:30 Benaya epakuya
1Kings2:31 Elyo imfumu yapeela Benaya icipope cakuti
1Kings2:32 Yawe euli nokumukanda pa mulopa asumishe pantu
1Kings2:33 No mulandu wa mulopa wa pali aba bantu uli nokutulumana pa mutwe wakwa Yoabu na ba mu lupwa lwakwe pe na pe. Lelo pali Davidi na ba mu lupwa lwakwe
1Kings2:34 Elyo Benaya mwana Yehoiyada aile no kuya koma Yoabu no kumwipaya
1Kings2:35 Imfumu yabika Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ukuba umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo pa malo yakwa Yoabu elyo yabika na Abiyata ukuba shimapepo pa cifulo cakwa Sadoki.
1Kings2:36 Elyo imfumu yaita Shimei no kumweba ukuti
1Kings2:37 Pantu ilyo lyonse ukafuma mu musumba no kwabuka umukonko wa Kidironi
1Kings2:38 Shimei ayasuke imfumu ati
1Kings2:39 Cilya papitafye imyaka itatu
1Kings2:40 Pakumfwa ifi apekanya kabalwe wakwe anina aya na kuli Akishi ku Gati mukufwaya abasha bakwe. Shimei aimine aya
1Kings2:41 Ilyo Solomoni bamweba ukuti Shimei nafuma mu Yerusalemu no kuya ku Gati elyo no kubwela
1Kings2:42 imfumu epakutuma abakuya ita Shimei no kumweba ati
1Kings2:43 Nga kanshi cinshi wafililwa ukusunga umulapo obe kuli Yawe elyo no kukanabeela icipope nakupeele?”
1Kings2:44 Imfumu yakonkanyapo ukweba Shimei aiti
1Kings2:45 Imfumu Solomoni ili no kwikala iyapaalwa
1Kings2:46 Imfumu epakupeela icipope kuli Benaya umwana umwaume wakwa Yehoiyada nao afuma aya koma Shimei no kumwipaya. No bufumu bwaikala na maka mu minwe yakwa Solomoni.
1Kings3:1 Solomoni ayambile ukumfwana na Farao imfumu ya mu calo ca Egupto icakuti aupa no mwana wakwe. Amuleta ukulaikala mu musumba wakwa Davidi mpaka ilyo apwile ukukuula isano lyakwe
1Kings3:2 Lelo abantu bena pali ilya nshita balepeelela amalambo mu ncende shakupepelapo isho balecindika
1Kings3:3 Solomoni alangile ukutemwa Yawe ukupitila mukwendela mu fipope fyakwa wishi Davidi
1Kings3:4 Imfumu elyo yaima no kuya ku Gibeoni mukutuula amalambo
1Kings3:5 Ni ku Gibeoni eko Yawe amonekele kuli Solomoni mu ciloto pa nshita ya bushiku no kumweba ati
1Kings3:6 Solomoni ayasuka ati
1Kings3:7 Apo iwe we Yawe Lesa wandi
1Kings3:8 Ine ne mubomfi obe ndi pano pakati ka bantu abo waisalila
1Kings3:9 Eico ine nalomba ukuti umpeeleko ne mubomfi obe umutima uwamano pakuti ndeteeka bwino kabili ndeiluka ukulekanya ububi no busuma. Pantu nani uwingabomba umulimo wakutungulula aba bantu bobe abashaicindamina?”
1Kings3:10 Ici casekeshe Yawe icakuti Solomoni alomba amano.
1Kings3:11 Na Lesa atile kuli ena
1Kings3:12 na ine nalakucitila ukulingana nefyo ulombele. Nalakupeela umutima uwamano no kwiluka ifyo umuntu nelyo umo tatala akwatako elyo kabili takwakabe uukakwatako.
1Kings3:13 Na ine nomba nalakulundilapo nefyo ushacilomba. Nalakupeela icuma no kucindama icakuti mu nshiku sha bumi bobe takwakabe imfumu iyikalingana nobe.
1Kings3:14 Kabili nga cakuti walaenda mu nshila shandi no kubaka ifipope fyandi na mafunde yandi ngefyo Davidi wiso acitile
1Kings3:15 Elyo Solomoni abuuka
1Kings3:16 Elyo kwaishile bacilende babili baisa iminina ku cinso ca mfumu.
1Kings3:17 Umo asosa ati
1Kings3:18 Panumafye ya nshiku shitatu ukutula apo umwana wandi afyalilwe
1Kings3:19 Pa nshita ya bushiku umwana wa uyu mwanakashi acifwa pantu acimwilikisha.
1Kings3:20 Elyo aisa ima pakati ka bushiku no kwisa senda umwana wandi apo ine nacilala ne musha wenu. Acibuula umwana wandi amulalika pa cifuba cakwe no kubuula umwana wakwe uwafwa amulalika pa cifuba candi.
1Kings3:21 Ilyo nacibuka ulucelo ukuti ŋonshe umwana
1Kings3:22 Umwanakashi umbi nao ayasuka ati
1Kings3:23 Imfumu yasosa aiti
1Kings3:24 Elyo imfumu yalanda aiti
1Kings3:25 Nayo imfumu epakupeela icipope aiti
1Kings3:26 Nyina afyele umwana uyo uwali umutuntulu aumfwila umwana wakwe uluse epakulanda ku mfumu ati
1Kings3:27 Elyo imfumu yapingula ukuti
1Kings3:28 Ilyo Israeli yonse yaumfwile ubupingushi bwa mfumu
1Kings4:1 Kanshi imfumu Solomoni yateekele icalo conse ica Israeli.
1Kings4:2 Na aba ebali bacilolo bakalamba: Asariya umwana umwaume wakwa Sadoki ewali shimapepo.
1Kings4:3 Eliolefu na Ahiya bamwana Shisha ebali bakalemba ba milandu. Yehoshafati mwana Ailudi ewali kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo.
1Kings4:4 Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ewali umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo. Sadoki na Abiyata ebali bashimapepo.
1Kings4:5 Asariya mwana Natani ewali umukalamba wa bacilolo balesunga imisumba. Sabudi mwana Natani nga shimapepo kabili nga cibusa wa mfumu.
1Kings4:6 Aisha nga kangalila mukalamba uwa kwisano. Adoniramu mwana Abuda nga kangalila wa bamulaasa
1Kings4:7 Solomoni alikwete na bantu ikumi limo na babili (12) abo asontele ukuba abalashi bafitungu mu calo conse ica Israeli kukubomba umulimo wakuleta ifyakulya fya mfumu ne fya kwisano. Cila umo ali nokuleta ukufuma ku citungu cakwe ifyakulya ifya mweshi umo cila mwaka.
1Kings4:8 Na aya e mashina yabo: Beni Huri ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu
1Kings4:9 Beni Dekeli ewali umulashi wa misumba ya Makasi
1Kings4:10 Beni Hesedi ewali umulashi wa misumba ya Aruboti
1Kings4:11 Beni Abinadabu ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Nafoti Dori. Uyu wine ewaupile Tafati mwana Solomoni.
1Kings4:12 Baana mwana Ailudi
1Kings4:13 Beni Geberi ewali umulashi wa musumba wa Ramoti Gileadi
1Kings4:14 Ainadabu mwana Ido ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Manaimu.
1Kings4:15 Aimasi ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Naftali
1Kings4:16 Baana mwana Hushai ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Asheri elyo na ku Aloti.
1Kings4:17 Yehoshafati mwana Palua ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Isaka.
1Kings4:18 Shimei mwana Ela ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Benjamini.
1Kings4:19 Geberi mwana Uri ewali umulashi wa calo ca ku Gileadi icaleteeka Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli elyo ne calo cakwa Ogi imfumu ya ku Bashani. Geberi ewalifye umulashi eka muli uyu musumba.
1Kings4:20 Abena Yuda na bena Israeli basandana bafula baba kwati musensenga wa pali bemba. Balalya no kunwa elyo no kusansamuka nganshi.
1Kings4:21 Kabili Solomoni aba kateeka pa shamfumu shonse sha fyalo ukufuma ku mumana wa Yufurate ukushintafye na ku calo ca Bafilisiti kabili mpaka ku mupaka wa calo ca bena Egupto. Ifyalo fyonse ifi fyalasonka kuli Solomoni
1Kings4:22 Ifyaletuulwa cila bushiku ku mfumu Solomoni fyali amatepe umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150) aya bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino elyo na matepe ya ŋanu nayo imyanda itatu (300).
1Kings4:23 Baletuula iŋombe ishaina ikumi limo
1Kings4:24 Pantu ateekele ishamfumu shonse ishali kwisamba lya mumana wa Yufurate ukufuma ku Tifisa ukushinta ku Gasa kabili aikele umutende ne fyalo fyonse ifya mumbali.
1Kings4:25 Mu nshiku shonse isha bumi bwakwa Solomoni
1Kings4:26 Solomoni akwete amacinka amakana amakumi yane (40
1Kings4:27 Bacilolo ba mu misumba
1Kings4:28 Baleleta ku ncende ya fitekwa cila muntu icipimo cakwe ica bale elyo ne cani icakuliisha bakabalwe bonse.
1Kings4:29 Lesa apeela Solomoni amano
1Kings4:30 Ukufula kwa mano yakwa Solomoni kwacila pa mano yakwete abaume ba ku kabanga no kucila na pa mano yonse aya bena Egupto.
1Kings4:31 Akwatisha amano ukucila umuntu onse ukucila na pali Etani umwina Esra
1Kings4:32 Solomoni ashikile amapinda ayafikile pa makana yatatu (3
1Kings4:33 Alondolola na palwa fimuti ukutulafye pa cimuti icalepesha ica keda wa ku Lebanoni ukufika na ku tumisambo twa hisopo tulya utumena mu fibumba. Asambilisha na pa mulandu wa nama
1Kings4:34 Bashibantu ukufuma mu nko shonse balaisa mukumfwa ku mano yakwa Solomoni
1Kings5:1 Ilyo Hiramu imfumu ya ku Turi yaumfwa ukuti Solomoni nasubwa ukuti eo apyane pa bufumu bwakwa wishi Davidi
1Kings5:2 Solomoni nao abweseshamo amashiwi aya kuli Hiramu ati
1Kings5:3 “Iwe nawishiba ukuti pa mulandu wa nkondo shalwile tata Davidi ukufuma ku mbali shonse
1Kings5:4 Lelo Yawe Lesa wandi nampeela umutende ukufuma ku mbali shonse
1Kings5:5 Eico nomba ndefwaya ukuti nkuulile Yawe Lesa wandi iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyakwe ukulinganafye ngefyo umwine Yawe aebele tata Davidi ilyo atile
1Kings5:6 “Eico iwe konkomesha abantu ukuti baye ntemenako ifimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda wa ku Lebanoni. Ndi nokutuma abantu abakwisa bomba na bantu bobe elyo kabili ndi nokulipila abantu bobe amalipilo yonse ayo uli nokupingula. Nawishiba ukuti ifwe tatwakwata abantu abacenjela ukuputula ifimuti nga bena Sidoni.”
1Kings5:7 Ilyo Hiramu aumfwa amashiwi yakwa Solomoni
1Kings5:8 Hiramu epakutuma amashiwi aya kuli Solomoni ukuti
1Kings5:9 Abantu bandi ebakulakulula imilando ukufuma ku Lebanoni ukutwala kuli bemba
1Kings5:10 Muli iyi nshila Hiramu akonkenyepo ukupeela Solomoni imilando yonse iyalefwaikwa iya fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda ne fimuti fya paini.
1Kings5:11 Solomoni nao alapeela Hiramu imingolo ya ŋanu iyafinine amakilo imintapendwa ibili (2
1Kings5:12 Yawe epakupeela Solomoni amano ukulingana nefyo amulaile. Paba no kumfwana ukwamutende pakati kakwa Solomoni na Hiramu icakuti bapangana ne cipangano.
1Kings5:13 Imfumu Solomoni yalemba na bantu abakubomba umulaasa amakana amakumi yatatu (30
1Kings5:14 Imfumu yalabatuma ku Lebanoni mu mabumba ya bantu amakana ikumi limo (10
1Kings5:15 Imfumu Solomoni yali na bakasenda wa fipe amakana amakumi cine lubali (70
1Kings5:16 Elyo akwata na bantu bambi amakana yatatu ne myanda itatu (3
1Kings5:17 Imfumu yapeela icipope icakushula amabwe ayakulu ukufuma ku mpili elyo ayabaswa ubusaka ayakukuulila mu mufula wa ŋanda.
1Kings5:18 Ababomfi bakwa Solomoni na bakwa Hiramu elyo na baume ba ku Gebali ebaleputaula imbao no kupekanya amabwe yakukuulile iŋanda yakwa Yawe.
1Kings6:1 Mu mwaka walenga imyanda ine na makumi cine konse konse (480) ukufuma apo abena Israeli bafumine mu Egupto
1Kings6:2 Iŋanda iyo imfumu Solomoni yakuulile Yawe yalepele icipimo amakubiti amakumi mutanda (60) mubutali
1Kings6:3 Umuputule wakwingililapo mu ŋanda walepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) mukucilinganya
1Kings6:4 Pa mawindo ya mu ŋanda apangilapo ifyakwikashapo ifyapikulwa.
1Kings6:5 Ashintilishe ku cibumba ce Tempele icikuulwa cimbi icakwete utumiputule utunono utwa mumbali.
1Kings6:6 Umuputule wa panshi mukucilinganya walepele icipimo amakubiti yasano
1Kings6:7 Pakukuula ŋanda yakwa Yawe balebomfya amabwe ayabashilwa libela kuntu yalefuma
1Kings6:8 Umwinshi wakwingilila mu muputule wa panshi uwabelele ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
1Kings6:9 Efyo akuulile iŋanda yakwa Yawe no kulipwishishisha. Abomfya imilando ne mbao sha cimuti icalepesha ica keda pakupalika umutenge.
1Kings6:10 Kabili akuula no tumiputule utunono ukushingulusha iŋanda. Ubutali bwacila kamo ukulola mumulu kali amakubiti yasano. Imilando ya fimuti fya keda eyaletusuntinkanya ku ŋanda.
1Kings6:11 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli Solomoni aliti
1Kings6:12 “Pali iyi ŋanda ulekuula
1Kings6:13 Kabili ndi nokwikala pakati ka bana bakwa Israeli elyo nshakabapose aba bantu bandi abena Israeli.”
1Kings6:14 Efyo Solomoni akuulile iŋanda yakwa Yawe no kuipwisha.
1Kings6:15 Apopele mukati ka cibumba imbao sha cimuti icalepesha ica keda ukufuma panshi ya mu ŋanda no kufika mu mutenge
1Kings6:16 Apaatulako umuputule umbi lwa mukati kunuma ya ŋanda yakwa Yawe uwalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili. Aimika imbao sha cimuti icalepesha ica keda mukati ka uyu umuputule ukufuma panshi mpaka mu mutenge. Uyu ewali Umuputule wamushilo icine cine.
1Kings6:17 Incende ya kuntanshi ka uyu muputule yalepele amakubiti amakumi yane ubutali.
1Kings6:18 Mukati ka ŋanda mwali imbao sha cimuti ca keda ishabaswapo inkombo na maluba ayabalula. Incende yonse yalifye imbao sha fimuti fya keda
1Kings6:19 Apekanya bwino Umuputule uwamushilo icine cine mukati ka ŋanda umwakubika Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe.
1Kings6:20 Umuputule uwamushilo cine cine mukati wali amakubiti amakumi yabili mubutali
1Kings6:21 Solomoni ashingula golide wine wine ku fibumba fyonse ifya mukati ka ŋanda
1Kings6:22 Elyo mukati monse ashingulamo golide
1Kings6:23 Mukati ka Muputule wamushilo icine cine apangilamo bakerubi babili ku cimuti ca miolifa abalepele amakubiti ikumi limo ukulola mumulu.
1Kings6:24 Ipindo limo kuli Kerubi wantanshi lyalepele amakubiti yasano ne pindo libiye nalyo amakubiti yasano
1Kings6:25 Kerubi wacibili nao alepa amakubiti ikumi limo pantu bonse babili bakerubi bali abapalana mu cipimo na mu nshiki.
1Kings6:26 Kerubi umo alepele amakubiti ikumi limo ukulola mu mulu
1Kings6:27 Ateka bakerubi bonse babili mukati ka Muputule wamukati ka ŋanda
1Kings6:28 Kuli bakerubi ashingulako golide.
1Kings6:29 Ku fibumba fyonse ifya mukati na kunse abashilako ifilengwa fya bakerubi
1Kings6:30 Elyo panshi ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe na panshi lwa kunse ya ŋanda napo ashingulapo golide.
1Kings6:31 Pa mwinshi wakwingilila mu Muputule wamushilo icine cine apangilapo ifiibi ifya mbao sha cimuti ca miolifa ne fimuti fya maingwe fisano.
1Kings6:32 Kabili pa fiibi fibili ifya mbao sha miolifa akambatikapo bakerubi ababaswa
1Kings6:33 Mu nshila imo ine apanga amaingwe aya mbali shine aya ku fimuti fya miolifa pa mwinshi wa mu muputule ukalamba.
1Kings6:34 Apanga ifiibi fibili ifya mbao sha ku fimuti fya paini cila cimo cali mu fipande fibili ifyapapikana nga baisula.
1Kings6:35 Abashilapo bakerubi
1Kings6:36 Kabili akuula ulubansa lwa mukati mu mitande itatu ku mabwe ayabaswa bwino no mutande umo ku milando iyasukulwa iya cimuti icalepesha ica keda.
1Kings6:37 Umufula wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe wapangilwe mu mwaka walenga bune mu mweshi wabubili ekutila umweshi washinde.
1Kings6:38 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na umo (11) mu mweshi wa lusuba lunono emukutila umweshi walenga cine konse konse
1Kings7:1 Solomoni aposelepo imyaka ikumi limo na itatu (13) pakuti apwishe ukukuula isano lyakwe.
1Kings7:2 Elyo akuulile isano ilyaitilwe “Umutengo wa ku Lebanoni
1Kings7:3 Umutenge wapangilwe ne mbao sha fimuti fya keda ishaikele pa mulu wa milando iyashintilile pa cibumba iyali amakumi yane na isano (45)
1Kings7:4 Amawindo yaiko yabikilwe mumulu mu mitande itatu
1Kings7:5 Iminshi yonse yakwete inceshi isha matungi yane. Eyabikilwe yatatu yatatu ku ntanshi ya ŋanda kabili yaleloleshanya.
1Kings7:6 Elyo akuula no muputule wa nceshi sheka sheka mubutali uwalepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) elyo mubwipi wali amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30). Kuntanshi abikako ulukungu ulwafimbwa no mutenge uwatungililwa ne nceshi.
1Kings7:7 Akuulile umuputule umwakwikala icipuna ca mfumu
1Kings7:8 Iŋanda ye sano iyakwe yali kunuma ya iyi ŋanda iyalimo icipuna cakwe
1Kings7:9 Aya yonse amayanda
1Kings7:10 Mu mufula wayako mwapangilwe na mabwe ayakulu kabili ayasuma ayalepele amakubiti ikumi limo
1Kings7:11 Pamulu napo pali amabwe ayapekanishiwa bwino
1Kings7:12 Ku lubansa lukalamba bashingulwisheko icibumba ica mitande itatu iya mabwe ayabaswa bwino elyo no mutande umo uwa milando iyasukulwa iya fimuti fya keda
1Kings7:13 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yatumine abakuya ita Hiramu umwina Turi elyo yaisa mupokelela.
1Kings7:14 Uyo nyina ali ni namfwilwa uwa mu luko lwakwa Naftali elyo wishi ali mwina Turi kafula wa mukuba. Hiramu ali umuntu uwaishibishe imilimo kabili uwacenjela nganshi mu milimo yonse iya pa mukuba. Aishile ku mfumu Solomoni no kwisa bomba bwino imilimo yonse iyo apeelwe.
1Kings7:15 Aengele inceshi shibili isha mukuba
1Kings7:16 Kabili apanga ne mitwe ibili ku mukuba uwayengululwa iyakubika pa mulu wa nceshi. Cila mutwe wali amakubiti yasano ukulola mumulu.
1Kings7:17 Apanga ne minyololo iyapikulwa nge citabataba aipomba ku mitwe iyali pa mulu wa nceshi. Cila mutwe wakwete iminyololo cine lubali.
1Kings7:18 Apanga amateke mu mitande ibili ukushinguluka icapikulwa cimo cimo ifyakuwaminisha imitwe iyali pa mulu wa nceshi. Acita cimo cine kuli cila mutwe.
1Kings7:19 Imitwe iyali pa mulu wa nceshi sha mu lukungu yali kwati maluba ayalepa amakubiti yane.
1Kings7:20 Pa mitwe yonse iyali pa nceshi pa ncende yapangilwe kwati ni nongo mupepi ne fyapikulwa epali amateke mu mitande ukushinguluka.
1Kings7:21 Ashimpile inceshi pa lukungu lwe Tempele. Uluceshi lwali ku kapinda ka ku kulyo alwinike ishina lya Yakini elyo lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso alwinike ishina lya Boasi.
1Kings7:22 Imitwe pamulu yali mu musango wa maluba. Efyo imilimo ya pa nceshi yapwile.
1Kings7:23 Apangile icishiba icaengululwa ku fyela
1Kings7:24 Pesamba lyaciko ashingulushapo inkombo ikumi limo kuli cila cipimo kubiti. Inkombo shatantikwa mu mitande ibili iyo bengelela lintu balepanga icishiba.
1Kings7:25 Icishiba caikele pali bacilume ba ŋombe ikumi limo na babili (12). Batatu baloleshe ku kapinda ka ku kuso
1Kings7:26 Ukutikama kwaciko kwali ngo lupi lumo
1Kings7:27 Apangile impanda isha mukuba ikumi limo ishakusesha. Cila lupanda lwalepele amakubiti yane
1Kings7:28 Ifi efyo impanda shapangilwe
1Kings7:29 Pali ishi mbao
1Kings7:30 Cila lupanda lwakwata imipeto ya mukuba ine ne misomali ya mukuba elyo cila lupanda lwakwata ne cakusambilamo icaikele pa fyakucifikilila fine ifyaengwa.
1Kings7:31 Ku lubali lwa mukati lwa cakutekapo paba icipunda icashinguluka ukufika apalepele kubiti umo mukushika. Ici icipunda cali icashinguluka elyo ne cakutekapo calepele mupepi na kubiti umo na citika. Ukushinguluka mu mbali ya cipunda mwali ifyabaswa. Amolu ya cakutekapo yali ayapapatala monse monse
1Kings7:32 Imipeto yonse ine yali mwisamba lya molu
1Kings7:33 Imipeto yapangwa kwati mipeto ye celeta. Imisomali
1Kings7:34 Icakutekapo conse cakwete ifyakwikatilako fine
1Kings7:35 Pa mulu wa cakutekapo pali umushingo uwashinguluka uwali citika wa kubiti ukulola mumulu. Ifyakutungilila elyo ne mikonso fyakakilwa pa mulu pa cakutekapo.
1Kings7:36 Abasa bakerubi
1Kings7:37 Ifi efyo apanga ifyakutekapo ikumi limo. Fyonse fyataminwe mu fikombola fimo fine elyo fyaba ifyapalana mu bukulu na mu musango.
1Kings7:38 Apangile ifyakusambilamo ikumi limo ifya mukuba. Cila musambilo walesunga amenshi ayali balita imyanda cine konse konse na makumi cine konse konse (880). Cila musambilo walepele amakubiti yane
1Kings7:39 Abika ifyakutekapo fisano ku kapinda ka ku kulyo aka ŋanda yakwa Yawe kabili fisano ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Abika icishiba ku lubali lwa ku kulyo lwa ku kabanga ka ŋanda.
1Kings7:40 Kabili apanga ne misambilo
1Kings7:41 Inceshi shibili
1Kings7:42 Amateke imyanda ine (400) aya ku minyololo ibili iyapikulwa
1Kings7:43 Ifyakutekapo ikumi ne misambilo nayo ikumi
1Kings7:44 Icishiba na bacilume ba ŋombe ikumi limo na babili (12) pesamba lyaciko.
1Kings7:45 Inongo
1Kings7:46 Ifi fyonse imfumu yafyengulwile kwibumba lya mwiwanga lya Yordani pakati ka Sukoti na Saretani.
1Kings7:47 Solomoni ashile ifi fipe ukwabula ukuti afipime pa mulandu wa bwingi bwafiko. Eico no kufina kwa mukuba takwaishibikwe.
1Kings7:48 Solomoni apangile ne fipe fyonse ifyakubomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe: Ubulambo bwa golide
1Kings7:49 Ifyakutekapo ifisaniko ifya golide iyaengwa bwino (fisano fyali ku kulyo kabili fimbi fisano ku kuso kuntanshi ya Muputule wamushilo icine cine)
1Kings7:50 Ifisambilo ifya golide wine wine
1Kings7:51 Ilyo imilimo yonse imfumu Solomoni abombele pakukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe yapwile
1Kings8:1 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yaitile kwisano ku Yerusalemu abakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli
1Kings8:2 Abaume bonse abena Israeli baisa longana pamo ku mfumu Solomoni pa nshita ya nshikunkulu mu mweshi uwalenga cine lubali ekutila umweshi wa Etanimu.
1Kings8:3 Ilyo abakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli bafikile
1Kings8:4 no kuleta Imbokoshi ya cipangano cakwa Yawe
1Kings8:5 Imfumu Solomoni no lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli abalongene kulya ali
1Kings8:6 Bashimapepo epakuleta Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe pa cifulo caiko mu Muputule wa mukati ka ŋanda uwamushilo icine cine no kuiteeka mwisamba lya mapindo ya bakerubi.
1Kings8:7 Amapindo ya bakerubi yayanshile pa mulu wa Mbokoshi icakuti yafimbilikisha kumo ne fimuti fyakupingilako fyaiko.
1Kings8:8 Ifi fimuti fyali ifitali icalengele nokuti impela yafiko ilemoneka ku bali mu Muputule wamushilo
1Kings8:9 Tamwali cintu cimbi mu Mbokoshi kanofye amabwe ayapapatala yabili ayo Mose abikilemo pa ncende ya ku Holebu palya Yawe apangile icipangano na bena Israeli ukutula apo bafumine mu Egupto.
1Kings8:10 Ilyo bashimapepo bafumine mu Muputule wamushilo elyo ikumbi lyaishile isula mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
1Kings8:11 Na pa mulandu we kumbi ili bashimapepo bafilwa no kubomba imilimo yabo pantu ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bwaisula mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
1Kings8:12 Elyo Solomoni atila
1Kings8:13 Ine ninkukuulila iŋanda iyacindama
1Kings8:14 Ninshi ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lucili nalwiminina palya pene
1Kings8:15 Elyo yalanda aiti
1Kings8:16 ‘Ukufumafye pa bushiku nafumishe abantu bandi abena Israeli ukufuma mu calo ca ku Egupto
1Kings8:17 Cali pa mutima wakwa tata Davidi ukukuula iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyakwa Yawe
1Kings8:18 Nomba Yawe atile kuli tata Davidi
1Kings8:19 Nomba teiwe uli nokukuula iŋanda
1Kings8:20 “Yawe nafikilisha ubulayo alaile. Nine napyana Davidi tata kabili nine naikala na pa cipuna ca bufumu bwa bena Israeli
1Kings8:21 Nimpekanya ne ncende ya Mbokoshi iyabamo icipangano Yawe apangene ne fikolwe fyesu ilyo abafumishe mu Egupto.”
1Kings8:22 Elyo Solomoni aiminine ku cinso ca bulambo bwakwa Yawe kuntanshi ukwalongene abena Israeli
1Kings8:23 “Iwe Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli
1Kings8:24 Naufikilisha ubulayo walaile umubomfi obe Davidi tata. Ku kanwa kobe eko walaile elyo ku kuboko kobe wafikilishapo nga fino fine caba ilelo.
1Kings8:25 “Lelo iwe Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli
1Kings8:26 Eico nomba
1Kings8:27 “Nomba bushe Lesa kuti aikala pano calo? Apofye imyulu nangufye imyulu ya pamulu teti imukumane
1Kings8:28 Lelo kutika kwipepo lya mubomfi obe na ku kupapata kwakwe ukwakubelelwa uluse
1Kings8:29 Shileka amenso yobe yesukile no kulalolesha pali iyi ŋanda ubushiku na kasuba
1Kings8:30 Umfwa ukupapata kwa mubomfi obe nokwa bantu bobe abena Israeli ilyo bapepa pali ino ncende. Shi wingalaumfwa ukufuma ku mulu uko waikala kabili ilyo waumfwa ulebelela uluse.
1Kings8:31 “Umuntu nga abifya umwina mupalamano wakwe kabili alefwaikwa ukwisa lapa
1Kings8:32 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu no kucita icilefwaikwa. Ulepingula pakati ka babomfi bobe no kupeela umulandu ku ulubile
1Kings8:33 Ilyo abantu bobe abena Israeli babacimfya ku balwani babo pa mulandu wa bubifi bwabo kuli we Yawe
1Kings8:34 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu no kubelela abantu bobe abena Israeli uluse pa fyabubifi fyabo. Kabili ukababweshe na ku calo wapeele ifikolwe fyabo.
1Kings8:35 “Ilyo imyulu yaisalika ne mfula yaleka ukuloka pantu abantu bacita ifyabubifi kuli iwe
1Kings8:36 elyo uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu no kubelela ababomfi bobe abena Israeli uluse pa fyabubifi fyabo. Elyo ukabafunde ne mbela isuma iyakwikalilamo
1Kings8:37 “Ilyo icipowe nangu icikuko caisa pa calo
1Kings8:38 kabili ilyo abantu bobe abena Israeli bapepa no kupapata
1Kings8:39 elyo ukaleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu
1Kings8:40 Ulecita ifi pakuti balekutiina ne nshita yonse iya bumi bwabo mu calo wapeele ifikolwe fyesu.
1Kings8:41 “Na pa mulandu wa mweni uushili mu bantu bobe abena Israeli
1Kings8:42 pantu abantu bali nokumfwa ubukulu bwe shina lyobe na maka ya kuboko kobe nefyo kwatambalala. Ilyo aba bantu baisa pali ino ŋanda mukupepa
1Kings8:43 nalyo line uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu
1Kings8:44 “Ilyo abantu bobe baya ku nkondo mukulwisha abalwani babo
1Kings8:45 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu amapepo yabo no kupapata kwabo elyo no kubapeela ukucimfya.
1Kings8:46 “Abantu nga bakubifya
1Kings8:47 kabili nga cakuti bapilibula imitima ilyo bali muli cilya calo muli bunkole
1Kings8:48 elyo bapilibukila kuli iwe ne mitima yabo yonse ne myeo yabo mu calo ca balwani ababasenda bunkole
1Kings8:49 elyo uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu incende waikalako
1Kings8:50 Kabili ulebelela abantu bobe uluse abacitile ifyabubifi kuli iwe
1Kings8:51 pantu bantu bobe kabili abacishilano cobe
1Kings8:52 “Uleke amenso yobe yesuke ku kupapata kwa babomfi bobe na ku kupapata kwa bantu bobe abena Israeli
1Kings8:53 Pantu walibapatula ukufuma mu nko shonse isha pano isonde kukuba abacishilano cobe ngefyo wakonkomeshe ukupitila mu mubomfi obe Mose ilyo iwe we Mfumu Yawe
1Kings8:54 Ilyo Solomoni apwile ukupepa no kulomba kuli Yawe
1Kings8:55 Aiminina no kupaala ibumba lyonse ilya bena Israeli mwishiwi ilikalamba no kutila
1Kings8:56 “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe
1Kings8:57 Yawe Lesa wesu abe na ifwe ngefyo ali ne fikolwe fyesu
1Kings8:58 Alenge imitima yesu ukupilibukila uko ali
1Kings8:59 Kabili na mashiwi yonse ndelanda
1Kings8:60 pakuti na bantu bonse aba pano isonde beshibe ukuti Yawe ni Lesa kabili takwaba na umbi.
1Kings8:61 Lelo imitima yenu ifwile ukuba iyacishinka kuli Yawe Lesa wesu
1Kings8:62 Elyo imfumu na bena Israeli bonse abalipo batuulile amalambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe.
1Kings8:63 Solomoni atuula amalambo yakwampana kuli Yawe
1Kings8:64 Pa bushiku bwine bulya
1Kings8:65 Kanshi Solomoni na bena Israeli bonse ali nabo pali ilya nshita epakusefya inshikunkulu. Abantu bali abengi abafumine ukutendekela ku Lebo Hamati ukufika na ku kamana mainsa aka pa mupaka wa calo ca Egupto. Basefeshe iyi nshikunkulu pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wesu pa nshiku cine lubali ukulundapo na shimbi cine lubali
1Kings8:66 Pa bushiku bwakonkelepo asalanganya abantu bonse. Abantu nabo batasha imfumu
1Kings9:1 Ilyo imfumu Solomoni yapwile ukukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe ne sano lyaiko
1Kings9:2 Yawe amonekele kuli Solomoni umuku wacibili
1Kings9:3 Yawe atile kuli ena
1Kings9:4 Nomba iwe
1Kings9:5 ninshi nkalenga icipuna ca bufumu bobe pali Israeli ukubapo umuyayaya ngefyo nalaile Davidi wiso ilyo natile
1Kings9:6 “Lelo iwe nangu abana bobe nga mwafuma ku cinso candi kabili mwakaana ukubaka amafunde ne fipope nkupeele
1Kings9:7 ninshi nkatamfya abena Israeli ukufuma mu calo mbapeele kabili nkakaana ne ŋanda ine ino iyo nasangulula umwakuba ishina lyandi. Israeli akabakofye mu lushimi kabili icintu icakuseka abantu bonse.
1Kings9:8 Kabili nangu iŋanda ino nshita ilemoneka iyapulama
1Kings9:9 Abantu bakalaasuka abati
1Kings9:10 Panuma ya myaka amakumi yabili (20)
1Kings9:11 imfumu Solomoni yapeela Hiramu imfumu ya ku Turi imisumba amakumi yabili (20) mu calo ca Galile pa mulimo Hiramu abombele uwakumupeela imbao sha fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda
1Kings9:12 Nomba ilyo Hiramu aile ukufuma ku Turi mukuya mona imisumba Solomoni amupeele
1Kings9:13 Elyo atila kuli Solomoni
1Kings9:14 Lelo Hiramu ninshi alituma kale ku mfumu amatalanta ya golide umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120).
1Kings9:15 Ifi efyo cali pa bamulaasa abo imfumu Solomoni yalembele pakukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe
1Kings9:16 Farao imfumu ya ku Egupto yalisanshile no kupoka umusumba wa Gesa no kuoca. Aipaya na bena Kenani abaikalamo elyo aupeela na kuli mwane muka Solomoni nge cabupe ca pa bwinga.
1Kings9:17 Elyo Solomoni akuula cipya cipya umusumba wa Gesa. Akuula na Beti Horoni wa pesamba
1Kings9:18 Baalati na Tadimo wa mu matololo ya mukati ka calo
1Kings9:19 ne misumba yakututilamo ifipe
1Kings9:20 Kwaliko abantu bambi abashele mu calo abo abashali abena Israeli pamo nga bena Amoli
1Kings9:21 Aba bali ba mu ndupwa shabo abashele mu calo abo abena Israeli bafilwa ukupeela kukonaulwa. Kanshi Solomoni epakubabuula abacita abasha bamulaasa ngefyo caba ukufika na pa bushiku bwa lelo.
1Kings9:22 Lelo Solomoni tacitilepo umwina Israeli nangu umo ukuba umusha. Bena abacitafye abashilika ba nkondo
1Kings9:23 Ebaba bacilolo bakalamba abakumona pa milimo yakwa Solomoni. Bonse bali bacilolo imyanda isano na makumi yasano (550) abakwangalila abaume abalebomba imilimo.
1Kings9:24 Panuma mwana Farao akukile ukufuma ku musumba wakwa Davidi ukwisa kwisano Solomoni amukuulile kulya
1Kings9:25 Imiku itatu cila mwaka Solomoni aletuula amalambo yakoca ne mituulo yakwampana pa bulambo akuulile Yawe
1Kings9:26 Imfumu Solomoni akuulile amato ayakalamba pa Esioni Geberi iyaba mupepi na Elati iya mu calo ca Edomu pa lulamba lwa Bemba Wakashika.
1Kings9:27 Elyo Hiramu atuma abantu bakwe abamato abaishiba bemba ukubombela pamo na bantu bakwa Solomoni.
1Kings9:28 Baya na mato ku Ofiri no kuya senda golide amatalanta imyanda ine na makumi yabili (420) baleta ku mfumu Solomoni.
1Kings10:1 Ilyo namfumu wa ku Sheba aumfwile ululumbi pali Solomoni ifyo acindamike ishina lyakwa Yawe
1Kings10:2 Aisa fika mu Yerusalemu no mulongo ukalamba uwa babomfi ne ngamila ishasendele ifya cena cisuma
1Kings10:3 Solomoni nao ayasuka amepusho yakwe yonse
1Kings10:4 Ilyo namfumu wa ku Sheba amona amano yakwa Solomoni elyo ne sano akuulile
1Kings10:5 ifyakulya ifyali petubulo lyakulilapo
1Kings10:6 Elyo atile ku mfumu
1Kings10:7 Lelo nshasumine ifi fintu fyonse mpaka ili naisa imwena na menso yandi. Mu cine ifyo naumfwile tafipaleme na pali citika wa fintu ukwete. Iwe
1Kings10:8 Yangu ifyo bashuka abaume bobe! Yangu ifyo bashuka bacilolo bobe abeminina ku cinso cobe cila nshita no kumfwa ku mano yobe.
1Kings10:9 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe Lesa obe
1Kings10:10 Elyo apeele imfumu amatalanta ya golide umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120)
1Kings10:11 Amato yakwa Hiramu eyaletele golide ukufuma ku Ofiri
1Kings10:12 Imfumu yabomfya imiti iyalukula ukupangamo inceshi shakwikasha iŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo ne ŋanda ye sano
1Kings10:13 Imfumu Solomoni apeele namfumu wa ku Sheba conse ico afwaile kabili ico alombele
1Kings10:14 Ukufina kwa golide Solomoni alepoka cila mwaka kwali amatalanta imyanda mutanda na makumi mutanda na mutanda (666)
1Kings10:15 ukwabula ukupendelako iyalefuma ku musonko wa bamakwebo yakalamba na bashitisha ifipe elyo no kufuma ku mfumu shonse isha ku Arabia elyo na ku balashi ba mu calo.
1Kings10:16 Imfumu Solomoni apangile inkwela ishikulu imyanda ibili (200) kuli golide uwakufula. Cila nkwela mwalebomba golide uwafina amakilo yatatu na citika (3.5kg).
1Kings10:17 Kabili apanga inkwela na shimbi ishinono imyanda itatu (300) kuli golide uwafulwa. Na muli cila nkwela mwalebomba golide uwafina mupepi na makilo yabili. Imfumu yasungila inkwela mwisano ilyaleitwa “Umutengo wa ku Lebanoni.”
1Kings10:18 Elyo imfumu yapangile icipuna icikulu ica meno ya nsofu kabili yalambatikako golide umusuma.
1Kings10:19 Icipuna cakwete amatabo mutanda
1Kings10:20 Inkalamo shimbi ikumi limo na shibili (12) shaiminina mu matabo mutanda
1Kings10:21 Ifipe fyonse ifyakunwenamo ifya mfumu Solomoni fyali ifya golide
1Kings10:22 Imfumu yakwete amato aya ku Tashishi ayengi pali bemba ayali pamo na yakwa Hiramu. Umuku umo panuma ya myaka itatu yalebwela nayasenda golide
1Kings10:23 Imfumu Solomoni yalicilile imfumu shonse isha pano isonde mu bunonshi na mu mano.
1Kings10:24 Aba pano isonde bonse balafwaya ukumonana na Solomoni pakuti bomfweko amano Lesa abikile mu mutima wakwe.
1Kings10:25 Cila mwaka
1Kings10:26 Solomoni alonganika amaceleta na bakabalwe. Akwete amaceleta ikana limo ne myanda ine (1
1Kings10:27 Imfumu yalenga silifa ukufula mu Yerusalemu nga mabwe
1Kings10:28 Bakabalwe bakwa Solomoni babashitile mu calo ca ku Egupto na ku Kuwe. Bashimakwebo ba mfumu ebaleshita ukufuma ku Kuwe.
1Kings10:29 Bashitile iceleta ukufuma ku Egupto pa ndalama imyanda mutanda (600) isha mashekeli ya silifa elyo kabalwe umo pa ndalama amashekeli umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150). Bashimakwebo bakwa Solomoni nabo baleshitisha ku shamfumu shonse isha bena Hiti na bena Aramu.
1Kings11:1 Lelo Imfumu Solomoni yalitemenwe abanakashi na bambi ukucila pali mwana Farao. Alyupilepo na banakashi ba ku Moabu
1Kings11:2 Bali ba ku mitundu iyo Yawe aebele abena Israeli ukuti
1Kings11:3 Akwata abakashi imyanda cine lubali (700) aba ku bufumu elyo na bakashi bakwe abo ashaupile mu bwinga nabo imyanda itatu (300). Na bakashi bakwe bayalula umutima wakwe.
1Kings11:4 Ilyo Solomoni akota
1Kings11:5 Alakonka Ashitoreti umulungu uwanakashi wa bena Sidoni
1Kings11:6 Solomoni asuka acita ifyabipa mu menso yakwa Yawe
1Kings11:7 Pa lupili ku kabanga ka musumba wa Yerusalemu
1Kings11:8 Ifyo fine efyo acitila ne milungu ya bakashi bakwe bonse abafumine kumbi. Balafukilisha ububani no kulatuula amalambo ku milungu yabo.
1Kings11:9 Yawe afulilwe Solomoni pafyo umutima wakwe wafumine kuli Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli uwamonekele kuli ena imiku ibili.
1Kings11:10 Nangu Solomoni bamuleseshe kuli Lesa ukukonka imilungu imbi
1Kings11:11 Eico Yawe aebele Solomoni ati
1Kings11:12 Lelo
1Kings11:13 Nalyo line nshakaseshe ubufumu bonse ukufuma kuli ena. Ndi nokumupeelako uluko lumo pa mulandu wakwa Davidi umubomfi wandi na pa mulandu wa Yerusalemu umusumba uo nasala.”
1Kings11:14 Elyo Yawe aimisha Solomoni umulwani Hadadi umwina Edomu
1Kings11:15 Kunuma ilyo Davidi alelwisha abena Edomu
1Kings11:16 Yoabu na bonse abena Israeli baile ikala kulya pa myeshi mutanda mpaka balofyafye bonse abaume ba mu Edomu.
1Kings11:17 Nomba Hadadi ninshi acilifye akalumendo abutukile ku Egupto pamo na bacilolo bamo aba mu Edomu ababomfi bakwa wishi.
1Kings11:18 Pakubutuka
1Kings11:19 Farao atemwa nganshi Hadadi icakuti amupeela na mulamu wakwe
1Kings11:20 Kuli nkashi nankwe yakwa Tapenesi
1Kings11:21 Lintu acili mu Egupto
1Kings11:22 Farao amwasuka ati
1Kings11:23 Kabili Lesa aimishe Solomoni na umbi umulwani
1Kings11:24 Alonganika impuka ya bantu abakumukonka ababulwi elyo aba ne ntungulushi ya bacisanguka. Pali ilya nshita Davidi aleonaula abashilika bakwa Soba
1Kings11:25 Resoni ali umulwani wa bena Israeli pa nshita yonse iya bumi bwakwa Solomoni
1Kings11:26 Yeroboamu nao
1Kings11:27 Umfweni icalengele ukuti apondokele imfumu. Solomoni alikuulile ifibumbili fyakwikasha ifikulwa no kucilika umupokapoka mu cibumba ca musumba wakwa Davidi wishi.
1Kings11:28 Nomba Yeroboamu aba umwaume uwamaka
1Kings11:29 Pa nshita ine ilya Yeroboamu aima ubulendo ukuya ku Yerusalemu
1Kings11:30 na Ahiya abuula umwingila upya afwele no kuulepaula mu tupimfya ikumi limo na tubili (12).
1Kings11:31 Elyo asosa kuli Yeroboamu ati
1Kings11:32 Lelo pa mulandu wa mubomfi wandi Davidi
1Kings11:33 Nalacita ifi pa mulandu wakuti nabansha no kwamba ukupepa Ashitoreti umulungu wa bena Sidoni
1Kings11:34 “‘Nomba nshafumye ubufumu bonse mu maboko yakwa Solomoni. Nalimubika ukuba imfumu mu nshiku shonse isha mweo wakwe pa mulandu wa mubomfi wandi Davidi
1Kings11:35 Ndi nokufumya ubufumu ukufuma mu minwe ya mwana wakwe no kukupeelapo inko ikumi limo.
1Kings11:36 Nkapeela uluko lumo ku mwana wakwe pakuti umubomfi wandi inshita yonse akakwate icisaniko pa cinso candi mu Yerusalemu
1Kings11:37 Lelo palwa iwe
1Kings11:38 Iwe nga wacita fyonse ifyo nakukonkomesha
1Kings11:39 Nkapetamika aba mu ŋanda yakwa Davidi pa mulandu uyu
1Kings11:40 Solomoni afwaile ukwipaya Yeroboamu
1Kings11:41 Palwa milandu imbi iya bufumu bwakwa Solomoni
1Kings11:42 Solomoni aikele mu Yerusalemu no kuteeka icalo conse ica Israeli pa myaka amakumi yane (40).
1Kings11:43 Ilyo afwile
1Kings12:1 Reoboamu aile ku Shekemu pantu abena Israeli bonse eko baile mukuya mubika pa bufumu.
1Kings12:2 Ilyo Yeroboamu mwana Nebati aumfwa ifi ninshi acili mu Egupto
1Kings12:3 Abena Israeli baita Yeroboamu
1Kings12:4 “Wiso alilumike nganshi ikoli pali ifwe. Nomba iwe utwangushisheko imibombele yacibe ne koli ilyafina wiso abikile pali ifwe
1Kings12:5 Reoboamu abasuka ati
1Kings12:6 Elyo imfumu Reoboamu alandishanya na bakalamba abalebomba na wishi Solomoni ilyo alipo. Abepusha ati
1Kings12:7 Bamwasuka abati
1Kings12:8 Lelo Reoboamu akaana amano yamupandileko abakalamba
1Kings12:9 Abepusha ati
1Kings12:10 Na balumendo abo akulile pamo nankwe bamwasuka abati
1Kings12:11 Tata abikile pali imwe ikoli ilyafina
1Kings12:12 Panuma ya nshiku shitatu Yeroboamu na bantu bonse baisa kuli Reoboamu
1Kings12:13 Imfumu yayasuka abantu bukali bukali
1Kings12:14 yakonka amano yafumine ku balumendo baiko no kulanda aiti
1Kings12:15 Imfumu yafilwa ukumfwa ku bantu pantu ukucitika kwa ifi fyonse kwafumine kuli Yawe
1Kings12:16 Ilyo abena Israeli bamona ukuti imfumu yakaana ukubomfwa
1Kings12:17 Lelo ku bena Israeli abaikele mu misumba ya mu Yuda
1Kings12:18 Imfumu Reoboamu yatumine Adoniramu
1Kings12:19 Kanshi efyo abena Israeli baba abasangukila iŋanda yakwa Davidi ukufika ne lelo.
1Kings12:20 Ilyo abena Israeli baumfwile ukuti Yeroboamu nabwela
1Kings12:21 Ilyo Reoboamu afikile mu Yerusalemu
1Kings12:22 Nomba kwaisa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe kuli Shemaiya umuntu wakwa Lesa ilyakuti
1Kings12:23 “Landa kuli Reoboamu mwana Solomoni imfumu ya mu Yuda
1Kings12:24 Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati
1Kings12:25 Elyo Yeroboamu akuulile ilinga ilyakosa nganshi ku Shekemu mu mpili sha ku Efulemu eko aikala. Kulya eko afumine pakuya kuula Penieli.
1Kings12:26 Yeroboamu atontonkanya mu mano yakwe ati
1Kings12:27 nga cakuti aba bantu batwalilila ukulaya mukutuula amalambo ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe mu Yerusalemu. Kabili bakatampa ukunakila shikulwibo Reoboamu imfumu ya bena Yuda. Bali nokunjipaya bakabwelele na ku mfumu Reoboamu.”
1Kings12:28 Panuma ilyo atontonkanyapo
1Kings12:29 Umulungu umo aubika mu Betele elyo na ubiye mu Dani.
1Kings12:30 Kabili ici acitile caba icabubifi. Abantu balayafye ukufika na ku Dani mukupepa umulungu uwaliko.
1Kings12:31 Yeroboamu akuula amayanda yakupepelamo apasansama
1Kings12:32 Abika inshikunkulu pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi walenga cine konse konse ukulingana ne nshikunkulu yaleba ku Yuda elyo atuula na malambo ya pa bulambo. Acite ifi mu Betele
1Kings12:33 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi walenga cine konse konse
1Kings13:1 Lintu Yeroboamu aiminine ku bulambo mukutuula umutuulo
1Kings13:2 Na peshiwi lyakwa Yawe asesema pali ubu bulambo ati
1Kings13:3 Pa bushiku bwine ubu
1Kings13:4 Ilyo imfumu Yeroboamu aumfwa ifyo umuntu wakwa Lesa aseseme pa bulambo ubu ku Betele
1Kings13:5 Elyo ubulambo nabo bwabongoloka ne mito yaitika ukulingana ne cishibilo capeele umuntu wakwa Lesa mukukonke shiwi lyakwa Yawe.
1Kings13:6 Elyo imfumu yatila ku muntu wakwa Lesa
1Kings13:7 Imfumu yaeba umuntu wakwa Lesa aiti
1Kings13:8 Lelo umuntu wakwa Lesa ayasuka imfumu ati
1Kings13:9 Pantu Yawe alinkonkomeshe kwishiwi lyakwe ati
1Kings13:10 Kanshi epakupita inshila imbi
1Kings13:11 Nomba kwali kasesema uwakale uwaleikala ku Betele
1Kings13:12 Wishi abepusha ati
1Kings13:13 Ena aeba abana bakwe ati
1Kings13:14 Elyo akonka ukwaile umuntu wakwa Lesa
1Kings13:15 Elyo kasesema amweba ati
1Kings13:16 Umuntu wakwa Lesa ayasuka ati
1Kings13:17 Yawe alinkonkomesha kwishiwi lyakwe ukukanalyako umukate
1Kings13:18 Kasesema wakale ayasuka ati
1Kings13:19 Kanshi umuntu wakwa Lesa epakubwelela nankwe aya lya no kunwa mu ŋanda yakwe.
1Kings13:20 Lilya bacili nabekala petebulo
1Kings13:21 Abilikisha ku muntu wakwa Lesa uwafumine ku Yuda ati
1Kings13:22 lelo wabwelela kunuma no kwisa lya umukate no kunwa amenshi muli ino ncende umo akwebele ukukanalyamo umukate nangu ukunwamo amenshi
1Kings13:23 Ilyo umuntu wakwa Lesa apwishishe ukulya no kunwa
1Kings13:24 Lilya acili mukuya
1Kings13:25 Abantu abalepita basanga icitumbi nacilala mu musebo ne nkalamo naiminina mumbali
1Kings13:26 Ilyo kasesema uwamubweseshe pa lwendo lwakwe aumfwile
1Kings13:27 Kasesema aeba abana bakwe ati
1Kings13:28 Elyo aima aya sanga icitumbi nacitambalala pa musebo ne nkalamo naimininina pa mbali. Inkalamo tayalile icitumbi nangu ukwikata kabalwe.
1Kings13:29 Elyo kasesema aimya icitumbi ca muntu wakwa Lesa abika na pali kabalwe
1Kings13:30 Aya lalika icitumbi mu nshinshi yakwe elyo bamuloosha no kulanda ati
1Kings13:31 Panuma ya kumushiika elyo aeba abana bakwe ati
1Kings13:32 Pantu imbila abilile kwishiwi lyakwa Yawe pa mulandu wa bulambo mu Betele na pa mayanda yonse ya ku ncende shakupepelapo imilungu isha mishi ya mu Samaria ili nokufikilishiwa.”
1Kings13:33 Lelo na panumafye ya fyonse ifi
1Kings13:34 Ici ecali icabubifi ico iŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu yacitile
1Kings14:1 Pa nshita ine ilya
1Kings14:2 na Yeroboamu aeba umukashi wakwe ati
1Kings14:3 Usende mikate ikumi limo
1Kings14:4 Eico muka Yeroboamu acita ifyo mulume amwebele aya ku ŋanda yakwa Ahiya ku Shilo. Nomba Ahiya alilekele ukumona pa mulandu wakukota.
1Kings14:5 Lelo Yawe alyebele Ahiya ukuti
1Kings14:6 Kanshi ilyofye Ahiya aumfwa inshindo pa mwinshi atila
1Kings14:7 Kabiye
1Kings14:8 Napatwile ubufumu ukufuma kuba mu ŋanda yakwa Davidi
1Kings14:9 Naucita icabipa ukucila pali bonse abakutangilile. Nauyipangila imilungu yobe we mwine
1Kings14:10 “‘Pa mulandu wa ici
1Kings14:11 Imbwa shikalya bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu abakafwila mu musumba
1Kings14:12 “Nomba iwe bwelelamo kumobe. Ilyo walaya ingila mu musumba umwana alaya fwa.
1Kings14:13 Abena Israeli bonse bali nokumuloosha kabili no kumushiika. Ena e umofye paba mu ŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu uo Yawe
1Kings14:14 “Yawe umwine ali nokufwailapo imfumu imbi pa bena Israeli iyo iyili no kwisa onaula iŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu. Buno bwine e bushiku
1Kings14:15 Kabili Yawe ali nokupunganya abena Israeli ukuba kwati litete lilepungana mu mulonga wa menshi. Ali nokushimpula Israeli ukufuma muli cilya calo icisuma ico apeele ifikolwe fyabo
1Kings14:16 Kabili ali nokubasha pa mulandu wa pa bubifi ubo Yeroboamu acitile no kulenga abena Israeli nabo ukubifya.”
1Kings14:17 Elyo muka Yeroboamu aimine afuma no kuya ku Tirisa. Lilya line afikafye pa lubansa lwa ŋanda
1Kings14:18 Bamushiika elyo na bena Israeli bonse bamuloosha nge shiwi Yawe asosele ukupitila mu mubomfi wakwe Ahiya.
1Kings14:19 Imilimo imbi iyo Yeroboamu acitile mu nshiku shakwe ishabufumu
1Kings14:20 Ali imfumu pa myaka amakumi yabili na ibili (22) elyo afwa ayalala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. No mwana wakwe Nadabu ewamupyene ukuba imfumu.
1Kings14:21 Reoboamu mwana Solomoni ali imfumu mu Yuda. Ali ne myaka amakumi yane na umo (41) ilyo aishile ba imfumu. Kabili aikele pa bufumu imyaka ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) mu Yerusalemu
1Kings14:22 Abena Yuda bacitile icabipa mu menso yakwa Yawe. Ukucila na pa fyabubifi ifikolwe fyabo fyacitile.
1Kings14:23 Baikuulila ne ncende shakupepelamo imilungu yabo
1Kings14:24 Mwaba na bacilende ba ku mfuba abaume mu calo. Abantu bonse baiposa mukucita ifyamakankamike ifyalecita abantu abo Yawe atamfishe ku cinso ca bena Israeli.
1Kings14:25 Mu mwaka walenga isano iya bufumu bwakwa Reoboamu
1Kings14:26 Asenda icuma conse icali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ne cuma ca mu ŋanda ye sano. Asendafye fyonse
1Kings14:27 Kanshi imfumu Reoboamu epakupanga shimbi inkwela isha mukuba ishakupyanikishapo
1Kings14:28 Ilyo lyonse imfumu yaya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe
1Kings14:29 Palwa fintu fimbi ifyakwa Reoboamu
1Kings14:30 Paali ukulwishanya ukwatwalilila pakati kakwa Reoboamu na Yeroboamu.
1Kings14:31 Kabili Reoboamu ilyo afwa aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe
1Kings15:1 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) uwa bufumu bwakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati
1Kings15:2 Kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myaka itatu. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Maaka mwana Abishalomu.
1Kings15:3 Acitile ifyabubifi fyonse ifyo wishi acitileko. Umutima wakwe tawaipeele kuli Yawe Lesa wakwe ngefyo umutima wa cikolwe cakwe Davidi wali.
1Kings15:4 Lelo pa mulandu we shina lyakwa Davidi
1Kings15:5 Pantu Davidi alicitile icisuma pa cinso cakwa Yawe elyo no kubaka amafunde yakwa Yawe inshiku shonse isha mweo wakwe ngefyo bamukonkomeshe
1Kings15:6 Paleba ukulwa pakati kakwa Abiya na Yeroboamu mu nshiku shonse isha mweo wakwa Abiya.
1Kings15:7 Palwa fintu fimbi ifyakwa Abiya ifyo acitile pa bufumu
1Kings15:8 Elyo Abiya afwa
1Kings15:9 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili (20) uwa bufumu bwakwa Yeroboamu imfumu ya bena Israeli
1Kings15:10 kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu imyaka amakumi yane na umo (41). Nakulu ishina lyakwe ali ni Maaka mwana Abishalomu.
1Kings15:11 Asa acitile ifintu ifyalungama pa menso yakwa Yawe
1Kings15:12 Atamfya mu calo bonse bacilende ba ku mfuba abaume
1Kings15:13 Afumya Maaka nakulu pa cifulo cakwe ica bunyina wakwa namfumu
1Kings15:14 Nangu tafumishe incende shakupepelako isho balecindika
1Kings15:15 Aletele mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe silifa
1Kings15:16 Asa balelwa inkondo na Baasha imfumu ya ku bena Israeli mu nshita yonse iya bufumu bwabo.
1Kings15:17 Baasha imfumu ya bena Israeli yaima mukulwisha Yuda kabili ashingulusha ilinga kuli Rama pakulesha ukuti kwiba nangu umo uwakufuma nangu ukwingila mu calo cakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda.
1Kings15:18 Asa elyo abuula silifa na golide onse uwashele mu cipao ca mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ne ya kwisano
1Kings15:19 Ayeba ati
1Kings15:20 Beni Hadadi asumine amashiwi ya mfumu Asa elyo atuma na bakalamba ba fita fya nkondo ukuya sansa imisumba ya mu Israeli. Acimfya imisumba ya Iyoni
1Kings15:21 Ilyo Baasha aumfwa ifi
1Kings15:22 Elyo Imfumu Asa yapeela icipope kuli bonse abena Yuda
1Kings15:23 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Asa
1Kings15:24 Elyo Asa afwa no kuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe
1Kings15:25 Nadabu mwana Yeroboamu ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa mu Israeli mu mwaka wabubili uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda
1Kings15:26 Acitile ifibi pa cinso cakwa Yawe
1Kings15:27 Baasha mwana Ahiya uwa mu luko lwakwa Isaka amwimina no kuya mwipaya ku Gibetoni
1Kings15:28 Baasha aipeye Nadabu mu mwaka wabutatu uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda
1Kings15:29 Ilyo atampafye ukuteeka
1Kings15:30 Ifi fyacitike pa mulandu wa fyabubifi Yeroboamu acitile
1Kings15:31 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Nadabu
1Kings15:32 Paleba ukulwa pakati kakwa Asa na Baasha imfumu ya bena Israeli mu nshita yonse iya bufumu bwabo.
1Kings15:33 Mu mwaka wabutatu uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda
1Kings15:34 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
1Kings16:1 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yehu mwana Hanani palwakwa Baasha.
1Kings16:2 “Nakwimishe ukufuma ku lukungu no kukubika pa butungulushi bwa bantu bandi abena Israeli. Lelo iwe waenda mu nshila shakwa Yeroboamu no kulenga abantu bandi abena Israeli ukubifya
1Kings16:3 Eico naba mupepi no kulofya Baasha pamo na ba mu ŋanda yakwe
1Kings16:4 Imbwa shikalya bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa Baasha abakafwila mu musumba
1Kings16:5 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Baasha
1Kings16:6 Baasha ilyo afwile alele ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe
1Kings16:7 Ne calengele ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ukwisa ukupitila muli kasesema Yehu mwana Hanani kuli Baasha na ba mu ŋanda yakwe
1Kings16:8 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na mutanda (26) uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda
1Kings16:9 Simuri
1Kings16:10 Simuri aisa ingilafye
1Kings16:11 Cilya ayamba ukuteeka
1Kings16:12 Efyo Simuri alofeshe ulupwa lonse ulwa ŋanda yakwa Baasha umwasoselwe ishiwi lyakwa Yawe palwakwa Baasha ukupitila muli kasesema Yehu
1Kings16:13 pa mulandu wa fyabubifi Baasha no mwana wakwe Elaya bacitile. Kabili balenga na bena Israeli ukubifya
1Kings16:14 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Elaya
1Kings16:15 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na cine lubali (27) uwakwa Asa ukuba imfumu ya bena Yuda
1Kings16:16 Ilyo abena Israeli abali pa nkambi baumfwa ukuti Simuri aliimina imfumu no kuyipaya
1Kings16:17 Elyo Omuri na bena Israeli abali nankwe bafuma ku Gibetoni no kuya shinguluka umusumba wa Tirisa.
1Kings16:18 Ilyo Simuri amona ukuti umusumba wapokwa
1Kings16:19 Ici cacitike pa mulandu wa fyabubifi acitile
1Kings16:20 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Simuri
1Kings16:21 Elyo abantu ba mu Israeli bapatukene pabili
1Kings16:22 Nomba abakwa Omuri bakwatishapo amaka ukucila abakwa Tibuni mwana Ginati. Efyo Tibuni afwile na Omuri aba imfumu.
1Kings16:23 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na umo (31) uwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda
1Kings16:24 Ashita ulupili lwa Samaria kuli Shemeri pa matalanta ya silifa yabili
1Kings16:25 Nomba Omuri acita ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe kabili abifya ukucila na pali bonse abamutangilile.
1Kings16:26 Alaendafye mu nshila shonse ishakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati na mu fyabubifi fyakwe
1Kings16:27 Pa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Omuri
1Kings16:28 Omuri ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe kabili ashiikilwe mu Samaria. Elyo Ahabu umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu.
1Kings16:29 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu (30) uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda
1Kings16:30 Ahabu mwana Omuri ena acilapo ukubifya pa cinso cakwa Yawe ukucila pali bonse abamutangilile.
1Kings16:31 Ena tamwenemo no bubi mukucitako ifyabubifi fyacitile Yeroboamu mwana Nebati
1Kings16:32 Aimika ubulambo bwakwa Baali mwitempele lyakwa Baali ilyo akuulile mu Samaria.
1Kings16:33 Ahabu aimika uluceshi lwa mulungu Ashera no kucitafye ifintu ifyakusonsomba Yawe
1Kings16:34 Mu nshiku shakwa Ahabu
1Kings17:1 Nomba Eliya umwina Tishibe uwafumine ku Tishibe mu calo ca Gileadi aebele Ahabu ati
1Kings17:2 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli Eliya aliti
1Kings17:3 “Fuma kuno
1Kings17:4 Wakulanwa amenshi mu mumana elyo ninkonkomesha bamwankole ukulakupeela ifyakulya uko kwine.”
1Kings17:5 Eliya acita ifyo Yawe amwebele. Aya ku mumana wa Keriti
1Kings17:6 Bamwankole balamuletela umukate ne nama ulucelo
1Kings17:7 Ilyo papite nshita umumana wakama pa mulandu wakuti tamwali imfula mu calo.
1Kings17:8 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli Eliya aliti
1Kings17:9 “ Ima nombaline kabiye ku Sarepati iya ba ku Sidoni eko uye wikale. Ninkonkomesha namfwilwa wa kuli ilya ncende ukuya kupeelako ifyakulya.”
1Kings17:10 Kanshi Eliya epakuya ku Sarepati. Ilyo afika pa mpongolo ya musumba
1Kings17:11 Cilya aima ukuya mukubuula amenshi
1Kings17:12 Namfwilwa ayasuka ati
1Kings17:13 Eliya amweba ati
1Kings17:14 Pantu ifi efyo Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli asosa ati
1Kings17:15 Namfwilwa aya no kuya cita ifyo Eliya amwebele. Kanshi cila bushiku kwalaba ifyakulya fyakwa Eliya
1Kings17:16 Kabili ubunga tabwatalile abupwa mu mpakwilo
1Kings17:17 Panuma ya nshita iyitali
1Kings17:18 Elyo umwine ŋanda aeba Eliya ati
1Kings17:19 Eliya amweba ati

1Kings18:1 Panuma ya nshita iyitali
1Kings18:2 Kanshi Eliya epakuya monekela kuli Ahabu. Lelo mu Samaria mwali icipowe icabipa nganshi.
1Kings18:3 Kanshi Ahabu nao epakwita Obadia uwaleyangalila abalebomba kwisano. Uyu Obadia ali umuntu uwacisumino icikulu muli Yawe.
1Kings18:4 Lintu Yesebele acili aleipaya bakasesema bakwa Yawe
1Kings18:5 Ahabu alyebele Obadia ukuti
1Kings18:6 Kanshi epakwakana incende shakuya mukufwailishako
1Kings18:7 Ilyo Obadia acili mukuya
1Kings18:8 Eliya amwasuka ati
1Kings18:9 Obadia amweba ati
1Kings18:10 Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe Lesa obe uwamweo
1Kings18:11 Nomba
1Kings18:12 Ine nshaishibe noko Umupashi wakwa Yawe ulekusenda nga nakusha. Nga cakuti naya eba Ahabu elyo ese asange taulipo ninshi alenjipaya. Lelo ine ne mubomfi obe ukutulafye ku bwaice bwandi lyonse mpepa Yawe.
1Kings18:13 Bushe shikulu
1Kings18:14 Elyo nomba unjebe ukuya kuli shikulu nje mwebe ati
1Kings18:15 Eliya asosa ati
1Kings18:16 Awe Obadia aile kumanya Ahabu no kumweba
1Kings18:17 Ilyo amona Eliya amweba ati
1Kings18:18 Eliya ayasuka ati
1Kings18:19 Nomba longanika abantu bonse aba mu Israeli twise tukumane nabo pa lupili lwa Kameli. Kabili ulete na bakasesema bonse imyanda ine na makumi yasano (450) abakwa Baali
1Kings18:20 Elyo Ahabu atuma imbila mu calo conse ica Israeli no kulonganika bakasesema bonse pa lupili lwa Kameli.
1Kings18:21 Eliya aiminina ku cinso ca bantu no kubeba ati
1Kings18:22 Elyo Eliya abeba ati
1Kings18:23 Tufwaileniko bacilume wa ŋombe babili. Kabili bakasesema bakwa Baali baisalilepo iyo balefwaya
1Kings18:24 Elyo imwe mukuute peshina lya mulungu wenu
1Kings18:25 Eliya aeba bakasesema bakwa Baali ati
1Kings18:26 Kanshi epakubuula iŋombe iyo basalile no kupekenya. Elyo bakuuta peshina lyakwa Baali ukufuma ulucelo ukufika akasuba pakati ka mutwe
1Kings18:27 Lilya akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe Eliya ayamba ukubaseka ati
1Kings18:28 Epakupunda ishiwi likalamba
1Kings18:29 Ilyo akasuba kapita pakati ka mutwe
1Kings18:30 Elyo Eliya aeba abantu bonse ati
1Kings18:31 Eliya abuula amabwe ikumi limo na yabili (12)
1Kings18:32 Kuli aya yene mabwe akuulilako ubulambo mwishina lyakwa Yawe. Aimbako ne cilindi ukushinguluka icikulu ico bengabikamo imbuto ukucila petepe limo.
1Kings18:33 Ateba ne nkuni
1Kings18:34 Kabili abeba ati
1Kings18:35 Amenshi yakonkoloka mu mbali shonse isha bulambo no kwisula mu cilindi icashingulwikeko.
1Kings18:36 Pa nshita yakutuula ilambo

1Kings18:38 Elyo Yawe atuma umulilo wakwe no koca ilambo

1Kings20:2 Atuma inkombe mu musumba ku mfumu Ahabu iya bena Israeli ati
1Kings20:3 ‘Silifa na golide yobe nomba yandi elyo na bakashi bobe bonse na bana abasuma bandi.’”
1Kings20:4 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yayasuka ati
1Kings20:5 Inkombe shaya bwela nakabili no kusosa ashiti
1Kings20:6 Lelo mailo
1Kings20:7 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yaita abakalamba bonse aba mu calo no kubeba aiti
1Kings20:8 Abakalamba na bantu bonse bayasuka ati
1Kings20:9 Elyo aeba inkombe shakwa Beni Hadadi ati
1Kings20:10 Elyo Beni Hadadi atuma amashiwi na yambi kuli Ahabu ati
1Kings20:11 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yayasuka aiti
1Kings20:12 Beni Hadadi aumfwa amashiwi aya pa nshita ena ne mfumu ali nasho balenwa mu matenti yabo
1Kings20:13 Nomba pa nshita ine ilya kwaishile kasesema kuli Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli no kwisa landa ati
1Kings20:14 Ahabu aipusha ati
1Kings20:15 Ahabu epakwita abalumendo ba balashi bafitungu abaume imyanda ibili na makumi yatatu na babili (232). Elyo alonganika na bena Israeli bonse amakana cine lubali (7
1Kings20:16 Bafuma ninshi akasuba kali pakati ka mutwe ilyo Beni Hadadi ne mfumu shimbi amakumi yatatu na babili (32) abalemutungilila bacili mu matenti balenwa.
1Kings20:17 Abalumendo ba balashi bafitungu ebabalilapo ukufuma. Nomba Beni Hadadi alitumine inengu
1Kings20:18 Ena asosa ati
1Kings20:19 Abalumendo ba balashi bafitungu babalilapo ukufuma mu musumba
1Kings20:20 elyo cila umo alakoma umulwani wakwe. Pa mulandu wa ici abena Aramu babutuka
1Kings20:21 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yakonkanyapo ukufuma no kuya cimfya abamaceleta na ba pali bakabalwe

1Kings20:23 Pali ilya ine nshita

1Kings20:31 Bacilolo bakwe bamweba abati
1Kings20:32 Bafwala insalu shabulanda mu misana yabo no kupomba intambo ku mitwe yabo

1Kings21:1 Panuma ya nshita iyitali kwacitike umulandu uwakumine kwibala lyakwa Naboti umwina Yesireli. Ili bala lyali mu Yesireli
1Kings21:2 Ahabu aeba Naboti ati
1Kings21:3 Lelo Naboti ayasuka ati
1Kings21:4 Elyo Ahabu aya ku ŋanda
1Kings21:5 Umukashi wakwe Yesebele aingila amwipusha ati
1Kings21:6 Ayasuka umukashi ati
1Kings21:7 Yesebele umukashi wakwe asosa ati
1Kings21:8 Yesebele alemba inkalata mwishina lyakwa Ahabu
1Kings21:9 Muli ishi nkalata alembamo ukutila
1Kings21:10 Lelo muteke abaume babili ifinangwa fya bantu pa menso yakwe abakuti bamubepeshe abati natuka Lesa kabili natuka ne mfumu. Elyo mumusende no kuya mutobaula amabwe afwe.”
1Kings21:11 Elyo abakalamba na basambashi abaikele mu musumba wakwa Naboti bacita ifyo Yesebele abebele mu nkalata abalembele.
1Kings21:12 Bapekanya ubushiku bwakufunga baisa teka Naboti pa ncende iyicindami pakati ka bantu.
1Kings21:13 Elyo ifinangwa fibili fyaisa ikala kuntanshi yakwe fyalabepesha Naboti pa cinso ca bantu filetila
1Kings21:14 Elyo batuma amashiwi kuli Yesebele abati
1Kings21:15 Yesebele panuma yakumfwa ukuti Naboti nabamupola amabwe nafwa
1Kings21:16 Ilyo Ahabu aumfwa ukuti Naboti nafwa
1Kings21:17 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Eliya umwina Tishibe aliti
1Kings21:18 “Kabiye uye eba Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli uuteeka mu Samaria. Pali ino nshita ali mwibala lyakwa Naboti ilyo endele ukuya pokolola.
1Kings21:19 Umwebe auti
1Kings21:20 Ahabu aeba Eliya ati
1Kings21:21 Nalaleta icinkunka pali iwe. Nalalofya uluko lobe elyo nalaonaula mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu umwaume onse uwakulekelesha uwa bena Israeli umusha nangu umuntungwa.
1Kings21:22 Nalalenga iŋanda yobe ukuba nge yakwa Yeroboamu umwana umwaume wakwa Nebati kabili nge yakwa Baasha umwana mwaume wakwa Ahiya
1Kings21:23 “Elyo pa mulandu wakwa Yesebele
1Kings21:24 “Imbwa shili nokulya bonse abakwa Ahabu abakafwila mu musumba ne fyuni ifipupuka fikalya bonse abakafwila mu mpanga.”
1Kings21:25 Tapatalile apaba umuntu uwapala Ahabu ukuiposaika mukucita ububifi pa cinso cakwa Yawe
1Kings21:26 Ahabu alikwete umulandu pa fintu acitile ifyakwamba ukupepa utulubi tumbi
1Kings21:27 Ilyo Ahabu aumfwa amashiwi aya
1Kings21:28 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Eliya umwina Tishibe aliti

1Kings22:1 Pa myaka itatu tapatalile apaba inkondo pakati ka bena Aramu na bena Israeli.
1Kings22:2 Lelo mu mwaka walenga itatu Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda yaima yaya mukupempula imfumu ya bena Israeli.
1Kings22:3 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yalyebele bacilolo baiko aiti
1Kings22:4 Elyo aipusha Yehoshafati ati
1Kings22:5 lelo Yehoshafati kabili alanda ku mfumu ya bena Israeli ati
1Kings22:6 Elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yalonganika bakasesema bonse abaume abali imyanda amakumi yane (400) no kubepusha ati
1Kings22:7 Lelo Yehoshafati epakwipusha ati
1Kings22:8 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yayasuka Yehoshafati aiti
1Kings22:9 Elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yaita umo pali bacilolo baiko no kumweba ati
1Kings22:10 Imfumu ya bena Israeli na Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda baikele pa fipuna fyabo ifyabufumu pa lubansa lwakutwilapo mupepi ne mpongolo yakwingililapo mu Samaria
1Kings22:11 Nomba Sedekia umwana umwaume wakwa Kenana alipangile insengo sha fyela elyo asosa ati
1Kings22:12 Bakasesema bonse bambi balesesema cimo cine abati
1Kings22:13 Inkombe batumine kuli Mikaiya yamweba ati

1Kings22:22 “Yawe aipusha ati
1Kings22:23 “Nomba mona
1Kings22:24 Elyo Sedekiya umwana mwaume wakwa Kenana aima aya toba Mikaiya ulupi pa menso. Amwipusha ati
1Kings22:25 Mikaiya amwasuka ati
1Kings22:26 Elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yapeela icipope aiti
1Kings22:27 Muye mweba ati
1Kings22:28 Mikaiya alanda ati
1Kings22:29 Kanshi imfumu ya bena Israeli na Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda epakuya ku Ramoti Gileadi.
1Kings22:30 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yaeba Yehoshafati aiti
1Kings22:31 Nomba imfumu ya bena Aramu yalipeele icipope ku bakalamba ba bashilika ba maceleta amakumi yatatu na babili (32) ukutila
1Kings22:32 Ilyo abakalamba ba maceleta bamona Yehoshafati
1Kings22:33 abakalamba ba bashilika ba maceleta bamona ukuti te mfumu ya bena Israeli
1Kings22:34 Nomba umo abuula ubuta aposa umufwi icilaselase
1Kings22:35 Akasuba konse inkondo yakoselakofye ninshi imfumu ikelefye mwiceleta
1Kings22:36 Ilyo akasuba kaya mukuwa
1Kings22:37 Kanshi imfumu ilyo yafwile
1Kings22:38 Baya samfya iceleta pa cishiba mu Samaria (apalesamba bacilende) elyo imbwa shaisa mukumyanga umulopa wakwe ukulingana nefyo ishiwi lyakwa Lesa lyasosele.
1Kings22:39 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya bufumu bwakwa Ahabu
1Kings22:40 Ahabu aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Na Ahasia umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu.
1Kings22:41 Yehoshafati umwana mwaume wakwa Asa aishile ba imfumu ya bena Yuda mu mwaka walenga ine ilyo Ahabu ali imfumu ya bena Israeli.
1Kings22:42 Yehoshafati ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu na isano (35) ilyo apyene pa bufumu
1Kings22:43 Muli fyonse alaendafye mu nshila shakwa wishi Asa
1Kings22:44 Kabili Yehoshafati aikele umutende ne mfumu ya bena Israeli.
1Kings22:45 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoshafati
1Kings22:46 Alifumishe mu calo bacilende ba ku mfuba abaume bonse
1Kings22:47 Mu Edomu tamwali imfumu
1Kings22:48 Nomba Yehoshafati alipangile amato ya makwebo ayengi nganshi ayakuya ku Ofiri mukusenda golide. Nomba yafilwa ukwenda pa menshi
1Kings22:49 Pali ilya ine nshita Ahasia umwana mwaume wakwa Ahabu aeba Yehoshafati ati
1Kings22:50 Elyo Yehoshafati afwa ayalala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe
1Kings22:51 Ahasia umwana umwaume wakwa Ahabu aishile ba imfumu ya bena Israeli mu Samaria mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) ilyo Yehoshafati ali imfumu ya bena Yuda. Kabili ateekele icalo ca Israeli pa myaka ibili.
1Kings22:52 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
1Kings22:53 Aletumika no kupepa Baali kabili asonsomba Yawe

2Kings5:1 Nomba Namani ewali umukalamba wa fita fyankondo fya mfumu ya bena Aramu. Ali umuntu uwacindama mu menso yakwa shikulu wakwe elyo no kutemwikwa pantu kupitila muli ena Yawe apeele abena Aramu ukucimfya abalwani babo. Ali umushilika uwacenjela nganshi
2Kings5:2 Nomba abena Aramu ilyo baile mukusansa
2Kings5:3 Elyo umukashana aeba nakulu ati
2Kings5:4 Namani epakuya ku mfumu no kuya sosa ifyo umukashana wa ku Israeli alandile.
2Kings5:5 Imfumu ya ku Aramu yayasuka aiti
2Kings5:6 Kalata asendele ku mfumu ya ku Israeli yalembelwe ukuti
2Kings5:7 Panumafye yakubelenga kalata

2Kings5:13 Ababomfi bakwa Namani baya kuli ena no kumweba ati
2Kings5:14 Elyo aima ayasamba imiku cine lubali mu mumana wa Yordani
2Kings5:15 Elyo Namani pamo na babomfi bakwe babwelela ku muntu wakwa Lesa. Aiminina pa cinso cakwe alanda no kuti
2Kings5:16 Kasesema ayasuka ati

2Kings5:20 Gehasi

2Kings7:4 Nga twati
2Kings7:5 Cilya akasuba kawa
2Kings7:6 Ici cacitike pa mulandu wakuti Yawe alilengele abena Aramu ukumfwa iciunda ca maceleta na bakabalwe elyo no mulongo uukalamba uwa fita
2Kings7:7 Kanshi epakwima no kubutuka mu nshita ya cungulo icakuti basha amatenti pamo na bakabalwe elyo na bapunda. Bashe inkambi umo yabela
2Kings7:8 Abaume bafibashi bafika pa mpela ya nkambi
2Kings7:9 Elyo balandishanya abati
