2Kings7:16 Elyo abantu bonse baima baya tapa ifipe mu nkambi ya bena Aramu. Kanshi icipimo ca bunga bwa mikate calashitwa pa ndalama shekeli umo
2Kings7:17 Nomba imfumu yabikile cilolo ulya yashintilishe pa kuboko kwakwe ukuba umukalamba wa pa mpongolo. Elyo abantu pakupita baisa munyantaula mpaka afwa
2Kings7:18 Na mu cine
2Kings7:19 Cilolo aebele umuntu wakwa Lesa ati
2Kings7:20 Kabili ifi fine efyacitike kuli ena
2Kings8:1 Nomba Elisha alyebele umwanakashi ulya apepele umwana ukubuuka ku bafwa ati
2Kings8:2 Umwanakashi acitile ukulingana nefyo umuntu wakwa Lesa amwebele. Ena no lupwa lwakwe bafuma baya ikala mu calo ca Bafilisiti pa myaka cine lubali.
2Kings8:3 Panuma ya myaka cine lubali abwelele ukufuma ku calo ca Bafilisiti elyo aya ku mfumu no kwipusha pakuti bamubweseshe iŋanda ne bala lyakwe.
2Kings8:4 Nomba imfumu yalelanda kuli Gehasi
2Kings8:5 Ilyo Gehasi acili alelondolwela imfumu ifyo Elisha abushishe umuntu ukufuma ku bafwa
2Kings8:6 Imfumu yaipusha umwanakashi pali ifi
2Kings8:7 Elisha aile ku Damasiko
2Kings8:8 imfumu epakweba Hasaeli aiti
2Kings8:9 Hasaeli aima aya mukukumanya Elisha
2Kings8:10 Elisha ayasuka ati
2Kings8:11 Elyo Elisha atontafye amenso pamo pene ne mpumi yakwe yakashika mpakafye Hasaeli aumfwa insoni. Elyo umuntu wakwa Lesa atampa ukulila.
2Kings8:12 Hasaeli aipusha ati
2Kings8:13 Hasaeli asosa ati
2Kings8:14 Elyo Hasaeli afuma pali Elisha abwelela kuli shikulu wakwe. Ilyo Beni Hadadi aipusha ati
2Kings8:15 Lelo ubushiku bwakonkelepo abuula icisalu icatikama
2Kings8:16 Mu mwaka walenga isano uwakwa Yoramu umwana mwaume wakwa Ahabu ilyo ali imfumu ya bena Israeli
2Kings8:17 Ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu na ibili (32) ilyo aishileba imfumu
2Kings8:18 Aendele mu nshila shaleendamo imfumu shonse isha bena Israeli ngefyo aba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu bacitile
2Kings8:19 Lelo Yawe tafwaile ukonaula abena Yuda pa mulandu wa mubomfi wakwe Davidi. Yawe alilaile ukumusungila icengelo pamo na bana bakwe umushinsanshiku.
2Kings8:20 Mu nshita shakwa Yehoramu
2Kings8:21 Kanshi Yehoramu epakuya kuli Sairi asenda na maceleta yonse. Abena Edomu bamushinguluka pamo ne fita fikalamba ifya maceleta
2Kings8:22 Ukushinta ne lelo abena Edomu baikala abasangukila abena Yuda. Abena Libina nabo bapondweke pa nshita imo ine.
2Kings8:23 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoramu
2Kings8:24 Yehoramu asuka afwa no kuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Bamushiika pamo nabo mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Kabili Ahasia umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu.
2Kings8:25 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12) uwakwa Yoramu umwana wakwa Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli
2Kings8:26 Ahasia ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na ibili (22) ilyo ayambile ukuteeka pa bufumu. Kabili ateekele pa bufumu umwaka umo mu musumba wa Yerusalemu. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Ataliya
2Kings8:27 Akonkelele imicitile ya ba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu no kucita ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe ngefyo aba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu bacitile
2Kings8:28 Ahasia aya ku nkondo pamo na Yoramu umwana mwaume wakwa Ahabu mukulwisha Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu ku Ramoti Gileadi. Abena Aramu bacena Yoramu.
2Kings8:29 Kanshi imfumu Yoramu epakubwelela ku Yesireli mukundapwa ifilonda abena Aramu bamucenene ku Ramoti lintu balelwa na Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu. Elyo Ahasia umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoramu imfumu ya ku Yuda aya ku Yesireli mukupempula Yoramu mwana Ahabu
2Kings9:1 Kasesema Elisha aitile umuntu umo ukufuma pa mpuka ya bakasesema nokumweba ati
2Kings9:2 Ilyo uleya fika kulya uye ufwaye ukuli Yehu
2Kings9:3 “Elyo uye ubuule umusukupala uminsulwile amafuta pa mutwe wakwe elyo ulande auti
2Kings9:4 Kanshi umulumendo kasesema epakuya ku Ramoti Gileadi.
2Kings9:5 Ilyo afika
2Kings9:6 Yehu aima aya ingila mu ŋanda. Elyo kasesema aminsulwila amafuta pa mutwe wakwa Yehu
2Kings9:7 Uli nokulofya iŋanda yakwa Ahabu sokulu
2Kings9:8 Iŋanda yonse iyakwa Ahabu ili nokuloba. Ndi nokuputula ukufumya kuli Ahabu umwana mwaume onse uwalekeleshako mu bena Israeli
2Kings9:9 Ndi nokulenga iŋanda yakwa Ahabu ukuba nge ŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu umwana mwaume wakwa Nebati
2Kings9:10 Nomba Yesebele ena
2Kings9:11 Ilyo Yehu afuma abwelela kuli bacilolo banankwe aba fita
2Kings9:12 Bonse bayasuka abati
2Kings9:13 Ukwabula ukuposa inshita
2Kings9:14 Kanshi Yehu umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoshafati
2Kings9:15 lelo imfumu Yoramu yalibwelele ku Yesireli kukundapwa ifilonda abena Aramu bamucenene mu nkondo balelwa na Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu. Yehu asosa ati
2Kings9:16 Elyo anina mwiceleta lyakwe aya ku Yesireli pantu Yoramu eko aikele aletensha ifilonda
2Kings9:17 Ilyo malonda uwali pamulu we linga lya mu Yesireli amona ifita fyakwa Yehu fileisa
2Kings9:18 Umushilika wa pali kabalwe epakuya kumanya Yehu
2Kings9:19 Elyo imfumu yatuma umuntu wacibili uwa pali kabalwe. Nao aya bakumanya
2Kings9:20 Nakabili malonda asosa ati
2Kings9:21 Yoramu apeela icipope ati
2Kings9:22 Ilyo Yoramu amona Yehu amwipusha ati
2Kings9:23 Yoramu epakupilibuka abutuka
2Kings9:24 Elyo Yehu abuula ubuta no kulasa umufwi pakati ka mabeya yakwa Yoramu. Umufwi waya lasa mu mutima
2Kings9:25 Yehu aeba Bidika
2Kings9:26 Yawe alanda ukuti
2Kings9:27 Ilyo Ahasia imfumu ya bena Yuda amona ifyacitika
2Kings9:28 Ababomfi bakwe bamusendela mwiceleta ku Yerusalemu no kuya mushiika pamo ne fikolwe fyakwe mu nshinshi yakwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi.
2Kings9:29 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na umo (11) uwa bufumu bwakwa Yoramu mwana Ahabu
2Kings9:30 Elyo Yehu aile ku Yesireli. Ilyo Yesebele aumfwa palwa ifi
2Kings9:31 Lilya Yehu aingila pa mpongolo
2Kings9:32 Yehu ainwina umutwe ku windo elyo abilikisha ati
2Kings9:33 Elyo asosa ati
2Kings9:34 Yehu aingila mu ŋanda alya no kunwa anwa. Elyo asosa ati
2Kings9:35 Lelo ilyo baile kukumushiika
2Kings9:36 Babwelelamo mukuya eba Yehu
2Kings9:37 Umubili wakwa Yesebele ukaba kwati ni citindi pa mushili wa ncende ya mu Yesireli
2Kings10:1 Mu Samaria mwali abana abaume bakwa Ahabu amakumi cine lubali (70). Kanshi Yehu epakulemba amakalata nokuyatuma ku Samaria kuli bacilolo ba mu Yesireli
2Kings10:2 “Apo abana bakwa shikulu wenu muli nabo
2Kings10:3 eico salenipo uwawama kabili uwalinga pali bamwana shikulu wenu eo mubike pa cipuna cakwa wishi
2Kings10:4 Nomba bonse batiina nokulanda abati
2Kings10:5 Elyo kangalila wa kwisano
2Kings10:6 Elyo Yehu abalembela kalata wabubili alandamo amashiwi ayakuti
2Kings10:7 Ilyo inkalata yaisa
2Kings10:8 Ilyo inkombe shafika kuli Yehu
2Kings10:9 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo Yehu aisa fuma. Aiminina pa cinso ca bantu bonse no kubeba ati
2Kings10:10 Eico ishibeni ukuti tapakabe ishiwi lyakwa Yawe nangu limo ilyalandwa pa ŋanda yakwa Ahabu ili shakafikilishiwe. Yawe nacita ifyo alaile ukupitila mu mubomfi wakwe Eliya.”
2Kings10:11 Kanshi Yehu epakwipaya bonse mu Yesireli abashelemo aba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu
2Kings10:12 Yehu afuma alola lwa ku Samaria. Ilyo ali mu nshila pa Beti Ekedi wa bakacema
2Kings10:13 akumanya aba lupwa lwakwa Ahasia imfumu ya bena Yuda nokubepusha ati
2Kings10:14 Apeela icipope ati
2Kings10:15 Panuma yakufuma kulya
2Kings10:16 Yehu amweba ati
2Kings10:17 Ilyo Yehu afika mu Samaria
2Kings10:18 Elyo Yehu alonganya abantu bonse no kubeba ati
2Kings10:19 Eico nomba
2Kings10:20 Yehu alanda ati
2Kings10:21 Elyo atuma amashiwi mu calo conse ica bena Israeli
2Kings10:22 Elyo Yehu aeba kasunga wa fyakufwala ati
2Kings10:23 Elyo Yehu na Yehonadabu mwana Rekabu baingila mwitempele lyakwa Baali. Yehu aeba ababomfi bakwa Baali ati
2Kings10:24 Kanshi efyo baingila mukutuula amalambo elyo na ya cakoca. Nomba Yehu ninshi naimika abaume amakumi cine konse konse (80) panse ye tempele no kubeba ati
2Kings10:25 Panumafye ilyo Yehu apwisha ukutuula umutuulo wa cakoca
2Kings10:26 Bafumisha panse uluceshi lwa mabwe ulo balepepelapo Baali no kulonaula.
2Kings10:27 Babongolola no bulambo bwakwa Baali no kutobolola itempele lyakwa Baali na bantu epo basangula icimbusu ukushinta ne lelo.
2Kings10:28 Kanshi Yehu epakonaula amapepo yakwa Baali mu Israeli.
2Kings10:29 Lelo nao wine tafumine ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati
2Kings10:30 Yawe aeba Yehu ati
2Kings10:31 Lelo Yehu tasakamene ukulabeela ifyebo fyakwa Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli no mutima wakwe onse. Alifililwe ukufuma ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu ifyo aleteleleko abena Israeli ukucitako.
2Kings10:32 Muli shilya nshiku Yawe ayamba ukucefya ubukulu bwa calo ca bena Israeli. Hasaeli acimfya abena Israeli monsefye mu calo cabo
2Kings10:33 ku kabanga ku mumana wa Yordani
2Kings10:34 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehu
2Kings10:35 Yehu ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe
2Kings10:36 Inshita Yehu ateekele pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli mu Samaria yakumene imyaka amakumi yabili na cine konse konse (28).
2Kings11:1 Ilyo Ataliya nyina kwa Ahasia amwene ukuti umwana wakwe afwa
2Kings11:2 Nomba Yehosheba
2Kings11:3 Aikelefye uwafiswa pamo no walemusunga mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe pa myaka mutanda ilyo Ataliya ateekele icalo.
2Kings11:4 Mu mwaka walenga cine lubali Yehoiyada aitile intungulushi sha cila fita umwanda umo (100)
2Kings11:5 Abakonkomesha nokuti
2Kings11:6 Icipani cimbi icacibili cikaba pa mpongolo ya Suri
2Kings11:7 Elyo na imwe mwe ba mu fipani fimbi fibili ifishibomba pe Sabata muli nokubombela imfumu mukulinda iŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Kings11:8 Mwikale abashinguluka imfumu
2Kings11:9 Abakalamba ba fita umwanda umo (100) bacita fyonse ifyo Yehoiyada shimapepo akonkomeshe. Cila umo asenda abantu bakwe bonse abali nokubomba pa bushiku bwe Sabata elyo na bonse abashali nokubomba pa bushiku bwe Sabata nokwisa kuli Yehoiada shimapepo.
2Kings11:10 Elyo shimapepo apeela abakalamba ba fita amafumo ne nkwela ifyali fya mfumu Davidi kabili ifyalesungwa mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Kings11:11 Bakalinda
2Kings11:12 Yehoiada elyo afumya umwana wa mfumu
2Kings11:13 Ilyo Ataliya aumfwa icongo capangile bakalinda elyo na bantu bonse
2Kings11:14 Alolesha elyo amona imfumu naiminina mupepi no luceshi ukulingana nefyo ulutambi lwali. Bacilolo na bakalisha wa mapenga nabo bali mu mbali ya mfumu
2Kings11:15 Yehoiyada shimapepo apeela icipope ku bakalamba ba fita umwanda umo (100) abalemona pa bashilika ati
2Kings11:16 Nabo epakumwikata
2Kings11:17 Yehoiyada elyo apanga icipangano pakati kakwa Yawe ne mfumu elyo na bantu ukuti abantu bali nokuba abantu bakwa Yawe. Kabili apanga na cimbi icipangano ica pakati ka mfumu na bantu.
2Kings11:18 Abantu bonse aba mu calo baya ku ŋanda ya mulungu Baali no kuya ibongolola. Batobaula ne fibumbili fya malambo no tulubi mu tupimfya tupimfya no kwipaya Matani
2Kings11:19 Asenda abakalamba ba fita umwanda umo (100)
2Kings11:20 na bantu bonse abekalacalo basekela. Kabili na mu musumba mwaba icibote
2Kings11:21 Yoashi ali ne myaka cine lubali ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu.
2Kings12:1 Mu mwaka walenga cine lubali uwakwa Yehu
2Kings12:2 Yoashi acitile ifintu ifyawama pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa myaka yonse iyo Yehoiyada shimapepo alemutungulula.
2Kings12:3 Lelo incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika tashaonawilwe. Abantu batwalililefye ukutuula amalambo no koca ububani muli shilya shine ncende.
2Kings12:4 Yoashi aeba bashimapepo ati
2Kings12:5 Lekeni shimapepo uuli onse apoke indalama ukufuma kuli cila kasunga wandalama
2Kings12:6 Lelo ukufikafye na mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na itatu (23) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Yoashi
2Kings12:7 Eico imfumu Yoashi epakwita Yehoiyada shimapepo elyo na bashimapepo bambi nokubepusha ati
2Kings12:8 Bashimapepo basumina ukuleka ukupoka indalama ukufuma ku bantu
2Kings12:9 Yehoiyada shimapepo epakufwaya imbokoshi elyo atula icipunda pa nkupiko yaiko. Aibika pambali ya bulambo lubali ku kulyo kwa muntu uwaingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Bashimapepo abalelinda pa mwinshi ebalebika mu mbokoshi indalama shonse isho baleleta mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Kings12:10 Ilyo lyonse bamona ukuti mwaba indalama ishingi mu mbokoshi
2Kings12:11 Ilyo bapima no kulemba indalama shituulilwe
2Kings12:12 elyo na ku babomfya amabwe pakukuula na kuli bakabasa wa mabwe. Balashitamo imbao na mabwe ayabaswa ayakuwamisha iŋanda yakwa Yawe. Balipila ne ndalama shonse ishalefwaikwa mu milimo yakuwamya iŋanda.
2Kings12:13 Lelo indalama shonse ishaleisa tashabombele mukupangilamo imbale
2Kings12:14 Shalelipilwa ku babomfi abaleshibomfya mukuwamisha mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Kings12:15 Kabili takwali ukusakamana ukwishiba nga cakuti abalepoka indalama balelipila ababomfi
2Kings12:16 Indalama shakufuma ku mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi no wakwelelwa pa bubifi shena tabashitwele mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Kings12:17 Pa nshita ilya ine Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu aima aya sansa icifulo ca Gati nokucipoka
2Kings12:18 Nomba Yoashi imfumu ya bena Yuda epakubuula fyonse ifyamushilo ifyatuulilwe ne fikolwe fyakwe
2Kings12:19 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yoashi
2Kings12:20 Bacilolo bakwa Yoashi bamupingila
2Kings12:21 Bacilolo abamwipeye ni Yosabada umwana mwaume wakwa Shimeati na Yehosabadi umwana mwaume wakwa Shoma. Ilyo afwile baya mushiika na ku fikolwe fyakwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Elyo Amasiya umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu.
2Kings13:1 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na itatu (23) uwa buteko bwakwa Yoashi umwana wakwa Ahasia imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings13:2 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe mukukonka inshila ya fya bubifi bwakwa Yeroboamu umwana mwaume wakwa Nebati
2Kings13:3 Kanshi Yawe epakufulilwa abena Israeli icakuti ukwabula no kuposa inshita
2Kings13:4 Elyo Yehoahasi apapata kuli Yawe
2Kings13:5 Yawe epakupekanya uwakulubula abena Israeli
2Kings13:6 Lelo tabafumine kukucita ububifi ubo Yeroboamu aletelele abena Israeli ukucita icakuti nabo efyo bashala balecita. Kabili no luceshi lwa mulungu Ashera lwashelefye nalwiminina mu Samaria.
2Kings13:7 Takwashele ifita ifingi ifyakwa Yehoahasi
2Kings13:8 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoahasi
2Kings13:9 Yehoahasi ilyo afwile
2Kings13:10 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na cine lubali (37) uwakwa Yoashi imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings13:11 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Kabili talekele ifyabubifi fyonse ifyo Yeroboamu umwana mwaume wakwa Nebati acitile
2Kings13:12 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoashi
2Kings13:13 Yehoashi ilyo afwile aya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe
2Kings13:14 Nomba Elisha alilwele ubulwele ubo ubwaishile fika na kukumwipaya. Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli alileko mukuya mupempula
2Kings13:15 Elisha asosa ati
2Kings13:16 Aeba imfumu ya bena Israeli ati
2Kings13:17 Asosa ati
2Kings13:18 Kabili alanda ati
2Kings13:19 Umuntu wakwa Lesa epakufulilwa imfumu no kuyeba ati
2Kings13:20 Awe Elisha afwa
2Kings13:21 Pa nshita imo ninshi abena Israeli baleshiika umuntu
2Kings13:22 Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu yaikalilafye ukucusha abena Israeli pa nshita ya bufumu bwakwa Yehoahasi.
2Kings13:23 Lelo ukusenamina kwakwa Yawe kwali pali bena kabili alibakwatile uluse no kulanga ukubasakamana nganshi pa mulandu wa cipangano cakwa Abrahamu
2Kings13:24 Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu afwa
2Kings13:25 Elyo Yehoashi umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoahasi apokolola imisumba ukufuma kuli Beni Hadadi mwana wakwa Hasaeli

2Kings14:4 Lelo incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika shena taonawile. Abantu bakonkenyepofye ukutuula amalambo nokoca ububani muli shilya shine ncende.
2Kings14:5 Panuma yakumona ukuti ubufumu bwakosa mu minwe yakwe
2Kings14:6 Lelo taipeye abana ba bantu abaipeye wishi
2Kings14:7 Ni ena uwacimfishe abena Edomu amakana ikumi limo (10
2Kings14:8 Elyo Amasiya atuma inkombe kuli Yehoashi umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoahasi
2Kings14:9 Nomba Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli yabwesha amashiwi kuli Amasiya imfumu ya bena Yuda aiti
2Kings14:10 Iwe panuma yakucimfya abena Edomu
2Kings14:11 Lelo Amasiya akaana ukumfwa
2Kings14:12 Abena Yuda babapuma ku bena Israeli na cila muntu abutukila ku ŋanda kumwakwe.
2Kings14:13 Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli yaikata Amasiya imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings14:14 Asenda golide yonse na silifa ne fipe fyonse ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ne fyuma fyonse ifya kwisano. Asendako na bantu bacikatilo
2Kings14:15 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoashi
2Kings14:16 Yehoashi ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe
2Kings14:17 Amasiya mwana Yoashi imfumu ya bena Yuda yaikele imyaka ikumi limo na isano (15) panuma ya mfwa yakwa Yehoashi mwana Yehoahasi imfumu ya bena Israeli.
2Kings14:18 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Amasiya
2Kings14:19 Abantu bamupangila mu Yerusalemu
2Kings14:20 Icitumbi cena balicibweseshe pali bakabalwe
2Kings14:21 Elyo abantu bonse aba mu Yuda babuula Asariya
2Kings14:22 Ena ewakuulile umusumba wa Elati cipya cipya no kuubwesesha ku bena Yuda panuma ya mfwa yakwa Amasiya
2Kings14:23 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na isano (15) uwakwa Amasiya mwana Yoashi imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings14:24 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe

2Kings15:1 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na cine lubali (27) uwakwa Yeroboamu imfumu ya bena Israeli
2Kings15:2 Ali ne myaka ikumi limo na mutanda (16) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Kings15:3 Acitile ifyalungama pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings15:4 Nomba incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika shena tashonawile iyoo. Abantu bakonkenyepofye ukoca amalambo no bubani mulya mwine.
2Kings15:5 Yawe epakulwalika imfumu ifibashi mpaka no bushiku yafwile. Kabili yaleikalafye yeka mu ŋanda yaiko. Yotamu umwana wakwe ewalateeka abantu ba mu calo.
2Kings15:6 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Asariya
2Kings15:7 Asariya ilyo afwile
2Kings15:8 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na cine konse konse (38) uwakwa Asariya imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings15:9 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings15:10 Shalumu umwana mwaume wakwa Yabeshi apangila Sakaria. Amusansa pa cinso ca bantu no kumwipaya elyo amupyana na pa bufumu.
2Kings15:11 Ifintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Sakaria fyalilembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli.
2Kings15:12 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyalandilwe kuli Yehu lyafikilishiwe ilyakuti
2Kings15:13 Shalumu umwana mwaume wakwa Yabeshi atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na pabula (39) uwakwa Usia imfumu ya bena Yuda. Kabili ateekele mu Samaria umweshi umo.
2Kings15:14 Elyo Menahemu mwana Gadi afuma ku Tirisa aya ku Samaria. Aya sansa Shalumu mwana Yabeshi mu Samaria
2Kings15:15 Ifintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Shalumu
2Kings15:16 Pa nshita ine ilya
2Kings15:17 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na pabula (39) uwakwa Asariya imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings15:18 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Pa nshita yakwe yonse iya pa bufumu tapilibwike ukufuma ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati ifyo aletelele na bena Israeli ukubifyako.
2Kings15:19 Puli imfumu ya ku Asiria aisa sansa icalo ca bena Israeli. Elyo Menahemu epakumupeela amatalanta ya silifa ikana limo (1
2Kings15:20 Menahemu indalama apeele Puli afumishe ku bena Israeli. Cila mukankala asonkele silifa indalama amashekeli amakumi yasano iyakupeela imfumu ya ku Asiria. Puli epakubwelelamo kumwakwe.
2Kings15:21 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Menahemu
2Kings15:22 Menahemu ilyo afwile
2Kings15:23 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na isano (50) uwakwa Asaria imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings15:24 Pekaya acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Tapilibwike ukufuma ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati ifyo aletelele na bena Israeli ukubifyako.
2Kings15:25 Peka uwali umukalamba wa bacilolo wakwe
2Kings15:26 Ifintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Pekaya
2Kings15:27 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yasano na ibili (52) iyakwa Asaria imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings15:28 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Tapilibwike ukufuma ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati ifyo aletelele na bena Israeli ukubifyako.
2Kings15:29 Mu nshita yakwa Peka imfumu ya bena Israeli
2Kings15:30 Elyo Hoshea umwana mwaume wakwa Elaya apangila Peka mwana Remaliya. Amusansa no kumwipaya. Elyo amupyana pa bufumu mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili (20) uwakwa Yotamu mwana Usia.
2Kings15:31 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Peka
2Kings15:32 Mu mwaka walenga ibili uwakwa Peka mwana Remaliya imfumu ya bena Israeli
2Kings15:33 Ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na isano (25) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka
2Kings15:34 Acitile ifisuma pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings15:35 Lelo incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika taonawile. Abantu batwalililefye ukutuula amalambo nokoca ububani mulya mwine. Yotamu akuula cipya cipya impongolo ya pamulu iya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Kings15:36 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yotamu
2Kings15:37 Mu nshiku shilya Yawe ayamba ukutuma Resini imfumu ya bena Aramu na Peka mwana Remaliya ukucusha Yuda.
2Kings15:38 Yotamu ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe no kumushiika bamushiikile pamo pene nabo mu musumba wakwa Davidi wishi. Elyo Ahasi umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu.
2Kings16:1 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) uwakwa Peka umwana mwaume uwakwa Remaliya
2Kings16:2 Ahasi ali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka
2Kings16:3 Alepashanya imyendele ya mfumu sha bena Israeli. Abuula no mwana wakwe umo umwaume amupisha mu mulilo no kumupeela ilambo mukukonkelela imisango yabipisha iyalecita imishobo imbi ilya Yawe afulumwine pa cinso ca bena Israeli.
2Kings16:4 Aletuula amalambo no koca ububani mu ncende shakupepelamo imilungu pa mulu wa mpili elyo na pesamba lya cimuti icafumba conse.
2Kings16:5 Elyo Resini imfumu ya bena Aramu na Peka mwana Remaliya imfumu ya bena Israeli baima ukuya lwisha umusumba wa Yerusalemu
2Kings16:6 Pa nshita ine ilya
2Kings16:7 Ahasi epakutuma inkombe ukuya eba Tigilati Pilese imfumu ya bena Asiria ati
2Kings16:8 Elyo Ahasi abuula silifa na golide iyali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ne yali ku ŋanda ye sano atumina imfumu ya ku Asiria nge cabupe.
2Kings16:9 Imfumu ya ku Asiria yamumfwila
2Kings16:10 Elyo imfumu Ahasi yaile ku Damasiko mukuya kumanya Tigilati Pilese imfumu ya ku Asiria
2Kings16:11 Kanshi Uria shimapepo epakukuula ubulambo ukulingana ne filangililo fyabuko ifyo imfumu Ahasi yatumine ukufuma ku Damasiko
2Kings16:12 Ilyo imfumu yabwela ukufuma ku Damasiko no kwisa mona ubulambo
2Kings16:13 Yatuulilapo ilambo lyakoca elyo no mutuulo wa cabunga
2Kings16:14 Afumya ku ntanshi ya ŋanda ubulambo bwa mukuba ubwali pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings16:15 Elyo imfumu Ahasi yapeela ifi fipope kuli Uria shimapepo ukuti
2Kings16:16 Kabili Uria shimapepo acita fyonse umo imfumu Ahasi yamukonkomeseshe.
2Kings16:17 Imfumu Ahasi yapangulula imbao sha mumbali elyo yafumyapo ne mbale shakusambilamo ukufuma pa mpanda shakusesha. Afumya icakusambilamo ca mukuba ukufuma pa ŋombe sha mukuba ishacikoseshe
2Kings16:18 Afumya insaka ye Sabata iyo bakuulile mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Kings16:19 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Ahasi
2Kings16:20 Ahasi ilyo afwile
2Kings17:1 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12) uwakwa Ahasi imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings17:2 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings17:3 Shalimaneseri imfumu ya bena Asiria yaisa mukulwisha Hoshea
2Kings17:4 Nomba imfumu ya ku Asiria yasangile ukuti Hoshea ali ncenjeshi
2Kings17:5 Imfumu ya ku Asiria yaishile sansa icalo conse
2Kings17:6 Mu mwaka walenga pabula uwakwa Hoshea
2Kings17:7 Fyonse ifi fyacitike pa mulandu wakuti abena Israeli bacitile ifyabubifi kuli Yawe Lesa wabo
2Kings17:8 elyo nokukonka imbela sha mishobo Yawe atamfishe pa ntanshi yabo
2Kings17:9 Abena Israeli balacita mu bumfisolo ifishali fyacishinka kuli Yawe Lesa wabo. Ukutula pa lupungu lwa balinshi ukufika ku musumba we linga
2Kings17:10 Bakuula inceshi sha mabwe ishakupepelapo ne nceshi sha mulungu Ashera pa mulu wa mpili ishitali na mwisamba lya cimuti icafumba.
2Kings17:11 Pali cila ncende yakupepelapo epo balaocela ububani ngefyo imishobo ilya Yawe atamfishe pantanshi yabo yalecita. Bacitile ifintu ifibi ifyakuti fyalenga na Yawe ukukalipa.
2Kings17:12 Balapepa utulubi
2Kings17:13 Yawe alisokele abena Israeli na bena Yuda ukupitila muli bakasesema na bakamona ukuti
2Kings17:14 Nomba bafilwa ukumfwa elyo batalamika imitima nge fikolwe fyabo
2Kings17:15 Bakaana ifipope fyakwe ne cipangano apangene ne fikolwe fyabo
2Kings17:16 Basuula mafunde yonse ayakwa Yawe Lesa wabo
2Kings17:17 Balapisha abana babo abaume na banakashi mu mulilo. Balabuka no kupanda ubwanga elyo no kuiposaika mukubifya pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings17:18 Kanshi Yawe epakufulilwa abena Israeli apakalamba
2Kings17:19 Elyo na bena Yuda bene balifililwe ukubaka amafunde yakwa Yawe Lesa wabo. Balakonkelela imisango iyo abena Israeli batendeke.
2Kings17:20 Ecalengele Yawe akaane umutundu wa bena Israeli onse
2Kings17:21 Ilyo apatula abena Israeli ukufuma ku ŋanda yakwa Davidi
2Kings17:22 Abena Israeli batwalililafye mu fyabubifi fyonse ifyo Yeroboamu acitile icakuti bafilwa no kulekako
2Kings17:23 mpakafye Yawe afika na pakubafumya pa cinso cakwe
2Kings17:24 Imfumu ya ku Asiria yaleta abantu ukufuma ku Babiloni
2Kings17:25 Ilyo batampile ukwikala mulya mwine tabalepepa Yawe
2Kings17:26 Elyo baeba imfumu ya ku Asiria ukuti
2Kings17:27 Elyo imfumu ya ku Asiria yapeela icebo ukuti
2Kings17:28 Kanshi umo shimapepo uwafumine ku Samaria muli bunkole aisa mukwikala mu Betele
2Kings17:29 Lelo cila mushobo waicitila imilungu wauko mu misumba baikelemo no kuubika mu mayanda yakupepelamo ayo abantu ba mu Samaria bakuulile mu ncende ishasansama.
2Kings17:30 Abaume ba ku Babiloni bapanga umulungu wa Sukoti Benoti
2Kings17:31 Abena Afi bapanga umulungu wa Nibihasi na Tataki
2Kings17:32 Balapepa Yawe
2Kings17:33 Lelo ilyo bayambile ukupepa Yawe
2Kings17:34 Ukufika na pa bushiku bwa lelo bacili batwalililafye mu micitile yakale. Tabapepa Yawe nangu ukumfwila ifipope elyo ne fikomo
2Kings17:35 Ilyo Yawe apangile icipangano na bena Israeli
2Kings17:36 Lelo Yawe uwamufumishe mu Egupto ku maka ayengi no kuboko ukwatambalala ena ekafye eo mulepepa. Kuli ena eko muletuula amalambo elyo no kumucindika.
2Kings17:37 Mufwile ukuba abatekanya lyonse no kubaka ifipope
2Kings17:38 Mwikalaba icipangano napangile na imwe
2Kings17:39 Lelo mulepepafye Yawe Lesa wenu
2Kings17:40 Nabo bakaana ukumfwa
2Kings17:41 Nelyo aba bantu balepepa Yawe
2Kings18:1 Mu mwaka walenga itatu uwakwa Hoshea umwana mwaume wakwa Elaya imfumu ya bena Israeli
2Kings18:2 Ali ne myaka yakufyalwa amakumi yabili na isano (25) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu. Kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myaka amakumi yabili na pabula (29). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Abiya umwana umwanakashi wakwa Sakaria.
2Kings18:3 Acitile ifyalungama pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings18:4 Aonaula incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika
2Kings18:5 Hesekia acetekele Yawe
2Kings18:6 Hesekia alebeela Yawe
2Kings18:7 Na Yawe aleba nankwe
2Kings18:8 Ukutampa pa lupungu lwa bakalinda ukufika ku musumba we linga
2Kings18:9 Mu mwaka walenga bune uwakwa Hesekia
2Kings18:10 Panuma ya myaka itatu abena Asiria baupoka. Kanshi Samaria baipokele mu mwaka walenga mutanda uwakwa Hesekia
2Kings18:11 Imfumu ya bena Asiria epakutamfisha abena Israeli ku Asiria no kuya bapeela ukwikala ku Hala
2Kings18:12 Ifi fyacitike pa mulandu wakuti bakeene ukumfwila Yawe Lesa wabo
2Kings18:13 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ine (14) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Hesekia
2Kings18:14 Kanshi Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda epakutuma amashiwi ku mfumu ya bena Asiria iyali ku Lakishi aiti
2Kings18:15 Kanshi Hesekia epakumupeela silifa yonse iyali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo ne yali mu ŋanda ya kwisano.
2Kings18:16 Pali iyi nshita Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda asapulula golide yonse iyo ashingwilile ku fiibi na ku maingwe ya mwi Tempele lyakwa Yawe no kupeela imfumu ya ku Asiria.
2Kings18:17 Imfumu ya ku Asiria yatuma umukalamba wa fita fyonse ifya nkondo
2Kings18:18 Ilyo baita imfumu
2Kings18:19 Uyu Rabushake asosa ati
2Kings18:20 Bushe iwe uletontonkanya ukuti ukulandaukafye amashiwi yeka yeka auti e mano nangu maka yakulwa inkondo
2Kings18:21 Mona
2Kings18:22 Kabili nga wasosa kuli ine auti
2Kings18:23 “‘Kanshi isa nomba upangane na shikulu
2Kings18:24 Kuti wafulumuna shani cilolo umo uwacepesha pali bacilolo bakwa shikulu
2Kings18:25 Kabili bushe ine muleti njishile mukonaula ino ncende ukwabula ishiwi ukufuma kuli Yawe? Yawe umwine eunjebele ukwimina cino calo no kuconaula.’”
2Kings18:26 Elyo Eliakimu mwana Hilikiya
2Kings18:27 Lelo uyu Rabushake ayasuka ati
2Kings18:28 Elyo uyu Rabushake aiminina aololoka no kubilikisha mu Cihibulu ati
2Kings18:29 Ifi efyo imfumu yasosa aiti
2Kings18:30 Mwileka Hesekia amusembeleke ukutetekela muli Yawe nga alanda ukuti
2Kings18:31 “Mwimumfwila Hesekia. Ifi efyo imfumu ya ku Asiria yasosa ifyakuti
2Kings18:32 mpaka nkese mubuula no kumutwala mu calo icabafye nge calo cenu
2Kings18:33 Bushe kwalibako umulungu wa mushobo uuli onse uwapokololako icalo cauko ukufuma ku kuboko kwa mfumu ya bena Asiria?
2Kings18:34 Nge milungu ya ku Hamati na ku Apadi ili kwi? Nge milungu ya ku Sefafaimu
2Kings18:35 Bushe mulungu nshi pa milungu ya fyalo ifi fyonse walitala aupusushako icalo cauko kuli ine? Nga nomba imwe cinshi ico muleelenganishisha ukuti Yawe akapusushako Yerusalemu ku kuboko kwandi?”
2Kings18:36 Lelo abantu baikalafye tondolo ukwabula ukuti bamwasuke
2Kings18:37 Elyo Eliakimu mwana Hilikiya uwali mushika wa kwisano
2Kings19:1 Ilyo imfumu Hesekia yaumfwile ifi
2Kings19:2 Kabili yabuula Eliakimu mushika wa kwisano
2Kings19:3 Bamweba ati
2Kings19:4 Limbi kuti caba ukuti Yawe Lesa obe naumfwa amashiwi yonse aya uyu Rabushake uo shikulu wakwe imfumu ya ku Asiria itumine kukutuka Lesa uwamweo. Elyo na pakuti Yawe Lesa obe akalipe pa mashiwi aya omfwile. Eico pepelako abashele abacili abomi.’”
2Kings19:5 Ilyo bacilolo ba mfumu Hesekia bafika kuli Esaya
2Kings19:6 nao Esaya ababweseshamo ati
2Kings19:7 Umfwa
2Kings19:8 Ilyo uyu Rabushake aumfwa ukuti imfumu yabo naifuma ku Lakishi
2Kings19:9 Nomba Senakerubi apokelela amashiwi ayakuti Tiraka imfumu ya bena Kushi naifuma mukwisa mulwisha. Kanshi epakutuma nakabili inkombe kuli Hesekia na mashiwi yakuti
2Kings19:10 “Mwebe Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda ukuti
2Kings19:11 Mu cacine walyumfwa ifyo imfumu sha ku Asiria shacita ku fyalo fyonse
2Kings19:12 Nge milungu ya mishobo iyo iyaonawilwe ku fikolwe fyandi bushe yalibapokolweleko? Imilungu ya Gosani
2Kings19:13 “Ili kwi imfumu ya ku Hamati
2Kings19:14 Hesekia apokele kalata ukufuma ku nkombe nokubelenga. Elyo aya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Kings19:15 Elyo Hesekia apepa kuli Yawe ati
2Kings19:16 Teya ukutwi
2Kings19:17 “Cacine we Yawe ukuti imfumu sha bena Asiria shalyonaula imishobo yonse iyi ne fyalo fyaiko.
2Kings19:18 Shaliposa imilungu yabo mu mulilo no kuonaula. Nangu cali ukuti tafyali milungu
2Kings19:19 Nomba we Yawe
2Kings19:20 Elyo Esaya mwana Amosi atuma amashiwi kuli Hesekia ati
2Kings19:21 Ili e shiwi Yawe alandile pali ena ilyakuti
2Kings19:22 Ninani uo watukile no kupontela? Nani uo waotokele no kutulumwina amenso? Cine ni ku Wamushilo wakwa Israeli.
2Kings19:23 Ukupitila mu nkombe shobe emo utukile Imfumu insele shingi. Kabili usosele auti
2Kings19:24 Ninyimba ifishima mu fyalo fya kutali
2Kings19:25 “‘Bushe tawaumfwa ukuti nacipekenye ukufuma kale? Mu nshiku shakale emo napekenye ifi
2Kings19:26 Abantu babo amaka nayapwamo
2Kings19:27 “‘Lelo nalishiba uko wikala
2Kings19:28 Apo iwe waliitutumuna pali ine
2Kings19:29 “Ici ecikaba icishibilo cobe
2Kings19:30 Kabili abakashalapo mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda
2Kings19:31 Pantu mu Yerusalemu emukafuma abantu abakashalamo abomi
2Kings19:32 “Eico ifi efyo Yawe alanda palwa mfumu ya ku Asiria. “‘Tayakengilemo muli uno musumba nangu ukulasamo umufwi muno. Tayakapalame naikata inkwela ku musumba
2Kings19:33 Inshila yaishilemo eyo ikabwelelamo. Muli uno musumba mwena tayaingilemo nakalya.’ Efyalanda Yawe.
2Kings19:34 ‘Ndecingilila uno musumba no kuupususha
2Kings19:35 Awe
2Kings19:36 Kanshi Senakeribu imfumu ya bena Asiria epakufuma mu nkambi nokubwelelamo. Abwelela ku Ninife eko aya ikala.
2Kings19:37 Ubushiku bumo ninshi alepepa mwitempele lya mulungu wakwe Nisroki
2Kings20:1 Mu nshiku shine shilya
2Kings20:2 Hesekia nao epakupilibukila ku cibumba
2Kings20:3 “Nakulomba we Yawe

2Kings20:5 “Bwelela kuli Hesekia intungulushi ya bantu bandi

2Kings20:7 Elyo Esaya asosa ati
2Kings20:8 Hesekia alitalile aipusha Esaya ati
2Kings20:9 Esaya ayasuka ati
2Kings20:10 Hesekia asosa ati
2Kings20:11 Elyo kasesema Esaya apepa kuli Yawe. Elyo nao Yawe alenga icinshingwa ukulola kunuma intampulo ikumi umusango cacitikilemo pa matabo yakwa Ahasi.
2Kings20:12 Pali ilya nshita Merodaki Baladani umwana mwaume wakwa Baladani imfumu ya ku Babiloni yatumine Hesekia amakalata elyo ne cabupe
2Kings20:13 Hesekia ilyo apokelela ishi nkombe
2Kings20:14 Elyo Esaya kasesema aya ku mfumu Hesekia no kumwipusha ati
2Kings20:15 Kasesema aipusha ati
2Kings20:16 Elyo Esaya aeba Hesekia ati
2Kings20:17 Inshita ileisa ilyo ifintu fyonse mu ŋanda yobe iye sano
2Kings20:18 Kabili na pa ba mu lupwa lobe
2Kings20:19 Hesekia ayasuka ati
2Kings20:20 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Hesekia
2Kings20:21 Hesekia ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Elyo Manase umwana wakwe amupyana pa bufumu.
2Kings21:1 Manase ali ne myaka ikumi limo na ibili (12) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Yuda
2Kings21:2 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings21:3 Akuula cipya cipya incende shakupepelamo isho Hesekia wishi aonawile. Apangila Baali ifibumbili fya malambo elyo abasa no luceshi lwa mulungu Asher
2Kings21:4 Akuula ifibumbili fya malambo mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe umo Yawe asosele ati
2Kings21:5 Mu mansa shonse shibili isha mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Kings21:6 Atuula ilambo lyakupisha umwana wakwe umwaume mu mulilo
2Kings21:7 Abuula uluceshi ulwa mulungu Ashera
2Kings21:8 Nshakaleke nakabili ukuti amakasa ya bena Israeli yakaleendauka ukufuma mu calo napeele ifikolwe fyabo
2Kings21:9 Lelo abantu tabaumfwile. Manase alibafulungenye
2Kings21:10 Yawe epakulanda ukupitila mu babomfi bakwe bakasesema ati
2Kings21:11 “Manase imfumu ya bena Yuda nacita ifyamakankamike. Nacita ububifi ubwakucila na pa bena Amoli abamutangilile
2Kings21:12 Kanshi ifi efyo Yawe
2Kings21:13 Ndi nokupima Yerusalemu ku mwando napimineko Samaria
2Kings21:14 Nkaposa abantu bandi abakashalapo no kubapeela mu minwe ya balwani babo. Bakabasansa no kutapa ifyuma fyabo fyonse
2Kings21:15 pantu nabacita ifyabipa pa cinso candi no kunenga ukukalipa
2Kings21:16 Na cimbi cakuti Manase alisumya umulopa wakaele uwingi uwakwisula mu Yerusalemu ukufuma ku mpela ukufika na ku mpela imbi
2Kings21:17 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Manase
2Kings21:18 Manase ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe kabili bamushiikile mwibala lye sano lyakwe ilyakwa Usa. Elyo umwana wakwe Amoni amupyana pa bufumu.
2Kings21:19 Amoni ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na ibili (22) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Kings21:20 Amoni acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings21:21 Aendele mu nshila shonse ishakwa wishi
2Kings21:22 Asangukila Yawe
2Kings21:23 Bacilolo bakwa Amoni bamupangila
2Kings21:24 Elyo abekalacalo epakwipaya bonse abaimine nokwipaya imfumu Amoni. Elyo babuula umwana wakwe Yosaya eo bapyanikisha pa bufumu.
2Kings21:25 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Amoni nefyo acitile
2Kings21:26 Bamushiikile mu nshinshi yakwe ya mwibala lyakwa Usa. Elyo Yosaya umwana wakwe amupyana pa bufumu.
2Kings22:1 Yosaya ali ne myaka cine konse konse ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Kings22:2 Yosaya acitile ifyawama pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kwendela mu nshila shonse ishakwa wishi Davidi ukwabula ukulayalukila ku kulyo nangu ku kuso.
2Kings22:3 Mu mwaka walenga ukumi limo na cine konse konse (18) uwa pa bufumu
2Kings22:4 “Kabiye kuli Hilikiya shimapepo mukalamba no kuya mweba ukuti alonganike indalama shonse isho abantu baleta ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Kings22:5 Muye mumwebe apeele ishi indalama ku bantu abangalila umulimo wakuwamisha Yawe iŋanda. Kabili muye mona nokuti aba bantu nabo balipila ababomfi abawamya iŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Kings22:6 ekutila ku bapala imbao
2Kings22:7 Lelo tacilefwaikwa ukubepusha pafyo babomfeshe indalama pantu balikwata icishinka mu mibombele yabo.”
2Kings22:8 Hilikiya shimapepo mukalamba aeba Shafani uwali kalemba ati
2Kings22:9 Elyo Shafani uwali kalemba aya ku mfumu no kuya eba imfumu ati
2Kings22:10 Elyo Shafani uwali kalemba aeba imfumu ati
2Kings22:11 Ilyo imfumu yaumfwa amashiwi ya mu citabo ca mafunde
2Kings22:12 Imfumu epakupeela ifipope ifi kuli Hilikiya shimapepo
2Kings22:13 “Kabiyeni mwishina lyandi nelya bantu nelya Yuda yonse
2Kings22:14 Hilikiya shimapepo
2Kings22:15 Kasesema mwanakashi abeba ati
2Kings22:16 Yawe alanda ati
2Kings22:17 Pa mulandu wakuti balinsangukila no kocela ububani imilungu imbi elyo no kunenga ukuti nkalipe pa mulandu wa tulubi uto bapanga ne minwe yabo
2Kings22:18 Kebeni imfumu ya bena Yuda iyacimutuma ukwisa ipusha kuli Yawe ukuti
2Kings22:19 pantu umutima obe naulanguluka elyo no kuicefya pa cinso cakwa Yawe ilyo wacumfwa ifyo Yawe acilanda palwa ino ncende na bantu baiko
2Kings22:20 Kanshi iwe ndi nokukutwala ukwalala ifikolwe fyobe
2Kings23:1 Elyo imfumu Yosaya yaitile abakalamba bonse aba mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu.
2Kings23:2 Aya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe pamo na bena Yuda abaume
2Kings23:3 Imfumu Yosaya yaiminina mupepi no luceshi elyo yabukulusha icipangano pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings23:4 Imfumu yapeela icipope kuli Hilikiya shimapepo mukalamba
2Kings23:5 Atamfya bashimapepo babufi abo imfumu sha bena Yuda shasontele ukulaoca ububani pa ncende shakupepelapo isha mu misumba ya mu Yuda na kuli shonse ishashinguluka Yerusalemu. Bonse abalefukilisha ububani kuli Baali
2Kings23:6 Afumya uluceshi lwa mulungu Ashera mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Kings23:7 Atobaula na mayanda ya bacilende ba ku mfuba abaume ayali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Kings23:8 Yosaya abwesha bashimapepo bonse ukufuma mu misumba ya mu Yuda elyo aonaula incende shonse balepepelamo
2Kings23:9 Nangu cali ukuti aba bashimapepo ba ishi ncende shakupepelamo
2Kings23:10 Aonaula ne ncende ya Tofeti iyali mu mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu
2Kings23:11 Afumya pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe bakabalwe abo imfumu sha bena Yuda shatuulile ku kasuba. Aba bakabalwe bali mu lukungu ulwali mupepi no muputule wakwa cilolo ishina lyakwe ni Natani Meleki. Yosaya aoca na maceleta ayo balebomfya pakupepa akasuba.
2Kings23:12 Abongolola ifibumbili fya malambo imfumu sha bena Yuda shakuulile pa mutenge mupepi no muputule wa pamulu uwakwa Ahasi
2Kings23:13 Imfumu yatobaula incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika ishali ku kabanga ka Yerusalemu lwa ku masamba ya Lupili lwa Bonaushi isho Solomoni imfumu ya bena Israeli yakuulile Ashitoreti
2Kings23:14 Yosaya atobaula inceshi sha mabwe balepepelapo
2Kings23:15 Kabili aonaula no bulambo bwa ku Betele
2Kings23:16 Yosaya acebuka elyo amona inshinshi ishali pa ncende ya lupili. Aya buulamo amafupa aisa yocela pa bulambo pakuti abukoweshe
2Kings23:17 Imfumu yaipusha aiti
2Kings23:18 Imfumu yabeba ati
2Kings23:19 Nga filya fine acitile ku Betele
2Kings23:20 Yosaya aya ipaila pa fibumbili fya malambo bashimapepo bonse aba mu ncende shonse ishakupepelamo
2Kings23:21 Imfumu epakupeela ici cipope ku bantu bonse icakuti
2Kings23:22 Takwatalile akuba ukusefya inshikunkulu ye Pasaka ngeyi ukufumafye mu nshiku abapingushi batungulwile icalo ca Israeli ukufika mu nshita sha mfumu sha bena Israeli ne mfumu sha bena Yuda.
2Kings23:23 Lelo mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) uwakwa Yosaya
2Kings23:24 Yosaya akonkanyapo ukufumya imilimo ya mipashi ya bafwa no kubuka. Afumyamo ne milungu iyo balependwilako pa mayanda
2Kings23:25 Ukufumafye lintu talabapo nangu ilyo afuminepo
2Kings23:26 Lelo nangu cali ifi
2Kings23:27 Kanshi Yawe epakusosa ati
2Kings23:28 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yosaya
2Kings23:29 Ilyo Yosaya acili ali mfumu
2Kings23:30 Ababomfi bakwa Yosaya ebasenda icitumbi cakwe mwiceleta ukufuma ku Megido ukuleta ku Yerusalemu no kwisa mushiika mu nshinshi yakwe. Elyo abantu ba mu calo babuula Yehoahasi
2Kings23:31 Yehoahasi ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na itatu (23) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Kings23:32 Yehoahasi acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe filya fine fyonse fyacitile fikolwe fyakwe.
2Kings23:33 Farao Neko amukaka mu minyololo pa Ribula mu calo ca ku Hamati pakuti eba uwakuteeka mu Yerusalemu. Elyo apinda na bena Yuda umusonko uwa matalanta ya silifa umwanda umo (100) ne talanta lya golide limo.
2Kings23:34 Farao Neko abuula Eliakimu mwana Yosaya eo abika pa bufumu pa cifulo cakwa wishi Yosaya
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakimu alepeela Farao Neko indalama sha silifa na golide apindile. Kanshi epakusonkesha icalo conse indalama pakuti akumanishe ukucita ifyo bamupindile. Alesonkesha pakuti silifa na golide fifume ku bantu ba mu calo ukulingana nomo apekanishishe.
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakimu ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na isano (25) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Kings23:37 Kabili Yehoyakimu acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe filya fine fyonse fyacitile fikolwe fyakwe.
2Kings24:1 Mu nshita ya bufumu bwakwa Yehoyakimu
2Kings24:2 Yawe epakutuma ifita fya bena Kaludea
2Kings24:3 Mu cishinka
2Kings24:4 Pali ifi alundilepo no mulandu wakusumya umulopa wakaele
2Kings24:5 Nomba palwa fintu fimbi ifya pambufumu bwakwa Yehoyakimu elyo na fyonse ifyo acitile
2Kings24:6 Yehoyakimu ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Elyo umwana wakwe umwaume Yehoiyakini ewamupyana pa bufumu.
2Kings24:7 Imfumu ya mu Egupto tayatalile aifuma nakabili mu calo caiko mukuya lwisha
2Kings24:8 Yehoiyakini ali ne myaka ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Kings24:9 Yehoiyakini acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe ngefyo wishi acitile.
2Kings24:10 Pali ilya ine nshita
2Kings24:11 Elyo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni umwine aisa ku musumba ninshi bacilolo bakwe nabaushinguluka.
2Kings24:12 Kanshi Yehoiyakini imfumu ya bena Yuda
2Kings24:13 Ngefyo Yawe asosele
2Kings24:14 Asenda muli bunkole abantu bonse aba mu Yerusalemu
2Kings24:15 Nebukadinesa asenda Yehoiyakini muli bunkole ku Babiloni pamo na nyina wa mfumu
2Kings24:16 Imfumu ya ku Babiloni yabuula ifita fya nkondo ifyakosa amakana cine lubali (7
2Kings24:17 Abuula Matania
2Kings24:18 Sedekia ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na umo (21) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Kings24:19 Sedekia acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Kings24:20 Ni pa mulandu wakuti Yawe alifulilwe
2Kings25:1 Kanshi mu mwaka walenga pabula uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Sedekia
2Kings25:2 Ifita fyashingulwike umusumba ukufika pa mwaka we kumi limo na umo (11) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Sedekia.
2Kings25:3 Pa bushiku bwalenga pabula mu mweshi walenga bune
2Kings25:4 Amalinga ya ku musumba epakulabongololwa. Pakumona ifi
2Kings25:5 Nomba ifita fya bena Kaludea fyakunkunika imfumu Sedekia
2Kings25:6 Fyati fikate imfumu
2Kings25:7 Baipaya abana abaume bakwa Sedekia pa cinso cakwe. Elyo ena bamutonkola amenso
2Kings25:8 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali mu mweshi walenga isano
2Kings25:9 Kanshi Nebusaradani epakoca iŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Kings25:10 Ifita fyonse ifya bena Kaludea ifyali no mukalamba wa bakalinda ba mfumu batobaula na malinga ayashingulwike umusumba wa Yerusalemu.
2Kings25:11 Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda wa mfumu asenda muli bunkole abantu bonse abashele mu musumba
2Kings25:12 Lelo uyu mukalamba wa bakalinda ashako abekalacalo bamo abalanda nganshi abakuti balesunga imyangashi elyo no kulalima amabala.
2Kings25:13 Abena Kaludea batobaula inceshi sha mukuba
2Kings25:14 Kabili basenda imipika
2Kings25:15 Umukalamba wa bakalinda wa mfumu asendafye fyonse ifyapangilwe na golide na silifa
2Kings25:16 Asenda umukuba wa ku nceshi shibili
2Kings25:17 Cila luceshi lwalepele lumo lumo amakubiti ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18). Umutwe wa mukuba umo uwali pa mulu wa luceshi wali amakubiti yatatu ukulola mumulu
2Kings25:18 Kabili Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda asenda Seraya shimapepo mukalamba
2Kings25:19 Ku bashelepo mu musumba
2Kings25:20 Awe Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda abatwala bonse ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni
2Kings25:21 Kulya kwine ku Ribula
2Kings25:22 Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni yasonta Gedalia umwana wakwa Ahikamu
2Kings25:23 Ilyo bacilolo wa fita pamo na bantu babo baumfwa ukuti imfumu ya ku Babiloni naisonta Gedalia ukuba umulashi
2Kings25:24 Gedalia alapa umulapo wakubalaya
2Kings25:25 Nomba mu mweshi walenga cine lubali
2Kings25:26 Pali iyi nshita
2Kings25:27 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na cine lubali (37) apo basendele Yehoiyakini imfumu ya bena Yuda muli bunkole
2Kings25:28 Efili Melodaki alemutentemba
2Kings25:29 Kanshi Yehoiyakini epakufula ifyakufwala fya mu cifungo
2Kings25:30 Kabili imfumu Efili Melodaki yalemupeela ifintu fyonse ifyo alekabila cila bushiku pa nshiku shonse ishashele ku bumi bwakwe.

1Chronicles4:39 Elyo baile kuntanshi ku bwingililo bwe shika lya Gedori
1Chronicles4:40 Eko baile sanga umulemfwe uwalelema elyo ne ncende iyikalamba iyamutende kabili iyabula icongo. Pantu bamo abena Hami eko kale baikele.
1Chronicles4:41 Aba abalumbwilwe mu mashina baishile mu nshiku shakwa Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda. Elyo baisa sansa na bena Hami mu matenti yabo pamo na bena Meuni abali kulya

1Chronicles4:43 Kabili bacimfishe abena Amaleki bonse abashele pali aba ababutwike. Kabili kulya kwine eko baikala ukufika na lelo.

1Chronicles11:24 Ifi efyabombele Benaya mwana Yehoiyada. Nao wine ali no lulumbi nge mpalume shabulwi shitatu.
1Chronicles11:25 Apeelwe umucinshi uukalamba nganshi ukucila na pa baume bene bene amakumi yatatu (30) abaletungulula abashilika

1Chronicles29:2 Nimomba na maka yandi yonse ukupekanya ifyakukuulila iŋanda yakwa Lesa

1Chronicles29:4 Emukuti
1Chronicles29:5 Nimpekanya golide pa milimo ya golide

1Chronicles29:7 Bapeele ku mulimo wa ŋanda yakwa Lesa amatalanta amakana yasano (5
1Chronicles29:8 Onse uwakwete utumabwe twamutengo apeela ku cipao ca ŋanda yakwa Yawe no kufisha mu minwe yakwa Yehieli umwina Geshoni.
1Chronicles29:9 Icintubwingi calisansamwike pa musango wa fintu intungulushi shabo shasekelele ukupeela kwakuitemenwa ne mitima yabo kuli Yawe. Kabili imfumu Davidi nayo yalisansamwike nganshi.
1Chronicles29:10 Davidi alumbanya Yawe pa cinso cabalongene bonse alanda ati

2Chronicles1:16 Bakabalwe bakwa Solomoni babashitile ku calo ca Egupto na ku Kuwe. Bashimakwebo ba mfumu ebabashitile ukufuma ku Kuwe.
2Chronicles1:17 Umutengo we celeta limo ukufuma ku Egupto wali indalama amashekeli ya silifa imyanda mutanda (600) elyo kabalwe umo pa mashekeli ya silifa umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150). Bashimakwebo bakwa Solomoni nabo baleshitisha ku shamfumu shonse isha bena Hiti na bena Aramu.

2Chronicles3:2 Pa bushiku bwalenga shibili mu mweshi walenga ibili mu mwaka walenga bune uwa pa bufumu
2Chronicles3:3 Umufula Solomoni apangile uwakukuulapo iŋanda yakwa Lesa wali amakubiti amakumi mutanda (60) mubutali elyo na makubiti amakumi yabili (20) mubwipi
2Chronicles3:4 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi wa ŋanda walepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) ukucilinganya mubwipi
2Chronicles3:5 Atantika imbao sha fimuti fya paini mu muputule ukalamba
2Chronicles3:6 Ayanshika mu ŋanda utumabwe utwayemba. Kabili abomfya na golide wa ku Pafaimu.
2Chronicles3:7 Ashingula golide ku myalo ya mu mutenge
2Chronicles3:8 Akuula Umuputule uwamushilo icine cine. Ubutali bwauko ukucilinganya iŋanda walepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) elyo na makubiti amakumi yabili mubwipi (20). Ashingula mukati monse na golide uwawamishiwa bwino uwa matalanta imyanda mutanda (600)
2Chronicles3:9 insunga sha golide shafinine ukucila citika wa kilo. Kabili ashingula golide mu ncende sha pamulu.
2Chronicles3:10 Mu muputule wamushilo icine cine apangilamo bakerubi babili
2Chronicles3:11 Amapindo ya bakerubi yalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20). Ipindo limo lyalepele amakubiti yasano kabili lyashinta mu cibumba ca ŋanda
2Chronicles3:12 Kabili mu musango umo wine ipindo limo ilyakwa kerubi wabubili lyalepele amakubiti yasano elyo lyashinta ku cibumba cibiye ica ŋanda
2Chronicles3:13 Ubutali bwa mapindo ya bakerubi ninshi nayasuntinkana yalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20). Bapangilwe nabeminina pa makasa yabo baloseshe amenso ku muputule ukalamba.
2Chronicles3:14 Apanga icisalu icakucingako ku bushishi bwacifufya

2Chronicles4:1 Kabili apangile ubulambo bwa mukuba ubwali amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) mubutali na makubiti amakumi yabili (20) mubwipi
2Chronicles4:2 Apanga icishiba icaengululwa ku fyela
2Chronicles4:3 Pesamba apangilepo ifinama ifyapala bacilume ba ŋombe ukucishinguluka. Fyali ikumi limo pali kubiti umo. Apanga bacilume ba ŋombe ashitantika mu milongo ibili nashikambatila ku cishiba.
2Chronicles4:4 Icishiba caikala pa mulu wa bacilume ba ŋombe ikumi limo na babili (12). Batatu balolesha ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
2Chronicles4:5 Umutika waciko waba nge cisansa ca lupi
2Chronicles4:6 Apanga imbale shakusambilamo ikumi limo

2Chronicles4:8 Kabili apanga amatebulo ikumi ayabika mwi Tempele. Abika yasano ku kapinda ka ku kuso elyo na yasano ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Kabili apanga inweno umwanda umo (100) isha golide ishakusanshilako.
2Chronicles4:9 Apanga ulubansa lwa bashimapepo. Elyo apanga icibansa icikalamba elyo ne fiibi fya ici cibansa kabili ashingulako no mukuba ku fiibi.
2Chronicles4:10 Abika icishiba lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso ukulemenena lwa ku kabanga.
2Chronicles4:11 Kabili apanga amalongo elyo na bafosholo elyo ne nweno shakusanshilako. Kanshi Huramu epakupwisha imilimo yonse iyo abombele imfumu Solomoni iya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa:

2Chronicles7:2 Bashimapepo bafilwa no kwingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe pa mulandu wakuti ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bwaisula mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Chronicles7:3 Ilyo abana bakwa Israeli bonse bamona uko umulilo ulefuma ku mulu elyo no bucindami bwakwa Yawe buli pa mulu we Tempele
2Chronicles7:4 Elyo imfumu na bantu bonse batuula amalambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe.

2Chronicles7:6 Bashimapepo bonse baya iminina pa ncende shabo

2Chronicles7:8 Kanshi Solomoni pali ilya nshita epakucita inshikunkulu iya nshiku cine lubali ninshi ulukuta ulukalamba ulwa bena Israeli lonse luli nankwe
2Chronicles7:9 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse balongana bonse pamo
2Chronicles7:10 Pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shitatu (23) mu mweshi walenga cine lubali epo abweseshemo abantu ku mayanda yabo. Babwelelamo abasansamuka no kusekelela mu mitima yabo pa fintu fyonse ifisuma Yawe acitile Davidi na Solomoni elyo na bantu bakwe abena Israeli.
2Chronicles7:11 Kanshi Solomoni efyo apwile ukukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo ne sano lyakwe
2Chronicles7:12 Elyo Yawe amonekela kuli ena mu nshita ya bushiku no kumweba ati
2Chronicles7:13 Inshita shimo nakulaisala umulu icakuti ne mfula yakaana ukuloka
2Chronicles7:14 Lelo nga cakuti mwe bantu bandi
2Chronicles7:15 Nomba amenso yandi yakulaikala ayaisuka na matwi yandi yakulakutika ku mapepo ayakulapeelwa pali ino ncende.
2Chronicles7:16 Ninsala no kusangulula ino iŋanda pakuti ishina lyandi likabelelele pano inshita yonse. Amenso yandi no mutima wandi fyakulaba pano lyonsefye.

2Chronicles8:7 Kwaliko abantu bambi abashele mu calo abo abashali abena Israeli pamo nga bena Hiti

2Chronicles8:10 Aba ebali bacilolo bakalamba abakwa Solomoni imfumu

2Chronicles9:1 Ilyo namfumu wa ku Sheba aumfwile ululumbi lwa pali Solomoni
2Chronicles9:2 Solomoni nao ayasukafye amepusho yakwe yonse. Tapali icamucushishe pakumulondolwela.
2Chronicles9:3 Ilyo namfumu wa ku Sheba amwene amano yali muli Solomoni
2Chronicles9:4 icakulya icali petebulo lyakwe
2Chronicles9:5 Elyo aeba imfumu Solomoni ati
2Chronicles9:6 Lelo nshasumine ifyo balelanda mpakafye naisa imwena na menso yandi. Kabili mona ifyo balondolwele kuli ine tafyafikile na pali citika wa bwingi bwa mano yobe. Iwe walicila pa lulumbi naumfwile.
2Chronicles9:7 “Yangu ifyo bashuka abaume bobe! Yangu ifyo bashuka bacilolo bobe
2Chronicles9:8 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe Lesa obe
2Chronicles9:9 Elyo apeela imfumu amatalanta umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120) aya golide
2Chronicles9:10 Abantu bakwa Hiramu elyo na bantu bakwa Solomoni ebasendele golide ukufuma ku Ofiri. Kabili ebaletele ne milando ya cimuti ca aligumi elyo no tumabwe utwauma umutengo.
2Chronicles9:11 Imfumu yabomfya imilando ya aligumi pakupanga amatabo ya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe na ku ŋanda ye sano. Kabili afibomfya mukupangilako amaseese ne nsango ifya bakemba wa nyimbo. Kabili takwatalile akuba ifyaba ngefi mu calo ca bena Yuda.
2Chronicles9:12 Imfumu Solomoni epakupeela namfumu wa ku Sheba fyonse ifyo afwaile kabili ifyo alombele. Kanshi ena epakumupeela ifintu ifingi ukucila na pafyo aletele. Elyo namfumu wa ku Sheba pamo na babomfi bakwe baima babwelelamo ku calo kumwabo.
2Chronicles9:13 Golide yonse iyo Solomoni alepoka cila mwaka yalefika amatalanta imyanda mutanda na makumi mutanda na mutanda (666)
2Chronicles9:14 ukukanalundapo uwa mu misonko uwalesonka bakashitisha elyo na bamakwebo. Kabili imfumu shonse isha ku Arabia elyo na balashi ba mu calo balaleta golide na silifa kuli Solomoni.
2Chronicles9:15 Elyo imfumu Solomoni apanga inkwela imyanda ibili (200) ishikalamba kuli golide uwakufula. Cila nkwela afulilako golide uwafina amakilo yatatu na citika.
2Chronicles9:16 Kabili apanga inkwela ishinono imyanda itatu (300) kuli golide uwakufula. Pali cila nkwela afulilapo golide uwafina kilo umo na citika. Imfumu epakuya bika ishi nkwela mu muputule wa mwisano uo baleita ukuti “Umutengo wa ku Lebanoni.”
2Chronicles9:17 Kabili imfumu yapanga icipuna ca lulumbi ku meno ya nsofu elyo yalambatikako golide wine wine.
2Chronicles9:18 Ici icipuna cakwete amatabo mutanda elyo cakwete ne cakunyantapo ica golide. Ku mbali shonse isha cipuna kwali ifyakutuushapo amaboko
2Chronicles9:19 Inkalamo shimbi ikumi limo na shibili (12) shaiminina pa matabo yonse mutanda
2Chronicles9:20 Ifipe fyonse ifyakunwenamo ifya mfumu Solomoni fyali ifya golide elyo ne fipe fyonse ifya mu ŋanda ye sano iyo baleita ukuti “Umutengo wa ku Lebanoni” fyali fya golide wine wine. Tamwali icapangilwe kuli silifa pantu silifa tayali iyacindama mu nshiku shakwa Solomoni.
2Chronicles9:21 Imfumu yakwete amato aya ku Tashishi ayengi umwalebomba abantu bakwa Hiramu. Umuku umo pa myaka itatu aya mato yalebwela nayasenda golide
2Chronicles9:22 Imfumu Solomoni yacilile imfumu shonse isha pano isonde ubunonshi na mano.
2Chronicles9:23 Kabili shonse imfumu sha pano isonde shalefwaisha ukumonana na Solomoni kukumfwako amano Lesa abikile mu mutima wakwe.
2Chronicles9:24 Panuma ya cila mwaka
2Chronicles9:25 Solomoni akwete utuyanda amakana yane (4
2Chronicles9:26 Kabili ewali kateeka pa shafumu shonse ukufuma ku mumana wa Yufurate ukufika ku calo ca Bafilisiti ukuya na ku mupaka wa bena Egupto.
2Chronicles9:27 Imfumu yalengele ubwingi bwa silifa ukufula mu Yerusalemu kwati mabwe elyo ne fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda ukufula kwati fimuti fya mwisamba lya mpili ifya mikunyu.
2Chronicles9:28 Bakabalwe bakwa Solomoni babashitile ukufuma ku Egupto elyo no kufuma mu fyalo fimbi.
2Chronicles9:29 Lelo pa milandu imbi iya pa bufumu bwakwa Solomoni ukufumafye pa kutendeka mpaka na ku mpela

2Chronicles22:1 Abantu ba mu Yerusalemu babuulile Ahasia
2Chronicles22:2 Ahasia atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu ninshi ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na ibili (22)
2Chronicles22:3 Nao wine aisa yamba ukwenda mu mibeele ya ba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu pantu nyina ewalemukoselesha mukucita ifibi.
2Chronicles22:4 Acitile ifintu ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Chronicles22:5 Kabili ni bamo bene ebamupandile amano ilyo ena na Yoramu mwana Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli baile mukulwisha Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu ku Ramoti Gileadi. Na muli ubu bulwi Yoramu balimucenene ku bena Aramu.
2Chronicles22:6 Kanshi efyo abweleleko aisa ku Yesireli mukutensha ifilonda bamucenene pa Ramoti mu nkondo bakwete na Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu. Elyo Ahasia mwana Yehoramu imfumu ya bena Yuda aya ku Yesireli mukupempula Yoramu mwana Ahabu pantu alicenenwe ku bulwi.
2Chronicles22:7 Lelo ici cali cilubo icikalamba kuli Ahasia
2Chronicles22:8 Cilya Yehu acili alebomba umulimo wakulofya aba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu
2Chronicles22:9 Kabili aima aya alefwaya ukwali Ahasia
2Chronicles22:10 Ilyo Ataliya nyina wakwa Ahasia amona ukuti umwana wakwe bamwipaya
2Chronicles22:11 Lelo Yehosheba
2Chronicles22:12 Aikele ninshi balimufisa pa myaka mutanda mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa pa nshita yonse Ataliya ateekele icalo.
2Chronicles23:1 Mu mwaka walenga cine lubali
2Chronicles23:2 Aba bantu bapitana mukati ka calo conse ica bena Yuda balelonganika abena Levi elyo ne ntungulushi sha mishobo mu misumba ya bena Yuda ukuti bakese ku Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles23:3 Bonse baisa longana pa ŋanda yakwa Lesa epo bapanga icipangano na Yoashi imfumu uwalifye umwaice. Yehoiyada abeba ati
2Chronicles23:4 Nomba ifi efyo muli nokucita ilyo bashimapepo na bena Levi baisa ku milimo yabo pe Sabata. Impuka imo iyabutatu yakulalinda pa mpongolo.
2Chronicles23:5 Impuka na imbi iyabutatu ili nokuya mukubombela kwisano elyo ne mpuka yakulekelesha iyabutatu ili nokulabombela pa mpongolo iyitwa ‘Umufula.’ Elyo bonse abashala bali nokulaba mu lubansa lwa ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Chronicles23:6 Takuli nangu umo uufwile ukwingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Chronicles23:7 Abena Levi bali nokwikala nabashinguluka imfumu
2Chronicles23:8 Kanshi abena Levi na bantu bonse abena Yuda bacita fyonse ukulingana nefyo Yehoiyada shimapepo akonkomeshe. Cila muntu alonganika abantu bakwe abaleya ku ncito na balekomboka pa bushiku bwe Sabata pa mulandu wakuti ninshi Yehoiada talati asalanganye mpuka sha bashilika.
2Chronicles23:9 Yehoiyada abuula amafumo elyo ne nkwela ishikalamba ne shinono ishali sha mfumu Davidi ishali mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa
2Chronicles23:10 Ashingulusha abantu bonse abali ne fyanso mu minwe apaikele imfumu mupepi no bulambo elyo ne ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Chronicles23:11 Elyo Yehoiyada na bana bakwe baya fumya umwana wa mfumu
2Chronicles23:12 Ilyo Ataliya aumfwa icongo ca bantu uko balebutauka no kusekelela imfumu
2Chronicles23:13 Cilya afika
2Chronicles23:14 Yehoiyada shimapepo atuma abakalamba ba pa fita imyanda (100) abatungulula abashilika abeba ukuti
2Chronicles23:15 Bamuleka afika pa mwinshi wakwingililapo bakabalwe ku lubansa lwa kwisano epo bamwikatila no kumwipaya.
2Chronicles23:16 Elyo Yehoiyada apanga icipangano icakuti ena
2Chronicles23:17 Kabili abantu bonse baima baya ku ŋanda ya mulungu Baali baya ibongolola. Babongolola ifibumbili fya malambo no kutobaula utulubi. Elyo baipaya na Matani shimapepo wakwa Baali pa ntanshi ya ifibumbili fya malambo.
2Chronicles23:18 Panuma ya ifi
2Chronicles23:19 Abika abakulinda iminshi ya pa mpongolo ya ŋanda yakwa Yawe pakumona ukuti onse uwakowela tengilemo.
2Chronicles23:20 Elyo asenda abakalamba ba pa fita imyanda (100)
2Chronicles23:21 Elyo na bantu bonse mu calo basekelela. Kabili na mu musumba mwaba icibote
2Chronicles24:1 Yoashi ali ne myaka cine lubali ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles24:2 Pa myaka yonse iyo Yehoiyada ali shimapepo
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoiyada elyo amufwaila na banakashi babili abo aupile
2Chronicles24:4 Ilyo papita inshita Yoashi atontonkanya ukuwamya ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Chronicles24:5 Alonganika bashimapepo elyo na bena Levi elyo abeba ati
2Chronicles24:6 Eico imfumu epakwita Yehoiyada shimapepo mukalamba no kumweba ati
2Chronicles24:7 Nomba pa myaka yapitile abana bakwa Ataliya
2Chronicles24:8 Eico imfumu epakupeela icipope icakuti bapange icakubikamo imisonko baya cibika lwa kunse ya mpongolo ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Chronicles24:9 Bapanga ne cipope icakuti abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu bambe ukuleta kuli Yawe umusonko ulya Mose umubomfi wakwa Lesa aebele abena Israeli ukutuula lintu bali mu matololo.
2Chronicles24:10 Ici casekesha bacilolo elyo na bantu bonse icakuti bonse bayambilefye abene ukuleta impiya mpaka baisusha ico bapangile icakubikamo.
2Chronicles24:11 Ilyo lyonse abena Levi baleta ico bapangile icakubikamo kuli bacilolo ba mfumu elyo bamona nokuti muli mpiya ishingi nganshi
2Chronicles24:12 Kabili imfumu elyo na Yehoiyada balabuula impiya ishi balafolesha abantu abalebomba imilimo ya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Bafwaya bakasona wa mabwe elyo na bapala imbao ukuti bawamye iŋanda yakwa Yawe. Elyo baingisha ababomfi abakupanga ifipe fya fyela no mukuba ifyakuwamishako iŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Chronicles24:13 Kanshi abantu baingishe epakubomba na maka no kulenga imilimo ukuba iyalondoloka. Bakuula cipya cipya iŋanda yakwa Lesa ukulinganafye ne yantanshi elyo balundako no kuikosha.
2Chronicles24:14 Ilyo bapwisha ukuwamya
2Chronicles24:15 Nomba yalifikile inshita ilyo Yehoiyada akotele elyo afwa ninshi ali ne myaka umwanda umo na makumi yatatu (130).
2Chronicles24:16 Ashiikilwe mu ncende bashika imfumu mu musumba wakwa Davidi pa mulandu wa fisuma abombele mu Israeli
2Chronicles24:17 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Yehoiyada
2Chronicles24:18 Balenga nokuti balekeleshe iŋanda yakwa Yawe Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo bayalukila mukupepa inceshi sha mulungu Ashera elyo ne milungu imbi. Na pa mulandu wa ici calenga Lesa ukufulilwa abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles24:19 Nangula Lesa alilangile uluse no kubatumina bakasesema ukubalondolwela amashiwi yakuti babwelele kuli Lesa
2Chronicles24:20 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Lesa waikila no kukupa Sakaria
2Chronicles24:21 Lelo abantu bamwimina
2Chronicles24:22 Imfumu Yoashi yafililwe ukwibukisha uluse Yehoiyada wishi wakwa Sakaria amucitile lelo amwipaila umwana wakwe. Uyo lintu alefwa asosele amashiwi yakuti
2Chronicles24:23 Lilya cafika pa kupilibuka kwa mwaka
2Chronicles24:24 Nangu cali ukuti abashilika ba bena Aramu bali abanono lelo Yawe abapeele amaka yakwipaya abashilika ababacilile ubwingi. Pa mulandu wakuti abena Yuda balifumine kuli Yawe Lesa wa bashibo
2Chronicles24:25 Ilyo abena Aramu bafuminemo
2Chronicles24:26 Abo abamwimine no kumwipaya bali ni Sabadi mwana Shimeati umwanakashi umwina Amoni elyo na Yehosabadi mwana Shimiriti umwanakashi umwina Moabu.
2Chronicles24:27 Imilandu ya pa bana bakwe

2Chronicles25:2 Acitile ifyawama pa cinso cakwa Yawe

2Chronicles25:4 Lelo abana babo bena tababepeye
2Chronicles25:5 Amasiya akonkanyapo ukucita icintu na cimbi. Aita abena Yuda pamo

2Chronicles25:7 Lelo umuntu wakwa Lesa aisa kuli ena no kwisa mweba ati

2Chronicles25:10 Kanshi Amasiya epakweba abashilika abena Efulemu ukubwelelamo kumyabo. Babwelelamo kumyabo abafulwa nganshi pafyo Yuda acita.

2Chronicles25:13 Nomba abashilika balya Amasiya akenye ukulwako inkondo
2Chronicles25:14 Ilyo Amasiya abwelele ukufuma mukusansa abena Edomu

2Chronicles25:19 Nawamba ukuisumbula pa mulandu wakuti naucimfya abena Edomu cakulenga no kukwata amataki no kuyumfwa. Nomba iwe ikalafye pa ŋanda. Nga cinshi ulefwaila ifyongo no kufwaya ukuti uyonaule elyo nokonaula abena Yuda?”
2Chronicles25:20 Lelo Amasiya akaana ukuti omfwe
2Chronicles25:21 Kanshi Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli epakulonganika abashilika bakwe aya kukulwa na bena Yuda. Amasiya imfumu ya bena Yuda balalwa na Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli pa Beti Shemeshi mu calo ca bena Yuda.
2Chronicles25:22 Abena Yuda babapuma ku bena Israeli na cila muntu abutukila ku ŋanda kumwakwe.
2Chronicles25:23 Elyo Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli aikata Amasiya imfumu ya bena Yuda uwali mwana Yoashi
2Chronicles25:24 Asendamo golide yonse na silifa elyo ne fipe fyonse ifyasangilwe mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa ifyo Obedi Edomu alesunga. Asenda ne fyuma fyonse ifya mwisano na bantu baikete bunkole
2Chronicles25:25 Amasiya mwana Yehoashi mfumu ya bena Yuda ashele aikala imyaka ikumi limo na isano (15) panuma ya mfwa yakwa Yehoashi mwana Yehoahasi imfumu ya bena Israeli.

2Chronicles25:27 Kanshi ukufumafye apo Amasiya alekele ukulaenda mu nshila shakwa Yawe
2Chronicles25:28 Icitumbi cena balicibweseshe pali bakabalwe
2Chronicles26:1 Elyo abantu bonse aba mu Yuda babuulile Usia umwana wakwa Amasiya ninshi alifye ne myaka ikumi limo na mutanda (16)
2Chronicles26:2 Ewaishile kuula cipya cipya umusumba wa Elati
2Chronicles26:3 Usia ali ne myaka ikumi limo na mutanda (16) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu kabili aikele pa bufumu mu musumba wa mu Yerusalemu pa myaka amakumi yasano na ibili (52). Nyina ali mwina Yerusalemu. Ishina lyakwe ali ni Yekoliya.
2Chronicles26:4 Ena acitile ifyalungama pa cinso cakwa Yawe filya fine wishi Amasiya acitile.
2Chronicles26:5 Mu nshiku shakwa shimapepo Sakaria
2Chronicles26:6 Aima aya mukulwisha Abafilisiti
2Chronicles26:7 Lesa epakumwafwa mu nkondo shonse isho alwile na Bafilisiti elyo na Baarabu abaleikala mu Guri Baali kabili na pa bena Meuni.
2Chronicles26:8 Abena Amoni bayamba ukulapeela umusonko kuli Usia
2Chronicles26:9 Elyo mu musumba wa Yerusalemu akuulamo impungu
2Chronicles26:10 Elyo aya kuula impungu na shimbi mu matololo
2Chronicles26:11 Usia akwete abashilika ba nkondo abasambilishiwa bwino kabili abaishiba ukulwa. Lyonse bali abaiteyanya ukuya ku bulwi mu mabumba yabo umo batantikilwe
2Chronicles26:12 Impendwa yonse iya ntungulushi sha ndupwa sha bakulwa inkondo yali amakana yabili ne myanda mutanda (2
2Chronicles26:13 Aba ebaletungulula abashilika abasambilishiwa ukulwa abali amakana imyanda itatu na cine lubali ne myanda isano (307
2Chronicles26:14 Kabili lyonse ilyo baleya ku nkondo
2Chronicles26:15 Pa mpungu akuulile mu Yerusalemu elyo na pa fifutu fya finshoko
2Chronicles26:16 Lelo ilyo Usia amona ukuti akwata amaka
2Chronicles26:17 Elyo Asaria shimapepo na bambi bashimapepo bakwa Yawe abashipile baingila mukati umo ali.
2Chronicles26:18 Baya mukalipila no kumweba abati
2Chronicles26:19 Nomba Usia afulwa ninshi acili naikata ne cakocelamo ububani mu minwe yakwe. Lelo lilya line acili nafulilwa bashimapepo apo baiminine pantanshi ya bulambo bwa bubani mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Chronicles26:20 Cilya Asariya shimapepo mukalamba elyo na bashimapepo bambi abali nankwe bamulolesha
2Chronicles26:21 Kanshi imfumu Usia ali ne fibashi ukushintafye no bushiku afwile. Aikele uwapatulwa ku ŋanda yakwe ico ali ne fibashi

2Chronicles26:23 Usia asuka afwa no kuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe

2Chronicles27:3 Yotamu kabili akuula cipya cipya impongolo ya pamulu iya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe

2Chronicles28:1 Ahasi akwete imyaka amakumi yabili (20) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles28:2 Ena atendeke ukwenda mu nshila shimbi isha mu misango ya mfumu sha bena Israeli
2Chronicles28:3 Ayambile ukoca amalambo mu mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu elyo aoca na bana bakwe mu mulilo nga malambo. Akonkele ukulacita ifyamuselu filya fine fyalecita imishobo ilya Yawe afulumwine pa ntanshi ya bena Israeli.
2Chronicles28:4 Alatuula amalambo no koca ububani mu ncende shakupepelamo imilungu pa mulu wa mpili elyo na pesamba lya cimuti icafumba conse.
2Chronicles28:5 Ifi alecita

2Chronicles28:10 Kabili mulefwaya nomba mubuule abaume na banakashi ba mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu ukuba abasha benu. Bushe imwe emukuti tamwacitapo ifyabubifi kuli Yawe Lesa wenu?

2Chronicles28:13 “Imwe

2Chronicles29:1 Hesekia afikile pa myaka yakufyalwa amakumi yabili na isano (25) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles29:2 Ena acitile ifyalungama pa cinso cakwa Yawe ngefyo wishi Davidi acitile.
2Chronicles29:3 Mu mweshi wakubalilapo ku kutendeka kwa mwaka uwa pa bufumu bwakwe
2Chronicles29:4 Elyo aita bashimapepo na bena Levi
2Chronicles29:5 elyo abeba ati
2Chronicles29:6 Ifikolwe fyesu fyalifililwe ukuba ne cishinka kabili bacitile ifintu ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wesu elyo no kumusangukila. Bafutatila Yawe
2Chronicles29:7 Baisala ne mpongolo she Tempele lyakwe
2Chronicles29:8 Eico Yawe alifulilwe nganshi abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu. Abalenga ukuba icakupapako icakupeela umwenso no kusekwa ngefyo na imwe muleimwena na menso yenu.
2Chronicles29:9 Ni pa mulandu wa ifi bacitile
2Chronicles29:10 Lelo nomba ndefwaya ukuti mpange icipangano na Yawe
2Chronicles29:11 Mwe bana bandi mwiba abanakuka mukubomba imilimo yenu nomba
2Chronicles29:12 Elyo abena Levi abatendeke ukubomba bali nifi: Ukufuma ku bena Koati
2Chronicles29:13 Ukufuma ku ba mu lupwa lwakwa Elisafani
2Chronicles29:14 Ukufuma ku ba mu lupwa lwakwa Hemani
2Chronicles29:15 Cilya balonganika bamunyinabo
2Chronicles29:16 Bashimapepo elyo baingila mu cifulo camushilo ica mukati ka ŋanda yakwa Yawe mukuisangulula. Bafumisha panse nokubika pa lubansa lwe Tempele lyakwa Yawe fyonse ifintu ifyakowela ifyasangilwemo. Abena Levi epakusenda fyonse no kufitwala ku mukonko wa Kidironi.
2Chronicles29:17 Pa bushiku bwakutendeka umweshi wantashi epo batendeke umulimo wakusangulula mpaka baya fika apakwingilila mwi Tempele lyakwa Yawe pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse mu mweshi wine uyo. Elyo pa nshiku na shimbi cine konse konse bakonkenyepo ukusangulula iŋanda yakwa Yawe mpaka bapwa pa bushiku ubwalenga ikumi limo na mutanda (16).
2Chronicles29:18 Ilyo bapwisha ukubomba imilimo
2Chronicles29:19 Natusangulula no kupekanya ifibombelo fyonse filya imfumu Ahasi afumishe mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe pakukanaba ne cishinka lintu ali pa bufumu. Fyonse tufibikile pa ntanshi ya bulambo bwakwa Yawe.”
2Chronicles29:20 Ubushiku ubwakonkelepo ulucelocelo imfumu Hesekia yasenda bacilolo ba mu musumba yaya ingila nabo mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Chronicles29:21 Baya leta bacilume ba ŋombe cine lubali

2Chronicles29:27 Hesekia epakubakonkomesha ukutuula ilambo lyakoca pa bulambo. Cilyafye bayamba ukutuula ilambo na ba nyimbo shakulumbanya Yawe nabo bayamba ukwimba
2Chronicles29:28 Ulukuta lonse lwakontama no kwamba ukupepa
2Chronicles29:29 Ilyo bapwishafye ukutuula ilambo
2Chronicles29:30 Elyo imfumu Hesekia na bacilolo bakwe bakonkomesha abena Levi ukuti bambe ukulumbanya Yawe mu mashiwi Davidi na Asafu kamona balebomfya pakulumbanya. Kanshi bonse epakwamba ukulumbanya ninshi nabasansamuka
2Chronicles29:31 Elyo imfumu Hesekia yaeba abantu aiti
2Chronicles29:32 Ifya malambo yakoca ifyo ulukuta lwaletele kuli Yawe fyali bacilume wa ŋombe amakumi cine lubali (70)
2Chronicles29:33 Inama shonse ishasangulwilwe ku mulimo we lambo lyakoca shafikile iŋombe ishilume imyanda mutanda (600) elyo ne mpaanga ne mbushi shali amakana yatatu (3
2Chronicles29:34 Lelo bashimapepo balicepele nganshi abakuti bafunde inama shonse isha malambo yakoca. Kanshi ecalengele bamunyinabo abena Levi bese babafweko mpaka ilyo bapwisha incito kabili basangulwilapo bambi bashimapepo. Pantu abena Levi bena baposele amano mukuisangulula abene ukucila ifyali bashimapepo.
2Chronicles29:35 Yalifulile nganshi imituulo ya cakoca
2Chronicles29:36 Eico Hesekia na bantu bonse basansamwike nganshi pafyo Yawe acitile pakati ka bantu bakwe

2Chronicles30:2 Kanshi imfumu
2Chronicles30:3 Kunuma balifililwe ukusefya pa nshita iyasontwa pa mulandu wakuti takwali bashimapepo abengi abaisangulwile elyo no lukuta lwali talulalongana mu Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles30:4 Eico imfumu no lukuta lonse lwasuminisha ukuti uku kupekanya kulifye bwino.
2Chronicles30:5 Kanshi epakutuma imbila mu calo conse ica Israeli
2Chronicles30:6 Ukulingana nefyo imfumu yapeele icipope
2Chronicles30:7 Mwipanga icilubo cakuba nga bashinwe nangu bamunyinenwe abashakwete cishinka kuli Yawe
2Chronicles30:8 Mwiba abaumalala imitima ngefyo bashinwe baali. Imwe nakileni Lesa
2Chronicles30:9 Nga cakuti mwabwelela kuli Yawe
2Chronicles30:10 Mu calo cakwa Efulemu na Manase
2Chronicles30:11 Lelo nangu cali ifi
2Chronicles30:12 Na mu Yuda cali ifyo fine
2Chronicles30:13 Kanshi kwalongene ibumba lya bantu ilikulu nganshi ku Yerusalemu kukusefya inshikunkulu ya mukate uushatutumuka iyo bakwete mu mweshi walenga ibili.
2Chronicles30:14 Kabili abantu balimine no kufumya ifibumbili fya malambo ifyali mu Yerusalemu
2Chronicles30:15 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) ubwa mu mweshi walenga ibili elyo baipeye umwana wa mpaanga we Pasaka. Uyu mulimo walengele bashimapepo na bena Levi ukumfwa insoni icalengele no kuisangulula bayaleta na malambo yakoca ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Chronicles30:16 Elyo baingila mu ŋanda no kuya pa fifulo fyabo ifyakubombelapo ukulingana nefyo calembwa mu mafunde yakwa Mose umubomfi wakwa Lesa. Bashimapepo epakubuula umulopa babapeele ku bena Levi balaukana.
2Chronicles30:17 Nomba cali ukuti abengi abali mwibumba bali tabalasanguluka
2Chronicles30:18 Lelo nelyo cali ukuti abantu abengi abafumine ku Efulemu
2Chronicles30:19 uyo umutima wakwe waiminina pakufwaya icinso cakwa Yawe Lesa
2Chronicles30:20 Yawe epakumfwa ipepo lyakwa Hesekia
2Chronicles30:21 Abena Israeli abali mu Yerusalemu basefeshe inshikunkulu ya mikate ishatutumuka pa nshiku cine lubali ninshi nabasansamuka nganshi. Abena Levi na bashimapepo bena batwalilile ukwimbila Yawe cila bushiku
2Chronicles30:22 Hesekia alandile amashiwi yakukoselesha abena Levi abo abalangile amano yakubombela Yawe. Pa nshiku cine lubali balelya ifyo babakenye elyo baletuula umutuulo wakwampana no kulumbanya Yawe
2Chronicles30:23 Elyo ulukuta lonse epakusuminishanya ukuti balundeko inshiku shakusefya na shimbi cine lubali kanshi epakukonkanyapo ukusefya ukwa nsansa ishingi nganshi.

2Chronicles32:13 “Bushe imwe tamwaishiba ifyo ine ne fikolwe fyandi twacita ku bantu aba mu fyalo fimbi? Bushe imilungu ya iyo mishobo yalikwetepo amaka ayakupokolola ifyalo fyabo kuli ine?
2Chronicles32:14 Mulungu nshi wa pa mishobo yonse iyo ifikolwe fyandi fyaonawile waeshako ukupususha abantu bakwe kuli ine? Nga kanshi uyo mulungu wenu kuti wamupususha shani ku minwe yandi?

2Chronicles32:16 Bacilolo bakwa Senakeribu batwalililafye ukulanda amashiwi yakususha Yawe Lesa pamo pene no mubomfi wakwe Hesekia.
2Chronicles32:17 Imfumu ya ku Asiria yabikapo amakalata ayakutuka Yawe

2Chronicles32:20 Elyo imfumu Hesekia na kasesema Esaya mwana Amosi balomba no kulilila kuli Lesa wa mu mulu mwipepo pali ifi fine.
2Chronicles32:21 Yawe epakutuma malaika aisa onaula abashilika bonse pamo na bakalamba ba fita fya nkondo elyo na bacilolo mu nkambi ya mfumu ya bena Asiria. Kanshi epakubwelelamo ku calo cakwe ne nsoni nganshi. Elyo cilyafye ayaingila mwitempele lya mulungu wakwe
2Chronicles32:22 Kanshi efyo Yawe apokolwele Hesekia pamo na bantu ba mu Yerusalemu ukufuma kuli Senakeribu imfumu ya bena Asiria elyo ukufumafye na ku bantu bambi bonse. Lesa abapeela ne cibote ukufuma ku mbali shonse.
2Chronicles32:23 Abantu abengi bayamba ukuleta imituulo yakwa Yawe ku Yerusalemu elyo ne fyabupe ifikankala kuli Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda. Ukufuma pali ilya nshita Hesekia aikele uwacindikwa nganshi ku mishobo yonse.
