2Chronicles33:1 Manase afikile pa myaka yakufyalwa ikumi limo na ibili (12) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles33:2 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe mukucita ifyamuselu ifyalecitako imishobo ilya Yawe atamfishe no kubatalusha ku bena Israeli.
2Chronicles33:3 Abwekeshepo ukukuula incende shakupepelapo isho balecindika shilya wishi Hesekia aonawile. Kabili akuulile imilungu ba Baali ifibumbili fya malambo no kwimika inceshi sha mulungu Ashera. Alapepa ne fita fyonse fya mu mulu no kufitumika.
2Chronicles33:4 Mu kati ka ŋanda yakwa Yawe akuulamo ifibumbili fya malambo fimbi
2Chronicles33:5 Mu mansa shonse shibili isha mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe akuulilemo ifita fyonse fya mu mulu ifibumbili fya malambo.
2Chronicles33:6 Atuula amalambo yakupisha abana bakwe abaume mu mulilo mu mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu
2Chronicles33:7 Elyo abuula ne cilubi ico abashile ayacibika mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa
2Chronicles33:8 Nshakatale nakabili ndeka amakasa ya bena Israeli ukufuma muli cino calo napeele ifikolwe fyabo nga cakuti bateka imitima mukucita fyonse ifyo nabakonkomesha mu mafunde yandi
2Chronicles33:9 Lelo Manase ena alengele abena Yuda na bali mu Yerusalemu ukufuma kuli Lesa
2Chronicles33:10 Kabili Yawe ilyo alandile kuli Manase na bantu bakwe
2Chronicles33:11 Eico Yawe alengele ifita fya nkondo fya bena Asiria ukubengilila. Baisa ikata Manase bamusenda umufungwa
2Chronicles33:12 Lelo lilya acili alecula mu cifungo
2Chronicles33:13 Elyo alomba kuli Yawe
2Chronicles33:14 Panuma ya ifi
2Chronicles33:15 Elyo aingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe afumyamo imilungu imbi yonse ne cilubi abikilemo
2Chronicles33:16 Kabili abweseshapo ubulambo bwakwa Yawe
2Chronicles33:17 Lelo abantu bena batwalililafye ukutuula amalambo pa ncende shakupepelapo isho bacindika
2Chronicles33:18 Palwa fintu fimbi ifyo Manase acitile pa bufumu
2Chronicles33:19 Ifyali ipepo lyakwe
2Chronicles33:20 Ilyo Manase afwile no kuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni akwete imyaka yakufyalwa amakumi yabili na ibili (22) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles33:22 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Chronicles33:23 Lelo tali nga wishi Manase uwaishile icefya kuli Yawe
2Chronicles33:24 Bacilolo bakwe epakumupangila mpaka bamwipaila mu ŋanda ye sano lyakwe.
2Chronicles33:25 Lelo abekalacalo nabo baipaya bonse abaimine no kwipaya imfumu Amoni
2Chronicles34:1 Yosaya akumenye imyaka yakufyalwa cine konse konse ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles34:2 Acitile ifyawama pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kwendela mu nshila shonse ishakwa wishi Davidi
2Chronicles34:3 Mu mwaka walenga cine konse konse uwa pa bufumu ninshi acilifye umwaice
2Chronicles34:4 Apeela icipope cakubongolola ifibumbili fya malambo ifya milungu ba Baali. Aputaula mu tupimfya tupimfya ifibumbili fya malambo ifyakufutumwinapo ububani ifyabelele pa mulu wafiko elyo abongolola ne nceshi sha mulungu Ashera
2Chronicles34:5 Aoca na mafupa ya bashimapepo pa fibumbili fya malambo yabo. Kanshi ifi efyo asangulwile Yuda na Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles34:6 Ifi fine efintu acita na mu misumba ya bena Manase
2Chronicles34:7 Abongolola ifibumbili fya malambo no kuputaula inceshi sha mulungu Ashera no kushonaula utulubi tonse elyo aputaula tupimfya tupimfya ifibumbili fya malambo ifyakufutumwinapo ububani mu calo conse ica Israeli
2Chronicles34:8 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Yosaya
2Chronicles34:9 Baisa kuli Hilikiya shimapepo mukalamba mukumuletela indalama ishatuulilwe mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa
2Chronicles34:10 Epakubuula ishi ndalama no kushipeela mu minwe ya bantu abo basalile ukwangalila imilimo ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Aba bantu ebalelipila ababomfi abalelungisha Iŋanda.
2Chronicles34:11 Babuula impiya shimo bapeela bakabasa wa mbao elyo na bakakuula pakuti bashitemo amabwe ayabaswa elyo ne mbao shakulundinkanya ne shakupalikila amayanda ayo imfumu sha bena Yuda shalengele ukonaulwa.
2Chronicles34:12 Aba bantu babombele imilimo iyi ne mitima iyacishinka. Na baletungulula abanabo mukubomba iyi milimo bali ni Yahati na Obadiya abena Levi abafumine mu lupwa lwakwa Merari
2Chronicles34:13 ebaleangalila abakusenda ifipe no kutungulula ababomfi bonse mu milimo iyalekana lekana. Elyo na bamo abena Levi ebali bakalemba
2Chronicles34:14 Ilyo bayambile ukufumya indalama isho batuulile mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe
2Chronicles34:15 Hilikiya epakweba Shafani kalemba ati
2Chronicles34:16 Elyo Shafani abuula icitabo atwala ku mfumu no kuya sosa ati
2Chronicles34:17 Nabafumya impiya ishali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe no kushipeela kuli bakangalila na babomfi.”
2Chronicles34:18 Elyo Shafani kalemba aeba imfumu ati
2Chronicles34:19 Ilyo imfumu yaumfwile amashiwi ya mafunde
2Chronicles34:20 Yakonkomesha aya mashiwi kuli Hilikiya
2Chronicles34:21 “Kabiyeni mwishina lyandi nelya bantu abashalapo mu Israeli na mu Yuda muye twipushishako pali aya mashiwi yalembwa muli ici citabo basangile. Pantu ubukali bwakwa Lesa ubuli nokutwishila bukalamba pa mulandu wakuti abafyashi besu balifililwe ukubaka ishiwi lyakwa Yawe. Kabili tabalecita fintu ukulingana ne fyalembwa muli ici citabo.”
2Chronicles34:22 Hilikiya elyo na bantu imfumu yatumine pamo nankwe baya kuli Hulida kasesema mwanakashi
2Chronicles34:23 Elyo Hulida abeba ati
2Chronicles34:24 ifi efyo Yawe asosa ifyakutila
2Chronicles34:25 Pa mulandu wakuti nabamfutatila
2Chronicles34:26 Kebeni imfumu ya bena Yuda iyacimutuma kukwipusha kuli Yawe ukuti
2Chronicles34:27 “Pantu umutima obe naulanguluka elyo no kuicefya kuli Lesa ilyo wacumfwa ifyo acilanda palwa ino ncende na bantu bekalamo
2Chronicles34:28 Nomba ndi nokukutwala ukwalala ifikolwe fyobe kabili uli nokushiikwa mu cibote. Amenso yobe tayali nokumonako ifinkunka fyonse ndi nokuleta pali ino ncende na pa bantu bonse abekala pano.”’ ” Kanshi nabo epakubwesesha amashiwi yonse ku mfumu.
2Chronicles34:29 Elyo imfumu yalonganika abakalamba bonse aba mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles34:30 Imfumu yaingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe na bena Yuda abaume
2Chronicles34:31 Elyo imfumu yaiminina pa ncende yaiko apali uluceshi no kubukulusha icipangano pa cinso cakwa Yawe icakulaenda mu nshila shakwa Yawe
2Chronicles34:32 Elyo abuula bonse abali mu Yerusalemu na bena Benjamini ukusuminisha icipangano. Abena Yerusalemu bacitile ici umwabela icipangano cakwa Lesa uwaba Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo.
2Chronicles34:33 Yosaya epakufumya utulubi twamuselu mu calo conse ica bena Israeli
2Chronicles35:1 Kabili Yosaya acindikile Yawe mukusefya Ipasaka
2Chronicles35:2 Abika bashimapepo mu fifulo fyabo ifyakubombelamo no kubakoselesha mu milimo ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
2Chronicles35:3 Elyo aeba abena Levi
2Chronicles35:4 Iteyanyeni mu ndupwa shenu mu mpuka mu mpuka ukulingana ne fyakonkomeshe Davidi imfumu ya bena Israeli no mwana wakwe Solomoni.
2Chronicles35:5 Mwiminine mu cifulo camushilo na kabungwe ka bena Levi pali cila mpuka sha ndupwa sha bekalacalo banenu abo ababomba mukwafwilisha.
2Chronicles35:6 Elyo mwipaye abana ba mpaanga ba pe Pasaka. Muisangulule mwe bene no kupekanya abana ba mpaanga ba bamunyinenwe
2Chronicles35:7 Yosaya epakupeela abo ababomba mukwafwilisha abana ba mpaanga na ba mbushi amakana amakumi yatatu (30
2Chronicles35:8 Bacilolo bakwe bacita cimo cine
2Chronicles35:9 Kabili Konaniya pamo pene na Shemaiya na Netaneli bamunyina
2Chronicles35:10 Ilyo fyonse fyapekanishiwe ifya pakusefya Ipasaka
2Chronicles35:11 Abena Levi epakwipaya abana ba mpaanga be Pasaka
2Chronicles35:12 Elyo bapatulapo inama ishakutuula ilambo lyakoca bapeela ku mpuka sha ndupwa sha bekalacalo abali nokutuula kuli Yawe ngefyo calembwa mu citabo cakwa Mose. Kabili bacita cimo cine kuli bacilume ba ŋombe.
2Chronicles35:13 Baoca inama ye Pasaka pa mulilo ngefyo calembwa elyo ishamushilo shonse bashipika mu malongo
2Chronicles35:14 Panuma ya ifi
2Chronicles35:15 Bakemba
2Chronicles35:16 Kanshi efyo imilimo yonse iyakwa Yawe yabombeke
2Chronicles35:17 Ifi efyo abena Israeli abasangilwepo pali ilya nshita basefeshe Ipasaka ne nshikunkulu ya mikate iyishatutumuka pa nshiku cine lubali.
2Chronicles35:18 Takwaliko Ipasaka ilyo basefeshe muli uyu musango ukufuma mu nshiku shakwa kasesema Samwele. Elyo kabili takwatalile akuba imfumu ya bena Israeli iyatalile aisefya Ipasaka ngefyo Yosaya acitile na bashimapepo bakwe abena Levi
2Chronicles35:19 Kwali ukusefya ili Ipasaka mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Yosaya.
2Chronicles35:20 Panuma ya ifi fyonse
2Chronicles35:21 Lelo Neko atuma inkombe shakuya mweba amashiwi yakuti
2Chronicles35:22 Lelo Yosaya akaana ukumfwa nokuti abweleko
2Chronicles35:23 Bakaposa wa mifwi balasa imfumu Yosaya
2Chronicles35:24 Kanshi epakumufumya mwiceleta alimo
2Chronicles35:25 Yeremia ashika ne nyimbo sha pali Yosaya
2Chronicles35:26 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yosaya nefyo acitile pakuipeelesha ukulingana ne fyalembwa mu mafunde yakwa Yawe
2Chronicles35:27 elyo ifintu fyonse acitile ukufuma ku kutendeka ukufika na ku mpela fyalilembwa mu citabo ca shamfumu sha mu Israeli na mu Yuda.
2Chronicles36:1 Elyo abantu ba mu calo babuulile Yehoahasi mwana Yosaya eo bapyanika pa bufumu mu Yerusalemu pa cifulo cakwa wishi.
2Chronicles36:2 Yehoahasi akwete imyaka yakufyalwa amakumi yabili na itatu (23) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles36:3 Elyo imfumu ya mu Egupto yaisa mutamfya pa bufumu mu Yerusalemu
2Chronicles36:4 Imfumu ya ku Egupto yasonta na Eliakimu
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakimu akwete imyaka yakufyalwa amakumi yabili na isano (25) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles36:6 Elyo imfumu Nebukadinesa iya ku Babiloni yamusansa
2Chronicles36:7 Kabili Nebukadinesa asenda ne fipe fimo ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe kulya kwine no kufibika mwisano lyakwe.
2Chronicles36:8 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoyakimu
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoiyakini akwete imyaka yakufyalwa ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles36:10 Ilyo umwaka wayalwike
2Chronicles36:11 Sedekia ali ne myaka yakufyalwa amakumi yabili na umo (21) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
2Chronicles36:12 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
2Chronicles36:13 Kabili asangukila imfumu Nebukadinesa uwamusontele pa bufumu no kumulenga ukulapa mwishina lyakwa Lesa. Elyo akosha umutima no kutalama icakuti afilwa no kubwelela kuli Yawe
2Chronicles36:14 Kabili abakalamba bonse aba bashimapepo na bantu bene bacishamo ukuba ababula icishinka
2Chronicles36:15 Yawe
2Chronicles36:16 Lelo baletumfya inkombe shakwa Lesa
2Chronicles36:17 Lesa epakubemisha imfumu ya bena Kaludea uwaishile ipaya abalumendo bonse ku lupanga abali mu cifulo camushilo
2Chronicles36:18 Asenda ifipe fyonse ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa ku Babiloni
2Chronicles36:19 Baoca Iŋanda yakwa Lesa
2Chronicles36:20 Elyo asenda abantu bonse muli bunkole ku Babiloni abapuswike kukubepaya
2Chronicles36:21 Ici cali mukufikilisha ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyalandilwe na kasesema Yeremia ilyakuti icalo cali nokubaka Amasabata yaciko mu nshita yonse iyakonaulwa mpaka imyaka yonse amakumi cine lubali (70) ikakumane.

Ezra3:1 Ilyo umweshi walenga cine lubali wafikile
Ezra3:2 Elyo Yeshua umwana mwaume uwakwa Yosadaki na bamunyina bashimapepo
Ezra3:3 Bakuula ubulambo pa mufula wa pa ncende iyakale nelyo baletiina abantu abaleikala kuli ilya incende
Ezra3:4 Balasefya ne nshikunkulu ya Nsakwe ukulingana nefyo calembwa. Cila bushiku baletuula amalambo yakoca ukukonka ne mpendwa iya fyalefwaikwa cila bushiku.
Ezra3:5 Kabili balikonkenyepo ukuleka amalambo yakoca. Balundapo na ya mweshi upya
Ezra3:6 Ubushiku bwakutampa umweshi uwalenga cine lubali batampile ukutuula kuli Yawe amalambo yakoca nelyo bali tabalapwa ukwimba umufula wakukuulilapo Itempele lyakwa Yawe.
Ezra3:7 Elyo bapeela indalama ku bakasona wa mabwe na bakabasa wa mbao. Bapeela ifyakulya ne fyakunwa na mafuta ya miolifa ku bena Sidoni na bena Turi. Bacitile ifi fyonse pakuti batwale imilando ya fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda pali bemba ukufuma ku Lebanoni ukutwala ku Yopa ukulingana ne nsambu bapeelwe kuli Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia.
Ezra3:8 Mu mweshi wabubili uwa mu mwaka wabubili apo babwelele ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa mu Yerusalemu
Ezra3:9 Elyo Yeshua na bana bakwe pamo na bamunyina baikatana na Kadimieli na bamwane abaume abana bakwa Yuda pakwangalila umulimo wa mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa
Ezra3:10 Ilyo bakakuula bapwisha ukwimba umufula we Tempele lyakwa Yawe
Ezra3:11 Elyo baimba bonse capamo mukutasha no kutotela Yawe abati
Ezra3:12 Lelo bashimapepo abengi na bena Levi na bakalemba ba ndupwa
Ezra3:13 Kanshi abantu balifililwe ukupusanya iciunda cansansa ne camisowa
Ezra4:1 Ilyo abalwani ba bena Yuda na Benjamini baumfwile ukuti abantu abali mu busha nabatampa ukukuulila Yawe
Ezra4:2 baya kuli Serubabeli na bakalamba ba ndupwa sha bashibo
Ezra4:3 Nomba Serubabeli
Ezra4:4 Elyo abekalacalo batampile ukunenuna abena Yuda no kubatiinya pakuti baleke ukukuula.
Ezra4:5 Elyo bapeela bashicilye amafisakanwa abakubemininako pakuti bafupule imilimo na mapange ya bena Yuda. Kabili batwalililafye ukulacita ifi pa nshita yonse yakwa Sairasi mfumu ya ku Pesia
Ezra4:6 Mu nshiku shakwa Asuelusi
Ezra4:7 Kabili mu nshiku shakwa Atakisesi
Ezra4:8 Reumu umukalamba wa bashilika na Shimushai kalemba balemba kalata walupato pali Yerusalemu ku mfumu Atakisesi mu musango uyu.
Ezra4:9 “Ukufuma kuli Reumu umukalamba wa bashilika na Shimushai kalemba na banabo bambi
Ezra4:10 ne mishobo yonse iyo umuntu umo uwacindama kabili uwalulumbi Osinapa
Ezra4:11 Ifi efyali kalata batumine
Ezra4:12 Tulefwaya ukwishibishako imfumu ukuti Abayuda abali uko kale
Ezra4:13 Kabili nacilinga ukwishibisha imfumu ukuti umusumba nga wakuulwa nakabili
Ezra4:14 Apo kwisano ekufuma imilile yesu
Ezra4:15 Mufwailishe ifyalembwa mu fitabo fya fikolwe
Ezra4:16 Tulefwaya ukuti imfumu ishibe ukutila umusumba nga wakuulwa cipya cipya ne fibumba fyakuulwa
Ezra4:17 Elyo imfumu yatuma ubwasuko
Ezra4:18 Kalata mwantumine baliipilibwila mu lulimi lwesu no kumbelengela balimbelengela.
Ezra4:19 Nalipeela icipope icakuti bafwailishe bwino palwa uyu mulandu
Ezra4:20 Elyo kabili kwaliko imfumu ishamaka ishaleteeka mu Yerusalemu
Ezra4:21 Kanshi nomba mupeele icipope kuli abo bantu icakuti baleke ukubomba
Ezra4:22 Mucenjele mwifilwa ukucita ifi namweba pali uyu mulandu. Cinshi twingalekela ukuti ubonaushi bwabipa ifi bulecusha imfumu mukutwalilila.”
Ezra4:23 Panumafye yakubelenga kalata uwafumine ku mfumu Atakisesi
Ezra4:24 Efyo baleseshe umulimo wakukuulila Lesa iŋanda mu Yerusalemu mpakafye mu mwaka wabubili uwa buteeko bwakwa Dariusi imfumu ya ku Pesia.
Ezra5:1 Elyo bakasesema babili
Ezra5:2 Kanshi Serubabeli mwana Shealitieli na Yeshua mwana Yosadaki baima no kwamba ukukuula iŋanda yakwa Lesa iyali mu Yerusalemu. Na bakasesema bonse babili bali nabo
Ezra5:3 Pali ilya nshita
Ezra5:4 Bakonkanyapo no kwipusha amashina ya bantu abalekuula.
Ezra5:5 Lelo amenso yakwa Lesa yali pa bakalamba ba Bayuda. Kanshi tababaleseshe ukukuula
Ezra5:6 Ifi efyali umusango wa kalata Tatenai umulashi wa citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana
Ezra5:7 Batumine amashiwi ku mfumu
Ezra5:8 Tulefwaya ukwishibisha imfumu ukuti twaliya ku citungu ca Bayuda
Ezra5:9 Kwena twalipwishe abakalamba no kubeba ukuti
Ezra5:10 Twalibepwishe na mashina pakuti tulembe amashina ya bantu abalebatungulula no kukwishibisha.
Ezra5:11 Lelo batwaswike abati
Ezra5:12 Nomba pa mulandu wakuti abafyashi besu balikalifya Lesa wa ku mulu umutima
Ezra5:13 Kwena mu mwaka wakubalilapo uwakwa Sairasi mfumu ya ku Babiloni
Ezra5:14 Elyo afumishe ne fipe ifya golide na silifa ifyali mwi sano lya ku Babiloni
Ezra5:15 Amwebele ukuti
Ezra5:16 Kanshi uyu Sheshibasa epakwisa imba umufula wa ŋanda yakwa Lesa mu Yerusalemu. Ukufuma ilya ine nshita mpaka na nomba iyi ŋanda icili ilekuulwa lelo tailati ipwe.’
Ezra5:17 Nga cakuti casansamusha imfumu
Ezra6:1 Elyo imfumu Dariusi apeele icipope icakufwaya fwaya ifitabo umwalembwa imilandu ifyo basungile mu ŋanda ya fishilano ku Babiloni.
Ezra6:2 Kanshi basangile icitabo icipombwa mu musumba wa Ekabatana uwali mu citungu ca Media
Ezra6:3 “Amashiwi yakwibukisha: Mu mwaka wakubalilapo uwa bufumu bwakwe
Ezra6:4 Bakabike ne mitika itatu iya mabwe ayakalamba no mutika wa mbao umo pamulu. Elyo indalama balingile ukubomfya mu mulimo uyu shifwile ukufuma ku cipao ca mfumu.
Ezra6:5 Kanshi ne fipe fya golide na silifa ifya ŋanda yakwa Lesa ifyo Nebukadinesa afumishe mwi Tempele lya ku Yerusalemu
Ezra6:6 “Kanshi nomba
Ezra6:7 Mwiibikamo mu mulimo wakukuulila Lesa iŋanda. Mulekele umulashi wa Bayuda na bakalamba ba Bayuda ebo bakuule cipya cipya iyi ŋanda yakwa Lesa palya pene pa ncende yabelelepo.
Ezra6:8 Kabili namupeela icipope pafyo mufwile ukucita ku bakalamba ba Bayuda abalekuula cipya cipya iŋanda yakwa Lesa. Indalama shonse muli nokupeela aba bantu abalekuula
Ezra6:9 Na fyonse ifyo balekabila ifili nga ifiponti fya ŋombe
Ezra6:10 Ifi ni pakutila balelekela Lesa wa ku mulu ilambo ilyakumusekesha. Elyo balepepelako ne mfumu pamo na bana baiko.
Ezra6:11 Kabili napeela icipope ukuti umuntu onse uwakaana ukukonka ici cebo
Ezra6:12 Lesa uwalenga ishina lyakwe likale kulya kwine engafumya pa cifulo imfumu no muntu onse uukafwaya ukupilibula ici nangu ukonaula iyi ŋanda yakwa Lesa mu Yerusalemu. Ine ne Dariusi napeela icipope ici
Ezra6:13 Elyo Tatenai umulashi wa citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana
Ezra6:14 Kanshi abakalamba ba Bayuda bakonkanyapo ukukuula bwino bwino ukupitila mufyo kasesema Hagai na Sakaria umwana mwaume wakwa Ido baseseme. Bapwisha ukukuula ukulingana nefyo Lesa wa bena Israeli abakonkomeshe
Ezra6:15 Iyi ŋanda yapwile pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu mu mweshi wa Adari mu mwaka walenga mutanda uwa buteko bwakwa Dariusi.
Ezra6:16 Elyo kabili abena Israeli
Ezra6:17 Pakutuula iyi ŋanda kuli Lesa
Ezra6:18 Elyo basonta bashimapepo ukulingana na mabumba yabo. Abena Levi nabo ukulingana nefyo batantama mukutumika Lesa mu Yerusalemu
Ezra6:19 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na bune (14) ubwa mu mweshi wapakubala
Ezra6:20 Bashimapepo bonse na bena Levi bonse baisangulula no kubafye abakaele bonse. Baipaya abana ba mpaanga be lambo lye Pasaka ilyakupapatilako abantu bonse ababwelele ukufuma muli bunkole
Ezra6:21 Abena Israeli bonse abafumine muli bunkole balile umwana wa mpaanga pamo pene na bantufye bonse abaipatwile kukukanakonka intambi ishikowesha isha bantu ba mu calo pakuti bambe ukupepa Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli.
Ezra6:22 Basefeshe ne nsansa inshikunkulu ya Mukate uushatutumuka pa nshiku cine lubali
Ezra7:1 Panuma ya ifi fyonse
Ezra7:2 mwana Shalumu
Ezra7:3 mwana Amariya
Ezra7:4 mwana Serahiya
Ezra7:5 mwana Abishua
Ezra7:6 Uyu Esra aishile ukufuma ku Babiloni. Ali kalemba uwacenjela nganshi mu mafunde yakwa Mose ayo Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli abapeele. Elyo imfumu yalimupeele fyonse ifyo alombele pantu ukuboko kwakwa Yawe Lesa wakwe kwali pali ena.
Ezra7:7 Kanshi abena Israeli bamo na bashimapepo bamo
Ezra7:8 Esra afikile mu Yerusalemu mu mweshi walenga busano mu mwaka walenga cine lubali uwakuteeka pa bufumu.
Ezra7:9 Atampile ubulendo bwakwe ubwakufuma ku Babiloni pa bushiku bwa kutampa kwa mweshi wakubalilapo. Elyo afika ku Yerusalemu pa bushiku bwa kutampa kwa mweshi uwalenga busano
Ezra7:10 Pantu Esra abikile umutima wakwe pakusambilila amafunde yakwa Yawe
Ezra7:11 Ifi efyali kalata imfumu Atakisesi apeele kuli Esra shimapepo
Ezra7:12 “Atakisesi
Ezra7:13 Ine nomba napeela icipope icakuti umuntu onse umwina Israeli pamo pene na bashimapepo benu na bena Levi ababa mu calo candi ukuti abo abalefwaya ukuya ku Yerusalemu
Ezra7:14 Pantu nautumwa ku mfumu pamo na bacilolo baiko cine lubali mukwipusha palwa Yuda na Yerusalemu ukulingana na mafunde yakwa Lesa wenu ayaba mu minwe yobe.
Ezra7:15 Elyo uli nokutwala silifa na golide
Ezra7:16 Ukasende na silifa na golide mukufumya ku citungu ca ku Babiloni
Ezra7:17 Ukabomfye bwino bwino indalama ishi
Ezra7:18 “Elyo silifa na golide ifikashalapo kuti wabomfya mu musango iwe na Bayuda banobe mukamona ukuti naulingana no bufwayo bwakwa Lesa wenu.
Ezra7:19 Elyo ifipe fyonse filya wapeelwa ukulabomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa
Ezra7:20 Nga kulekabilwa na fimbi ifyakubomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa obe kuti washita. Ukabomfye indalama sha mu cipao ca kwisano.
Ezra7:21 “Ine ne mfumu Atakisesi napeela icipope kuli bakasunga ba cipao aba kwishilya lya mumana icakuti
Ezra7:22 Alingile ukupeelwa ukulingana ne cipimo ca makilo amakana yatatu ne myanda ine (3
Ezra7:23 Fyonse ifyo Lesa wa mumulu apingula palwa ŋanda yakwa Lesa wa mumulu mulemona ukuti nafikonkwa bwino bwino pakuti ubukali bwakwe bwikaponena pa mfumu na bana bakwe.
Ezra7:24 Kabili mufwile ukwishiba ukuti tamwakwata amaka yakupatikisha bashimapepo bonse
Ezra7:25 “Na iwe Esra ukulingana na mano yakwa Lesa obe ayo akupeela
Ezra7:26 Uyo onse ukakaana ukukonka amafunde yakwa Lesa obe nangu aya mfumu
Ezra7:27 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe Lesa wa fikolwe fyesu
Ezra7:28 Na ine

Ezra8:13 Ku bana bakwa Adonikamu
Ezra8:14 Ku bana bakwa Bigifai
Ezra8:15 Ine ne Esra nalongenye ibumba lyonse ilya bantu mupepi no mumana utwala amenshi ku Ahafa uko twaikele inshiku shitatu. Ilyo nalolekeshe
Ezra8:16 Kanshi epakwita intungulushi
Ezra8:17 Nabatuma kuli Ido uwali intungulushi ya ku ncende ya Kasifiya. Nabeba ne fyakuya sosa kuli Ido na bandume nankwe
Ezra8:18 Ku luse lwakwa Lesa ulu atukwatila
Ezra8:19 Batumine na Hashabiya na Yeshaya bamwana Merari na bandume nankwe na bana babo
Ezra8:20 Baishile na babomfi be Tempele imyanda ibili na makumi yabili (220) abo Davidi na bacilolo bakwe basontele ukwafwako abena Levi. Aba bonse balibalembele na mashina.
Ezra8:21 Kulya kwine ku mumana wa Ahafa ine ne Esra napeela icebo icakufunga icakulya pakuicefya kuli Lesa wesu na pakuilombela ifwe fwe bene
Ezra8:22 Ala nali ne nsoni shakulomba ku mfumu ibumba lya bashilika ne fita fya pali bakabalwe abakutupokololako ku balwani pa lwendo lwesu
Ezra8:23 Kanshi twalifungile no kulomba Lesa pali uyu mulandu. Lesa nao alyumfwile ipepo lyesu.
Ezra8:24 Elyo nasala intungulushi sha bashimapepo ikumi limo na babili (12)
Ezra8:25 Nabapimine silifa na golide ne fyakubomfya no mutuulo ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu uo imfumu
Ezra8:26 Elyo napima silifa no kubapeela amatalanta imyanda mutanda na makumi yasano (650)
Ezra8:27 imbale nasho isha golide amakumi yabili (20) ifyafinine ukulingana ne ndalama dariki isha golide ikana limo (1
Ezra8:28 Elyo nabeba ukuti

Ezra8:30 Kanshi bashimapepo na bena Levi epakubuula silifa
Ezra8:31 Kanshi pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shibili (12) ubwa mu mweshi wakubalilapo
Ezra8:32 Twafikile ku Yerusalemu
Ezra8:33 Pa bushiku bwalenga shine
Ezra8:34 Fyonse balifipendele no kupima ifyo fyafinine

Ezra9:1 Panuma ya ifi fyonse intungulushi shaisa kuli ine no kunjeba ashiti
Ezra9:2 Pantu balyupile abana babo no kubofya ku bana babo. Kanshi umushobo uwasangululwa bausankanya no wa bekalacalo. Muli ubu butalami

Ezra10:4 Ima kanshi pantu mulimo obe
Ezra10:5 Elyo Esra aima

Ezra10:7 Kanshi bauma imbila mu calo conse ca bena Yuda na Yerusalemu ukuti bonse ababwelele mu busha balongane ku Yerusalemu.

Ezra10:13 Nomba abantu nabafula elyo na mainsa nayakosa nganshi
Ezra10:14 Lekeni intungulushi shesu shiminineko ulukuta. Lekeni mu misumba yesu yonse abaupa abanakashi abenafyalo bakese pa nshita yapimwa. Bakese na bakalamba na bapingushi aba cila musumba mpaka ubukali ubwakwa Lesa pali uyu mulandu bukafume apo tuli.”
Ezra10:15 Kwalifye Yonatani mwana Asaeli na Yaseya mwana Tikifa ebakeene uyu mulandu
Ezra10:16 Elyo abafumine mu busha bacita ifyo fine. Esra shimapepo asala abaume abakalamba ba ndupwa ukulingana ne ndupwa shabo
Ezra10:17 Elyo ubushiku bwakutampa kwa mweshi wakubalilapo ninshi tabulati bupite bapwisha ukulanda na baume abaupile abanakashi abenafyalo.
Ezra10:18 Kanshi pasangilwe abana ba bashimapepo bamo abaupile abanakashi abenafyalo
Ezra10:19 Balaya no kuleka abakashi babo no kuleka ilambo lyakufutila pa filubo fyabo

Nehemiah1:1 Aya e mashiwi yakwa Nehemia
Nehemiah1:2 Hanani umo uwa muli bamunyinane
Nehemiah1:3 Elyo nabo balyaswike no kutila
Nehemiah1:4 Ilyo naumfwile aya mashiwi
Nehemiah1:5 Elyo nasosele nati
Nehemiah1:6 Shi wingateya ukutwi kobe no kwisula amenso yobe pakuti umfwe ipepo lyandi ne mubomfi obe. Ine
Nehemiah1:7 Twabombele ifintu mu bunasha bwalufyengo kuli iwe. Tatwakonkele nangufye panono amalango ne fipope nangu amafunde ifyo wapeele ku mubomfi obe Mose.
Nehemiah1:8 “Nomba ibukisha amashiwi ayo waebele umubomfi obe Mose
Nehemiah1:9 Lelo nga cakuti mwabwelulukila kuli ine
Nehemiah1:10 “Nomba aba e babomfi bobe
Nehemiah1:11 We Mfumu yandi
Nehemiah2:1 Kabili cali mu mweshi wa Nisani mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili (20) iya bufumu bwakwa Atakisesi
Nehemiah2:2 Eico imfumu yatile kuli ine
Nehemiah2:3 lelo naeba imfumu nati
Nehemiah2:4 Imfumu yalanda kuli ine aiti
Nehemiah2:5 kabili nalanda na ku mfumu nati
Nehemiah2:6 Elyo imfumu yasosa kuli ine
Nehemiah2:7 Elyo na ine natile ku mfumu
Nehemiah2:8 Kabili ukuti bampeelako na imbi kalata iyakutwala kuli Asafu kasunga wa mutengo wa mfumu
Nehemiah2:9 Elyo naile ku balashi ba mu citungu ca mwishilya lya mumana
Nehemiah2:10 Ilyo Sanibalati umwina Horoni elyo na Tobia nga cilolo umwina Amoni bati bomfwe umulandu
Nehemiah2:11 Ilyo nafikile mu Yerusalemu
Nehemiah2:12 Elyo naima ubushiku na bamo abantu abanonofye. Nshaebeleko umuntu nelyo umo ifyo Lesa wandi abikile mu mutima wandi ifyakucitila Yerusalemu. Kabili nshakwete icitekwa cakuninapo cimbi ukucila pali kabalwe wandi uo naleninapo.
Nehemiah2:13 Kabili mu nshita ya bushiku napitile mu Mpongolo ya ku mukonko pa mwinshi ku Cishima ca Cisoka elyo na ku Mpongolo ya Fisoso. Natandalile ifibumba fya Yerusalemu ifyawile panshi ne mpongolo shafiko ishaonawilwe ku mulilo.
Nehemiah2:14 Elyo naile na ku Mpongolo ya Kamfukumfuku na ku Cishiba ca Mfumu. Awe nshasangile inshila iyingapitapo kabalwe nanininepo.
Nehemiah2:15 Kanshi mu nshita ine iya bushiku naile ndeenda mu mukonko no kulengula bwino ifyo ilinga lyali. Elyo na panuma ya ifi nalibwelulwike no kwingila kabili pa Mpongolo ya ku mukonko.
Nehemiah2:16 Kwena bacilolo nabo bene tabaishibe uko naile nangu ifyo nacitile. Pantu nshali nshilaeba Abayuda
Nehemiah2:17 Elyo natile kuli bena
Nehemiah2:18 Kabili nabebele na pa luse lwakwa Lesa wandi ulwangafwilisheko elyo na pa mashiwi ya mfumu yantu yanjebele. Elyo nabo batile
Nehemiah2:19 Lelo ilyo Sanibalati umwina Horoni
Nehemiah2:20 Elyo na ine nabaswike nati
Nehemiah3:1 Elyo shimapepo mukalamba Eliashibu na bamunyina abali bashimapepo baima bakuula Impongolo ya Mpaanga
Nehemiah3:2 Abapalamene nabo pakukuula bali bena Yeriko
Nehemiah3:3 Impongolo Yesabi yakuulilwe na bamwana Hasena. Babikile imyalo pa ncende yaiko
Nehemiah3:4 Meremoti mwana Uria nao uwali mwana Hakosi awemye iciputulwa cakonkelepo. Elyo no wamukonkelepo ali ni Meshulamu mwana Berekia
Nehemiah3:5 Iciputulwa cakonkelepo cabombelwe na baume abafumine ku Tekoa. Nomba abakalamba babo bena bakaana ukubomba no kubeela umulimo wa ntungulushi shabo.
Nehemiah3:6 Yehoada umwana mwaume wakwa Paseya elyo na Meshulamu umwana mwaume wakwa Besodeya
Nehemiah3:7 Elyo ababakonkelepo kukuwamya ilinga bali ni Melatiya umwina Gibeoni
Nehemiah3:8 Elyo uwabakonkelepo ukuwamya ilinga ni Usieli umwana mwaume wakwa Harhaya umo uwa pa balefula golide
Nehemiah3:9 Elyo nakabili uwakonkelepo kukuwamya ilinga ni Refaiya umwana mwaume wakwa Huri
Nehemiah3:10 Kabili uwabakonkelepo ni Yedaya umwana wakwa Harumafu uwawemye ilinga ilyali ku ntanshi ya ŋanda yakwe. Kabili uo bapalamene nankwe kukuwamya ilinga ni Hatushi
Nehemiah3:11 Malikiya umwana wakwa Harimu elyo na Hashubu umwana mwaume wakwa Pahati Moabu nao awemye ulubali lunankwe
Nehemiah3:12 Elyo kabili uwamukonkelepo ni Shalumu umwana mwaume wakwa Halohesha
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuni pamo na bekashi ba mu Sanoya nabo bayafwilishe ukuwamya Impongolo ya ku mukonko. Baliikuulile elyo baikasha ifiibi mu ncende yafiko elyo babika ne fyakukakilako ne mipilikisho. Elyo bakuula ne cibumba icalepa amakubiti ikana limo (1
Nehemiah3:14 Malichiya umwana mwaume wakwa Rekabu
Nehemiah3:15 Shalumu umwana mwaume wakwa Koli Oose
Nehemiah3:16 Uwamukonkele ni Nehemia umwana mwaume wakwa Asibuku
Nehemiah3:17 Elyo abamukonkelepo bena Levi
Nehemiah3:18 Pali ena pakonkele ababwananyina
Nehemiah3:19 Pakonkele na umbi pali ena
Nehemiah3:20 Balaki umwana mwaume wakwa Sabayi mu kucenjela kwakwe nao aliwemye incende imbi iyakufuma pa cifutu ukufika ukwakwingilila mu ŋanda yakwa Eliashibu shimapepo mukalamba.
Nehemiah3:21 Kabili uwakonkelepo ni Meremoti umwana mwaume wakwa Uriya uwali umwana mwaume wakwa Hakosi. Uyu nao ewawemye ifyaonaike ku ncende imbi ukufuma ku mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Eliashibu ukufikafye na ku mpela ya ŋanda ine iyakwa Eliashibu.
Nehemiah3:22 Abakonkelepo ukuwamya iyi ncende ni bashimapepo
Nehemiah3:23 Elyo kabili abakonkelepo ni Benjamini na Hashubu. Nabo babombele uyu mulimo wakuwamya iyi ncende apalungatene na mayanda yabo. Kabili uwakonkelepo ali Asaria umwana mwaume wakwa Maaseya
Nehemiah3:24 Kabili panuma yakwe
Nehemiah3:25 Palali umwana mwaume wakwa Usayi
Nehemiah3:26 elyo na babomfi be Tempele abaleikala pa mulu wa lupili lwa Ofeli. Aba nabo bonse babombele umulimo wakuwamya ilinga ukufika na ku Mpongolo ya Menshi
Nehemiah3:27 Kabili abakonkelepo
Nehemiah3:28 Pa mulu wa Mpongolo ya Bakabalwe
Nehemiah3:29 Elyo panuma yabo
Nehemiah3:30 Panuma yakwe pakonkele Hananiya umwana mwaume wakwa Shelemiya
Nehemiah3:31 Elyo no wamukonkelepo ni Malikiya
Nehemiah3:32 Elyo kabili
Nehemiah4:1 Ilyo Sanibalati aumfwile ukuti tulekuula ilinga
Nehemiah4:2 Elyo asosa pa cinso ca banankwe na ku bashilika ba bena Samaria ati
Nehemiah4:3 Elyo Tobia umwina Amoni
Nehemiah4:4 Umfwa we Lesa wesu ifyo batusuula. Ubabweseshe insele shabo pa mitwe yabo abene. Kabili bapeeleni ukuba icitapwa ku calo ca bunkole!
Nehemiah4:5 Tecakwesha ukufimba pa mampulu yabo. Kabili tecakwesha ukufuuta ifyabubifi fyabo ifyo bacita
Nehemiah4:6 Kanshi twakuula ilinga mpaka twalifishafye na pakati ka butali bwaliko
Nehemiah4:7 Lelo Sanibalati
Nehemiah4:8 Elyo bonse baikatene pamo ukuti bese mukulwisha abena Yerusalemu no kulenga kube ifimfulunganya.
Nehemiah4:9 Eico ifwe twapepele kuli Lesa wesu
Nehemiah4:10 Elyo abena Yuda batile
Nehemiah4:11 Kabili abalwani besu batile
Nehemiah4:12 Kanshi ifi efyo cali ilyo Abayuda bamo abaleikala mupepi nabo baishile no kutweba ukulingana ne miku ikumi limo pali ici nokutila
Nehemiah4:13 Elyo na ine nalashike abantu bamo umo ilinga talilapwa
Nehemiah4:14 Elyo naloleshe no kumona ifintu ifi
Nehemiah4:15 Ilyo abalwani besu baumfwile ukuti natwishiba amapange yabo

Nehemiah8:1 abantu epakulongana pamo kwatifye muntu umo pa lwalala ku ntanshi ya Mpongolo ya Menshi. Elyo baeba Esra uwali ni kalemba ukuleta Icitabo ca mafunde yakwa Mose ico Lesa akonkomeshe ku bena Israeli.
Nehemiah8:2 Eico kanshi pa bushikufye ubwantanshi mu mweshi wakulenga cine lubali
Nehemiah8:3 Awe atampa no kubabelengela icitabo ca mafunde palya pene pa lwalala ku ntanshi ya Mpongolo ya Menshi
Nehemiah8:4 Kanshi Esra kalemba uyu
Nehemiah8:5 Elyo Esra aisula icitabo pa menso ya cintubwingi conse
Nehemiah8:6 Elyo Esra atotele Yawe
Nehemiah8:7 Kanshi abena Levi

Nehemiah8:10 Elyo Nehemia abeba nokuti
Nehemiah8:11 Elyo abena Levi pakutalalika abantu bonse batile
Nehemiah8:12 Elyo nomba abantu bonse baya mukulya no kunwa
Nehemiah8:13 Nomba mu bushiku bwalenga shibili ubwa mweshi
Nehemiah8:14 Awe basanga mu mafunde ayapeelwe kuli Mose
Nehemiah8:15 Elyo bali nokuma imbila mu misumba yabo yonse elyo na mu Yerusalemu iyakuti
Nehemiah8:16 Kanshi abantu epakuyako
Nehemiah8:17 Kanshi emukutila bonse abantu ababwelele ukufuma muli bunkole basakile insakwe no kwikalamo. Kabili bali abasansamuka pantu tacabalile acicitikapo ukufuma ku nshiku shakwa Yoshua mwana Nuni. Awe umuntu onsefye ali ne nsansa ishikalamba nganshi.

Nehemiah9:1 Nomba pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shine (24)
Nehemiah9:2 Elyo bonse abena Israeli baipatwile ku benafyalo bonse. Elyo baiminine no kuyebelela ku fyabubifi fyabo fyonse
Nehemiah9:3 Kanshi baiminine mu fifulo fyabo no kubelenga mu citabo ca mafunde yakwa Yawe Lesa wabo pa nsa shitatu isha kasuba. Kabili pa nsa shimbi shitatu isha kasuba elyo baleisosela amashiwi yakuyebelela. Bawile ubukupeme pa cinso cakwa Yawe

Nehemiah9:19 Mulya mu matololo tawabalekeleshe nakalya
Nehemiah9:20 Kabili wabapeele Umupashi obe uusuma nganshi
Nehemiah9:21 Wabasakamene ilyo bali mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane. Takwali akantu ako baleculako. Insalu shabo shonse tashasapwike nakalya
Nehemiah9:22 “Wabapeele ishamfumu elyo ne mishobo. Kabili wabapatulwile ukuti bekale mu fitungu mu fitungu. Bapoka ne calo cakwa Sihoni imfumu ya ku Heshiboni elyo ne calo ca mfumu Ogi uwa ku Bashani.
Nehemiah9:23 Kabili wafushishe abana babo abaume kwati ni ntanda sha mu mulu. Kabili wabatwele na mu calo walaile kuli bashibo
Nehemiah9:24 Kanshi nabo abana babo baliingile no kupoka icalo. Kabili walengele na bekashi ba mu calo abena Kenani ukuba ne cumfwila. Wabapeele mu maboko yabo
Nehemiah9:25 Bapokele imisumba ya malinga pamo pene ne mpanga iyafunda nganshi. Kabili bapokele na mayanda ayaisulamo ifyuma fyonse. Bapoka ne fishima ifyaimbwa kabela

Nehemiah9:31 Lelo mu cikuku cobe icikulu tawabalekeleshe nangu ukubalofya
Nehemiah9:32 “Eico nomba
Nehemiah9:33 Kabili we mfumu iwe waliba umulungami pali conse icaisa pali ifwe
Nehemiah9:34 Nangufye ni bashamfumu besu nangu ni ntungulushi shesu
Nehemiah9:35 Ilyo bali mu bufumu bwa ku calo cabo tabakupyungile
Nehemiah9:36 “Nomba mona ifwe na lelo tuli basha pantu balitucimfya. Mu calo cino icapeelwe ku fikolwe fyesu ukusekelelamo ku fisabo na ku fisuma ifyabamo
Nehemiah9:37 Ifisabo fyaciko fiwaminafye bashamfumu abo watupeela ukulatuteeka pa mulandu wa bubifi bwesu. Elyo kabili bacita ifyo batemenwe pa mibili yesu na pa fitekwa fyesu. Awe kwena ifwe twaikalilafye ubucushi bweka.

Nehemiah12:18 Shamua uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Biliga
Nehemiah12:19 Matenai uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Yoiaribu
Nehemiah12:20 Kalai uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Salai
Nehemiah12:21 Hashabiya uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Hilikiya
Nehemiah12:22 Mu nshiku shakwa Eliashibu
Nehemiah12:23 Elyo abena Levi bena
Nehemiah12:24 Intungulushi sha bena Levi shali ni Hashabiya
Nehemiah12:25 Elyo kwali na balelinda amayanda yakusungilamo ifipe
Nehemiah12:26 Ifi fyacitike mu nshiku shakwa Yoiakimu umwana mwaume wakwa Yeshua umwishikulu wakwa Yosadaki
Nehemiah12:27 Kanshi ilyo nshita yafikile iyakuti batuule ilinga lya musumba wa mu Yerusalemu kuli Lesa
Nehemiah12:28 Elyo bakemba balongana pamo ukufuma mu ncende iyashingulwike Yerusalemu ne mishi ya bena Netofa.
Nehemiah12:29 Bambi bafumine ku Beti Giligali na ku ncende ya ku Geba na Asimafeti pantu bakemba bakuulile imishi yabo ukushinguluka Yerusalemu.
Nehemiah12:30 Elyo bashimapepo na bena Levi baisangulula abene
Nehemiah12:31 Kanshi naeba intungulushi sha bena Yuda ukunina pa mulu we linga. Nasonta na mabumba ya bakemba yabili ayakulu ukuti yengile mu milongo ibili
Nehemiah12:32 Lilya bapita elyo pakonka Hoshaya ali na citika wa ntungulushi sha bena Yuda
Nehemiah12:33 pamo na Asariya
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda
Nehemiah12:35 na bana ba bashimapepo bamo bamo baisa na mapenga
Nehemiah12:36 Ba lupwa lwakwe bali ni Shemaiya
Nehemiah12:37 Cilya bafika pa Mpongolo ya Kamfukumfuku
Nehemiah12:38 Ibumba limbi ilya bakemba lyalungama ku masamba. Na ine nalikonka panuma pamulu we linga
Nehemiah12:39 pa mulu wa Mpongolo yakwa Efulemu
Nehemiah12:40 Elyo amabumba ya bakemba yabili ayakulumbanya Lesa yaiminina pa ncende shabo mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Na ine wine pamo na citika wa ntungulushi twali nasho twaimina
Nehemiah12:41 twali pamo na bashimapepo abali na mapenga. Amashina yabo ni aya: Eliakimu
Nehemiah12:42 elyo pamo na Maaseya
Nehemiah12:43 Kanshi pali ubo bushiku batuula Lesa amalumbo ayengi nganshi no kusansamuka. Balisansamwike pantu Lesa ewabapeele ishi nsansa ishishaifulila. Banamayo pamo pene na bana balisansamwike. Ne ciunda ca nsansa ishali mu Yerusalemu caumfwikike ukutali nganshi.
Nehemiah12:44 Pa nshita ine ilya basonta abantu bashifwe abakwangalila amatala umo balesungila umutuulo wa ŋanda yakwa Lesa
Nehemiah12:45 Balebomba umulimo wakutumika Lesa no kusangulula. Bakemba na bakalinda wa mpongolo nabo bene efyo balecita ukulingana nefyo Davidi no mwana wakwe Solomoni babakonkomeshe.
Nehemiah12:46 Na kale line mu nshiku shakwa Davidi na Asafu kwali ntungulushi sha bakemba ne nyimbo shakulumbanya no kutatakula Lesa.
Nehemiah12:47 Kabili na mu nshiku shakwa Serubabeli na Nehemia
Nehemiah13:1 Pa bushiku ubo epo babelengele icitabo cakwa Mose pa lwalala mu matwi ya bantu. Bafikile apo calembwa ukuti tecakwesha ukusankana no mwina Amoni nangu umwina Moabu mu lukuta lwakwa Lesa
Nehemiah13:2 pantu aba bantu tabapokelele abana bakwa Israeli no kubapeela ifyakulya na menshi lelo balipile Balamu pakuti abatipwile. Nomba Lesa ena ayalula icitipu ukuba ipaalo.
Nehemiah13:3 Ilyo abantu baumfwile ili funde
Nehemiah13:4 Ilyo ifi tafilati ficitike
Nehemiah13:5 kanshi apekanishishe Tobia umuputule uukalamba nganshi uo pakubala balebomfya ukubikamo umutuulo wa cabunga
Nehemiah13:6 Ukuba kwena ilyo ifi fyonse fyalecitika nshali mu Yerusalemu iyoo
Nehemiah13:7 Elyo naishile umfwa icilubo Eliashibu acitile pakupeela Tobia umuputule mu lubansa lwa ŋanda yakwa Lesa.
Nehemiah13:8 Nalifulilwe nganshi no kuposa panse ifipe fyakwa Tobia fyonse ifyali mu muputule.
Nehemiah13:9 Elyo napeela icebo icakuti imiputule yonse isangululwe
Nehemiah13:10 Kabili nalimwene nokuti icipande capekumi bali nokulapeela abena Levi
Nehemiah13:11 Kanshi nakalipila intungulushi no kubepusha ukuti
Nehemiah13:12 Abena Yuda bonse epakuleta umutuulo wa cekumi uwabunga
Nehemiah13:13 Napeele Shelemiya shimapepo
Nehemiah13:14 Ulenjibukisha we Lesa wandi pali ici
Nehemiah13:15 Muli shilya nshiku namwene abaume aba mu calo ca Bayuda balenyanta icakukaminamo umwangashi pa bushiku bwe Sabata. Kabili nabalonga iŋanu pali bakabalwe pamo no mwangashi ne fitwalo fya myangashi
Nehemiah13:16 Kabili abaume abafumine ku Turi abaleikala mu Yerusalemu nabo baleleta isabi ne fintu fimbi ifyamakwebo no kushitisha mu Yerusalemu ku bantu ba mu calo ca Yuda pa bushiku bwe Sabata.
Nehemiah13:17 Elyo naebaula na basambashi ba mu calo ca Yuda natila
Nehemiah13:18 Bushe bashinwe tabacitile ica musango umo wine pakuti Lesa alete amafya pali ifwe no musumba? Kabili imwe mulelundako pakukowesha Isabata pakuti ubukali buponene Israeli.”
Nehemiah13:19 Kanshi elyo payambile ukufiita
Nehemiah13:20 Limo limo bashimakwebo na bakashitisha ba fyakulya ifyalekana lekana balesendama kunse ya Yerusalemu.
Nehemiah13:21 Lelo nalibasokele nati
Nehemiah13:22 Elyo napeela abena Levi icebo icakuti baisangulule kabili baye mukulonda impongolo epakushininkisha ukuti Isabata lilesungwa muli bukaele. Ulenjibukisha pali ici we Lesa wandi
Nehemiah13:23 Kabili mu nshiku shine isho namwene ukuti Abayuda baupile banamayo ukufuma ku bena Ashidodi
Nehemiah13:24 Na bana bafyelwe muli ifi fyupo
Nehemiah13:25 Kanshi nabakalipila no kubatipwila. Nasuka naumapo nabamo no kubanukula umushishi. Nabeba nokuti bafwile balapa umulapo mwishina lyakwa Lesa ukuti
Nehemiah13:26 Bushe te fyupo fya musango uyu efyalengele ukuti Solomoni mfumu ya bena Israeli acite icabubifi? Mu fyalo fyonse takwali imfumu iyali nga ena. Ali uwatemwikwa kuli Lesa
Nehemiah13:27 Nshilefwaya ukumfwa ukuti na imwe mwaibika mu misango iyi iyabipisha
Nehemiah13:28 Umo pa bana bakwa Yehoiyada
Nehemiah13:29 Ibukisha aba bantu
Nehemiah13:30 Kanshi efyo nasangulwile bashimapepo na bena Levi kuli fyonse ifyafuma ku benafyalo
Nehemiah13:31 Nateyanya nokuti pa nshita ishapimwa baleleta umutuulo wa nkuni ne fitwalo fyakubalilapo. Ulenjibukisha pakumpeela ishuko
Esther1:1 Ifi fintu fyacitike mu nshiku shakwa Asuelusi
Esther1:2 Mu nshiku shilya imfumu Asuelusi ali pa cipuna cabufumu mu musumba wa Susa.
Esther1:3 Elyo mu mwaka walenga butatu uwa buteko bwakwe acitila bamushika na babomfi bakwe bonse imitebeto. Abakalamba ba fita fyakwe ifya ku Pesia na Media
Esther1:4 Kanshi alangisha ifyuma fya bufumu bwakwe ubwa lulumbi
Esther1:5 Panuma ya ishi inshiku
Esther1:6 Kwaliko ne nsalu ishabuuta ne shacifufya isho bacingileko ishaleselela. Bashikulikile ku tumyando twa nsalu ishatelela isha kolokondwe wabuuta no wakashikila
Esther1:7 Ifyakunwa fyena balefinwena mu tumakapu utwa golide
Esther1:8 Ukulingana ne fyakonkomeshe imfumu
Esther1:9 Namfumu Fashiti nao apekanishisha banamayo imitebeto mwisano lya mfumu Asuelusi.
Esther1:10 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali ico imfumu yasansamuka pa mulandu wa mwangashi yalenwa
Esther1:11 ukuya buula namfumu Fashiti pakuti ese nafwala icisote ca bunamfumu no kwisa ilanga ku bantu ifyo ayemba pantu ali umusuma nganshi.
Esther1:12 Nomba namfumu ena akaana amashiwi imfumu yatumine bamutungwi ukuya mweba. Pali ici
Esther1:13 Elyo imfumu yalanda na bampandamano waiko
Esther1:14 Abo imfumu yaishibishe nganshi ni aba: Kashena
Esther1:15 Yasosa aiti
Esther1:16 Elyo Memukani
Esther1:17 Pantu ificitile namfumu ilyo fyaishibikwa kuli banamayo bonse
Esther1:18 Lelo line banamayo ba ku Pesia na Media abomfwile imibeele yakwa namfumu
Esther1:19 Nga kuti casansamusha imfumu
Esther1:20 Pakuti ilyo ici cebo ca mfumu cikeshibikwa mu calo cakwe conse icishaikulila
Esther1:21 Ili funde lyasekesha imfumu na bacilolo. Imfumu yacita ngomo mwine Memukani aipandileko amano.
Esther1:22 Atuma amakalata ku fitungu fyonse ifya bufumu bwakwe ukulingana no lulimi ulwaba muli cila citungu ukutila umwaume onse e mukalamba wa mu ŋanda yakwe.
Esther2:1 Panuma ya ifi fyonse
Esther2:2 Elyo ababomfi ba mfumu abaleitumika basosa abati
Esther2:3 Imfumu isale bacilolo mu fitungu fyonse ifya calo cakwe abakulonganika abakashana banacisungu no kubaleta ku ŋanda ya banakashi ba mfumu iyaba mu musumba wa Susa. Aba bakashana bakalasungwa na Hegai mutungwi umubomfi wa kwisano uwaleyangalila abanakashi ba mfumu. Babapeele na mafuta na tumbi utwakuti bamoneka bwino.
Esther2:4 Pali aba bakashana
Esther2:5 Kanshi mu musumba wa Susa mwali Umuyuda umo ishina lyakwe ni Modekai umwana wakwa Yairi
Esther2:6 uwali pa basha basendele ukufuma ku Yerusalemu pamo na Yekoniya imfumu ya ku Yuda uo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni asendele.
Esther2:7 Modekai alesunga Hadasa
Esther2:8 Kanshi ilyo babilishe imbila ne cebo ca mfumu
Esther2:9 Esta awamina Hegai
Esther2:10 Esta tasokolwele abantu bakwe nangu ulupwa lwakwe pantu Modekai alimukonkomeshe ukukanasokolola.
Esther2:11 Cila bushiku Modekai aleendauka mupepi no lubansa lwa ŋanda ya banakashi ba mfumu pakuti eshibe ifilecitika kuli Esta.
Esther2:12 Kanshi inshita yasuka yafika iyakuti cila mukashana aye ku mfumu Asuelusi. Ici cacitike panuma ya mweshi ikumi limo na ibili (12) ukulingana ne cebo ca banamayo. Imyeshi yakuipekanya yali ngefi: Imyeshi mutanda abakashana balesuba amafuta aya cinyamuti icanunka ubusaka muri
Esther2:13 Ilyo umukashana aleya ku mfumu ukufuma mu ŋanda ya banakashi ba mfumu
Esther2:14 Afwile ukwingila icungulo elyo akacelo afuma aya mu ŋanda iyabubili iyo balesungilamo abanakashi ba mfumu. Uwalesunga iyi ŋanda ni Sha Ashigasi
Esther2:15 Elyo cafikile Esta umwana umwanakashi wakwa Abihaili nalume wakwa Modekai
Esther2:16 Kanshi ilyo batwele Esta ku mfumu Asuelusi mwisano lyakwe mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo
Esther2:17 imfumu yatemenwe Esta ukucila bonse abanakashi bambi. Amona ukusekelelwa no luse ku mfumu ukucila banacisungu bambi bonse. Kanshi yamufwika icisote cabunamfumu ku mutwe
Esther2:18 Elyo imfumu yacitile bacilolo na babomfi bakwe imitebeto iyikalamba. Kwena yali mitebeto yakwa Esta. Apeela ku fitungu fya calo cakwe ubushiku bwakutuusha no kupeela ifyabupe ukulingana nefyo imfumu ingapeela.
Esther2:19 Kanshi ilyo balonganike abakashana kabili umuku wabubili
Esther2:20 Esta tasokolwele ulupwa lwakwe nangu abantu bakwe ukulingana nefyo bamukonkomeshe kuli Modekai. Esta abeela Modekai ngefyo alemubeela ilyo alemusunga.
Esther2:21 Mu nshiku shilya lilya Modekai aleikala pa mpongolo ya mfumu
Esther2:22 Kanshi Modekai aumfwa uyu mulandu. Kabili aeba namfumu Esta. Esta nao aeba imfumu mwishina lyakwa Modekai.
Esther2:23 Elyo bafwailisha pali uyu mulandu
Esther3:1 Panuma ya ifi fintu imfumu Asuelusi asumbula Hamani umwina Agagi
Esther3:2 Kanshi bonse ababomfi ba mfumu abali pa mpongolo bali nokupeela Hamani umucinshi pakumwinamina
Esther3:3 Elyo ababomfi ba mfumu abali pa mpongolo baeba Modekai ati. “Bushe cinshi ushikonkele icebo ca mfumu?”
Esther3:4 Efyo balamweba cila bushiku nomba ena taleumfwa
Esther3:5 Ilyo Hamani amona ukuti Modekai talemwinamina nangu ukumupeela umucinshi
Esther3:6 Nomba talefwaya ukwipaya Modekai eka iyoo. Panuma yakumweba abantu bakwa Modekai
Esther3:7 Mu mweshi wakubalilapo uwitwa Nisani
Esther3:8 Elyo Hamani aeba imfumu Asuelusi ati. “Kuliko abantu bamo abaipatulula abasalanganina mu bantu bobe aba mu fitungu fyonse fya bufumu bobe. Balipusana ku bantu bambi ku ntambi shabo
Esther3:9 Ngakuti casansamusha imfumu
Esther3:10 Elyo imfumu yafuule imbalaminwe yakufwatikilako no kupeela Hamani umwina Agagi umwana wakwa Hamedata
Esther3:11 Kabili imfumu yaeba Hamani aiti. “Indalama shalipeelwa kuli iwe pamo pene na bantu bene
Esther3:12 Kanshi imfumu yaita bakalemba baiko pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shitatu (13) mu mweshi wakubalilapo ukuti balembe icebo ukulingana na fyonse ifyo Hamani alandile. Ici cebo calembelwe ku nkonkani sha mfumu shonse na balashi aba cila citungu mu calo
Esther3:13 Batumine bakapaso ku fitungu fyonse ifya calo ca mfumu no kubapeela amakalata apali icebo icakonaula
Esther3:14 Icikope ca uyu kalata cali nokubilikishiwa mu fitungu fya calo fyonse nge cebo pakuti abantu bonse bakaipekanye pali ubu bushiku.
Esther3:15 Bakapaso bwangu bwangu bakonka icipope ca mfumu
Esther4:1 Ilyo Modekai aumfwile ifyacitike fyonse
Esther4:2 Aya fika na ku mpongolo ya mfumu. Nomba takwali umuntu nangu umo uwasuminishiwe ukwingila pa mpongolo ya mfumu nafwala insalu shabulanda.
Esther4:3 Kanshi mu citungu conse ica calo umwafikile icipope ne cebo ca mfumu
Esther4:4 Elyo ababomfi bakwa Esta abanakashi na bamutungwi wakwe bamushimikile ifyalecitika
Esther4:5 Elyo Esta aita Hataki
Esther4:6 Hataki aya kuli Modekai mu lubansa lwa musumba pantanshi ya mpongolo ya mfumu.
Esther4:7 Elyo Modekai amweba fyonse ifyamucitikile
Esther4:8 Modekai kabili amupeela ne cikope ca cebo
Esther4:9 Elyo Hataki aya kuli Esta no kumweba ifyo Modekai amwebele.
Esther4:10 Panuma yakulanda
Esther4:11 “Ababomfi ba mfumu bonse na bantu bakwe mu fitungu fya calo cakwe fyonse balishiba ukuti umwaume nelyo umwanakashi uwaingila mu lubansa lwamukati kukumona imfumu ukwabula ukuti imwite
Esther4:12 Elyo baebele Modekai ifyo Esta asosele.
Esther4:13 Pakwasuka Esta
Esther4:14 Pantu iwe nga waikalafye tondolo pali ino nshita
Esther4:15 Mukwasuka Modekai
Esther4:16 “Kabiye ulonganike Abayuda bonse abekala mu Susa no kubeba ukuti bakamfungileko pa nshiku shitatu akasuba no bushiku ukwabula ukulya no kunwa amenshi. Na ine wine na babomfi bandi banamayo tukafunga nga imwe. Panuma yakufunga elyo nkaya ku mfumu
Esther4:17 Elyo Modekai aya cita fyonse ifyo Esta amwebele.
Esther5:1 Pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu Esta afwala insalu shakwe ishabunamfumu
Esther5:2 Ilyo imfumu yamwene Esta naiminina mu lubansa
Esther5:3 Imfumu yamwipusha aiti
Esther5:4 Elyo Esta asosa ati
Esther5:5 Imfumu nayo epakusosa aiti
Esther5:6 Ilyo bacili balenwa umwangashi panuma ya matebeto
Esther5:7 Elyo Esta ayasuka ati. “Ifyo ndefwaya nefyo ndelomba nifi.
Esther5:8 Nga ninsanga uluse pa cinso ca mfumu elyo nga cakuti casansamusha imfumu ukumpeela ico ndelomba no kufikilisha ico mfwaya
Esther5:9 Ilyo Hamani afumine ku malila
Esther5:10 Lelo kwena ashipikisha aya na ku ŋanda kumwakwe. Elyo atuma abakwita abanankwe no mukashi wakwe Sereshi.
Esther5:11 Elyo Hamani atampa ukubashimikila ubwingi bwa fyuma fyakwe
Esther5:12 Alundapo nokuti
Esther5:13 Lelo ifi fyonse tafilepilibula akantu nangu kamo kuli ine nga cakuti ndemona Modekai Umuyuda naikala pa mpongolo ya mfumu.”
Esther5:14 Elyo umukashi wakwe Sereshi na banankwe bamweba abati
Esther6:1 Muli ubo bushiku imfumu Asuelusi alifililwe ukusendama utulo. Kanshi epakweba abakumuletela icitabo camilandu
Esther6:2 Awe basanga apo balembele ifyo Modekai asokolwele batungwi ba mfumu babili
Esther6:3 Elyo imfumu yaipusha aiti
Esther6:4 Imfumu nayo aiti
Esther6:5 Ababomfi ba mfumu bayasuka abati
Esther6:6 Kanshi Hamani aingila
Esther6:7 Hamani epakweba imfumu ati
Esther6:8 leteni ifyakufwala fyabufumu ifyo imfumu yafwalapo na kabalwe imfumu yaninapo
Esther6:9 Elyo buulenipo umo pa balashi ba mfumu abacindamisha nganshi eo mupeele insalu na kabalwe. Uyu mulashi afwike uyu muntu imfumu ilefwaya ukucindika
Esther6:10 Elyo imfumu yaeba Hamani aiti. “Endesha
Esther6:11 Hamani epakuya buula ifyakufwala na kabalwe
Esther6:12 Elyo Modekai abwelela ku mpongolo ya mfumu lelo Hamani bwangu bwangu aya ku ŋanda kumwakwe
Esther6:13 Elyo Hamani ashimikila umukashi wakwe Sereshi na banankwe bonse fyonsefye ifyamucitikile. Bampandamano wakwe na bakashi bakwe epakumweba abati. “Nga ni Modekai ulya ufwaya ukuwisha
Esther6:14 Bacili balelanda nankwe
Esther7:1 Kanshi imfumu na Hamani baingila mu malila na namfumu Esta.
Esther7:2 Pali ubu bushiku bwacibili
Esther7:3 Elyo namfumu Esta ayasuka ati
Esther7:4 Pantu balitushitisha ine na bantu bandi pakuti batonaule
Esther7:5 Elyo mfumu Asuelusi aipusha namfumu Esta ati
Esther7:6 Esta epakwasuka ati
Esther7:7 Elyo imfumu yaleka ukunwa umwangashi
Esther7:8 Ilyo imfumu yabwelele ukufuma mwibala lye sano
Esther7:9 Elyo Habona umo pali bamutungwi abaletumika imfumu asosa ati
Esther7:10 Imfumu epakusosa ati
Esther8:1 Ubushiku bulya imfumu Asuelusi yapeela namfumu Esta iŋanda yakwa Hamani umulwani wa Bayuda. Elyo Modekai aisa ku mfumu pantu Esta aliyebele ukuti muntu wakwe.
Esther8:2 Kabili imfumu yafula imbalaminwe yakufwatikilako iyo yapokolwele kuli Hamani yapeela na Modekai. Esta nao apeela Modekai amaka pa ŋanda yakwa Hamani.
Esther8:3 Elyo Esta abwekeshapo ukulanda ne mfumu. Awa pa nkasa shakwe alelila no kumupapata pakuti ekonka amapange ayabi yakwa Hamani umwina Agagi ayo apangile Abayuda.
Esther8:4 Ilyo imfumu yalangile Esta inkonto ya golide
Esther8:5 Esta epakwima aya iminina na pali mfumu. Elyo asosa ati
Esther8:6 Bushe ine kuti natemwa shani ukumona icinkunka icileishila abantu bandi? Bushe kuti nashipikisha shani ukumona ubonaushi bwa ba lupwa lwandi?”
Esther8:7 Elyo imfumu Asuelusi aeba namfumu Esta na Modekai Umuyuda ati
Esther8:8 Nomba kuti mwalembelako Abayuda mu musango mulefwailamo mwishina lya mfumu. Mufwatikepo ne nshimbi ya mbalaminwe ya mfumu
Esther8:9 Pali ilya ine nshita bakalemba ba mfumu balibetile
Esther8:10 Alembele kalata mwishina lya mfumu Asuelusi no kufwatikapo inshimbi ya mbalaminwe yakwe. Elyo atuma amakalata aya ne nkombe shalubilo ishaninine pali bakabalwe abalubilo nganshi abafyelwe kuli bakabalwe abasalwa abo imfumu yalebomfya.
Esther8:11 Mu makalata aya mwalembelwe ukuti Abayuda aba muli cila musumba nabapeelwa insambu ishakuti balongane no kucingilila ubumi bwabo
Esther8:12 Ifi fifwile ukucitika pa bushiku bumofye mu fitungu fyonse ifya calo ca mfumu Asuelusi
Esther8:13 Icikope ca fyalembelwe cali nokupeelwa nge cebo mu fitungu fya calo fyonse
Esther8:14 Kanshi inkombe shanina na pali bakabalwe balubilo abo imfumu yalebomfya
Esther8:15 Awe Modekai afuma pa cinso ca mfumu ninshi nafwala ne fyakufwala fyabufumu ifyacifufya ne fyabuuta
Esther8:16 Pantu kwaba ubuseko
Esther8:17 Elyo kabili mu fitungu fya calo fyonse ne misumba yonse
Esther9:1 Kanshi mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12)
Esther9:2 Abayuda mu misumba yonse na mu fitungu fyonse ifya calo ca mfumu Asuelusi balongana mukwipaya abo abalefwaya ukubalofya. Kanshi tapali nangu umo uwakubalwisha pantu umwenso wakubatiina waliketefye abantu bonse.
Esther9:3 Bonsefye abalashi ba mfumu aba mu fitungu fya calo
Esther9:4 Pantu Modekai ali na maka ayengi mu ŋanda ya mfumu
Esther9:5 Kanshi Abayuda bakoma bonse abalwani babo ku lupanga
Esther9:6 Mu musumba wa Susa wekafye Abayuda baipeye no konaula abantu abaume imyanda isano (500).
Esther9:7 Kabili baipaya na Pashandata na Dalufoni na Asipata
Esther9:8 na Porata
Esther9:9 na Pamashita na Arisai na Aridai na Faisata
Esther9:10 abana ikumi limo abakwa Hamani mwana Hamedata
Esther9:11 Pa bushiku bwine ubo baya shimikilako imfumu impendwa ya bantu baipeye mu musumba wa Susa.
Esther9:12 Elyo imfumu yaeba namfumu Esta aiti
Esther9:13 Elyo Esta ayasuka ati
Esther9:14 Kanshi imfumu epakupeela icebo icakucita ifyo fine. Ne funde lyapeelwa mu musumba wa Susa
Esther9:15 Abayuda abali mu Susa balongana nakabili pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) ubwa mu mweshi wa Ada
Esther9:16 Elyo Abayuda bambi balongana mu fitungu fya calo ca mfumu
Esther9:17 Ubu bwali bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shitatu (13) ubwa mu mweshi wa Ada. Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) balituushishe no kubucita ubwakusefya ne nsansa.
Esther9:18 Abayuda bali mu Susa bena balongene pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shitatu (13) no bwalenga ikumi limo na bune (14)
Esther9:19 E mulandu walenga ukuti Abayuda
Esther9:20 Modekai alembele ifintu fyonse no kutuma amakalata ku Bayuda bonse mu fitungu fyonse fya calo ca mfumu Asuelusi ifyakutali ne fyamupepi.
Esther9:21 Mu makalata aya abakonkomeshe ukucindika ubushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na bune (14) ubwa mu mweshi wa Ada elyo no bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15) cila mwaka.
Esther9:22 Pantu e bushiku Abayuda balubwikemo ku balwani babo
Esther9:23 Kanshi Abayuda basuminisha ifyalembele Modekai
Esther9:24 Hamani umwina Agagi umwana wakwa Hamedata
Esther9:25 Nomba ilyo imfumu yaumfwile ifi ukufuma kuli Esta
Esther9:26 E mulandu wine bainikile inshiku ati Purimu ukufumya kwishiwi lya puri. Kabili ni pa mulandu wa fyonse ifyalembelwe muli iyi kalata nefyo bamwene ne fyabaponene
Esther9:27 Abayuda baipangile no kukonka ulutambi pamo na bana babo na bantu bonsefye ukucindika cila mwaka apabula ukufilwa ishi nshiku shibili umo mwine calembelwa na pa nshita iyasalwa cila mwaka.
Esther9:28 Ishi nshiku shibili bafwile bashicindika no kushikonka mu nkulo shonse
Esther9:29 Elyo namfumu Esta
Esther9:30 Aya makalata yatuminwe ku Bayuda bonse aba mu fitungu fyonse umwanda umo amakumi yabili na cine lubali (127) ifya calo ca mfumu Asuelusi mu mashiwi yacibote no kubateeka imitima.
Esther9:31 Amashiwi yali mu makalata yabakonkomesha ukuti bakalesefya inshiku sha Purimu pa nshita iyasontwa pamo ngefyo namfumu Esta na Modekai Umuyuda babebele ukucita pamo na bana babo mukukonka ulutambi lwakufunga ukulya no kuloosha.
Esther9:32 Icebo capeele Esta ecalengele ukuti ukusefya Purimu kube ulutambi elyo no kulembwa mu citabo.
Esther10:1 Imfumu Asuelusi apatikisha abantu ba mu calo conse na mu lulamba lwa bemba ukusonka umusonko.
Esther10:2 Kanshi ificitwa fyakwe fyonse ifyabulamba na maka acitile
Esther10:3 Modekai Umuyuda ewakonkelepo ukucindama pa mfumu Asuelusi. Kabili ali na maka pa Bayuda
Job1:1 Kwaliko umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Yobo. Aleikala mu calo ico beta Usi. Uyu muntu ali uwakaele
Job1:2 Afyele abana abaume cine lubali na bana abanakashi nabo batatu.
Job1:3 Akwete impaanga amakana cine lubali (7
Job1:4 Abana bakwa Yobo abaume babeleshe ukucita imitebeto cila muntu kumwakwe no kwitako abanankwe
Job1:5 Kanshi cali ifi
Job1:6 Kanshi kwali ubushiku bumo ilyo abana baume bakwa Lesa aba ku mulu baile longana pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Job1:7 Elyo Yawe aipusha Satana ati
Job1:8 Yawe akonkanyapo ati
Job1:9 Satana epakwasuka Yawe ati
Job1:10 Teico walimucingilila pamo ne ŋanda yakwe na fyonse ifyo akwata mu mbalifye shonse. Walipaala ne milimo yakwe
Job1:11 Nomba fungulula ukuboko kobe no kwikata pa fyuma fyakwe fyonse
Job1:12 Elyo Yawe aeba Satana ati. “Cisuma kanshi nabika fyonse ifyo akwata mu minwe yobe
Job1:13 Ubushiku bumo cilya abana bakwa Yobo abaume na banakashi balelya no kunwa umwangashi mu ŋanda ya mukalamba wabo umwaume
Job1:14 inkombe yafika kuli Yobo yamweba aiti
Job1:15 elyo abena Saba bacisa fukukila ifitekwa
Job1:16 Acili alelanda ifi
Job1:17 Acili alelanda ifi
Job1:18 Acili alelanda na imbi inkombe yafika aiti
Job1:19 Elyo mu kashita akanonofye kwacima umwela uukalamba ukufuma mu matololo no kwisa uma amatungi yane aya ŋanda no kubongolokela pa baice
Job1:20 Elyo Yobo aiminina
Job1:21 “Naishile ubwamba ukufuma munda muli mayo
Job1:22 Muli ifi fyonse Yobo tabifishe
Job2:1 Nakabili kwali ubushiku bumo ilyo abana bakwa Lesa abaume aba ku mulu baile longana pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Satana nao epakwisa monekela ku cinso cakwa Yawe.
Job2:2 Kabili Yawe aipusha Satana ati
Job2:3 Yawe amwipusha ati
Job2:4 Elyo Satana ayasuka Yawe ati
Job2:5 Nomba fungulula ukuboko kobe no kwikata kwifupa no munofu wakwe. Akakulapisha pa cinso cobe.”
Job2:6 Yawe epakweba Satana ati
Job2:7 Kanshi Satana epakufuma pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kuya lwalika Yobo ifilonda ifyabipisha nganshi umubili onse
Job2:8 Yobo epakubuula iciinga eco alafopolweko ifilonda
Job2:9 Elyo umukashi wakwe aisa mweba ati
Job2:10 Lelo Yobo ayasuka umukashi wakwe ati
Job2:11 Kanshi elyo bacibusa bakwa Yobo batatu baumfwile amacushi yonse ayamuponene
Job2:12 Bacili akatalamukila bamumona
Job2:13 Baikala nankwe panshi ukulingana ne nshiku cine lubali
Job3:1 Panuma ya ifi

Job4:1 Elifasi umwina Temani ayasuka ati
Job4:2 “Umuntu nga akwebako ishiwi limo
Job4:3 Mona walifunda abantu abengi

Job4:5 Nomba na iwe cakufikila
Job4:6 Bushe akatiina kobe aka kuli Yawe temwaba ukutetekela kobe? Elyo ne mikalile iya bololoke bobe temo emwaba isubilo lyobe?
Job4:7 “Tala tontonkanya. Bushe walimonapo umuntu umo uwaololoka umutima aloba? Nangu umuntu uwakaele aonaika?

Job4:19 nga palibufi abantu ababumbwa ukufuma ku lukungu
Job4:20 Akacelo epo bali
Job4:21 Na fyonse ifyo bakwata fyaonaikila pamo nabo

Job5:7 Lelo umuntunse ena nga afyalwa asanga ubucushi

Job5:22 Pa nshita ya bonaushi ne cipowe

Job6:7 Ine nshikwete nsala yakulya ifyakulya fya musango uyu. Nafimfitika ku mukoshi.

Job6:9 Nangu nga kuti casekesha Lesa ukunjipaya

Job6:12 Bushe amaka yandi kuti yalingana na mabwe ukukosa

Job13:4 Pantu imwe mulebepekesha ukulanda icishinka kanshi muli babufi
Job13:5 Shi talalenifye tondolo
Job13:6 Umfweni kanshi kufyo nalatantika umulandu wandi
Job13:7 “Bushe cinshi mulebepela ubufi mwishina lyakwa Lesa? No kumusoselako nomba mu fyabufi?
Job13:8 Bushe mulefwaya ukuwila ku lubali lwakwe? Bushe kuti mwalubulwilako Lesa umulandu?
Job13:9 Bushe imwe muleti kuti camuwamina nga amuceceta ifyo ubumi bwenu bwaba? Nangu bushe kuti mwamubepa ngefyo umuntu abepa umubiye?
Job13:10 Ala Lesa akamukalipila
Job13:11 Bushe ubucindami bwakwa Lesa tabumutiinya
Job13:12 Amapinda yenu ala mapinda ya mito
Job13:13 “Talaleni lekeni na ine nkwate inshita iyakuilandila
Job13:14 Nshikene
Job13:15 Lesa nga alefwaya ukunjipaya kuti anjipaya
Job13:16 Ici ecikampususha pantu nalishiba ukuti
Job13:17 Mumfwe bwino bwino amashiwi yandi
Job13:18 Moneni ninjipekanya nganshi ukulubulula umulandu wandi
Job13:19 Nani engampeela umulandu
Job13:20 “Nomba ndelomba ifintu fibili
Job13:21 Fumya ukuboko kobe pali ine
Job13:22 Elyo lyena nga wanjita ndeisa
Job13:23 Bushe ifyabupulumushi ne fyabubifi nacita fyaba finga? Unange ifyo nalufyanya nefyo nabifya.
Job13:24 Cinshi wafishila icinso cobe kuli ine
Job13:25 Bushe kuti watiinya ibuula ilileululuka mu mwela
Job13:26 Wampingula buluku buluku
Job13:27 Wabika amolu yandi mwikoli
Job13:28 Efyo no bumi bwa muntu bonaikafye nge cintu icilebola
Job14:1 “Umuntu onse uwafyalwa ku mwanakashi
Job14:2 Atila abalula nge luba kabili abonsa
Job14:3 Bushe kuti watontomesha amenso yobe pa muntu uwaba ifi? Kabili eo waita no kumuleta ku bupingushi kuli iwe?
Job14:4 Nani engafumya icasanguluka ku cakowela? Tapali nangu umo.
Job14:5 Apo inshiku sha muntu shalipendwa
Job14:6 Fumyapo amenso pa muntu uleke aikalile
Job14:7 “Umuti wena walikwata isubilo
Job14:8 Imishila yauko nangu ingakota shani
Job14:9 kuti walemuka nga waumfwa umutonshi
Job14:10 Nomba umuntu nga afwa
Job14:11 Nga filya fine amenshi ya muli bemba yakama no kucepa
Job14:12 abantu balafwa nokwima tabema
Job14:13 “Iyee
Job14:14 Umuntu nga afwa
Job14:15 Lyena nga wanjita nkasuka
Job14:16 Lyena kuti walalengula imyendele yandi yonse
Job14:17 Ne fyabubifi fyandi ukafisalila mu cola
Job14:18 “Nomba nga filya fine ulupili lusholomoka lwasuka lwabongoloka
Job14:19 filya fine amenshi yakuusa amabwe
Job14:20 Pakulekelesha umuntu wamucimfya
Job14:21 Abana bakwe abaume nga bashala bacindikwa
Job14:22 Ena omfwafye ubukali mu mubili wakwe
Job15:1 Elyo Elifasi umwina Temani ayaswike ati
Job15:2 “Bushe umuntu wamano kuti ayasukako ku mashiwi ayabuwelewele
Job15:3 Bushe kuti afwaya ukulanda amashiwi ayacabecabe
Job15:4 Cinshi iwe Yobo wafumisha akatiina ka kuli Lesa mu mano yobe
Job15:5 Ububi bwaba mu mutima obe ebwalenga ukuti akanwa kobe kalande ifi
Job15:6 Akanwa kobe ekakushinina
Job15:7 “Bushe niwe wabalilepo ukufyalwa pa bantu bonse mwa? Bushe waliko ilyo impili tashilati shibeko?
Job15:8 Bushe ulomfwako ubupingushi bwa mu cilye cakwa Lesa? Niwe wakwata amano wekafye mwa?
Job15:9 Finshi waishiba ifyo ifwe tushaishiba? Finshi waumfwa ifyo ifwe tushaumfwa?
Job15:10 Pali baifwe pali abakalamba abamfwi
Job15:11 Bushe wasuula ukutalalika kwakwa Lesa
Job15:12 Cinshi umutima obe ukoseele ifi? Mona ifyo walalukumya amenso
Job15:13 icakuti no mutima obe wafulilwa Lesa
Job15:14 Bushe muntu nshi uwingaba uwakaele? Nani uwafyalwa ku mwanakashi uwingaba umololoke?
Job15:15 Lesa nga tacetekela abamushilo bakwe
Job15:16 palibufi umuntunse uwabipisha
Job15:17 “Nga wakutika kuli ine nalakweba
Job15:18 ifishilano ifya bamano
Job15:19 Abo beka ebapeelwe icalo ico abenafyalo bashalepitamo.
Job15:20 Ubumi bwa muntu umubi bwaba bwakucula inshiku shonse
Job15:21 Iciunda cakutiinya caumfwika mu matwi ya mubi
Job15:22 Tasubila ukuti akafumamo mu mfifi
Job15:23 Akalulumba mpanga yonse mukufwaya ifyakulya
Job15:24 Ubulanda no bucushi nafimwishila
Job15:25 Pantu emishe ukuboko kwakwe kukulwisha Lesa
Job15:26 Napama ukulwisha Lesa
Job15:27 Pantu ali uwaina na masaya yaletenta
Job15:28 “Akekala mu fibolya fya misumba
Job15:29 Takatale aba umukankala
Job15:30 Takatale afuma mu mfifi
Job15:31 Elaibepa pakucetekela mu fyafye
Job15:32 Ifi efikamucitikila mu bumi bwakwe
Job15:33 Akaba ngo mwangashi uulelukusha ifipompo
Job15:34 Pantu uluko ulushisumina Lesa talusanduluka
Job15:35 Bakemita ububi
Job16:1 Elyo Yobo ayasuka ati
Job16:2 “Nalyumfwa ifintu ifingi ifya musango uyu
Job16:3 Bushe mukaleka lilali ukulanda amashiwi yenu ayaba ngo mwela weka weka? Kanshi amaka yakutwalilila ukulanda ifi muyafumya kwi?
Job16:4 Pantu na ine wine kuti nalanda amashiwi yamo yene
Job16:5 Kuti nalanda amashiwi yakumukoselesha
Job16:6 “Nomba nga nalanda
Job16:7 Cine cine we Lesa naungonaula
Job16:8 Elyo kabili naunkaka
Job16:9 Lesa alencusha mu cipyu cakwe
Job16:10 Nabanjasamwina utunwa twabo pakungwela
Job16:11 Lesa namposa mu minwe ya bantu ababifi
Job16:12 Ne mwine naleikalafye bwino
Job16:13 Nandasaula imifwi ukufuma mu tupinda tonse. Ukwabula no luse
Job16:14 Nandasaula imiku ne miku
Job16:15 Ninsuka nimbila ne nsalu shabulanda
Job16:16 Amenso yandi nayasuka nayakashika na cee kukulila ifilamba
Job16:17 Nangu line mu minwe yandi tamwaba lufyengo
Job16:18 “We calo wishiika umulopa wandi
Job16:19 Na nombaline kambone wandi aba mu mulu
Job16:20 Kebela wandi e cibusa wandi
Job16:21 Kebela eusoseleko umuntu kuli Lesa
Job16:22 “Kushelefye imyaka inono
Job17:1 “Umupashi wandi naonaika
Job17:2 Cine cine abakuntumfya nabanshinguluka
Job17:3 “Ngafwako we Lesa no kumpeela ico ufwaya pantu takuli nangu umo uwingangafwa?
Job17:4 Pantu naubomika imitima teti beshibe
Job17:5 Uwabepa umunankwe pakumwenamo ubunonshi
Job17:6 “Lesa nansangula ngo mulumbe ku bantu
Job17:7 Amenso yandi nayanaka ku mulandu wa macushi
Job17:8 Ici
Job17:9 Kabili abalungami bena nabatwalilila mu nshila shabo
Job17:10 “Nomba imwe konkanyenipo
Job17:11 Inshiku shandi nashipita
Job17:12 Bapilibula ubushiku ukuba akasuba. Ulubuuto balandapo talukokola
Job17:13 Bushe ine isubilo lyandi nga kwikala ku calo ca bafwa
Job17:14 nga naeba inindi ukuti
Job17:15 ninshi icisubilo candi cili kwi? Nani engamona ukuti naba ne cakulolela?
Job17:16 Bushe nkaya nafyo ku calo ca bafwa
Job18:1 Elyo Biludadi umwina Shuha ayasuka ati
Job18:2 “Bushe iwe Yobo uleleka lilali amashiwi yakusabaila? Shikatala uleke na ifwe tulandepo.
Job18:3 Cinshi uletumwena nge nama? Cinshi uletumwena nga bantu ababulwa amano mu menso yobe?
Job18:4 Nelyo uleilepula we mwine ku cipyu cobe
Job18:5 “Ala cishinka ulubuuto lwa muntu umubi lulashima
Job18:6 Ulubuuto mwi tenti lyakwe lulashima
Job18:7 Uwaleenda ne ntampulo ishamaka kale nomba aleongolokafye
Job18:8 Pantu amakasa yakwe umwine eyamutwala mukwikatwa mwisumbu
Job18:9 Iciteyo camwikatila ku citende cakwe
Job18:10 Intambo iyakumwikata ifishilwe mu mushili
Job18:11 Ifyakumutiinya fyalimutengamina konse konse
Job18:12 Ubonaushi bulemulolela
Job18:13 Ubulwele bulalya inkanda yakwe
Job18:14 Nabamukululula ukumufumya mwitenti lyakwe ilyo acetekelamo
Job18:15 Mwitenti lyakwe tamwakashale icintu nelyo cimo
Job18:16 Imishila yakwe panshi nayuma
Job18:17 Tabakamwibukishe pano isonde
Job18:18 Bakamufumya mu lubuuto no kumuposa mu mfifi
Job18:19 Takashe umwana nangufye icinshikulula mu luko lwakwe
Job18:20 Abantu ba ku masamba bakasunguka pakumona ishamo lya uyu muntu
Job18:21 Ee
Job19:1 Elyo Yobo nao ayasuka no kutila
Job19:2 “Bushe mukaleka lilali ukuncusha
Job19:3 Namuntukaula imiku ikumi
Job19:4 Nga cakuti ine nalilufyanya
Job19:5 Nga cakuti imwe mwalaitutumuna pali ine
Job19:6 mwishibe ukuti ni Lesa ewanjilikisha. Ewampombela mwisumbu lyakwe.
Job19:7 “Ine nangufye nailishanya pa bunkalwe bancita
Job19:8 Lesa alinjisalila inshila
Job19:9 Alimpokolola ubucindami bwandi
Job19:10 Nangonaula mu mbalifye shonse
Job19:11 Alinjimisha ubukali bwakwe
Job19:12 Ifita fyakwe ifyamaka nafimpalamina
Job19:13 “Lesa alintalusha kuli bamunyinane
Job19:14 Balupwa lwandi nabantaluka
Job19:15 Abeni nalepokelela na babomfi bandi abakashana balemona ine ngo mweni
Job19:16 Nga naita umubomfi wandi
Job19:17 Ku mukashi wandi nako umupu wandi ulenunka pipi
Job19:18 No twaice twine natunsuula
Job19:19 Abanandi bonse nabampata
Job19:20 Niŋonda
Job19:21 “Nangulukeniko mwe bacibusa wandi
Job19:22 Cinshi mulencushisha ifi ngefyo Lesa alencusha? Bushe tamwakanake ukucusha umubili wandi?

Job19:24 Yalembwa ku cilembelo ca cela na ku mutofwe
Job19:25 Nomba ine
Job19:26 Nangu panuma inkanda yandi yaonaika kuli ubu bulwele
Job19:27 Ine eo nkamona na menso yandi aya
Job19:28 “Nga mwalanda amuti
Job19:29 Mufwile ukutiina ulupanga mwe bene

Job20:4 “Bushe tawaishiba ifyo caba ukufumafye na kale
Job20:5 ukuti umucinshi wa muntu umubifi tautwalilila
Job20:6 Nangu ubukankala bwakwe bwinganina bwafika na mu mulu
Job20:7 ala nakalya wakuposafye
Job20:8 Akapita nge ciloto
Job20:9 Ilinso ilyalemumona talyakatale alimumona nakabili
Job20:10 Abana bakwe ebakalomba uluse ku balanda
Job20:11 Amafupa yakwe ayaisulamo amaka ya bulumendo
Job20:12 “Nangu ububi bwalowa mu kanwa kakwe
Job20:13 nangu tafwaya no kubufwisa
Job20:14 ifilyo mu cifu cakwe nafisasa
Job20:15 Akaluka ifyuma acibawile
Job20:16 Akonka ubusungu bwa ngoshe
Job20:17 Takatale alolesha pa mimana
Job20:18 Akabwesha conse ico anonkele no kuculila
Job20:19 Pantu atitikisha abalanda no kulenga ukuti babe abapina
Job20:20 “Ulunkumbwa lwakwe ulubi talupwa iyoo
Job20:21 Tashapo utwakulya nelyo tumo
Job20:22 Pa nshita akwatisha ifyuma ifingi
Job20:23 Ilyo aisusha ulufumo lwakwe no kwikuta
Job20:24 Nangu engabutuka icanso ca cela
Job20:25 Umufwi uwamulasa ulapulila panuma
Job20:26 Imfifi ikulu ilelolela ukukupa ifyuma fyakwe
Job20:27 Imyulu ikasokolola ububi bwakwe
Job20:28 Ilyeshi likasenda fyonse ifyaba mu ŋanda yakwe

Job21:1 Elyo Yobo nao ayasuka ati.
Job21:2 “Kutikeni bwino bwino ku mashiwi yandi
Job21:3 Ntekeleni no mutima nande
Job21:4 Bushe ine ni ku muntunse ndeilishanya? Cinshi ningatalalilafye tondolo?
Job21:5 Ndolesheni mu menso ifyo ndi
Job21:6 Nga natontonkanya pali ici icamponena
Job21:7 Cinshi ababi bakokwela pa calo? Mulandu nshi bafikila ku bukote no kukwata amaka ayengi?
Job21:8 Ababi bena abana babo bakulila pa cinso cabo
Job21:9 Amayanda yabo yekala mu cibote
Job21:10 Iŋombe shabo ishilume shalikwata amaka yabufyashi
Job21:11 Abana babo abaice baifuminafye no kulayangililafye mu lubansa nge mpaanga
Job21:12 Balemba inyimbo no kulisha insombo na maseese
Job21:13 Inshiku shabo pa calo shabafye ishansansa
Job21:14 Aba bantu beba Lesa abati
Job21:15 Ngo Mwine wa maka yonse finshi ali pakuti tulemutumika
Job21:16 Bena batila ishuko lyaba mu minwe yabo
Job21:17 “Bushe mulamona ilingi uko icisaniko ca babifi cishima? Miku inga ifibi fibacitikila? Bushe icipyu cakwa Lesa nao cilabaletelako ishamo?
Job21:18 Bushe miku inga mwamona ababifi baleululwa mu mwela nge mpimbili
Job21:19 Imwe mulesosa ati
Job21:20 Lekeni umwine aimwene na menso yakwe uko Lesa alemukanda
Job21:21 Bushe umubifi
Job21:22 “Bushe umuntunse kuti apanda Lesa amano
Job21:23 Limo umuntu afwafye ilyo acili na maka ayengi
Job21:24 Ninshi acilifye no mubili uwamaka
Job21:25 Umbi nao afwa ne cililishi mu mutima
Job21:26 Lelo nangu cibe ifyo
Job21:27 “Nomba ine ninjishiba ifili mu mano yenu
Job21:28 Imwe mulesosa amuti
Job21:29 Bushe imwe emukuti tamwatala amwipushapo abalendo
Job21:30 Ala umubifi alasungwa ukufika na ku bushiku bwakukandwa
Job21:31 Lelo kwena takuba umuntu nelyo umo uuya mukusosha umubifi
Job21:32 Ilyo bamusenda kukumushiika
Job21:33 No mushili wa mwishika ulomfwika bwino kuli ena
Job21:34 Nga imwe kuti mwantalalikako shani ku mashiwi yenu ayabulamo amano? Pantu mu kwasuka kwenu mulifye ubufi bweka.”
Job22:1 Elyo Elifasi umwina Temani ayasuka Yobo ati
Job22:2 “ Bushe umuntunse busuma nshi engakwata kuli Lesa? Bushe nangu umuntu uwamano cisuma nshi engacitila Lesa?
Job22:3 Nga fisuma nshi Umwine wa maka yonse engasanga mu kulungamika kobe? Nangu finshi enganonkamo mu mbela yobe nga yaba iyakaele?
Job22:4 “Bushe uletontonkanya ukuti ni pa mulandu wakuti walimukwatila akatiina
Job22:5 Bushe te pa mulandu wa bubifi bobe
Job22:6 Iwe walefuula bamunonko ifyakufwala bashala ubwamba
Job22:7 Abalekwata icilaka iwe walebatana amenshi
Job22:8 nangu wali umuntu umukankala uwakwete ne mpanga
Job22:9 Waleleka bamukamfwilwa ukubwelelamo ukwabula nangu cimo
Job22:10 E mulandu ulengele ifiteyo fikushinguluke
Job22:11 Ecilengele ukuti pa menso yobe pafiite fititi

Job22:13 Nomba iwe utila
Job22:14 Amakumbi ayatikama yalimufimba
Job22:15 Bushe iwe ulefwaya ukusunga imibeele yakale
Job22:16 Basendelwe ninshi inshita yabo tailafika

Job22:20 ‘Ala cacine abalwani besu nabonaika
Job22:21 “Eico iwe nakilafye kuli Lesa
Job22:22 Usekelele amafunde ayo alekupeela

Job22:25 awe lyena Umwine wa maka yonse eukaba golide yobe
Job22:26 Kabili Umwine wa maka yonse eukaba insansa shobe
Job22:27 Lyena ukalati nga wamupepa
Job22:28 Ukalakwata ishuko pa milimo yonse iyo ukalabomba
Job22:29 Pa bantu abaponena mu mafya
Job22:30 Lesa kuti apususha nangu uushili wakaele

Job23:16 Ni Lesa eulenga umutima wandi ukufunshika
Job23:17 Lelo imfifi taimpeseshe amano iyoo
Job24:1 “Nga cinshi Umwine wa maka yonse ashapimina inshita yakupingwilapo

Job24:4 Mu nshila balatamfulamo abapina
Job24:5 Abapina balafumina mu mpanga kwati ni bapunda ba mpanga abaikala mu matololo
Job24:6 Baya mukulaseepa ifyakulya mu mabala
Job24:7 Ubushiku aba balanda basendamafye ubwamba

Job26:13 Umupu wakwa Lesa ewalengele ukuti umulu uwame
