Job27:1 Elyo Yobo akonkanyapo ukulanda ati
Job27:2 “Ine nalapa mu cishinka cakwa Lesa umumi
Job27:3 Apo ine ncili ndepema
Job27:4 nakaana ndai ukuti akanwa kandi takakatale akalanda ifyabubifi
Job27:5 Nshasumine nangu pamo ukuti imwe mulelungika mu kulanda kwenu
Job27:6 Ndi nokwikatilila kuli bukaele bwandi
Job27:7 “Lekeni umulwani wandi abe ngo mubifi
Job27:8 Ngo muntu ushaishiba Lesa
Job27:9 Bushe Lesa kuti aumfwa ku kulila kwakwe
Job27:10 Bushe kuti alasansamukila Umwine wa maka yonse? Bushe kuti alilila kuli Lesa inshita yonse?
Job27:11 Ndi nokumufunda pafyo amaka yakwa Lesa yaba
Job27:12 Mwe bene nga mwaliimwena
Job27:13 “Ifi efyo Lesa ali nokucita ku bantu ababifi
Job27:14 Abana bakwe nangu bafule shani
Job27:15 Abakashalapo bakafwa ku cikuko
Job27:16 Umubi nangu atulumanike icuma ngo musensenga
Job27:17 lelo fyonse ifyo atulumanika abalungami ebakesa mukufifwala
Job27:18 Umubi alaikuulila amayanda kwati ni tunakantebele
Job27:19 Ubushiku pakusendama ninshi ali umukankala
Job27:20 Ifinkunka filamupumikisha nga filya ilyeshi licita
Job27:21 Umwela wa ku kabanga nao ulamukumpula
Job27:22 Umwela ulamuposa na maka ukwabula uluse
Job27:23 Lelo pa nshita alefulumuka
Job28:1 “Eko yaba imikoti umo abantu bemba silifa
Job28:2 Ifyela fipangwa ukufuma ku mushili
Job28:3 Abantu balasanika pakupwisha imfifi
Job28:4 Bemba amendo mu ncende ishishabamo abantu
Job28:5 Ni mu mushili emumena ifyakulya
Job28:6 Tusafile
Job28:7 “Kapumpe teshiba inshila yakwingilila pa mikoti
Job28:8 Ifiswango ifikangasa tafyendamo
Job28:9 Nomba abantu bena balatoba amabwe ayakosa nganshi
Job28:10 Abantu bena balatulinkanya amendo mu fimabwe
Job28:11 Bena balacilika intulo sha mimana
Job28:12 “Nomba amano
Job28:13 Takulaba umuntu uwaishiba ubucindami bwa mano
Job28:14 Umuyenge usosa auti
Job28:15 Amano tayashitwa na golide uwalopololwa
Job28:16 Ukucindama kwa mano kwalicila pa mutengo wa golide uwine wine uwa ku Ofiri
Job28:17 Ukucindama kwa mano kwalicila ukucindama kwa golide na kilistali
Job28:18 Utumabwe utwa kolali na yasipeli
Job28:19 Kwalicila ukucindama kwa tumabwe utwa topasi wa ku Kushi
Job28:20 “Nomba amano bushe ni kwi yatula? Noko wingasanga ukwiluka ni kwi?
Job28:21 Yalibelama ku menso ya fyabumi fyonse
Job28:22 Ukuloba ne mfwa kuti fyatila
Job28:23 “Ni Lesa fye eka ewaishiba inshila iyalola ukwaba amano
Job28:24 Pantu ena alamona noko isonde lyashinta
Job28:25 Ilyo apimine umwela amaka
Job28:26 ilyo apimine imfula apakulokela
Job28:27 elyo amwene amano no kuyalondolola
Job28:28 Lesa epakweba umuntu ati
Job29:1 Kabili Yobo abwekeshapo ukulanda ati
Job29:2 “Yangu ifyo nafuluka imyeshi yakale
Job29:3 Yangu ifyo caweme ilyo cisaniko cakwe calesanika pa mutwe wandi
Job29:4 Yangu ifyo kale nalesansamuka mu nshiku sha bulumendo bwandi
Job29:5 Kale Umwine wa maka yonse twaleenda nankwe
Job29:6 Kale amakasa yandi yaleowa mwishiba ilyatikama
Job29:7 “Kale naleya ku mpongolo ya musumba
Job29:8 Kale abalumendo baletifye cilya bamona
Job29:9 Bacilolo baleleka ukulanda
Job29:10 Na bakateeka nabo baleikala tondolo nga epo ndi
Job29:11 Kale bonse abaleumfwa ukucindama kwandi baletasha
Job29:12 Pantu nalepususha umulanda uwalekuuta
Job29:13 Umuntu uuli pakufwa
Job29:14 Ubulungami naleenda nabo kwati cakufwala ca ku mubili
Job29:15 Nali ilinso lya mpofu
Job29:16 Nali wishi wa balekabila
Job29:17 Kale naletobaula insekete sha bantu balufyengo
Job29:18 “Ine kale naletifye
Job29:19 Kale nali ngo muti uwashinta imishila yaiko pa menshi
Job29:20 Kale naleti ubucindami bwandi tabwakapwe
Job29:21 “Nga ndelanda
Job29:22 Nelyo naleka ukulanda
Job29:23 Bonse balendolela filya balolela imfula
Job29:24 Ilyo nabasekela
Job29:25 Nine nalepingula abantu no kubeba ifyakucita
Job30:1 “Nomba balenseka
Job30:2 Amaka ya mu maboko yabo tayalemombela nangu cimo
Job30:3 Bashelefye imipalapata ku mulandu wa bupina ne cipowe
Job30:4 Baleya mu mpanga mukusaba amabula ya mu mpanga
Job30:5 Abanabo balebatamfisha ukutali
Job30:6 Baleikala mu ncena sha mikonko
Job30:7 Epakulapundila mu fimpusa kwati ni mpunda
Job30:8 Abantu abalifye ifiwelewele
Job30:9 “Kabili ni aba bene ebanseka mu nyimbo
Job30:10 Balimpata kabili balantaluka
Job30:11 Ico bamwene ukuti Lesa nomba nandimuna
Job30:12 Uluko lwabo lwanjimina ku kulyo
Job30:13 Nabancilikila inshila konse konse pakuti nikwata ukwakubutukila
Job30:14 Baisa ingila nga pa cipunda ce linga icamokoka
Job30:15 Ifyakutiina fyanjishila
Job30:16 “Ine nomba ndi mupepi ne mfwa
Job30:17 Nga bwaila ndeumfwa mu mafupa mulekokota
Job30:18 Cili kwati Lesa nankama mu mukoshi we laya lyandi
Job30:19 Cili kwati Lesa amfubwile mu matipa
Job30:20 Nalilila kuli iwe we Lesa mukulu
Job30:21 Naunjalukila bunkalwe bunkalwe
Job30:22 Naunjimya no kumposa mu mwela
Job30:23 Ninjishiba ukuti alentwalafye ukwakuti nje mfwile
Job30:24 “Lelo bushe uuli mu bucushi tatambika ukuboko kwakwe? Bushe mukupelelwa kwakwe takuuta mutuule?
Job30:25 Bushe kale ine nshalelililako abantu abalecula
Job30:26 Ilyo nasubila ishuko
Job30:27 Mu mala yandi mulepota ukwabula ukuleka
Job30:28 Inkanda yandi naifita lelo te kasuba kalengele iyoo
Job30:29 Bamumbwe ebasangwike bamunyinane
Job30:30 Inkanda yandi yalwike iyafiita kabili ilesunika no kuponena panshi
Job30:31 Eico peseese lyandi ndelishapofye inyimbo sha ndoosha
Job31:1 “Ine nalipangana na menso yandi
Job31:2 Nomba kwena bushe fintu nshi ifyo Lesa uwa mu mulu alambula abantu? Ni finshi ifyo Umwine wa maka yonse abikila abantu?
Job31:3 Bushe tasungila abalufyengo ishamo
Job31:4 Bushe Lesa tamona imyendele yandi
Job31:5 “Nalapa ine ukuti nshatala mbepa bufi
Job31:6 Lekeni Lesa ampime pa cipimo icishibepa
Job31:7 Nga cakuti amakasa yandi yatala yafuma mu nshila
Job31:8 lyena lekeni bambi ebo balye icuma candi
Job31:9 “Nga cakuti ine nalitala nkumbwa umwanakashi
Job31:10 lyena ninshi umukashi wandi naye mukutebeta bambi
Job31:11 Pantu nga nalicita ububi ubwabipisha
Job31:12 Caba ngo mulilo uwoca mpaka waonaula
Job31:13 “Ine nga nalifyengele ababomfi bandi abaume nangu abanakashi
Job31:14 ninshi kuti nacita shani ilyo Lesa akema? Ni finshi ifyo nkasuka ilyo Lesa anjipusha?
Job31:15 Lesa ewamumbile
Job31:16 “Ine nshatala nkaana ukwafwa abalanda mufyo bakabila
Job31:17 Ine nshatala ndya umukate neka
Job31:18 Pantu ukufuma ku bwaice bwandi ndela abalanda ngo mufyashi
Job31:19 Ilyo nalemona umuntu uushikwete icakufwala
Job31:20 ine nalemupeelako icakufwala icisuma icapikulwa ku masako ya mpaanga shandi. Na onse uo napeela
Job31:21 Nga cakuti nalimishe amaboko yandi pa bana banshiwa
Job31:22 ninshi ukuboko kwandi kupapukile pa kubeya
Job31:23 Umwenso wanjikata pantu ubukali bwakwa Lesa kuti bwanjishila
Job31:24 “Nga cakuti natetekela muli golide
Job31:25 Nga cakuti nacita icilumba pa mulandu wa cuma candi icafulisha
Job31:26 Nga cakuti namona ubucindami bwa kasuba ilyo kabalika
Job31:27 Bushe ifi efyakukubula umutima wandi
Job31:28 Ifi fyonse kuti fyaba ububifi ubukalamba ubwakupingwilwapo
Job31:29 “Nga cakuti ndasansamuka pakumona ifyo abalwani bandi basheme
Job31:30 awe ine nshatala ndeka ululimi lwandi ukuti lulebifya
Job31:31 Nga cakuti abantu ba mwitenti lyandi tabatala abasosa abati
Job31:32 Takwatala akuba umweni uwasendama panse
Job31:33 Nga cakuti ndafisa abantu bumpulamafunde bwandi nge ficita bambi
Job31:34 pa mulandu wakutiina icintubwingi
Job31:35 Iye bushe nani uwingansoselako pakuti Lesa aŋumfwe
Job31:36 Ilyo ipepala kuti nalibika pa kubeya kwandi
Job31:37 Ndi nokuya londolola kuli ena pa myendele yandi yonse
Job31:38 “Nga cakuti impanga yandi yalandubulwisha
Job31:39 nangu nga cakuti ndya ifisabo fyabamo ukwabula ukulipila ababomfi
Job31:40 ninshi lyena lekeni imyunga eyo yamenemo mu cifulo ca ŋanu
Job32:1 Kanshi abantu aba batatu epakuleka ukulanda na Yobo
Job32:2 Elyo Elihu mwana Barakeli
Job32:3 Afulilwe na bacibusa bakwe bonse batatu
Job32:4 Ilyo balelanda
Job32:5 Nomba ilyo amwene ukuti aba bantu batatu tabakwete icakwasuka
Job32:6 Kanshi Elihu
Job32:7 Ine mu mutima wandi nacilatontonkanya ati
Job32:8 Nomba ine nalishiba ukuti umupu uwaba mu muntu
Job32:9 Ala ubukote tabulenga ukuti umuntu abe na mano
Job32:10 Kanshi nomba na imwe kutikeniko na kuli ine
Job32:11 “Moneni
Job32:12 Nacilakutumaninamo nganshi mufyo mulesosa
Job32:13 Eico mwilaibepa amuti
Job32:14 Pantu Yobo tasosele amashiwi ayakupinkana na ine
Job32:15 “Ala aba bantu nacibasungusha
Job32:16 Bushe na nomba kuti nalolela apo nabaleka ukulanda
Job32:17 Kanshi nomba nine nalalandapo
Job32:18 Pantu ndi ne fingi ifyakulanda
Job32:19 Munda yandi muli kwati muli umwangashi upya
Job32:20 Na pakuti mpeme kanofye ntale nande
Job32:21 Ine nshacite mucishacinani ku muntu nelyo umo
Job32:22 Ine nshaishiba no kusembeleka nakalya
Job33:1 “Kanshi nomba iwe Yobo
Job33:2 Mona
Job33:3 Mu mutima wandi mwalafuma insoso ishaololoka
Job33:4 Pantu Umupashi wakwa Lesa ewabumba ine
Job33:5 Nga wafwaya ukunjasuka
Job33:6 Ine nshili Lesa
Job33:7 Peba nangu cimo icakulenga ukuti untiine
Job33:8 “Lelo ine ninjumfwila fyonse ifyo ulandile
Job33:9 ‘Ndi wakaele uwabula ububifi
Job33:10 Nomba Lesa alafwailishafye icakumpeelelapo umulandu
Job33:11 Abikile amakasa yandi mwikoli
Job33:12 “Eico nakweba ukuti pakusosa ifi nauluba
Job33:13 Nga cinshi ico uleebawila Lesa
Job33:14 Pantu Lesa alalanda mu musango umo
Job33:15 Kuti alandila mu ciloto na mu fimonwa mu nshita ya bushiku
Job33:16 Limbi kuti amutotoshafye
Job33:17 pakwalula umuntu ukufuma ku fyabipa
Job33:18 Pakuti apusushe umweo wakwe ku nindi
Job33:19 “Limbi Lesa alakalipila umuntu ilyo alecula ku bulwele
Job33:20 Ilyo umutima wakwe taulefwaya kulya
Job33:21 Ilyo umubili wakwe waonda umupwilapo
Job33:22 Ilyo ubumi bwakwe bwapalama ku nindi
Job33:23 “Lelo nga cakuti malaika ali mupepi
Job33:24 Uwakumulangulukila no kumweba ati
Job33:25 Lyena ninshi kuti umubili wakwe wapuputulwa
Job33:26 Lyena kuti apepa Lesa ico amukwatila uluse
Job33:27 Lyena kuti aisa pa bantu nokusosa ati
Job33:28 Alubula umweo wandi ukufuma mukuya ku nindi
Job33:29 “Ifi fyonse efyo Lesa acitila umuntu
Job33:30 pakuti apusushe umweo wakwe ku nindi
Job33:31 “Eico iwe Yobo
Job33:32 Nga naukwata ifyakulanda unjasuke
Job33:33 Nga taukwete fyakwasukapo
Job34:1 Kabili Elihu akonkanyapo ukulanda ati
Job34:2 “Kutikeni ku mashiwi yandi mwe bantu bamano
Job34:3 Ala amatwi eyapima ifilelandwa
Job34:4 Natufwailishe bonse capamo icilungeme
Job34:5 Yobo alesosa ati
Job34:6 Nangu nshamonapo icibi ico nacita
Job34:7 Bushe kwalibapo umuntu uwaba nga Yobo
Job34:8 Aenda na bacita ifibi
Job34:9 Bushe tasosele ati
Job34:10 “Kanshi nkutikeni nganshi imwe mwe bantu bamano. Lesa alitaluka nganshi ku bubi
Job34:11 Alambula umuntu ukulingana ne milimo yakwe
Job34:12 Awe tacingacitika icakuti Lesa kuti alufyanya
Job34:13 Takwatala akuba na umbi uyo uwalashika Lesa pano isonde
Job34:14 Nga cakuti Lesa afumyapo umupashi wakwe pano isonde
Job34:15 ala ifintu fyonse ifipema kuti fyafwafye pa muku umo
Job34:16 “Kanshi iwe Yobo nga uli wamano kutika
Job34:17 Bushe uwapata umulinganya kuti ateeka? Bushe Umwine wamulinganya
Job34:18 Bushe te uwingeba bashamfumu ukuti
Job34:19 Bushe te uushakwatila intungulushi umucishacinani
Job34:20 Akashita akali konse kuti bafwa nangu ni pakati ka bushiku
Job34:21 “Pantu Lesa alalengula imyendele ya muntu
Job34:22 Takwaba ukwafisama
Job34:23 Pantu Lesa talefwaya ukuceceta umuntu nakabili
Job34:24 Alofya abacindami apabula ukwipusha umulandu
Job34:25 Pantu Lesa alishiba ifibi fyonse ifyo bacita
Job34:26 Abakandila pa bubi bwabo
Job34:27 Pantu bena balimukene
Job34:28 Ebalengele inkuuta sha balanda ukumfwika kuli Lesa
Job34:29 Bushe Lesa nga atalala tondolo
Job34:30 eulesha umubi ukuba kateeka
Job34:31 “Nomba umuntu nga aeba Lesa ati
Job34:32 Unsambilishe ifyo nafilwa ukwishiba. Nga cakuti nalibifya
Job34:33 Bushe iwe
Job34:34 “Abantu bonse abamano na bonse abasalapuka
Job34:35 ‘Cacine Yobo alanda ukwabula amano
Job34:36 Kanshi mwesheni Yobo apakalamba
Job34:37 Pantu ena ku fyabubifi fyakwe alundilepo na bucisanguka
Job35:1 Kabili Elihu akonkanyapo ukulanda ati
Job35:2 “Bushe iwe Yobo
Job35:3 Kabili uleipusha auti
Job35:4 Kanshi ine nalakwasuka
Job35:5 “Inwina amenso ku mulu umone
Job35:6 Nga wacita ububifi
Job35:7 Nangu nga wawamya
Job35:8 Ukubifya kobe kuletelela umuntu nga iwe wine
Job35:9 “Pa mulandu wa cisendo cakutitikishiwa abantu balailishanya
Job35:10 Lelo tapaba uutontonkanya no kwipusha ati
Job35:11 Ni Lesa ewalenga ukuti tucenjele ukucila inama sha mu mpanga
Job35:12 Nelyo abantu bakuuta mutuule
Job35:13 Cine cine Lesa tomfwako ku kukuuta kwa aba bantu
Job35:14 Pali bufi bushe Lesa kuti akumfwa nga wasosa auti
Job35:15 Kabili ulesosa auti
Job35:16 Kanshi Yobo asosafye amashiwi yacilandelande
Job36:1 Elihu akonkanyapo ukusosa ati
Job36:2 “Ntekelafye umutima
Job36:3 Amano yandi ine yafuma ukutali
Job36:4 Pantu icine cine ifyo ine ndesosa te fyabufi iyoo
Job36:5 “Mona ni Lesa e wamaka lelo tasuusha umuntu nangu umo
Job36:6 Taleka abantu babi baleikalilila
Job36:7 Lesa tafumya amenso yakwe pa bantu abaololoka imitima
Job36:8 Asuka abakaka mu minyololo
Job36:9 Epakubalanga fyonse ifyo balecita
Job36:10 Epakubakomona amatwi pakuti bomfwishe ifyo Lesa alebasoka
Job36:11 Nga cakuti baumfwa no kwamba ukumubombela
Job36:12 Lelo nga bakaana ukumfwa
Job36:13 “Lelo abaumalala imitima
Job36:14 Bafwa ilyo bacili imisepela
Job36:15 Apususha abalanda mu nshita shabo ishabulanda
Job36:16 Nobe wine afwaya ukukupususha mu bulanda bobe
Job36:17 “Lelo iwe nawisulamo ubupingushi bwa babifi
Job36:18 Kanshi nomba ulecenjela
Job36:19 Bushe icuma cobe
Job36:20 Wilafuluka inshita ya bushiku
Job36:21 Ulecenjela wiyalukila kukucita ifyabipa
Job36:22 “Tontonkanya ifyo Lesa aba umucindami pa mulandu wa maka yakwe. Ni kafundisha nshi uwingalingana nankwe?
Job36:23 Nani uwingamulangilila ifyakucita? Nangu nani uwingapama ukumweba ati
Job36:24 “Ibukishafye ukulumbanya Lesa pa milimo yakwe
Job36:25 Abantu bonse balatamba ifyo Lesa acita
Job36:26 Icacine Lesa alikulisha
Job36:27 “Ni Lesa eubuula amenshi muli bemba
Job36:28 Imfula nayo epakulafumfumuka ukufuma mu makumbi
Job36:29 Takwaba nelyo umo uwaishiba ifyo Lesa atandanya amakumbi mu lwelele
Job36:30 Ulemona ifyo umwele wa nkuba umushinguluka
Job36:31 Ifi fyonse efyo Lesa abomfya pakupingula abantu
Job36:32 Afumbata umwele wa nkuba mu minwe yakwe
Job36:33 Icibulukutu cisobela ukwisa kwa mfula
Job37:1 “Ecalenga ukuti umutima wandi ututume
Job37:2 Kutikeni imwe bonse. Umfweni ishiwi lyakwa Lesa ifyo lilepanta
Job37:3 Alebyashisha umwele wa nkuba pano pesamba lya mulu
Job37:4 Pakonkapo icibulumo ce shiwi lyakwe
Job37:5 Cine cine Lesa alatusungusha pafyo acita ifikulu
Job37:6 Ifyo eba ubunga bwa mfula ati
Job37:7 Ninshi ne milimo ya bantu yatala yalala
Job37:8 Ninshi lyena ne nama sha mpanga shabwelelamo uko shikala
Job37:9 Kankungwe afuma kumwakwe ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Job37:10 Umupu wakwa Lesa ulapanga amenshi makasa
Job37:11 Lesa ewisusha amenshi mu makumbi
Job37:12 Lesa umwine ewensha amakumbi na pa nshita sha mu mwaka alayatungulula umwakwalukila
Job37:13 Ico Lesa aletela amakumbi ne mfula pano calo
Job37:14 “Umfwa bwino aya mashiwi iwe Yobo
Job37:15 Bushe iwe Yobo
Job37:16 Bushe iwe walishiba icilenga amakumbi ukulaenda mu lwelele
Job37:17 Wamona ifyo ifyakufwala ifi ufwele fikabile ku cipuki
Job37:18 Bushe iwe kuti wayafwako Lesa ukufungulula umutenge wa mulu
Job37:19 “Bushe iwe ulefwaya tulande shani pali Lesa? Pantu nomba ifwe amano yapela
Job37:20 Ine nshaebe Lesa nati
Job37:21 Takuli muntu nangu umo uwingalolesha pa kasuba akabengeshima mu mulu
Job37:22 Na ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwaisuka kwabuuta
Job37:23 Ifwe teti tufike apaikala Umwine wa maka yonse
Job37:24 Ecilenga nokuti abantu balemukwatila akatiina
Job38:1 Elyo Yawe ayasuka Yobo
Job38:2 “Bushe iwe niwe nani we ulefulunganya ifyo ine napingula
Job38:3 Eico kakisha umushipi mu musana nge mpalume ya bulwi
Job38:4 “Bushe wali kwi ilyo nashimpile umufula wa pano isonde
Job38:5 Bushe iwe walishiba uwapimine ubukulu bwa pano pesonde? Icine cine walishiba
Job38:6 Nga nipi apo inceshi she sonde shashimpwa? Nani abikile ilibwe ilyakulikasha pa kulitungilila?
Job38:7 Ilyo intanda sha pa macaca shaleimba ne nsansa
Job38:8 “Nani uwaisalile amenshi ya muli bemba
Job38:9 Ilyo nabuulile fubefube no kukupa pali bemba
Job38:10 Nine napimine bemba apakupelela
Job38:11 No kumweba nati
Job38:12 “Bushe mu bumi bobe
Job38:13 Bushe walitala awebapo ulucelo ukuti lwikatilile impela she sonde
Job38:14 Ulubuuto lwa pa macaca lulalenga impili ne mikonko ukwaluka
Job38:15 Ulubuuto lwapa macaca lulashibatika abantu babi
Job38:16 “Bushe iwe walitala aufika apatula amenshi ya muli bemba? Bushe walitala awenda panshi ye tenga lya muli bemba?
Job38:17 Bushe kwalitala akubako umo uwakulanga apabela impongolo sha mfwa? Bushe walitala aumona abalinda impongolo shafiita ukwikala abafwa?
Job38:18 Bushe walishiba apafika ubukulu bwe sonde lyonse? Unjebe nga cakuti walishiba ifi fyonse.
Job38:19 “Bushe iwe walishibako uko ulubuuto lwaikalila
Job38:20 Bushe kuti watungulula ulubuuto ne mfifi
Job38:21 Ee
Job38:22 “Bushe iwe walifikako uko natulika ubunga bwa mfula
Job38:23 Ifi fintu ne mwine ndafisunga pakuti filebomba pa nshita ya bucushi
Job38:24 Bushe iwe walishiba uko akasuba katula
Job38:25 Nani uwaimbile icikonkwa umwakupita mulamba wa mfula uwa mukuku
Job38:26 Nani alenga imfula ukuloka mu fifulo umushaba bantu
Job38:27 Nani uutapilila amatololo
Job38:28 “Bushe imfula yalikwata wishi? Nangu nani uufyala amatoni ya mume?
Job38:29 Nyina wa menshi yalya ayatalalisha nani? Nangu nani nyina wa mume ulya uufuma mu mulu?
Job38:30 Ni nani uulenga amenshi ukukosa nge libwe
Job38:31 “Bushe niwe wakakanya iminyololo iyakaka intanda sha Pileiyadesi
Job38:32 Bushe niwe wingalenga mulanga ukumoneka pa nshita yakwe
Job38:33 Bushe iwe walishiba icalenga ukuti ifya mu mulu fileenda? Bushe umusango fyendelamo kuti wafipingula
Job38:34 “Bushe iwe ishiwi lyobe kuti lyafika ku makumbi
Job38:35 Bushe iwe niwe wingeba umwele wa nkuba ukubyata
Job38:36 Bushe nani uupanda ulwita mfula amano ayakusobela ukuti imfula yalaisa? Nangu nani upanda mukolwe amano yakusobela ukuti bwaca?
Job38:37 Nani uwakwata amano yakulonganya amakumbi
Job38:38 Mpaka ulukungu lwa pa mushili lwakambantana
Job38:39 “Bushe iwe niwe wikatila inkalamo inama shakulya? Nangu bushe niwe utuusha utwana twashiko insala
Job38:40 lilya tubwatalala mu mimba yatuko
Job38:41 Nani uupekanisha mwankole ifyakulya
Job39:1 “Bushe iwe walishiba ilyo ifibushi mabwe fifyala? Bushe walitala autamba uko inama ya mpanga ilefyala abana?
Job39:2 Bushe ulapenda imyeshi iyo inama sha mpanga shikwatilapo utwana
Job39:3 Bushe walimona ifyo shikontama pakukwata utwana
Job39:4 Utwana twashiko tutila nga twakula twakwata amaka mulya mu matololo
Job39:5 “Nani uulenga ukuti punda wa mpanga aleyendela? Nani uwamufumya mu minyololo?
Job39:6 Nine ne mwine nalenga ukuti aleikala mu matololo
Job39:7 Punda wa mpanga apata icibi icongo ca mu mushi
Job39:8 Wena apitanafye mu mpili emwaba ifyakulya
Job39:9 “Bushe iwe imboo kuti yasumina ukukubombela? Nangu ukusendama ubushiku pa mulimba obe?
Job39:10 Bushe iwe kuti wabula umwando no kukaka imboo mu mukoshi
Job39:11 Bushe kuti wasubila mu maka yakwata imboo
Job39:12 Bushe kuti watontonkanya auti
Job39:13 “Amapindo ya mbuni yalangufyanya nganshi pakupampaila
Job39:14 Itila nga yabikila amani pa mushili yayasha nefyo fine
Job39:15 Imbuni yena yalaba nokuti ulukasa lwa muntu kuti lwanyantapo
Job39:16 Yena icita ubunkalwe ku twana twaiko
Job39:17 Icalenga
Job39:18 Nomba nga yati kambutuke
Job39:19 “Bushe niwe walenga kabalwe ukuba uwalubilo? Bushe niwe wamufwika umwansa pa mukoshi?
Job39:20 Bushe niwe walenga ukuti aletolauka amabaka nga makanta
Job39:21 Kabalwe alafola nga ali mu nika no kulalishamo inshindo
Job39:22 Alaseka umwenso
Job39:23 Pa mbali yakwa kabalwe pali mufuko wa mifwi
Job39:24 Kabalwe alapwa imilundu uwabula ukutuushako
Job39:25 Lyonse ilyo ipenga lyalila
Job39:26 “Bushe iwe Yobo
Job39:27 Bushe niwe weba kapumpe ukuti apupukile mu mulu apatali
Job39:28 Ubushiku asendama pa mulu wa mabwe ayatali
Job39:29 Palya pene epo wena alengwila akatalamukila
Job39:30 Aliisha utwana twakwe ifya mulopa
Job40:1 Yawe epakweba Yobo ati
Job40:2 “Bushe iwe we ulepashanya no Mwine wa maka yonse
Job40:3 Elyo Yobo ayasuka Yawe ati
Job40:4 “Tapali ifyo ndi ine uwakuti ningamwasuka
Job40:5 Ine ninanda umuku umo
Job40:6 Elyo Yawe asosha Yobo ukufuma mu cimwela ati
Job40:7 “Eico kakisha umushipi mu musana nge mpalume ya bulwi
Job40:8 “Bushe emukuti ulefwaya ukusuusha ubupingushi bwandi? Bushe iwe
Job40:9 Bushe na iwe
Job40:10 Nga efyo caba
Job40:11 Uilange nefyo wakalipa
Job40:12 Ushuluke no muntu onse uwacilumba
Job40:13 Ubashiike bonse mu lukungu
Job40:14 Nga wacita ifi
Job40:15 “Tala
Job40:16 Kabili ubale umone ifyo yaba na maka mu musana
Job40:17 Umucila waiko watonkomana nge cimuti ca keda
Job40:18 Amafupa mu mungololo waiko yaba kwati ni mpanda sha mukuba
Job40:19 “Bemoti yalicindama pa fibumbwa fyonse ifyakwa Lesa
Job40:20 Impili eshiiletela icakulya ne nama shimbi shonse eko shangala.
Job40:21 Bemoti isendama mu macinda
Job40:22 Yatemwa ukuuba mu cintelelwe ca mpupunga sha macinda
Job40:23 Nangufye yaibila panshi ya menshi
Job40:24 Nani engekata bemoti nga ilelolesha? Nani uwingaikolokofya icinkobwe mu mona waiko?”
Job41:1 “Bushe iwe kuti waloba cishimweshimwe ci Lefiatani ku bulobo? Bushe kuti wakaka ululimi lwaciko ku mwando?
Job41:2 Bushe kuti wapisha umwando mu mona waciko
Job41:3 Bushe kuti cishimweshimwe cakupapata iwe
Job41:4 Bushe kuti waumfwana naco pakuti cilekubombela
Job41:5 Bushe kuti walacangasha nga akoni kalya umuntu ateeka
Job41:6 Bushe abamakwebo kuti bapangana palwa kushitisha cishimweshimwe
Job41:7 Bushe kuti watulaula umubili waciko ku meela aya mabanga? Nangu bushe kuti wacilasa ubwela mu mutwe?
Job41:8 Nga cakuti waesha ukucikumanya
Job41:9 Ukulwisha ukucikata ninshi uleibepafye
Job41:10 Takwaba uwingakwata amaka yakucibala
Job41:11 Nga nani uwingesa ilishanya ukuti nalimukwatila imisha pakuti imulipile? Pantu ifintu fyonse fyandi pano pesamba lya mulu.
Job41:12 “Ine nshingafilwa ukukweba palwa myendo yakwe
Job41:13 Nani uwingafunda umukupo wakwe
Job41:14 Nani uwingacasamuna akanwa
Job41:15 Panuma yaciko patantama imitande ya nkwela
Job41:16 Shalikambantana icakuti no mwela teti upite pakati kashiko.
Job41:17 Shalikambatana mu musango uwakuti tashingapatululwa.
Job41:18 Cena nga catesemuna palabyata insase
Job41:19 Mu kanwa kaciko mufuma ulubingu lwa mulilo
Job41:20 Mu myona yaciko mufutumuka icushi
Job41:21 Umupu waciko ulasha amalasha
Job41:22 Mu mukoshi waciko emwaba amaka
Job41:23 Umutika wa munofu waciko walikambantana
Job41:24 Umutima waciko wakosa nge libwe
Job41:25 Ilyo caibuka
Job41:26 Ulupanga nangu lwacikoma
Job41:27 Cena cimona icela kwati cani
Job41:28 Imifwi teti icifulumune
Job41:29 Nga wacibola icibombolo
Job41:30 Pa lufumo lwaciko paba amaŋongwa ayatwa ngo mwele
Job41:31 Cena cilabilausha amenshi petenga
Job41:32 Mu menshi umo cipita mulashala ikuba ilyabengeshima
Job41:33 Pano isonde tapaba icibumbwa nangu cimo icalingana naco
Job41:34 Kabili cena calisuula nganshi ifibumbwa fimbi fyonse
Job42:1 Elyo Yobo ayasuka Yawe ati
Job42:2 “Ine nalishiba ukuti niwe we mwine uwingacita icili conse
Job42:3 Nawipusha ukuti ni nani uyo uwingacila mu bupingushi bwandi ukwabula amano? Eico pa mulandu wakulanda amashiwi ayakusabaila
Job42:4 “Wacinjeba ati
Job42:5 Kale nakwishibe mukukumfwa kuli bambi
Job42:6 Eico nabwesha amashiwi yandi yonse ayo nalanda
Job42:7 Panuma ilyo Yawe apwisha ukweba Yobo aya mashiwi
Job42:8 Kanshi imwe kabuuleni bacilume ba ŋombe cine lubali
Job42:9 Elyo Elifasi umwina Temani
Job42:10 Ilyo Yobo apwile ukupepelako bacibusa bakwe
Job42:11 Bamunyina bonse na bankashi yakwe bonse abakwa Yobo
Job42:12 Yawe epakupaala imikalile yakwa Yobo ukucila na pafyo aikele kale. Yobo akwata impaanga amakana ikumi na yane (14
Job42:13 Akwata abana abaume cine lubali elyo na bana abanakashi batatu.
Job42:14 Umwana wakwe umwanakashi uwapakubala amwinika ishina lya Yemima
Job42:15 Mu calo conse tamwali abanakashi abali abasuma nga bamwana Yobo. Shibo nao alibaakenyeko ifyuma pamo pene na bandume shabo ifyo ali nokubashila pa kufwa kwakwe.
Job42:16 Ilyo amacushi yakwe yapwile
Job42:17 Asukile Yobo afwa ninshi ali umukote uwa nshiku ishingi.

Psalms136:6 Ewashimpa isonde pali bemba. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe.

Psalms136:9 Umweshi ne ntanda filesanika ubushiku. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe.

Psalms136:11 Ewafumishemo na bena Israeli mu Egupto. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe.

Ecclesiastes8:1 Nani uwaba ngo muntu uwamano? Nani uwaishiba umo ifintu fyalola? Amano yalalenga icinso ca muntu ukuwama
Ecclesiastes8:2 We muntu ulenakila ifyebo fya mfumu ya calo pa mulandu wa cilayo cobe kuli Lesa.
Ecclesiastes8:3 Wifuma bwangu ku mulola wa mfumu
Ecclesiastes8:4 Imfumu ya calo ilanda na maka
Ecclesiastes8:5 Uusunga ifyebo fyaiko alekala umutelelwe
Ecclesiastes8:6 Kwaliba inshita iyalinga iyakubombelapo umulimo onse
Ecclesiastes8:7 Pali ifwe fwe bantu
Ecclesiastes8:8 Takwaba muntu uwakwata amaka pa mweo wakwe kukuucingilila
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ifi fyonse ine nalifishibe ilyo naletontonkanya pa mulandu wa fintu ificitika pano isonde
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ine naliimwena uko abantu ababifi baleshiikwa
Ecclesiastes8:11 Mulandu nshi abantu bashitiinina kulacita milandu? Nico abamilandu tababalimuna mukwangufyanya iyoo.
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nangula umuntu umubifi engalabifya libili libili
Ecclesiastes8:13 Nomba ico abantu ababifi tabakwatila Lesa akatiina nakalya
Ecclesiastes8:14 Paliba imisango iyakuicushafye iyicitika pano isonde. Limo abantu abololoke balaponenwa ne shamo ilifwile lileponena abantu ababifi. Limbi wamona uko abantu babifi balekwata ishuko ilifwile elilekwata abantu abololoke. Ala uyu musango nao ine ntilafye misango yakuicushafye.
Ecclesiastes8:15 Na ine epakushininkisha ukuti kanshi umuntu ali nokulilapofye
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ilyo napeeleshe umutima wandi mukwishiba amano
Ecclesiastes8:17 elintu namwene fyonse ifyo Lesa acita. Tapaba ifyo umuntu engeshibapo pa ficitika mwisamba lya kasuba. Nangu umuntu engatulukusha shani mukufwailisha
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ine nalitontonkenye nganshi pali ifi fyonse
Ecclesiastes9:2 Fyonse ifishila umuntu fimo fine
Ecclesiastes9:3 Kwena ici cintu ecabipisha pali fyonse ificitika pano isonde
Ecclesiastes9:4 Umuntu onse uucili umumi pano isonde ena alaba ne subilo
Ecclesiastes9:5 Pantu abomi balishiba ukuti bakafwa
Ecclesiastes9:6 Ukutemwa kwabo ne mpatila yabo no bufuba bwabo
Ecclesiastes9:7 Iwe we muntu ulelyafye icakulya cobe ne nsansa
Ecclesiastes9:8 Mu nshita shonse ulefwala ifyabusaka ifyabuuta
Ecclesiastes9:9 Uleikala ne nsansa no mukashi uo watemwa
Ecclesiastes9:10 Umulimo onsefye uo waikata
Ecclesiastes9:11 Pano isonde ine nalimonapo icintu na cimbi
Ecclesiastes9:12 Nakuba takwaba umuntu uwishiba ilyo inshita yakwe ikafika. Nga filya fine isabi likatwa mwisumbu
Ecclesiastes9:13 Pano isonde nalimonapo icilangililo cimo palwa mano ico namwene ukuti cikankala.
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kwaliko umusumba umo uunono uwaleikalamo abantu abanonofye. Elyo kwaishile ne mfumu imo iyamaka no kwisa uwililila yaushinguluka
Ecclesiastes9:15 Muli uyo wine musumba mwalimo no mulanda umo uwamano uwaile nasha nasha imfumu
Ecclesiastes9:16 Kanshi na ine epakutila
Ecclesiastes9:17 Cawamishapo ukukutika ku mashiwi ya bamano abalanda nabateka umutima
Ecclesiastes9:18 Amano yalabomba bwino ukucila ifyanso fya nkondo

Isaiah1:1 Muli ici citabo emwaba ifyo Esaya mwana Amosi amwene palwa bena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu
Isaiah1:2 “Mwe myulu umfweni
Isaiah1:3 Iŋombe shileshiba uwashiteeka
Isaiah1:4 Iye! Mwe bantu ba mutundu uubifya
Isaiah1:5 Mulandu nshi mwabikilapofye ukulamusangukila? Bushe imwe mulefwaya ukuti acishepo ukumukanda
Isaiah1:6 Ukutampila ku mutwe ukushinta na ku nkasa
Isaiah1:7 Icalo cenu nacisanguka amatololo
Isaiah1:8 Umwana mwanakashi Sioni ashelefye eka
Isaiah1:9 Yawe umwine wa fita fyonse abula kutushilapo abakupusunsukako bamo bamo awe nomba nga tulifye nga Sodoma
Isaiah1:10 Umfweni ishiwi lyakwa Yawe mwe ntungulushi sha bena Sodoma
Isaiah1:11 Yawe alesosa ati
Isaiah1:12 Nani uwamweba ukulandetela ifyo fyonse ilyo mwisa kukulampepa? Bushe nani uwamweba ukulanyantauka mu mansa sha ŋanda yandi iyakumpepelamo?
Isaiah1:13 Lekeni ukundetela imituulo yenu iyabuwelewele
Isaiah1:14 Ine nomba nimpata inshikunkulu shenu isha mitebeto ya pa kumoneka kwa mweshi upya
Isaiah1:15 Nangu mwimye amaboko yenu pakumpepa
Isaiah1:16 Sambeni
Isaiah1:17 bikeni amano kukuwamya. Bikeni imitima ku kucita ifyalungama. Akwafweniko abalefyengwa
Isaiah1:18 “Ine ne Yawe ndeti
Isaiah1:19 Nga mwalanakilafye ine
Isaiah1:20 Nomba nga mwakaana
Isaiah1:21 Yangu ifyo usangwike nga cilende
Isaiah1:22 Iwe Yerusalemu kale wali nga silifa
Isaiah1:23 Intungulushi shobe nashitalama
Isaiah1:24 Kanshi nomba umfweni ifyo Yawe umwine wa fita
Isaiah1:25 Ine nkamucitapo cimo imwe. Pakumuwamya nkamulopolola nga filya fine balopolola umukuba mwilungu
Isaiah1:26 Nkalamupeela intungulushi na bacilolo nga balya bene mwalekwata kale. Lyena mukalaitwa umusumba uwalungama
Isaiah1:27 Sioni akalubulwa ku mulinganya
Isaiah1:28 Nomba umuntu onse uulebifya no kusangukila Yawe
Isaiah1:29 Mukalalanguluka pa mulandu wakupepa ifimuti fya oki
Isaiah1:30 Mukalokota nga mabula ya cimuti ca oki icileuma
Isaiah1:31 Umuntu uwamaka akaba nge cani icaumisha ne micitile yakwe iyibi ikalasabuka nge nsase. Elyo nomba fikatimuka fyonse no kupya icakuti takwakamoneke no wakuushimya.
Isaiah2:1 Aya e mashiwi ayaishile kuli Esaya mwana Amosi
Isaiah2:2 Mu nshiku shakulekelesha
Isaiah2:3 Abantu abengi bakalaisa no kusosa abati
Isaiah2:4 Ena eukapingula imishobo yonse
Isaiah2:5 Kanshi imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo
Isaiah2:6 We Lesa
Isaiah2:7 Mu calo cabo namufulisha silifa na golide
Isaiah2:8 Utulubi twiswile paa mu calo cabo
Isaiah2:9 Eico umuntu akacefiwa
Isaiah2:10 Kabiyeni kafisameni mu ncengo mu mpili
Isaiah2:11 Ubushiku bumo buli mupepi ubo abacilumba bakakontamika ifinso panshi
Isaiah2:12 Pantu ni pali ubo bwine bushiku epo Yawe umwine wa fita akapesha abacilumba bonse
Isaiah2:13 E bushiku akonawilapo ifimuti fyalepesha ifya keda ku Lebanoni
Isaiah2:14 E bushiku akapashilapo impili shonse ishitali no tupili twine
Isaiah2:15 no kubongolwelapo impungu shonse ishitali
Isaiah2:16 E bushiku akabunshapo ne fimato fyamakwebo fyonse ifya ku Tashishi
Isaiah2:17 E bushiku ubo icilumba ca bantuse cikapwilapo kumo kwine na mataki yabo. Pali ubo bushiku lyena ni Yawe fye eka eukalasansabalikwa
Isaiah2:18 ninshi nomba no tulubi twalobelelafye tonse.
Isaiah2:19 Abantu bakalafisama mu ncengo sha mu mpili
Isaiah2:20 Ilyo ubo bushiku bukesa
Isaiah2:21 Ilyo Yawe akesa tensha isonde
Isaiah2:22 Kanshi mwilatetekela bantunse. Ala benakufwa. Kuti mwabatunga cinshi apo benakufwa.
Isaiah3:1 Nomba moneni. Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alaswa apoke ifintu fyonse ifyo abena Yerusalemu na bena Yuda babomfya mu bwikashi
Isaiah3:2 ne mpalume ne fita
Isaiah3:3 na bamushika wa fita amakumi yasano (50) ne ntungulushi
Isaiah3:4 Yawe akaleka utwaice ukuba intungulushi
Isaiah3:5 Abantu bakalacushanya umuntu no muntu
Isaiah3:6 Kukesa inshita ilyo aba mu lupwa lumo bakasalapo umuntu wabo umo no kumweba abati
Isaiah3:7 Nomba pa nshita ilya ine nao akatila
Isaiah3:8 Abena Yerusalemu batalansuka
Isaiah3:9 Imimonekele pa mpumi shabo eilebashinina. Pakubifya
Isaiah3:10 Eba abantu abalungami ukuti fyonse ifintu fikabawamina
Isaiah3:11 Abantu ababifi bena bashama
Isaiah3:12 Abantu bandi babacushafye ku twaice
Isaiah3:13 Yawe aikala pa cipuna cakwe icakuputwilapo imilandu
Isaiah3:14 Yawe naita abakalamba ne ntungulushi ku cilye camilandu. Alebalubulwisha ati
Isaiah3:15 Imwe tamwakwata nsambu shakutitikisha abantu bandi
Isaiah3:16 Yawe alisosele ati
Isaiah3:17 Kanshi ine ne Yawe
Isaiah3:18 Pali ubo ubushiku Yawe akapokolola abanakashi ba mu Yerusalemu ifintu fyonse ifyo bamekelamo
Isaiah3:19 amasikiyo elyo na makosa. Elyo ku mitwe yabo akabafuulako insalu ishakuifimba pa menso
Isaiah3:20 ne fisote. Akabapokolola ne mpinga isho bafwala ku molu
Isaiah3:21 Yawe akapokolola ne mbalaminwe
Isaiah3:22 ne fyakufwala fyabo ifikankala
Isaiah3:23 ne filola fyabo
Isaiah3:24 Mu cifulo ca kununkila akacena akasuma
Isaiah3:25 Abaume ba mu musumba wa Yerusalemu bakafwa ku lupanga
Isaiah3:26 Mu mpongolo sha Sioni mwalaswa mube ukushinshimukila no kulapumapo imisowa
Isaiah4:1 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika
Isaiah4:2 Pa bushiku bulya Umusambo wakwa Yawe ukawama no kucindama
Isaiah4:3 Bonsefye abakashalapo mu Sioni
Isaiah4:4 Mu nshita iyo Imfumu ikasamba ubusali bwa bana banakashi ba mu Sioni
Isaiah4:5 Elyo Yawe akesa lenga ikumbi ukushinguluka pa lupili lonse ulwa Sioni
Isaiah4:6 Ubucindami bwakwe ebukaba icintelelwe ku cikabilila pa musumba pa nshita ya kasuba
Isaiah5:1 “Ine kanyimbile umutemwikwa wandi ulwimbo
Isaiah5:2 Alishiminepo
Isaiah5:3 Nomba
Isaiah5:4 Bushe cinshi icashalako ico ine nafilwa ukubombela ibala lyandi? Mulandu nshi mwibala lyandi mutwalilafye ifitwalo ifyakantuka
Isaiah5:5 Kanshi umfweni ifyo ine nomba nalacita ibala lyandi ilya myangashi. Nalalifumyako ulubao
Isaiah5:6 Nalaleka lisapilwe. Ine nshaletungwila myangashi
Isaiah5:7 Ala ibala lya myangashi ilyakwa Yawe umwine wa fita ni ŋanda yakwa Israeli
Isaiah5:8 Mwashama imwe
Isaiah5:9 Ine ninjumfwila uko Yawe umwine wa fita alesosa ati
Isaiah5:10 Mwibala lya myangashi ilikulile ba eka ikumi mwakulafumafye umwangashi unono uuli balita amakumi yabili na babili (22). Icipimo ca homeri ica mbuto mwakulafumafye inseke shinono isha icipimo ca efa cimo epela.”
Isaiah5:11 Mukacimona imwe mwe babuuka lucelocelo no kutampa ukunwa ifikola
Isaiah5:12 Ilyo mucita inshikunkulu shenu imwe mulalisha amaseese ne nsango
Isaiah5:13 Mwe bantu e mulandu wine balaswa bamusendele muli bunkole ukwabula ukwishiba. Intungulushi shenu shikafwa ku cipowe
Isaiah5:14 Icalo ca bafwa cilelolela
Isaiah5:15 Abantu bonse bakasebana
Isaiah5:16 Yawe umwine wa fita ena akalanga ubupulami bwakwe mu fintu ifyalungama ifyo acita
Isaiah5:17 Mu fitantala fya musumba emo abana ba mpaanga bakalaliila umulemfwe
Isaiah5:18 Mukacimona imwe
Isaiah5:19 Imwe mulasosa amuti
Isaiah5:20 Mukacimona imwe
Isaiah5:21 Mukacimona imwe
Isaiah5:22 Mukacimona imwe
Isaiah5:23 Abalesangwa ne milandu bena imwe mulabaleka
Isaiah5:24 Eico
Isaiah5:25 Eico Yawe nafulilwa abantu bakwe
Isaiah5:26 Yawe naimya icishibilo pakwita abantu ba mushobo uwa kutali. Alebalishisha umunsoli pakuti bese
Isaiah5:27 Tapali nangu umo uunakile kukwenda
Isaiah5:28 Imifwi yabo intu yatwa
Isaiah5:29 Ukubuluma kwabo kwaba ngo kwa nkalamo. Abashilika babo babuluma nge nkalamo ishikete inama
Isaiah5:30 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika
Isaiah6:1 Mu mwaka imfumu Usia yafwilemo
Isaiah6:2 Pa mulu waiko ninshi napeminina na Baselafi abalebengeshima
Isaiah6:3 Ninshi balepokanina baleti
Isaiah6:4 Iciunda ca mashiwi yabo caletensha ne mifula ya pa mwinshi we Tempele
Isaiah6:5 Na ine epakusosa nati
Isaiah6:6 Elyo umo pali Baselafi
Isaiah6:7 Aisa nkumya nalyo pa kanwa
Isaiah6:8 Elyo naumfwa Yawe aipusha ati
Isaiah6:9 Kanshi nao epakuntuma ati
Isaiah6:10 Leka abo bantu babe ne mitima iyakutwa
Isaiah6:11 Elyo na ine naipusha nati
Isaiah6:12 Ukushinta napo Yawe akatamfisha abantu ukutali
Isaiah6:13 Nangufye umo pa bali ikumi engashala mu calo
Isaiah7:1 Kwalibuukile inkondo ilyo imfumu Ahasi aleteeka icalo ca bena Yuda. Ahasi ali ni mwana Yotamu
Isaiah7:2 Elyo baletele umulandu ku ba ŋanda yakwa Davidi ukutila
Isaiah7:3 Elyo Yawe aeba Esaya ati
Isaiah7:4 Uye mucenjeshako auti
Isaiah7:5 Icalo ca Siria
Isaiah7:6 Filepanga afiti
Isaiah7:7 “Lelo Imfumu Yawe nasosa ukuti
Isaiah7:8 “Pantu icalo ca Siria tacacila Damasiko umusumba waciko amaka
Isaiah7:9 Icalo ca Efulemu tacacila musumba waciko wa Samaria amaka
Isaiah7:10 Nakabili Yawe alilandile kuli Ahasi ati
Isaiah7:11 “Ipusha Yawe Lesa obe pakuti akulangepo icishibilo cimo. Naco cibe icakosa icashika nga ku mbo atemwa icayafya icalepa nga ku mulu.”
Isaiah7:12 Apali Ahasi wena ayasukafye ati
Isaiah7:13 Elyo nao Esaya aposapo ishiwi ati
Isaiah7:14 Kanshi Yawe umwine ewalamulanga icishibilo cimo. Kukaba umukashana umo uukaba pabukulu. Nao akafyala umwana umwaume
Isaiah7:15 Akalalya umukaka no buci mpaka ilyo akeshiba ukukaana icibi no kusala icisuma.
Isaiah7:16 Ilyo inshita ya uyu mwana ishilati ifike iyakukaana icibi no kusala icisuma
Isaiah7:17 “Iwe pamo na bantu bobe
Isaiah7:18 “Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah7:19 Bakesa kupa mu mikonko mu fimabwe
Isaiah7:20 “Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah7:21 “Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah7:22 ifyo fitekwa fikalamuletela umukaka uwingi
Isaiah7:23 “Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah7:24 Abantu bakalatiina ukulayamo
Isaiah7:25 Mu tupili tonse umo kale abantu balelima ifintu
Isaiah8:1 Yawe alinjebele ati
Isaiah8:2 Unjitileko abantu abacishinka
Isaiah8:3 Ilyo nasendeme no mukashi wandi
Isaiah8:4 Pantu umwana akalati talaishiba nakutila
Isaiah8:5 Yawe alinsoseshe nakabili
Isaiah8:6 alanjeba ati
Isaiah8:7 kanshi ine ne Yawe nalaya buula imfumu ya Asiria ne fita fyaiko fyonse
Isaiah8:8 Baleisa pongwela nge lyeshi pa calo ca Yuda
Isaiah8:9 “Icefyeni imwe mwe mishobo ya benafyalo kabili tiineni
Isaiah8:10 Pekanyeni ifyo muli nokucita
Isaiah8:11 Yawe alinsokele pa maka ine ne Esaya
Isaiah8:12 Alinjebele ati
Isaiah8:13 Uleibukishafye ukuti Yawe umwine wa fita
Isaiah8:14 Ena akaba icifulo icamushilo
Isaiah8:15 Kanshi bengi bakulaipununako
Isaiah8:16 “Ukakilile ubunte ubu
Isaiah8:17 Yawe aliifisa ku ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo
Isaiah8:18 “Moneni epo ndi
Isaiah8:19 “Abantu nga balamweba ukwipusha imilandu ku bantu ababuka na bapendula
Isaiah8:20 Ku mafunde na kufyo Lesa amukonkomesha eko muloleshe
Isaiah8:21 Abantu bakalalulumbafye mu calo
Isaiah8:22 elyo kabili balolesha amenso panshi
Isaiah9:1 Lelo takwakabe ukufiitwa nakabili ngefyo cali kale mu nshita shakusuulwa. Kale Lesa alekele cisebane cilya citungu ca luko lwa bena Sebuloni no lwa bena Naftali
Isaiah9:2 Abantu abaleenda mu mfifi
Isaiah9:3 We Yawe walibafushisha ishuko no kukusha umushobo. Baleanga pa cinso cobe
Isaiah9:4 Pantu naukontaula ikoli ilyalebafinya
Isaiah9:5 Ifimasapato fya bashilika ifyo bafwala mu bulwi
Isaiah9:6 Pantu kuli ifwe nakufyalwa umwana. Ifwe natupeelwa umwana umwaume. Ifwe eukalatuteeka. Bakalamwita abati
Isaiah9:7 Amaka yakwe ayabufumu yakalacililakofye
Isaiah9:8 Yawe natuma amashiwi ayakali kuli Yakobo
Isaiah9:9 Abena Efulemu bonse
Isaiah9:10 “Nangu amayanda ya njelwa yawile
Isaiah9:11 Kanshi
Isaiah9:12 Abena Siria babelele lwa ku kabanga
Isaiah9:13 Nomba abena Israeli
Isaiah9:14 Eico kanshi nomba ni pa bushiku bumofye epo Yawe akalimuna intungulushi sha bena Israeli kumo na bantu bene. Akabaputula imitwe
Isaiah9:15 Abakalamba na bacindami
Isaiah9:16 Intungulushi shalilufya aba bantu mu nshila no kubafulunganya nganshi amano.
Isaiah9:17 Eico kanshi pa balumendo bonse Yawe takalekepo nangu umo uwakuti akapusuke
Isaiah9:18 Ububi bwa bantu bulebilima ngo lubingu lwa mulilo
Isaiah9:19 Yawe umwine wa fita nafulwa
Isaiah9:20 Bonsefye mu calo baletola tolafye utwakuti balelya
Isaiah9:21 Manase akalya Efulaimu
Isaiah10:1 Mukacimona imwe
Isaiah10:2 Mufwaya ukuti abalanda bapokwe insambu shabo shonse
Isaiah10:3 Imwe mukacita shani ubushiku Lesa akamulimuna? Mukacita shani ilyo akamuletela ifyakumulofya ifikatula ukutali? Mukabutukila kuli ani ukwakuti mukaye shina? Nikwi uko mukafisa ifyuma fyenu?
Isaiah10:4 Imwe mukafwa ku nkondo
Isaiah10:5 Yawe alisosele ati
Isaiah10:6 Nine natumine abena Asiria pakuti basanse umushobo wa bantu abansuula
Isaiah10:7 Nomba imfumu ya bena Asiria yena tailuka ukuti nine njituma. Yaba na mapange yambi yambi mu mutima waiko
Isaiah10:8 Yena ilaitakisha aiti
Isaiah10:9 Nine nacimfya umusumba wa Kalino no wa Kakemishi. Nine nacimfya umusumba wa Hamati no wa Apadi. Nine nacimfya umusumba wa Samaria no wa Damasiko wine.
Isaiah10:10 Nine nalimuna ifyalo filya fipepa utulubi
Isaiah10:11 Nine naonaula Samaria kumo kwine no tulubi tonse utwalimo
Isaiah10:12 Nomba Yawe aletila ati
Isaiah10:13 pantu ena alailumbanya aiti
Isaiah10:14 Imishobo ya bantu bonse yali kwati cisansala ca koni
Isaiah10:15 Bushe isembe kuti lyasosa ukuti lyalicila uulibomfya? Bushe icela cakucekela imbao calicindama ukucila umuntu uucibomfya? Inkonto ala taisenda muntu
Isaiah10:16 Kanshi nomba Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alaswa aletele abantu abaina ubulwele bwakondoloka. Kabili mu bucindami bwakwe akatimuna umulilo uukalabilima.
Isaiah10:17 Yawe uusanikila Israeli akasanguka umulilo. Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli akasanguka ulubingu ulwakoca fyonsefye pa muku umo mpo
Isaiah10:18 Imitengo umwaba imiti isuma
Isaiah10:19 Paleshalafye imiti iyancepela
Isaiah10:20 Inshita imo ikafika ilyo abena Israeli na ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo abakashalapo bakaleka ukulatetekela umutundu wa bantu uwapene ubalofye. Mu cine cine bakatetekela Yawe
Isaiah10:21 Bamwana Yakobo abanonofye abakashalapo ebakabwelela kuli Lesa Wamaka.
Isaiah10:22 Nangu abena Israeli bafulisha ngo musensenga wa mu lulamba lwa bemba
Isaiah10:23 Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita akaleta ubonaushi mu calo consefye
Isaiah10:24 Eico Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita akasosa ati
Isaiah10:25 Pantu pashalafye akashita akanono ninshi ine naleka ukulamufulilwa
Isaiah10:26 Ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita
Isaiah10:27 Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah10:28 Ala abalwani balya bali pa Aiati. Nabacilinganya Migiloni. Nabasha ifipe fyabo pa Mikimashi.
Isaiah10:29 Nabapita pa mupata
Isaiah10:30 Pundisha we Mwana mwanakashi wa Galimu. Kutikeni mwe bena Laisha. Asukeni mwe bena Anatoti.
Isaiah10:31 Abena Madimena nababutuka
Isaiah10:32 Abalwani lelo bali mu mushi wa Nobu
Isaiah10:33 Moneni
Isaiah10:34 Yawe alababungula nge miti
Isaiah11:1 Pakapuka umusambo uuteku pa cishiki cakwa Yese
Isaiah11:2 No Mupashi wakwa Yawe ukekala pali ena
Isaiah11:3 Insansa shakwe shikaba mukukwata akatiina kuli Yawe. Ena takalepingula bantu mu fyakumonafye ku menso
Isaiah11:4 Ena akalaputula imilandu ya balanda mu kulungika
Isaiah11:5 Ubololoke bukaba e mushipi wakwe
Isaiah11:6 Imimbulu ikalaikala umutelelwe pamo no mwana wa mpaanga
Isaiah11:7 Iŋombe shikalaliila pamo ne fiswango fya bea
Isaiah11:8 Akanya akaleonka kakangala pa bwendo bwa ngoshe
Isaiah11:9 Pa lupili lwandi ulwamushilo tapakaleba nangufye cimo icakucusha umuntu
Isaiah11:10 Ubushiku bumo bukesa ilyo uyu mushila wakwa Yese ukesa ba uluunga lwa cishibilo ku mishobo ya benafyalo. Abantu ba mishobo bakalongana mu musumba waiko
Isaiah11:11 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika
Isaiah11:12 Yawe akemisha imishobo ya benafyalo uluunga ulwakwishibilako ukuti nomba alelonganya nakabili abena Israeli
Isaiah11:13 Ubufuba bwa bena Efulemu bukapwa
Isaiah11:14 Elyo bonse pamo bakawililila Abafilisiti lubali lwa ku masamba
Isaiah11:15 Yawe akemya umwela uwakaba
Isaiah11:16 Ukutampila mu calo ca Asiria kukaba umusebo uwine wine
Isaiah12:1 Muli ubo ubushiku ukemba no kutila
Isaiah12:2 Icine cine Lesa e pusukilo lyandi
Isaiah12:3 Mukusekelela ukukalamba mukalatapa amenshi mu fishima fye pusukilo.”
Isaiah12:4 Kabili muli ubo bushiku mukemba amuti
Isaiah12:5 Muleimbila Yawe
Isaiah12:6 Lekeni bonsefye abaikala mu Sioni bange
Isaiah13:1 Ifyo Esaya mwana Amosi amwene palwa musumba wa Babiloni
Isaiah13:2 Pa mulu wa lupili ulushabapo kantu
Isaiah13:3 Ee
Isaiah13:4 Umfweni icongo mu mpili
Isaiah13:5 Pakwisa filefuma mu fyalo fyakutali ifyaba mu tupinda tonse utwa mpela ya myulu. Yawe alaisa ne filwilo fya cipyu cakwe kukonaula icalo conse.
Isaiah13:6 Pongomokeni imisowa pantu ubushiku bwakwa Yawe nabupalama! E bushiku ubo Umwine wa maka yonse akacitamo ubonaushi.
Isaiah13:7 E mulandu wine ukalenga ukuti mu maboko ya bantu mupomponteke
Isaiah13:8 Bakalaikankilafye ku mwenso
Isaiah13:9 Ubushiku bwakwa Yawe buli mupepi
Isaiah13:10 Intanda shilya shaba lumo lumo
Isaiah13:11 Yawe alesosa ati
Isaiah13:12 Abakashalapo bakabafye abancepela
Isaiah13:13 Ine nkatensha umulu
Isaiah13:14 Abenafyalo abaikala mu Babiloni bakafulumukila mu fyalo fyabo
Isaiah13:15 Bonse abasangwa bakalabapulinkanya ulupanga
Isaiah13:16 Bakalaloleshakofye bulanda bulanda ilyo bakalafwanta panshi utwana twabo pakutwipaya
Isaiah13:17 “Ine ne Yawe nkaluminisha abena Media pakuti bawililile Babiloni. Bena tabaposa mano kuli silifa nangufye kuli golide.
Isaiah13:18 Bakepaya abalumendo bonse ku mifwi
Isaiah13:19 Ubuteeko bwa calo ca Babiloni ubwawamisha pa buteeko bwafyalo bumbi bonse
Isaiah13:20 Takwakatale akuba muntu uukekalamo nakabili. Abena Arabia abendauka tabakatale nakabili ababikamo amatenti yabo
Isaiah13:21 Umusumba wa Babiloni walaswa ubefye incende umwakulaikala inama sha mu matololo
Isaiah13:22 Mu mpungu mwakulaumfwika ukulila kwa bacimbwi no kwa bamumbwena mu mayanda ye sano. Inshita yakulimwinapo umusumba wa Babiloni naipalama. Inshiku shauko tashakatantalishiwe iyoo.”
Isaiah14:1 Yawe akalangulukilako abena Israeli
Isaiah14:2 Abantu ba mishobo iyingi bakabuula abena Israeli
Isaiah14:3 Mu bushiku bulya Yawe akalenga imwe mwe bena Israeli mukaleipemena no kutuusha kukulunguluka no kubomba imilimo iyakosa.
Isaiah14:4 Ilyo cikaba ifyo
Isaiah14:5 Yawe nakontola inkonto ya babifi
Isaiah14:6 Inkonto iyi eyaleuma imitundu ya bantu mu cipyu no kulabafopola libili libili. Taitalile aileka ukulacusha no bukali imishobo ya benafyalo.
Isaiah14:7 Awe nomba lino abantu isonde lyonse baleipemena
Isaiah14:8 Imiti ya paini ne ya keda iyalepesha iya ku Lebanoni ileanga ne nsansa palwa mfumu iyilobele
Isaiah14:9 “Icalo ca bafwa panshi ya calo cileyanga
Isaiah14:10 Shonse shilekweba ashiti
Isaiah14:11 Abantu baikalile ukulakucindika ne nyimbo sha mu maseese
Isaiah14:12 “Yangu ifyo wapona ukufuma mu mulu
Isaiah14:13 Iwe walepanga mu mutima waleti
Isaiah14:14 Ine nkanina apatali no kufika pa mulu wa makumbi. Nkaba ngo Wapulamo.’
Isaiah14:15 Tepapa nomba Yawe nakufwinta ku calo ca bafwa ku nindi ukwashika.
Isaiah14:16 “Abakumona bakulakutamba
Isaiah14:17 Bushe teulya aonawile imisumba
Isaiah14:18 Ishamfumu shonse ishateekele pano isonde shalala mu lulumbi
Isaiah14:19 Nomba iwe tawakwatapo nindi
Isaiah14:20 Iwe tawakashiikwe nge fishiikwa ishamfumu shimbi
Isaiah14:21 “Aleni tampeniko ukwipaya abana abaume aba iyi mfumu. Bamwane bali nokufwa pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa fikolwe fyabo. Tapakatale apaba nakabili mwane nangu umo uukateekapo icalo conse nangu ukufushamo imisumba.”
Isaiah14:22 Yawe umwine wa fita alisosele ati
Isaiah14:23 “Nkasangula umusumba ukuba icifulo umwakusangwafye ifipululu
Isaiah14:24 Yawe umwine wa fita alilapile ati
Isaiah14:25 Ine nkalofya abena Asiria mu calo candi
Isaiah14:26 Efyo ine napanga ukucitila isonde lyonse
Isaiah14:27 Ee
Isaiah14:28 Mu mwaka uo imfumu Ahasi yafwilemo
Isaiah14:29 “Imwe mwe Bafilisiti
Isaiah14:30 Nomba abalanda abene bene ine ne Yawe nkalabasunga
Isaiah14:31 “Imwe mwe misumba yonse iya Bafilisiti
Isaiah14:32 Nga kanshi ifwe tukasuka shani inkombe ishatwishila ukufuma ku mushobo wa Bafilisiti? Ifwe tukashebafye ukuti
Isaiah15:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa bena Moabu ni aya. Moabu naonaulwa! Umusumba wa Ari waonaulwa mu nshita ya bushiku. Moabu naonaulwa! Umusumba wa Kiri waonaulwa mu nshita ya bushiku.
Isaiah15:2 Abena Diboni baya kwitempele lyabo
Isaiah15:3 Abantu mu misebo nabafwala insalu shabulanda
Isaiah15:4 Abena Heshiboni na bena Eleale balekuuta
Isaiah15:5 Umutima wandi ulelangulukilako Moabu. Imbutushi shakwe shilebutukila ku mushi wa Soari ukufika na ku Egilati Shelishiya. Bamo baya balelilila mu musebo uwaya ku Luiti
Isaiah15:6 Amenshi aya mu kamana ka Nimurimu nayakama
Isaiah15:7 Abantu baleabuka umukonko wa Mishingu pakufulumuka
Isaiah15:8 Mu mipaka yonse iya Moabu muleumfwika inkuuta. Imisowa ileumfwika na mu mushi wa Egilaimu no wa Bere Elimu.
Isaiah15:9 Ku mushi wa Diboni amenshi ya mu mumana uwabako yakashike cee ku mulopa
Isaiah16:1 Abena Moabu aba mu musumba wa Sela uwaba mu matololo babuulile utwana twa mpaanga
Isaiah16:2 Abanakashi abena Moabu amano nayabapela
Isaiah16:3 Balaeba abena Yuda abati
Isaiah16:4 Lekeni fwe bena Moabu imbutushi twikaleko mu calo cenu. Nemwe muletupokololako kuli balya bantu balefwaya ukutulofya.” Ulufyengo no bonaushi nga fyapwa
Isaiah16:5 elyo umo pa bana bakwa Davidi akaba imfumu
Isaiah16:6 Kwena twalyumfwa ifyo abena Moabu baba ne cilumba
Isaiah16:7 Abena Moabu bakulaloosha
Isaiah16:8 Amabala ya ku Heshiboni nayabonsa ne myangashi ya ku Sibuma nayo naibonsa. Bakateeka ba mishobo ya benafyalo nabanyantaula imyangashi iyawamisha iyalefika na ku Yaseri no kwandalala ukufika na mu matololo. Imisambo yaiko yaleandalala no kulola lwa ku masamba yafika na kwishilya lya Bemba Wamfwa.
Isaiah16:9 Awe nomba nalililako imyangashi ya ku Sibuma
Isaiah16:10 Mu mabala ayali kale ayafunda
Isaiah16:11 Ine umutima wandi ulekalipa palwa calo ca Moabu
Isaiah16:12 Abena Moabu nangu baye mukupepa pali shilya ncende shakupepelapo bacindika mu mpili
Isaiah16:13 Efyo Yawe asobele kale palwa calo ca Moabu.
Isaiah16:14 Elyo kabili pali nomba Yawe nalyo alesosa ati
Isaiah17:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa musumba wa Damasiko ni aya. Yawe alisosele ati
Isaiah17:2 Mu misumba ya ku Aroeli tamwakabe abantu. Ikabafye ni ncende umo impaanga ne ŋombe shikalaliila
Isaiah17:3 Takwakashale ilinga kuli Efulemu
Isaiah17:4 “Ubushiku bumo bwalaswa bufike
Isaiah17:5 Cikaba nge bala ilyo batimpwilemo imitwe ya ŋanu
Isaiah17:6 Mukashalafye abantu abampendwa abakapusukamo
Isaiah17:7 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika
Isaiah17:8 Ninshi nomba capwa baleka ukulasakamana ifibumbili fya malambo ifyo abene bakuula. Ninshi nomba basuulilapo ne fintu ifyo baipangila
Isaiah17:9 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika
Isaiah17:10 Mwe bena Israeli
Isaiah17:11 elyo ifyo mwalimba lelo
Isaiah17:12 Abantu ba mishobo iyamaka balebolokota
Isaiah17:13 Nangu imitundu ya bantu ishile nailulunkana nga matamba
Isaiah17:14 Pa nshita ya cungulo awe kwaba na kayofi! Kutifye cilya bushilati buce
Isaiah18:1 Ukacimona we calo umumfwika icongo cakupupuka kwa mapindo
Isaiah18:2 we utuma inkombe pali bemba
Isaiah18:3 Umfweni imwe bonse mwe baikala pano isonde
Isaiah18:4 Pantu Yawe nanjeba ine ne Esaya ati
Isaiah18:5 Pantu nga filya fine ciba ilyo bashilati basabe ifitwalo ku myangashi
Isaiah18:6 Ifitumbi fya bashilika babo fikashala filele nsale nsale
Isaiah18:7 Inshita imo ikafika
Isaiah19:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa calo ca Egupto ni aya. Moneni Yawe nanina pekumbi ililesensela
Isaiah19:2 Yawe alesosa ati
Isaiah19:3 Ine naya kukufulunganya ifyo abena Egupto bapekanya
Isaiah19:4 Nomba ine nkaleka imfumu imo iyikakashi
Isaiah19:5 Amenshi ya mu mumana wa Nailo yakalacepelako
Isaiah19:6 Imilonga iyaitamo nayo ikalakaminako
Isaiah19:7 pamo pene ne fyani fya mu lulamba lwa Nailo
Isaiah19:8 Abalondo bonse abaikalila ukwipaya isabi mu Nailo bakalashinta mu nshiku no kulalanguluka
Isaiah19:9 Balya bapikula insalu ishawamisha bakalengwe nsoni
Isaiah19:10 Bakapikula wa nsalu na balya abacenjela mu fyakupanga panga
Isaiah19:11 Kwena intungulushi sha mu musumba wa Soani
Isaiah19:12 Iwe Farao nga abalekupandako amano bali kwi? Bushe kuti bakwebako ifyo Yawe umwine wa fita apanga ukucitila icalo ca Egupto?
Isaiah19:13 Bacilolo ba mu Soani tababa na mano
Isaiah19:14 Ni Yawe ewabapongolwela umupashi wa mano yacimfulumfulu
Isaiah19:15 Mu Egupto tamulifye nangu umo uwakuti acitemo cimo pakwafwa icalo
Isaiah19:16 Inshita imo ikafika ilyo abena Egupto bakaba nga banakashi. Bakalaikankilafye ku mwenso pakumona uko Yawe umwine wa fita apangwile ukuboko pakubalimuna.
Isaiah19:17 Abena Egupto bakalatiina icalo ca Yuda. Kuli onse uo bakalumbwilako icalo ca Yuda akatutuma pa mulandu wakwibukisha ishamo ilyo Yawe umwine wa fita apanga ukubaletela.
Isaiah19:18 Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah19:19 Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah19:20 Ifyo fintu efikaba ifibukisho ifyakulenga ukwibukisha ukuti Yawe umwine wa fita aba mu Egupto
Isaiah19:21 Yawe akaisokolola umwine ku bena Egupto. Ilyo akacita ifyo
Isaiah19:22 Yawe nangu akapumaula abena Egupto
Isaiah19:23 Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah19:24 Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah19:25 Yawe umwine wa fita akapaala abantu ba ifyo fyalo ati
Isaiah20:1 Sagoni imfumu ya Asiria alipeele Taritani mushika wa fita fyakwe icebo cakusansa Ashidodi umusumba wa Bafilisiti
Isaiah20:2 Muli iyo ine nshita Yawe aebele Esaya mwana Amosi ukufuula insalu shabulanda isho alefwala
Isaiah20:3 Elyo Yawe asosele ati
Isaiah20:4 Imfumu ya Asiria ikasenda bankole ubwamba abo ikekata muli ifyo fyalo fibili. Abaice na bakote bene bakalaenda ukwabula insapato
Isaiah20:5 Abatetekela icalo ca Kushi
Isaiah20:6 Iyo nshita nga yafika
Isaiah21:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa calo ca Babiloni ni aya. Ubonaushi bukatula ku calo icakutiinya
Isaiah21:2 Ine ne Esaya nimona icimonwa cimo pa fintu ifyakutiinya icakutila
Isaiah21:3 Ifyo ine mwene mu cimonwa nafindetela umwenso
Isaiah21:4 Amano yandi nayafulungana
Isaiah21:5 Mu cimonwa namwenefye bapekanya amaliila
Isaiah21:6 Elyo Yawe anjeba ati
Isaiah21:7 Nga amona abantu baleisa pali bakabalwe
Isaiah21:8 Malonda nao apunda ati
Isaiah21:9 Ala balya baleisa. Baleisa pali bakabalwe
Isaiah21:10 Mwe bantu bandi
Isaiah21:11 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa musumba wa Duma
Isaiah21:12 Na malonda ayasuka ati

Isaiah22:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa mukonko wa Cimonwa ni aya. Nga kanshi cinshi cilecitika? Mulandu nshi abena musumba bonse baninine pa mitenge ya mayanda?
Isaiah22:2 Mu musumba onse muli akabolokoto
Isaiah22:3 Intungulushi shobe shalifulumwike shonse pamo
Isaiah22:4 Awe ndekeni ne mwine mwilandolesha
Isaiah22:5 Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alipekanya ubushiku ubwacimpungili
Isaiah22:6 Abashilika ba mu calo ca Elamu beshile pali bakabalwe nabasenda amata ne mifwi
Isaiah22:7 Mu ncende shenu ishawamisha isha mwishika emwiswile amaceleta
Isaiah22:8 Kanshi amalinga ayakupokolwelako Yuda yalibongolweke. Ilyo ico cintu camoneke
Isaiah22:9 Mwalimwene umo amalinga ya Yerusalemu yabongolweke
Isaiah22:10 Mwapenda amayanda yonse aya mu Yerusalemu
Isaiah22:11 Mwaimba icishima lwa mukati ka malinga umwakuti muleikala amenshi ayaletula mu cishiba cakale. Lelo icakuti mupose amano kuli Lesa uwapekanya ifi fyonse ukutula na ku kale
Isaiah22:12 Eico muli ubo bushiku Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alimwitile imwe pakuti mulelila
Isaiah22:13 Lelo imwe mwaikalilefye ukulasekasekafye no kulasamwa. Mwaipaya impaanga ne ŋombe ishakuti mulye
Isaiah22:14 Yawe umwine wa fita asuka anjeba ati
Isaiah22:15 Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alinjebele ine ukuya kuli Shebina kangalila
Isaiah22:16 “Bushe iwe uitunga ukuba cinshi? Ni nsambu nshi iwe wakwata ishakuti uleibashila inindi mu cilibwe ca mu kapili
Isaiah22:17 Imilimo iyo iwe ubomba

Isaiah22:23 Ine nkamukosha ndii ngo lusunga
Isaiah22:24 Ubucindami bonse ubwa pa lupwa bukabikwa pali ena

Isaiah23:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa musumba wa Turi ni aya. Pumenipo imisowa
Isaiah23:2 Kutumaneni mwe baikala pa lulamba lwa bemba
Isaiah23:3 Mwe banonkela mukwenda pali bemba
Isaiah23:4 Iwe we musumba wa Sidoni
Isaiah23:5 Na bena Egupto bene bakacilimukila no kututuma ku mwenso

Isaiah23:7 Bushe uyu Turi e musumba wenu uwansansa

Isaiah23:9 Ala ni Yawe umwine wa fita ewapangile ukucita ifi
Isaiah23:10 Ucilinganye icalo cobe ngo mulonga wa Nailo

Isaiah24:15 Na ba ku kabanga nabo bene bakalalumbanya Yawe. Abantu abaikala mu fishi

Isaiah28:20 Cikaba nge pinda ilyatila

Isaiah36:7 Kabili nga wasosa kuli ine auti
Isaiah36:8 “Kanshi isa nomba upangane na shikulu
Isaiah36:9 Kuti wafulumuna shani cilolo umo uwacepesha pali bacilolo bakwa shikulu
Isaiah36:10 Bushe iwe uletontonkanya ukuti ine naitendekafye pakwisa sansa icalo no kuconaula
Isaiah36:11 Elyo Eliakimu
Isaiah36:12 Nao Rabushake abankula ati
Isaiah36:13 Elyo uyu Rabushake kabili aiminina aololoka no kubilikisha mu Cihibulu ati
Isaiah36:14 Ilesosa aiti
Isaiah36:15 Mwileka Hesekia alemusembeleka ukutetekela muli Yawe nga alanda ukuti
Isaiah36:16 Mwimumfwila Hesekia.’ Ifi efyo imfumu ya ku Asiria yasosa ifyakuti
Isaiah36:17 mpaka nkese mubuula no kumutwala mu calo icabafye nge calo cenu. Icalo ica ŋanu no mwangashi upya. Icalo ica mikate na mabala ya myangashi.
Isaiah36:18 Mwileka Hesekia alemubepa pakulamweba ukutila “Yawe aletupokolola!” Bushe kwalibako umulungu wa mushobo uuli onse uwapokololako icalo cauko ukufuma ku kuboko kwa mfumu ya bena Asiria?
Isaiah36:19 Nge milungu ya ku Hamati
Isaiah36:20 Bushe mulungu nshi pa milungu ya fyalo ifi fyonse uwatala aupusushako icalo cauko kuli ine? Nga nomba imwe cinshi ico muleelenganishisha ukuti Yawe akapusushako Yerusalemu ku kuboko kwandi?’”
Isaiah36:21 Lelo abantu baikalafye tondolo ukwabula ukuti bamwasuke
Isaiah36:22 Elyo Eliakimu mwana Hilikiya uwali mushika wa kwisano
Isaiah37:1 Ilyo imfumu Hesekia yaumfwile ifi
Isaiah37:2 Kabili yabuula Eliakimu mushika wa kwisano
Isaiah37:3 Bamweba ati
Isaiah37:4 Limbi kuti caba ukuti Yawe Lesa obe naumfwa amashiwi ya uyu Rabushake uo shikulu wakwe imfumu ya ku Asiria itumine kukutuka Lesa uwamweo. Elyo na pakuti Yawe Lesa obe akalipe pa mashiwi aya omfwile. Eico pepelako abashele abacili abomi.’ ”
Isaiah37:5 Ilyo bacilolo ba mfumu Hesekia bafika kuli Esaya
Isaiah37:6 nao Esaya ababweseshamo ati
Isaiah37:7 Umfwa
Isaiah37:8 Ilyo uyu Rabushake aumfwa ukuti imfumu yabo naifuma ku Lakishi
Isaiah37:9 Nomba Senakerubi apokelela amashiwi ayakuti Tiraka imfumu ya bena Kushi naifuma mukwisa mulwisha. Pakumfwa aya mashiwi atuma inkombe kuli Hesekia abakuyatila abati
Isaiah37:10 “Mwebe Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda ukuti
Isaiah37:11 Mu cacine waliumfwa ifyo imfumu sha ku Asiria shacita ku fyalo fyonse
Isaiah37:12 Nge milungu ya mishobo iyo iyaonawilwe ku fikolwe fyandi bushe yalibapokolweleko? Imilungu ya Gosani
Isaiah37:13 Ili kwi imfumu ya ku Hamati
Isaiah37:14 Hesekia apokele kalata ukufuma ku nkombe no kubelenga. Elyo aya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe
Isaiah37:15 Elyo Hesekia apepa kuli Yawe ati
Isaiah37:16 “ We Yawe umwine wa fita
Isaiah37:17 Teya ukutwi
Isaiah37:18 “Cacine we Yawe ukuti imfumu sha bena Asiria shalofya abantu ba iyi mitundu yonse no konaula ifyalo fyabo.
Isaiah37:19 Shaliposa imilungu yabo mu mulilo no kuyonaula. Nangu cali ukuti tayali milungu
Isaiah37:20 Kanshi nomba we Yawe
Isaiah37:21 Elyo Esaya mwana Amosi atuma amashiwi kuli Hesekia ati
Isaiah37:22 aya e mashiwi ayo Yawe asosele pali Senakeribu.’ “Nacisungu mwana Sioni akususha no kukutumfya. Umwana mwanakashi wa Yerusalemu apukunya umutwe panuma yobe.
Isaiah37:23 Ninani uo watukile no kupontela? Nani uo waotokele no kutulumwina amenso? Cine ni ku Wamushilo wakwa Israeli.
Isaiah37:24 Ukupitila mu nkombe shobe emo utukile Imfumu insele shingi
Isaiah37:25 Ninyimba ifishima mu fyalo fya kutali
Isaiah37:26 “Bushe tawaumfwa ukuti nacipekenye ukufuma kale? Mu nshiku shakale emo napekenye ifi
Isaiah37:27 Abantu babo amaka nayapwamo
Isaiah37:28 “Lelo nalishiba uko wikala
Isaiah37:29 Apo iwe waliitutumuna pali ine
Isaiah37:30 Ici ecikaba icishibilo cobe
Isaiah37:31 Kabili abakashalapo mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda
Isaiah37:32 Pantu mu Yerusalemu emukafuma abantu abakashalamo abomi
Isaiah37:33 “Eico ifi efyo Yawe alanda palwa mfumu ya ku Asiria. ‘Tayakengilemo muli uno musumba nangu ukulasamo umufwi muno. Tayakapalame naikata inkwela ku musumba
Isaiah37:34 Inshila yaishilemo eyo ikabwelelamo. Muli uno musumba mwena tayaingilemo nakalya. Efyalanda Yawe.
Isaiah37:35 Ndecingilila uno musumba no kuupususha
Isaiah37:36 Awe
Isaiah37:37 Kanshi Senakeribu imfumu ya bena Asiria epakufuma mu nkambi nokubwelelamo. Abwelela ku Ninife eko aya ikala.

Isaiah38:1 Mu nshiku shine shilya
Isaiah38:2 Hesekia nao epakupilibukila ku cibumba

Isaiah40:9 We wakubila
Isaiah40:10 Moneni

Isaiah49:22 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe
Isaiah49:23 Ishamfumu shakulabafye kwati e bashinwe
Isaiah49:24 Bushe impalume kuti umo aipoka ifyo yatapa? Bushe imfumu iikali kuti umo aya ipokolola bankole baiko?
Isaiah49:25 Yawe nao epakwasuka ati
Isaiah49:26 Nkalenga abakucusha ukulya imibili yabo
Isaiah50:1 Ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Nga kanshi amapaso yakulekaninapo icupo ayo natamfishepo nyinenwe yali kwi? Nangu nani uo nakwatako inkongole uo namushitisheko? Bushe ilyo namuposele muli bunkole mutila nalimushitishe mwa? Awe iyoo. Imwe mwaposelwe muli bunkole pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyenu. Ni pa mulandu wa bumpulamafunde bwenu eco namutamfishe.
Isaiah50:2 Cinshi pashasangilwe umuntu nelyo umo ilyo naishile? Cinshi ico imwe mushaleasukila ilyo ine nalemwita? Bushe ukuboko kwandi kwalipipisha ukwakufilwa ukumulubula mwa? Bushe ine nshakwata amaka ayakumupususha? Moneni nangufye ni bemba alakama no kuuma nga namukalipila
Isaiah50:3 Ine ndafwika umulu ifyafiita
Isaiah50:4 Yawe alimfunda ne mubomfi wakwe ifyakusosa
Isaiah50:5 Yawe alimpeela amano ayakwiluka ifintu
Isaiah50:6 Inuma yandi nalipeele ku balempumaula. Amasaya yandi napeele ku balensusaula umwefu. Nshafishile icinso candi ku balentumfya
Isaiah50:7 Pantu ni Mfumu Yawe eungafwa ine nshakasebane nakalya. Eco nalengela impumi yandi ukukosa nge libwe
Isaiah50:8 Lesa uwakunandilako ukuti ine ndi wakaele ali mupepi. Nga nani uwingampeela umulandu? Natwiminine nankwe. Aleni natuleya bonse ku cilye. Nandubulwishe uuli no mulandu na ine.
Isaiah50:9 Ine ni Mfumu Yawe umwine eumpokako. Nga kanshi nani uwinganseka ngo wa mulandu? Bakacucuka bonsefye kwati ni nsalu
Isaiah50:10 Kanshi imwe bonse mwe bakwatila Yawe akatiina
Isaiah50:11 Nomba imwe bonse mwe bakosha umulilo
Isaiah51:1 “Umfweni kuli ine mwe bakonkelela ubololoke
Isaiah51:2 Lolesheni kuli shinwe Abrahamu
Isaiah51:3 Cine cine Yawe akalangulukilako umusumba wa Sioni
Isaiah51:4 “Umfweni kuli ine
Isaiah51:5 Ubulungami bwandi nabupalama
Isaiah51:6 Inwineni amenso yenu ku mulu
Isaiah51:7 “Umfweni kuno
Isaiah51:8 Pantu abo bantu icipelebesha ca bushiku cikabalya nge nsalu
Isaiah51:9 Buuka
Isaiah51:10 Bushe teiwe wine wakamishe amenshi ya muli bemba mwitenga ilyashika
Isaiah51:11 Kanshi abantu abo walubula we Yawe bakabwela
Isaiah51:12 Yawe nakabili aletila ati
Isaiah51:13 Kuti mwalaba shani Yawe uwamubumba
Isaiah51:14 Bankole ababa mu fifungo
Isaiah51:15 Pantu ine nine Yawe
Isaiah51:16 Nalibika amashiwi yandi mu kanwa kobe
Isaiah51:17 Buuka
Isaiah51:18 Pa bana baume bonse abo wafyele tapamoneka nelyo umo uwakukwikatililako pa kuboko. Mu bana baume bonse abo wakushishe tapamoneka nangu wakuti alekutungululako.
Isaiah51:19 Pa mipamba iyo ibili iyakuponene
Isaiah51:20 Mu finshoko fyonse ifya misebo
Isaiah51:21 Eico umfweni ici mwe bena Yerusalemu mwe balecula
Isaiah51:22 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe
Isaiah51:23 Nimbuula ulu lukombo no kulubika mu minwe ya bamucusha
Isaiah52:1 Buuka
Isaiah52:2 Ima panshi
Isaiah52:3 Yawe alemweba ati
Isaiah52:4 Pantu ifi efyasosa Yawe Lesa umwine wa maka yonse ati
Isaiah52:5 Yawe nasosa ati
Isaiah52:6 Nomba lino lyena
Isaiah52:7 Ala yaliyemba pa mpili amakasa ya baleta imbila nsuma
Isaiah52:8 Umfweni
Isaiah52:9 Awileni capamo utupundu
Isaiah52:10 Yawe nalanga amaka yakwe ayamushilo pa cinso ca nko shonse. Na bantu bonse isonde lyonse nabaimwena ukupususha kwakwa Lesa wesu.
Isaiah52:11 Endesheni imwe
Isaiah52:12 Uno muku wena tamwaime mu kampampa iyoo
Isaiah52:13 Yawe aletila ati
Isaiah52:14 Lelo kwena abantu abengi balisungwike ilyo bamumwene
Isaiah52:15 Lelo akacilimusha abantu ba mishobo iyingi
Isaiah53:1 “Ngo wingasumina ifi fintu tuleshimika
Isaiah53:2 Ala ni Yawe umwine ewafwaile ukuti umubomfi wakwe akulile pa cinso cakwe
Isaiah53:3 Ifwe twalimusuulile
Isaiah53:4 “Cine cine alibuulile amacushi ayo twali nokuposwamo nifwe. Alisendele ubukali ubo ifwe twali nokumfwa. Ifwe twatilefye ni Lesa eumuleteele aya macushi no bulanda
Isaiah53:5 Lelo kwena ni pa mulandu wa bumpulamafunde bwesu ecalengele ukuti bamucenaule ifyo
Isaiah53:6 Bonsefye ifwe twali nge mpaanga ishaluba
Isaiah53:7 “Balemutintanya
Isaiah53:8 Balimwikete mu lufyengo
Isaiah53:9 Bapekenye inshinshi yakwe pamo pene ne ntalamisoka
Isaiah53:10 “Kwena ni Yawe ewafwaile umubomfi wakwe afwantwe no kucula icibi
Isaiah53:11 Epakuti amacushi yakwe yonse nga yapwa mu mweo wakwe akasansamuka nakabili. Akashininkisha ukuti kanshi taculilefye apafye. Ni mukwishiba emo umubomfi wandi umulungami akalungamikila abengi
Isaiah53:12 E mulandu wine na ine nkamutekela apacindama pakati ka bacindami. Akaakana ne mpalume conse icatapwa. Pantu umwine ewaipeeleshe kukufwa
Isaiah54:1 “Aula utupundu no kwimba ulwimbo lwansansa
Isaiah54:2 “Kushako itenti ilyo wikalamo. Anshika ne fisalu fye tenti lyobe
Isaiah54:3 Pantu ukakushako imipaka yobe ku kuso na ku kulyo
Isaiah54:4 “Wilatiina
Isaiah54:5 Pantu Kabumba obe akaba mwina mobe
Isaiah54:6 Pantu Yawe ewakwita ngo mukashana uwaupwa nomba uo wiba alekelesha
Isaiah54:7 “Ine nalikushile iwe pa kashita kamo no kukulekelesha
Isaiah54:8 Ine nalikufulilwe no kukusha
Isaiah54:9 “Pantu ici caba kuli ine nga mu nshiku shakwa Noa
Isaiah54:10 Nangu impili shingaseshiwa no tupili twasholomoka
Isaiah54:11 “Owe
Isaiah54:12 Insonshi sha mayanda yobe ine nkashikuulila na mabwe yamutengo aya rubi
Isaiah54:13 Abantu bobe abaume bakafundwa kuli Yawe umwine
Isaiah54:14 Mu bololoke emo uli nokushimpwa. Ukalaikalila ku matwi tondolo
Isaiah54:15 Bamo nga bakalakusansa awe ninshi teine nkalalenga iyoo
Isaiah54:16 “Wamona
Isaiah54:17 Lelo ifyanso fyonse ifyo bapanga pakukulwishishako
Isaiah55:1 “Imwe bonse mwe bacula ku cilaka
Isaiah55:2 Nga mulandu nshi mwingalaposela impiya pa fintu ifishili fyakulya? Nga cinshi ico mwingala onawila amalipilo yenu pa fintu ifyo mushingekuta? Mulenkutika
Isaiah55:3 “Kutikeni kuno
Isaiah55:4 Nine nasontele Davidi pakuti abe kambone ku bantu bonse
Isaiah55:5 Kanshi nomba nimwe muketa imishobo ya benafyalo
Isaiah55:6 “Fwayeni Yawe pa nshita engasangwa
Isaiah55:7 Imwe mwe babifi lekeni imisango yenu
Isaiah55:8 “Pantu ifyo ine ntontonkanya tafyaba ngefyo imwe mutontonkanya iyoo
Isaiah55:9 “Ngefi fine umulu wasansuka ukucila icalo
Isaiah55:10 “Nga filya fine imfula no bunga bwa mfula fitula mu mulu
Isaiah55:11 efyo na mashiwi yandi yaba ayo ine nanda. Tayabwelela kuli ine ukwabula akantu
Isaiah55:12 “Ala cine cinefye imwe mukafuma ne nsansa
Isaiah55:13 Mulya mwaba imyunga pali nomba
Isaiah56:1 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati
Isaiah56:2 Akulaba uwapaalwa umuntu onse uucita ifi fintu
Isaiah56:3 “Umwinafyalo uwaisa ilunda kuli ine ne Yawe elatila ati
Isaiah56:4 Yawe aletila kuli bamutungwi
Isaiah56:5 ninshi ine nkamupeelapo cimo mu ŋanda yandi na mu fibumba fyaiko
Isaiah56:6 “Imwe mwe benafyalo
Isaiah56:7 Imwe nkamuleta ku lupili lwandi ulwamushilo
Isaiah56:8 Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa maka yonse
Isaiah56:9 Iseni mwe fiswango fyonse ifya mu mpanga
Isaiah56:10 Pantu intungulushi shonse ishaba no mulimo wakusoka abantu bandi
Isaiah56:11 Ishi ntungulushi shaba nge mbwa ishatemwisha ukulya tashiikuta nakalya. Bacemi impelwamano. Bonse umo umo bacitilafye umo balefwaila
Isaiah56:12 Basosa abati
Isaiah57:1 Abantu abololoke balafwa
Isaiah57:2 Abantu abekala imikalile iyalungama
Isaiah57:3 Lelo imwe iseni kuno mulubulule
Isaiah57:4 Nani uo muleseka imwe? Nani mulesenteka no kufumisha ululimi? Bushe tamuli bana ba bansangukila
Isaiah57:5 Imwe mwaliba abapimpa ukucita ifyalunkumbwa mwisamba lya fimuti fya oki ifyalelema. Mulatuula na bana benu ilambo mu ncengo sha mabwe
Isaiah57:6 Emo mutola amabwe ayatelela ayo mucindika ngo tulubi twenu
Isaiah57:7 Imwe muya pa mpili ishasansama epo mwaya bika imisengele yenu
Isaiah57:8 Ku numa ya fiibi fyenu lwamukati ku maingwe
Isaiah57:9 Imwe mutala mulenda amalendo no kusenda amafuta ya miolifa na fimbipo ifinunka ubusaka
Isaiah57:10 Nangu munaka kulwa kufwaya fwaya imilungu
Isaiah57:11 Nani uo imwe muletiina no kusakamikwako pakuti mutampe no kulabepa kuli ine. Tamwibukisha na kuli ine nangu ukubikako amano? Bushe imwe nomba namuleka ukulantiina
Isaiah57:12 Nomba ine nalasosela pakabalika ifyaba imyendele yenu
Isaiah57:13 Mwakulati nga mwakuuta mutuule
Isaiah57:14 Kabili cikasoswa ukuti
Isaiah57:15 Pantu efyo asosa uwasansama kabili uwapulama uwabapo pe na pe kabili Uwamushilo. “Ine naikala mu cifulo icasansama kabili icamushilo
Isaiah57:16 Pantu nshakatwalilile ukubomanya
Isaiah57:17 Ine nalibafulilwe pa mulandu wakuba no lwinso lwa fyabubifi. Kanshi ine epakubalimuna cipyu cipyu
Isaiah57:18 Ine nalimona ifyo bacita
Isaiah57:19 Pa milomo ya bantu bakwe abaloosha nomba pakaba icitwalo cakulumbanya
Isaiah57:20 Nomba ababifi bena baba nga bemba uusunkana
Isaiah57:21 “Ababi
Isaiah58:1 “Iwe pundishafye
Isaiah58:2 Kwena balampepa inshiku shonse
Isaiah58:3 Abantu batila abati
Isaiah58:4 Ilyo muleka ukulya
Isaiah58:5 Bushe uyu e musango wakuleka ukulya untu nasala? Ubushiku bumo bushe kuti ebo umuntu aicefyamo? Bushe bushiku bwakukontamafye nge tete
Isaiah58:6 “Bushe teuyu musango wakuleka ukulya uo ine mfwaya? Ukukakula abafyengwa iminyololo
Isaiah58:7 Abali ne nsala mulebapako icakulya
Isaiah58:8 Awe ninshi lyena icikuuku candi cikabengeshima pali imwe nge mibengelele ya kasuba akaletula
Isaiah58:9 Lyena mukalati nga mwanjita ne Yawe namwasuka. Mukalati nga mwakuuta mutuule
Isaiah58:10 nga mwalapeelako abali ne nsala icakulya
Isaiah58:11 Lyena ninshi ne Yawe nkalamutungulula lyonsefye
Isaiah58:12 Mukalabuukulula ifibolya fyakale
Isaiah58:13 Yawe aletila ati
Isaiah58:14 awe ninshi lyena mukalakwata insansa isha kuli Yawe. Kabili nkamusansabalika
Isaiah59:1 Moneni ukuboko kwakwa Yawe takwaipipa ukwakuti kufilwe ukumupususha imwe iyoo
Isaiah59:2 Ala
Isaiah59:3 Amaboko yenu yalikowela ku mulopa wa abo mwafyenga
Isaiah59:4 Nga mwaya ku cilye
Isaiah59:5 Batota amani aya mafwafwa
Isaiah59:6 Ifyo bapikula teti nangu umo afwalwe nge nsalu iyoo
Isaiah59:7 Amakasa yabo lyonse yabutukila ukucita ifyabipa
Isaiah59:8 Bena tabaishiba inshila yamutende iyoo
Isaiah59:9 Twashininkisha ukuti ecalenga ukuti umulinganya ube ukutali na ifwe
Isaiah59:10 Tupampantilafye icibumba nge mpofu
Isaiah59:11 Bonse tubuluma nge fiswango fya bea
Isaiah59:12 We Yawe
Isaiah59:13 Ifwe twalikusangukila we Yawe
Isaiah59:14 Umulinganya ifwe twaliuleka
Isaiah59:15 Icishinka nacicepesha
Isaiah59:16 Lesa alasunguka pakumona ukuti takwaba nelyo umo uutulanyako abo balecusha. Kanshi nomba ni Lesa fye umwine ewalasakatuka pakuti abapususheko
Isaiah59:17 Akulafwala ubulungami kwati e cakufwala cakwe icakucinga icifuba. Kabili ku mutwe wakwe akulafwalako ukupususha
Isaiah59:18 Akalimuna abalwani bakwe pakulinganya pafyo bacita
Isaiah59:19 Eico abantu bakatiina Yawe ukufuma ku masamba konse
Isaiah59:20 Yawe aleeba abantu bakwe ati
Isaiah59:21 “Elyo kabinge ine napangana nabo icipangano icakuti
Isaiah60:1 Ima iwe Sioni
Isaiah60:2 Pantu mona imfifi ikafimba pano isonde
Isaiah60:3 Imishobo ya benafyalo ikaileta ku lubuuto lobe
Isaiah60:4 Sansula amenso
Isaiah60:5 Iwe wakulati nga walolesha
Isaiah60:6 Ingamila shakulaisa imilongo
Isaiah60:7 Impaanga shonse isha ku Keda ne sha ku Nebaiyoti bakashileta kuli iwe pakulashituula ilambo. Shikalatuulwa pa bulambo pakusansamusha ne Yawe
Isaiah60:8 Nga yalya mato yaleshunda nga makumbi
Isaiah60:9 Pantu ifyalo fya ku lulamba lwa pali bemba filenindila
Isaiah60:10 Abenafyalo bakabuukulula amalinga yobe
Isaiah60:11 Inshiku shonse impongolo shobe shikalaba ishaisuka
Isaiah60:12 Elyo abantu ba mishobo ne shamfumu shabo abakalakaana ukulakubombela
Isaiah60:13 Imbao sha mipapa
Isaiah60:14 Abana ba bantu abakucusha
Isaiah60:15 Nangu abantu bakusuulile no kukupata icakuti takwali no walepita mu calo cobe
Isaiah60:16 Iwe ukalaonka ibele lya mishobo ya benafyalo pamo ne shamfumu shaiko
Isaiah60:17 Pa mukuba obe
Isaiah60:18 Icongo cabuluku tacakaleumfwika nakabili mu calo cobe
Isaiah60:19 Te kasuba kakalakusanikilako ilyo bukalaca iyoo
Isaiah60:20 Akasuba kakulamubalikilafye lyonse ukwabula ukuwa
Isaiah60:21 Abantu bobe bakalabafye bonse abololoke
Isaiah60:22 Nangu ulupwa lobe ulwaba ulwacepeshapo kabili ulwafyefye
Isaiah61:1 Umupashi wa Mfumu Yawe waba pali ine
Isaiah61:2 Alintuma ine pakuti ndebilisha ukuti inshita nomba naifika iyo Yawe alapusushishapo abantu bakwe
Isaiah61:3 pakuti mu Sioni ndetalalikamo no kulasansamushamo abalelilishika
Isaiah61:4 Bakulakuula cipya cipya ifibolya fya myaka ishishibantu
Isaiah61:5 Abenafyalo bakulamubombela. Bakulamucemenako ne fitekwa
Isaiah61:6 Elyo imwe mwakulaitwa bashimapepo bakwa Yawe
Isaiah61:7 Insoni shenu no kusaluka kwenu nafipwa
Isaiah61:8 Yawe aletila ati
Isaiah61:9 Na bana ba mu bufyashi bwabo bakulalumbuka ku mishobo ya benafyalo
Isaiah61:10 Nayanga ne nsansa muli Yawe
Isaiah61:11 Pantu ngefi fine umushili umesha imbuto no kukusha ifimenene mwibala
Isaiah62:1 Awe ine
Isaiah62:2 Abantu ba mishobo bakulamonako ifyo iwe ucita ifyalungama
Isaiah62:3 Kuli Yawe
Isaiah62:4 Abantu nomba tabalekwita “Uwalekeleshiwa
Isaiah62:5 Pantu nga filya fine umulumendo abuula umukashana uushabala opwa eo aupa
Isaiah62:6 “Iwe Yerusalemu
Isaiah62:7 Belaleka ine ndeiikalilafye
Isaiah62:8 Yawe nalapa umulapo wa kuboko kwakwe ukwa ku kulyo
Isaiah62:9 Lelo imwe mwe balima iŋanu no kushiseepa
Isaiah62:10 Imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu
Isaiah62:11 Lekeni beshibe ukuti Yawe alebilikisha ku bantu bonse pano isonde ati
Isaiah62:12 Imwe mwakulaitwa ‘Abantu bakwa Lesa abamushilo
Isaiah63:1 Nani ulya aletula ku musumba wa Bosira uwa mu calo ca Edomu? Icakufwala cakwe cilifye icakashika ce
Isaiah63:2 Nga nomba mulandu nshi icakufwala cobe cikashikile
Isaiah63:3 Yawe nao epakwasuka ati
Isaiah63:4 Pantu ine namwene ukuti inshita nomba yafika iyakulimwinapo abalwani babo
Isaiah63:5 Naliloleshe pakuti monepo umo uwakungafwako
Isaiah63:6 Abantu ba mishobo yonse nalibanyantawile bukali bukali
Isaiah63:7 Ine nakulashimika ifyo Yawe aba no kutemwa ukwa pe
Isaiah63:8 Yawe nao epakusosa ati
Isaiah63:9 Ku macushi yabo yonse nao aliculileko
Isaiah63:10 Lelo bena balitalamine Yawe
Isaiah63:11 Elyo basuka balaibukisha inshiku shakale
Isaiah63:12 Bushe ni kwi kwaba Yawe uwalebomfya ubulamba bwakwe
Isaiah63:13 Ilyo Yawe abapishishe panshi apauma ndi mu menshi ayashaishikila
Isaiah63:14 baleendafye nge ŋombe ishileya ku nika ku mulemfwe. Umupashi wakwa Yawe ewabalengele ukutuusha. Kanshi efyo we Yawe watungulwile abantu bobe
Isaiah63:15 We Yawe
Isaiah63:16 Pantu iwe niwe Shifwe. Nangu icikolwe cesu Abrahamu tatwishiba
Isaiah63:17 We Yawe
Isaiah63:18 Ifwe fwe bantu bobe twaikele mwisano lyobe ilyamushilo inshita inonofye
Isaiah63:19 Iwe uletucitafye kwati tewe watuteeka
Isaiah64:1 Nga cinshi ico ushingalepwila umulu no kwisa panonshi? Icakuti ne mpili kuti shalaitentelafye pa cinso cobe.
Isaiah64:2 Nga filya umulilo ubilima mu cisonso
Isaiah64:3 Limbi iwe walishile cita ifintu ifyakutiinya nganshi ifyo ifwe tushaenekele
Isaiah64:4 Awe takwatala akuba muntu uwaumfwapo nangu uwailukapo nangu ukumonapo Lesa umo uwaba no bulamba nga iwe
Isaiah64:5 Iwe ulasekelela abomfwa insansa mukulacita ifyalungama
Isaiah64:6 Bonsefye pano tupelele
Isaiah64:7 Pali ifwe
Isaiah64:8 Lelo kwena we Yawe
Isaiah64:9 Kanshi wilatufulilwa ifi
Isaiah64:10 Imisumba yobe iyamushilo nomba ilifye ifibolya
Isaiah64:11 Iŋanda yesu iyaba iyamushilo kabili iyalulumbi
Isaiah64:12 We Yawe
Isaiah65:1 Yawe nao epakwasuka
Isaiah65:2 Naletambalika amaboko yandi inshiku shonse ku mushobo wa bantu abatalama
Isaiah65:3 Bena balankalifya umutima ku mufulo wabo. Bocela amalambo mu mabala yabo
Isaiah65:4 Baya mukwikala mu nshinshi na mu ncende ishafisama
Isaiah65:5 Elyo kabili aba bantu bene
Isaiah65:6 Moneni umulandu wabo walilembwa kale. Ine ne Yawe nshakalekepofye iyoo
Isaiah65:7 bonse ububifi bwenu no bwa fikolwe fyenu
Isaiah65:8 Lelo kwena ine ne Yawe ndetila nati
Isaiah65:9 Nkasenamina abana bakwa Yakobo
Isaiah65:10 Bakalacemena impaanga shabo mu Sharoni
Isaiah65:11 “Nomba imwe mwe bafumya amano kuli ine ne Yawe
Isaiah65:12 Nkamupekanisha ukwipaiwa mu nkondo
Isaiah65:13 Eico ine ne Yawe namwebelapo imwe ukuti
Isaiah65:14 Ababomfi bandi bena bakalaimba inyimbo shansansa
Isaiah65:15 Abantu bandi abasalwa bakalabuula ishina lyenu
Isaiah65:16 Umuntu onse mu calo uukalalomba ipaalo
Isaiah65:17 “Mwamona
Isaiah65:18 Imwe lyonsefye muleanga ne nsansa pa fintu ifyo ine ndecita
Isaiah65:19 Na ine wine nakulasansamuka icibi pa mulandu wa Yerusalemu
Isaiah65:20 Tamwakaleba tunya utwakulaikalafye inshiku ishinono ututeku nakalya
Isaiah65:21 Abantu bakulaikuulila amayanda
Isaiah65:22 Tabakakuule amayanda elyo bambi ebaisa ikalamo iyoo. Kabili tabakalime elyo bambi ebaisa lya awe. Abantu bandi bakulakokola pa calo nge miti. Abasalwa bandi bakulailemena ifintu ifyo bakulaibombela.
Isaiah65:23 Bakulashuukilamo mu milimo yabo
Isaiah65:24 Nomba ilyo tabalati banjite
Isaiah65:25 Umumbulu no mwana wa mpaanga fikamba ukulila pamo
Isaiah66:1 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati
Isaiah66:2 Ala nine wine nabumba fyonse ifi. Fyonsefye
Isaiah66:3 “Abantu tepakutemwa ukucita ifyo abene balefwaya. Umuntu uuli onse uwipaya iŋombe no kutuula ilambo
Isaiah66:4 Kanshi na ine wine nakulabatoosha imipamba
Isaiah66:5 “Umfweni kuno ishiwi lyakwa Yawe
Isaiah66:6 Umfweni akabolokoto ako kaba mu musumba
Isaiah66:7 “Umusumba wandi uwamushilo uli ngo mwanakashi uwafyala umwana umwaume apopenefye
Isaiah66:8 Bushe kwalitala akuba umuntu uwamonapo nangu ukumfwapo ica uyu musango? Bushe kwalitala akuba umushobo umo uwa bantu uwatampile ukubapo pa bushikufye bumo? Ala Sioni ena akafyala umutundu wa bantu ilyo line akakomwa ne fumo.
Isaiah66:9 Nine Yawe ulenga ukuti cilepalamina icakuti abantu bandi balefyalilwapo
Isaiah66:10 “Sansamukeni pamo na Yerusalemu
Isaiah66:11 Mwakulacankilwa ifisuma fyakwe
Isaiah66:12 Ifi efyasosa Yawe
Isaiah66:13 Ine nkalamutalalikila imwe mu Yerusalemu
Isaiah66:14 Ilyo imwe mukalamona ifi fintu
Isaiah66:15 “Ine ne Yawe nkeshila mu mulilo
Isaiah66:16 Abantu bonsefye pa calo abo ne Yawe nkasanga ne milandu
Isaiah66:17 “Ine ne Yawe ndetila nati
Isaiah66:18 Ine nalishiba ifyo bena batontonkanya nefyo bacita. Ine nalaisa nonganye abantu ba mishobofye yonse ne ndimi shonse nabo bakesa mona ubucindami bwandi.
Isaiah66:19 Kabili nkabika icishibilo pakati kabo icakushininkisha ukuti kanshi nine ndebalimuna. Kwena nalaisa shapo bamo
Isaiah66:20 Bakabwesha na banenu bonse
Isaiah66:21 Bamo pali abo bantu
Isaiah66:22 “Ngefi fine umulu upya ne calo cipya ifyo ine ndecita fyakulabelelela ku maka yandi ne Yawe
Isaiah66:23 Pa nshikunkulu ya kumoneka kwa mweshi onse uupya

Jeremiah11:2 “Umfwa kuno amashiwi ya ici cipangano. Webe abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu
Jeremiah11:3 ukuti ifi efyalanda Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli aletila
Jeremiah11:4 Icipangano cimo cinefye ico napangene ne fikolwe fyenu
Jeremiah11:5 Kanshi ine epakufikilisha icilayo ico nalaile ifikolwe fyabo
Jeremiah11:6 Elyo Yawe kabili anjeba ati
Jeremiah11:7 Pantu ilyo ine nafumishe ifikolwe fyabo mu calo ca Egupto
Jeremiah11:8 Lelo bena tebakumfwa nangu ukubikako amano nakalya. Bonsefye babikapofye ukumalala imitima no kubifya lyonse. Ine nalibakonkomeshe ukulabeela icipangano
Jeremiah11:9 Elyo Yawe kabili anjeba ati
Jeremiah11:10 Nababwelela ku fya bubifi bwa fikolwe fyabo
Jeremiah11:11 Kanshi nomba ine ne Yawe ndesosa ukuti ndebaletela ifinkunka ifyo bashakafumemo. Bakulati nga bakuuta mutuule
Jeremiah11:12 Elyo abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu bakulaya mukulilila ku milungu iyo bafutumwina ububani. Nomba ilya milungu yakulafilwa ukubapusushako ilyo ifi finkunka filebafikila.
Jeremiah11:13 Imilungu iyo imwe mwe bena Yuda mwaba nayo
Jeremiah11:14 “Kanshi iwe Yeremia wiesha kupapatilako abo bantu
Jeremiah11:15 Kabili Yawe asosa ati
Jeremiah11:16 Kale ine ne Yawe nalebeta umuti wa muolifa uwalelema amabula
Jeremiah11:17 “Ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita ne walimbile aba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda

Jeremiah11:19 Lelo ine nanakililefye nga kana ka mpaanga ako baletwala kukwipaya
