Jeremiah24:7 Ine nkabapeela umutima wakwishiba ukuti nine Yawe. Elyo nabo bakaba abantu abandifye
Jeremiah24:8 “Elyo Sedekia imfumu ya cino calo ca Yuda
Jeremiah24:9 Ine nkabaponesha ishamo ilyakuti likaletele na bantu ba mishobo yonse iya pano isonde umwenso. Abantu bambi bakalabashobola
Jeremiah24:10 Nkababushisha inkondo
Jeremiah25:1 Ilyo Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia ateekele icalo ca Yuda
Jeremiah25:2 Kanshi Yeremia nao epakulabilila abena Yuda bonse na bena Yerusalemu bonse imbila iyakuti
Jeremiah25:3 “Pa myaka amakumi yabili na itatu (23)
Jeremiah25:4 Imwe tamufwaya kumfwa nelyo ukuposako amano
Jeremiah25:5 Imwe balimweba ukutila
Jeremiah25:6 Mwilakonka imilungu imbi imbi nangufye ukulaipepa no kulaibombela. Mwilabilimuna ine umutima kulwa kupepa utulubi uto iminwe yenu yapanga. Na ine nshakamuletele ububi.’
Jeremiah25:7 Lelo mwalikaana ukumfwa ifyo nsosa ne Yawe. Mwalimbilimuna umutima kulwa tulubi twenu uto iminwe yenu yapanga
Jeremiah25:8 “Kanshi nomba apo imwe mushifwaya kumfwa amashiwi yandi
Jeremiah25:9 ‘Ine nalaita abantu bonse aba ku kapinda ka ku kuso
Jeremiah25:10 Utupundu twabo utwansansa no twakwanga
Jeremiah25:11 Cino calo conse calashala amatololo umwabula abakwilamo. Na bantu ba iyi mishobo yonse bakabombela imfumu ya ku Babiloni pa myaka amakumi cine lubali (70).
Jeremiah25:12 Iyo myaka amakumi cine lubali (70) nga yapwa
Jeremiah25:13 ‘Cilya calo nkacicita fyonse ifyo nacipangila
Jeremiah25:14 Pantu abantu ba iyi mishobo nabo bene bakateekwapo ubusha ku bantu ba mishobo imbi iyingi na ku shamfumu ishikalamba
Jeremiah25:15 Ifi efyasosele Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli kuli ine ati
Jeremiah25:16 Ilyo balenwamo
Jeremiah25:17 Awe na ine napoka ulukombo mu minwe yakwa Yawe no kunwesha imishobo yonse iyo antumineko.
Jeremiah25:18 Naya nweshamo abena Yerusalemu na bantu abaikala mu misumba yonse iya mu calo ca Yuda
Jeremiah25:19 Na bambi abo naile nweshamo ni Farao imfumu ya mu calo ca Egupto
Jeremiah25:20 na benafyalo bonse abaikelemo. Kabili bambi ni bashamfumu aba mu calo ca Usi
Jeremiah25:21 Na bambi e bena Edomu bonse
Jeremiah25:22 ne shamfumu shonse isha mu Turi
Jeremiah25:23 ne ya mu musumba wa Dedani
Jeremiah25:24 Na shimbi ni shamfumu shonse isha mu Arabia
Jeremiah25:25 ne shamfumu shonse isha mu calo ca Simuri
Jeremiah25:26 ne shamfumu shonse isha ku kapinda ka ku kuso
Jeremiah25:27 Sosa kuli bena auti
Jeremiah25:28 Nga bakaana ukupoka ulukombo mu minwe yobe no kunwamo
Jeremiah25:29 Moneni
Jeremiah25:30 “Iwe Yeremia uli nokusoka aba bantu pakusesema aya mashiwi yandi yonse ayo ine nandile. Uli nokweba aba bantu auti
Jeremiah25:31 Iciunda ce shiwi lyakwe cikomfwika no kwapelela isonde
Jeremiah25:32 Kabili Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati
Jeremiah25:33 Pali ubo bushiku ifitumbi fya bantu abo Yawe alaswa epaye
Jeremiah25:34 Imwe mwe bakacema
Jeremiah25:35 Abacemi tabakamone kwakubutukila
Jeremiah25:36 Umfweni ukukuuta kwa bacemi no kulila kwa ntungulushi sha mukuni
Jeremiah25:37 Ne calo icali icamutelelwe naconaulwa
Jeremiah25:38 Yawe nafuma mu cifulo cakwe nge nkalamo
Jeremiah26:1 Ilyofye Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia ali pa bufumu ubwakuteeka icalo ca Yuda
Jeremiah26:2 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati
Jeremiah26:3 Nalimo abantu kuti baumfwa
Jeremiah26:4 “Ubebe ukutila
Jeremiah26:5 kabili nga tamuleposa amano ku mashiwi ya babomfi bandi bakasesema
Jeremiah26:6 Kanshi nga tamulekonka ifi fintu balemweba
Jeremiah26:7 Bashimapepo na bakasesema na bantu bambi bonse balyumfwileko uko Yeremia alesosa fyonse ifi mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.
Jeremiah26:8 Kutifye cilya Yeremia apwa ukusosa fyonsefye ifyo Yawe amukonkomeshe ukubeba
Jeremiah26:9 Cinshi ico iwe ulelumbwila ifi mwishina lyakwa Yawe
Jeremiah26:10 Bacilolo ba mu Yuda bati bomfwe ifi fintu
Jeremiah26:11 Elyo bashimapepo na bakasesema balaeba bacilolo na bantu bambi bonse abati
Jeremiah26:12 Yeremia ena epakweba bacilolo bonse na bantu bambi bonse ati
Jeremiah26:13 Kanshi imwe muli nokwalula imisango yenu ne micitile yenu
Jeremiah26:14 Elyo ine

Jeremiah26:17 Elyo abakalamba bamo baima

Jeremiah26:19 “Hesekia uwaleteeka cino calo ca Yuda pamo na bantu bene tabaipeye Mika iyoo. Hesekia alitiinine Yawe
Jeremiah26:20 Kwaliko no muntu umbi mwana Shemaia
Jeremiah26:21 Ilyo imfumu Yehoyakimu pamo na bashilika baiko bonse na bacilolo baiko bonse baumfwile ifyo Uria alandile

Jeremiah26:23 Nabo baya fumya Uria mu Egupto
Jeremiah26:24 Lelo Yeremia ena ishuko akwete nicofye alipo na umo uwakumusoselako

Jeremiah27:8 “‘Nomba abantu ba mushobo umo

Jeremiah27:10 Ala imwe bamusesemenafye ifyabufi

Jeremiah27:13 Nga cinshi ico iwe pamo na bantu bobe mwingafwaila ukufwa ku nkondo
Jeremiah27:14 Iwe wilaumfwako kuli bakasesema abalekulesha ukubombela imfumu ya ku Babiloni. Ala fyabufifye balesesema kuli iwe.
Jeremiah27:15 Yawe umwine ewasosa ukuti tewabatuma iyoo

Jeremiah27:18 Nga ni bakasesema bene bene
Jeremiah27:19 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita alanda palwa inceshi no musambilo ne fyakutekapo ifipe na fimbipo ifyashele muli uyu musumba.
Jeremiah27:20 Ifi fipe Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni tayafisendele ilyo yaikete Yekonia mwana Yehoyakimu imfumu ya bena Yuda

Jeremiah28:1 Muli uyo wine mwaka

Jeremiah32:1 Yawe alandile kuli Yeremia ili shiwi mu mwaka walengele ikumi apo Sedekia atampile ukuba imfumu ya calo ca Yuda
Jeremiah32:2 Pali iyo ine nshita ninshi ifita fya mfumu ya ku Babiloni nafisansa umusumba wa Yerusalemu
Jeremiah32:3 Imfumu Sedekia emo yamufungilile ilyo yamusangile no mulandu uwakusesema no kubila mbila ukuti Yawe nasosa ati
Jeremiah32:4 Nokuti Sedekia imfumu ya cino calo ca Yuda takamone pakupusukila ku bena Kaludea. Akaposwa ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni
Jeremiah32:5 Nokuti Sedekia bakamusenda ku Babiloni
Jeremiah32:6 Yeremia nao alilandile ati
Jeremiah32:7 ‘Hanameli mwana Shalumu nokolume alaswa ese uko uli
Jeremiah32:8 Ne cacine ukulinganafye nomo Yawe anjebele
Jeremiah32:9 Kanshi na ine epakushita ibala kuli Hanameli umufyala wandi
Jeremiah32:10 Nalemba na pali kalata ishina lyandi pakushininkisha umulandu
Jeremiah32:11 Elyo nabuula bakalata bonse babili abalipo ifyabukwebo bwesu
Jeremiah32:12 awe napeela bakalata bonse babili kuli Baruki mwana Neriya
Jeremiah32:13 Elyo pa menso yabo bonse naeba Baruki nati
Jeremiah32:14 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita
Jeremiah32:15 Pantu Yawe umwine wa fita

Jeremiah32:17 “We Imfumu Yawe
Jeremiah32:18 Ulabelela abantu amakana na makana uluse
Jeremiah32:19 Ifyo iwe upanga ukucita
Jeremiah32:20 Niwe wacitile ifipeshamano ne finjelengwe mu calo ca Egupto. Na nombaline ucili uleficita ukushinta na pali buno bushiku bwine ku bena Israeli
Jeremiah32:21 Pakufumya abantu bobe abena Israeli mu Egupto
Jeremiah32:22 Niwe wabapeele ne calo cino icikankala kabili icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci
Jeremiah32:23 Nomba ilyo baishile muli cino calo no kucipoka
Jeremiah32:24 “Tepapa nomba abena Kaludea nabatulamika ifimina fya maloba ukushinguluka umusumba pakuti baupoke
Jeremiah32:25 We Mfumu Yawe
Jeremiah32:26 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti
Jeremiah32:27 “Mona
Jeremiah32:28 Kanshi ine ne Yawe efyo nsosa. Nalabuula uno musumba
Jeremiah32:29 Abena Kaludea abalelwisha uno musumba
Jeremiah32:30 Umutundu wa bena Israeli na bena Yuda tabacitapo ifintu fimbi kanofye ukucita ifibi pa cinso candi ukufuma ku bwaice bwabo. Abena Israeli ine balankalifya umutima pa mulandu wa tulubi uto bapanga ne minwe yabo. Efyasosa Yawe
Jeremiah32:31 Uno musumba walinkalifya umutima no kundetela icipyu ukutulafye apo wakuulilwa. Ine nomba mpangilefye ukuonaula
Jeremiah32:32 pa mulandu wa fibi fyonse ificitwa na bena Israeli na bena Yuda ifyankalifya umutima. Abaficita ni bashamfumu babo na bacilolo babo
Jeremiah32:33 Aba bantu ine balimfutatila
Jeremiah32:34 Na mu ŋanda yakumpepelamo iye shina lyandi iyo bankuulila
Jeremiah32:35 Mu mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu balikuulilamo Baali ifibumbili fye lambo
Jeremiah32:36 Yawe
Jeremiah32:37 Ine nkalonganya abantu
Jeremiah32:38 Lyena bakalaba abantu abandifye
Jeremiah32:39 Nkalenga bakalefwayafye no mutima umo icintu cimo ceka mu miikalile yabo
Jeremiah32:40 Ine nkapangana nabo icipangano ca pe icakutila
Jeremiah32:41 Ine nkalasansamuka pakubabombela ifisuma
Jeremiah32:42 Ici ecasosa Yawe ukutila
Jeremiah32:43 Iwe Yeremia nusosa ukuti cino calo cikaba nga matololo umushaikala bantu nangufye inama
Jeremiah32:44 Abantu bakalayashita
Jeremiah33:1 Ilyo Yeremia acili mu cifungo mu lubansa lwa bakalinda
Jeremiah33:2 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe uwapangile isonde
Jeremiah33:3 Lilila kuli ine
Jeremiah33:4 Pantu ifi efyasosa Yawe
Jeremiah33:5 Abena Kaludea balaisa mukulwisha uno musumba balaisa isushamo ifitumbi fya bantu abo ndi nokwipaya ku bukali ne cipyu candi. Ndi nokufisa icinso candi kuli uno musumba pa mulandu wa fyabubifi ficitikamo.
Jeremiah33:6 “Lelo kwena nkaundapa no kubweseshamo ubumi. Nkondapa abantu bauko
Jeremiah33:7 Nkabweseshamo ubunonshi mu calo ca Yuda na mu calo ca Israeli
Jeremiah33:8 Abantu nkabasangulula ku fyabubifi fyabo ifyo babifishe kuli ine
Jeremiah33:9 Kabili uno musumba wa Yerusalemu ukalandetela insansa

Jeremiah33:11 utupundu twakwanga no twansansa. Mukalaumfwika na mashiwi ya bashibwinga na ya banabwinga. Ilyo abantu bakalaleta ku ŋanda yandi imitulo yakutotela
Jeremiah33:12 Kabili Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati
Jeremiah33:13 Mu mishi ya mu calo ca mpili
Jeremiah33:14 Kabili Yawe asosa ati

Jeremiah33:16 Shilya nshiku nga shafika
Jeremiah33:17 Pantu ine ne Yawe nalaya ukuti pefye kukalaba mwana Davidi umo uwakuteeka nge mfumu ya ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli
Jeremiah33:18 kabili pefye kukalaba bashimapepo abena Levi abakwiminina pa cinso candi
Jeremiah33:19 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti
Jeremiah33:20 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati
Jeremiah33:21 ninshi ne cipangano candi no mubomfi wandi Davidi kuti caonaika
Jeremiah33:22 Ine nkafusha nganshi abana ba mubomfi wandi Davidi
Jeremiah33:23 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti

Jeremiah48:11 Yawe aletila ati

Jeremiah48:28 “Imwe mwe bena Moabu
Jeremiah48:29 “Abena Moabu
Jeremiah48:30 Ine ne Yawe nalishiba icilumba cabo. Amataki yabo yabuwelewelefye
Jeremiah48:31 Awe kanshi ine kandelooshafye abena Moabu bonse
Jeremiah48:32 Ine nakulaloosha abena Sibuma
Jeremiah48:33 Mu calo ca mufundo ica Moabu
Jeremiah48:34 “Abena Heshiboni na bena Eleale baleloosha
Jeremiah48:35 Ine ne Yawe Lesa ndepesha abena Moabu
Jeremiah48:36 “Eico ine ndelililakofye Moabu
Jeremiah48:37 Abaume bonse nababeya inkuso ne myefu pakulanga ubulanda. Nabaitetaula bonse ku minwe
Jeremiah48:38 Pa mitenge ya mayanda yonse aya mu Moabu paleumfwikafye imisowa

Jeremiah48:40 Pantu ifi efyasosa Yawe ati

Jeremiah51:1 Yawe aletila ati
Jeremiah51:2 Nalatuma abenafyalo abakululula Babiloni
Jeremiah51:3 Mwileka abashilika ba bena Babiloni bakane mu mata yabo
Jeremiah51:4 Lekeni balaswe bafwile na mu calo cabo cine ica bena Kaludea
Jeremiah51:5 Ine ne Lesa ne Yawe umwine wa fita nshalekelesha bena Israeli na bena Yuda iyoo
Jeremiah51:6 Fulumukenimo mu Babiloni. Butukishenifye pakuti mupusuke
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloni ali ngo lukombo lwa golide ulo Yawe aikete mu minwe
Jeremiah51:8 Babiloni awafye mukwangufyanya
Jeremiah51:9 Elyo abeni abaikalamo nabo epakwasuka abati
Jeremiah51:10 Eya. Tepapa Yawe alitupokokolola. Natuleya
Jeremiah51:11 Aleni noneni imifwi
Jeremiah51:12 Peeleni icishibilo icakusansa amalinga ya musumba wa Babiloni. Fusheniko abakulinda. Bikeniko bamalonda. Pekanyeni abakubemina. Yawe nabomba ifyo apangile ukucita
Jeremiah51:13 Mu Babiloni mwaba imimana iyingi
Jeremiah51:14 Yawe umwine wa fita alilapa ati
Jeremiah51:15 Ni Yawe ewabumba icalo ku makafye yakwe
Jeremiah51:16 Eutila nga abulukuta mukupeela icebo
Jeremiah51:17 Abantu bonse bawelewele kabili tababa na mano
Jeremiah51:18 Finangwafye
Jeremiah51:19 Lesa uwaba icakaniko cakwa Yakobo ena taba ifi iyoo
Jeremiah51:20 Yawe alanda ukuti
Jeremiah51:21 Niwe nalepaminako bakabalwe
Jeremiah51:22 Niwe naleipailako abaume na banakashi bene
Jeremiah51:23 Niwe naleipailako bakacema ne mpaanga shabo shine
Jeremiah51:24 Yawe aletila ati
Jeremiah51:25 “Babiloni
Jeremiah51:26 Pa fitantala fyobe tapakabe uukabuulapo ilibwe lyakukuulila pa cifutu
Jeremiah51:27 “Peeleni icishibilo mu calo icakusanshilapo. Lisheni ipenga pakati ka mishobo imbi. Pekanyeni imishobo iyakulwa nankwe
Jeremiah51:28 Mukungule ne shamfumu sha bena Media
Jeremiah51:29 Icalo conse ciletenta ku mwenso
Jeremiah51:30 Ifita fya bena Babiloni fyaleka ukulwa inkondo
Jeremiah51:31 Uwalubilo abutuka ukufika pa walubilo munankwe
Jeremiah51:32 Nokuti abalwani nabapoka ifyabu fya pa mumana
Jeremiah51:33 Umwana mwanakashi Babiloni aba ngo mubansa wakupulilapo
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni nasantaula Yerusalemu no kumucibaula. Alipasanganya umusumba
Jeremiah51:35 “Lekeni ulukakala ulo abena Babiloni bacitile kuli ifwe lube pali bena.” Efyo basose abena Sioni. “Lekeni umulopa wesu ube pa bena Kaludea.” Efyo basose abena Yerusalemu.
Jeremiah51:36 Kanshi Yawe asosa ati
Jeremiah51:37 Elyo umusumba wa Babiloni ukasanguka icibolya
Jeremiah51:38 Abena Babiloni babuluma capamo nge nkalamo
Jeremiah51:39 Ilyo balekabila ukulya
Jeremiah51:40 Nkabasenda nga bana ba mpaanga
Jeremiah51:41 “Owe Babiloni napokwa
Jeremiah51:42 Bemba naimina Babiloni
Jeremiah51:43 Imisumba ya ku Babiloni ishele ifibolya

Jeremiah51:45 “Fulumukenimo imwe mwe bantu bandi. Butukeni bonse
Jeremiah51:46 Mwifupuka iyoo
Jeremiah51:47 Eico kanshi mwalamona ukuti inshita imo yalafika
Jeremiah51:48 Elyo fyonse ifyaba mu mulu na pano isonde fyakulayanga ne nsansa
Jeremiah51:49 “Babiloni alipaulula abantu ba pano isonde ponse
Jeremiah51:50 “Mwe bantu bandi mwe baba mu Babiloni
Jeremiah51:51 Imwe mulasosa amuti
Jeremiah51:52 “Kanshi ine ne Yawe ndesosa ukuti
Jeremiah51:53 Babiloni nangu enganina mu mulu mumbi mumbi
Jeremiah51:54 Umfweni inkuuta mu Babiloni
Jeremiah51:55 Yawe aleonaula Babiloni
Jeremiah51:56 Ifyakonaula Babiloni fili mukwisa
Jeremiah51:57 “Bacilolo ababamo ine nalabapeela ifyakuti fibakole
Jeremiah51:58 Amalinga ya Babiloni ayatikamisha yalabongoloka
Jeremiah51:59 Aya e mashiwi Yeremia kasesema akonkomeshe Seraya mwana Neriya

Jeremiah51:61 Alyebele Seraya ati
Jeremiah51:62 Elyo kabili ukakonkanyepo no kupepa auti
Jeremiah51:63 Seraya
Jeremiah51:64 ukatile nokuti
Jeremiah52:1 Sedekia ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na umo (21) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu
Jeremiah52:2 Sedekia alecita ifintu ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe
Jeremiah52:3 Ni pa mulandu wakuti Yawe alifulilwe
Jeremiah52:4 Kanshi mu mwaka walenga pabula uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Sedekia
Jeremiah52:5 Ifita fyashingulwike umusumba ukufika pa mwaka we kumi limo na umo (11) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Sedekia.
Jeremiah52:6 Pa bushiku bwalenga pabula mu mweshi walenga bune
Jeremiah52:7 Amalinga ya ku musumba epakulabongoloka. Pakumona ifi
Jeremiah52:8 Nomba ifita fya bena Kaludea fyakunkunika imfumu Sedekia
Jeremiah52:9 Fyati fikate imfumu
Jeremiah52:10 Ku Ribula kwine eko imfumu ya ku Babiloni yaipaila na bamwana Sedekia abaume
Jeremiah52:11 Elyo yatonkola Sedekia amenso
Jeremiah52:12 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo mu mweshi walenga isano
Jeremiah52:13 Kanshi Nebusaradani epakoca iŋanda yakwa Yawe
Jeremiah52:14 Ifita fyonse ifya bena Kaludea ifyali no mukalamba wa bakalinda ba mfumu batobaula na malinga ayashingulwike umusumba wa Yerusalemu.
Jeremiah52:15 Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda wa mfumu asenda muli bunkole abantu bamo abalanda na bonse abashele mu musumba
Jeremiah52:16 Lelo Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda ashako abekalacalo bamo abalanda nganshi abakuti balesunga imyangashi elyo no kulalima amabala.
Jeremiah52:17 Abena Kaludea batobaula inceshi sha mukuba
Jeremiah52:18 Kabili basenda imipika
Jeremiah52:19 Umukalamba wa bakalinda wa mfumu asendafye fyonse ifyapangilwe na golide na silifa
Jeremiah52:20 Asenda umukuba wa ku nceshi shibili
Jeremiah52:21 Inceshi shibili shalifye ishapalana
Jeremiah52:22 Pa mulu wa luceshi lumo pali umutwe wa mukuba uwalepele amakubiti yasano elyo mu mbali ya mutwe mwali umushingo uo baengelelemo amateke ukushinguluka. Uluceshi lubiye pamo na mateke yaluko fyalifye cimo cine.
Jeremiah52:23 Kwali amateke amakumi pabula na mutanda (96) ayaleselela mumbali
Jeremiah52:24 Kabili Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda asenda Seraya shimapepo mukalamba
Jeremiah52:25 Ku bashelepo mu musumba
Jeremiah52:26 Awe Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda abatwala bonse ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni iyali mu mushi wa Ribula.
Jeremiah52:27 Kulya kwine ku Ribula
Jeremiah52:28 Impendwa ya bantu abo Nebukadinesa asendele muli bunkole eiyi. Mu mwaka walengele cine lubali apo Nebukadinesa abelele pa bufumu
Jeremiah52:29 Mu mwaka walengele ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) apo Nebukadinesa abelele pa bufumu
Jeremiah52:30 Mu mwaka walengele amakumi yabili na itatu (23) apo Nebukadinesa aikalile pa bufumu
Jeremiah52:31 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na cine lubali (37) apo basendele Yehoiyakini imfumu ya bena Yuda muli bunkole
Jeremiah52:32 Efili Melodaki alemutentemba
Jeremiah52:33 Kanshi Yehoiyakini epakufula ifyakufwala fya mu cifungo
Jeremiah52:34 Inshiku shonse ukushinta napo afwilile

Ezekiel1:1 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu (30) mu mweshi walenga bune
Ezekiel1:2 Cali mu mwaka walenga isano ukufuma apo imfumu Yehoiyakini asendelwe muli bunkole
Ezekiel1:3 Kulya ku calo ca bena Kaludea ku mumana wa Keba
Ezekiel1:4 Awe nalolesha namona umwela uwacikuku ulefuma ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Namona no mwele wa nkuba wabyata mwikumbi ilikalamba nganshi. Pakati ka mulilo palemoneka icabeeka nge cela.
Ezekiel1:5 Pakati namwene pali ifyapala ifyamweo fine. Nafyo mukumoneka fyalemoneka ngo muntu.
Ezekiel1:6 Nomba fyonse cimo cimo fyali ne finso fine na mapindo yane.
Ezekiel1:7 Amolu yafiko yali ayaololoka
Ezekiel1:8 Kabili mwisamba lya mapindo yafiko mu mbali shonse shine cimo cimo calikwetemo ifisansa nge fya muntu. Ifyamweo fyonse fine fyali ne finso na mapindo.
Ezekiel1:9 Fyalisuntinkenye amapindo yafiko. Na pakwenda fyaleendelafye pamo ukwabula ukupindulukila nelyo kumo
Ezekiel1:10 Ifinso fyafiko fyalemoneka ngefi. Fyonse fine fyali ne cinso ca muntu kuntanshi
Ezekiel1:11 Ifi efyali ifinso fyafiko. Kabili fyafungulwile amapindo yafiko ukulosha mumulu. Cila cimo cali na mapindo yabili ayasuntinkene na mapindo ya camweo cibiye ku mbali shonse
Ezekiel1:12 Fyonse cimo cimo fyalungeme uko fyaloseshe amenso
Ezekiel1:13 Mu kumoneka kwa ifi fyamweo fyali kwati mulilo wa mafito uuleyaka nangu ifisaniko ifileyaka no kupitana apo fyali
Ezekiel1:14 Ifyamweo fyaleti fyaya kuntanshi fyabwelela kunuma
Ezekiel1:15 Ilyo nalolesha pa fyamweo namona umupeto nawiminina pa mushili lubali ku fyamweo
Ezekiel1:16 Ifi efyalemoneka ukupangwa kwa mipeto. Imipeto yalebengeshima nge libwe lyamutengo kirisaliti
Ezekiel1:17 Imipeto yena pakwenda kulungamafye ukuli konse mu tupinda tune ukulolele imipeto
Ezekiel1:18 Ifingolongolo fya mipeto fyali ifyasansuka nganshi kabili ifyakusungusha
Ezekiel1:19 Cilya ifyamweo fyalaenda
Ezekiel1:20 Konse uko umupashi waleya nafyo eko fyaleya
Ezekiel1:21 Lyonsefye kuti ifyamweo nga fyalaenda nayo yalaenda
Ezekiel1:22 Icayanshile pa mulu wa mitwe ya fyamweo calemoneka ngo lwelele
Ezekiel1:23 Mwisamba lya lwelele fyalifungulwile amapindo ya fiko no kusuntinkanya ku mapindo ya cinankwe
Ezekiel1:24 Ilyo ifyamweo fyaleenda
Ezekiel1:25 Elyo kwafuma ishiwi pa mulu wa lwelele ulwali pa mulu wa mitwe yafiko
Ezekiel1:26 Pa mulu wa lwelele ulwali pa mulu wa mitwe yafiko pali icintu icalemoneka nge cipuna cabufumu
Ezekiel1:27 Ine namwene icalemoneka ngo musana wakwe ukufika ku mutwe alebengeshima nge cela pakati ka mulilo
Ezekiel1:28 Ulubuuto ulwamushingulwike lwali ngo mukolamfula mu makumbi pa bushiku bwa mfula

Ezekiel4:1 “Nomba we mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel4:2 Ushingulusheko icilindi icashika pakulanga ifyo bautebelele. Uciteko ne cibumbili no kwimika inkambi shakuulwisha. Bika ne mpungu ishakulondelamo ne nsakwe
Ezekiel4:3 Buula pani ya cela uibike pakati
Ezekiel4:4 “Ale nomba lala kabafu
Ezekiel4:5 Ine nakupeela impendwa sha nshiku ukulingana ne myaka ya bubifi bwabo. Kanshi ni pa nshiku imyanda itatu na makumi pabula (390) iwe ukalaculila ububifi bwa ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli.
Ezekiel4:6 Ilyo ukapwisha
Ezekiel4:7 “Upilibwile icinso cobe ku musumba wa Yerusalemu umone ifyo bautebelele

Ezekiel4:11 Kabili pa bushiku bumo ukalanwapofye inkombo shibili isha menshi

Ezekiel5:8 Kanshi ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe asosa ati nomba kankwebelepo ukuti na ine nakusangukila Yerusalemu. Kabili ndi nokukukanda pakabalika ninshi ne mishobo ya benafyalo ilemonako.

Ezekiel5:13 “Elyo ukomfwisha apapela icipyu candi. Nkalanga ubukali bwandi ukushintafye napo cikalinga no mulandu wapwa. Ilyo ifyo fyonse fikafika

Ezekiel10:1 Ilyo ine nainwine amenso pa lwelele ulwa pa mulu wa mitwe ya bakerubi
Ezekiel10:2 Elyo Yawe aeba umuntu uwafwele insalu ishabusaka ishatelela ati
Ezekiel10:3 Nomba ilyo aleyamo
Ezekiel10:4 No bucindami bwakwa Yawe epakulafuma pa mulu wa bakerubi
Ezekiel10:5 Iciunda ca mapindo ya bakerubi naco caumfwika na ku lubansa lwa panse
Ezekiel10:6 Cilya Yawe akonkomesha umuntu uwafwele insalu ishabusaka ishatelela ukuya lapula umulilo mu mipeto iyali mwisamba lya bakerubi
Ezekiel10:7 Elyo Kerubi umo aikata pa mulilo uwali apo bali
Ezekiel10:8 Bakerubi bonse umo umo nabakwata mwisamba lya mapindo yabo ifisansa nge fya muntu.
Ezekiel10:9 Kabili nalolesha namona imipeto ine ku lubali lwa bakerubi
Ezekiel10:10 Mukumoneka imipeto yonse ine yalifye iyapalana

Ezekiel10:12 Kabili imibili yabo

Ezekiel10:14 Bakerubi bonse umo umo bali ne finso fine. Icapakubala cali nge cinso icakwa kerubi
Ezekiel10:15 Awe na bakerubi baima
Ezekiel10:16 Ilyo bakerubi baleya
Ezekiel10:17 Kumfwa bakerubi nga baiminina
Ezekiel10:18 Elyo ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bwafumina pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe
Ezekiel10:19 Ilyo ncilii ndetamba
Ezekiel10:20 Ifi e fyamweo ifyo namwene pesamba lyakwa Lesa wakwa Israeli ku mumana wa Keba. No kushininkisha nomba nashininkisha ukuti e bakerubi bene.
Ezekiel10:21 Bonse umo bali ne finso fine
Ezekiel10:22 Ifinso fyabo fyali cimo cine na filya fine namwene ku mumana wa Keba. Bonse umo baleya uko baloseshe ifinso fyabo.
Ezekiel11:1 Umupashi walinjimishe no kuntwala ku mpongolo iyabela lwa ku kabanga ka ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Kulya kwine eko nasangile nabeminina abaume amakumi yabili na basano (25)
Ezekiel11:2 Yawe nao anjeba ati
Ezekiel11:3 Bena batila abati
Ezekiel11:4 Kanshi iwe we mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel11:5 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe waikile pali ine no kwisa njeba ati
Ezekiel11:6 Imwe mwalipaulula abantu muli uno musumba
Ezekiel11:7 “Eico kanshi ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe ilesosa
Ezekiel11:8 Imwe mulatiina ulupanga
Ezekiel11:9 Nalamutamfyamo muli uno musumba
Ezekiel11:10 Balamwipaila muno mwine ku lupanga
Ezekiel11:11 Uno musumba tawabe inongo yenu iyoo nangu imwe ukuba inama muli iyi nongo. Ine nkamucitila ubupingushi mu mipaka ya calo ca Israeli.
Ezekiel11:12 Epakuti mushininkishe ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe
Ezekiel11:13 Nomba kutifye cilya ndesesema
Ezekiel11:14 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine
Ezekiel11:15 aliti
Ezekiel11:16 “Kanshi uye ulande auti
Ezekiel11:17 “Kanshi sosa auti
Ezekiel11:18 Bakabwelela muli ici calo kabili bakesa fumyamo fyonse ifyamakankamike no tulubi twamuselu.’
Ezekiel11:19 Ine nkabapeela umutima umbi uwaololoka no kubika umupashi uupya muli bena. Nkafumya muli bena umutima wa libwe no kubikamo umutima uwa munofu.
Ezekiel11:20 Lyena bakalasunga amafunde yandi
Ezekiel11:21 Nomba abantu abatemwa ukulapepa ifimpashanya ifyabunani no tulubi utwamuselu
Ezekiel11:22 Elyo bakerubi balitampile ukupupuka
Ezekiel11:23 Ubucindami bwakwa Yawe epakufumamo mu musumba
Ezekiel11:24 Kabili mu cimonwa mwine Umupashi wakwa Yawe wanjimya
Ezekiel11:25 Na ine epakulaebako bankole banandi ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe anangile.

Ezekiel12:5 Ilyo bakulatamba
Ezekiel12:6 Uleke bamoneko uko wakulaitwika icipe pa kubeya
Ezekiel12:7 Kanshi na ine epakucita ifyo Yawe ankonkomeshe. Ilyo line nalonga ifipe fyandi mu nshita ya kasuba
Ezekiel12:8 Mu nshita ya lucelo kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti
Ezekiel12:9 “We mwana wa muntu

Ezekiel16:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti
Ezekiel16:2 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel16:3 Eba Yerusalemu ukuti Imfumu Yawe alekweba ukuti iwe wafyelwe umwana mwanakashi mu calo ca Kenani. Wiso ali mwina Amoli
Ezekiel16:4 Ilyo wafyelwe
Ezekiel16:5 Takwali wakuti akulangulukileko nangu ukukukwatila uluse lwakuti akucitilepo cimo pali ifyo fintu. Ilyo wafyelwe
Ezekiel16:6 “Nomba ilyo ine napitilepo apo wali
Ezekiel16:7 Kanshi na ine epakulakukusha ngo muti uulekula no kulelema mwibala. Walikulile no kuba umukalamba uwayemba nganshi. Na mabele yobe yasuka yatuntumana
Ezekiel16:8 “Limbi ilyo napitilepo nakabili
Ezekiel16:9 “Nabuula na menshi
Ezekiel16:10 Nakufwika ne fyakufwala ifyapikulwa
Ezekiel16:11 Nakufwika ne ifisamo ifyakuiyemfya. Nabika amakosa ku maboko yobe no bulungu mu mukoshi obe.
Ezekiel16:12 Nakupeela ne cakukobeka ku myona yobe
Ezekiel16:13 Awe iwe wafwikilwe ifisamo fya golide na silifa
Ezekiel16:14 Ululumbi lwa kuyemba kobe lwasuka lwafika na ku mishobo ya benafyalo. Ukuyemba kobe kwali ukwafikapo
Ezekiel16:15 “Nomba iwe wacetekelefye mu kuyemba kobe
Ezekiel16:16 Walabuulapo insalu shobe shimo
Ezekiel16:17 Walibuula ifisamo ifyakuiyemfya ifya golide na silifa
Ezekiel16:18 Kabili walibuula insalu shobe ishapikulwa ubusaka isho ine nakupeela
Ezekiel16:19 Ine nalikupeela ifyakulya
Ezekiel16:20 “Kabili walibuula bamwano abaume na banakashi abo wamfyalila
Ezekiel16:21 ukwabula ukumbuulila abana no kubatuula nge lambo lyakoca ku tulubi?
Ezekiel16:22 Pali iyi nshita yonse iyo waikalila bucilende
Ezekiel16:23 “Washama
Ezekiel16:24 iwe walikuula incende ishasansama muli cila lubansa lwa musumba apakupepela utulubi no kulacitilapo ubucende.
Ezekiel16:25 Mu mbali ya misebo yonse walikuula incende ishasansama umo ukowesha ubusuma bobe
Ezekiel16:26 Abena mupalamano banobe abena Egupto
Ezekiel16:27 “Eico naimishe ukuboko kwandi pakuti nkukande
Ezekiel16:28 Wasukile waba cilende na bena Asiria ukwabula ukutendwa
Ezekiel16:29 Kabili wafusha bucilende bobe na bena Kaludea
Ezekiel16:30 “We wamano ayanakuka
Ezekiel16:31 Mu misebo yonse iwe wakuulilemo incende apakupepela utulubi no kulacitilapo bucilende mu ncende apasansama mu lubansa lonse lwa mu musumba. Kwena walipapusha pantu te ndalama ufwaya muli bucilende nga filya bacilende abaseeka bacita.
Ezekiel16:32 Iwe wabafye ngo mwanakashi uwasuula wiba
Ezekiel16:33 Cilende onse alalipililwapo pali bucilende bwakwe. Nomba iwe caliibela
Ezekiel16:34 Kwena iwe waliibela kuli bacilende bambi
Ezekiel16:35 “Kanshi iwe cilende umfwa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe.
Ezekiel16:36 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe
Ezekiel16:37 kanshi na ine nomba nkalonganya na bonse abatemwikwa bobe abo watemwa nabo wapata. Nkabaleta bakese kushinguluka
Ezekiel16:38 Nkakukanda ifikandwa abanakashi bacilende na basumya umulopa. Nkaleta pali iwe ubukali bwa mulopa ne cilandushi ca bukali bwandi ne ca bufuba bwandi.
Ezekiel16:39 Nkakulubwila mu minwe ya bacibusa obe
Ezekiel16:40 “Bakakwimisha ibumba lya bantu pakuti bakakupole amabwe
Ezekiel16:41 Bakoca amayanda yobe
Ezekiel16:42 Ninshi ine nomba catalala
Ezekiel16:43 Iwe walilaba ifyo ine nalekutentemba ilyo wali akaice
Ezekiel16:44 “Iwe Yerusalemu
Ezekiel16:45 Cine cine iwe we mukashana walipala noko. Noko alipata wiso
Ezekiel16:46 “Umukalamba obe nkashi mbiyo ni Samaria
Ezekiel16:47 Iwe tawapelelafye pakulabakonkelela na pakulapashanya imisango yabo iyabipisha
Ezekiel16:48 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ifyakuti
Ezekiel16:49 Kanshi ubu ebwali ububifi bwakwa nkashi nobe Sodoma. Ena na bamwane abanakashi baleitakisha pantu balikwatishe ifyakulya
Ezekiel16:50 Bali ne cilumba
Ezekiel16:51 “Ifibi ifyo Samaria alecita fyalicepapo pa fyabubifi ifyo iwe ucita. Iwe walimucila ukucita ifintu ifyabunani
Ezekiel16:52 Kanshi nomba iwe uli nokumfwa insoni. Pantu ifyabubifi fyobe fyalibipishapo pa fyabubifi fya bankashi mbiyo
Ezekiel16:53 Kabili Yawe aebele Yerusalemu ati
Ezekiel16:54 Ukalaumfwa insoni
Ezekiel16:55 Nkashi mbiyo
Ezekiel16:56 Bushe iwe tewe waleseka Sodoma lilya walecita amataki
Ezekiel16:57 ilyo ububi bobe bulya ucita bwali tabulasokoloka? Eico nomba balekuseka abana banakashi bakwa Edomu
Ezekiel16:58 Niwe wailetelela we mwine pa mulandu wa fintu ifishaibipila kabili ifyabunani ifyo iwe ucita. Efyasosa Yawe.”
Ezekiel16:59 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati
Ezekiel16:60 Nomba kwena ine nkebukisha icipangano ico napangene nobe ilyo wali umwaice

Ezekiel16:62 Nkapangana na iwe icipangano icipya

Ezekiel21:9 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel21:10 Nalunonwa pakuti luleipaya
Ezekiel21:11 “‘Ulupanga nalupeelwa ukuwamishiwa
Ezekiel21:12 Kuuta inkuuta
Ezekiel21:13 Ukweshiwa kukesa mu cinefye
Ezekiel21:14 “Kanshi nomba we mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel21:15 Epakuti imitima yabo ilekubauka ku mwenso
Ezekiel21:16 We lupanga ulwanonwa ulekoma uku noku
Ezekiel21:17 Na ine nomba nalaomba amapi
Ezekiel21:18 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti
Ezekiel21:19 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel21:20 Ushile icakulanga ulupanga inshila iyakuya lwisha ku Raba wa bena Amoni na imbi iyakuya lwisha icalo cakwa Yuda no musumba we linga uwa Yerusalemu.
Ezekiel21:21 Pantu imfumu ya ku Babiloni ikeminina pa mampatu ya musebo apakumanina imisebo ibili kukufwaya ulubuko. Ikapendula ku mifwi
Ezekiel21:22 Ala nomba imfumu yaikata ku kulyo umufwi uusontele ku Yerusalemu. Yalaya kukwimikako ifyakututawilako ilinga
Ezekiel21:23 Kuli bena cikamoneka kwati te cishinka pa mulandu wa cumfwano ico bacita. Nomba akabebukisha pa bubi bwabo no kubasenda bunkole.
Ezekiel21:24 Ifyo ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndemweba imwe nifi ukuti bumpulamafunde bwenu nabwishibikwa. Bonse nabeshiba ukuti imwe muli no mulandu. Mulalanga ububi bwenu mu fintufye fyonse ifyo imwe mucita. Namukwata umulandu
Ezekiel21:25 “Nobe we cilolo we kateeka wa calo ca Israeli
Ezekiel21:26 Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe
Ezekiel21:27 Owe we bonaushi. We bonaushi nobe. Umusumba nalaucita icibolya. Nomba mpaka akasuke akese uo nasala ukuti eo akese cibuula ngo mwine uwacishinka
Ezekiel21:28 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel21:29 Eba abena Amoni ukuti ifimonwa ifyo bamona
Ezekiel21:30 “Bwesesha ulupanga mu citubo caluko. Iwe nkakupingwila mu ncende ine umo wapangilwe
Ezekiel21:31 Ilyo nkakwimina ngo lubingu lwa mulilo
Ezekiel21:32 Iwe ukonaika ku mulilo nge nkuni. Umulopa obe ukasuumina mu calo cobe mwine
Ezekiel22:1 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti
Ezekiel22:2 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel22:3 Kabili utile
Ezekiel22:4 Umulandu wakwata wakwipaya abantu
Ezekiel22:5 Ifyalo fyamupepi ne fyakutali fyakulakupumya pa mulandu wa kuipumbusha kobe
Ezekiel22:6 “Mona ifyo aba bacilolo bonse aba bena Israeli babomfya amaka yabo pakwipaya abantu.
Ezekiel22:7 Muli iwe we musumba tamwaba nelyo umo uucindika abafyashi bakwe. Muli iwe balatitikisha na beni
Ezekiel22:8 Taucindika fintu ifyamushilo
Ezekiel22:9 Muli iwe mwaba ababukwakwa abaikalilafye ukusumya umulopa. Ni muli iwe emwaba abaliila pa mfuba sha pa mpili no kucita ifyamuselu.
Ezekiel22:10 Muli iwe bamo balasendama na bamuka bashibo. Bamo balapatikisha abanakashi pakuti basendame nabo pa nshita abo banakashi bali kumpepo.
Ezekiel22:11 Bamo balasendama na bamukabene
Ezekiel22:12 Muli iwe abantu bamo balapoka amafisakanwa pakuti basumye umulopa wa muntu. Bamo balakongwesha kaloba no kupokelapo insonsela ukucila mu cipimo ukufuma ku bena mupalamano babo. Kabili mwalindabako ine. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.

Ezekiel22:17 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti

Ezekiel22:20 Nga filya fine babika mwilungu silifa no mukuba ne cela no mutofwe ne lata kukufyengulula
Ezekiel22:21 Nkamulonganika mu Yerusalemu
Ezekiel22:22 Mukasungulukila mu Yerusalemu nga filya fine silifa asungulukila mwilungu
Ezekiel22:23 Nakabili ishiwi lyakwe lyaishile kuli ine aliti
Ezekiel22:24 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel22:25 Intungulushi shaba kwati ni nkalamo ishilebuluma pa nshita shiletakaanya inama iyo shikete. Intungulushi shilepaya abantu no kulabapoka indalama ne fyuma fyabo fyonse
Ezekiel22:26 Bashimapepo balonaula amafunde yandi
Ezekiel22:27 Abakalamba babuteeko nabo baba nge mimbulu iyiletakanya inama iyo ikete. Balepaya abantu no kusumya umulopa pakuti banonkelepo icuma.

Ezekiel30:10 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati
Ezekiel30:11 Ena akaya na bashilika bakwe abakalipisha pakuya onaula icalo. Bakaya sansa icalo ku lupanga

Ezekiel30:13 “Ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndesosa ukuti nkonaula utulubi

Ezekiel30:15 Umusumba wa Pelusiumu uwakwatisha amalinga yamaka mu Egupto
Ezekiel30:16 Nkoca icalo ca Egupto

Ezekiel30:18 Mu Tapanesi mukafiita fititi ilyo nkonaula Egupto no kumupwisha ubulamba ubo aleitakishishapo. Mukaba icikutika mu Egupto

Ezekiel30:21 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel30:22 Kanshi ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati
Ezekiel30:23 Abena Egupto nalaswa mbasalanganishishe mu mishobo na mu fyalo ifyalekana lekana.
Ezekiel30:24 Elyo nkakoshe na maboko ya mfumu ya ku Babiloni
Ezekiel30:25 Farao nkamupwisha amaka
Ezekiel30:26 Nalaswa nsalanganishishe abena Egupto mu mishobo ne fyalo fya pano isonde. Elyo nabo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’”

Ezekiel31:2 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel31:3 Mona iwe ndekupalanya ku muti wa keda uwalepesha ulya ukula mu Lebanoni
Ezekiel31:4 Amenshi eyalengele ukuti ulekula
Ezekiel31:5 Pa mulandu wakutapililwa bwino bwino
Ezekiel31:6 Fyasuka ne fyuni fya misango yonse
Ezekiel31:7 Wali umuti uwayemba ku busuma
Ezekiel31:8 Mwibala lyakwa Lesa
Ezekiel31:9 Ine nine naupulamike no kuwandalika imisambo. Ne miti yonse mu Edeni
Ezekiel31:10 “Kanshi ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati
Ezekiel31:11 Kanshi ine nomba uyo muti naupeele mu minwe ya ntungulushi iya mishobo ya benafyalo
Ezekiel31:12 na benafyalo nabo abalulunkana baliuwishishe
Ezekiel31:13 Ifyuni fyonse fikesa tongama pali uyo muti uukawa
Ezekiel31:14 Eico kanshi ukutula pali nomba
Ezekiel31:15 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati
Ezekiel31:16 Nalengele imishobo yonse ukuti itutume ku ciunda ca kuwa kwauko ilyo nauposele ku calo ca bafwa pamo nabo abaya ku nindi. Elyo imiti yonse iya mu Edeni
Ezekiel31:17 Ikaya nankwe ku calo ca bafwa kukwikala pamo na bafwa kale

Ezekiel32:1 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12)
Ezekiel32:2 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel32:3 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati
Ezekiel32:4 Nkakufuntwila na pa mulundu
Ezekiel32:5 Icitumbi cobe nkacisalanganya pa mpili
Ezekiel32:6 Umulopa obe ukakumana pa calo
Ezekiel32:7 Ilyo nkakonaula
Ezekiel32:8 Nkashimya ifyengelo fyonsefye ifya mu mulu
Ezekiel32:9 “Abantu ba mishobo iyingi bakalasakamana ilyo umulandu wakonaika kobe nkausalanganishisha mu fyalo
Ezekiel32:10 Ifyo iwe nkakucita
Ezekiel32:11 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati
Ezekiel32:12 Nkaleka abashilika ba mishobo ikali ababula uluse bakepaye ku lupanga ibumba ilikalamba ilya bantu bobe. Bakapwisha icilumba ca calo ca Egupto
Ezekiel32:13 Nkalofya ne fitekwa fyaciko ifyaba mu lulamba lwa mimana yaciko. Takwakashale bantu abakufundaula amenshi nakabili
Ezekiel32:14 Nkaleka amenshi yaciko yakaleikala
Ezekiel32:15 Ilyo icalo ca Egupto nkacisangula amatololo
Ezekiel32:16 “Ala aya mashiwi ndebasoka yakasanguka ulwimbo lwa pa ndosha. Abanakashi ba mishobo ya benafyalo bakalalwimba pakuloosha icalo ca Egupto
Ezekiel32:17 Mu mwaka uwalengele ikumi limo na ibili (12)
Ezekiel32:18 “We mwana wa muntu
Ezekiel32:19 Elyo uye beba auti
Ezekiel32:20 “Bakawila pamo na bantu abakafwila mu nkondo. Moneni ulupanga nalupambulwa ulwakwipailako Egupto na bantu bonse abashaifulila.
Ezekiel32:21 Kanshi ukufuma ku calo cabafwa impalume shonse isha fita shikalanda palwa bena Egupto pamo na balebafwako abati
Ezekiel32:22 “Asiria ulya ali palya
Ezekiel32:23 ne nindi shabo shibikwa pa ncende iyashika iya ku calo ca bafwa. Abashilika bakwe bonse bafwilile mu nkondo
Ezekiel32:24 “Elamu ulya ali palya
Ezekiel32:25 Balipangile Elamu ubusanshi pakati ka bafwile mu nkondo
Ezekiel32:26 “Mesheki Tubali nao ali palya pakati ka nindi sha bashilika bakwe. Balya bonse bantu abashasembululwa
Ezekiel32:27 Bushe bena tabalala apalala ababulwi abashasembululwa
Ezekiel32:28 “Eico na iwe wine Farao
Ezekiel32:29 “Edomu nao ali kulya pamo ne shamfumu shakwe na bacilolo bakwe bonse. Bali abashilika abapambana
Ezekiel32:30 “Intungulushi shonse isha ku kapinda ka ku kuso nasho shili kulya kwine
Ezekiel32:31 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. Ilyo Farao imfumu ya Egupto akabamona bonse
Ezekiel32:32 Nangu ena namubomfeshe mukusalanganya umwenso mu calo ca bamweo lelo Farao ne fita fyakwe fyonse bali nokuya lala pamo na bashasembulwa abafwile ku nkondo.” Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.

Ezekiel39:21 “Abantu ba mishobo nkabalanga ifyo ine nacindama

Ezekiel40:1 Ilyo twali muli bunkole
Ezekiel40:2 Mu cimonwa mwine Lesa antwala mu calo ca Israeli
Ezekiel40:3 Nao Lesa eko antwala
Ezekiel40:4 Elyo uyo muntu alanjeba ati
Ezekiel40:5 Ico ine namweneko
Ezekiel40:6 Elyo kabili alungama ku mpongolo iyabelele ku kabanga. Anina amatabo
Ezekiel40:7 Umuputule onse uwa bamalonda wali itete limo mubutali elyo ne tete limo mukucilinganya. Pakati ka miputule palepele amakubiti yasano. Umwinshi wa mpongolo uwabelele ukwakwingilila ukulungatana ne Tempele mupepi no muputule wa pa mwinshi wali itete limo.
Ezekiel40:8 Awe uyo muntu alapima uyo muputule uwapalamishe kwi Tempele
Ezekiel40:9 asanga ukuti wali amakubiti cine konse konse
Ezekiel40:10 Kwaliko miputule iya bamalonda itatu iyali konse konse lubali lwa nshila
Ezekiel40:11 Kabinge uyo muntu apima inshila mubufumo
Ezekiel40:12 Pa miputule yonse iya bamalonda pali lwapantanshi utumalinga utwipi utwalepele kubiti umo. Iyo miputule iya bamalonda
Ezekiel40:13 Elyo kabili uyo muntu apima ifyo palepele ukufuma kunuma ya muputule umo
Ezekiel40:14 Kabili apimine ifibumba fya muputule wakwingililapo ukushinguluka mukati
Ezekiel40:15 Ukutula lwapanse pa mpongolo iyakwingililapo ukuya shinta na pa mpela ya muputule wa pa mwinshi
Ezekiel40:16 Mu miputule ya bamalonda yonse pamo ne fibumba fyonse mwali insolokoto kunse na mukati pamo na mu muputule wa pa mwinshi. Pa fibumba fyamukati ifyalungatene ne nshila
Ezekiel40:17 Uyo muntu kabili antwala mu lubansa lwakunse. Mwali imiputule amakumi yatatu (30) iyakuulilwe ukusuntinkana ne cibumba icashingulwike ulubansa
Ezekiel40:18 Aya mabwe ayapapatala yalambatikwe ku fibumba fyonse uku noku ukufika ku mpongolo iyali iyalinganaa mubutali na mulufumo. Ulo lubansa lwabelele lwa panshi.
Ezekiel40:19 Uyo muntu apimine ubutali bwa lubansa ukufuma ku mpongolo ya pesamba no kufika lwakunse ku lubansa lwamukati
Ezekiel40:20 Elyo kabili apimine ubutali na mu bwipi bwa mpongolo iya ku kapinda ka ku kuso
Ezekiel40:21 Yali ne miputule itatu itatu iya bamalonda iyali ku mbali shonse ishaba malonda. Ifibumba pamo no muputule wa pa mwinshi fyali ifyalingana ne mpongolo yapakubala iyali ku kabanga. Mu butali bwafiko fyonse fyali amakubiti amakumi yasano (50)
Ezekiel40:22 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi
Ezekiel40:23 Ukufuma ku mwinshi wa mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso
Ezekiel40:24 Kabili alintwele lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Ezekiel40:25 Mu miputule wa pa mwinshi uwa pali iyo mpongolo mwali insolokoto nga shilya shine shali mu miputule iya pa mpongolo shimbi. Ubutali bwa nshila bwali amakubiti amakumi yasano (50)
Ezekiel40:26 Palipo na matabo cine lubali ayakunininapo pakuya ku mpongolo
Ezekiel40:27 Nako kwine kwaliko ne mpongolo iyakupitilapo pakuya mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati iyabelele ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Awe nao alapima ifyo palepele ukufuma ku mpongolo imo ukuya shinta na ku ibiye iyakunse iyabelele lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Ezekiel40:28 Kabili alimpishishe pa mpongolo iya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Ezekiel40:29 Ne miputule ya bamalonda
Ezekiel40:30 Imiputule ya pa mwinshi iyashingulwike ulubansa lwamukati ka mpongolo yali amakubiti amakumi yabili (25) mubutali
Ezekiel40:31 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi walungatene no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse. Palilengelwe no tuncindu pa fibumba fyamukati ifyalungatene ne nshila. Palipo na matabo cine konse konse ayakunininapo pakuya kuli iyo mpongolo.
Ezekiel40:32 Kabili alimpishishe pa mpongolo ya ku kabanga
Ezekiel40:33 Ne miputule iya bamalonda
Ezekiel40:34 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi walungatene no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse. Palilengelwe no tuncindu pa fibumba fyamukati fyonse fibili
Ezekiel40:35 Kabili antwele ku mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Awe alapima ne mpongolo
Ezekiel40:36 Nako kwine kwali imiputule iya bamalonda
Ezekiel40:37 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi wa mpongolo walungatene no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse. Pa fibumba fyamukati fyonse fibili palilengelwe utuncindu. Palipo na matabo cine konse konse ayakunininapo pakuya kuli iyo mpongolo.
Ezekiel40:38 Mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse
Ezekiel40:39 Mu muputule wa pa mwinshi mwali amatebulo yane
Ezekiel40:40 Lwa ku cibumba ca panse ica muputule wa pa mwinshi napo pali amatebulo yane
Ezekiel40:41 Kanshi mukati ka muputule mwali amatebulo yane
Ezekiel40:42 Amatebulo yane ayo balepekanishishapo amalambo ayakoca
Ezekiel40:43 Kwali ne finkobwe ifyalepele nge cisansa ca lupi
Ezekiel40:44 Kunse ya mpongolo yamukati
Ezekiel40:45 Elyo uyo muntu alanjeba ukuti uyu muputule uuloseshe ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Ezekiel40:46 na ulya uloseshe ku kapinda ka ku kuso
Ezekiel40:47 Elyo apimine ulubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati
Ezekiel40:48 Elyo kabili anyingisha mu muputule uwakwingililamo pakuya mwi Tempele. Awe alapima na pa bwingililo
Ezekiel40:49 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi wali mubutali amakubiti amakumi yabili (20)
Ezekiel41:1 Kabili antwala mu muputule uwamushilo uwakunse
Ezekiel41:2 apakwingilila pali amakubiti ikumi limo mubufumo
Ezekiel41:3 Elyo aya mu muputule uwamushilo uwamukati alapima ne nceshi sha fibumba
Ezekiel41:4 Apima no muputule wamushilo uwamukati
Ezekiel41:5 Kabili apimine umutika wa cibumba cakunse ice Tempele
Ezekiel41:6 Imiputule yali ya ntunti shitatu
Ezekiel41:7 Utu tumiputule twali utukuluko pa ntunti ya pamulu ukucila iya panshi. Kanshi icikulwa conse ukushinguluka Itempele cakuulilwe mu musango uwakuti imiputule ya pa ntunti ya pamulu yalikulileko nga mwaninika ukuya pa ntunti ya pamulu. Balikuulileko na matabo ukufuma panshi
Ezekiel41:8 Ine nalimweneko ne cibumbili icashingulwike Itempele. Casanseme itete limo
Ezekiel41:9 Icibumba cakunse ica uto tumiputule cali no mutika ukulingana pa makubiti yasano. Kwaliko ne ncende imo iyishalipo kantu
Ezekiel41:10 ubukulu bwaiko bwali amakubiti amakumi yabili (20). Iyo ncende yabelele pakati ka cibumbili na mayanda ayo bashimapepo balebomfya.
Ezekiel41:11 Kwaliko ne minshi iyakwingililapo pakuya mu miputule ukufuma pa ncende iyishalipo kantu
Ezekiel41:12 Kwaliko ne ŋanda imo iyalungatene ne Tempele lubali lwa ku masamba. Mubukulu yali amakubiti amakumi cine lubali (70)
Ezekiel41:13 Uyo muntu alipimine Itempele lwakunse
Ezekiel41:14 Ukutula pa mpela ya lubansa
Ezekiel41:15 Uyo muntu alipimine ubutali bwa ŋanda iyalungatene no lubansa lwa kunuma ye Tempele
Ezekiel41:16 fyena fyonse fyapampaminwemo imbao panshi na ku fibumba
Ezekiel41:17 Pa ncende iyali pamulu lwapanse apakwingilila mu muputule wamushilo uwamukati
Ezekiel41:18 palilengelwe bakerubi no tuncindu. Paleti apa ni Kerubi
Ezekiel41:19 Icinso ca muntu caloleshe lwa ku kancindu ku lubali lumo
Ezekiel41:20 ukutampila panshi ukuya shinta na pafikile ifiibi
Ezekiel41:21 Amaingwe ya fiibi ifya muputule wakunse uwamushilo yalepele mubutali
Ezekiel41:22 Palipo no bulambo ubwa fimuti. Nabo bwalepele amakubiti yatatu ukufuma panshi
Ezekiel41:23 Apakwingilila ukuya mu muputule uwakunse uwamushilo pali ifiibi fibili
Ezekiel41:24 Ifyo fiibi fyali ifyaminkubili
Ezekiel41:25 Pa fiibi fya muputule wakunse uwamushilo palengelwe bakerubi no tuncindu
Ezekiel41:26 Mu mbali ya uyo muputule wa pa mwinshi mwali insolokoto
Ezekiel42:1 Uyo muntu alintwele lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse
Ezekiel42:2 Iŋanda ya iyi miputule mubutali yali amakubiti umwanda umo (100)
Ezekiel42:3 Lubali lumo yalungatene no lubansa ulwalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20)
Ezekiel42:4 Ku ntanshi ya miputule kwali inshila imo iyakupitamo
Ezekiel42:5 Imiputule pa ntunti ya pamulu
Ezekiel42:6 Imiputule ya pa ntunti yabutatu tayatungililwe ne nceshi nga mayanda yambi
Ezekiel42:7 Ku ŋanda ine kwali na kalilinga kamo akalungatene ne miputule
Ezekiel42:8 no mutande wa miputule ya panshi nao walepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50). Lelo umutande wa miputule uwali ku lubali lwa muputule wamushilo walepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100).
Ezekiel42:9 Ku mpela ya ŋanda lubali lwa ku kabanga
Ezekiel42:10 Lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ake Tempele
Ezekiel42:11 Pa ntanshi ya miputule palipo inshila imo iyakupitamo
Ezekiel42:12 Ifyali iminshi yauko
Ezekiel42:13 Elyo uyo muntu alanjeba ati
Ezekiel42:14 Ilyo bashimapepo baingila mukubomba mu cifulo camushilo

Ezekiel48:33 “Ku kapinda ka ku kulyo akalepele amakubiti amakana yane ne myanda isano (4
Ezekiel48:34 “Elyo ku kapinda ka ku masamba akalepele amakubiti amakana yane ne myanda isano (4
Ezekiel48:35 “Ubutali ubwakushinguluka umusumba bukaba amakubiti amakana ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18
Daniel1:1 Mu mwaka wabutatu ilintu imfumu Yehoyakimu yaleteeka icalo ca bena Yuda
Daniel1:2 Imfumu Lesa alekele Nebukadinesa acimfye Yehoyakimu no kusende fipe fimo ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Kabili asendele bankole no kubatwala ku Babilonia
Daniel1:3 Elyo imfumu Nebukadinesa yakonkomeshe Ashipenasi
Daniel1:4 Abo balumendo balingile ukuba abayemba pa finso
Daniel1:5 Kabili imfumu yakonkomesha nokuti abo balumendo balepeelwako icakulya pamo no mwangashi ukufuma kwitebulo lya mfumu cila bushiku. Elyo nga bapwa ukusambilila pa myaka itatu
Daniel1:6 Pa balumendo abasalilwe pali Daniele
Daniel1:7 Mushika mukalamba ena abenike amashina yambi. Daniele ainikwe Beliteshasa
Daniel1:8 Daniele ena asalilepo ukukanaikowesha ku cakulya pamo no mwangashi wa kwisano
Daniel1:9 Nomba Lesa alenga Ashipenasi
Daniel1:10 Lelo uyu mushika aebele Daniele ati
Daniel1:11 Kanshi Daniele epakuya kuli kalinda untu Ashipenasi asontele ukulasunga Daniele
Daniel1:12 “Napapata ifwe fwe babomfi bobe utweshe pa nshiku ikumi limo. Uletupeelakofye umusalu nge cakulya elyo na menshi nge cakunwa.
Daniel1:13 Panuma ukalinganye imimonekele yesu ne ya balumendo abakulalya no kunwa ifya kwisano
Daniel1:14 Kalinda alisumine ukubesha pa nshiku ikumi limo.
Daniel1:15 Panuma ya nshiku ikumi limo imibili yabo yali iyalelema kabili balemoneka abaina ukucila na banabo abalelya ifya kwisano.
Daniel1:16 Kanshi kalinda epakufumyapo ifyakulya ifisuma no mwangashi ifyapeelwe kuli bena
Daniel1:17 Nomba Lesa apeele aba balumendo amano yakwishiba ifintu
Daniel1:18 Panuma ya myaka itatu iyapiminwe ukulingana ne cipope ca mfumu
Daniel1:19 Ilintu imfumu yapwile ukulanda na balumendo bonse yamwene ukuti Daniele
Daniel1:20 Mu milandu yonse iyakuma ku mano na kukwishiba ifyo imfumu yalebepusha calemoneka ukuti aba balumendo bane bali abacenjela ukucila abantu bonse abalecita ifyakupendula pamo na bacita fyakusobela mu calo conse ico yaleteeka.
Daniel1:21 Daniele ena alitwalilile ukwikala kwisano ukushinta na mu mwaka Sairasi atendeke ukuteeka.
Daniel2:1 Mu mwaka wabubili uwa kuteeka kwakwe
Daniel2:2 Elyo imfumu yatumine abakufwaya abantu abapendula
Daniel2:3 Elyo imfumu yabeba aiti
Daniel2:4 Elyo Abena Kaludea abamano bayasuka imfumu mu lulimi lwa Ciaramaiki ati
Daniel2:5 Elyo imfumu yaasuka abena Kaludea abamano aiti
Daniel2:6 Lelo nga cakuti mwanjeba iciloto cine no kushimbula umo cilolele
Daniel2:7 Nabo bayasuka imfumu nakabili abati
Daniel2:8 Imfumu epakwasuka aiti
Daniel2:9 Nga mwafilwa ukunjeba iciloto ninshi palifye ubupingushi bumo pali imwe. Namusuminishanya ukunjeba amashiwi yabucenjeshi na yabufi pakuti muleke inshita ipite. Aleni njebeni iciloto elyo nalaishiba ukuti kanshi kuti mwalondolola na muntu cilolele.”
Daniel2:10 Abena Kaludea abamano baebele imfumu abati
Daniel2:11 Umulandu untu uleipusha mulopwe nawafya
Daniel2:12 Pakumfwa ifi
Daniel2:13 Kanshi epakutuma icipope icakwipaya abamano bonse
Daniel2:14 Ilintu Alioki mushika wa fita fya mfumu alepekanya ukwima ukuya aleipaya abamano mu Babiloni
Daniel2:15 Aipwishe mushika ati
Daniel2:16 Elyo Daniele aile ku mfumu no kulomba inshita pakuti alondolole iciloto caiko.
Daniel2:17 Daniele abwelele ku ŋanda kumwakwe no kulondolola umulandu ku banankwe Hanania
Daniel2:18 Abacincishe ukupapata ukuti Lesa wa ku mulu abacitile inkumbu pa mulandu wa cipeshamano ici kukuleka bena pamo na bamano mu Babiloni beipaiwa.
Daniel2:19 Pali ubo bwine bushiku pa nshita ya bushiku iciloto calisokolwelwe kuli Daniele mu cimonwa. Elyo Daniele alumbenye Lesa wa ku mulu ati
Daniel2:20 “Ishina lyakwa Lesa lipaalwe pe na pe
Daniel2:21 Eupilibula inshita pamo ne myaka
Daniel2:22 Ni Lesa eusokolola ifyaba umwashika ne nkaama shine
Daniel2:23 Nakutotela kabili nakulumbanya we Lesa wa fikolwe fyandi
Daniel2:24 Daniele aile kuli Alioki untu imfumu yasontele ukwipaya abamano aba mu musumba wa Babiloni
Daniel2:25 Awe Alioki atwele Daniele ku mfumu no kuyeba ati
Daniel2:26 Imfumu yaipwishe Daniele (uwaishibikwe nga Beliteshasa) aiti
Daniel2:27 Daniele nao ayaswike ati
Daniel2:28 Lelo eko aba Lesa mu mulu uusokolola ifyankaama. Uyu wine eulekusokolwela ifyalaswa ficitike
Daniel2:29 “Ilintu mwali mu tulo
Daniel2:30 Ici cimonwa tacisokolwelwe kuli ine pa mulandu wakuti nalicila bonse abamano
Daniel2:31 “Mulopwe ilyo walele walotele icimpashanya ca muntu uushaikulila kabili icabeka nganshi naciminina ku cinso cobe. Cali icakutiinya mukumoneka.
Daniel2:32 Umutwe waciko wali uwa golide wine wine
Daniel2:33 Amolu yaciko yali aya cela
Daniel2:34 Ilintu wali ulelolekesha
Daniel2:35 Icela
Daniel2:36 “Ifi efyali ciloto cintu mulopwe walotele nomba twalashimbula umo cilolele.
Daniel2:37 Kanabesa iwe niwe imfumu iyacila ishamfumu shonse. Lesa wa ku mulu alikupeela ubufumu
Daniel2:38 Kabili alikupeela bukateeka pa bantu bonse ne nama sha mpanga ne fyuni fya mu lwelele. Konse uko fikala alifipeela mu maboko yobe ukuti uleba kateeka wafiko. Icilepilibula ukuti niwe mutwe wa golide.
Daniel2:39 “Panuma ya bufumu bobe pakakonka ubufumu bwacibili ubwacepako. Elyo kabili pakakonke ubufumu bwalenga citatu ubwa mukuba ubukateeke sonde lyonse.
Daniel2:40 Elyo pakese ubufumu bumbi ubwabune ubwakosa pamo nge cela. Nga filya fine icela citobaula no konaula ifintu fimbi efyo ubu bufumu bukesa onaula ubufumu bonse ubwantanshi.
Daniel2:41 Nga filya fine wamwene mu ciloto amakasa ne fikondo fyali fya cela icasakaniwa ne bumba efyo ubo bufumu bukaba ubwapatukana.
Daniel2:42 Pamo nga fintu wamwene ifikondo fyali ifya cela icasakaniwa ne bumba
Daniel2:43 Elyo kabili fintu wamwene
Daniel2:44 “Mu nshita ilyo isho shine imfumu shikalateeka
Daniel2:45 Filya wamwene icimokolwa ca cilibwe ukufuma pa lupili ukwabula umuntu wacimokwele
Daniel2:46 Elyo Nebukadinesa awile panshi mukutotela Daniele. Akonkomesha ukuti batuule umutuulo kuli Daniele no kumufutumwina ububani.
Daniel2:47 Elyo imfumu Nebukadinesa yatile kuli Daniele
Daniel2:48 Elyo imfumu yalashike Daniele pa bufumu no kumutuula ifyabupe fingi. Yamucitile ukuba umulashi mukalamba mu citungu conse ica Babiloni kabili kangalila wa bamano bonse aba ku Babiloni.
Daniel2:49 Nomba Nebukadinesa acitile Shadiraki
Daniel3:1 Imfumu Nebukadinesa yapangishe icimpashanya kuli golide icali amakubiti amakumi mutanda (60) mumulu
Daniel3:2 Elyo imfumu Nebukadinesa yakonkomeshe bonse abali pali bukateeka bwa fitungu
Daniel3:3 Ecalengele ukuti abali pali bukateeka bwa fitungu
Daniel3:4 Elyo kabilisha wa mafunde abilikisha ukuti
Daniel3:5 Nga cakuti mwaumfwa amapenga
Daniel3:6 Kumfwa umuntu onse uwakaana ukuwa panshi kukucishinshimuna
Daniel3:7 Ecalengele ukuti pa nshita ilya ine baumfwile amapenga
Daniel3:8 Abena Kaludea bamo bamo abali pali bukateeka bwa calo basebele Abayuda.
Daniel3:9 Batile ku mfumu Nebukadinesa
Daniel3:10 Walipeela icipope we mfumu

Daniel3:13 Ilintu Nebukadinesa aumfwile
Daniel3:14 Elyo Nebukadinesa abepwishe ati
Daniel3:15 Ukufuma lelo nga cakuti mwaumfwa amapenga
Daniel3:16 Shadiraki
Daniel3:17 Nga cakuti twaposwa mwilungu lya mulilo
Daniel3:18 Nelyofye Lesa wesu tatupuswishe

Daniel3:20 no kweba bamo pa mpalume sha bashilika bakwe ukukaka Shadiraki
Daniel3:21 Elyo abashilika bakakile abo balumendo ninshi nabafwala insalu
Daniel3:22 Pa mulandu wa cebo ca mfumu
Daniel3:23 Na aba balumendo batatu baponene mwilungu lya mulilo ninshi nabakakwa.
Daniel3:24 Elyo Nebukadinesa imfumu acilimwike no kupapa
Daniel3:25 Kabili atile

Daniel3:27 kabili bamushika
Daniel3:28 Elyo Nebukadinesa alandile ati
Daniel3:29 “Eico nabika icipope icakuti abantu aba luko ululi lonse pamo no lulimi ululi lonse abalepontela Lesa wakwa Shadiraki
Daniel3:30 Awe imfumu yapeela Shadiraki
Daniel4:1 Imfumu Nebukadinesa yatumine amashiwi ku bantu aba mishobo yonse abalanda indimi shalekana lekana aiti
Daniel4:2 “Ndi ne nsansa pakumwishibishako ifipapwa pamo ne fipeshamano ifyo Lesa uwapulamo ancitila.
Daniel4:3 “We fishibilo ulakula
Daniel4:4 “Ine ne mfumu Nebukadinesa nali mu ŋanda yandi iye sano
Daniel4:5 Nalilotele iciloto icandetele umwenso. Ilyo nasendeme pa busanshi bwandi
Daniel4:6 Ecalengele ukuti mpeele icipope icakuti bonse abamano mu Babiloni bese banondolwele umwalolele iciloto.
Daniel4:7 Ilyo abapendula na abacita ifyakusobela pamo na bamalele na bena Kaludea abamano nabebele iciloto candi nabo balifililwe ukucilondolola.
Daniel4:8 Kumfwa ilintu Daniele
Daniel4:9 “Natile
Daniel4:10 “Ifi e fimonwa ifyo namwene lintu nalele pa musengele wandi
Daniel4:11 Ici cimuti calekula no kukosa mpaka cafika mu lwelele
Daniel4:12 Amabula yaciko yali ayalelema
Daniel4:13 “Mu cimonwa
Daniel4:14 Abilikishe ne shiwi ilikalamba ati
Daniel4:15 Lelo lekeni icishiki icashingulukwa ne cela pamo no mukuba cishale mu cani ca mu mpanga
Daniel4:16 Lekeni amano yakwe yapilibuke ukufuma ku mano ya buntu kabili apeelwe amano ya bunama pa myaka cine lubali.
Daniel4:17 Efyo fwe bamalaika twaputula umulandu pakuti abamweo beshibe ukuti Uwapulamo ateeka pa bufumu bwa bantu kabili abupeela kubo atemenwe kabili alalashikapo na bacepeshapo.’
Daniel4:18 “Ici e ciloto ico ine ne mfumu Nebukadinesa ndotele. Nomba Beliteshasa nondolwela muntu cilolele pantu tapali nelyo umo pa bantu ba mu bufumu bwandi uwinganondolwela. Lelo iwe kuti walondolola ico umupashi wa milungu iyamushilo waba muli iwe.”
Daniel4:19 Pakubala Daniele uwaleitwa Beliteshasa alisungwike icakuti afilwa ukulanda
Daniel4:20 Icimuti mwacimona
Daniel4:21 na mabula ayalelema kabili ne fisabo ifingi ifyakwafwilisha ifyamweo fyonse
Daniel4:22 nimwe mwe mfumu! Ubucindami bwenu mwe mfumu nabukula no kukosa
Daniel4:23 Mwe mfumu mwamwene malaika wamushilo alefuma ku mulu aletila
Daniel4:24 “Ubu e bupilibulo bwa ciloto mwe mfumu. Uwapulamo eupingwile ukuti ici ciponene pali shikulu wandi imfumu
Daniel4:25 mukatamfiwa ukufuma ku bantu no kuya ikala ne nama sha mpanga. Mukalalya icani nge ŋombe no kubomfiwa ku mume wa mu mulu. Imyaka cine lubali ikapita mpaka mukasumine ukuti Uwapulamo ewateeka pa bufumu bwa bantu kabili abupeela ku muntu atemenwe.
Daniel4:26 Icebo cakusha icishiki ca cimuti ne mishila yaciko
Daniel4:27 Ecalenga mwe mfumu konkeni amano aya ndemupandako. Yebeleleni imembu shenu ukupitila mukucita ubulungami
Daniel4:28 Fyonse ifi fyalifikilishiwe ku mfumu Nebukadinesa.
Daniel4:29 Panuma ya myeshi ikumi limo na ibili (12)
Daniel4:30 yatile
Daniel4:31 Kutifye talapwa na kulanda
Daniel4:32 Walatamfiwa ukufuma ku bantu bobe no kuya ikala ne nama sha mpanga wakulalya icani nge ŋombe. Imyaka cine lubali ikapita mpaka ukasumine ukuti Uwapulamo ewateeka pa bufumu bwa bantu kabili abupeela ku muntu atemenwe.”
Daniel4:33 Apopene conse icasoselwe kuli Nebukadinesa cafikilishiwe. Alitamfiwe ukufuma ku bantu kabili alelya icani nge ŋombe. Umubili wakwe walebomfiwa ku mume wa mu mulu mpaka ubupipi bwakulile kwati masako ya kapumpe
Daniel4:34 “Ilintu inshita yafikile
Daniel4:35 Abantu bonse aba pano isonde tababa nangu cimo. Abombela umo alefwaila ku fita fya mu mulu
Daniel4:36 “Pa nshita ilya ine amano yandi yalibwelele
Daniel4:37 Nomba ine ne Nebukadinesa ndalumbanya no kutasha pamo no kutatakula Imfumu ya ku mulu pantu fyonse ifyo acita fyalilungama
Daniel5:1 Ilintu imfumu Belishasa aleteeka
Daniel5:2 Pa nshita Belishasa acili alenwa
Daniel5:3 Elyo baletele inkombo sha golide ne sha silifa ishafumine mwi Tempele
Daniel5:4 Ilyo balenwa umwangashi batashishe ne milungu yabo iya golide
Daniel5:5 Ilya ine nshita kwamoneke icisansa ca muntu cilelemba pa cibumba apalungatene na pa ncende apo inyali yalesanika mwisano ninshi imfumu ilemona icisansa cilelemba.
Daniel5:6 Icinso ca mfumu caliwile na matontonkanyo yasalangana ne mfyufyu sha mu musana shalasokona na makufi yalapumana.
Daniel5:7 Elyo imfumu yabilikishe pakwita abacita ifyakusobela na bamalele pamo na bapendula abena Kaludea no kutila kuli bena
Daniel5:8 Abamano bonse aba mfumu balishile lelo balifililwe ukubelenga ifilembo pa cibumba nelyo ukulondolwela imfumu umo fyalolele.
Daniel5:9 Umwenso waikete imfumu ne cinso caiko cawile ukucilamo
Daniel5:10 Ilintu namfumu aumfwile amashiwi ya mfumu pamo na bacindami bakwe
Daniel5:11 Eko aba umuntu mu bufumu bobe uwakwata umupashi wa milungu iyamushilo. Mu nshita ya bawiso asangilwe ukukwata ubwishibilo no kucenjela pamo na mano ayapalana na mano ya milungu. Imfumu Nebukadinesa pali ilya nshita yamucitile ukuba umukalamba pa bantu abacita ifyakusobela na malele pamo ne fyakubuka na bena Kaludea abamano.
Daniel5:12 Uyo muntu Daniele
Daniel5:13 Ecalenga Daniele alitilwe ku cinso ca mfumu
Daniel5:14 Niŋumfwa ukuti umupashi wa milungu iyamushilo waba muli iwe kabili walikwata ubwishibilo
Daniel5:15 Abamano pamo na bacita ifyakusobela baciletwa pakuti babelenge filembo no kunjeba umo fyalola
Daniel5:16 Nomba niŋumfwa ukuti iwe kuti walondolola umo filolele no kupwisha ubwafya. Nga cakuti wabelenga ifi filembo pamo no kunjeba umo filolele
Daniel5:17 Elyo Daniele ayaswike imfumu ati
Daniel5:18 “Mwe mfumu
Daniel5:19 Pa mulandu wa bukateeka apeelwe
Daniel5:20 Lelo ilintu umutima wakwe waishile ba uwaumalala ku mulandu wa cilumba
Daniel5:21 Lesa alimutamfishe ukufuma pa bantu no kumupeela amano ya nama
Daniel5:22 “Lelo imwe
Daniel5:23 Namusuula Imfumu ya mu mulu ico mwabuulile ifipe fya mwi Tempele lyakwe
Daniel5:24 Ecilengele atume icisansa icacilalemba ifilembo.
Daniel5:25 “Ifi e filembo ifilembelwe: “MENE
Daniel5:26 “Nomu emo filolele. MENE ni mpendwa
Daniel5:27 TEKELE cipimo
Daniel5:28 PARISINI ciputulwa
Daniel5:29 Pali ilya ine nshita Belishasa akonkomeshe ukuti Daniele afwikwe ilaya ilyakashikila no munyololo wa golide mu mukoshi wakwe no kumupeela bukateeka bwacitatu mu bufumu.
Daniel5:30 Ubushiku bwine bulya Belishasa imfumu ya bena Kaludea alipaiwe
Daniel5:31 kabili Dariusi umwina Media ewapokele ubufumu ninshi ali ne myaka amakumi mutanda na ibili (62).
Daniel6:1 Calisansamwishe Dariusi ukusonta abalashi umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120) abakumwafwako ukuteeka mu bufumu.
Daniel6:2 Abasontela bakangalila batatu
Daniel6:3 Elyo Daniele uyu aba uwaishibikwa ku mfumu ukucila bakangalila banankwe pamo na balashi bonse
Daniel6:4 Elyo bakangalila pamo na balashi balafwailisha umulandu wakuti bafyengeleshe Daniele mu mibombele yakwe iyabukangalila
Daniel6:5 Elyo batendeke ukwebana abati
Daniel6:6 Eico bakangalila na balashi baile nge bumba ku mfumu no kutila
Daniel6:7 Bakangalila ba mfumu
Daniel6:8 Nomba
Daniel6:9 Elyo imfumu Dariusi yalembele no kufwatikapo pa cipope ico.
Daniel6:10 Ilintu Daniele aumfwile ukuti imfumu naikakatika ici cipope
Daniel6:11 Aba bantu baile pamo nge bumba no kusanga Daniele alepepa ukwipusha Lesa ukumwafwa.
Daniel6:12 Elyo baile ku mfumu no kutila kuli yena palwa cipope caiko abati
Daniel6:13 Elyo batile ku mfumu
Daniel6:14 Ilintu imfumu yaumfwile
Daniel6:15 Aba bantu epakuya nge bumba ku mfumu no kuya landa abati
Daniel6:16 Ecalenga imfumu yapeela icipope icakuti Daniele bamulete no kumuposa mu cilindi ca nkalamo. Elyo imfumu yasosa kuli Daniele aiti
Daniel6:17 Awe baleta icilibwe no kucilika pa mwinshi wa cilindi ca nkalamo. Elyo imfumu yaumapo inshimbi yakwe elyo ne sha bacilolo wakwe pakuti kwiba umuntu umo uwingalula nangu cimo pa mulandu wakwa Daniele.
Daniel6:18 Elyo imfumu yabwelele kwisano no kwikala ukwabula ukulya kabili tayalele tulo.
Daniel6:19 Ku maca ya bushiku bwakonkelepo
Daniel6:20 Cilyafye yapalamina ku cilindi ca nkalamo umwali Daniele yalimwitile mwishiwi lya cililishi aiti
Daniel6:21 Daniele alyaswike ati
Daniel6:22 Lesa wandi acituma malaika kukwisala utunwa twa nkalamo
Daniel6:23 Imfumu yali no buseko apakalamba kabili yaebele ukuti Daniele bamufumye mu cilindi ca nkalamo. Ilintu Daniele bamufumishe mu cilindi ca nkalamo
Daniel6:24 Kabili imfumu yasosele ukuti balya abasebelele Daniele no kumubepesha
Daniel6:25 Elyo imfumu Dariusi yalembele ku bantu bonse pamo ne mishobo yonse na bantu ba ndimi shonse isha pano calo ponse aiti
Daniel6:26 “Nacite cipope icakuti
Daniel6:27 Alapokolola kabili alapususha
Daniel6:28 Elyo Daniele ali uwashuka mu nshita Dariusi aleteeka pamo na mu nshita Sairasi umwina Pesia aleteeka.
Daniel7:1 Mu mwaka wantanshi ilintu Belishasa imfumu ya Babiloni aleteeka
Daniel7:2 Daniele atile
Daniel7:3 Namwene ifinama fine ifyapusana cimo ne cinankwe filefuma muli bemba.
Daniel7:4 “Icantanshi calemoneka nge nkalamo kabili cakwete amapindo nga kapumpe. Ilintu ncili ndelolesha
Daniel7:5 “Kabili ku cinso candi kwamoneke cinama cabubili icapalile bea balicimishe lubali lumo
Daniel7:6 “Kabili namwene cinama na cimbi icalemoneka nge mbwili. Panuma yaciko cakwete amapindo yane ayapalile aya cuni. Ici cinama cakwete imitwe ine kabili calipeelwe amaka yakuteeka.
Daniel7:7 “Panuma ya ifi
Daniel7:8 Ilintu ncili ndelolesha no kutontonkanya pa nsengo
Daniel7:9 “Kabili namwene ifipuna fyabufumu
Daniel7:10 Umulonga wa mulilo walepita ukufuma kuli ena. Abakumubombela balipo amakana na makana. Abaleiminina pa cinso cakwe bali amakana ikumi ukufushiwa na makana ikumi. Awe icilye calitendeke kabili ne fitabo fyalikupukwilwe.
Daniel7:11 “Ilintu natwalilile ukulolesha
Daniel7:12 Ifinama fimbi fyalipokelwe amaka no kusuminishiwa ukuba no mweo pa nshita iyalinga.
Daniel7:13 “Mu cimonwa candi ubushiku namwenemo uwapala umwana wa muntu aleisa na makumbi ya mu mulu. Afikile ku Wakale nakale kabili balimupalamike napo ali.
Daniel7:14 Apeelwe amaka
Daniel7:15 “Ine ne Daniele umutima wandi walisakamene pantu ifimonwa ifyali mu matontonkanyo yandi fyalinsakamike.
Daniel7:16 Nasukile naipusha umo pa bantu abaimininepo ukuti anondolwele umo iciloto calolele. Elyo anjebele umo iciloto calolele.
Daniel7:17 Atile
Daniel7:18 Abamushilo bakwa Lesa uwapulamo ebakapeelwa ubufumu kabili ebakalateeka pe na pe.’
Daniel7:19 “Nomba nalefwaisha ukwishiba bwino pa mulandu wa cinama icabune icapusene ku fibiye
Daniel7:20 Kabili nalefwaya ukwishiba bwino pa mulandu wa nsengo ikumi limo pamo pene na kalusengo akanono akamoneke apafumine insengo shitatu. Aka kalusengo akanono kakwete amenso na kanwa akalelanda ifyamataki.
Daniel7:21 Pa nshita nalelolesha
Daniel7:22 Elyo Uwakale nakale aishile peela ubupingushi no kupeela abamushilo ba wapulamo insambu ninshi inshita yakuti bakwate ubufumu naifika.
Daniel7:23 “Pa mulandu wa cinama cabune atile
Daniel7:24 Insengo ikumi limo shaimininako imfumu ikumi limo ishikema muli ubu bufumu
Daniel7:25 no kupontela Uwapulamo pamo no kucusha abamushilo bakwe pakuti ikapilibule inshita ishaimikwa. Ikanyantaula abamushilo pa mwaka umo
Daniel7:26 Lelo ilintu icilye cikekala
Daniel7:27 Elyo ubuteeko
Daniel7:28 “Umu emwalola ciloto. Ine ne Daniele nalisakamikwe apakalamba mu matontonkanyo yandi icakuti ne cinso caliwile
Daniel8:1 Mu mwaka uwalenga butatu ilintu Belishasa imfumu yaleteeka

Daniel8:10 Kalikulile icakuti kaile sansa ne fita fya mu mulu. Kaliponeshe ifita fimo ne ntanda shimo panshi elyo kafinyantaula.

Daniel8:18 Pa nshita alesosa ifi
Daniel8:19 Atile

Daniel9:4 Napepele kuli Yawe Lesa wandi no kuyebelela nati
Daniel9:5 “Twalibembuka kabili twalibifya. Tuli babifi kabili twalikusangukila no kusuula amafunde yobe pamo ne fipope fyobe.
Daniel9:6 Tatwaba na cumfwila ku babomfi bobe bakasesema abasosele mwishina lyobe ku mfumu shesu na kuli bacilolo besu na kuli bashifwe pamo na ku bantu bonse aba mu calo.
Daniel9:7 We mfumu uli mulungami
Daniel9:8 We Yawe
Daniel9:9 We mfumu Lesa wesu waba uwankumbu kabili uwelela nangu twakusangukila.
Daniel9:10 Tatunakila Yawe Lesa wesu nelyo ukusunga amafunde atupeele ukupitila mu babomfi bakwe bakasesema.
Daniel9:11 “Israeli onse alipula mu fipope fyobe no kwalukako pakukaana ukunakila ishiwi lyobe. E mulandu wine ifitipu pamo ne milapo ifyalembwa mu mafunde yakwa Mose umubomfi wakwa Lesa fyalipongolwela pali ifwe
Daniel9:12 Walicita ifintu watupingile pamo ne ntungulushi shesu ishitutungulula. Walileta ishamo pali ifwe pamo na pa musumba wa Yerusalemu icakuti pano isonde tapaba umusumba uwashama nga Yerusalemu.
Daniel9:13 Ishamo lyonse ilyalembwa mu mafunde yakwa Mose lyaba pali ifwe

Daniel11:10 “Abana ba mfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso bakapekanya ibumba ilikalamba ilya fita no kubusha inkondo. Bakalulunkana nge lyeshi ilyamaka mpaka ukufika na kwilinga lya balwani.
Daniel11:11 Elyo imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ikafulwa
Daniel11:12 Iyo mfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ikalaitakisha pa mulandu wakucimfya ifita ifishaifulila
Daniel11:13 Pantu imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ikabwelela mu calo caiko
Daniel11:14 “Pa nshita ilya abantu abengi bakasangukila imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Na mu mushobo obe wine iwe Daniele
Daniel11:15 Kanshi imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ikaya shinga umusumba we linga
Daniel11:16 Uukaya basansa akabacita ifyo alefwaya
Daniel11:17 Imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ikapekanya ifita fyaiko fyonse pakuyapoka icalo conse ica mfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Nomba ikatala ikapande amano ayakumfwaninamo neyo mfumu. Ikatala ikatumine imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo mwane umwanakashi uwakuti ikope
Daniel11:18 Elyo kabinge ikapilibukila mu lulamba lwa bemba na mu fishi mwine
Daniel11:19 Elyo iyo mfumu ikabwelela ku calo caiko
Daniel11:20 “Pa malo yaiko pakesa imfumu imbi. Yena ikatuma kasonkesha wamusonko pakuti ifyuma fyaiko fifulishe. Nomba pakapitafye akashita kanono ninshi akonaulwa
Daniel11:21 “Imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso iyikakonkapo yena ikaba imfumu iyibi
Daniel11:22 Ifita ifikaicilima ikafipasanganya
Daniel11:23 Nangu iyo mfumu ikateekafye akamushobo ka bantu akanono
Daniel11:24 Mukupumikisha ikasansa icitungu cimo icikankala nganshi ica mu calo
Daniel11:25 “Ikapama ukwimya ibumba ilikalamba ilya fita pakuya lwisha imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo
Daniel11:26 Abalya ne mfumu ifya kwisano ebakayonaula. Ibumba lyonse ilya fita fyaiko likapashika
Daniel11:27 Elyo isho imfumu shibili shikalila petebulo limo
Daniel11:28 Imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ikabwelelamo ku calo caiko
Daniel11:29 “Limbi kuntanshi ikabwelelako nakabili kukuya sansa icalo ca ku kapinda ka ku kulyo

Daniel11:33 Abamano ba muli abo bantu
Daniel11:34 Ilyo bakacula
Daniel11:35 Abamano bamo bamo bakaipununa no kuwa
Daniel11:36 “Imfumu ikalacitilafye umo ilefwaila. Ikalaitakisha no kuisansabalika ukuti yena yalicila pa milungu yonse
Daniel11:37 Iyo mfumu yena ikasuulilapo ne milungu ya fikolwe fyaiko
Daniel11:38 Pa malo ya iyo milungu
Daniel11:39 Abenafyalo abakalapepa uyo mulungu

Obadiah1:1 Icimonwa cakwa Obadia. Ifi efyasosa Yawe palwa bena Edomu. Yawe atumine inkombe yakwe mu mishobo ya bantu
Obadiah1:2 Yawe asosa kuli Edomu aleti
Obadiah1:3 Icilumba ca mu mutima obe calakubepa
Obadiah1:4 Nangu wingalelemba mumulu apatali kwati ni kapumpe
Obadiah1:5 “Bushe te busanso ububi bwakwishila? Nga cakuti abapupu balekwishila
Obadiah1:6 Lelo we Esau bali nokukushafye nakalya nakalya
Obadiah1:7 Bonse abo waleumfwana nabo balekutamfisha ku mupaka
Obadiah1:8 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati
Obadiah1:9 Impalume sha mu Temani shili nokutiina
Obadiah1:10 “Pantu iwe walefyenga no kwipaya bamunonko abena Yakobo
Obadiah1:11 Pali bulya bushiku iwe waleloleshakofye
Obadiah1:12 Iwe nga tawalesansamuka ilyo bamunonko baleshama. Iwe nga tawaleanga ilyo abena Yuda baleonaika
Obadiah1:13 Iwe nga tawaingile mu musumba wa bantu bandi
Obadiah1:14 Iwe nga tawalelolela pa masansa ya nshila
Obadiah1:15 “Ubushiku bwakwa Yawe buli mupepi
Obadiah1:16 Nga filya fine wanwene pa lupili lwandi ulwamushilo
Obadiah1:17 “Lelo pa lupili lwa Sioni pakaba bamo abakapusuka
Obadiah1:18 Iŋanda yakwa Yakobo ikaba mulilo uoca
Obadiah1:19 “Abena Israeli aba mu matololo ya Negebu bakapoka ulupili lwakwa Esau. Na ba mwishika lya mpili sha Yuda nabo bakapoka icalo ca Bafilisiti. Bakapoka icalo ca Efulemu ne calo ca Samaria
Obadiah1:20 Ifita fya bena Israeli ifyaba muli bunkole fikapoka icalo ca Kenani ukuya fikafye na ku Salefati. Na bena Yerusalemu abali muli bunkole mu Sefaradi bakapoka imisumba ya mu matololo ya Negebu.
Obadiah1:21 Abena Israeli abacimfya bakanina ulupili lwa Sioni pakuteeka ulupili lwakwa Esau. No bufumu bukaba bwakwa Yawe.”
Jonah1:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yona mwana Amitai aliti
Jonah1:2 “Ima kabiye ku Ninife kuli ulya musumba ukalamba
Jonah1:3 Lelo Yona apanga ukufyukila ku Tashishi pakufulumuka Yawe. Aima
Jonah1:4 Lelo Yawe aimya umwela uukali nganshi pali bemba
Jonah1:5 Bacoba wa bwato umwenso wabekata
Jonah1:6 Mushika wa bwato aya mweba ati
Jonah1:7 Elyo bacoba balaebana abati
Jonah1:8 Elyo bamwipusha abati
Jonah1:9 Nao abasuka ati
Jonah1:10 Awe bacoba umwenso wabekata nganshi pali aya mashiwi
Jonah1:11 Elyo bamwipwishe abati
Jonah1:12 Nao epakubasuka ati
Jonah1:13 Bacoba ba bwato baesha na maka nganshi ukuti bafishe ubwato ku mulundu
Jonah1:14 Epakulakuuta kuli Yawe abati
Jonah1:15 Ne cacine epakwikata Yona bamuposa na muli bemba
Jonah1:16 Awe bacoba ba bwato pakumona ica uyu musango
Jonah1:17 Yawe epakuteyanya icisabi icikalamba icakumina Yona. Na Yona apwile inshiku shitatu akasuba no bushiku mu nda ya cisabi.
Jonah2:1 Elyo Yona apepele kuli Yawe Lesa wakwe ilyo ali mu nda ya cisabi ati
Jonah2:2 “Mu kupelelwa kwandi nalilile kuli Yawe
Jonah2:3 Pantu wamposele muli bemba uwashika
Jonah2:4 Na ine epakutila
Jonah2:5 Amenshi nayanjibisha

Micah1:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Mika
Micah1:2 Umfweni kuno imwe mwe bantu ba mitundu yonse. Kutikeni imwe bonse mwe baikala pano isonde. Lekeni Imfumu Yawe amushinine imwe. Umfweni Imfumu iyilelanda ukufuma mwi Tempele lyaiko ilyamushilo.

Nahum1:7 Yawe

Habakkuk2:8 Imwe mwalitapa ifintu fya bantu ba mishobo iyingi

Habakkuk2:11 Na mabwe yene ayo bakuulila amayanda yakalamulilila imisowa
Habakkuk2:12 Mwalishama imwe mwe bakuulila umusumba mukusumya umulopa
Habakkuk2:13 Bushe te Yawe umwine wa fita uwapingula ukuti ukucucutika kwa bantu ba mishobo imbi kukonaikilafye mu mulilo? Nokuti abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo babombela icafye?

Habakkuk2:15 Mwashama imwe mwe banwesha abanenu ifikola
Habakkuk2:16 Kuntanshi nimwe nomba mukasebaninapo
Habakkuk2:17 Ubuluku mwacitile mu Lebanoni
Habakkuk2:18 Nga kalubi nako ka mulimo nshi? Kantufye akapangwa no muntu
Habakkuk2:19 Mwalishama imwe mwe balaeba icimuti icabaswafye amuti
Habakkuk2:20 Nomba Yawe wena aba mwi Tempele lyakwe ilyamushilo. Abantu bonse aba pano isonde nabaleikala tondolo pa cinso cakwe.

Haggai1:1 Pa bushiku ubwakutampa umweshi uwalenga mutanda
Haggai1:2 Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati
Haggai1:3 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Hagai aliti
Haggai1:4 “Bushe ino ni nshita iyakuti imwe muleikala mu mayanda ayakuulwa ubusaka
Haggai1:5 Eico kanshi Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati
Haggai1:6 Mutila mwatanda imbuto ishingi elyo mwalobololamofye tunono. Mulakwata icakulya nomba tacifikapo icakuti muleikuta. Mulakwata umwangashi uwakunwa nomba taufikapo ukupwisha icilaka. Mulafwala ifyakufwala nomba tafifikapo icakuti filemukafya imibili. Kabili uubombela amalipilo
Haggai1:7 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita alesosa aleti
Haggai1:8 Aleni kanshi nomba imeni
Haggai1:9 Imwe mwalesubila ukulalobolola ifisabo ifingi
Haggai1:10 E mulandu wine imyulu ileseshe imfula ukuloka
Haggai1:11 Nine naleta icilala pa calo
Haggai1:12 Serubabeli mwana Shealitieli
Haggai1:13 Elyo Hagai inkombe yakwa Yawe aeba abantu amashiwi yakwa Yawe ayakutila
Haggai1:14 Yawe epakwimya umutima wakwa Serubabeli mwana Shealitieli

Haggai2:1 Pa bushiku bwalengele amakumi yabili na bumo (21)
Haggai2:2 “Eba Serubabeli mwana Shealitieli
Haggai2:3 ‘Bushe apo muli
Haggai2:4 Lelo kwena iwe Serubabeli kosa
Haggai2:5 Ilyo mwafumine mu calo ca Egupto
Haggai2:6 Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati
Haggai2:7 Ninshi ine napukanya na bantu ba mishobo yonse ne fisuma fyabo fyonse fikesa kuno nkese isusha ne ŋanda iyo ine ifyuma pa. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.
Haggai2:8 Silifa yandi na golide wine wandi. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.
Haggai2:9 Iyi ŋanda yandi iyipya ikacindama ukucila iyakale. Emo ine nkalapeela abantu bandi ishuko no mutende. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.”
Haggai2:10 Pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shine (24)
Haggai2:11 Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati
Haggai2:12 Umuntu umo nga abuulapo umupusa wa nama pa nama iyamushilo iyo batuulile ilambo
Haggai2:13 Elyo Hagai abepusha ati
Haggai2:14 Elyo Hagai abeba ati
Haggai2:15 “Ala muletontonkanyapo bwino pa fintu ukufuma lelo no kuya kuntanshi. Tontonkanyeni ilyo mushilatampa kukuula Itempele lyandi
Haggai2:16 Umuntu nga aya pa mwina wa ŋanu uwa fipimo amakumi yabili (20)
Haggai2:17 Ala nine Yawe nalemonawila fyonse ifyo mwaleesha ukulima
Haggai2:18 Nomba pali buno bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shine (24)

Zechariah14:4 Pali bulya ubushiku lyena akeminina pa lupili lwa Miolifa
Zechariah14:5 Pakupusuka imwe mukapita muli uyo wine umukonko uukashinta ku lubali lwa Aseli. Mukafulumuka nga filya fine ifikolwe fyenu fyafulumwike ilyo kwaishile icinkukuma pa nshita imfumu Usia yaleteeka icalo ca Yuda. Elyo Yawe Lesa wandi akesa moneka pamo na bamushilo bakwe bonse.

Zechariah14:7 Kukabafye ulubuuto lwa kasuba inshita yonse

Zechariah14:12 Abantu ba mishobo yonse abalwishishe umusumba wa Yerusalemu
Zechariah14:13 Iyo nshita Yawe akapelenganya amano ya bantu abakalwisha Yerusalemu. Bakalaba no mwenso icakuti bonse umo umo bakalaikatanapo no munabo umo
Zechariah14:14 Abena Yuda nabo bakaiposamo no kuya lwa ku Yerusalemu. Ifyuma fya bantu ba iyo mishobo iyashinguluka yonse
Zechariah14:15 Ico cine cikuko ecikalaipaya na bakabalwe
Zechariah14:16 Ilyo abalwani bakacimba

Zechariah14:18 Abena Egupto nga balakaana ukulaisako no kubuulamo ulubali ninshi nabo bene bakaponenwa ne cikuko
Zechariah14:19 Efyo abena Egupto bakalalimunwa pamo na bantu ba mishobo imbi yonse abakalakaana ukulaya kukusefya inshikunkulu ya Nsakwe.
Zechariah14:20 Pali bulya ubushiku pa tunyenjele uto bakabalwe bakalafwala
Zechariah14:21 Inongo shonse isha mu musumba wa Yerusalemu
Malachi1:1 Aya e mashiwi yakwa Yawe ayo atumine Malaki ukuya eba abena Israeli.
Malachi1:2 Yawe alesosa ati
Malachi1:3 lelo Esau ena nalimupata. Icalo ca mpili icakwa Esau ine naliconaula
Malachi1:4 Abena Edomu
Malachi1:5 Ico cintu mukalacimona na menso yenu
Malachi1:6 Imwe bashimapepo
Malachi1:7 “Ukunsuula kwenu nico pa bulambo bwandi imwe mutuulapo ifyakulya ifyakowela. Lelo kabili mulanjipusha amuti
Malachi1:8 Ilyo imwe muleta inama iyapofula pakwisa ituula ilambo kuli ine
Malachi1:9 Eico nomba papateni pakuti Lesa atubeleleko uluse. Pantu nga mwaisa ne mituulo ya musango uyu mu maboko yenu
Malachi1:10 Yawe umwine wa fita aleti
Malachi1:11 Ishina lyandi lili nokucindikwa mu mishobo yonse
Malachi1:12 Lelo imwe mulalisuula pakusosa ukuti itebulo lyandi lyalikowela kabili tamucindika ne cakulya ico imwe mutuulapo.
Malachi1:13 Mulasosa amuti
Malachi1:14 Ashama umuntu utila pakuntuula ilambo aisa ne nama iyalemana
Malachi2:1 Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita alanda ati
Malachi2:2 Nga mwalakaana ukuŋumfwa kabili nga mwakaana ukulacindika ishina lyandi mu mitima yenu
Malachi2:3 “Moneni
Malachi2:4 Elyo mukashininkisha ukuti nine nakonkomesha aya mashiwi
Malachi2:5 Ilyo ine napangene na Levi icipangano candi
Malachi2:6 Talefunda fyabufi iyoo
Malachi2:7 “Pantu shimapepo ewaba no mulimo wakulanga abantu amano yene yene ayakunjishiba ine ne Lesa. Abantu bali nokulaya kuli shimapepo pakuya mukulasambililako ifyo ine mfwaya
Malachi2:8 Nomba imwe mwe bashimapepo
Malachi2:9 Kanshi nomba na ine nalaleka abantu bonse bamusuule kabili mube abafye
Malachi2:10 Bushe ifwe bonse tatwaba na Shifwe umo wine? Bushe te Lesa umofye mpo uwatubumba? Nga nomba mulandu nshi tushumfwanina
Malachi2:11 Mwamona
Malachi2:12 Umuntu onse uucita ica musango uyu
Malachi2:13 Kabili na cimbi ico imwe mucita
Malachi2:14 No kwipusha mulepusha amuti
Malachi2:15 Bushe te Lesa amucitile umubili umo no mweo umo pamo pene nabo? Ngeco afwaya bushe cinshi? Ala ni pakuti tulekwata abana abakuba icine cine abantu bakwa Lesa. Kanshi muleisunga mu mitima yenu
Malachi2:16 Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli alesosa ati
Malachi2:17 Imilandile yenu imwe naitendusha Yawe. Lelo imwe muleipusha amuti
Malachi3:1 Yawe umwine wa fita alesosa ati
Malachi3:2 Elyo nomba bushe nani akesa shanshako mu bushiku akafika? Nani akapusuka ilyo akesa moneka? Pantu ena akesa ba ngo mulilo wa mwilungu umo bengulwila ifyela
Malachi3:3 Akesa mukulalubulwisha ngo muntu uuleengulula no kuwaminisha silifa. Akesa wamya bamwana Levi nga filya fine bawaminisha silifa na golide. Elyo nabo nomba bakalatuula Yawe imituulo iya mu bololoke.
Malachi3:4 Imituulo iyo abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu bakalatuula Yawe
Malachi3:5 Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati
Malachi3:6 Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati
Malachi3:7 Ukufuma ku nshita ya fikolwe fyenu
Malachi3:8 Eico na ine ndemwipusha nati
Malachi3:9 Mwashama imwe bonsefye
Malachi3:10 Akuleteni ku ŋanda yandi umutuulo uutuntulu uwa capekumi
Malachi3:11 Nshaleleka makanta ukuti alemonawila ifisabo iyoo
Malachi3:12 “Elyo na bantu ba mishobo yonse bakulatilafye
Malachi3:13 Yawe aletila ati
Malachi3:14 Nico imwe mutila amuti
Malachi3:15 Ukulingana nefyo ifwe tumona
Malachi3:16 Elyo abantu abakwatile Yawe akatiina balasoshanya
Malachi3:17 Elyo Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati
Malachi3:18 Elintu nakabili mukashininkisha ifyo abantu abololoke baibela ku bantu ababifi

Malachi4:2 Nomba imwe mwe bacindika ishina lyandi
Malachi4:3 Pali ubo bushiku ilyo nkacita ifi fintu
Malachi4:4 “Kanshi imwe muleibukishafye amafunde ya mubomfi wandi Mose
Malachi4:5 “Moneni ilyo ubo bushiku bukalamba kabili ubwakutiina ubwakwa Yawe bushilati bufike
Malachi4:6 Kabili akesa pilibwila imitima ya bashibo ku bana babo

Matthew1:25 Nomba tabakumenepo mpaka Maria apaapa umwana umwaume. Yosefu nao amwinika ne shina lya Yesu.

Matthew3:1 Mu nshiku shilya elyo Yoani Kabatisha aishile mu matololo ya Yudeya alebila ati
Matthew3:2 “Lapileni no kupilibuka

Matthew3:4 Yoani alefwala insalu ishapikulwa na masako ya ngamila. Alekaka umushipi wa mpapa mu musana. Kabili ifilyo alelya ni makanta no buci bwa mu mpanga.
Matthew3:5 Elyo abantu ukufuma mu Yerusalemu na mu Yudeya monse na mu calofye conse ica Yordani balaisa uko ali.

Matthew3:11 Ine ndemubatishisha ku menshi pakulanga ukuti namulapila no kupilibuka. Nomba uukankonka panuma
Matthew3:12 Ali no lupe lwakwelelako mu minwe yakwe. Akafumya imisungu pa lubansa. Akatutila iŋanu mu butala bwakwe. Imisungu yena akayoca mu mulilo uushishima!”
