Matthew10:1 Awe Yesu aitile abasole bakwe ikumi limo na babili. Abapeela na maka yakutamfya imipashi yakowela na yakuposha amalwele yonse ne ntenda shonse.
Matthew10:2 Aya e mashina ya basole ikumi limo na babili. Umutanshi ni Simoni
Matthew10:3 Filipo na Batolomeo
Matthew10:4 Simoni uwa mwibumba lya Baselote na Yuda wa ku Kelyoti uwaposele Yesu ku balwani.
Matthew10:5 Yesu elyo atuma abasole ikumi limo na babili
Matthew10:6 Lelo mulungamefye ku mpaanga ishaluba isha mu bena Israeli!
Matthew10:7 Ilyo muleya
Matthew10:8 Muleposha abalwele
Matthew10:9 Pa lwendo mwilasenda ndalama
Matthew10:10 Mwilasenda nelyo cola nangu imingila ibili
Matthew10:11 “Kabili mu musumba uo mwaingilamo nangu umushi
Matthew10:12 Ilyo mwaingila mu ŋanda
Matthew10:13 Muli iyo ŋanda nga bamupokelela bwino
Matthew10:14 Kabinge onse uwakaana ukumusekelela
Matthew10:15 Ndemweba icine cine
Matthew10:16 “Moneni namutuma nge mpaanga pakati ka mimbulu. Kanshi muleba abacenjela nge nsoka
Matthew10:17 Mulecenjela ku bantu
Matthew10:18 Kabili bakamutwala ku balashi na kuli bashamfumu pa mulandu wa ine
Matthew10:19 Nomba ilyo bakalamutwalako
Matthew10:20 Pantu teimwe mukalalanda
Matthew10:21 “Munyina akepaisha munyina
Matthew10:22 Abantu bonse bakamupata pa mulandu wa ine
Matthew10:23 Nga balamucusha mu musumba umo
Matthew10:24 “Umusambi tacila kafundisha wakwe
Matthew10:25 Kuti calingafye umusambi ukuba nga kafundisha wakwe
Matthew10:26 “Kanshi mwilatiina aba bantu. Pantu takwaba nangu cimo icabelama
Matthew10:27 Ifyo ndemweba mu mfifi
Matthew10:28 Kabili mwilatiina abepaya umubili
Matthew10:29 Bushe tuncelelya tubili tatushitwa pa ndalama imo? Nomba pali uto tapaba nelyo kamo kaponena panshi ukwabula ukuti Shinwe eshibe.
Matthew10:30 Elyo ne mishishi ya ku mitwe yenu ine
Matthew10:31 Eico mwilaba na mwenso
Matthew10:32 “Umuntu onse uushitiina kunumbula pa bantu ukuti muntu wandi
Matthew10:33 Lelo uyo onse uukankaana pa bantu
Matthew10:34 “Mwilatila ine naisa pano calo kukuletapo icibote. Awe iyoo
Matthew10:35 Pantu naisa kukulwikanya umwana umwaume na wishi
Matthew10:36 Eico umuntu
Matthew10:37 “Uwatemwa wishi nelyo nyina ukucila ine talingile ukuba musambi wandi. Elyo no watemwa mwane umwaume nangu umwanakashi ukucila ine
Matthew10:38 Na onse uushisenda musalaba wakwe no kulankonka

Matthew18:2 Yesu epakwita akaice kamo
Matthew18:3 Elyo alabeba ati

Matthew18:8 “Nga cakuti icisansa cobe nangu ulukasa lobe efyakulengesha ukubifya
Matthew18:9 Ilinso lyobe nga elyakulengesha ukubifya

Matthew18:11 
Matthew18:12 “Bushe imwe kuti mwatilapo shani? Umuntu nga cakuti alikwata impaanga umwanda umo (100)
Matthew18:13 Ndemweba icine cine
Matthew18:14 Eifyo fine na Shinwe wa mulu tafwaya ukuti palubepo kamo pali utu utwaice.
Matthew18:15 “Munonko nga akulufyanya uye mweba icilubo cakwe uko muli babili mwekafye. Nga akumfwa ninshi mwawikishanya na munonko.

Matthew18:17 Nga cakuti akaana ukubatesha nabo
Matthew18:18 “Ndemweba icine cine
Matthew18:19 “Kabili ndemweba nati
Matthew18:20 Pantu uko babili nangu batatu balongana pa mulandu wa ine
Matthew18:21 Elyo Petelo aishile kuli Yesu
Matthew18:22 Yesu amwasuka ati
Matthew18:23 Eico Ubufumu bwa mu mulu kuti twabupashanya ku mfumu iyalefwaya ukwishiba ifyo abasha baiko babomfeshe indalama shaiko.
Matthew18:24 Kuti cilya yatampa ukupitulukamo
Matthew18:25 Nomba ico uyu musha ashikwete ifyakuti afutilepo
Matthew18:26 Awe umusha amufukamina
Matthew18:27 Awe imfumu yamulangulukila
Matthew18:28 Nomba uyu musha ashifumapofye
Matthew18:29 Umusha mubiye amufukamina alamupapata ati
Matthew18:30 Lelo wena akaana ukusumina. Amuposa mu cifungo
Matthew18:31 Abasha banankwe pakumona ifyacitika
Matthew18:32 Imfumu yabo epakwita ulya musha kumwakwe. Yamweba aiti
Matthew18:33 Bushe na iwe tawaciba nakubelela umusha mubiyo uluse
Matthew18:34 Awe imfumu yafulwa nganshi. Yamuposa mu cifungo umo bali nokumucusha mpaka akabweshe inkongole shakwe shonse.
Matthew18:35 Efyo na imwe Tata wa mu mulu akamucita kumfwa nga tamulebeleshanya uluse ne mitima yenu yonse.”

Matthew19:2 Amabumba ya bantu ayakalamba yamukonka

Matthew19:8 Yesu abasuka ati

Matthew19:10 Elyo abasambi bamweba abati
Matthew19:11 Yesu abasuka ati

Matthew19:14 Yesu ena asosa ati

Matthew19:21 Yesu amwasuka ati

Matthew20:1 “Ubufumu bwa mu mulu bwaba ngo mwine ibala
Matthew20:2 Baumfwana na bancito ukubalipila amalipilo ya pa bushiku bumo. Elyo abatuma na kwibala lyakwe ilya myangashi.
Matthew20:3 Kabili cilya akasuba kasansama
Matthew20:4 Nabo abeba ati
Matthew20:5 Awe nabo eko baya. Kabili cilya akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe
Matthew20:6 Cilya akasuba kaya kukuwa
Matthew20:7 Bamwasuka abati
Matthew20:8 “Cilya kwaba icungulo
Matthew20:9 Abacingila incito cilya akasuba kaba kukuwa
Matthew20:10 Abacibalilapo ukwingila incito nabo baisa. Balesubila ukulipilwa ukucilapo. Nomba nabo balipilwafye amalipilo ya pa bushiku bumo.
Matthew20:11 Cilya balipilwa balailishanya ku mwine ibala lya myangashi abati
Matthew20:12 ‘Abo aba pakulekelesha ababombafye insa imo

Matthew27:47 Elyo abantu bamo abaiminine mupepi baumfwa ifi

Matthew27:52 Amabwe ya pa nindi yaisuka
Matthew27:53 Bafuma na mu nindi. Nomba panuma ya kushukuka kwakwa Yesu

Matthew27:61 Maria Mandalena
Matthew27:62 Ilyo bwaisaca
Matthew27:63 Balamweba abati

Matthew28:1 Ilyo ubushiku bwe Sabata bwapitile
Matthew28:2 Awe apopene icinkukuma icikalamba capita. Malaika wa Mfumu aika ukufuma ku mulu
Matthew28:3 Pa menso yakwe palebengeshima ngo mwele wa mfula
Matthew28:4 Abalelonda umwenso wabekata
Matthew28:5 Malaika alaeba abanakashi ati
Matthew28:6 Ala talimo muno
Matthew28:7 Kanshi kabiyeni muye eba abasambi bakwe amuti
Matthew28:8 Awe abanakashi bafuma bwangu bwangu ku nindi nabasansamuka
Matthew28:9 Awe apopene Yesu abakumanya abaposha ati
Matthew28:10 Elyo Yesu abeba ati
Matthew28:11 Ilyo abanakashi baleya ku basambi
Matthew28:12 Bashimapepo bacindami balongana na bakalamba pakuti bomfwane ifyakucita. Awe bapeela abalelonda inindi indalama ishingi.
Matthew28:13 Babeba abati
Matthew28:14 Nangu nga cakuti umulashi aumfwako uyu mulandu
Matthew28:15 Awe nabo abalelonda bapoka indalama
Matthew28:16 Elyo abasambi ikumi limo na umo baile ku Galile
Matthew28:17 Cilya bamumona
Matthew28:18 Elyo Yesu apalama
Matthew28:19 Kanshi kabiyeni muleyalula abantu ba mishobo yonse pakuti babe abasambi bandi. Mulebabatisha mwishina lyakwa Tata ne lya Mwana ne lyakwa Mupashi Wamushilo.
Matthew28:20 Mulebafunda ukulakonka fyonse ifyo namukonkomesha. Kabili nakulaba na imwe lyonse mpakafye na ku kupwa kwa calo.”

Mark1:23 Nomba mu sinagoga

Mark8:23 Yesu aikata impofu pa kuboko
Mark8:24 Umuntu ainuna amenso ati

Mark8:26 Yesu epakumweba ati

Mark16:2 Kanshi lucelocelofye ubushiku bwakutampa umulungu baya ku nindi ninshi elyofye akasuba katula.

Mark16:4 Nomba bati baloleshe
Mark16:5 Cilya baingila mu nindi
Mark16:6 Nao abeba ati

Mark16:8 Awe abanakashi bafuma mu nindi
Mark16:9 [Lucelocelo ubushiku bwakutampa umulungu ilyo Yesu abuukile ku bafwa
Mark16:10 Nao epakuya shimikilako abo Yesu aleenda nabo abaleloosha no kulila.
Mark16:11 Nomba bena nangu baumfwile kuli Maria Mandalena ukuti Yesu nakabili ali umumi elyo no kumumona namumona
Mark16:12 Kabili panuma Yesu aisa monekela mu musango umbi ku basambi babili abaleya mu mpanga.
Mark16:13 Awe nabo babwelelamo ku banabo no kuya bashimikilako
Mark16:14 Elyo pakulekelesha aisa monekela ku basole ikumi limo na umo
Mark16:15 Elyo abeba ati
Mark16:16 Uwasumina no kubatishiwa abatishiwa
Mark16:17 Elyo ne fishibilo fyacipeshamano ifyo abansumina bakalacita nifi
Mark16:18 Kabili bakalaikata insoka
Mark16:19 Nomba ilyo Imfumu Yesu yapwa ukulanda nabo
Mark16:20 Elyo abasambi bena basalangana baya balebila mpanga yonse. Imfumu nayo yalebomba nabo
Luke1:1 Mukwai
Luke1:2 Abantu batushimikila
Luke1:3 Kanshi apo na ine nalipitulukamo muli fyonse bwino bwino pa nshita iyitali
Luke1:4 Epakuti mushininkishe ukuti fyonse ifyo mwafundwa fyacishinka.
Luke1:5 Ilyo Herodi ali pa bufumu mu Yudeya
Luke1:6 Bonse babili bali abololoke pa cinso cakwa Lesa. Balekonka ifyebo na mafunde yonse aya Mfumu ukwabula icilubo.
Luke1:7 Nomba tabakwete mwana ico Elisabeti ali ni ŋumba. Kabili bonse babili bali abakote.
Luke1:8 Nomba ilyo cafikile impuka yakwa Sakaria ukubomba umulimo wa bushimapepo
Luke1:9 Bashimapepo bali no lutambi lwakupendula pakusala imilimo cila umo ali nokubomba. Kanshi ubo bushiku cawilile Sakaria ukuti eo aye futumwina Lesa ububani mwi Tempele.
Luke1:10 Ilyo Sakaria ali mukati alefutumwina Lesa ububani
Luke1:11 Elyo malaika wa Mfumu amumonekela
Luke1:12 Sakaria ati amone malaika
Luke1:13 Elyo malaika amweba ati
Luke1:14 Kabili ukasansamuka no kwanga
Luke1:15 Pantu akaba umucindami pa menso yakwa Lesa. Takalenwa mwangashi nangufye ubwalwa bumbi bonse. Kabili akesulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo ninshi acili mwifumo lyakwa nyina.
Luke1:16 Kabinge
Luke1:17 Akakwata amano na maka nga kasesema Eliya. Akatangilila Imfumu kukupekanya abantu bakuibombela. Akawikishanya abafyashi na bana. Akalula bacintomfwa ukukwata amano yene yene aya bantu abololoke.”
Luke1:18 Sakaria epakwipusha malaika ati
Luke1:19 Malaika amweba ati
Luke1:20 Mona walaba cibulu

Luke1:36 Ngefyo na Elisabeti lupwa lobe
Luke1:37 Pantu takwaba nelyo cimo ico Lesa engafilwa.”
Luke1:38 Maria epakusosa ati
Luke1:39 Mu nshiku shine isho
Luke1:40 Aingila mu ŋanda mwa Sakaria

Luke1:42 Elyo aikatisha ishiwi asosa ati

Luke1:45 Ee
Luke1:46 Maria epakutila ati
Luke1:47 No mweo wandi uleyanga muli Lesa Umupusushi wandi.
Luke1:48 Pantu alinjibukisha ne musha wakwe
Luke1:49 Pantu uwamaka yonse ancitila ifyakupapa. Ishina lyakwe lyamushilo.
Luke1:50 Kabili umukonkanina inkulo alanga uluse ku bamutiina.
Luke1:51 Alicita ifyamaka no kuboko kwakwe. Alisalanganya abacilumba mu mitima yabo.
Luke1:52 Alisamununa bashamfumu pa fipuna fyabo. Alisansabalika na bafye.
Luke1:53 Abansala alibekusha ifisuma
Luke1:54 Alitulanya Israeli umubomfi wakwe
Luke1:55 Ulo alaile ifikolwe fyesu Abrahamu na ba lupwa lwakwe.”
Luke1:56 Maria aikele na Elisabeti cikanga imyeshi itatu
Luke1:57 Awe inshiku shakupaapa shasuka shakumana
Luke1:58 Ilyo abena mupalamano na ba lupwa lwakwe baumfwa ukuti Imfumu naimulangulukilako apakalamba
Luke1:59 Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse
Luke1:60 Lelo nyina asosa ati
Luke1:61 Elyo baeba nyina abati
Luke1:62 Kanshi balalembula wishi pakumwipusha ishina ilyo alefwaya ukwinika mwane.
Luke1:63 Sakaria nao alomba icakulembapo
Luke1:64 Awe apopene akanwa kakwe no lulimi lwakwe fyakakuka
Luke1:65 Awe abena mupalamano bonse baikatwa no mwenso. Kabili ifi fintu nomba fyabafye e lyashi abantu ba mu calo ca mpili ca mu Yudeya balalandapo.

Luke7:1 Cilyafye Yesu apwa ukweba abantu fyonse ifyo alefwaya ukubeba
Luke7:2 Kanshi umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo alikwete umusha uo atemenwe nganshi. Uyu mubomfi alilwele nganshi
Luke7:3 Ilyo umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo aumfwako ifya pali Yesu
Luke7:4 Nabo ilyo bafika kuli Yesu
Luke7:5 Pantu alitemwa umushobo wesu
Luke7:6 Yesu epakuya nabo. Cilya abafye mupepi ne ŋanda
Luke7:7 Uyu wine e mulandu ulengele ukuti mfilwe ukuiishila ne mwine. Lelo sosafye ishiwi
Luke7:8 Pantu ine nalikwata abakalamba abanteeka
Luke7:9 Yesu ati omfwe ifi
Luke7:10 Ilyo abantu atumine babwelelamo ku ŋanda
Luke7:11 Pati papite akashita
Luke7:12 Nombafye cilya apalama ku mpongolo ya musumba
Luke7:13 Imfumu cilya yamona uyu mukamfwilwa yaumfwa uluse. Yamweba aiti
Luke7:14 Awe yapalama
Luke7:15 Awe no muntu uwafwile aima aikala
Luke7:16 Awe bonse baikatwa no mwenso
Luke7:17 Awe ululumbi lwakwa Yesu lwasalanganafye mpanga yonse mu Yudeya na mu fyalo fyonse ifya mumbali.
Luke7:18 Awe abasambi bakwa Yoani Kabatisha baile mushimikilako ifi fyonse.

Luke7:20 Abasambi bakwa Yoani ilyo bafika kuli Yesu basosa abati

Luke7:22 Elyo Yesu ayasuka inkombe shakwa Yoani ati
Luke7:23 Kabili alishuka umuntu uushitwishika pali ine.”
Luke7:24 Cilya inkombe shakwa Yoani shabwelelamo
Luke7:25 Kanshi cinshi mwaile kukumona? Bushe muntu uufwala insalu ishabusaka? Awe iyoo
Luke7:26 Nga kanshi ico mwaile mona cinshi? Bushe ni kasesema? Ee
Luke7:27 Eo calembwapo ukuti
Luke7:28 Ndemweba nati
Luke7:29 Abantu bonse abalemumfwa

Luke7:32 Baba nga baice abekele mu lubansa lwa cisankano
Luke7:33 Pantu Yoani atile aisa
Luke7:34 Elyo paisa Umwana wa muntu
Luke7:35 Nomba ificitwa fya mano yakwa Lesa filashinina ukuti yacine.”
Luke7:36 Elyo Umufalise umo aitile Yesu kukulya nankwe. Awe Yesu aile aingila mu ŋanda ya Mufalise
Luke7:37 Kanshi mu musumba mwali umwanakashi uwa misango ibi. Cilya aumfwa ukuti Yesu ali pakulya mu ŋanda ya Mufalise

Luke8:1 Panuma ya ifi
Luke8:2 Elyo na banakashi bamo abo atamfishemo imipashi yakowela no kubaposha ku malwele
Luke8:3 elyo na Yoana muka Cusa mushika wakwa Herodi
Luke8:4 Elyo kwalongene ibumba ilikalamba. Abantu balafuma muli uyu musumba na muli uyu
Luke8:5 “Katanda aile kukutanda imbuto shakwe. Cilya alatanda
Luke8:6 Shimo shaponena mu mushili wa nsakalabwe. Nomba cilya shamena
Luke8:7 Imbuto shimbi shaponena mu myunga ne myunga yashitabilila
Luke8:8 Shimbi shena shaponena mu mushili usuma. Awe shena shakula shatwala ne fisabo
Luke8:9 Elyo abasambi baipusha Yesu umulolele uyu mulumbe.
Luke8:10 Yesu nao abeba ati
Luke8:11 “Kanshi umu emulolele uyu mulumbe. Imbuto lishiwi lyakwa Lesa.
Luke8:12 Imbuto shaponene mumbali ya nshila e bantu abomfwa ishiwi lyakwa Lesa. Elyo Ciwa aisa
Luke8:13 Ishaponene mu mushili wa nsakalabwe
Luke8:14 Ishaponene mu myunga
Luke8:15 Nomba ishaponene mu mushili usuma
Luke8:16 “Tapaba muntu nelyo umo uusanika icisaniko
Luke8:17 Pantu takwaba nelyo cimo icafisama icishakasokoloke. Kabili takwaba nelyo cimo icankaama icishakeshibikwe no kucileta pa bwelu.
Luke8:18 Kanshi mulecenjela kufyo muleumfwa. Pantu umuntu uwakwata akapeelelwapo na fimbi. Elyo no ushakwata bakamupoka nefyo aitunga ukukwata.”
Luke8:19 Elyo nyina na bamunyina bakwa Yesu baishile
Luke8:20 Kanshi bamweba abati
Luke8:21 Yesu ena abasuka ati
Luke8:22 Ubushiku bumo Yesu aingilile mu bwato pamo na basambi bakwe. Elyo aebele abasambi bakwe ati
Luke8:23 Ilyo baleya mu bwato
Luke8:24 Abasambi epakuya kuli Yesu
Luke8:25 Elyo abeba ati
Luke8:26 Bayashika ubwato mu calo ca bena Gerasa icalungatana ne calo ca Galile.
Luke8:27 Cilyafye Yesu afuma mu bwato
Luke8:28 Cilya amona Yesu
Luke8:29 Pantu Yesu aebele umupashi wakowela ukuti ufume mu muntu. Imikufye iyingi umupashi wakowela walemwikata. Elyo pakumusunga
Luke8:30 Yesu amwipusha ati
Luke8:31 Imipashi yakowela elyo yalapapata Yesu ukuti eitamfisha ku ncende yaiko.
Luke8:32 Kanshi mumbali ya lupili mwali no mukuni ukalamba uwa nkumba shalelya. Imipashi yakowela yalapapata Yesu ukuti aileke ingile mu nkumba. Yesu nao aisuminisha.
Luke8:33 Awe imipashi yakowela yafuma mu muntu yaya ingila mu nkumba. Elyo umukuni wa nkumba wakunkunyala pa mukunkuluko
Luke8:34 Bakacema cilya bamona ifyacitika
Luke8:35 Abantu epakuya kukumona ificitike. Cilya bafika kuli Yesu
Luke8:36 Abo abaimwenene
Luke8:37 Abantu bonse aba mu calo ca Gerasa baikatwa no mwenso ukalamba
Luke8:38 Umuntu umwafumine imipashi yakowela alapapata Yesu ukuti akonke. Nomba Yesu amukaanya
Luke8:39 “Iyoo
Luke8:40 Nomba cilya Yesu abwelelemo
Luke8:41 Elyo paisa umuntu umo
Luke8:42 Pantu ali no mwana umukashana umofye mpo
Luke8:43 Elyo mwibumba mwalimo umwanakashi uwalwele umukunko pa myaka ikumi limo na ibili. Nomba bonse balifililwe ukumuposha.
Luke8:44 Uyu mwanakashi epakwisa lwa kunuma yakwa Yesu
Luke8:45 Elyo Yesu aipusha ati
Luke8:46 Lelo Yesu ena asosa ati
Luke8:47 Elyo umwanakashi amona ukuti naishibikwa. Awe aisa fukama apali Yesu aletutumafye. Elyo pa cinso ca bantu bonse alashimikila Yesu icilengele ukuti amukumye nefyo apolele apopenefye.

Luke8:49 Ilyo Yesu acili alelanda

Luke8:56 Awe abafyashi ba mukashana cabapesha amano. Nomba Yesu ena abakonkomesha ukuti tabali nakwebako nelyo umo icicitike.

Luke10:2 Yabeba aiti
Luke10:3 Kabiyeni
Luke10:4 Mwilasenda cikwama
Luke10:5 Elyo mu ŋanda yonse iyo mwaingilamo
Luke10:6 Na cine ngo muntu wamutende ewikalamo
Luke10:7 Muleikala mu ŋanda imo ine. Mulelya no kunwa ifyo bamupeela
Luke10:8 Kabili mu musumba onse umo mwaingila
Luke10:9 Muleposha na balwele abalimo. Mulebeba nokuti
Luke10:10 Nomba umusumba onse mwaingilamo na bantu tabamusekelele
Luke10:11 ‘No lukungu lwine lwa mu musumba wenu ulukungile ku makasa yesu nalo lwine twamukuntila. Nomba kwena mwishibe ukuti
Luke10:12 Ndemweba ukuti
Luke10:13 “Ukacimona Kolasini! Ukacimona nobe Betisaida! Pantu ifipeshamano fyacitilwe muli imwe
Luke10:14 Eico ndemweba nati
Luke10:15 Nomba iwe Kapenamu
Luke10:16 Kabili Yesu ati
Luke10:17 Awe abasambi balya amakumi cine lubali na babili
Luke10:18 Yesu abeba ati
Luke10:19 Moneni
Luke10:20 Nomba mwilasansamukafye pali ico imipashi yakowela ilecimba kuli imwe
Luke10:21 Kabili pa nshita ine iyo
Luke10:22 Tata alimpeela fyonse. Tapaba nangu umo uwaishiba Mwane
Luke10:23 Kabili uko bali beka Yesu apilibukila ku basambi bakwe alabeba ati
Luke10:24 Pantu ndemweba bakasesema abengi na bashamfumu abengi balefwaya ukumona ifyo imwe mulemona
Luke10:25 Awe kafundisha wamafunde umo
Luke10:26 Yesu amwasuka ati
Luke10:27 Nao ayasuka ati
Luke10:28 Yesu amweba ati
Luke10:29 Nomba kafundisha wamafunde ico alefwaya ukuiwaminisha
Luke10:30 Mukumwasuka Yesu ena atila ati
Luke10:31 Kanshi califye nkuma
Luke10:32 Kanshi umwina Levi nao acita ifyo fine. Nao atile ashifika pali iyi ncende
Luke10:33 Nomba umwina Samaria uwali pa bulendo
Luke10:34 Aya apo ali. Abuula amafuta no mwangashi aitila pa filonda
Luke10:35 Ubushiku bwakonkapo
Luke10:36 Nomba iwe pali aba batatu uo uletila e mubiye wa uyu muntu uwasanshilwe na bapupu nani?
Luke10:37 Nao ayasuka ati
Luke10:38 Kabili ilyo Yesu na basambi bakwe bacili baleya pa bulendo
Luke10:39 Malita ali na nkashimbiye ishina lyakwe ni Maria
Luke10:40 Malita wena alepitanafye mukupekanya ifyakubatebeta. Awe asuka aisa kuli Yesu alamweba ati
Luke10:41 Nomba Imfumu yamwasuka aiti
Luke10:42 Lelo cintufye cimo ecilefwaikwa. Maria ena nasala iciwemepo. Kabili takwakabe uwakumupokolola.”

Luke22:2 Bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde ico baletiina abantu
Luke22:3 Elyo Satana aingile muli Yuda uo batila wa ku Kelyoti
Luke22:4 Yuda aima aya kuli bashimapepo bacindami na ku bakalamba ba bakalinda we Tempele
Luke22:5 Awe nabo basansamuka
Luke22:6 Yuda nao asumina. Nomba alafwailishafye inshita ingalinga ukumuposelapo
Luke22:7 Elyo ubushiku bwakulyamo Imikate Ishatutumuka bwafikile
Luke22:8 Yesu elyo atuma Petelo na Yoani ati
Luke22:9 Nabo bamwipusha abati
Luke22:10 Yesu abeba ati

Luke22:12 Nao alaya mulanga umuputule wa pamulu
Luke22:13 Awe baima baya sanga ne fintu fyonse ngomo Yesu abebele. Nabo epakupekanya ne Pasaka.
Luke22:14 Ilyo inshita yafikile
Luke22:15 Elyo alabeba ati
Luke22:16 Pantu ndemweba
Luke22:17 Elyo Yesu abuula ulukombo
Luke22:18 Pantu ndemweba ukuti ukufuma nomba nshakanwe nakabili ifya ku fisabo fya myangashi
Luke22:19 Kabili Yesu abuula umukate
Luke22:20 Mu musango umo wine ilyo bapwa ukulya umulalilo
Luke22:21 Elyo kabili uulemposa wine tuli nao pano pakulya.
Luke22:22 Ukuba kwena Umwana wa muntu alaya kukufwa umo mwine Lesa apekanishisha. Lelo umuntu uwalaposa Umwana wa muntu ena alishama!”
Luke22:23 Abasole epakutampa ukulaipushanya abati
Luke22:24 Elyo abasole balabikana ifikansa abati
Luke22:25 Yesu alabeba ati

John5:31 Ine nga nalapeela bukambone pali ine ne mwine
John5:32 Nomba eko ali umbi uwakupeela bukambone pali ine. Kabili nalishiba ukuti bukambone bwakwe pali ine bwacishinka.
John5:33 Mwatumine inkombe kuli Yoani
John5:34 Kwena ine nshikabila bukambone bwa muntu
John5:35 Yoani ali nge cisaniko icileyaka
John5:36 Nomba bukambone bwandi bwena
John5:37 Elyo na Tata wine uwantuma
John5:38 Kanshi na mashiwi yakwe tayekala mu mitima yenu
John5:39 Mubelenga nganshi ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo
John5:40 Lelo imwe tamufwaya ukwisa kuli ine pakuti mukwate umweo.
John5:41 “Ine nshifwaya ukuti abantu balenumbanya.
John5:42 Lelo ine nalimwishiba. Tamwatemwa Lesa nakalya.
John5:43 Ico naishila
John5:44 Nga kanshi kuti mwansumina shani? Imwe bonse mufwayafye ukuti abanenu balemulumbanya. Tamusakamana kuti Lesa uwabafye umo mpo eo alemulumbanya.
John5:45 Kanshi mwilatontonkanya ukuti nine nkamwebelela kuli Tata. Awe
John5:46 Mu cine amusumina Mose
John5:47 Nomba apo mushasumina ifyo alemba
John6:1 Ilyo ifi fyapita
John6:2 Ibumba lya bantu ilikalamba lyamukonka
John6:3 Yesu anina ulupili
John6:4 Kanshi califye mupepi ne Pasaka inshikunkulu ya Bayuda iya Cakucilila.
John6:5 Cilya ibumba lya bantu lileisa uko ali
John6:6 Asosele ifi kukumweshafye
John6:7 Filipo amwasuka ati
John6:8 Umusambi wakwe umo
John6:9 “Kuno kuliko akalumendo kakwete imikate isano ne sabi libili. Nomba kuti fyabomba nshi ku bantu bafula ifi?”
John6:10 Yesu abeba ati
John6:11 Elyo Yesu abuula imikate atasha Lesa. Elyo balayakanya abantu abekele
John6:12 Awe bonse balya baikuta. Elyo Yesu aeba abasambi bakwe ati
John6:13 Awe balonganya ifipandwa fyasheleko ku mikate isano iyo abantu balile
John6:14 Abantu cilya bamona ici cishibilo Yesu acita
John6:15 Yesu ati amone ukuti balafwaya ukwisa musenda no kumupatikisha pakuti abe imfumu
John6:16 Cilya caba icungulo
John6:17 Baingila mu bwato
John6:18 Kanshi kwali icimwela ca maka cilepuupa
John6:19 Ilyo abasambi baoba ubwato intamfu ingalingana ne milundu isano nangu mutanda
John6:20 Yesu abeba ati
John6:21 Lyena abasambi balafwaya ukumuninika mu bwato
John6:22 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo ibumba lya bantu balya abashele kulya kwine lyashininkishe ukuti kwalifye ubwato bumo epela. Kabili Yesu taingile mu bwato pamo na basambi bakwe
John6:23 Amato yamo yafumine ku Tibelia
John6:24 Ilyo abantu bamona ukuti Yesu talimo
John6:25 Cilya bamusanga kwishilya lya bemba
John6:26 Yesu abasuka ati
John6:27 Mwilabombela icakulya icishili cakubelelela. Ala akubombeleni icakulya icakupeela umweo wape
John6:28 Elyo abantu bamwipusha abati
John6:29 Yesu abasuka ati
John6:30 Nabo bamwipusha abati
John6:31 Ifikolwe fyesu fyalile mana mu matololo. Efyo calembwa ukuti ‘Abapeele umukate wakulya ukufuma ku mulu.’ ”
John6:32 Yesu abasuka ati
John6:33 Pantu umukate wakwa Lesa ni uyu uwaika ukufuma ku mulu
John6:34 Abantu bamweba abati
John6:35 Yesu abasuka ati
John6:36 “Lelo ngefyo namweba
John6:37 Abo bonse abo Tata ampeela bakulaisa kuli ine. Elyo ine nshakatale ntamfya onse uwaisa kuli ine.
John6:38 Pantu ico naishila ukufuma ku mulu tekukucita ifyo ndefwaya ne mwine
John6:39 Ne fifwaya uwantuma nifi
John6:40 Pantu ico Tata afwaya nici icakuti
John6:41 Abayuda epakulailishanya pali ico asosa ati
John6:42 Balasosa abati
John6:43 Yesu abasuka ati
John6:44 Ala tapaba nangu umo uwingesa kuli ine
John6:45 Umo pali bakasesema alemba ati
John6:46 Nshiletila kwaliba uwamona Tata. Awe uwamona Tata
John6:47 “Ndemweba icine cine
John6:48 Ine nine mukate wamweo.
John6:49 Ifikolwe fyenu fyalile mana mu matololo
John6:50 Lelo uyu e mukate uwaika ku mulu
John6:51 Nine mukate wamweo uwaika ku mulu. Elyo onse uulya uyu mukate
John6:52 Abayuda elyo batampa ukubikana ifikansa abati
John6:53 Yesu abeba ati
John6:54 Uyo onse uulya umubili wandi no kunwa umulopa wandi
John6:55 Pantu umubili wandi cakulya cacine cine
John6:56 Uyo onse uulya umubili wandi no kunwa umulopa wandi aikala na ine
John6:57 Kanshi nga filya Tata wamweo uwantuma
John6:58 Kanshi uyu e mukate uwaika ku mulu. Te cimo na ulya mukate ifikolwe fyenu fyalile
John6:59 Yesu asosele ifi ilyo alefunda mu sinagoga mu Kapenamu.
John6:60 Abasambi bakwa Yesu abengi ilyo baumfwa ifyo Yesu alanda
John6:61 Yesu aishiba ukuti abasambi bakwe balailishanya pali ifyo alanda. Alabeba ati
John6:62 Nga cikaba shani nga mwamona Umwana wa muntu alenina alebwelela uko aikele kale?
John6:63 Ni Mupashi eupeela umweo
John6:64 Nomba pali imwe bamo tabasumina.” Pantu ukufumafye ilyo atampile ukufunda
John6:65 Elyo akonkanyapo nokuti
John6:66 Pakumfwa ifi abasambi bakwa Yesu abengi bamusangukila
John6:67 Elyo Yesu aipusha abasole bakwe ikumi limo na babili ati
John6:68 Simoni Petelo amwasuka ati
John6:69 Kabili nomba twalisumina no kwishiba ukuti uli Wamushilo uwafuma kuli Lesa.”
John6:70 Yesu ayasuka ati
John6:71 Kanshi aloseshe kuli Yuda mwana Simoni uwa ku Kelyoti. Pantu nangu ali umo pa basole ikumi limo na babili
John7:1 Panuma ya ifi
John7:2 Inshikunkulu ya Bayuda iya Nsakwe yali mupepi.
John7:3 Elyo bamunyina bakwa Yesu balamweba abati
John7:4 Tapaba nangu umo uulefwaya ukulumbuka ku bantu kabili alacita ifintu mu bumfisolo. Apo ulecita ifi fintu
John7:5 Pantu mu cacine
John7:6 Yesu abasuka ati
John7:7 Imwe abantu ba pano calo tekuti bamupate
John7:8 Imwe kabiyeni ku nshikunkulu. Ine nshileyako kuli iyi nshikunkulu
John7:9 Ati abebe ifi
John7:10 Ilyo bamunyina kwa Yesu baya ku nshikunkulu
John7:11 Pa nshikunkulu Abayuda balamufwaya. Balaipusha abati
John7:12 Nomba abantu mwibumba bena baikalilafye ukulatotoshanya pali Yesu. Bamo balasosa abati
John7:13 Lelo kwena tapali walelanda pali Yesu pa lwalala
John7:14 Cilya cafika pakati kakusefya inshikunkulu ya Nsakwe
John7:15 Abayuda bapapa nganshi. Balasosa abati
John7:16 Yesu abasuka ati
John7:17 Onse uufwaya ukucita ifyo Lesa afwaya
John7:18 Umuntu onse uulandafye ifya pa mutwe wakwe
John7:19 Bushe Amafunde yakwa Mose
John7:20 Ibumba lyamwasuka aliti
John7:21 Yesu abasuka ati
John7:22 Mose amupeele ifunde lyakusembululwa. Lelo ukusembululwa kwena te Mose watampile
John7:23 Nomba ilyo basembulula umuntu pa bushiku bwe Sabata pakukonka Amafunde yakwa Mose tabonaula bushiku bwe Sabata. Nga kanshi cinshi mwamfulilwa ico naposha umuntu pa bushiku bwe Sabata?
John7:24 Kanshi mwilapingwilafye ukukonka imimonekele ya cintu iyoo
John7:25 Abantu bamo aba mu Yerusalemu balesosa abati
John7:26 Nomba uyu aleilandilafye pa lwalala
John7:27 Lelo ifwe uyu twalishiba uko afuma
John7:28 Ilyo Yesu acili alefunda mwi Tempele
John7:29 Lelo ine nalimwishiba
John7:30 Awe balafwaya ukumwikata. Nomba tapali wamwiketemo
John7:31 Abantu abengi mwibumba bena bamusumina. Balasosa nokuti
John7:32 Abafalise cilya baumfwa uko abantu mwibumba baletotoshanya ifi pali Yesu
John7:33 Yesu asosa ati
John7:34 Mukalamfwaya
John7:35 Abayuda balalanshanya abati
John7:36 Nga kanshi alosha mwi pakusosa ati
John7:37 Ubushiku bwakulekelesha ubwa nshikunkulu ya Nsakwe
John7:38 Mu Malembo Yamushilo calembwa ukuti
John7:39 Yesu pakulanda ifi
John7:40 Ilyo abantu baumfwa ifyo Yesu asosa
John7:41 Bambi nabo balati
John7:42 Bushe Amalembo Yamushilo tayatila ayati
John7:43 Kanshi abantu epakupusana pa mulandu wakwa Yesu.
John7:44 Bamo balafwaya ukumwikata lelo tapali wamwiketemo.
John7:45 Awe ifita fya kwi Tempele fyabwelelamo kuli bashimapepo bacindami na Bafalise. Nabo baipusha ifita abati
John7:46 Ifita fyabasuka afiti
John7:47 Abafalise balabeba abati
John7:48 Bushe mwalyumfwako ukuti umo pa ntungulushi nangu umo pa Bafalise alimusumina?
John7:49 Nomba ili bumba talyaishiba na Mafunde yakwa Mose
John7:50 Nomba umunabo umo Nikodemo
John7:51 “Bushe amafunde yesu yalisuminisha ukupeela umulandu ku muntu uo mushilaumfwa mulandu wakwe no kwishiba ifyo alecita?”
John7:52 Bamwasuka abati
John7:53 Awe cila muntu aima aya kumwakwe.
John8:1 Yesu ena afuminepo aya ku lupili lwa Miolifa.
John8:2 Kabili lucelocelo abwelela kwi Tempele. Awe abantu balalongana umo ali. Elyo aikala atampa no kulabafunda.
John8:3 Bakafundisha bamafunde na Bafalise elyo baleta umwanakashi umo uo basangilishe mu lubembu. Bamwiminika na mu lwalala.
John8:4 Baeba Yesu abati
John8:5 Mu Mafunde
John8:6 Basosele ifi pakuti bakwate umwakumwikatila
John8:7 Cilya babikapofye ukumwipusha
John8:8 Awe kabili ainama
John8:9 Bati bomfwe ifyo
John8:10 Elyo Yesu ainuka
John8:11 Nao ayasuka ati
John8:12 Yesu aebele abantu nakabili ati
John8:13 Abafalise epakumweba abati
John8:14 Yesu abasuka ati
John8:15 Imwe mupingulafye no bupingushi bwabuntunse. Ine nshipingula nelyo umo.
John8:16 Lelo nga cakuti ningapingula
John8:17 Mu Mafunde yakwa Mose calembwa ukuti bukambone bwacishinka kano abantu babili basuminishanya.
John8:18 Ine ndepeela bukambone pali ine ne mwine
John8:19 Elyo bamwipusha abati
John8:20 Yesu asosele ifi fyonse ilyo alefunda mwi Tempele
John8:21 Kabili Yesu abebele ati
John8:22 Abayuda balalanshanya abati
John8:23 Yesu abasuka ati
John8:24 Eico mwebele nati
John8:25 Elyo bamwipusha abati
John8:26 Kwena pali imwe ninkwatafye ifingi ifyakulandapo no kumupeelelapo umulandu. Kabili uwantuma
John8:27 Awe tabailwike nakalya ukuti alebeba pali Wishi.
John8:28 Kanshi Yesu abeba ati
John8:29 Kabili lyonse tuba no wantuma
John8:30 Abantu abengi pakumfwa ifyo Yesu alesosa
John8:31 Elyo Yesu alaeba Abayuda abamusumine ati
John8:32 Mukeshiba icishinka
John8:33 Nabo bamwasuka abati
John8:34 Yesu abasuka ati
John8:35 Ubwikashi bwa musha mu lupwa tebwape
John8:36 Kanshi Umwana nga ewamulubula
John8:37 Ninjishiba ukuti muli ba mu lupwa lwakwa Abrahamu. Nomba kabili mulefwaya ukunjipaya
John8:38 Ine mweba ifyo namona kuli Tata
John8:39 Bamwasuka abati
John8:40 Lelo kwena mulefwaya ukunjipaya
John8:41 Imwe mulecita ifyo shinwe acita.” Bamwasuka abati
John8:42 Yesu abeba ati
John8:43 Cinshi ico mushumfwila ifyo nsosa? Ala nico mushifwaya kutesha mashiwi yandi.
John8:44 Imwe shinwe ni Ciwa. Kabili mufwayafye ukucita ifyo shinwe afwaya. Ukufumafye na ku kale aba cipondo. Kabili tatala akonka ifyacishinka
John8:45 Nomba ine nanda icishinka
John8:46 Bushe nani pali imwe enganshinina ukuti nalitala ncitapo ububifi? Nomba ifyo mweba nga fyacishinka
John8:47 Umuntu wakwa Lesa alomfwa amashiwi yakwa Lesa. Umulandu mushumfwila nico mushili bantu bakwa Lesa.”
John8:48 Abayuda epakwasuka Yesu abati
John8:49 Yesu abasuka ati
John8:50 Ine nshiifwailafye ne mwine umucinshi. Lelo eko ali umo uumfwaila umucinshi
John8:51 Ndemweba icine cine
John8:52 Abayuda bamwasuka abati
John8:53 Icikolwe cesu Abrahamu alifwa. Bushe iwe naucila Abrahamu? Elyo bakasesema nabo balifwa. Bushe uleitunga nshi iwe?”
John8:54 Yesu abasuka ati
John8:55 Nomba imwe tamwamwishiba
John8:56 Shinwe Abrahamu alyangile ico ali nokumona ubushiku bwa kwisa kwandi. Alibumwene
John8:57 Abayuda bamwasuka abati
John8:58 Yesu abasuka ati
John8:59 Abayuda epakulatola amabwe pakuti bamulase. Yesu ena afyefyetuka afuma na mu lubansa lwe Tempele.

John10:1 “Ndemweba icine cine
John10:2 Uwingilila pa mwinshi e kacema wa mpaanga.
John10:3 Kalinda alamwiswila iciibi ca pecinka
John10:4 Ilyo ashifumisha shonse panse
John10:5 Tashikonka muntu umbi nakalya. Umuntu umbi shilamubutuka
John10:6 Ni Yesu wabomine uyu mulumbe. Lelo tabaumfwile umo walolele.
John10:7 Yesu alabeba nakabili ati
John10:8 Bonse ababalilepo ukwisa bena bapupu kabili fipondo
John10:9 Nine mwinshi. Onse uwingilila pali ine akapusuka. Akalaingila no kufuma apo atemenwe
John10:10 Umupupu teshila cimbi kanofye ukwiba
John10:11 “Ine ndi kacema musuma. Kacema musuma ni uyo uuleka umweo wakwe pa mpaanga shakwe.
John10:12 Uwancito
John10:13 Uwancito abutuka ico wancitofye
John10:14 Ine ndi kacema musuma. Nalishiba impaanga shandi ne mpaanga shandi nasho shalinjishiba.
John10:15 Kanshi nga filya fine Tata anjishiba na ine nalishiba Tata. Eco na ine ndekela umweo wandi pa mpaanga shandi.
John10:16 Nalikwata impaanga na shimbi
John10:17 Tata alintemwa
John10:18 Tapali nelyo umo uulempoka umweo wandi. Awe iyoo
John10:19 Awe Abayuda nakabili bapusana pa mulandu wa aya mashiwi.
John10:20 Abengi balasosa abati
John10:21 Bambi bena balati
John10:22 Cali mu nshita yamibundo. Ku Yerusalemu kwali Inshikunkulu yakwibukisha Ukusangululwa kwe Tempele.
John10:23 Yesu aletandala mu ncende ye Tempele
John10:24 Abayuda baisa mushinguluka balamweba abati
John10:25 Yesu abasuka ati
John10:26 Nomba imwe tamusumina
John10:27 Impaanga shandi shilomfwa ishiwi lyandi. Nalishishiba
John10:28 Ine ndashipeela umweo wape
John10:29 Tata uwashimpeela
John10:30 Tata na ine twabafye umo.”
John10:31 Elyo Abayuda batola amabwe balafwaya ukumulasa.
John10:32 Yesu epakubeba ati
John10:33 Abayuda bamwasuka abati
John10:34 Yesu abasuka ati
John10:35 Nga kanshi apo Lesa aeba aba bantu abo ishiwi lyakwe lyafikileko ukuti muli milungu
John10:36 Nga ine neo Tata aisalila umwine
John10:37 Mwilansumina kumfwa nga nshilebomba milimo yakwa Tata.
John10:38 Lelo nga ndabomba imilimo yakwa Tata
John10:39 Nakabili balafwaya ukumwikata
John10:40 Elyo Yesu ayabukila kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani
John10:41 Abantu abengi balaisa uko ali. Balasosa abati
John10:42 Awe na bengi bamusumina.
John11:1 Kwaliko umuntu umo umulwele ishina lyakwe ni Lasalo. Aleikala mu Betani
John11:2 Uyu Maria eulya wakonkomwenene amafuta ya cena cisuma pa makasa ya Mfumu
John11:3 Bankashi bakwa Lasalo ebatumine amashiwi kuli Yesu abati
John11:4 Ilyo Yesu aumfwa ifi
John11:5 Yesu alitemenwe Malita na nkashimbiye na Lasalo.
John11:6 Lelo ilyo aumfwa ukuti Lasalo mulwele
John11:7 Elyo aeba abasambi bakwe ati
John11:8 Abasambi bakwe bamweba abati
John11:9 Yesu ayasuka ati
John11:10 Lelo nga alaenda ubushiku
John11:11 Yesu ati asose ifi elyo aeba abasambi bakwe ati
John11:12 Abasambi bamwasuka abati
John11:13 Yesu aloseshe mukutila
John11:14 Elyo Yesu alandafye apabuuta tuutu ati
John11:15 Lelo ine ico nshaliko ninsansamuka pa mulandu wenu. Pantu lyena mukasumina. Nomba natuleyako.”
John11:16 Toma uo baleita Mpundu
John11:17 Cilya Yesu afika ku Betani
John11:18 Ukufuma ku Betani ukufika ku Yerusalemu pabafye imilundu itatu.
John11:19 Kanshi na ba mu Yudeya abengi balishile kuli Malita na Maria kukubatalalikako imitima pa mulandu wa mfwa yakwa ndume yabo.
John11:20 Ilyo Malita aumfwa ukuti Yesu aleisa
John11:21 Malita alaeba Yesu ati
John11:22 Lelo ninjishiba ukuti na nombaline Lesa kuti akupeela conse ico wingamulomba.”
John11:23 Yesu amweba ati
John11:24 Malita amwasuka ati
John11:25 Yesu amweba ati
John11:26 Elyo na onse umumi uwansumina
John11:27 Malita amwasuka ati
John11:28 Cilya asosa ifi
John11:29 Maria cilya aumfwa ifi
John11:30 Yesu ninshi talati afike mu mushi
John11:31 Awe Abayuda abali na Maria mu ŋanda balemutalalika umutima
John11:32 Maria afika apali Yesu
John11:33 Ilyo Yesu amona uko alelila
John11:34 Elyo aipusha ati
John11:35 Awe Yesu alalila.
John11:36 Abayuda balasosa abati
John11:37 Nomba bamo balasosa abati
John11:38 Elyo Yesu nakabili aumfwa ubulanda nganshi
John11:39 Yesu abeba ati
John11:40 Yesu amwasuka ati
John11:41 Awe bafumyapo icilibwe. Elyo Yesu apunamina mu mulu asosa ati
John11:42 Kwena ine nalishiba ukuti lyonsefye ulaŋumfwa. Lelo nalanda ifyo pa mulandu we bumba ili linshingulwike
John11:43 Ati asose ifi
John11:44 Awe uwafwile afuma. Ifisansa na makasa nafipombwa no tusalu. Pa menso pena pakakilwe icitambala. Yesu abeba ati
John11:45 Aba mu Yudeya abengi abaishile kukuloosha kuli Maria
John11:46 Lelo bamo bena baya ku Bafalise
John11:47 Kanshi bashimapepo bacindami na Bafalise epakuteka icilye. Balasosa ati
John11:48 Nga twaleka ukuti akonkanyepofye ifi fine
John11:49 Umunabo umo
John11:50 Bushe tamwishibe ukuti cawamapo umuntu umo afwila abantu ukucila ukuti umushobo onse waonaika?”
John11:51 Te pa mutwefye wakwe asosele aya mashiwi. Lelo ico ali Shimapepo mukalamba wa muli uyo mwaka
John11:52 Kabili te mushobo wa Bayuda beka. Lelo nokuti akalonganike abantu bakwa Lesa monse umo basalanganina
John11:53 Ukufuma ubo bushiku Abayuda balapangana ifyakwipaya Yesu.
John11:54 Kanshi Yesu nao nomba taleenda pa lwalala mu Bayuda. Lelo afumako aya ku musumba baleti Efulaimu ku calo ca mupepi na matololo

John18:14 Ni uyu wine Kayafa ewapandile Abayuda amano ati
John18:15 Simoni Petelo elyo no musambi umbi bena bakonkele Yesu. Uyu musambi umbi wena alishibikwe kuli Shimapepo mukalamba. Kanshi ena aingila pamo na Yesu mu lubansa lwe sano lyakwa Shimapepo mukalamba.

John18:23 Yesu amwasuka ati

John21:25 Kwaliba na fimbi ifintu ifingi ifyo Yesu acitile. Ine ndemona ukuti

Acts1:2 ukufumafye apo atampile ukufikafye nelyo asendelwe ku mulu. Ilyo talati asendwe ku mulu
Acts1:3 Panuma ya macushi yakwe
Acts1:4 Kanshi bushiku bumo ilyo Yesu ali nabo pamo
Acts1:5 Yoani alebatisha ku menshi
Acts1:6 Ilyo abasole balongene pamo
Acts1:7 Yesu abaswike ati
Acts1:8 Lelo ilyo mukapoka amaka yakwa Mupashi Wamushilo
Acts1:9 Cilyafye alanda ifi
Acts1:10 Kanshi ilyo bacili balelolekesha ku mulu
Acts1:11 Balabeba abati
Acts1:12 Elyo abasole babwelelemo ku Yerusalemu ukufuma ku lupili ulo batila
Acts1:13 Cilya baingila mu musumba wa Yerusalemu
Acts1:14 Aba bonse balelonganafye ilingi aba mutima umo
Acts1:15 Mu nshiku shine isho abasambi baisa longana ku cilye. Ni cikanga bali bonse pamo umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120). Elyo Petelo aiminina alabeba ati
Acts1:16 “Mwe bamunyinane
Acts1:17 Yuda ali wa mwibumba lyesu
Acts1:18 (Yuda
Acts1:19 Abantu bonse abekala mu Yerusalemu balyumfwileko ici cintu. Eico ili bala mu lulimi lwabo batila
Acts1:20 “Pantu calembwa mu citabo ca Malumbo ukuti
Acts1:21 “Kanshi tuli nokusala umuntu umo pali aba bantu abali na ifwe inshita yonse
Acts1:22 Uwali na ifwe ukufumafye ilyo Yoani atampile ukubatisha
Acts1:23 Awe babuulapo abantu babili
Acts1:24 Elyo balapepa abati
Acts1:25 Uwakuti abuule imilimo ya basole
Acts1:26 Elyo balapendula. Awe cawila Matia. Kanshi Matia epakumubika pa basole ikumi limo na umo.
Acts2:1 Cilya ubushiku bwa Pentekoste bwafika
Acts2:2 Awe apopene icilulumo cafuma ku mulu
Acts2:3 Elyo bamona ifyapala imingu sha mulilo
Acts2:4 Elyo bonse baisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo. Batampa nokulalanda mu ndimi shimbi umo Mupashi abapeelele ukulanda.
Acts2:5 Kanshi mu Yerusalemu mwalimo Abayuda abapetamina Lesa
Acts2:6 Ilyo baumfwa ici cilulumo abantu balongana ibumba ilikalamba. Bonse cabapelenganya ico cila muntu alaumfwa uko abasambi balelandila mu lulimi lwakwe.
Acts2:7 Balapapa
Acts2:8 Nga kanshi caba shani icakuti bonse umo umo tuleumfwa ifyo balelanda mu lulimi twafyalilwamo?
Acts2:9 Ifwe fwe bena Pati
Acts2:10 fwe bena Fulugia
Acts2:11 Fwe Bayuda
Acts2:12 Awe bonse balapapa na mano yabapela. Elyo balaipusha abati
Acts2:13 Bamo bena balaseka abasambi abati
Acts2:14 Elyo Petelo aiminine pamo na basole ikumi limo na umo. Asansula ishiwi alaeba abantu ati
Acts2:15 Aba bantu tabakolelwe iyoo
Acts2:16 Ala ici ecilya kasesema Yoeli alandapo ati
Acts2:17 “‘Lesa asosa ati
Acts2:18 Mu nshiku shilya
Acts2:19 Nkalanga ifinjelengwe mulya mu mulu ne fipeshamano pano isonde. Kukaba umulopa no mulilo ne ntumba ya cushi.
Acts2:20 Akasuba kakafiita fititi no mweshi nao ukakashika ngo mulopa
Acts2:21 Elyo abantu bonse abakalilila peshina lyakwa Yawe ebakapusuka.’
Acts2:22 “Mwe bena Israeli
Acts2:23 Lesa umwine alishibe no kufwaya efyo alefwaya ukuti uyu Yesu aposwe mu minwe yenu. Nimwe bene mwamwipeye pakulenga Abenafyalo bamutanike pa musalaba.
Acts2:24 Lelo Lesa alimubusha ku bafwa
Acts2:25 Eo Davidi alandapo ati
Acts2:26 Eico umutima wandi uli ne nsansa no lulimi luleyanga
Acts2:27 Pantu we Mfumu tawakaleke umweo wandi ukushala mu calo ca bafwa. Tawakaleke nokuti Uwamushilo obe akabole.
Acts2:28 Walinangilila inshila ishitwala ku mweo
Acts2:29 “Mwe bamunyinane
Acts2:30 Nomba Davidi ali ni kasesema. Alishibe ukuti Lesa alimulaile no kulapa alapa ati
Acts2:31 Davidi nga kasesema amwene ifyali nokwisa citika. Eico ni pa kushukuka kwakwa Kristu alandile ilyo atile ati
Acts2:32 “Lesa alibusha Yesu ku bafwa. Kabili bonse tuli bakambone pali ici cintu.
Acts2:33 Lesa alimusansabalika
Acts2:34 Davidi umwine wine asosa ati
Acts2:35 mpaka abalwani bobe nkabacite apakunyanta amakasa yobe.’
Acts2:36 “Kanshi abena Israeli bonse bashininkishe ukuti uyu Yesu
Acts2:37 Cilya abantu baumfwa ifyo Petelo alanda
Acts2:38 Petelo abasuka ati
Acts2:39 Pantu nimwe bene na bana benu Lesa alaya ubu bupe. Alaya na kuli bonse abali ukutali na bonsefye abo Imfumu Lesa wesu akuuta ukuti bese uko ali.”
Acts2:40 Kabili Petelo abebafye ifingi na fimbi ifyakubasoka. Alabakonkomesha ati
Acts2:41 Awe abantu abengi basekelela ifyo abeba
Acts2:42 Abantu balebika imitima yabo kufyo abasole balebafunda
Acts2:43 Abasole balecita ifinjelengwe ne fishibilo ifingi. Kanshi abantu bonse bali na katiina.
Acts2:44 Lelo abasumina bonse baleikala pamo. Ifintu cila muntu akwete fyali fya bonse.
Acts2:45 Baleshitisha ifyuma fyabo na fyonse ifyo bakwete. Elyo indalama balemonamo
Acts2:46 Cila bushiku baleya kukulongana pamo kwi Tempele. Mu mayanda yabo mwena balekumana kukulya icakulya. Balelya ne nsansa
Acts2:47 Balelumbanya Lesa
Acts3:1 Ubushiku bumo Petelo na Yoani baya kwi Tempele
Acts3:2 Pa mpongolo ye Tempele iyo baleti
Acts3:3 Icite cilya camona ukuti Petelo na Yoani balaingila mwi Tempele
Acts3:4 Elyo bonse Petelo na Yoani bamulolesha. Petelo wena amweba ati
Acts3:5 Awe abalolesha
Acts3:6 Petelo epakumweba ati
Acts3:7 Elyo Petelo amwikata ku kuboko kwa ku kulyo
Acts3:8 Afwampuka napo ekele
Acts3:9 Abantu bonse bamumona uko aleenda
Acts3:10 Bamwishiba ukuti euyu wine uwaleikala pa mpongolo yayemba iye Tempele alelomba. Awe bonse cabapesha amano
Acts3:11 Ilyo bamona uwali cite ekatilile kuli Petelo na Yoani
Acts3:12 Cilya Petelo amona abantu
Acts3:13 Lesa wakwa Abrahamu
Acts3:14 Imwe mwakeene Yesu umuntu Wamushilo
Acts3:15 Umwine wa mweo wena mwamwipaya. Nomba Lesa alimubusha ku bafwa. Na ifwe nifwe bakambone pali ici cintu.
Acts3:16 Uyu muntu mulemona uo mwaishiba no kwishiba
Acts3:17 “Nomba bamunyinane

Acts3:20 Epakuti Imfumu imupeele inshita yakumutalalika imitima. Imutumine Yesu uo yamupekanisha
Acts3:21 Uyu wine Yesu ali nokuba mu mulu mpaka no kufika ku nshita iyo Lesa akapanga fyonse cipya cipya

Acts3:24 Bakasesema bonse
Acts3:25 Nimwe mpyani sha filayo bakasesema balelandapo. Kabili nimwe mpyani sha cipangano Lesa aebele Abrahamu ati
Acts3:26 Kanshi Lesa asalile Umubomfi wakwe no kumutuma kuli imwe pakubala
Acts4:1 Bashimapepo no mukalamba wa fita fyakulinda Itempele
Acts4:2 Baisa nabafulwa
Acts4:3 Awe babekata
Acts4:4 Lelo abengi abaumfwileko ifyo balefunda
Acts4:5 Cilya bwaca
Acts4:6 Bateka icilye pamo na Anosi Shimapepo mukalamba
Acts4:7 Baiminika Petelo na Yoani mu lwalala
Acts4:8 Elyo Petelo aisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo
Acts4:9 Ifwe ilelo nga muletulubulwisha
Acts4:10 Kanshi imwe bonse
Acts4:11 Uyu Yesu eo calembwapo ukuti
Acts4:12 “Ni kuli Yesu fye eka eko twingamona ukupusuka. Pantu tapaba na umbi pano isonde
Acts4:13 Cilya bashicilye bamona ifyo Petelo na Yoani bapamine pakulanda
Acts4:14 Awe bafilwa ne fyakusosapo
Acts4:15 Kanshi epakweba abasole ukufumina panse. Bashicilye bena bashala balelanshanya.
Acts4:16 Balaipushanya abati
Acts4:17 Nomba pakulesha ici cintu ukusalanganina ku bantu natubebekeshe ukuti tabali nakulanda ku muntu nelyo umo pali Yesu.”
Acts4:18 Kabili babeta mu cilye. Balabakonkomesha abati
Acts4:19 Nomba Petelo na Yoani bayasuka bashicilye abati
Acts4:20 Awe ifwe tekuti tuleke ukulanda pa fintu ifyo ifwe fwe bene twaimwena no kuyumfwila.”
Acts4:21 Bashicilye
Acts4:22 Elyo no muntu wine baposeshe muli ici cishibilo
Acts4:23 Apopenefye ilyo icilye cabalekelemo
Acts4:24 Ilyo baumfwa umulandu
Acts4:25 Niwe ku maka yakwa Mupashi Wamushilo walengele icikolwe cesu Davidi umubomfi obe atile ati
Acts4:26 Ishamfumu sha pano isonde shileipekanya ku bulwi
Acts4:27 “Pantu Herodi na Pontio Pilato balongene pamo na Benafyalo na bena Israeli muno Yerusalemu. Balapangila na Yesu umubomfi obe uwamushilo
Acts4:28 Kwena bena balongenefye kukufikilisha ifyo iwe we Lesa ku maka yobe na ku mano yobe ifyo wapangile ukuti fili nokucitika.
Acts4:29 Kanshi nomba we Mfumu
Acts4:30 Tambalika ukuboko kobe kukundapa. Cita ifinjelengwe ne fishibilo ku maka yakwa Yesu
Acts4:31 Cilya bapwafye ukupepa
Acts4:32 Ibumba ilya basumina lyalifye ilya mutima umo na mano yamo yene. Tapali no wakulatila
Acts4:33 Abasole bena balebikapofye ukwiminina na maka pali bukambone bwa kushukuka kwa Mfumu Yesu. Ne cikuuku cakwa Lesa cali pali bonse bene nganshi.
Acts4:34 Takwali uwakukabila akantu mwibumba lyabo. Bonse abakwete amabala nangu amayanda balefishitisha. Elyo indalama balemonamo
Acts4:35 baleleta ku basole. Elyo bashakanya kuli bonse ukulingana nefyo cila muntu alekabila.
Acts4:36 Kanshi kwali umuntu umo uwa mu luko lwa bena Levi
Acts4:37 Uyu muntu alikwete ibala
Acts5:1 Kwaliko umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Anania
Acts5:2 Nomba Anania afisapo indalama shimo
Acts5:3 Petelo amweba ati
Acts5:4 Ilyo taulashitisha ibala
Acts5:5 Anania ati omfwe aya mashiwi awa panshi afwa no kufwa. Elyo bonse abaumfwileko baikatwa no mwenso.
Acts5:6 Elyo abalumendo baisa
Acts5:7 Cilya papita kwati insa shitatu
Acts5:8 Petelo amwipusha ati
Acts5:9 Elyo Petelo amweba ati
Acts5:10 Apopene Safira awa panshi apali Petelo
Acts5:11 Awe ulukuta lonse
Acts5:12 Elyo abasole balacita ifishibilo ne finjelengwe ifingi ku bantu. Abasumina bonse balelongana pamo aba mutima umo mu lukungu baleti
Acts5:13 Abantu nangu balelumbanya abasumina
Acts5:14 Awe ibumba lya baume na banakashi abalesumina mu Mfumu lyaya lilelundulukilakofye.
Acts5:15 Pakumona ifipeshamano ifyo abasole balecita
Acts5:16 Kanshi abantu abengi ukufuma mu misumba iyashinguluka Yerusalemu nabo balaisako. Baleleta abalwele babo na balecushiwa ku mipashi yakowela
Acts5:17 Elyo Shimapepo mukalamba pamo na banankwe aba mwibumba lya Basaduki umufimbila wabekete
Acts5:18 Awe babekata
Acts5:19 Lelo ubushiku malaika wa Mfumu aisa isula impongolo sha cifungo. Afumisha na basole panse.
Acts5:20 Abeba ati
Acts5:21 Awe nabo bakonka ifyo malaika abeba. Lucelocelo
Acts5:22 Ilyo abo batumine bafika mu cifungo
Acts5:23 Abati
Acts5:24 Ilyo umukalamba wa fita fya bakalinda we Tempele na bashimapepo bacindami baumfwa ifi
Acts5:25 Elyo paisa umuntu
Acts5:26 Elyo umukalamba wa fita fya bakalinda we Tempele ayako ne fita fyakwe
Acts5:27 Awe baleta abasole
Acts5:28 Abeba ati
Acts5:29 Petelo na basole bambi bayasuka abati
Acts5:30 Lesa wa fikolwe fyesu
Acts5:31 Lesa alimucindamika
Acts5:32 Ifwe tuli bakambone pali iyi milandu
Acts5:33 Cilya bashicilye baumfwa ifi
Acts5:34 Lelo shicilye umo
Acts5:35 Elyo alaeba bashicilye ati
Acts5:36 Tapalati papite inshita iyitali apo twamwene Teuda uwaleitunga ukuti te muntu wafyefye. Awe na bantu cikanga imyanda ine balamukonka. Lelo bamwipaya
Acts5:37 Panuma yakwa Teuda
Acts5:38 Kanshi pali uyu mulandu ndemweba nati
Acts5:39 Lelo nga fyafuma kuli Lesa ninshi mukafilwa ukufyonaula. Mukasangafye ukuti mulelwisha Lesa wine!”
Acts5:40 Awe bamusuminisha. Elyo baeba abasole ukwingila mu cilye. Baeba ne fita ukuboma ifikoti. Babalesha no kufunda pali Yesu
Acts5:41 Abasole bafuma mu cilye nabasansamuka
Acts5:42 Cila bushiku babikilepofye ukulafunda no kubila Imbila Nsuma iyakutila Yesu e Kristu
Acts6:1 Kanshi pa nshita iyi
Acts6:2 Kanshi abasole ikumi limo na babili epakulonganya ibumba lyonse ilya basambi. Balabeba abati
Acts6:3 Kanshi bamunyinefwe
Acts6:4 Elyo ifwe twakulaibikafye pakupepa no kufunda amashiwi yakwa Lesa.”
Acts6:5 Awe ibumba lyonse lyasekela aya amashiwi. Lyasala Stefano
Acts6:6 Ibumba lya basambi lyabaleta ku basole. Nabo abasole babapepelela
Acts6:7 Awe ne shiwi lyakwa Lesa lyaya lilelunduluka. Abasambi mu Yerusalemu nabo baya balefulilakofye. Elyo ne bumba ilikalamba ilya bashimapepo lyanakila icisumino.
Acts6:8 Stefano ali uwamaka kabili uwakwatisha icikuuku cakwa Lesa. Alecita ifishibilo ifyakupapa ne finjelengwe pakati ka bantu.
Acts6:9 Nomba abantu bamo batampa ukubikana ifikansa na Stefano. Bamo bena Kurene na bena Alekisandilia abafumine ku sinagoga baleti
Acts6:10 Nomba bafilwa ukumwansha mufyo alesosa ku mulandu wa mano yakwe
Acts6:11 Elyo basembeleka abantu mu bumfisolo ukuti basose abati
Acts6:12 Kanshi abantu
Acts6:13 Elyo baletamo na bakambone babufi. Balasosa abati
Acts6:14 Twalyumfwile uko alesosa ati
Acts6:15 Bashicilye bonse elyo batontomesha amenso pali Stefano. Bamona nokuti impumi yakwe yalamoneka kwati ni mpumi yakwa malaika.
Acts7:1 Shimapepo mukalamba elyo aipusha Stefano ati
Acts7:2 Stefano ayasuka ati
Acts7:3 Aebele Abrahamu ati
Acts7:4 Awe afuma mu calo ca Kaludea aya na kukwikala mu Harani. Panuma ya mfwa yakwa wishi
Acts7:5 Muli cino calo mwena Lesa tapeelamo Abrahamu nangu akapanga akakuti atile
Acts7:6 Kabili Lesa amwebele nokuti
Acts7:7 Lesa atile nokuti
Acts7:8 Elyo Lesa apeela Abrahamu ulutambi lwakusembulula abana abaume ukuba icishibilo ca cipangano. Kanshi ilyo Isaki afyelwe
Acts7:9 “Nomba ifi ifikolwe ifyalumbuka fyafimbila Yosefu. Fyamushitisha
Acts7:10 Alamwafwilisha mu macushi yakwe yonse. Amupeela amano ayalengele nokuti Falao imfumu ya mu Egupto imuposeko amano. Kabili Falao acita Yosefu umulashi mu Egupto. Amucita na kangalila wa fyuma fya kwisano.
Acts7:11 Elyo kwaisa pona icipowe mu calo conse ca Egupto na mu Kenani
Acts7:12 Ilyo Yakobo aumfwa ukuti mu Egupto mwena muli ifyakulya
Acts7:13 Pa lwendo lwabubili
Acts7:14 Elyo Yosefu alaisha amashiwi kuli wishi Yakobo
Acts7:15 Awe Yakobo aya ku Egupto. Mu Egupto mwine emo afwila. Emwafwila ne fikolwe fyesu.
Acts7:16 Ifitumbi fyabo balefibwesesha ku Shekemu. Balefishiika mu nindi Abrahamu ashitile ne ndalama kuli bamwana Hamori.
Acts7:17 “Awe inshita yasuka yapalama iyakufikilisha icilayo Lesa alaile Abrahamu. Abantu besu basanda
Acts7:18 Elyo paisa imfumu imbi iyishaishibe Yosefu
Acts7:19 Iyi mfumu yacenjelela abantu besu
Acts7:20 Ni mu nshita ine iyo elyo Mose afyelwe. Ali umwana uwayemba nganshi. Abafyashi bakwe bamulela kumwabo pa myeshi itatu.
Acts7:21 Nomba ilyo baya musha kunse
Acts7:22 Mose bamusambilisha acenjela nganshi mu masambililo yonse aya bena Egupto. Awe alumbuka nganshi mufyo alelanda na mufyo alecita.
Acts7:23 “Mose cilya afika imyaka amakumi yane iyakufyalwa
Acts7:24 Amonako uko umwina Egupto alecusha umwina Israeli umo. Awe apokololako umwina Israeli
Acts7:25 Mose alatontonkanya ukuti abena Israeli kuti bailuka
Acts7:26 Ubushiku bwakonkapo Mose asanga abena Israeli babili balelwa. Aesha ukubalamununa. Alabeba ati
Acts7:27 Nomba uwaleuma umunankwe atamfula Mose. Amweba ati
Acts7:28 Bushe ulefwaya ukunjipaya nga filya mailo waipeye umwina Egupto?’
Acts7:29 Cilya Mose aumfwa ifi
Acts7:30 “Patile cilya papita imyaka amakumi yane
Acts7:31 Pakumona ifi Mose camupesha amano. Awe ayako alefwaya ukumwensekesha. Lelo aumfwa ishiwi lya Mfumu aliti
Acts7:32 ‘Nine Lesa wa fikolwe fyobe. Nine Lesa wakwa Abrahamu
Acts7:33 Elyo Imfumu yamweba aiti
Acts7:34 Ninjimwena ne mwine ifyo abantu bandi balecula nganshi mu Egupto. Niŋumfwa nefyo balelilishika. Eico ninjika kukubalubula. Kanshi isa nkutume ku Egupto.’
Acts7:35 “Ni Mose umo wine uo abena Israeli bakeene
Acts7:36 Mose asuka abafumya mu Egupto. Acitile ifinjelengwe ne fishibilo ifingi mu Egupto
Acts7:37 Ni uyu wine Mose ewaebele abena Israeli ati
Acts7:38 Ali pamo ne cilonganino ca bena Israeli mu matololo. Ni Mose eo malaika alandile nankwe pa lupili lwa Sinai
Acts7:39 “Lelo ifikolwe fyesu tafyalefwaya ukumumfwila. Fyamusangukila
Acts7:40 Kanshi epakweba Aroni afiti
Acts7:41 Awe kanshi epakupanga icilubi icapala iciponti ca ŋombe. Balacituula na malambo. Basefya ne nsansa icintufye ico abene bapangile ne minwe yabo.
Acts7:42 Lesa nao abalukila
Acts7:43 Nimwe mwalesenda itenti lya mulungu Moleki
Acts7:44 “Ilyo bali mu matololo ifikolwe fyesu fyali ne Tenti lyakwa Lesa ilyakulanga ukuti Lesa ali pakati kabo. Lyapangilwe mu musango Lesa alangilemo Mose ukulipanga
Acts7:45 Ifikolwe fyesu fyaleshilana Itenti lyakwa Lesa umukonkanina inkulo. Fyalelisenda no kulingisha mu calo bapokolwele ku mishobo imbi
Acts7:46 Lesa alitemenwe Davidi. Davidi epakulomba Lesa ukuti akuulile Lesa wakwa Yakobo umwakwikala.
Acts7:47 Lelo ni Solomoni ewakuulile Lesa iŋanda.
Acts7:48 “Lelo Lesa Mukulu tekala mu mayanda yakuulwa na bantu. Efyo na kasesema alanda ati
Acts7:49 “‘Lesa atila ati
Acts7:50 Bushe teine ne mwine napanga ifi fyonse?’
Acts7:51 “Mwe bantu bakosa imitwe mwe! Mwaumalala imitima no kukanaumfwa nga Benafyalo. Mwabafye nge fikolwe fyenu. Imwe lyonse mukaana ukumfwila Mupashi Wamushilo!
Acts7:52 Bushe palibapo kasesema uo ifikolwe fyenu fishacushishe? Ifikolwe fyenu fyaleipaya inkombe shakwa Lesa ishalesobela ukwisa kwa Mubomfi uwapetamina Lesa. Nomba imwe mwamuposa ku balwani
Acts7:53 Nimwe mwapokelele Amafunde yakwa Mose
Acts7:54 Ilyo bashicilye baumfwa ifyo Stefano alanda
Acts7:55 Nomba Stefano aisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo. Elyo apunamina ku mulu
Acts7:56 Stefano elyo asosa ati; “Namona umulu naucenama
Acts7:57 Awe bashicilye balasowesha
Acts7:58 Balamutintanya
Acts7:59 Ilyo balemulasa amabwe
Acts7:60 Elyo afukama panshi apunda ati
Acts8:1 Saulo wena amwene ukuti balungika pakwipaya Stefano. Pali ubo bwine bushiku Abayuda batampileko ukulacusha ulukuta mu Yerusalemu. Abalukuta bonse epakusalanganina mu calo ca Yudeya na mu ca Samaria. Abashelefye mu musumba basolefye beka.
Acts8:2 Awe abantu bamo abapetamina Lesa baya shiika Stefano
Acts8:3 Lelo Saulo wena aswangana nganshi mukulofya ulukuta lonse. Alaingila muli cila ŋanda alekulululamo abasumina abaume na banakashi
Acts8:4 Abasumina abasalangene
Acts8:5 Filipo ayile ku musumba umo uwa mu Samaria. Alabila Kristu ku bantu.
Acts8:6 Amabumba yalakutikisha pakumfwa bwino ifyo Filipo alefunda
Acts8:7 Pantu imipashi yakowela yalefuma mu bantu abengi ilepunda. Elyo ifite ne filema ifingi nafyo fyalepola.
Acts8:8 Awe na mu musumba mwabafye insansa sheka sheka.
Acts8:9 Mu musumba uyo uwa mu Samaria mwalimo umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Simoni. Pa nshita imo alecita ifyamalele mu musumba
Acts8:10 Abantu bonse abakalamba na baice balekutikisha nganshi kufyo alesosa. Baleti
Acts8:11 Balemukutikisha nganshi
Acts8:12 Nomba ilyo basumina ifyo Filipo alebila Mbila Nsuma ya Bufumu bwakwa Lesa ne yakwa Yesu Kristu
Acts8:13 Na Simone nao wine asuka asumina. Ilyo abatishiwa
Acts8:14 Ilyo abasole mu Yerusalemu baumfwa ukuti abena Samaria nabasekelela amashiwi yakwa Lesa
Acts8:15 Cilya bafikako
Acts8:16 Pantu Mupashi Wamushilo tali talaisa pali bene. Babatishiwefye mwishina lya Mfumu Yesu.
Acts8:17 Elyo Petelo na Yoani babatambalikilapo amaboko
Acts8:18 Simoni cilya amona ukuti bapoka Mupashi Wamushilo ico abasole babatambalikilapo amaboko
Acts8:19 Abeba ati
Acts8:20 Lelo Petelo amwasuka ati
Acts8:21 Taulingile nelyo panono ukulabomba na ifwe. Pantu uli no mutima uwafulungana pa cinso cakwa Lesa.
Acts8:22 Kanshi lapila pali iyi mitontonkanishishe yobe ibi. Upapate ku Mfumu. Uleke ikubeleleko uluse pakukwata imitontonkanishishe ya uyu musango mu mutima obe.
Acts8:23 Pantu namona ukuti umutima obe waisulamo ubukali
Acts8:24 Simoni epakwasuka ati
Acts8:25 Petelo na Yoani balafunda amashiwi yakwa Lesa baleshimika nokuti bena ni bakambone. Elyo babwelelamo ku Yerusalemu. Ilyo baleya
Acts8:26 Malaika wa Mfumu aebele Filipo ati
Acts8:27 Awe aima alaya. Kanshi umwina Etiopia mutungwi nao alebwelelamo kumwabo. Uyu muntu ali cilolo uwacindama
Acts8:28 Nomba alebwelamo kumwabo
Acts8:29 Mupashi aeba Filipo ati
Acts8:30 Awe Filipo abutukilako. Aumfwa nokuti alebelenga ifyalemba kasesema Esaya. Elyo Filipo amwipusha ati
Acts8:31 Nao ayasuka ati
Acts8:32 Kanshi Amalembo Yamushilo ayo alebelenga ni aya
Acts8:33 Balemusaalula
Acts8:34 Elyo mutungwi aeba Filipo ati
Acts8:35 Elyo Filipo atampa ukulanda. Atampilafye ku Malembo Yamushilo yene acilabelenga. Elyo amulondolwelako na pa Mbila Nsuma yakwa Yesu.
Acts8:36 Nomba ilyo baleya mu musebo
Acts8:37 [Filipo amweba ati
Acts8:38 Elyo mutungwi aeba ukuti iceleta liminine. Awe bonse babili
Acts8:39 Cilya bafuma mu menshi na Mupashi wa Mfumu asenda Filipo. Cilolo tatalile amumona nakabili. Awe akonkanyapo ulwendo lwakwe nasansamuka nganshi.
Acts8:40 Filipo wena aisangafye ali mu Asoti. Elyo aya alepitana mu mishi alebila Imbila Nsuma
Acts9:1 Saulo akonkenyepofye ukululunkana nganshi mukufwaya ukwipaya abasambi. Awe aya kuli Shimapepo mukalamba.
Acts9:2 Aya lomba amakalata yakutwala ku masinagoga mu Damasiko. Pakuti nga asangako abaume nangu abanakashi abakonka inshila Yesu alanga
Acts9:3 Kanshi ilyo aleya ku Damasiko
Acts9:4 Awe Saulo awa panshi. Aumfwa ne shiwi lilemweba aliti
Acts9:5 Saulo aipusha ati
Acts9:6 Nomba ima
Acts9:7 Abantu bali na Saulo pa lwendo
Acts9:8 Saulo aima panshi. Ati ashibatule amenso
Acts9:9 Pa nshiku shitatu tewakulolesha nakalya. Kabili talelya nangu ukunwa kantu.
Acts9:10 Mu Damasiko mwaleikala umusambi umo
Acts9:11 Imfumu yamweba aiti
Acts9:12 Mu cimonwa
Acts9:13 Anania ayasuka ati
Acts9:14 Kanshi na kuno kwine eshile ku maka ya bashimapepo bacindami
Acts9:15 Imfumu yamweba aiti
Acts9:16 Kabili nine wine ne mwine nkamulanga ifyo ali nokucula pa mulandu wa ine.”
Acts9:17 Anania epakwima
Acts9:18 Apopene mu menso yakwa Saulo mwalukuta ifintu ifyaba nga mamba. Awe atampa no kulalolesha nakabili. Elyo aima
Acts9:19 Ati alye icakulya
Acts9:20 Apopene atampa no kulashimikila mu masinagoga ukuti Yesu ni Mwana Lesa.
Acts9:21 Awe bonse abaleteshako balapapa. Balaipushanya abati
Acts9:22 Lelo Saulo akalabana nganshi mukufunda. Alapelenganya Abayuda ba mu Damasiko amano
Acts9:23 Cilya papita inshiku ishingi
Acts9:24 Lelo Saulo aumfwako ifyo balemupangila. Akasuba no bushiku balalonda impongolo sha musumba pakuti bamwipaye.
Acts9:25 Nomba abasambi bakwa Saulo ubushiku bamubuula
Acts9:26 Saulo afikile ku Yerusalemu elyo alefwaya ukuti aleikumika ku basambi. Lelo balamutiina bonse
Acts9:27 Elyo Banaba amusenda
Acts9:28 Elyo Saulo alaendauka nabo
Acts9:29 Kabili alalanda na Bayuda abalanda Icigiriki no kupaashanya nabo. Lelo bena balafwaya ukumwipaya.
Acts9:30 Cilya ababwananyina baishiba ifi
Acts9:31 Kanshi ulukuta lonse mu Yudeya
Acts9:32 Petelo elyo alepitanafye mpanga yonse ku basumina. Asuka pa nshita imo aya pempula na bamushilo abaleikala mu Luda.
Acts9:33 Mu Luda emo asanga umuntu umo
Acts9:34 Petelo amweba ati
Acts9:35 Abantu bonse abaleikala mu Luda na mu Sharoni cilya bamumona
Acts9:36 Mu Yopa mwali umusambi umo umwanakashi
Acts9:37 Mu nshiku shine isho
Acts9:38 Luda ni mupepi na Yopa. Kanshi abasambi baumfwa ukuti Petelo ali mu Luda. Batumako abantu babili abakumweba ukuti
Acts9:39 Petelo aima aya nabo. Cilya afika
Acts9:40 Elyo Petelo abafumya mu muputule. Afukama
Acts9:41 Petelo amwikata pa kuboko
Acts9:42 Awe ici cintu caishibikwafye mu Yopa monse
Acts9:43 Petelo aikala mu Yopa inshikufye ishingi. Alaikala na kanuka wampapa umo
Acts10:1 Mu musumba wa Kesalia mwalimo umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Konelio. Ali umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo. Iyi mpuka ya fita
Acts10:2 Ali umuntu uwapetamina Lesa. Kabili umwine wine no lupwa lwakwe lonse balikwatile Lesa akatiina. Aleyafwilisha nganshi Abayuda abalanda. Kabili lyonse alebikapofye ukupepa Lesa.
Acts10:3 Ubushiku bumo cilya akasuba kasendama lwa pa nshita ya 15:00
Acts10:4 Konelio aikatwa no mwenso
Acts10:5 Kanshi nomba tuma abantu bamo ku Yopa
Acts10:6 Aleikala kwa Simoni kanuka wampapa. Iŋanda yakwe yaba mupepi na bemba.”

Acts10:8 Abashimikilako fyonse ifimoneke
Acts10:9 Ubushiku ubwakonkelepo cilyafye akasuba kalafika pakati ka mutwe pa nshita ya 12:00
Acts10:10 Awe insala yamwikata
Acts10:11 Amona umulu waisuka. Amona ne cintu cimo icapala icisalu icikalamba
Acts10:12 Mukati muli inama sha misango ne misango
Acts10:13 Elyo ishiwi lyamweba aliti
Acts10:14 Lelo Petelo ayasuka ati

Acts10:16 Awe ici cintu cabwekeshapo imiku itatu. Elyo apopene icisalu bacisenda mu mulu nakabili.

Acts10:18 Balaipusha abati
Acts10:19 Ilyo Petelo acili aletontonkanya pa cimonwa
Acts10:20 Ale ika
Acts10:21 Awe Petelo aika. Elyo abeba ati

Acts10:25 Kanshi cilya Petelo afika kwa Konelio
Acts10:26 Lelo Petelo
Acts10:27 Petelo aingila mu ŋanda ninshi balelanda na Konelio. Asangamo na bantu abengi nabalongana.
Acts10:28 Alabeba ati
Acts10:29 Eico ilyo unjitile
Acts10:30 Konelio ayasuka ati
Acts10:31 Asosa ati
Acts10:32 Kanshi tuma ku Yopa abakuyaita Simoni uo batila Petelo. Ekala kwa Simoni kanuka wampapa. Iŋanda yakwe yaba mupepi na bemba.’
Acts10:33 Kanshi na ine apopene epakutuma abakukwita
Acts10:34 Elyo Petelo alabeba ati
Acts10:35 Lelo asekelafye umuntu onse uwa mu mushobo onse kumfwa nga akwatila Lesa akatiina kabili alecita nefyo afwaya.
Acts10:36 Imwe mwalishiba amashiwi Lesa atumine abena Israeli. Aya mashiwi yakutila
Acts10:37 Imwe namwishiba ifyacitika mu Yudeya monse
Acts10:38 Mwalishiba nefyo Lesa afumfumwine Mupashi Wamushilo na maka yakwe pali Yesu wa ku Nasaleti. Elyo nao alapitana konse alecita ifintu ifisuma
Acts10:39 Ifwe tuli bakambone muli fyonse ifyo Yesu acitile mu Yerusalemu na mu calofye conse ica Bayuda. Basukile bamwipaya mukumutanika pa musalaba.
Acts10:40 Lelo pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu
Acts10:41 Kwena te ku bantu bonse iyoo
Acts10:42 Atukonkomeshe no kulashimikila abantu
Acts10:43 Kanshi eo bakasesema bonse bapeelapo bukambone abati
Acts10:44 Ilyo Petelo acili alesosa aya mashiwi
Acts10:45 Abayuda abasumina abaishile na Petelo ukufuma ku Yopa
Acts10:46 Baumfwa noko balelanda indimi ishalekana lekana
Acts10:47 “Nga nani engakaanya aba bantu ukubatishiwa ku menshi. Bapokelela Mupashi Wamushilo nga filya fine na ifwe twapokelele.”
Acts10:48 Petelo epakubeba ukuti babatishiwe mwishina lyakwa Yesu Kristu. Elyo bamulomba ukuti ekale nabo inshiku shimo shimo.
Acts11:1 Abasole na babwananyina bonse mu Yudeya baumfwile ukuti Abenafyalo nabo nabapokelela ishiwi lyakwa Lesa.

Acts11:3 Balamweba ati
Acts11:4 Kanshi Petelo epakutampa
Acts11:5 Ati
Acts11:6 Awe nati ndolekeshe mukati
Acts11:7 Elyo natesha ishiwi lyanjeba aliti

Acts11:9 Nakabili ishiwi lyabwekeshepo ukufuma mu mulu aliti
Acts11:10 Ici cintu cabwekeshepo imiku itatu. Elyo icisalu casendwa mu mulu.
Acts11:11 Pa nshita ine iyo
Acts11:12 Elyo Mupashi anjeba ukuya nabo ukwabula ukushingashinga. Aba bamunyinefwe mutanda twaile nabo ku Kesalia. Awe twaya ingila na mu ŋanda mwa Konelio.
Acts11:13 Elyo Konelio alatushimikila ifyo amwene malaika naiminina mu ŋanda mumwakwe. Uyu malaika amweba ati
Acts11:14 Uyu muntu eukesa kweba amashiwi yakuti iwe no lupwa lobe mukamone ukupusuka.’

Acts11:16 Elyo naibukisha nefyo Imfumu yasosele aiti

Acts11:18 Ilyo baumfwa ifi
Acts11:19 Panuma yakwipaya Stefano
Acts11:20 Lelo bamo pa basumina
Acts11:21 Imfumu nayo yalabafwako. Awe na bantu abengi basumina
Acts11:22 Ili lyashi lyasuka lyaumfwika kwibumba lya ku lukuta lwa ku Yerusalemu. Elyo nabo batumineko Banaba ku Antioki.
Acts11:23 Ilyo afikileko
Acts11:24 Banaba ali umuntu umusuma
Acts11:25 Elyo Banaba aya ku Taso kukufwaya Saulo
Acts11:26 Cilya amusanga
Acts11:27 Mu nshita ine iyi ilyo Banaba na Saulo bali mu Antioki elyo bakasesema bamo baishile ku Antioki ukufuma ku Yerusalemu.
Acts11:28 Elyo umo pali aba bakasesema
Acts11:29 Elyo abasambi baumfwana ukuti bali nokutuma ifyakwafwako ababwananyina banabo aba mu Yudeya. Abati “Cila muntu ali nokupeela apo akwatile.”
Acts11:30 Kanshi efintu bacitile. Bapeela Banaba na Saulo indalama ishakutwala ku bakalamba mu Yerusalemu.
Acts12:1 Muli iyo ine nshita

Acts12:10 Bapita pa mpuka yapakubala iya fita fyalelonda

Acts12:20 Herodi tabaleumfwana na bantu ba mu Turi na ba mu Sidoni. Kanshi nabo epakuyako ibumba kukumonana na Herodi. Babalilapo ukusembeleka Blasto no kwikatana nankwe

Acts13:6 Elyo Banaba na Saulo bapita ne nshila ya ku mulundu baya fika na ku Pafosi. Ku Pafosi eko basanga Umuyuda umo ishina lyakwe ni Bar-Yesu. Uyu muntu alecita amalele

Acts13:28 Nelyo bashamwene mulandu wakumwipailapo

Acts13:34 Kabili ifyo Lesa asosa pakubusha Yesu ku bafwa
Acts13:35 Elyo pambi napo atila

Acts13:37 Lelo uo Lesa abusha ku bafwa

Acts13:51 Nabo abasole babakuntila ulukungu lwa ku makasa yabo
Acts13:52 Abasambi ba mu Antioki bena basansamuka nganshi

Acts14:4 Abantu mu musumba basuka bapatukana. Bamo bawila ku Bayuda
Acts14:5 Basuka Abenafyalo na Bayuda pamo pene ne ntungulushi shabo

Acts14:7 Nako kwine balebila Imbila Nsuma.
Acts14:8 Mu Lusitila mwali umuntu uwalemana amakasa. Afyelwe icilema
Acts14:9 Uyu muntu alekutika kufyo Paulo alelanda. Paulo amulolekesha
Acts14:10 Aikatisha ishiwi ati

Acts14:12 Banaba balamwita Seo. Elyo Paulo wena ico ewalelandisha balamwita Elemesi.

Acts14:16 Mu myaka yakale Lesa alekele imishobo yonse ukulacita ifyo ilefwaya.
Acts14:17 Lelo Lesa lyonse alailanga ukuti eko aba ku fisuma fyonse acita. Alamupeela imfula ukufuma ku mulu
Acts14:18 Nangu abasole basosele aya mashiwi

Acts14:20 Lelo ilyo abasambi baisa longana apo ali
Acts14:21 Mu Debe

Acts14:25 Mu Pega namo bafundamo amashiwi ya Mfumu
Acts14:26 Kabili bafuma ku Atalia
