2Corinthians8:7 Imwe mwalicilamo ukukwatisha fyonse
2Corinthians8:8 Ine nshilemupangila ifunde nelyo limo. Lelo ndefwayafye ukumona apo icitemwiko cenu capela
2Corinthians8:9 Imwe mwalishiba icikuuku ca Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu. Nangu wena ali umukankala
2Corinthians8:10 Ine ifyo ndetontonkanya icingamuwamina ukucita pali uyu mulandu nifi. Pali ino nshita mutale mupwishe umulimo mwatampile uyu mwaka wapwile. Nimwe mwabalilepo ukutampa ukubomba uyu mulimo
2Corinthians8:11 Aleni kanshi pwilishisheni umulimo! Kalabaneni ukupwisha
2Corinthians8:12 Nga cine cine mulefwaya ukupeela
2Corinthians8:13 Kanshi nshiloseshefye mukutila

2Corinthians8:15 Efyo calembwa ukuti
2Corinthians8:16 Ndetasha Lesa pakulenga Tito amusakamane nga filya ine musakamana.
2Corinthians8:17 Teicofye namwipwishe ukuti ese
2Corinthians8:18 Munyinefwe uyo twatuma uuleisa na Tito
2Corinthians8:19 Teico ceka
2Corinthians8:20 Tulasakamana nganshi ukuti abantu belaisosha pafyo tulebomba uyu mulimo wa fyabupe fyafula ifi.
2Corinthians8:21 Ifwe tufwaya ukucita ifisuma
2Corinthians8:22 Kanshi twatuma na umbi munyinefwe ukwisa nabo. Uyu munyinefwe twalimwesha mu nshila ishingi lelo twasanga ukuti lyonse abafye uwacincila. Nomba nico imwe alimucetekela nganshi
2Corinthians8:23 Tito wena eo twaampana nankwe
2Corinthians8:24 Mulange ukuti mwalibatemwa. Epakuti inkuta shonse shishininkishe no kwishiba ukuti tulalungika pakumutasha.
2Corinthians9:1 Kwena mu cacine tacilefwaikwa ukumulembela pa mulimo wakwafwa abamushilo ba mu Yudeya.
2Corinthians9:2 Nalishiba ukuti mulafwaisha ukwafwa. Kanshi eico mutashisha ku bantu ba mu Makedonia. Ndabeba ukuti abanenu mu Akaia bena batendeke umulimo wakwafwilishako uyu mwaka wapwile. Kanshi ukucincila kwenu nakulenga abengi pali bena babe abacincila.
2Corinthians9:3 Nomba natuma aba bamunyinefwe
2Corinthians9:4 Limbi nalimo kuti naisa na bena Makedonia bamo
2Corinthians9:5 Eico ine ntontonkenye ukuti
2Corinthians9:6 Mwibukishe ukuti umuntu uutanda utunono
2Corinthians9:7 Cila muntu ali nokupeela apo umwine alefwaila
2Corinthians9:8 Kabili Lesa aliba na maka yakupeela icikuuku ukucila na pali fyonse ifyo mukabila. Epakuti lyonse imwe mwe bene mulekwata fyonse ifyo mulekabila
2Corinthians9:9 Efyo calembwa ukuti
2Corinthians9:10 Kabili Lesa uupeela imbuto kuli katanda ne cakulya cakuti alye
2Corinthians9:11 Lesa nao akulalenga lyonse mulekwata ifingi
2Corinthians9:12 Pantu uyu mulimo mulebomba
2Corinthians9:13 Ala uyu mulimo mubombele

2Corinthians9:15 Ala natuletasha Lesa pa bupe bwakwe ubushaikulila!
2Corinthians10:1 Ine wine ne Paulo neo beba abati naba uwafuuka kabili uwamutembo ilyo ndi na imwe
2Corinthians10:2 Ala ndemupapata ku cilela no luse lwakwa Kristu ukuti
2Corinthians10:3 Kwena twikalafye ngo muntu onse pano calo
2Corinthians10:4 Ifyanso tulwishishako te fyabuntunse iyoo
2Corinthians10:5 Tulacimfya ifikansa fyonse ifyabufi. Tulacimfya icilumba conse icilesha ukwishiba Lesa. Tulanasha amatontonkanyo yonse aya bantu ukuti yanakile Kristu.
2Corinthians10:6 Kanshi ilyo mukanakila Kristu umupwilapo lyena elyo tukakanda abo bonse abamusangukila.
2Corinthians10:7 Lolekesheni bwino ifintu muleimwena na menso yenu! Bushe palipo umuntu umo uuleimona ukuti cine cine muntu wakwa Kristu? Ala na ifwe bene tuli bakwa Kristu ngefyo fine aletontonkanya ukuti wena muntu wakwa Kristu.
2Corinthians10:8 Kwena insoni shena nshikwete
2Corinthians10:9 Nshilefwaya ukuti cimoneke kwati ndefwaya ukumutiinya ku makalata yandi.
2Corinthians10:10 Pantu bamo baleisosha abati
2Corinthians10:11 Abo bantu bali nokushininkisha ukuti
2Corinthians10:12 Lelo kwena tekuti tupame ukulingana nangu ukuipalanya kuli abo bantu abaimona ukucila bambi. Awe aba bantu ni mpelwamano! Abene bene baipangila icipimo cakuipiminako
2Corinthians10:13 Ifwe ukuitakisha kwesu teti kucile mu cipimo. Ifwe ukuitakisha kwesu kuti kwabafye nokulingana no mulimo Lesa atupeela. Elyo muli ici cena
2Corinthians10:14 Apo na imwe mwaba muli ici cipimo tuitakishamo
2Corinthians10:15 Eico ifwe tatuitakisha ukucila pa cipimo ico Lesa atupimina
2Corinthians10:16 Elyo lyena ukufuma mu calo cenu tukalabila Imbila Nsuma na mu fyalo fimbi. Kabili epakuti kwikaba ukuitakisha pa mulimo uwabombwa no muntu umbi kale.

2Corinthians11:2 Filya Lesa aba no bufuba pali imwe
2Corinthians11:3 Ndi no mwenso wakuti amano yenu kuti yayalukila ku bubi
2Corinthians11:4 Pantu imwe mupokelela bwangu bwangufye onse uwaisa kuli imwe alabila na pali Yesu umbi uo ifwe tushamubililapo. Kabili mupokelela mupashi ne mbila ifyapusana na Mupashi ne Mbila Nsuma mwapokelele kuli ifwe.
2Corinthians11:5 Ine ndetontonkanya ukuti abo basole mulumbilisha tabancilile nakalya.
2Corinthians11:6 Nalimo mukulanda mwena nshacenjela
2Corinthians11:7 Nshatalile mulipilisha pakumushimikila Imbila Nsuma yakwa Lesa. Bushe nalilufyenye pali ico naleicefya pakuti imwe mucindame?

2Corinthians11:9 Kabili ilyo nali na imwe nshatalile musakamika pakuti mungafwilisheko pafyo nalekabila. Bamunyinefwe abafumine ku Makedonia ebandetele fyonse ifyo nalekabila. Ifyo fine kale nshalemusakamika efyo na kuntanshi kwine cikaba.
2Corinthians11:10 Kanshi mu cishinka cakwa Kristu icaba muli ine
2Corinthians11:11 Cinshi nasosela ifi? Bushe nico nshamutemwa? Lesa wena alishiba ukuti nalimutemwa!
2Corinthians11:12 Ifyo ndecita nomba efyo nakulakonkanyapo ukucita lyonse
2Corinthians11:13 Abo bantu tabali basole bacine cine. Basole babufi
2Corinthians11:14 Awe cena ico te cakupapa iyoo! Pantu na Satana nao alabepa abantu

2Corinthians11:17 Lelo ifi nalasosa te milandile ya Imfumu. Muli ici cena icakuitakisha ndelandafye icine cine nge ciwelewele.
2Corinthians11:18 Lelo apo abantu abengi baitakisha pafyo babomba ifyabuntunse
2Corinthians11:19 Apo imwe mwe bene muli bamano nganshi

2Corinthians11:21 Awe cena cansoni nasumina

2Corinthians11:24 Pa miku isano Abayuda bangumine ifikoti amakumi yatatu na pabula.

2Corinthians12:3 Nalishibe ukuti uyu muntu asendelwe ku Cifulo Cansansa. Nga asendelwe umutuntulu no mubili nalimo califye mu cimonwa
2Corinthians12:4 Muli iyo ncende aumfwile ifintu umuntu ashingalondolola
2Corinthians12:5 Pali uyu muntu pena epo ningaitakishishapo. Nomba pali ine ne mwine tekuti njitakishe
2Corinthians12:6 Kwena nangu ningaitakisha tekuti mbe iciwelewele

2Corinthians12:8 Napapete Imfumu pa miku itatu pakuti imfumyemo ici cintu.
2Corinthians12:9 Lelo Imfumu yanjaswike aiti
2Corinthians12:10 Pa mulandu wakwa Kristu ndasekela mu bunasha
2Corinthians12:11 Nalanda kwati ndi ciwelewele
2Corinthians12:12 Ifishibilo ifilanga ukuba umusole wine wine
2Corinthians12:13 Ngefyo nshabomba kuli imwe ifyo nabomba ku nkuta shimbi finshi? Shikanofye ninshi nico nshamusakamike kukungafwa? Kanshi mbeleleniko uluse pali ici cilubo!
2Corinthians12:14 Nomba uyu muku ewalenga butatu uwakwisa mupempula. Kabili nshakamusakamike ku cintu nelyo cimo. Ico ine mfwaya nimwe
2Corinthians12:15 Ine kuti nasansamuka nganshi ukubomfya fyonse ifyo nakwata no kuleka umweo wandi pakumwafwako. Bushe nico namutemwisha ifyo

2Corinthians12:18 Nalombele Tito ukwisa uko

2Corinthians12:21 Ndetiina ukuti limbi ilyo nkesa

Galatians1:1 Ine Paulo umusole. Nshaitwa nangu ukutumwa no muntu. Lelo ni Yesu Kristu na Lesa Wishi uwamubushishe ku bafwa ebanjita.
Galatians1:2 Ababwananyina bonse abo tuli nabo
Galatians1:3 Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Shifwe ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu fileba na imwe.
Galatians1:4 Kristu aliituula ilambo pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyesu
Galatians1:5 Lesa nalelumbwa pe na pe! Ameni.
Galatians1:6 Kwena namunsungusha! Pa nshitafye inono namusangukila Lesa uwamwitile pa mulandu wa cikuuku cakwa Kristu
Galatians1:7 Awe kwena
Galatians1:8 Lelo cibe nifwe nangu ni malaika ukufuma ku mulu nga aisa bila imbila imbi iyapusana ne Mbila Nsuma twabilile kuli imwe
Galatians1:9 Twalimwebele kale
Galatians1:10 Bushe pakulanda ifi
Galatians1:11 Mwe bamunyinane
Galatians1:12 Nshaipokelela ukufuma ku muntu nelyo umo
Galatians1:13 Mwalyumfwa ifya pa bumi bwandi ilyo nalekonka imipepele ya Ciyuda. Nacushishe nganshi ulukuta lwakwa Lesa. Nalefwayafye no kululofya.
Galatians1:14 Nalicincile ukucila Abayuda banandi abengi aba nkulo yandi mukukonka imipepele ya Ciyuda. Kabili nalibacilile bonse ukukonka ifishilano fya fikolwe fyesu.
Galatians1:15 Lelo Lesa ku cikuuku cakwe ansalile ninshi nshilafyalwa
Galatians1:16 Umwine wine ewatemenwe no kunsokolwela Mwane
Galatians1:17 Kabili nshaile nangu ni ku Yerusalemu kwine kukumona abantangilile ukuba abasole
Galatians1:18 Panuma ya myaka itatu elyo naile ku Yerusalemu kukumonana na Kefa. Naikele nankwe inshiku ikumi limo na shisano.
Galatians1:19 Nshamonene na musole umbi
Galatians1:20 Ndemweba pa menso yakwa Lesa
Galatians1:21 Elyo kabili naile ku calo ca Siria na Kilikia.
Galatians1:22 Inkuta sha mu Yudeya ishaba muli Kristu shena tashanjishibe no kumonana tatwamonanapo nasho.
Galatians1:23 Shaleumfwafye ifyo baleshishimikila abati
Galatians1:24 Nabo epakulalumbanya Lesa pa mulandu wa ine.
Galatians2:1 Papitile imyaka ikumi limo na ine
Galatians2:2 Ico nailileko
Galatians2:3 Tito uo nali nao nangu ena ali Mugiriki
Galatians2:4 Lelo abantu bamo abaleilanga ukuba kwati bena Kristu banensu balafwaya ukuti asembululwe. Aba bantu baishile sokelela mwibumba lyesu nge nengu pakuti bafwailishe pa buntungwa twashukila pali ico twaba muli Kristu. Bena balefwaya ukututeeka mu busha.
Galatians2:5 Awe na ifwe twakaanininafye ukubanakila
Galatians2:6 Lelo abo abalemoneka ukuba intungulushi
Galatians2:7 Lelo bamwenefye bwino ukuti Lesa alimpeela umulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma ku Benafyalo
Galatians2:8 Pantu ni Lesa umwine ku maka yakwe ewalenga ukuti mbe umusole ku Benafyalo
Galatians2:9 Ishi ntungulushi Yakobo
Galatians2:10 Icintu cimo ico batulombele
Galatians2:11 Ilyo Kefa aishile ku Antioki nalimukalipile pa bantu
Galatians2:12 Pantu ilyo abantu bafumine kuli Yakobo bali tabalati bese
Galatians2:13 Abena Kristu Abayuda bambi nabo ku mulandu wa mwenso balakonkelela ubucenjeshi bwakwa Kefa. Banaba nao wine ku mulandu wa mwenso alacita ubucenjeshi bumo bwine.
Galatians2:14 Kanshi ilyo namona ukuti aba bantu tabali pa cishinka mukukonka mashiwi ya Mbila Nsuma
Galatians2:15 Ifwe twafyalwa Abayuda
Galatians2:16 Ifwe twalishiba ukuti umuntu taba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa pa mulandu wakusunga Amafunde yakwa Mose
Galatians2:17 Nomba ifwe nga tufwaya ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa mukusumina muli Kristu
Galatians2:18 Nga cakuti nabwelela kukukuula ico naonawile
Galatians2:19 Ukulingana no mwalola Amafunde yakwa Mose ine nalifwa

Galatians3:1 Mwe bena Galatia muli mpelwamano! Nani uwamufulungenye? Nalimulondolwela bwino no kumulangafye bwino ifyo Kristu atanikwe pa musalaba.
Galatians3:2 Nalamwipushafye icintu cimo
Galatians3:3 Bushe cine kupelwamano konse uko! Mwatampile na Mupashi wakwa Lesa
Galatians3:4 Bushe ninshi fyonse ifyo mwaculileko fyali fyafye? Nshilesubila ukuti fyali fyafye!
Galatians3:5 Ico Lesa amupeelela Mupashi no kulacita ifipeshamano uko muli
Galatians3:6 Umfweni ifyo Abrahamu acitile
Galatians3:7 Kanshi mufwile ukwishiba ukuti abantu bacisumino e bana bene bene abakwa Abrahamu.
Galatians3:8 Amalembo Yamushilo yalisobele ukuti
Galatians3:9 Kanshi bonse abasumina balapaalwa nga filya Abrahamu apaalilwe ico asumine.
Galatians3:10 Abo bonse abashintilila pafyo babomba mukusunga Amafunde yakwa Mose balishama. Pantu calembwa ukuti
Galatians3:11 Lelo calishibikwafye bwino ukuti Amafunde yakwa Mose tayalenga muntu nelyo umo ukuti abe uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa. Pantu calembwa ukuti
Galatians3:12 Nomba Amafunde yakwa Mose tayashintilila pa citetekelo. Pantu calembwa ukuti
Galatians3:13 Lelo Kristu alitulubula ukufuma ku citipu icaletele Amafunde yakwa Mose

Galatians3:15 Bamunyinane

Galatians3:17 Kanshi umo nalosha ni umu
Galatians3:18 Pantu ubupe ubo Lesa alaya ukupeela
Galatians3:19 Nga kanshi Amafunde yakwa Mose ya mulimo nshi? Lesa apeele aya mafunde pakulanga ifyo umuntu abifya. Kabili yali nokubakofye mpaka uwa mu bufyashi bwakwa Abrahamu
Galatians3:20 Ndubulwila tafwaikwa ukumfwa nga palifye umuntu umo
Galatians3:21 Bushe calola mukuti Amafunde yakwa Mose yalipusana nefyo Lesa alaya? Awe
Galatians3:22 Lelo calembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ukuti
Galatians3:23 Ilyo inshita ya cisumino yali tailaisa

Galatians5:18 Lelo nga Mupashi eumutungulula
Galatians5:19 Nomba imicitile ibi iyabuntunse yalishibikwafye bwino. Niyi
Galatians5:20 ukupepa utulubi
Galatians5:21 umufimbila
Galatians5:22 Lelo Mupashi wena alenga icitemwiko
Galatians5:23 umutembo no kushipikisha. Takwaba ifunde nangu limo ililesha ifya musango uyu.
Galatians5:24 Abantu bakwa Kristu Yesu
Galatians5:25 Apo Mupashi ewatupeela umweo
Galatians5:26 Natuleke ukuitutumuna
Galatians6:1 Mwe bamunyinane
Galatians6:2 Mulesendeshanya ifipe ifyafina
Galatians6:3 Umo nga alaitunga ukuba cimo
Galatians6:4 Cila muntu aleipingula pafyo alecita. Nga fisuma
Galatians6:5 Pantu cila muntu ali nokuibombela imilimo yakwe umwine.
Galatians6:6 Umuntu uulefundwa amashiwi yakwa Kristu
Galatians6:7 Mwilaibepa
Galatians6:8 Uubyala mufyo ubuntunse bwakwe bufwaya
Galatians6:9 Kanshi twilatendwa ukucita ifisuma. Pantu kumfwa nga tatulenenuka
Galatians6:10 Kanshi ilyo tucili ne nshita
Galatians6:11 Moneni ifilembo ubukulu ifyo nalalemba. Nine wine ndemulembela no kuboko kwandi!
Galatians6:12 Abo bantu abalemupatikisha ukusembululwa
Galatians6:13 Elyo na basembululwa bene tabasunga Mafunde yakwa Mose. Balefwaya ukuti imwe musembululwe pakuti baleitakishisha pali ico mwanakila ulutambi lwakusembululwa.
Galatians6:14 Kwena ine nshamona cakuitakishishapo kanofye umusalaba wa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu. Pa mulandu wa musalaba wakwa Kristu
Galatians6:15 Ukusembululwa kwafyefye
Galatians6:16 Umutende no luse lwakwa Lesa fibe kuli bonse abakonka ici cebo
Galatians6:17 Ukufuma pali nomba nshilefwaya umuntu ukulancusha. Pantu naliba ne mikofu pa mubili wandi iyilanga ukuti ndi muntu wakwa Yesu.
Galatians6:18 Bamunyinane
Ephesians1:1 Ine Paulo
Ephesians1:2 Icikuuku no mutende fyakwa Lesa Shifwe ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu fileba na imwe.
Ephesians1:3 Natuletasha Lesa kabili Wishi wa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu! Pantu
Ephesians1:4 Ilyo Lesa talati abumbe icalo
Ephesians1:5 Lesa ku kutemwa kwakwe atusobwela libela ukuba abana bakwe pa mulandu wakwa Yesu Kristu. Ni ku kutemwafye umwine Lesa afwaile ifi.
Ephesians1:6 Kanshi natulelumbanya Lesa pa cikuuku cakwe icikalamba
Ephesians1:7 Kristu alitulubula ku mulandu wa mfwa yakwe. Umulopa wakwe walenga nokuti tubelelwe uluse ku fyabubifi fyesu. We cikuuku cakwa Lesa nobe ulakula
Ephesians1:8 ico mu mano yakwe yonse na mu kwiluka kwakwe konse alenga ukuti tushukile.
Ephesians1:9 Lesa alenga twishibe inkaama apangile umwine ukulingana no kutemwa kwakwe
Ephesians1:10 Ilyo inshita yalinga ikafika
Ephesians1:11 Nico tuli muli Kristu ecalengele ukuti Lesa atusale tube abantu bakwe. Pantu Lesa atusobwela libela ukufumafye ku citendekelo
Ephesians1:12 Kanshi ifwe fwe babalilapo ukutetekela muli Kristu
Ephesians1:13 Kabili muli Kristu
Ephesians1:14 Mupashi Wamushilo e cikatilo uulenga tushininkishe ukuti Lesa akatupeela ico alaya abantu bakwe
Ephesians1:15 Kanshi ecalenga ukuti
Ephesians1:16 nshatala ndeka ukutasha Lesa pa mulandu wa imwe. Ndamwibukishako mu mapepo yandi.
Ephesians1:17 Ndalomba na Lesa wa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu
Ephesians1:18 Kabili ndalomba nokuti Mupashi amusanikile amano yenu
Ephesians1:19 Elyo ndalomba nokuti mwishibe nefyo amaka yakula ayabomba muli ifwe fwe basumina. Amaka ayabomba muli ifwe
Ephesians1:20 ayo abomfeshe pakubusha Kristu ku bafwa no kumuteka lubali lwa ku kulyo kwakwe mu mulu.
Ephesians1:21 Nomba alimucindamika
Ephesians1:22 Lesa alenga Kristu ukuti acimfye fyonse. Lesa amupeela na ku lukuta ukuti abe e mutwe wa fintu fyonse.
Ephesians1:23 Pantu ulukuta e mubili wakwa Kristu
Ephesians2:1 Imwe kale mwalifwile pa mulandu wa bumpulamafunde no bubifi bwenu.
Ephesians2:2 Pantu mu bumi bwenu mwalekonkelela imisango iyabipa iya pano calo. Mwalenakila na kateeka wa bufumu bwa mu lwelele
Ephesians2:3 Kwena bonse pa nshita imo na ifwe efyo twali. Twaikele mukukonkelela ulunkumbwa lubi
Ephesians2:4 Lelo Lesa alikwatisha uluse
Ephesians2:5 Eico ilyo twali abafwa ku mulandu wa kubifya kwesu
Ephesians2:6 Kanshi pa mulandu wakwa Kristu
Ephesians2:7 Ico Lesa acitila ifyo
Ephesians2:8 Pantu ni ku cikuuku cakwa Lesa
Ephesians2:9 te ku maka yenu iyoo. Kanshi tapali nangu umo uwakuitakisha pali ici.
Ephesians2:10 Ifwe tulifye fibumbwa fyakwa Lesa. Lesa alitubumba
Ephesians2:11 Imwe mwe Benafyalo muleibukisha ifyo mwali kale. Abayuda bamwita
Ephesians2:12 Mwibukishe ukuti pa nshita ilya tamwaishibe Kristu
Ephesians2:13 Lelo nomba muli Kristu Yesu
Ephesians2:14 Pantu Kristu umwine atucita umushobo umo. Aleta icibote pakati ka Bayuda na Benafyalo. Ku mubili wakwe eko abongolwela icibumba icalebalekanya no kubapatanya.
Ephesians2:15 Alilesha Amafunde yakwa Mose ne ntambi na fyonse ifyo yalekonkomesha. Acita ifi pakuti awikishanye iyi mishobo
Ephesians2:16 Kristu ku mfwa yakwe iya pa musalaba alyonaula ulupato ulwali pakati ka iyi mishobo. Kabili ku mfwa yakwe auminkanya imishobo iyi ibili ukuba umubili umo
Ephesians2:17 Kristu aishile bila Imbila Nsuma yacibote ku bantu bonse
Ephesians2:18 Ni pa mulandu wakwa Kristu eco ifwe bonse Abayuda na Benafyalo twishila pa cinso cakwa Wishi ku bwafwilisho bwakwa Mupashi.
Ephesians2:19 Kanshi eico nomba na imwe mwe Benafyalo tamuli beni nangu imitulatulafye iyoo. Na imwe nomba muli bakaya pamo na bamushilo
Ephesians2:20 Imwe nomba mulifye nge cikuulwa ico bakuula pa mufula uwaimbwa na basole na bakasesema
Ephesians2:21 Ni Kristu umwine uo twaampana nankwe ewikasha icikuulwa conse no kuleka ukuti cikule
Ephesians2:22 Na imwe bene mwe Benafyalo
Ephesians3:1 Ni pa mulandu uyu
Ephesians3:2 Kwena mwalyumfwa ifyo Lesa ku cikuuku cakwe ampeela uyu mulimo uwakumubombela.
Ephesians3:3 Ngefyo nembelepo kale panono
Ephesians3:4 Nga mwabelenga ifyo nembelepo
Ephesians3:5 Mu nkulo ishapita
Ephesians3:6 Ne nkaama niyi iyakuti
Ephesians3:7 Lesa ku cikuuku cakwe alenga ukuti mbe umubomfi wa Mbila Nsuma
Ephesians3:8 Abamushilo bonse balincila ukucindama. Nomba nine Lesa apeela icikuuku cakubila ku Benafyalo ifintu ifikankala ifyacipeshamano ifyaba mu Mbila Nsuma yakwa Kristu.
Ephesians3:9 Ampeela no kulenga ukuti abantu beshibe ifyo ifya mu nkaama yakwe fili nokufikilishiwa. Lesa kabumba wa fintu fyonse alifishile ifyaba mu nkaama yakwe imyaka yonse iyi yapita.
Ephesians3:10 Epakuti nomba mukubomfya ulukuta lwakwe
Ephesians3:11 Lesa abomfya Kristu Yesu Imfumu yesu pakufikilisha aya mapange akwete ukufumafye na ku kale.
Ephesians3:12 Nico tuli muli Kristu neco twamusumina
Ephesians3:13 Kanshi namupapata mwinenuka pali ico ndemuculila

Ephesians3:15 uwinika ishina ulupwa lonse ulwa mu mulu na pano calo.

Ephesians3:17 Ndelomba nokuti ku cisumino mwakwata

Ephesians5:1 Kanshi apo muli bana bakwa Lesa abo atemwa
Ephesians5:2 Kabili muleenda abatemwana
Ephesians5:3 Apo imwe muli bamushilo bakwa Lesa
Ephesians5:4 Imwe tamuli nakubomfya amashiwi yabi
Ephesians5:5 Kanshi mushininkishe ukuti umuntu cilalelale
Ephesians5:6 Mwilaleka muntu nelyo umo amubepaike ku mashiwi yaciwelewele
Ephesians5:7 Kanshi aba bantu te bakwampana nabo.
Ephesians5:8 Pantu kale mwali mu mfifi
Ephesians5:9 Pantu ulubuuto lwena luletafye ifisuma fyeka fyeka
Ephesians5:10 Kanshi muleesha ukwishiba ifintu ifisansamusha Imfumu.
Ephesians5:11 Muletaluka ku fintu fyaciwelewele ifyo bantu bacita mu mfifi. Imwe mulefileta pa lwalala.
Ephesians5:12 Pantu ifyo bacita mu bumfisolo
Ephesians5:13 Pantu ifintu ifyo baleta ku lubuuto
Ephesians5:14 Icintu conse icasokolokela pa lwalala
Ephesians5:15 Kanshi mulemona bwino bwino imyendele yenu mu bumi bwenu. Mwilaenda kwati ni mpelwamano

Ephesians5:17 Mwiba kwati fipumbu

Ephesians5:19 Ilyo mulelanshanya mulebomfya amashiwi ya mu malumbo
Ephesians5:20 Lyonse mulebomfya ishina lya Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu pakutasha Lesa Tata pa fintu fyonse atupeela.
Ephesians5:21 Mulenakilana pa mulandu wakucindika Kristu.
Ephesians5:22 Mwe bakashi
Ephesians5:23 Pantu umulume e mutwe wa mukashi wakwe nga filya Kristu aba e mutwe wa lukuta. Elyo Kristu umwine e Mupusushi wa lukuta ulwaba e mubili wakwe.

Ephesians5:25 Mwe balume
Ephesians5:26 Acita ifi
Ephesians5:27 Epakuti aikwatile umwine ulukuta ulwayemba
Ephesians5:28 Efyo fine abalume bali nokutemwa abakashi babo nga filya fine batemwa imibili yabo. Umwaume uwatemwa umukashi wakwe ninshi aliitemwa umwine.
Ephesians5:29 Tapatala apaba umuntu uwapata umubili wakwe. Lelo alaulisha no kuusunga bwino
Ephesians5:30 Pantu ifwe tuli filundwa fya mubili wakwe.
Ephesians5:31 Efyo calembwa ukuti
Ephesians5:32 Aya mashiwi yasokolola amashiwi ya nkaama ikalamba. Ine ŋumfwa ukuti yalola kuli Kristu na ku lukuta.
Ephesians5:33 Kanshi na imwe bene nifyo fine. Umulume onse ali nokutemwa umukashi wakwe ngefyo aitemwa umwine. Elyo umukashi nao onse ali nokucindika umulume wakwe.

Philippians1:1 Ine Paulo na Timote
Philippians1:2 Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Shifwe ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu fileba na imwe.
Philippians1:3 Ine ndatasha Lesa lyonsefye ilyo ntontonkanya pali imwe.
Philippians1:4 Kabili lyonse ilyo mupepelako imwe bonse
Philippians1:5 Pantu ukufumafye ubushiku bwakubalilapo ilyo mwaumfwile Imbila Nsuma ukufika na nomba
Philippians1:6 Kanshi nalishininkisha ukuti
Philippians1:7 Kabili lyonse nshimulaba
Philippians1:8 Lesa e kambone wandi. Ala ndamufuluka nganshi bonse
Philippians1:9 Ndapepa nokuti icitemwiko cenu cilelundulukilakofye apakalamba mukukula
Philippians1:10 Lyena mukeshiba bwino ifintu ifiwamishepo. Elyo pa Bushiku bwakwa Kristu mukaba abakaele ababula icilubo.
Philippians1:11 Mu bumi bwenu mukaba ne mibeele yonse iyo Lesa afwaya
Philippians1:12 Bamunyinane
Philippians1:13 Kanshi ifita fyonse ifilonda kuno isano na bantu bambi bonse nabeshiba ukuti ico bamposela mu cifungo nico ndi mubomfi wakwa Kristu.
Philippians1:14 Kabili ukuposwa kwandi mu cifungo nakulenga bamunyinefwe abengi ukuba abashipa
Philippians1:15 Bamo kwena babila Kristu ku mulandu wa mufimbila ne fikansa
Philippians1:16 Aba bantu basuma bena bacita ifyo ku mulandu wa citemwiko
Philippians1:17 Lelo balya bambi bena tababa na cishinka mukubila Kristu. Mwabafye umutima wabukaitemwe. Batontonkanyafye pakumfushishako amacushi ilyo ncili mu cifungo.
Philippians1:18 Ici cena te mulandu! Lelo icintu icikalamba cakuti nangu babombe no mutima usuma nangu ubi
Philippians1:19 Pantu ninjishiba ukuti pa mulandu wa ici
Philippians1:20 Ico mfwaisha no kutetekela cakuti nikatala ŋumfwa insoni pa mulimo wandi. Lelo pa nshita yonse elyo ukucila pali ino ine nshita
Philippians1:21 Pantu kuli ine ubumi ni Kristu. Kabili imfwa yena ikandetela ificililepo.
Philippians1:22 Nomba nga cakuti ukwikala umumi nga kuti kwalenga nabomba imilimo ikankala
Philippians1:23 Ifintu fibili filentinta mu bumi bwandi. Ndefwaisha nganshi ukufuma muli buno bumi no kuya ikala na Kristu. Ici cena cawamapo ukucila.
Philippians1:24 Lelo pa mulandu wa imwe
Philippians1:25 Ici cena ninshininkisha. Ninjishiba ukuti twakulaba nenu. Twakulaba na imwe bonse pakuti mukulileko mu cisumino
Philippians1:26 Epakuti ilyo nkabwelela nakabili kuli imwe
Philippians1:27 Kanshi icintu icikalamba mu bumi bwenu
Philippians1:28 Mwilatiina balwani benu
Philippians1:29 Pantu imwe mwalipeelwa ishuko pa mulandu wakwa Kristu
Philippians1:30 Kanshi na imwe nomba muli na ine mu bulwi. Ni bulya bulwi bumo bwine mwamwene ndelwa na kale
Philippians2:1 Bushe ukuba muli Kristu kulamukosha? Bushe icitemwiko cakwa Kristu cilamukoselesha? Bushe mwalyampana na Mupashi? Bushe mwaliba no luse ne cilela ku banenu?
Philippians2:2 Kanshi akundeteleni insansa ishine shine mukuba na mano yamo yene
Philippians2:3 Mwilacita nelyo cimo pa mulandu wakuitemwa nangu ukuitutumuna ku cilumba
Philippians2:4 Kabili mulemona ukuti mulecita ifyakuwamina abanenu
Philippians2:5 Fyonse ifyo mulecita
Philippians2:6 Kristu wena nangu aba ni Lesa
Philippians2:7 Lelo aisangwile uwafye
Philippians2:8 Kabili apo ali ngo muntu
Philippians2:9 Eico Lesa alimusansabalike ukucila pali fyonse
Philippians2:10 Epakuti peshina lyakwa Yesu
Philippians2:11 Kabili pakulumbanya Lesa Wishi fyonse filelanda pa lwalala afiti
Philippians2:12 Eico bamunyinane filya lyonse mwalenakila ilyo twali na imwe
Philippians2:13 Pantu ni Lesa lyonse eubomba muli imwe pakuti mulefwaya no kulacita ifyo umwine afwaya.
Philippians2:14 Mulecita fyonse ukwabula ukuilishanya nangu ifikansa.
Philippians2:15 Lyena mukaba abana bakwa Lesa abapwililika
Philippians2:16 Mulebashimikilako ishiwi ilipeela umweo. Nga efyo mwalacita
Philippians2:17 Kabili nga cakuti umweo wandi wapeelwa nge cakunwa icaitilwa pelambo ilyaba e mutuulo uo icisumino cenu cilekela Lesa
Philippians2:18 Kabili na imwe bene kuti mwasansamuka no kwanga pamo na ine.
Philippians2:19 Imfumu Yesu nga ilefwaya
Philippians2:20 Kuno nshikweteko umbi uwakwata umutima uwakumusakamana icine cine nga ena.
Philippians2:21 Pantu cila muntu kuno asakamanafye ifintu fyakwe umwine
Philippians2:22 Bonse mwalishiba ukuti Timote abafye bwino. Mwalishiba ifyo ena na ine tubombela pamo pa mulandu wa Mbila Nsuma kwati ni mwane na wishi.
Philippians2:23 Kanshi ndesubila nkamutuma bwangu kuli imwe
Philippians2:24 Na ine wine nincetekela mu Mfumu ukuti na ine wine nalaswa njisefye bwangu kuli imwe.
Philippians2:25 Kabili ntontonkanya ukuti cilefwaikwa natuma munyinane Epafulodito abwelele kuli imwe. Uyu wena mubomfi munandi kabili uulwa ubulwi bwa Mfumu pamo na ine
Philippians2:26 Alefwaisha nganshi ukumumona bonse. Kabili ali uwasakamana nganshi ico mwaumfwile ukuti alilwele.
Philippians2:27 Ee
Philippians2:28 Eico ine napamfiwilwa ukumubwesha kuli imwe
Philippians2:29 Mumusekelele ne nsansa nganshi nga munyinenwe mu Mfumu. Mulecindika abantu ba musango ngoyu.
Philippians2:30 Pantu alifye mupepi ne mfwa pa mulandu wakubombela Kristu. Pakutifye angafwilisheko ne cafwilisho mushampeele ico mushalipo
Philippians3:1 Pakulekelesha bamunyinane ndeti
Philippians3:2 Cenjeleni ku bantu bacita ifibi
Philippians3:3 Pantu nifwe twapokelela ukusembululwa kwacine cine
Philippians3:4 Kwena na ine nga kuti nacetekela intambi shabuntunse. Nga kwingaba uwakutontonkanya palwa kucetekela intambi shabuntunse
Philippians3:5 Ine nasembulwilwe ilyo nali ne nshiku cine konse konse ishakufyalwa. Ine ndi wa mu mushobo wa bena Israeli
Philippians3:6 Kabili nali uwacincila nganshi
Philippians3:7 Lelo pa mulandu wakwa Kristu
Philippians3:8 Teifi fyeka iyoo lelo
Philippians3:9 tuleba nankwe pamo. Nomba ine ne mwine nshaba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa pa mulandu wakunakila Amafunde yakwa Mose. Lelo nomba naba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa pa mulandu wakusumina muli Kristu. Uku kuba uwakaele kwafuma kuli Lesa
Philippians3:10 Ico ndefwaishafye kwishiba Kristu na maka ya kushukuka kwakwe. Ndefwaisha ukwampana nankwe mu macushi aculileko na mu mfwa afwileko.
Philippians3:11 Pakuti na ine nkabushiwe umumi ukufuma ku bafwa.
Philippians3:12 Ine nshileitunga ukuti nalifikapo mukuba umusuma nangu ukuba uwapwililika. Lelo mbikapofye ukubutuka pakuti nkapoke icilambu pantu Kristu Yesu alimbuula ukuba umuntu wakwe.
Philippians3:13 Kwena bamunyinane ine nshiletontonkanya ukuti nalifika kukucipoka. Icintu cimo ico ncita
Philippians3:14 Kanshi ine mbutuka ukulungamafye apo bapima ukupelela pakuti mone ukupoka icilambu. Ici cilambu mweo wa mu mulu uo Lesa atwitako pa mulandu wakwa Kristu Yesu.
Philippians3:15 Ifwe bonse fwe bakula mu cisumino
Philippians3:16 Lelo pa nshita ino natukonkanyepofye ukwikala ngomo twaishibila.
Philippians3:17 Mwe bamunyinane
Philippians3:18 Imikufye iyingi nalimwebelepo
Philippians3:19 Uko aba bantu bakapelela ni kukulobelela
Philippians3:20 Ifwe kumwesu ni ku mulu
Philippians3:21 Akesa alula imibili yesu iyanakuka kabili iyinakufwa
Philippians4:1 Kanshi bamunyinane
Philippians4:2 Yuodia na Suntuke ndemupapata ukuti muleumfwana apo bonse mwaampana ne Mfumu.
Philippians4:3 Na iwe we mubomfi munandi icine cine
Philippians4:4 Lyonsefye mulesansamuka ico mwaampana ne Mfumu. Nabwekeshapo ukulanda nakabili
Philippians4:5 Mube abamutembo kuli bonse. Imfumu ili mupepi.
Philippians4:6 Mwilasakamikwa ne cintu nelyo cimo
Philippians4:7 Elyo no mutende wakwe Lesa
Philippians4:8 Pakulekelesha bamunyinane
Philippians4:9 Mulecita ifintu ifyo mwasambilile kuli ine nefyo namufundile
Philippians4:10 Imfumu nailenga ukuti nsansamuke nganshi pantu panuma ya nshita iyikalamba
Philippians4:11 Nshilelanda ifi ico nshikwete ifyo ndekabila. Ine calishibila ukwikala notu twine nkwete.
Philippians4:12 Nalishiba ifyo ukukabila kwaba
Philippians4:13 Ine kuti nacita fyonse ku maka Kristu ampeela.
Philippians4:14 Lelo kwena mwawemye nganshi pakungafwa mu macushi yandi.
Philippians4:15 Imwe mwe bena Filipi mwalishibafye bwino ukuti ilyo nafumine ku Makedonia mu nshikufye shilya shine ilyo natampile ukubila Imbila Nsuma
Philippians4:16 Ilyo nali mu Tesalonika mwalintumine ifyakungafwako ifyo nalekabila ukucila na pa muku umo.
Philippians4:17 Kanshi nshilefwayafye ukulapokelela ubupe
Philippians4:18 Nalipokelela fyonse ifyo mwampeela
Philippians4:19 Kabili Lesa wandi mu bukankala bwa bucindami bwakwe akulamupeela fyonse ifyo mulekabila pa mulandu wakwa Kristu Yesu.
Philippians4:20 Lesa wesu kabili Shifwe nalelumbwa pe na pe! Ameni.
Philippians4:21 Ndeposha abamushilo bonse
Philippians4:22 Abamushilo bonse tuli nabo kuno balemuposha
Philippians4:23 Icikuuku ca Mfumu Yesu Kristu cileba na imwe bonse.
Colossians1:1 Ine Paulo
Colossians1:2 Twamulembela mwe bamushilo abaikala mu Kolose
Colossians1:3 Lyonse ilyo tumupepelako
Colossians1:4 Ala twalyumfwa palwa cisumino cenu muli Kristu Yesu nefyo mwatemwa abamushilo bonse.
Colossians1:5 Icisumino ne citemwiko cenu fyashinta pafyo musubila ifyo Lesa amusungila bwino mu mulu. Ilyo amshiwi yacishinka aya Mbila Nsuma yabalilepo ukufika kuli imwe
Colossians1:6 ilyaba mu Mbila Nsuma iyilaleta ipaalo
Colossians1:7 Ni Epafula ewamufundile pa cikuuku cakwa Lesa
Colossians1:8 Ewatwebeleko pa citemwiko ico Mupashi amupeela.
Colossians1:9 Eico pa mulandu wa ifi
Colossians1:10 Elyo muleikala umo Imfumu ifwaila. Kabili mulecita lyonse ifyakusansamusha Imfumu. Mu milimo yenu mulefuma ifisuma. Lyena elyo mukamona ukwishibilako Lesa.
Colossians1:11 Tulamulombela kuli Lesa ukuti
Colossians1:12 Kabili muletasha Lesa Tata ne nsansa
Colossians1:13 Alitupokololako ku maka ya mfifi no kutuleta mu Bufumu bwakwa Mwane uo atemwa.
Colossians1:14 Uyu ewatulubula
Colossians1:15 Kristu e cata cakwa Lesa uushimoneka. E beli pa fibumbwa fyonse.
Colossians1:16 Pantu ni ku maka yakwa Kristu
Colossians1:17 Ilyo ifintu fyonse fishilabako Kristu eko ali
Colossians1:18 E mutwe wa lukuta lonse ulwaba umubili wakwe. E ntulo ya fintu fyonse. E beli mukubuuka ku bafwa. Pakuti ena ekafye abe uwantanshi muli fyonse.
Colossians1:19 Pantu Lesa umwine apingwile ukuti Mwane abe na Bulesa bonse.
Colossians1:20 Lesa apingwile nokuti ku maka yakwa Mwane
Colossians1:21 Na imwe bene kale mwali ukutali na Lesa
Colossians1:22 Lelo nomba pa mulandu wa mfwa yakwa Mwane
Colossians1:23 Mufwile ukutwalilila mu cisumino icakuulwa pa mufula uwakosa. Mwileka nelyo cimo cimusunkanye
Colossians1:24 Nomba ndi uwasansamuka pa mulandu wakuculila pali imwe. Pantu ku macushi ya mubili wandi wine
Colossians1:25 Ine
Colossians1:26 Imbila Nsuma e nkaama Lesa afishile mu myaka yapita na mu nkulo shonse
Colossians1:27 Lesa apangile ukwishibisha inkaama yakwe iyacindamisha ku Benafyalo. Inkaama niyi iyakuti Kristu aba muli imwe
Colossians1:28 Eico kanshi tubila Kristu ku muntu onse. Tusoka no kufunda abantu na mano yonse
Colossians1:29 Pakucita ici ndabombesha nganshi
Colossians2:1 Ndemwishibishako ifyo mombesha nganshi pali imwe na ba mu Laodikea
Colossians2:2 Ncita ifi pakuti imitima yabo ilesansamuka nokuti bekale abatemwana
Colossians2:3 Kristu e cipao umo Lesa afisa ifyuma fya mano yonse no kwishiba konse.
Colossians2:4 Ndemweba nati
Colossians2:5 Eico nelyo nshili na imwe ku mubili
Colossians2:6 Apo mwasumina ukuti Kristu Yesu ni Mfumu
Colossians2:7 Mwandemo ne mishila muli Kristu
Colossians2:8 Moneni mwileka nelyo umo ukuti amuteeke ubusha na mano yabuntunse aya bucenjeshi bwafye
Colossians2:9 Pantu mu mubili wakwa Kristu emwaisula Bulesa bonse.
Colossians2:10 Kabili mwalipeelwa umweo uwapwililika pa mulandu wa ico mwaba muli ena. Kristu e mutwe ukucila pali bakateeka na bamakafye bonse.
Colossians2:11 Kabili mukuba muli ena
Colossians2:12 Ilyo mwabatishiwe
Colossians2:13 Kale mwali abafwa pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyenu na pa mulandu mwali abashasembululwa ukufuma ku mubili wabuntunse. Lelo nomba Lesa alimulenga ukuba abamweo pamo na Kristu. Lesa alitubelela uluse ku fyabubifi fyesu fyonse.
Colossians2:14 Lesa alifuuta imisha yesu yonse iya mafunde ayaletupeela umulandu
Colossians2:15 Pa musalaba epo acimfishe amaka ya bakateeka na bamaka aba mu lwelele
Colossians2:16 Eico mwileka umuntu nelyo umo amupingule pafyo mwingalalya nefyo mwingalanwa
Colossians2:17 Ifi fintu fyali fyakwishibilakofye ifintu ifyali nokwisa. Icintu cacine cine ni Kristu.
Colossians2:18 Mwileka nelyo umo amusuule ukuti alimucila pa mulandu wa fimonwa
Colossians2:19 Kabili alileka ukunakila Kristu uwaba e mutwe wa lukuta
Colossians2:20 Imwe mwalifwa pamo na Kristu
Colossians2:21 “Wilaikata kuli ici!” “Wilasonda kuli cilya!” “Wilakumya kuli cimbi ico!”?
Colossians2:22 Ala aya mafunde ya pa fintu ifyonaika ilyo bafibomfya. Aya mafunde ne mifundile
Colossians2:23 Ee cine cine aya mafunde ayakulaipatikisha ukupepa
Colossians3:1 Imwe mwalibushiwa ku bafwa pamo na Kristu. Eico nomba akufwayeni ifintu ifya mu mulu
Colossians3:2 Bikeni imitima yenu pa fintu fya mu mulu
Colossians3:3 Pantu mwalifwa
Colossians3:4 Umweo wenu uwacine cine ni Kristu. Ilyo akamoneka
Colossians3:5 Mufwile ukuleka ifwe imibeele yenu yonse iyabuntunse
Colossians3:6 Ni pa mulandu wa ifi fintu epo ubukali bwakwa Lesa bwishila abantu abashimunakila.
Colossians3:7 Na imwe bene e mibeele mwaleendelamo kale ilyo mwaleikala muli iyo misango.
Colossians3:8 Lelo nomba muli nokutaluka kuli fyonse ifili ngefi
Colossians3:9 Mwilabepana
Colossians3:10 Mwalingila muli bumuntu bupya. Lesa e kabumba wa bumuntu bupya. Amulenga ukuti mulealukilako cipya cipya mu cata cakwe
Colossians3:11 Muli bumuntu bupya tamwaba kapatulula kakuti uyu Mwinafyalo noyu Muyuda
Colossians3:12 Imwe muli basalwa bakwa Lesa
Colossians3:13 Muleshipikishanya no kubeleshanya uluse nga umo ali no mulandu ku munankwe. Mulebeleshanya uluse ngefyo Imfumu yamubelela uluse.
Colossians3:14 Na pali iyi mibeele
Colossians3:15 Umutende untu Kristu apeela
Colossians3:16 Lekeni amashiwi yakwa Kristu ayacindamisha yaleikala mu mitima yenu. Mulebomfya nganshi amano mukufundana no kupandana amano
Colossians3:17 Lekeni fyonse ifyo mulecita no kusosa
Colossians3:18 Mwe bakashi
Colossians3:19 Mwe balume
Colossians3:20 Mwe bana
Colossians3:21 Mwe bashibo

Colossians3:23 Fyonse ifyo mulebomba
Colossians3:24 Muleibukisha ukuti Imfumu ikamupeela icilambu yalaya abantu baiko. Pantu Kristu e Shikulwinwe wine wine uo mubombela.
Colossians3:25 Na onse uwalufyanya akakandwa ukulingana no kulufyanya kwakwe

Colossians4:2 Mwilanenuka mukupepa. Mulebikako amano mukupepa
Colossians4:3 Muletupepelako na ifwe bene
Colossians4:4 Eico kanshi mulepepa ukuti ndebila Imbila bwino bwino ngefyo mfwile ukucita.
Colossians4:5 Mulecenjela kufyo mulecita ku bantu abashasumina. Mulebomfya bwino ne nshita yonse iyo mwashukila.
Colossians4:6 Imilandile yenu ileba lyonse iyacikuuku ku bantu ne yakubafwilisha. Mwishibe ukwasuka cila muntu bwino bwino.

1Thessalonians1:5 Pantu ilyo twamuletele Imbila Nsuma
1Thessalonians1:6 Mwasukile mwalapashanya ifwe pamo ne Mfumu. Nangu mwaculile nganshi
1Thessalonians1:7 Eico
1Thessalonians1:8 Amashiwi ya Mfumu tayasalanganafye mu Makedonia na mu Akaia ukufuma kuli imwe
1Thessalonians1:9 Abantu abene ebalanda pafyo mwatupokelele bwino. Balanda na pafyo mwafuma kukupepa utulubi
1Thessalonians1:10 Lyena epakulalolela ukwisa kwa Mwana wakwe Yesu ukufuma ku mulu
1Thessalonians2:1 Mwe bamunyinefwe

1Thessalonians2:3 Ilyo twalemufunda tatwalefwaya ukumutwala mu cilubo nangu ukumutwala kukubifya nangu ukwesha ukubepa umuntu nelyo umo. Imitima yesu yalifye iyatambalala.
1Thessalonians2:4 Lelo tulanda ifyo Lesa alefwaya ukuti tulande
1Thessalonians2:5 Mwalishibafye bwino ukuti tatwaishile kuli imwe na mashiwi ayasuma ayakumubeleleka
1Thessalonians2:6 Tatwalefwaya kutashiwa ku muntu nangu umo
1Thessalonians2:7 Lelo ilyo twali na imwe
1Thessalonians2:8 Pa mulandu wakumutemwisha
1Thessalonians2:9 Mwe bamunyinefwe
1Thessalonians2:10 Imibeele yesu kuli imwe mwe basumina
1Thessalonians2:11 Mwalishiba nefyo twalemulela bonse umo umo nga filya shibo alela abana bakwe.
1Thessalonians2:12 Twalemucincisha no kumukoselesha no kumweba ukuti
1Thessalonians2:13 Kuliko no mulandu umbi uo lyonse tutashishapo Lesa. Ilyo twamuletele amashiwi yakwa Lesa
1Thessalonians2:14 Mwe bamunyinane
1Thessalonians2:15 Bayuda bene ebaipeye Imfumu Yesu na bakasesema
1Thessalonians2:16 Baeseshe no kutukaanya ukushimikila Abenafyalo amashiwi yakubaletela ukupusuka. Mukucita ifi

1Thessalonians3:1 Kanshi pa mulandu wakufwaisha nganshi ukumumona
1Thessalonians3:2 Twatumine Timote munyinefwe umubomfi munensu wakwa Lesa mu mulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma yakwa Kristu. Twamutumine ukuti ese amukoseleshe no kumucincisha mu cisumino cenu
1Thessalonians3:3 epakuti umuntu nelyo umo pali imwe enenuka pa mulandu wa aya macushi. Mwalishiba mwe bene ukuti amacushi aya
1Thessalonians3:4 Ilyo twali na imwe twalimwebele libela ukuti bali nokutucusha. Ngefyo mwaishiba bwino
1Thessalonians3:5 Kanshi ilyo nafililwe ukushipikisha
1Thessalonians3:6 Nomba Timote nabwela ukufuma kumwenu. Naisa tushimikilako ilyashi ilisuma ilya pa cisumino cenu ne citemwiko cenu. Atushimikile ukuti lyonse mulomfwa insansa ilyo mutwibukisha
1Thessalonians3:7 Eico pa mulandu wenu
1Thessalonians3:8 Ala nomba kuti twatemwa no kuba abomi apo mu bumi bwenu muli ne cisumino icakosa mu Mfumu.
1Thessalonians3:9 Pa mulandu wa imwe tulatasha Lesa wesu. Tulamutasha pa cinso cakwe pa nsansa atupeela. Tulamutasha pa mulandu wa imwe.
1Thessalonians3:10 Ubwaca no bwaila tupapata Lesa ne mitima yesu yonse ukuti akaleke tukamonane kabili no kumwafwilishako kufyo mulekabila mu cisumino cenu.
1Thessalonians3:11 Lesa Shifwe umwine na Yesu Imfumu yesu bengatuwamisha inshila tukese kuli imwe.
1Thessalonians3:12 Imfumu yesu ingamulundilako ukutemwana mwatemwana nefyo mwatemwa abantu bonse. Mube abatemwisha bambi ngefyo ifwe twamutemwa.
1Thessalonians3:13 Imfumu ingalakosha imitima yenu no kumuwamya pakuti mukabe abapwililika abamushilo pa cinso cakwa Lesa Shifwe

1Thessalonians4:4 Cila muntu pali imwe eshibe ifyakusunga umubili wakwe mu nshila iyamushilo ne yamucinshi.
1Thessalonians4:5 Mwilakonkelela lunkumbwa lubi kwati bantu abashaishiba Lesa.
1Thessalonians4:6 Kanshi nelyo umo elafyengelesha munyina pali uyu mulandu. Twalimwebele kale ifi no kumusoka ukuti

1Thessalonians4:8 Eico kanshi uwasuula aya mafunde
1Thessalonians4:9 Pa mulandu wakutemwa ababwananyina pena tacilefwaikwa ukumulembelapo

1Thessalonians5:1 Mwe bamunyinefwe tacilefwaikwa ukumulembela pa nshita no bushiku ilyo ifi fikacitika.
1Thessalonians5:2 Awe mwalishibafye bwino bwino ukuti Ubushiku bwa Mfumu bukesa nga filya umupupu esa ubushiku.
1Thessalonians5:3 Ilyo abantu bakalasosa abati
1Thessalonians5:4 Lelo nomba imwe mwe bamunyinefwe tamwaba mu mfifi
1Thessalonians5:5 Imwe bonse muli bana ba lubuuto abenda akasuba. Tatwaba abana ba mfifi abenda ubushiku.
1Thessalonians5:6 Kanshi tatufwile ukuba nga bantu bambi abalala utulo
1Thessalonians5:7 Ni nshita ya bushiku abantu balala utulo
1Thessalonians5:8 Lelo ifwe twenda akasuba
1Thessalonians5:9 Pantu Lesa tatusalile pakuti twingesa kukukandwa ku bukali bwakwe
1Thessalonians5:10 Atufwilile pakuti ilyo tuli abomi nangu tuli abafwa
1Thessalonians5:11 Eico kanshi mulekoseleshanya no kucincishanya
1Thessalonians5:12 Mwe bamunyinefwe tulemupapata ukuti mulecindika abo abalebombesha pakati kenu. Abo ebo Imfumu yasonta ukulamutungulula no kulamufunda.
1Thessalonians5:13 Mulebacindikisha nganshi no kubatemwisha pa mulandu wa milimo babomba. Muleikala mu cibote bwino na banenu.
1Thessalonians5:14 Mwe bamunyinefwe
1Thessalonians5:15 Mwilaleka umuntu nelyo umo ukulailandula pa bubi bamucitila
1Thessalonians5:16 Mulesansamuka pe.
1Thessalonians5:17 Muleba no mute mukupepa.
1Thessalonians5:18 Muletasha Lesa muli fyonse. Pantu ifi efyo Lesa afwaya ukuti mulecita apo mwaba muli Kristu Yesu.
1Thessalonians5:19 Mwilalesha Mupashi Wamushilo ukubomba.
1Thessalonians5:20 Mwilasuula amashiwi ya bakasesema.
1Thessalonians5:21 Mulepima ifintu fyonse
1Thessalonians5:22 Muletaluka ku misango yonse iyibi.
1Thessalonians5:23 Lesa wamutende umwine amuwamye umupwilapo mu nshila shonse. Alemusunga ababula icilubo ku mipashi yenu
1Thessalonians5:24 Lesa uwamwita tafutuka
1Thessalonians5:25 Muletupepelako na ifwe mwe bamunyinefwe.
1Thessalonians5:26 Posheni ababwananyina bonse mukutomona kwamushilo.

2Thessalonians1:1 Ine Paulo na Sailasi na Timote
2Thessalonians1:2 Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Tata ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu fileba na imwe.
2Thessalonians1:3 Mwe bamunyinefwe
2Thessalonians1:4 Eico ifwe tulatakisha mu kulanda kwesu pali imwe ku nkuta shakwa Lesa. Tutakisha pafyo mwakonkanyapo ukushipikisha no kusumina ilyo bamucusha na mu mafya yene mulimo.
2Thessalonians1:5 Ala ifi fyonse fishininkisha ukuti Lesa wamulinganya mukupingula. Kabili muli ifi
2Thessalonians1:6 Lesa wamulinganya
2Thessalonians1:7 Akapwisha amacushi yenu pamo na macushi yesu yene. Akacita ici ilyo Imfumu Yesu ikasokoloka ilefuma ku mulu pamo na bamalaika baiko abamaka.
2Thessalonians1:8 Ikesa mu lubingu lwa mulilo kukukanda abo bonse abashifwaya ukwishiba Lesa na bakaana ukunakila Imbila Nsuma iyakwa Yesu Imfumu yesu.
2Thessalonians1:9 Lesa akabakanda
2Thessalonians1:10 Pa bushiku ubo ilyo akabwela
2Thessalonians1:11 Eico lyonsefye tulamupepelako. Tupapata Lesa wesu ukuti mube ne mibeele iyalinga ubwite amwitako. Ku maka yakwe engafikilisha ifisuma fyonse ifyo mufwaya ukucita no kupwishishisha imilimo yenu yonse iyo mubombela mu cisumino.
2Thessalonians1:12 Ninshi lyena mwakulacindika Yesu Imfumu yesu
2Thessalonians2:1 Nomba ilyo Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu ikabwela
2Thessalonians2:2 ukuti
2Thessalonians2:3 Mwileka umuntu nelyo umo alemubepa nangufye panono. Ubushiku bulya tabwakafike mpaka ilyo ukusangukila Lesa ukwa bantu abengi kukacitika
2Thessalonians2:4 Akaisansabalika ukucila pali fyonse ifitwa umulungu nangu pali fyonse ifyo abantu bapepa. Akengila mwitempele lyakwa Lesa akatile nokuti nine Lesa.
2Thessalonians2:5 Bushe tamuleibukisha? Nalimwebele ifi ilyo twali na imwe.
2Thessalonians2:6 Kabili mwalishiba icilesha umubi ukuti esokoloka pali ino nshita. Lelo pa nshita iyalinga umubi akasokoloka.
2Thessalonians2:7 Kwena inkaama ya mubi ilabomba na kale. Lelo ifyo nandile ukuti fikacitika
2Thessalonians2:8 Lyena umubi elyo akasokoloka. Lelo Imfumu Yesu ikesa
2Thessalonians2:9 Umubi ilyo akesa
2Thessalonians2:10 Akabomfya imisango iyalekana lekana pakubepaika abakaba nokulobelela. Bakalobelela
2Thessalonians2:11 Eico Lesa akabatumina amaka yakubafulunganya
2Thessalonians2:12 Kanshi abo bonse bakaba no mulandu
2Thessalonians2:13 Lelo ifwe lyonse tulatasha Lesa pali imwe mwe bamunyinefwe
2Thessalonians2:14 Lesa ku Mbila Nsuma twamushimikile
2Thessalonians2:15 Kanshi nomba mwe bamunyinefwe
2Thessalonians2:16 Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu umwine na Lesa Shifwe uwatutemwa
2Thessalonians2:17 engalasansamusha imitima yenu no kulamukosha pakuti mulebomba no kulalanda ifisuma fyonse.
2Thessalonians3:1 Pakulekelesha
2Thessalonians3:2 Mulepepa nokuti Lesa aletupokololako ku bantu ababi na bacintomfwa. Pantu te bonse basumina.
2Thessalonians3:3 Lelo Imfumu yena yacishinka yakulamukosha no kumucingilila ku Mubi.
2Thessalonians3:4 Imfumu eilenga ukuti tulemucetekela ukuti mulakonka ifyo tumweba
2Thessalonians3:5 Imfumu ingalamutungulula mukwishibisha ifyo Lesa amutemwa na mukushipikisha nga Kristu.
2Thessalonians3:6 Mwe bamunyinefwe
2Thessalonians3:7 Imwe mwe bene mwalishibafye bwino ukuti mufwile ukulatupashanya. Ifwe tatwali abanaŋani ilyo twali na imwe.
2Thessalonians3:8 Ifwe tatwalepoka icakulya ku muntu nelyo umo ukwabula ukulipila. Lelo twalebombesha nganshi no kucucutika ubwaca no bwaila pakuti twibika muntu nelyo umo mu bwafya bwakutulisha.
2Thessalonians3:9 Twalebombesha
2Thessalonians3:10 Kabili ilyo twali na imwe twamupeele ifunde ilyakuti
2Thessalonians3:11 Tulesosa ifi
2Thessalonians3:12 Ku maka ya Mfumu Yesu Kristu
2Thessalonians3:13 Lelo imwe mwe bamunyinefwe
2Thessalonians3:14 Nga umo akaana ukubeela aya mashiwi twamulembela muli uyu kalata
2Thessalonians3:15 Nomba mwilamumona kwati mulwani iyoo
2Thessalonians3:16 Imfumu iyine yamutende
2Thessalonians3:17 Ine ne Paulo nalemba no kuboko kwandi aya mashiwi yakumuposha. Pakupwisha ukulemba kalata yonse
2Thessalonians3:18 Icikuuku ca Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu cileba na imwe bonse.
1Timothy1:1 Ine ne Paulo ne wasalwa ukuba umusole wakwa Kristu Yesu ku maka yakwa Lesa Umupusushi wesu na Kristu Yesu uwaba e isubilo lyesu.
1Timothy1:2 Nakulembela Timote
1Timothy1:3 Ndefwaya ukuti wikale mu Efeso ngefyo nakwebele ilyo naleya ku Makedonia. Abantu bamo uko
1Timothy1:4 Uli nokubeba baleke ukukonkelela ifya mu milumbe ne fya mashina yabula impela aya fikolwe fyabo. Pantu ifi fintu filetafye ifikansa
1Timothy1:5 Kanshi ico nakupeelela ili funde ni pakuti ube ne citemwiko icifuma ku mutima wakaele
1Timothy1:6 Abantu bamo balifuma kuli ifi
1Timothy1:7 Bafwaya ukuba bakafundisha ba Mafunde yakwa Mose
1Timothy1:8 Bonse twalishiba ukuti Amafunde yakwa Mose yasuma
1Timothy1:9 Kabili bonse twalishiba ukuti tabapangila abololoke amafunde. Lelo bapanga amafunde pa mulandu wa bampulamafunde
1Timothy1:10 bacilende
1Timothy1:11 Ili ifunde lyaba mu Mbila Nsuma iyalulumbi iyo Lesa umucindami ampeela ukubila. Ili ifunde lyaba mu Mbila Nsuma iyo Lesa mucindami kabili umwinakulumbwa ampeela ukubila.
1Timothy1:12 Ndetasha Kristu Yesu Imfumu yesu uwampeela amaka yakubomba umulimo wandi. Kabili ndetasha Kristu Yesu pakumona ukuti nininga
1Timothy1:13 Kwena kale nalelanda ifyamusaalula pali ena
1Timothy1:14 Eico ku cikuuku ico Imfumu yesu yankwatila nganshi
1Timothy1:15 Kanshi aya mashiwi yacishinka
1Timothy1:16 Lelo Lesa alimbelelako uluse
1Timothy1:17 Ku Mfumu ya pe na pe iyishifwa
1Timothy1:18 Timote
1Timothy1:19 Uleikatilila mu cisumino na kuli kampingu musuma mu mutima. Abantu bamo tabasakamana kukutika kuli kampingu mu mitima yabo
1Timothy1:20 Bamo pali abo ni Imeneo na Alekisanda. Bena aba nalibaposa kuli Satana
1Timothy2:1 Ndemukonkomesha ukuti
1Timothy2:2 Mulepepelako na bashamfumu na bonse bambi aba mu buteko
1Timothy2:3 Ici cine e cisuma
1Timothy2:4 Ena afwaya ukuti abantu bonse bapusuke
1Timothy2:5 Pantu kwabafye Lesa umo mpo. Kabili kwabafye umo uulenga abantu babe pamo na Lesa
1Timothy2:6 Uyu Kristu Yesu
1Timothy2:7 Ni pali uyu wine mulandu epo natuminwa ukuba kabila wa Mbila Nsuma
1Timothy2:8 Lyonse ilyo mwalongana kukupepa
1Timothy2:9 Kabili ndefwaya abanakashi ifyo fine
1Timothy2:10 Lelo bali nokuisamika ne milimo isuma ngefyo cingalinga abanakashi abatila tulapepa Lesa.
1Timothy2:11 Abanakashi bali nokusambilila abamutalalila kabili abanakilila.
1Timothy2:12 Nshilesuminisha umwanakashi ukufunda nangu ukuba na maka yakucila umwaume. Umwanakashi ali nokwikala umutalalila.
1Timothy2:13 Pantu uwabalilepo ukubumbwa ni Adamu
1Timothy2:14 Elyo kabili te Adamu ewabepelwe
1Timothy2:15 Lelo umwanakashi akapusuka pa mulandu wakufyala abana
1Timothy3:1 Aya mashiwi yacishinka ayakuti umuntu nga alefwaya ukuba kangalila wa lukuta
1Timothy3:2 Kangalila wa lukuta afwile ukuba umuntu uwabula umulandu
1Timothy3:3 Tali nakuba cakolwa wa bwalwa nangu ukuba uwalubuli
1Timothy3:4 Ali nokuba umuntu uwaishiba ukusunga aba mu ŋanda mumwakwe bwino
1Timothy3:5 Pantu umuntu nga taishiba ifyakusunga aba mu ŋanda mumwakwe
1Timothy3:6 Tali nakuba umuntu umupya mu cisumino
1Timothy3:7 Kabili ali nokuba umuntu uo abantu abashili bena Kristu bacindika epali asebana
1Timothy3:8 Badikoni nabo bene bali nokuba abaicindika kabili abacishinka. Tabali nakuba bacakolwa wa bwalwa nangu abatemwisha indalama.
1Timothy3:9 Bali nokwikatisha imilandu ya nkaama ya cisumino
1Timothy3:10 Pakubala bali nokweshiwa. Elyo nga basanga ukuti tapali cakubalesha
1Timothy3:11 Abakashi babo nabo bene bali nokuba abaicindika. Tabali nakuba abalwambo
1Timothy3:12 Badikoni bali nokukwata umukashi umofye. Kabili bali nokuba abantu abaishiba ukusunga bwino abana babo na ba mu ŋanda mumwabo.
1Timothy3:13 Badikoni ababomba imilimo yabo bwino
1Timothy3:14 Ilyo ndekulembela ifi fintu
1Timothy3:15 Lelo nga kwaba ifyakunshingilisha
1Timothy3:16 Cinefye
1Timothy4:1 Mupashi asosafye apabuuta tuutu ati
1Timothy4:2 Aya mafunde yafuma ku mfundabuteshi ishabufi. Kampingu wa mitima yashiko alifwa
1Timothy4:3 Aba bantu balesha abantu ukuupa
1Timothy4:4 Icintu conse ico Lesa abumba cisuma. Tapaba nelyo cimo icakusuula
1Timothy4:5 Pantu amashiwi yakwa Lesa ne pepo filenga ukuti fisangululwe.
1Timothy4:6 Nga walafunda ifi fintu kuli bamunyinefwe
1Timothy4:7 Lelo iwe uletaluka ku milumbe yafyefye na ku fyakusabaila ifya banamayo abakote. Ulebikafye amano kukusambilila imikalile ya bwina Lesa.
1Timothy4:8 Kwena cintu cisuma ukucita ifintu ifyakusalapula umubili
1Timothy4:9 Aya mashiwi nasosa
1Timothy4:10 Kanshi ifwe tulalwisha no kubombesha nganshi
1Timothy4:11 Kanshi ifi efyo ulebafunda no kubakonkomesha.
1Timothy4:12 Wileka muntu nelyo umo akusuule ico uli mulumendo. Lelo uleba icilangililo ku basumina mu milandile yobe
1Timothy4:13 Mpaka nkese
1Timothy4:14 Wilalekelesha ubupe ubo wapeelwe ilyo bakasesema baseseme ne bumba lya bakalamba lyakutambikepo amaboko.
1Timothy4:15 Ulebomba iyi milimo
1Timothy4:16 Ulesakamana imibeele yobe
1Timothy5:1 Wilabomfya bukali pakwalulula umukalamba uwalufyanya
1Timothy5:2 Abanakashi abakalamba ulelanda nabo kwati ni banoko. Elyo abanakashi abacikashana nabo ulelanda nabo no mutima uwakaele kwati ulelanda na bankashi yobe.
1Timothy5:3 Ulesunga no mucinshi bamukamfwilwa ababula abakubasunga.
1Timothy5:4 Lelo mukamfwilwa nga alikwata abana nangu abeshikulu
1Timothy5:5 Mukamfwilwa uwakuti alifye eka
1Timothy5:6 Lelo mukamfwilwa uwakuti aishibafye ukuisansamusha
1Timothy5:7 Kanshi e fintu ulebafunda
1Timothy5:8 Lelo uyo uushisakamana kusunga ba lupwa lwakwe
1Timothy5:9 Pakuti ulembe mukamfwilwa pa mashina ya bamukamfwilwa
1Timothy5:10 Elyo na bantu balamutasha pa milimo isuma. Ali nokuba umwanakashi uwakusha abana bakwe bwino
1Timothy5:11 Lelo bamukamfwilwa abakashana bena wilabalemba amashina yabo pa mashina ya bamukamfwilwa. Pantu kuti basangukila Kristu
1Timothy5:12 Elyo kabili basangwa no mulandu wakonaula icilayo balaile kuli Kristu kale.
1Timothy5:13 Kabili kuti bayaluka abanaŋani
1Timothy5:14 Kanshi kwena ine kuti natemwapo ukuti bamukamfwilwa abakashana bena baleupwa
1Timothy5:15 Pantu bamukamfwilwa bamo balitusangukila
1Timothy5:16 Nga cakuti umwanakashi uwasumina muli Kristu nakwata ba lupwa lwakwe bamukamfwilwa
1Timothy5:17 Abakalamba abalebomba bwino umulimo wa butungulushi bena bafwile ukucindikwa nganshi. Palibufi nga balebombesha mu mulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma no kufunda.
1Timothy5:18 Pantu Amalembo Yamushilo yatila
1Timothy5:19 Wilasumina ukulubulwisha umulandu bapeela umukalamba wa lukuta
1Timothy5:20 Abo abalebikapofye ukubifya
1Timothy5:21 Pa menso yakwa Lesa na pa menso yakwa Kristu Yesu na pali bamalaika abasalwa
1Timothy5:22 Uleteka umutima pakutambalikila umuntu amaboko. Kabili uletaluka kukuikumika ku fyabubifi fya bantu bambi. Uleisunga uwakaele.
1Timothy5:23 Uleke ukulanwafye amenshi yeka yeka
1Timothy5:24 Abantu bamo ifyabubifi fyabo fyabafye pa bwelu
1Timothy5:25 E cimo cine ne fintu ifisuma abantu bacita
1Timothy6:1 Elyo abo abali abasha
1Timothy6:2 Abasha abo bashikulwibo basumina muli Kristu
1Timothy6:3 Onse uulelanda amafunde ayaibela
1Timothy6:4 ninshi aisulamofye icilumba
1Timothy6:5 Cilenga na bantu abo amano yabo yashibomba bwino
1Timothy6:6 Kwena ukuba umwina Lesa bunonshi ubukalamba
1Timothy6:7 Pantu ifwe tatwaletele nelyo cimo pano calo
1Timothy6:8 Kanshi ifwe nga natukwata ifyakulya ne fyakufwala
1Timothy6:9 Lelo abantu abafwaya ukuba abakankala bafyuma
1Timothy6:10 Pantu ukutemwa indalama e ntulo ya fibi fya misango yonse. Abantu bamo mukufwaisha indalama
1Timothy6:11 Nomba iwe we muntu wakwa Lesa uli nokutaluka kuli ifi fintu fyonse. Ulefwaishafye bukaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa
1Timothy6:12 Ulelwa ubulwi busuma ubwa cisumino
1Timothy6:13 Kanshi pa cinso cakwa Lesa uupeela umweo ku fintu fyonse
1Timothy6:14 ndekukonkomesha ukuti ulesunga aya mafunde ukwabula ukulufyanyapo nelyo cimo
1Timothy6:15 Pa nshita ikalinga Lesa umucindami
1Timothy6:16 Lesa ekafye ewakubelelela pe
1Timothy6:17 Ulekonkomesha abakankala mu fintu fya pano calo ukuti belaba na cilumba. Tabali nakubika isubilo lyabo mu fyuma ifi ifishibelelela. Bali nokusubila muli Lesa uutupeela fyonsefye ifitusansamusha.
1Timothy6:18 Ulebakonkomesha ukuti bali nokucita ifisuma. Bali nokubomba imilimo iyingi nganshi iyisuma. Bali nokuba no mutima wabukapekape
1Timothy6:19 Mukucita ifi
1Timothy6:20 We Timote
1Timothy6:21 Bamo basuka balufishamo ne cisumino cabo
2Timothy1:1 Ine Paulo
2Timothy1:2 Nakulembela iwe Timote umwana wandi uo natemwa. Icikuuku
2Timothy1:3 Ndatasha Lesa uo mombela no mutima onse uwatambalala ngefyo ifikolwe fyandi fyalecita. Ndamutasha lyonse ilyo nkwibukishako mu mapepo yandi ubwaca no bwaila.
2Timothy1:4 Nshilaba filamba fyobe. Kabili ndafuluka nganshi ukukumona
2Timothy1:5 Ndebukisha ne cisumino cacishinka wakwata. Ici cine e cisumino nokokulu Loisi na noko Eunike bakwete. Ine ninshininkisha e cisumino na iwe wine ukwete.
2Timothy1:6 Kanshi e mulandu wine ndekucinkulako ukuti wikatishe ukubomfya icabupe Lesa akupeele mukutambalikilapo amaboko yandi.
2Timothy1:7 Pantu Mupashi Lesa atupeela tewakulenga ukuti tube no mwenso
2Timothy1:8 Kanshi wilakwata nsoni pakuba kambone wa Mfumu yesu
2Timothy1:9 Ni Lesa ewatupususha no kutwita ukuti tube abamushilo
2Timothy1:10 Lelo ukwisa kwa Mupusushi wesu Kristu Yesu
2Timothy1:11 Ine Lesa alinsala ukuba kabila
2Timothy1:12 Kabili ni pali uyu wine mulandu epo ndeculila ifi. Lelo nshanenuka nakalya
2Timothy1:13 Amashiwi yacishinka ayo nakufunda
2Timothy1:14 Ku maka yakwa Mupashi Wamushilo uwaikala muli ifwe
2Timothy1:15 Nawishiba ukuti abantu aba mu calo ca Asia
2Timothy1:16 Lesa engakwatila aba mu ŋanda yakwa Onesifolo uluse
2Timothy1:17 Awe wena atile cilya afikafye mu Roma
2Timothy1:18 Imfumu ikamubelelekofye uluse pali bulya Bushiku! Kabili iwe Timote nawishibafye bwino ifyo angafwilisheko mu Efeso.
2Timothy2:1 Nomba iwe
2Timothy2:2 Walyumfwa ifyo nalefunda pa menso ya bantu abengi bakambone
2Timothy2:3 Kanshi na iwe uli nokuculako pamo na ifwe nge cita cacine cine icakwa Kristu Yesu.
2Timothy2:4 Icita icili pakubomba
2Timothy2:5 Elyo umuntu uulebutuka mukucimfyanya mu lubilo
2Timothy2:6 Umulimi uwabombeshe eufwile ukubalilapo ukupokako ku fisabo fyalobololwa.
2Timothy2:7 Utontonkanyepo pali ifyo nasosa
2Timothy2:8 Uleibukisha Imbila Nsuma tufunda iyitweba ukuti Yesu Kristu alibushiwe ku bafwa
2Timothy2:9 Ni pa mulandu wa Mbila Nsuma
2Timothy2:10 Kanshi eico ndashipikisha ukucula muli fyonse pa mulandu wa basalwa bakwa Lesa
2Timothy2:11 Awe iyi nsoselo yacishinka iyakuti. “Nga twafwa pamo nankwe
2Timothy2:12 Nga twashipikisha mukucula
2Timothy2:13 Nga tatuli na cishinka
2Timothy2:14 Uleibukisha abantu bobe pali ifi ifintu. Ulebasokako nganshi pa cinso cakwa Lesa ukuti
2Timothy2:15 Iwe
2Timothy2:16 Uletaluka ku mashiwi yacilandelande ayabula ukukuma kuli Lesa na ku mashiwi yaciwelewele
2Timothy2:17 Amashiwi ya musango uyu yena yalunduluka kwati cilonda icishipola. Aba bantu babili Imeneo na Fileto ebafunda amashiwi ya musango uyo.
2Timothy2:18 Aba bantu balifuma ku cishinka. Bena balesosa abati ukushukuka kwa bafwa kwalicitika kale. Kanshi bafulunganya ne cisumino ca bantu bamo abasumina.
2Timothy2:19 Lelo icakuulwa pa mufula uwakosa uo Lesa aimba te cakuteletenta. Pali ici palembwa ukuti
2Timothy2:20 Mu ŋanda iyacindama tamubafye ifipe ifya golide ne fya silifa
2Timothy2:21 Kanshi umuntu nga aitalusha ku fibi ifyo nandilepo
2Timothy2:22 Uletaluka ku lunkumbwa lubi ulwa mu bulumendo. Kabili pamo na bantu abamitima iyakaele abakuuta Lesa ukuti alebafwilisha
2Timothy2:23 Lelo iwe uletaluka ku fikansa fyabupuba no buwelewele. Walishiba ukuti ifi filengafye ukulaumana.
2Timothy2:24 Umusha wa Mfumu wena tafwile kulaumana na bantu. Afwile ukuba uwamutembo kuli bonse
2Timothy2:25 Ali nokuba no mutembo mukwalulula abantu abalekanya ifyo alebeba. Pantu limbi kuti Lesa abalenga ukulapila
2Timothy2:26 Awe lyena elyo amano yakabwela
2Timothy3:1 Uli nokwishiba ukuti mu nshiku shakupelekeshako mukaba inshita ishabipisha.
2Timothy3:2 Abantu bakalaisakamanafye abene
2Timothy3:3 Bakaba abantu ababula icitemwiko
2Timothy3:4 Bakaba abantu abashili bakucetekela
2Timothy3:5 Bakalamoneka kwati bantu abapetamina Lesa
2Timothy3:6 Bamo pali aba bantu bengila mu mayanda ya bantu no kunasha abanakashi abashashipa. Aba banakashi bantu batitikishiwa no bubi bwa fyabubifi fyabo
2Timothy3:7 Aba banakashi balafwaya ukusambilila lyonse
2Timothy3:8 Nga filya Yanesi na Yambulesi bakeenye Mose efyo aba bantu nabo bakaana icishinka. Aba bantu amano yabo tayabomba bwino kabili icisumino cabo cafyefye.
2Timothy3:9 Lelo tabakaye patali nakalya
2Timothy3:10 Nomba iwe Timote walishiba ifyo mfunda
2Timothy3:11 Walishiba nefyo abantu bancusha na mafya yandi. Iwe walishiba fyonse ifyancitikile
2Timothy3:12 Mu cine umuntu onse uwaba muli Kristu Yesu
2Timothy3:13 Lelo abantu babi na baitunga ukuba ifyo bashaba
2Timothy3:14 Lelo iwe ukonkanyepofye ukukonka ifyacishinka wafundwa kabili ifyo washininkisha nganshi. Pantu walishiba na bakafundisha abakufundile.
2Timothy3:15 Kabili uleibukisha ukuti ukufumafye ku bwaice
2Timothy3:16 Amalembo Yamushilo yonse yena mashiwi yakwa Lesa. Kanshi kuti wayabomfya pakufunda pa cishinka
2Timothy3:17 Eico kanshi Amalembo Yamushilo yalafwa umuntu wakwa Lesa ukuti akwate fyonse ifyo alekabila pakuti akwate amaka yakubomba umulimo usuma uwa musango onse.
2Timothy4:1 Ine ndekukonkomesha pa cinso cakwa Lesa na pa cinso cakwa Kristu Yesu uukabwela kukuputula imilandu ya bomi na bafwa
2Timothy4:2 Eico ndekukonkomesha nganshi ukuti ulebila amashiwi yakwa Lesa. Ulekomailapo ilyo cilingile nelyo cishilingile line. Ilyo ulefunda
2Timothy4:3 Ala inshita ikesa ilyo abantu tabakalefwaya ukumfwa amafunde yacine cine. Lelo bakalakonkafye ifyo balefwaya abene. Bakaikolonganikila bakafundisha abengi abakubeba ifyo abene bafwaya ukumfwa.
2Timothy4:4 Bakaleka ukukutika ku fyacishinka
2Timothy4:5 Lelo iwe uleba uwatekanya inshita yonse. Wilatiina kucula
2Timothy4:6 Ine nomba ndetuulwa nge cakunwa icaitilwa pelambo. Kabili inshita naifika iyakufuma pano calo.
2Timothy4:7 Nindwa ubulwi ubusuma
2Timothy4:8 Nomba icilambu bapeela abantu abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa cilempembela. Ici cilambu ni Mfumu iyiputula imilandu no mulinganya ikampeela pali bulya bushiku. Elyo kwena tekuli ine neka
2Timothy4:9 Ukeshe na maka yobe yonse ukwisa bwangu kuli ine.
2Timothy4:10 Pantu Demasi wena alisendwa ne fya calo cino
2Timothy4:11 Ndifye na Luka epela. Ukabuule Mako
2Timothy4:12 Tukiko eo natuma ku Efeso.
2Timothy4:13 Ilyo ukalaisa
2Timothy4:14 Alekisanda
2Timothy4:15 Uli nokucenjela kuli uyu muntu
2Timothy4:16 Umuku wapakubala ilyo nalelubulula
2Timothy4:17 Lelo Imfumu yali na ine
2Timothy4:18 Imfumu yakulampokololako ku fibi fyonse bengancitila
2Timothy4:19 Ndeposhapo Prisila na Akwila na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Onesifolo.
2Timothy4:20 Elasto ashele mu Kolinti
2Timothy4:21 Weshe na maka yobe yonse ukwisa ilyo inshita yampepo tailafika. Yubulo
2Timothy4:22 Imfumu ileba na iwe. Icikuuku cakwa Lesa cileba na imwe bonse.
Titus1:1 Ine ne ulelemba nine Paulo
Titus1:2 Neci cishinka cashintilila pesubilo lyakushukila umweo wape. Ni Lesa uushibepa
Titus1:3 Asokolwele ifi mu mashiwi yakwe pa nshita iyalingile. Lesa Umupusushi wesu ewankonkomeshe no kumpeela uyu mulimo wakubila aya mashiwi.
Titus1:4 Nakulembela iwe Tito
Titus1:5 Ico nakushilile mu Kiliti ni pakuti ushale walungika ifintu fyonse ifilefwaikwa ukulungika
Titus1:6 Umukalamba afwile ukuba umuntu uwabula umulandu. Afwile akwatefye umukashi umo na bamwane bafwile ukuba abantu abasumina
Titus1:7 Apo kangalila angalila umulimo wakwa Lesa
Titus1:8 Ali nokuba umuntu uwaishiba ukupokelela abeni
Titus1:9 Afwile ukusunga bwino nganshi amashiwi yacishinka ayo afundwa
Titus1:10 Pantu eko balifye abengi abasangukila Lesa
Titus1:11 Aba bantu bena uli nokubalesha
Titus1:12 Umwina Kiliti fye umwine
Titus1:13 Kanshi ifyo alandile fyacishinka. Eico iwe uli nokubakalipila nganshi
Titus1:14 Kabili baleke no kulakonkelela ifya mu milumbe ya Bayuda na mafunde ya bantu abasuula icishinka.
Titus1:15 Ku bantu abakaele takwaba icabakowesha. Lelo ku bantu abaobelwa mukubifya na mukukanasumina
Titus1:16 Bena basosa ukuti balishiba Lesa
Titus2:1 Lelo iwe ulefunda ifyakuti tafipusene na mafunde yacine cine.
Titus2:2 Ulefunda abaume abakalamba ukuti bali nokuba abantu aba misango isuma
Titus2:3 Eifyo fine ulefunda abanakashi abakalamba ukuti baleba ne misango nga banakashi abapetamina Lesa. Tabali nakuba ababepeshanya nangu ukuba abasha ba bwalwa. Bali nokulafunda ifintu ifisuma.
Titus2:4 Epakuti balefunda abanakashi abacikashana ukulatemwa abalume babo na bana babo.
Titus2:5 Kabili epakuti baleba abatekanya
Titus2:6 Eifyo fine na balumendo nabo
Titus2:7 Muli fyonse iwe wine uleba icilangililo kufyo ulecita. Ulebikako amano no kufunda ne cishinka.
Titus2:8 Ulebomfya amashiwi ayasuma ayakuti teti pabe uwakuyasusha. Epakuti abalwani bobe baleikatwa ne nsoni
Titus2:9 Abasha balenakila bashikulwibo no kulabasansamusha mu fintu fyonse. Tabali nakulabakaanyapo nelyo cimo ilyo balelanda
Titus2:10 nangu ukubebila ifintu. Lelo bafwile ukuilanga ukuti bantu abasuma lyonse
Titus2:11 Pantu Lesa alisokolola ku bantu bonse icikuuku cakwe icakupusukilamo.
Titus2:12 Ici cikuuku citufunda ukuleka imikalile ishili ya bwina Lesa no lunkumbwa lwa fya pano calo. Citufunda ukwikala pano calo abatekanya
Titus2:13 ilyo tulelolela no kusubila ne nsansa ukwisa ukwacindama ukwakwa Lesa Mukulu kabili Umupusushi wesu Kristu Yesu.
Titus2:14 Kristu Yesu aliileka ilambo umwine pakuti atulubule ku bubi bwesu bonse
Titus2:15 Kanshi ifi efyo uli nokufunda. Ulebomfya amaka yobe yonse wapeelwa mukucincisha no kukalipila abalekumfwa. Wilaleka nelyo umo ukuti akusuule.
Titus3:1 Ulecinkula abena Kristu ukuti bali nokunakila bakateeka na ba mu buteko. Bali nokubabeela
Titus3:2 Ulebeba tabali nakwamba umuntu nelyo umo nangu ukulaumana
Titus3:3 Na ifwe pa nshita imo twali ifiwelewele
Titus3:4 Lelo ilyo uluse lwakwa Lesa Umupusushi wesu ne citemwiko cakwe ku bantu fyasokolweke
Titus3:5 elyo Lesa atupuswishe. Tatupuswishe ico ifwe fwe bene twacitile ifintu fimo ifisuma
Titus3:6 Pantu Lesa alitufumfumwina Mupashi Wamushilo pa mulandu wakwa Yesu Kristu Umupusushi wesu.
Titus3:7 Acita ifi
Titus3:8 Aya mashiwi yacishinka. Ine ndefwaya ukuti ulekomailapo nganshi pali ifi fintu
Titus3:9 Lelo iwe uletaluka ku fikansa fyaciwelewele
Titus3:10 Umuntu uulenga ukupusana
Titus3:11 Nawishiba ukuti umuntu wa musango uyo alifulungana
Titus3:12 Ilyo nkatuma Atema nangu Tukiko kuli iwe
Titus3:13 Weshe na maka yobe yonse ukwafwilisha Sena
Titus3:14 Abantu besu bali nokusambilila ukubomfya inshita yabo mukucita imilimo isuma
Titus3:15 Bonse abo tuli nabo kuno balekuposha. Uposhepo bonse abatutemwa pa mulandu wa cisumino. Icikuuku cakwa Lesa cileba na imwe bonse.
Philemon1:1 Ine Paulo
Philemon1:2 Twalembela uyu kalata na ku lukuta ululongana mumobe
Philemon1:3 Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Shifwe na Yesu Kristu Imfumu yesu fingalaba na imwe.
Philemon1:4 We munyinane Filemoni
Philemon1:5 Pantu ndeumfwa palwa citemwiko cobe ne cisumino wakwata mu Mfumu Yesu na ku bamushilo bonse.
Philemon1:6 Ine mpepa ukuti ukwampana kwesu mu cisumino
Philemon1:7 We munyinefwe
Philemon1:8 Kanshi eico apo uli munyinane muli Kristu
Philemon1:9 Lelo pa mulandu wakuti nalikutemwa
Philemon1:10 Kanshi ndekupapata pa mwana wandi Onesimo
Philemon1:11 Kale talekubombela nelyo cimo
Philemon1:12 Ndemubwesesha kuli iwe
Philemon1:13 Kwena nalefwaya ukuti tuleikala nankwe kuno
Philemon1:14 Lelo kwena nshalefwaya ukucita nelyo cimo ukwabula iwe ukuti usuminishe. Lelo nalefwaya ukuti wangafwilishako kukutemwafye kobe
Philemon1:15 Nalimo ico Onesimo afumine kuli iwe pa nshita inono
Philemon1:16 Nomba tali mushafye epela
Philemon1:17 Eico
Philemon1:18 Nga alikulufyanyapo cimo
Philemon1:19 Ine wine Paulo nalalemba no kuboko kwandi ukuti
Philemon1:20 Kanshi we munyinane
Philemon1:21 Ine ilyo ndelemba ifi
Philemon1:22 Elyo na cimbi nici
Philemon1:23 Epafula
Philemon1:24 Mako
Philemon1:25 Icikuuku ca Mfumu Yesu Kristu cileba na imwe bonse.
Hebrews1:1 Kale Lesa atumine bakasesema
Hebrews1:2 Nomba muli ishi nshiku shakupelekeshako
Hebrews1:3 Eo ukubengeshima kwa bucindami bwakwa Lesa kumonekelamo. Kabili aba e cata cakwa Lesa icapwililika. Eulenga nokuti ifintu fyonse fikonkanye ukubapo ku maka ye shiwi lyakwe. Ilyo apwile umulimo wakufumisha abantu ifyabubifi
Hebrews1:4 Mwana Lesa alicila apakalamba pali bamalaika
Hebrews1:5 Pantu Lesa tatala ebapo umo pali bamalaika ati
Hebrews1:6 Kabili pakuleta Umwana wakwe ibeli muno calo
Hebrews1:7 Lelo pali bamalaika bena
Hebrews1:8 Lelo pali Mwane pena
Hebrews1:9 Watemwa ifintu ifyalungama
Hebrews1:10 Kabili atila nokuti
Hebrews1:11 Fyena fikaloba
Hebrews1:12 Ukafifunga kwati mwingila
Hebrews1:13 Lesa tatala alanda kuli umo pali bamalaika bakwe ati
Hebrews1:14 Kanshi bamalaika finshi? Bamalaika mipashi iyibombela Lesa
Hebrews2:1 Kanshi eico tuli nokuposako amano nganshi kuli fyonse ifyo twaumfwa
Hebrews2:2 Amashiwi bamalaika balandile
Hebrews2:3 Nga kanshi ifwe kuti twafulumukila kwi
Hebrews2:4 Kabili Lesa alibeminine bukambone ku fishibilo na ku fipeshamano ifya misango ne misango na ku finjelengwe alecita
Hebrews2:5 Lesa tasonta bamalaika ukuba bakateeka ba calo icili nokwisa
Hebrews2:6 Lelo umo
Hebrews2:7 Pa kashita akanono wamulengele ukuti abe uwacepapo pali bamalaika. Wamufwikile icisote cabufumu icamucinshi no bucindami.
Hebrews2:8 Elyo walenga na fyonse ukulamukunkwila.” Apo Lesa kanshi acita umuntu kateeka wa fintu fyonse
Hebrews2:9 Lelo uo tumona ni Yesu
Hebrews2:10 Kanshi Lesa uubumba ifintu fyonse kabili uo fyonse fibombela
Hebrews2:11 Yesu eusangulula abantu ukubafumya ku fyabubifi fyabo. Elyo umwine wine na bantu bene abasangululwa
Hebrews2:12 Asosa kuli Lesa ati
Hebrews2:13 Kabili atila nokuti
Hebrews2:14 Apo abo eta abana
Hebrews2:15 Elyo kabili epakuti alubule bonse abali abasha mu bumi bwabo bonse pa mulandu wakutiina imfwa.
Hebrews2:16 Pantu kwena calishibikwafye bwino ukuti te bamalaika Yesu afwilishako
Hebrews2:17 Eico kanshi Yesu ali nokwaluka ukuba nga bamunyina muli fyonse. Lyena epakuti abe Shimapepo mukalamba uwacine cine kabili uwaluse mukubombela Lesa wakwe
Hebrews2:18 Apo Yesu umwine alitunkilwe no kucula
Hebrews3:1 Kanshi bamunyinane
Hebrews3:2 Ali uwapetamina Lesa uwamusontele ukubomba uyu mulimo
Hebrews3:3 Umuntu uwakuula iŋanda alacindikwa ukucila ne ŋanda ine. Efyo fine Yesu nao aliba nokucindikwa apakalamba ukucila Mose.
Hebrews3:4 Cacine
Hebrews3:5 Mose ali uwapetama mukubomba imilimo yonse mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Kabili ali kambone wa fintu Lesa ali nokwisa landa kuntanshi.
Hebrews3:6 Lelo Kristu wena apo ni Mwane
Hebrews3:7 Kanshi Mupashi Wamushilo asosa ati
Hebrews3:8 mwiumalala mitima
Hebrews3:9 ilyo ifikolwe fyenu fyalenjesha no kunsonsomba

Hebrews3:11 Kanshi nalifulilwe
Hebrews3:12 Mwe bamunyinane

Hebrews3:14 Pantu ifwe twalyampana na Kristu
Hebrews3:15 Ngefyo calembwa ukuti
Hebrews3:16 Bantu nshi baumfwile ishiwi lyakwa Lesa
Hebrews3:17 Nga ni bani balya Lesa afulilwe pa myaka amakumi yane? Bantu balya ababifishe ne fitumbi fyabo fyashele mu matololo.
Hebrews3:18 Ni bani Lesa alelandapo ilyo alapile no mulapo ati
Hebrews3:19 Kanshi twamona ukuti
Hebrews4:1 Nomba apo icilayo cakutuusha ico Lesa alandapo epo cicili
Hebrews4:2 Pantu na ifwe twalyumfwa Imbila Nsuma
Hebrews4:3 Apo ifwe twasumina
Hebrews4:4 Pantu pamo calembwa palwa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali ukuti
Hebrews4:5 Uyu wine mulandu
Hebrews4:6 Bamo kwena balengila mu ncende yakutuushamo. Lelo ababalilepo ukumfwa Imbila Nsuma tabaingile mu ncende yakutuusha
Hebrews4:7 Ici ecalenga ukuti Lesa asale ubushiku bumbi
Hebrews4:8 Nga cakuti Yoshua alipeele abantu incende yakutuushamo iyo Lesa abalaile
Hebrews4:9 Kanshi emukutila ukutuusha kwa pe Sabata kwashalilafye abantu bakwa Lesa.
Hebrews4:10 Pantu uwaingila mukutuusha uko Lesa alaile
Hebrews4:11 Kanshi natulebombesha na maka yesu yonse pakuti twingile mu ncende yakutuushamo. Lyena epakuti umo pali ifwe ekafilwa nga filya bena bafililwe ico bashalebeela.
Hebrews4:12 Ishiwi lyakwa Lesa lyamweo
Hebrews4:13 Tapaba nelyo cimo icafisama ku cinso cakwa Lesa. Ifibumbwa fyonse fyabafye pa lwalala
Hebrews4:14 Kanshi natuleikatilila pa maka ku cisumino cesu ico twasuminamo. Pantu twalikwata Yesu
Hebrews4:15 Shimapepo wesu mukalamba tewakuti afilwe ukumfwa uluse pa bunasha bwesu. Lelo Shimapepo wesu mukalamba twakwata
Hebrews4:16 Kanshi natulepalama ku cipuna cakwa Lesa ukwaba icikuuku

Hebrews5:3 Apo nao alomfwa ubunasha

Hebrews6:1 Kanshi natubale tushe ifyo twasambilile pali Kristu ilyo twatampile
