Hebrews6:4 Bushe abantu abasuula ku cisumino cabo
Hebrews6:5 Aba bantu bena balyumfwako ifyo amashiwi yakwa Lesa yawama kabili balyumfwako ne fya pa maka ya nshita iyileisa.
Hebrews6:6 Elyo nomba balisangukila icisumino cabo! Kanshi tekuti cibombe icakubabwesha nakabili. Pantu bena nakabili baletanika Umwana wakwa Lesa
Hebrews6:7 Lesa eupaala umushili apo imfula iloka libili libili
Hebrews6:8 Lelo umushili uumesha imyunga na bacilasa
Hebrews6:9 Lelo bacibusa bandi nangu twalanda ifi
Hebrews6:10 Lesa taba na lufyengo. Ala tekuti alabe imilimo mwabomba nangu icitemwiko mwalanga pa mulandu wakwe mukwafwa abantu abamushilo abo na nomba mucili muleafwa.
Hebrews6:11 Ico ifwe tufwaisha cakuti cila umo pali imwe abe uwacincila mpaka na ku mpela
Hebrews6:12 Tatulefwaya imwe ukuti mube abanaŋani. Lelo tulefwaya ukuti imwe mube nga filya abantu bacisumino baba abamutekatima
Hebrews6:13 Ilyo Lesa alaile icilayo kuli Abrahamu
Hebrews6:14 Atile ati
Hebrews6:15 Abrahamu ali no mutekatima
Hebrews6:16 Ilyo abantu balapa umulapo
Hebrews6:17 Eico ku bantu abali nokupokelela ifyo alaile
Hebrews6:18 Kanshi kwaba ifi fintu fibili ifishingalulwa
Hebrews6:19 Icisubilo twakwata mu bumi bwesu caba kwati cela icafina ico baposa pali bemba pakulesha ubwato ukulaenda. Ici cisubilo cesu cintu cakosa
Hebrews6:20 Pa mulandu wa ifwe
Hebrews7:1 Uyu Melikisedeki ali ni mfumu ya Salemu
Hebrews7:2 Abrahamu nao abuulile icintu cimo pekumi lyonse ilya fintu asendele
Hebrews7:3 Takwata wishi nangu nyina nangu ifikolwe fyakwe
Hebrews7:4 Kanshi mwamona ukuti Melikisedeki ali umuntu uwacindama nganshi. Abrahamu icikolwe cesu icalumbuka nao amupeele icintu cimo cimo pekumi lyonse ilya fintu atapile mu bulwi.
Hebrews7:5 Elyo Amafunde yakwa Mose yakonkomeshe ukuti aba mu lupwa lwakwa Levi bashimapepo
Hebrews7:6 Melikisedeki wena tali wa mu lupwa lwakwa Levi
Hebrews7:7 Cena ici te cakutwishika icakuti umukalamba eupaala umwaice.
Hebrews7:8 Elyo nga ni bashimapepo bena
Hebrews7:9 Kanshi kuti twati apo Abrahamu apeele icintu cimo pekumi kuli Melikisedeki
Hebrews7:10 Pantu ilyo Abrahamu akumenye Melikisedeki
Hebrews7:11 Pali bushimapepo bwa bena Levi
Hebrews7:12 Pantu kumfwa nga kwaba ukwalula bushimapepo
Hebrews7:13 Elyo Imfumu yesu
Hebrews7:14 Calishibikwafye bwino ukuti Imfumu yesu yafyelwe mu luko lwakwa Yuda. Elyo ilyo Mose alandile pali bashimapepo
Hebrews7:15 Uyu mulandu waishile ishibikwa bwino ukucilapo
Hebrews7:16 Uyu wena bamucita Shimapepo te mulandu wakukonka amafunde ne ntambi sha bantu
Hebrews7:17 Pantu Amalembo Yamushilo yatila
Hebrews7:18 Kanshi amafunde yakale yalisuulwa kabili tayalebomba nelyo cimo.
Hebrews7:19 Pantu Amafunde yakwa Mose tekuti yalenge icintu nelyo cimo cibe icapwililika. Nomba pa malo ya mafunde
Hebrews7:20 Teici ceka
Hebrews7:21 Lelo Yesu ena ayalwike shimapepo ilyo Lesa alapile amweba ati
Hebrews7:22 Kanshi Yesu aba e cakushininkishishako icipangano icacilapo ukuwama.
Hebrews7:23 Bashimapepo bambi bena balya bali abengi
Hebrews7:24 Lelo Yesu wena aba no mweo wakubelelela
Hebrews7:25 Eico kanshi wena aliba na maka yakupususha umupwilapo abantu abaleisa kuli ena pakufika kuli Lesa
Hebrews7:26 Yesu
Hebrews7:27 Yesu wena taba nga Bashimapepo bakalamba bambi. Takabila kuleka amalambo cila bushiku
Hebrews7:28 Amafunde yakwa Mose yasonta abantu abanakuka ukuba Bashimapepo bakalamba. Lelo icilayo Lesa alaile no mulapopo
Hebrews8:1 Ico tulelandapofye nici icakuti ifwe twalikwata Shimapepo mukalamba uwa uyu musango. Aikala mu mulu lubali lwa ku kulyo kwa cipuna ca Mfumu iyacindama.
Hebrews8:2 E Shimapepo mukalamba uutumika mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine
Hebrews8:3 Shimapepo mukalamba onse asontwa pakuti aletuula imituulo
Hebrews8:4 Nomba alaikala pano calo
Hebrews8:5 Incende Yamushilo umo aba bashimapepo babomba
Hebrews8:6 Lelo Yesu ena apeelwa umulimo wa bushimapepo uwacindamishapo ukucila imilimo yabo
Hebrews8:7 Pantu mu cipangano capakubala fyonse afiba bwino
Hebrews8:8 Pantu Lesa asangile icilubo ku bantu bakwe
Hebrews8:9 Cena tacakabe nge cipangano ico napangene na bashibo
Hebrews8:10 ‘Ici e cipangano nkapangana na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli
Hebrews8:11 Takwakabe nangu umo uwakufunda umwina mupalamano munankwe
Hebrews8:12 Pantu nkababelelako uluse pa bubi bwabo
Hebrews8:13 Ilyo Lesa alanda palwa cipangano cipya
Hebrews9:1 Icipangano cakubalilapo calikwete amafunde pafyo bali nokulapepa
Hebrews9:2 Incende bapangile iyakupepelamo
Hebrews9:3 Panuma ya cisalu calecingililako kwali umuputule wabubili uwaleitwa Incende Yamushilo icine cine.
Hebrews9:4 Muli iyi Ncende emwali ubulambo bwapangilwe na golide apo baleocela ububani
Hebrews9:5 Pa mulu wa Mbokoshi ya cipangano pali ifimpashanya fibili fya bamalaika bakerubi abakulanga ubucindami bwakwa Lesa. Amapindo yabo yakupile pa mulu wa calecilika pa Mbokoshi ya cipangano apo baleita ukuti incende yakubelelwapo uluse ku fyabubifi. Lelo kwena ino taili nshita yakuti nalondolola fyonse bwino bwino.
Hebrews9:6 Ilyo bapwile ukupekanya ifi fintu fyonse
Hebrews9:7 Lelo mu muputule wa mukati uwabubili
Hebrews9:8 Kuli ifi
Hebrews9:9 Ici cishibilo cakutulanga ifyo cili pali ino nshita. Kanshi ciletulangafye ukuti imituulo na malambo ya nama batuula kuli Lesa tekuti yawamye umupwilapo umutima wa muntu uupepa.
Hebrews9:10 Pantu ifi fintu fyabafye pa fyakulya
Hebrews9:11 Lelo Kristu alisa Shimapepo mukalamba wa fintu fisuma ifilipo ndakai. Itenti lyakwa Lesa Kristu ena atumikilamo calicilapo ukucindama
Hebrews9:12 Kristu aingile umukufye umo epela mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine. Kristu wena pakwingilamo tasendele mulopa wa mbushi no wa fiponti fya ŋombe
Hebrews9:13 Ukukonka ulutambi lwa Bayuda umulopa wa mbushi no wa ŋombe ishilume
Hebrews9:14 Apo ciba ifyo
Hebrews9:15 Kanshi ni Kristu ewalenga ukuti kube icipangano cipya. Lyena epakuti abo Lesa aita
Hebrews9:16 Ilyo kuli icilayo cakushila umuntu ifintu panuma yakufwa
Hebrews9:17 Pantu icilayo cakushila umuntu ifintu panuma yakufwa
Hebrews9:18 Eico cine ne cipangano cakubalilapo tacatampile kubomba apabula umulopa wa cintu bepeye.
Hebrews9:19 Pakubala Mose alefunda abantu amafunde yonse ayalembwa mu citabo ica mafunde. Elyo alebuula umulopa wa ŋombe ishilume no wa mbushi aleusakanya mu menshi. Elyo aleukana pa citabo ca Mafunde yakwa Mose na pa bantu
Hebrews9:20 Alesosa ati
Hebrews9:21 Kabili mu musango umo wine
Hebrews9:22 Mu cacine ukulingana na Mafunde yakwa Mose
Hebrews9:23 Ifi fintu cimpashanyafye ca fintu fine fine ifya mu mulu
Hebrews9:24 Pantu Kristu taingile mu Ncende Yamushilo iyapangwa no muntu
Hebrews9:25 Shimapepo mukalamba wa Bayuda wena cila mwaka aleingila mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine
Hebrews9:26 Aciba ifyo
Hebrews9:27 Umuntu onse aba nokufwa umuku umo
Hebrews9:28 Efyo fine
Hebrews10:1 Amafunde yakwa Mose yalifye icakwishibilako ifintu ifisuma ifyali nokwisa
Hebrews10:2 Pantu abo bantu abesa kukupepa Lesa abalashininkisha ukuti ifyabubifi fyabo nafifuma
Hebrews10:3 Lelo mukutuula amalambo
Hebrews10:4 Pantu umulopa wa ŋombe ishilume no wa mbushi tekuti ufumye ifyabubifi nakalya
Hebrews10:5 Eico Kristu pakwisa pano calo asosele ati
Hebrews10:6 Amalambo yakoca inama yonse nangu amalambo ya pa fyabubifi tayakusansamusha nakalya.
Hebrews10:7 Na ine epakutila
Hebrews10:8 Ico abalilepo ukulanda
Hebrews10:9 Kabili atile ati
Hebrews10:10 Pantu Yesu Kristu acitile ifyo Lesa alefwaya ukuti acite. Ifwe bonse twalisangululwa twalifuma ku bubifi ku maka ye lambo ilya mubili wakwe umwine
Hebrews10:11 Kabili cila bushiku shimapepo onse Umuyuda alabomba imilimo yakwe
Hebrews10:12 Nomba Kristu wena atuulile ilambo limo ilyakubelelela pe ilifumya ifyabubifi. Elyo nomba aya ikala lubali lwa ku kulyo kwakwa Lesa.
Hebrews10:13 Eko nomba alolela mpaka Lesa akacite abalwani bakwe apakunyanta amakasa yakwe.
Hebrews10:14 Ku maka ye lambo limo
Hebrews10:15 Mupashi Wamushilo nao ni kambone wesu pali uyu mulandu. Pakubalilapo atila ati
Hebrews10:16 “Imfumu yasosa ukuti
Hebrews10:17 Kabili atila nokuti
Hebrews10:18 Apo Lesa abelela abantu uluse pa fyabubifi
Hebrews10:19 Mwe bamunyinane
Hebrews10:20 Kristu alitwiswila inshila ipya
Hebrews10:21 Twalikwata Shimapepo uwacindama uwangalila iŋanda yakwa Lesa.
Hebrews10:22 Kanshi natulepalamina kuli Lesa ne mitima iyacishinka ne cisumino nganshi. Natulekwata imitima iyasangululwa
Hebrews10:23 Natuleikatisha mwisubilo ilyo tulumbula ukuti lyesu
Hebrews10:24 Natuletontonkanya pafyo twingalacincishanya mukutemwana na mukucita ifisuma.
Hebrews10:25 Twilashala kukulongana pamo
Hebrews10:26 Pantu ifwe fwe bapokelela icishinka
Hebrews10:27 Awe lyena icikashalakofye
Hebrews10:28 Umuntu onse uwapula Amafunde yakwa Mose
Hebrews10:29 Nga kanshi ni shani umuntu uwasuula Umwana wakwa Lesa? Ni shani uyo muntu uumona ukuti cafyefye umulopa wa cipangano cakwa Lesa uwamusangulwile ukufuma ku bubifi? Ni shani umuntu uusaalula Mupashi wacikuuku? Kanshi tontonkanyenipo pafyo cikalinga uyu muntu ukukandwa icabipisha!
Hebrews10:30 Pantu twalishiba uwasosele ati
Hebrews10:31 Ala cintu cakutiina icakwikatwa mu minwe yakwa Lesa wamweo.
Hebrews10:32 Muleibukisha shilya nshiku shakale ilyo mwapokelele ulubuuto. Lyena mwalishangile nganshi no kulwisha na maka nangu mwalecula.
Hebrews10:33 Limo limo balemutukaula no kulamucusha pa menso ya bantu
Hebrews10:34 Mwalelangulukilako na bali mu cifungo
Hebrews10:35 Kanshi mwilafupuka
Hebrews10:36 Mulekoselela ukucita ifyo Lesa afwaya elyo mukapokelela ifyo alaya.
Hebrews10:37 Pantu
Hebrews10:38 Umololoke ena akulaba umumi pa mulandu wa citetekelo. Lelo nga amfutatila
Hebrews10:39 Lelo ifwe tatuli bantu abafutatila kuli Lesa kabili no kuloba baliloba. Ifwe tuli bantu abasumina no kupusuka twalipusuka.
Hebrews11:1 Cisumino ecilenga tushininkishe ukupeelwa ifintu tusubila
Hebrews11:2 Ni pa mulandu wa cisumino epo Lesa atashishe ifikolwe fyesu.
Hebrews11:3 Ni pa mulandu wa cisumino ecalenga twiluke ukuti ni Lesa ewabumbile icalo kwishiwi lyakwe. Kanshi emukuti ifimoneka fyatula ku fishimoneka.
Hebrews11:4 Cisumino calengele ukuti Abeli atuule Lesa ilambo ilyawamapo ukucila ilyakwa Kaini. Ni pa mulandu wa cisumino Lesa aebele Abeli ukuba uwakaele pa cinso cakwe
Hebrews11:5 Nico Enoki ali ne cisumino ecalengele nokuti efwa. Lelo Lesa amusendele umutuntulu ku mulu
Hebrews11:6 Pantu ukwabula icisumino umuntu tekuti asansamushe Lesa. Pantu umuntu pakwisa kuli Lesa
Hebrews11:7 Cisumino calengele ukuti Noa
Hebrews11:8 Cisumino calengele ukuti Abrahamu anakile Lesa uwamwitile ukuti ashe cilya calo aye ku calo ico Lesa alaile ukumupeela. Ashile icalo cakwe no kulaya uko ashaishibe.
Hebrews11:9 Cisumino cakwe calengele ukuti ekale umweni mu calo Lesa amulaile. Aleikala mu matenti nga filya Isaki na Yakobo baleikala abo Lesa alaile icilayo cimo cine.
Hebrews11:10 Pantu Abrahamu alelolela umusumba. Fundi uwalengele ifyo umufula uli nokuba na kakuula wine wa musumba
Hebrews11:11 Cisumino calengele ukuti Abrahamu akwate umwana nangu ali umukote nganshi
Hebrews11:12 Kanshi ecalengele ukuti ku muntu umofye
Hebrews11:13 Aba bantu bonse ilyo bafwile
Hebrews11:14 Abantu abalanda umusango uyu
Hebrews11:15 Tabaletontonkanya pa calo ico bafuminemo pantu aciba ifyo nga balisangile inshila yakubwelelamo.
Hebrews11:16 Lelo balefwaisha icalo iciwemepo
Hebrews11:17 Cisumino calengele ukuti Abrahamu ilyo Lesa amweseshe
Hebrews11:18 Lesa amwebele ati
Hebrews11:19 Abrahamu aletontonkanya ati Lesa kuti abusha umuntu uwafwa. Cacine kuti mwasosa nokuti Abrahamu ali kwati untu wapokelele Isaki ukufuma ku bafwa.
Hebrews11:20 Cisumino calengele ukuti Isaki apaale Yakobo na Esau pa fintu ifyali nokwisa kuntanshi.
Hebrews11:21 Cisumino calengele ukuti Yakobo ilyo ali mupepi nokufwa
Hebrews11:22 Cisumino calengele ukuti
Hebrews11:23 Cisumino calengele ukuti abafyashi bakwa Mose bamufise pa myeshi itatu ilyo afyelwe. Bamwene ukuti ali umwana umusuma nganshi
Hebrews11:24 Cisumino calengele ukuti Mose ilyo akulile akaane ukulamwita umwana wakwa mwana Falao umwanakashi.
Hebrews11:25 Mose asalilepo ukucula pamo na bantu bakwa Lesa
Hebrews11:26 Wena amwene ukuti umusaalula engacula pa mulandu wakwa Kristu wacindamapo ukucila ifyuma fyonse ifya mu Egupto
Hebrews11:27 Cisumino calengele ukuti Mose afume mu Egupto ukwabula ukutiina ubukali bwa mfumu. Alishipikishe kwati untu alemona Lesa uushimoneka.
Hebrews11:28 Cisumino calengele ukuti Mose acite Pasaka
Hebrews11:29 Cisumino calengele abena Israeli babuke Bemba Wakashika kwati ni pa mushili uwauma ndi. Lelo abena Egupto bena ilyo baeseshe ukucita ifyo
Hebrews11:30 Cisumino calengele amalinga ya musumba wa Yeriko ukuti yabongoloke
Hebrews11:31 Cisumino calengele Rahabu cilende ukuti bemwipaila pamo na bashasumine Lesa
Hebrews11:32 Finshi fimbi ifyo ningasosa? Awe tekuti nkwate inshita iyakulanda pali Gideoni
Hebrews11:33 Aba bantu ku cisumino cabo bacimfishe ifyalo mu bulwi. Balecita ifyo Lesa afwaya
Hebrews11:34 Baleshimya no mulilo uukali uulebilima no kupusunsuka ku lupanga ilyo balefwaya ukubepaya. Bali imbulwamaka
Hebrews11:35 Pa mulandu wa cisumino
Hebrews11:36 Bambi nabo babacushishe mukubaseka no kuboma ifikoti
Hebrews11:37 Balebepaya kukubalasa amabwe
Hebrews11:38 Aba bantu icalo tacabawamine. Baleseulukafye mu matololo na mu mpili kwati ni mbutushi
Hebrews11:39 Aba bantu balabatasha pa mulandu wa cisumino cabo! Lelo tabapokelele ifyo Lesa alaile.
Hebrews11:40 Pantu nifwe Lesa ateyanishishe ifyawamapo ukucila. Lesa ateyenye ukuti
Hebrews12:1 Nomba ifwe twalishingulukwa ne bumba ilikalamba ilya bakambone. Kanshi natuitalushe kuli fyonse ifitufinya na ku bubifi bwine ubutukakatilafye bwangu. Natuleshipikisha mukubutuka ulubilo batuteyanishisha.
Hebrews12:2 Natuletonta amenso yesu pali Yesu uwalengele ukuti tube ne cisumino
Hebrews12:3 Muletontonkanya pafyo Yesu apitilemo. Wena aleshipikisha ilyo abantu babi bamupatile nganshi. Kanshi na imwe mwilanenuka
Hebrews12:4 Pantu mukulwisha ububifi
Hebrews12:5 Bushe mwalilaba amashiwi yacikoseleshi ayo Lesa alanda kuli imwe bamwane ayakuti
Hebrews12:6 Pantu Imfumu ilakalipila abo yena yatemwa
Hebrews12:7 Muleshipikisha mu macushi
Hebrews12:8 Nga talemukalipila
Hebrews12:9 Nomba ifwe twalikwata abafyashi besu abantu
Hebrews12:10 Bashifwe bantu batukalipila pa kashita akanono ukulingana nefyo bamwene ukuti ecilingile. Lelo Lesa ena alatukalipila pakuti cituwamine
Hebrews12:11 Kwena lyonsefye pa nshita tulekalipilwa
Hebrews12:12 Kanshi kosheni amaboko yenu ayanakuka na makufi yenu ayaletutuma.
Hebrews12:13 Mulinganye inshila umwakupita amakasa yenu
Hebrews12:14 Lyonse mulefwaya ukwikala no muntu onse mu mutende no kuba abamushilo
Hebrews12:15 Mulecenjela pakuti umuntu nelyo umo elafutatila cikuuku cakwa Lesa. Mwileka nelyo umo aluke umushila uwalula
Hebrews12:16 Mwileka nelyo umo abe cilende nangu uushisakamana Lesa nga Esau
Hebrews12:17 Mwalishiba ukuti panuma alefwaya ukupoka ipaalo ilyabubeli kuli wishi
Hebrews12:18 Imwe tamwatala amufika pa cintu icakuti mwaikatako ngo lupili lwa Sinai. Pali ulu lupili palebilima umulilo
Hebrews12:19 Kabili paleumfwika iciunda ce penga ne shiwi ilikalamba. Ilyo abantu baumfwile ishiwi
Hebrews12:20 Pantu abantu calibanshishe ukubeela icebo icasoselwe ukuti
Hebrews12:21 Cacine icamoneke ku lupili cali cakutiinya nganshi icakuti na Mose wine asosele ati
Hebrews12:22 Lelo imwe mwaisa ku lupili lwa Sioni
Hebrews12:23 Mwaisa ku lukuta lwa mabeli yakwa Lesa
Hebrews12:24 Mwaisa kuli Yesu uwatuwikishanya na Lesa mu cipangano cipya. Mwaisa ku mulopa waitike uutusosela ifyawamapo ukucila umulopa wakwa Abeli.
Hebrews12:25 Kanshi mulecenjela
Hebrews12:26 Pa nshita ilya
Hebrews12:27 Pakusosa ati
Hebrews12:28 Kanshi natuletasha Lesa
Hebrews12:29 Pantu Lesa wesu cine cine mulilo uoca fyonse.
Hebrews13:1 Mwilanenuka mukutemwana nga bamunyina.
Hebrews13:2 Mwilalaba ukusekelela abeni. Bamo abantu mukucita ifyo balisekelela bamalaika ukwabula ukwishiba.
Hebrews13:3 Muleibukisha abali mu cifungo
Hebrews13:4 Bonse muli nokucindika icupo. Mwe balume na imwe mwe bakashi mube ne cishinka mu cupo cenu. Lesa akapingula abacita ubulalelale na babembuka.
Hebrews13:5 Mu mikalile yenu mwilatemwa indalama
Hebrews13:6 Kanshi natulecetekela Lesa
Hebrews13:7 Muleibukisha intungulushi shenu ishamushimikile amashiwi yakwa Lesa. Muletontonkanya pafyo bacitile mu bumi bwabo
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kristu wena abafye cimo cine
Hebrews13:9 Mwileka amafunde yambi yambifye
Hebrews13:10 Ifwe pa bulambo bwesu bashimapepo ababomba kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa tabakwata insambu shakulyako ifyelambo.
Hebrews13:11 Shimapepo mukalamba asenda umulopa wa nama no kuutula ilambo lyakufuta pa fyabubifi mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine. Lelo ifitumbi fya nama fyena bafyocela kunse ya nkambi.
Hebrews13:12 Kanshi eico Yesu nao afwilile kunse ya musumba
Hebrews13:13 Kanshi na ifwe natuleya kuli Yesu kunse ya nkambi
Hebrews13:14 Pantu pano calo tatwakwata musumba wakubelelela
Hebrews13:15 Ku maka yakwa Yesu
Hebrews13:16 Mwilalaba ukucita ifisuma no kwafwako abanenu kufyo mukwete
Hebrews13:17 Mulebeela intungulushi shenu
Hebrews13:18 Muletupepelako na ifwe. Ifwe natushininkisha tatwaba nelyo cimo icakusakamika kampingu wa mitima yesu
Hebrews13:19 Kanshi ndemupapata nganshi mulempepelako ukuti Lesa akambweseshe bwangu kuli imwe.
Hebrews13:20 Lesa alibusha ku bafwa Yesu Imfumu yesu. Uyu Yesu e kacema mukalamba wa mpaanga uo ku mulopa wakwe apangile icipangano cakubelelela.
Hebrews13:21 Lesa wamutende engamupeela ifintu ifisuma fyonse ifyo mulekabila pakuti mulecita ifyo alefwaya
Hebrews13:22 Mwe bamunyinane ndemupapata muteke imitima pakukutika kuli aya mashiwi ya cikoseleshi
Hebrews13:23 Ndefwaya mwishibe nokuti munyinefwe Timote balimufumya mu cifungo. Nga ayangufyanya ukwisa
Hebrews13:24 Poshenipo intungulushi shenu shonse na bamushilo bonse. Bamunyinefwe abafuma ku Itali balemuposha.
Hebrews13:25 Icikuuku cakwa Lesa cileba na imwe bonse.
James1:1 Ine Yakobo
James1:2 Mwe bamunyinane
James1:3 Pantu mwalishiba ukuti ilyo icisumino cenu cileeshiwa ku macushi
James1:4 Ukushipikisha kwenu kuli nokumoneka nganshi mufyo mulebomba
James1:5 Umo pali imwe nga takwete amano
James1:6 Lelo uyu wine ilyo alepepa
James1:7 Uyo muntu uwaba ifi
James1:8 Abafye uwabula ukushininkisha ifyo ali nokucita
James1:9 Uwabwananyina umupina afwile ukumfwa bwino pali ico Lesa amucindamika.
James1:10 Umukankala uwabwananyina nao wine afwile ukumfwa bwino pali ico Lesa amupoka ubucindami. Pantu umukankala akalukuta nge luba lya cani.
James1:11 Akasuba nga katula
James1:12 Alishuka umuntu uushipikisha mu macushi. Pantu nga acimya amacushi
James1:13 Umo nga atunkwa elatontonkanya ukuti ni Lesa eulemutunka. Pantu Lesa teti atunkwe ne fyabipa
James1:14 Lelo umuntu atunkwa ilyo ulunkumbwa lwakwe lwamusembeleka no kumwikata.
James1:15 Ulunkumbwa nga lwakula
James1:16 Ala mwilabepwa mwe bamunyinane!
James1:17 Ifyabupe fyonse ifisuma ifyo tupokelela ne fyawamisha umupwilapo fifuma ku mulu. Fifuma kuli Lesa Tata uwabumba ifya mu mulu ifipeela ulubuuto. Muli wena tamwaba imfifi
James1:18 Lesa umwine kukufwaya kwakwe ewatufyele kwishiwi lyakwe ilyacishinka. Acita ifi pantu alefwaya ukuti tube abantanshi pa fibumbwa fyakwe fyonse.
James1:19 Mwalishiba mwe bamunyinane mwe batemwikwa bandi ukuti
James1:20 Pantu icipyu ca muntu tacileta cisuma ico Lesa afwaya.
James1:21 Kanshi lekeni ifyakowela fyonse ne misango ibi yonse mucili nayo. Mulenakila Lesa no kupokelela amashiwi yakwe ayo abyala mu mitima yenu ayaba na maka yakumupususha.
James1:22 Mwilaibepa mukupelelafye pakumfwa amashiwi yakwe
James1:23 Umuntu uumfwafye amashiwi lelo tacita ifyo yalemweba
James1:24 Cilya apwa ukuilolesha afumapo
James1:25 Lelo umuntu uulolekesha mwifunde ilyapwililika ilitulenga tube abantungwa
James1:26 Bushe utila ndi mwina Lesa? Nga waba cilandelande ninshi uibepafye no bwina Lesa bobe nabo bwafyefye.
James1:27 Ubwina Lesa ubo Lesa Shifwe amona ukuti bwalipwililika ku busuma
James2:1 Mwe bamunyinane
James2:2 Nga cakuti umukankala uufwele imbalaminwe ya golide ne nsalu shamutengo
James2:3 Nga mwapokelela bwino uufwele ubusaka
James2:4 Bushe ninshi te kapatulula mwacita? Bushe ninshi te mano yabi mwabomfya mukupingula?
James2:5 Umfweni mwe bamunyinane mwe batemwikwa bandi! Lesa asala aba bantu
James2:6 Lelo imwe mulasausha abapina! Ni bani bushe bamufyengelesha no kumupatikisha ukuya ku filye? Bushe te bakankala!
James2:7 Bushe te bakankala basaalula ishina ilicindami lyakwa Kristu ilyo mwainikweko?
James2:8 Nga mulalungika
James2:9 Lelo nga mulacita akapatulula
James2:10 Uyo onse uusunga amafunde yakwa Lesa yonse
James2:11 Lesa ewapeele icebo cakuti
James2:12 Imilandile ne micitile yenu ileba nge ya bantu abapingulwa ne funde ililenga tube abantungwa.
James2:13 Pantu Lesa takabe na luse pakupingula umuntu uushakwete luse ku munankwe. Umuntu uwaluse tali nakutiina kupingulwa.
James2:14 Mwe bamunyinane
James2:15 Nomba nga cakuti munyinenwe
James2:16 Bushe cikabawamina shani nga umo pali imwe abeba ati
James2:17 Kanshi efyo ne cisumino caba
James2:18 Nalimo umo kuti alanda ati
James2:19 Bushe wasumina ukuti kwabafye Lesa umo? Cisuma! Ne mipashi yakowela nayo yalisumina
James2:20 We cipumbu ca muntu we
James2:21 Bushe cinshi calengele ukuti Abrahamu icikolwe cesu abe uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa? Ala ni pa milimo yakwe isuma
James2:22 Wamona ukuti cisumino ne milimo yakwe isuma fyabombele pamo. Milimo yakwe isuma yalengele ukuti icisumino cakwe cibe icapwililika.
James2:23 Ne fyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo fyalifikilishiwa ifyakuti
James2:24 Mwamona nomba ukuti
James2:25 Epamo pene na ku mwanakashi Rahabu cilende. Lesa amumwene ukuti wakaele pa cinso cakwe pafyo acitile. Apokelele inengu sha bena Israeli shibili
James2:26 Nga filya umubili wa muntu ufwa ilyo umupashi wafumamo
James3:1 Mwe bamunyinane
James3:2 Ifwe bonse ilingi tulalufyanya. Nomba umuntu nga talufyanya mufyo asosa
James3:3 Tubika icela mu kanwa kakwa kabalwe pakuti alecita ifyo tulefwaya. Nga twacita ifi tulenga kabalwe ukuya konse uko tulefwaya.
James3:4 Tontonkanyeni pa cibwato icenda pali bemba. Nangu cikule shani
James3:5 Ululimi nalo efyo lwaba. Nangu lwaba akapande ka mubili akanono
James3:6 Ululimi nalo lwaba kwati mulilo. Pa filundwa fya mibili yesu
James3:7 Umuntu kuti ateeka inama sha mpaanga
James3:8 Lelo takwaba winganasha ululimi. Lwena talupema pa bubi
James3:9 Ku lulimi tulalumbanishishako Imfumu kabili Shifwe
James3:10 Mu kanwa kamo kene emufuma ukutasha no kulapisha. Bamunyinane ifi tefyo cilingile ukuba.
James3:11 Mu kamfukumfuku kamo kene teti mufume amenshi ayasuma na yacicelecele.
James3:12 Umukunyu
James3:13 Ni ani pali imwe uwamano kabili uwacenjela? Uyo afwile ukulanga ukuti wamano kabili untu wacenjela ku micitile yakwe isuma mu fintu acita mu kuicefya ukwamano.
James3:14 Lelo nga mwaba no mufimbila nganshi no kuisakamanafye mwe bene
James3:15 Amano ya uyu musango tekuli Lesa yafuma
James3:16 Pantu uko kuli umufimbila no kuisakamanafye
James3:17 Lelo amano ayafuma kuli Lesa yena yaba ayapwililika
James3:18 Ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa
James4:1 Bushe ifilenga ukuti muleumana no kulalwa fifuma kwi? Bushe temukukonkelela ulunkumbwa lubi ululwisha mu mibili yenu?
James4:2 Mulafwaya ukukwata ifintu nomba tamukwata
James4:3 Ico mushipokelela ifintu ilyo mulomba
James4:4 Mwe bantu basangukila Lesa mwe! Bushe tamwaishiba ukuti ukubikana bucibusa ne calo kuba umulwani wakwa Lesa? Uufwaya bucibusa ne calo aicita umulwani wakwa Lesa.
James4:5 Mwilatontonkanya ukuti te fyacishinka ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ifitila
James4:6 Lelo kwena Lesa icikuuku atukwatila calicilapo. Eico calembwa ukuti
James4:7 Kanshi mulenakila Lesa. Muleyansha Ciwa
James4:8 Mulepalama kuli Lesa
James4:9 Beni no bulanda
James4:10 Muleba abafuuka pa cinso ca Mfumu
James4:11 Mwe bamunyinane
James4:12 Ni Lesa ekafye eupeela amafunde no kupingula abantu. Kabili ni ekafye ewaba na maka yakupususha abantu nangu ukubalofya. Nga iwe uli ani uwakupingula umunobe?
James4:13 Umfweni imwe mwe batila
James4:14 Tamwaishiba nga cakuti mukaba abomi mailo. Imwe mwabafye nga fubefube uumoneka pa kashita akanono
James4:15 Ifyo mulingile ukusosa nifi
James4:16 Nomba imwe mucita icilumba no kulaitakisha. Amataki yonse aya musango uyu
James4:17 Eico kanshi umuntu onse uwaishiba ifisuma fintu afwile ukulacita
James5:1 Umfweni mwe bakankala. Akulileni ifilamba
James5:2 Ifyuma fyenu nafibola ne nsalu shenu nashiliwa ku fishishi.
James5:3 Golide na silifa nafiliwa ne ndalawa. Neshi ndalawa shikaba e kambone wakumushinina. Shikonaula umubili wenu kwati mulilo. Imwe namuituntumanikila ifyuma muli shino nshiku shakupelekeshako.
James5:4 Moneni
James5:5 Mu bumi bwenu pano calo muposa indalama ishingi pa fyakuisansamusha no kuilemena mwe bene. Eico nomba namuinya kukupekanya ku bushiku bwakwipaiwa.
James5:6 Nimwe mupingwila abantu abakaele ukufwa
James5:7 Mwe bamunyinane
James5:8 Eico kanshi na imwe muleteka umutima
James5:9 Pali imwe bamunyinane
James5:10 Mwe bamunyinane muleibukisha bakasesema abo Lesa atumine kukulanda amashiwi yakwe. Lekeni babe ifilangililo fyenu mukuteka umutima ilyo muli mu macushi.
James5:11 Moneni balya baleshipikisha mu macushi
James5:12 Bamunyinane ndemukonkomesha nganshi ukuti
James5:13 Umo pali imwe nga ali mu macushi
James5:14 Umo pali imwe nga nalwala
James5:15 No mulwele akapola ico abamupepelako bali ne cisumino. Imfumu ikamuposha no kumubelela uluse nga alibifya.
James5:16 Kanshi muleebana ifyabubifi fyenu
James5:17 Eliya ali umuntufye nga ifwe. Alombele Lesa pa maka ukuti aleshe imfula ukuloka. Elyo na pa myaka itatu ne myeshi mutanda takwali mfula mu calo iyoo.
James5:18 Aishile lomba nakabili
James5:19 Mwe bamunyinane
James5:20 Uyu muntu uwayalulula umubifi ukufuma ku mibeele yakwe ibi
1Peter1:1 Ine Petelo
1Peter1:2 Imwe Lesa Tata ku kufwaya kwakwe amusalile kale ukuba abantu bakwe. Mupashi wakwe nao amucita ukuba abantu abamushilo abanakila Yesu Kristu
1Peter1:3 Napaalwe na matotelo Lesa
1Peter1:4 Kanshi eico tulolela ukukwatako ifintu fikankala Lesa asungila abantu bakwe. Amusungila ifi fintu mu mulu
1Peter1:5 Lesa ku maka yakwe ico imwe mwamusumina
1Peter1:6 Pali ici cena mulesansamuka
1Peter1:7 Aya macushi yakushininkishafye ukuti icisumino cenu cacine cine. Icela ca golide
1Peter1:8 Nangu mushamumona mwalimutemwa. Nangu mushilamumona mwalimusumina. Kanshi eico mulasansamuka ne nsansa ishikalamba nganshi isho umuntu ashingalondolola.
1Peter1:9 Pantu mulepokelela ukupusuka kwa myeo yenu uko icisumino cenu cifwaya.
1Peter1:10 Uko kwine kupusuka eko bakasesema basakamene no kufwailisha nganshi
1Peter1:11 Umupashi wakwa Kristu uo bakwete ewalebeba pafyo Kristu ali nokwisa cula
1Peter1:12 Lesa alisokolwele kuli aba bakasesema ukuti tabaleibombela abene mu mulimo wabo
1Peter1:13 Kanshi mu mitima yenu mube abaiteyanya kukubomba. Muletekanya
1Peter1:14 Nga bana abanakila Shinwe
1Peter1:15 Filya Lesa uwamwita aba uwamushilo
1Peter1:16 Pantu calembwa ukuti
1Peter1:17 Apo ilyo mulepepa mwita Lesa amuti ni Shifwe
1Peter1:18 Imwe mwalishiba ifyalipilwe pakumulubula ku misango ya buwelewele iyo ifikolwe fyenu fyamushilile. Tabomfeshe ifintu ifyonaika
1Peter1:19 Lelo imwe mwalubulwa no mulopa uwacindamisha uwakwa Kristu
1Peter1:20 Wena Lesa amusalile ne calo tacilabumbwa. Lelo pa mulandu wa ifwe
1Peter1:21 Ni ku maka yakwa Kristu mwakwatila icisumino muli Lesa. Uyu wine Lesa ewabushishe Kristu ku bafwa
1Peter1:22 Kanshi nomba mwalisangulula imitima yenu pali ico mwanakila icishinka
1Peter1:23 Pantu mwafyalwa cipya cipya te ku mufyashi uufwa
1Peter1:24 Pantu catila

1Peter2:1 Kanshi mutaluke ku fibi fyonse
1Peter2:2 Mube kwati tunya tufyelwe nomba
1Peter2:3 Pantu imwe mwaliyumfwila ifyo Imfumu yawama.
1Peter2:4 Iseni ku Mfumu
1Peter2:5 Imwe mube nga mabwe ayomi ayakuti Lesa abomfya pakukuula iŋanda yakwe. Muli iyi ŋanda yakwe emo imwe ku maka yakwa Yesu Kristu mwakulabombela Lesa nga bashimapepo bamushilo
1Peter2:6 Pantu ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo fitila
1Peter2:7 Kuli imwe mwe basumina
1Peter2:8 Pambi napo catila
1Peter2:9 Lelo imwe muli mukowa Lesa asala
1Peter2:10 Kale tamwali bantu bakwa Lesa
1Peter2:11 Mwe batemwikwa bandi
1Peter2:12 Ilyo muleikala na bantu abashaishiba Lesa
1Peter2:13 Pa mulandu wa Mfumu mulenakila ubuteko bonse ubwa bantu. Mulenakila kateeka mukalamba
1Peter2:14 Mulenakila na balashi
1Peter2:15 Pantu Lesa afwaya ukuti
1Peter2:16 Mu mikalile yenu mube abantungwa. Nomba mwilabomfya buntungwa bwenu ukuba akabepesho kakucitilako ifibi. Lelo mu mikalile yenu mube nga abasha bakwa Lesa.
1Peter2:17 Mulecindika umuntu onse
1Peter2:18 Mwe babomfi mulebeela no kucindika bashikulwinwe. Mwilacita ifyo kuli abo aba luse no mutembo
1Peter2:19 Pantu nga mwaba no mutima wakucita ubufwayo bwakwa Lesa
1Peter2:20 Lelo nga muleshipikisha impumo bamupuma ico mulufyenye
1Peter2:21 Ala ni kuli ifi fine eko Lesa amwitilako. Pantu Kristu umwine alimuculile
1Peter2:22 Kristu ena tabifishe
1Peter2:23 Kristu ilyo balemutuka
1Peter2:24 Kristu umwine asendele ifyabubifi fyesu mu mubili wakwe pa musalaba
1Peter2:25 Pantu kale mwali kwati ni mpaanga ishaleendafye icende ende
1Peter3:1 Mu musango umo wine abakashi balenakila abalume. Epakuti nga pali bamo abashanakila amashiwi yakwa Lesa
1Peter3:2 Pantu balemona ifyo imyendele yenu yakaele
1Peter3:3 Lekeni ukuyemba kwenu kwiba ku fyakuisamika ifili ngo musango mulelukilamo imishishi
1Peter3:4 Lelo ukuyemba kwenu kuli nokuba mu mitima yenu. Muleba nokuyemba ukushonaika
1Peter3:5 Ifi efyo abanakashi aba pakale abamushilo baleisamika. Balesubila muli Lesa
1Peter3:6 Efyo Sara alecita
1Peter3:7 E cimo cine na imwe mwe balume

1Peter3:9 Mwilalandula pa bubi bamucitila nangu ukulasaushanya

1Peter3:11 Ali nokuleka ukucita ifyabipa
1Peter3:12 Pantu amenso ya Mfumu yaba pa bololoke
1Peter3:13 Nomba nga mwalicincila mukucita ifisuma
1Peter3:14 Lelo nangu cakuti mulecula ico mulecita ifyo Lesa afwaya
1Peter3:15 Mulecindika Kristu no kumucita Imfumu ya bumi bwenu. Lyonse muleba abaiteyanya ukwasuka umuntu onse uwamwipusha ukumulondolwela pesubilo ilyo mwakwata. Muleyasuka uyo muntu mucinshi mucinshi no mutembo.
1Peter3:16 Muleenda na kampingu wa mitima yenu umusuma
1Peter3:17 Pantu cawamapo ukucula pakucita ifisuma
1Peter3:18 Kristu afwile umuku umo pa fyabubifi
1Peter3:19 Elyo ngo mupashi aile kukushimikila imipashi iyali mu cifungo.

1Peter4:1 Kanshi apo Kristu aculile mu mubili wakwe

1Peter4:3 Kale mwaikele inshita ikalamba mulecita ifyo abantu abashaishiba Lesa batemwa ukucita. Mwaleikala mu bulalelale
1Peter4:4 Kanshi nomba abantu bashaishiba Lesa nacibapesha amano ico mushilebakonka mu mikalile ibi iyabuwelewele

2Peter1:1 Ine Simoni Petelo
2Peter1:2 Icikuuku cakwa Lesa no mutende wakwe fileba na imwe umupwilapo pali ico mwaishiba Lesa na Yesu Imfumu yesu.
2Peter1:3 Lesa ku maka yakwe alitupeela fyonse ifyakutwafwako ukwikala nga bantu bakwe icine cine. Atwita ku bucindami bwakwe na ku busuma bwakwe pali ico twalimwishiba.
2Peter1:4 Ni ku bucindami bwakwe no busuma bwakwe eco atupeelela ifyabupe ifikankala ifyacindamisha nganshi ifyo atulaile. Pakuti kuli ifi fyabupe mumone ukukuma kuli Bulesa bwakwe
2Peter1:5 Eico kanshi na imwe muli nokubombesha
2Peter1:6 Elyo kukwishiba Lesa
2Peter1:7 Ku bwina Lesa
2Peter1:8 Iyi e mibeele muli nokukwata. Nga mwakwata iyi imibeele kabili yalalundulukilako
2Peter1:9 Lelo umuntu onse uushakwata iyi mibeele
2Peter1:10 Mwe bamunyinane
2Peter1:11 Elyo ninshi lyena mukapeelwa insambu shonse shakwingila mu Bufumu bwakubelelela ubwa Mfumu yesu kabili Umupusushi wesu Yesu Kristu.
2Peter1:12 Eico nakulamwibukishako ifi fintu
2Peter1:13 Ine ndetontonkanya ukuti
2Peter1:14 Pantu ine ninjishiba ukuti nalaswa mfume mu nsakwe iyi iya pano calo
2Peter1:15 Kanshi ndi nokwesha nganshi ukuti nga nafwa mukaleibukisha ifi ifintu inshita yonse.
2Peter1:16 Ifwe ilyo twamushimikile pa kwisa ukwamaka ukwa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu tatwabomfeshe imilumbe iyakwelenganyafye iyoo. Ifwe twaliimwenene na menso yesu ubucindami bwakwe.
2Peter1:17 Ifwe epo twali ilyo Lesa Wishi alemulumbanya no kumucindika. Ishiwi lyafumine kuli Lesa umwine bucindami aliti
2Peter1:18 Ifwe fwe bene nifwe twaumfwile ili shiwi lilefuma ku mulu ilyo twali nankwe pa lupili lwamushilo.
2Peter1:19 Kanshi calenga nokuti tucilileko mukushininkisha ukuti amashiwi yasosele bakasesema yacishinka. Elyo na imwe bene kuti cawama muleposako amano
2Peter1:20 Icakwibukisha pali fyonse nici icakuti
2Peter1:21 Pantu bakasesema tabaitendekefye abene pakulanda ayo mashiwi
2Peter2:1 Na kale line pa bantu ba mu Israeli epo bali bakasesema babufi. Epamo na pali imwe bene bakabapo bakafundisha babufi. Bakalamufunda amafundisho yabufi
2Peter2:2 Abengi bakakonka imisango yabo iyabupulumushi
2Peter2:3 Aba bakafundisha babufi pa mulandu wakuba no lunkumbwa lwa fyuma
2Peter2:4 Ilyo bamalaika babifishe
2Peter2:5 Lesa tapanishe na bantu ba cino calo aba pakale
2Peter2:6 Lesa apingwilile ne misumba ya Sodoma na Gomora ukonaika
2Peter2:7 Lesa apuswishe umuntu umololoke Loti. Loti ena imisango yabupulumushi iya bantu ababi yalemuletela ubulanda.
2Peter2:8 Uyu muntu umololoke Loti aleikala nabo
2Peter2:9 Kanshi Imfumu yalishiba ukupususha abantu abapetamina Lesa mu mafya yabo. Kabili yalishiba no kusunga abantu babi abali nokukandwa pa Bushiku bwabupingushi.
2Peter2:10 Palibufi Lesa akakanda abantu abakonkelela ulunkumbwa lwabo lubi no kusuula amaka yakwa Lesa. Aba bakafundisha babufi baba abapama kabili abakamuka
2Peter2:11 Nangu ni bamalaika bene
2Peter2:12 Aba bakafundisha babufi balanda no musaalula pa fintu ifyo bashishibe. Baba kwati ni nama sha mpanga ishishaishiba ico shilecita. Shena shifyalwafye pakuti shikatwe no kwipaiwa. Naba bakafundisha babufi bakonaulwafye kwati ni nama sha mpanga.
2Peter2:13 Bakacula pa mulandu wakucusha bambi. Bena insansa shabo kucita ifyakusansamusha imibili yabo pa lwalala. Baba kwati matoni ya fiko ayaleta insoni
2Peter2:14 Amenso yabo yabafye pa banakashi bakubembuka nabo. Baba no lunkumbwa ulushinaka ukufwaya ukubifya. Basembeleka abantu bashakosa pakuti babifye. Imitima yabo yateekwa no lunkumbwa. Aba bantu Lesa alibatipwila.
2Peter2:15 Balisha inshila yacishinka no kuluba baliluba. Bakonka inshila yakonkele Balamu mwana Beori
2Peter2:16 Lelo asukile akalipilwa pa cilubo cakwe. Punda wakwe inama iyishilanda
2Peter2:17 Aba bakafundisha babufi baba kwati tumfukumfuku twa menshi utwakama
2Peter2:18 Pantu aba bantu pakuitasha balanda amashiwi yaciwelewele
2Peter2:19 Babalaya ukuba abantungwa
2Peter2:20 Ukwishiba Imfumu yesu kabili Umupusushi wesu Yesu Kristu kwalipususha abantu ku fibi fya pano isonde. Nomba umwine nga aitwalako
2Peter2:21 Kuli aba bantu bena

2Peter3:17 Mwe batemwikwa bandi
2Peter3:18 Lelo mulekulilako mukuba ne cikuuku na mano yakwishiba Imfumu yesu kabili Umupusushi wesu Yesu Kristu. Kristu nalelumbwa pali nomba na pe na pe. Ameni.
1John1:1 Uo twalalandapo ni Lishiwi upeela umweo. Wena ewabako ukufumafye na ku citendekelo. Twalimumfwa no kumumona twalimumona na menso yesu. Ee twalimumona no kumwikatamo ne minwe yesu.
1John1:2 Ilyo uyu uupeela umweo aishile sokoloka
1John1:3 Ifyo twamona no kumfwa
1John1:4 Kanshi ico twamulembela aya mashiwi ni pakuti tube ne nsansa ishapwililika.
1John1:5 Aya e mashiwi twaumfwa kuli Mwane
1John1:6 Nga twasosa twatila ifwe twalyampana na Lesa ilyo tuli mu mfifi
1John1:7 Lelo nga twenda mu lubuuto nga filya Lesa aba mu lubuuto
1John1:8 Nga tutila tatwaba na bubifi
1John1:9 Lelo nga tulayebelela ifyabubifi fyesu kuli Lesa
1John1:10 Nga twatila tatwatala atubifya
1John2:1 Mwe bana bandi namulembela ifi
1John2:2 Kristu umwine ewaba ilambo ilifumya ifyabubifi fyesu
1John2:3 Nga twalakonka amafunde yakwa Lesa
1John2:4 Umo nga atila
1John2:5 Lelo uunakila amashiwi yakwa Lesa
1John2:6 Uyo onse uulanda ukuti aba na Lesa
1John2:7 Mwe batemwikwa bandi ici cebo nalamulembela
1John2:8 Lelo kwena icebo nalamulembela cipya
1John2:9 Uyo onse uutila aba mu lubuuto lelo alipata munyina
1John2:10 Onse uwatemwa munyina
1John2:11 Nomba uwapata munyina ena aba mu mfifi
1John2:12 Namulembela mwe bana bandi
1John2:13 Namulembela mwe bafyashi
1John2:14 Namulembela mwe bafyashi
1John2:15 Mwilatemwa calo nangu ifintu fya pano calo. Nga watemwa icalo
1John2:16 Pantu ifintu fyonse ifya pano calo
1John2:17 Icalo ne fintu fyonse ifyo abantu bakumbwa fileya kukupwa. Lelo abacita ifyo Lesa afwaya bena bakabelelela pe.
1John2:18 Mwe bana bandi ino nshita
1John2:19 Abo balwani bakwa Kristu abafumine mwibumba lyesu
1John2:20 Lelo imwe Kristu alimusuba na Mupashi Wamushilo
1John2:21 Nshimulembele ifi pa mulandu wakuti tamwaishiba cishinka
1John2:22 Nga kanshi uwabufi nani? Uwabufi muntu onse uutila Yesu tali e Kristu Umuntu wa musango uyu uukaana Wishi na Mwana e mulwani wakwa Kristu.
1John2:23 Pantu uukaana Mwane ninshi taba na Wishi
1John2:24 Kanshi mulesunga mu mitima yenu ayo mashiwi mwaumfwa ukutulafye ku citendekelo. Nga mwalasunga ayo mashiwi
1John2:25 Kabili umweo wa pe e cintu Kristu umwine atulaya.
1John2:26 Ico nalembela ifi kuli imwe ni pa mulandu wa abo abalefwaya ukulamufulunganya.
1John2:27 Lelo imwe Kristu alimusuba Mupashi Wamushilo uwaikala muli imwe. Kanshi nomba tamukabila nelyo umo uwakumufunda. Mupashi wakwe eumufundafye fyonse. Aba uwacishinka no kubepa tabepa iyoo. Kanshi mulenakila ifyo alemufunda
1John2:28 Eico kanshi mwe bana bandi ikaleni mukwampana pamo nankwe
1John2:29 Mwalishiba ukuti Kristu acita lyonse ifyo Lesa afwaya
1John3:1 Moneni ifyo Lesa Tata atutemwa! Alitutemwa nganshi
1John3:2 Mwe batemwikwa bandi
1John3:3 Onse uwakwata ili subilo muli Kristu
1John3:4 Onse uubifya
1John3:5 Mwalishiba ukuti ico Kristu amonekele
1John3:6 Kanshi onse uwaba na Kristu tatwalilila mukubifya pantu uyo onse uutwalilila mukubifya
1John3:7 Mwe bana bandi mwilaleka umuntu nelyo umo alemufulunganya! Onse uutwalilila mukucita ifyo Lesa afwaya
1John3:8 Umuntu onse uutwalilila mukubifya
1John3:9 Onse umwana wakwa Lesa icine cine tatwalilila mukubifya
1John3:10 Kuli ici eko twishibila abana bakwa Lesa na bana bakwa Ciwa. Pantu uyo onse uushitwalilila ukucita ifyo Lesa afwaya
1John3:11 Pantu aya e mashiwi mwaumfwile ukufuma ku citendekelofye
1John3:12 Twiba nga filya fyali Kaini uwali umuntu wakwa Ciwa. Aipeye munyina. Mulandu nshi amwipaile? Nico munyina alecita ifyo Lesa alefwaya
1John3:13 Eico kanshi mwe bamunyinane mwilapapa abantu ba mu calo nga bamupata.
1John3:14 Natwishiba ukuti twalifuma mu mfwa
1John3:15 Onse uwapata munyina wamisoka. Kabili mwalishiba ukuti mu wamisoka tamwaba mweo wape.
1John3:16 Kristu alenga ukuti twishibe ifyo icitemwiko caba ilyo alekele umweo wakwe pa mulandu wa ifwe. Kanshi na ifwe bene tulingile ukuleka imyeo yesu pali bamunyinefwe.
1John3:17 Umuntu uwakwata ifintu fya pano calo nga amona munyina alekabila
1John3:18 Mwe bana bandi twilaleka icitemwiko cesu cibefye pa kanwa na mu mashiwi
1John3:19 Kanshi muli ici emo twingeshibila ukuti tuli bantu bacishinka. Lyena tukekala ne mitima tondolo pa cinso cakwa Lesa
1John3:20 nangu imitima yesu iletushinina mu fintu ifingi. Pantu Lesa alishiba ifintu fyonse kabili alicindamapo ukucila pali kampingu wa mitima yesu.
1John3:21 Eico kanshi mwe batemwikwa bandi nga kampingu wa mitima yesu taletushinina
1John3:22 Lesa alatupeela fyonse ifyo tumulomba
1John3:23 Ifunde lyakwe nalyo nili ilyakutila
1John3:24 Onse uunakila amafunde yakwa Lesa aba na Lesa
1John4:1 Mwe batemwikwa bandi
1John4:2 Ico mwakulaishibilako Mupashi wakwa Lesa nici icakuti
1John4:3 Lelo uyo onse uushisumina ifi pali Yesu
1John4:4 Lelo imwe mwe bana bandi muli bakwa Lesa. Kabili mwalicimfya bakasesema babufi. Pantu Mupashi uwaba muli imwe wamaka nganshi ukucila umupashi wa bantu ba pano calo.
1John4:5 Aba bakasesema babufi ifintu balanda fya ba pano calo
1John4:6 Lelo ifwe tuli bantu bakwa Lesa. Onse uwaishiba Lesa alatumfwa
1John4:7 Mwe batemwikwa
1John4:8 Onse uushaba na citemwiko
1John4:9 Muli ici emo Lesa atulangila icitemwiko cakwe
1John4:10 Ici citemwiko caba ifi
1John4:11 Mwe batemwikwa
1John4:12 Tapaba nangu umo uwatala amona Lesa. Lelo nga tuletemwana
1John4:13 Twalishiba ukuti twaba na Lesa
1John4:14 Kabili twalimona ukuti Lesa atumine mwane ukuba Umupusushi wa bantu pano calo
1John4:15 Onse uushitiina ukulumbula ukuti Yesu ni Mwana Lesa
1John4:16 Kabili na ifwe bene twalishiba no kusumina twalisumina ukuti Lesa alitutemwa. Lesa citemwiko
1John4:17 Kanshi emukutila icitemwiko nga caba icapwililika muli ifwe
1John4:18 Apali icitemwiko tapaba mwenso nakalya. Icitemwiko icapwililika cilapwisha umwenso onse. Uwamwenso ninshi tafikapo pakutemwa
1John4:19 Ico tutemenwa nico Lesa ewabalilepo ukututemwa.
1John4:20 Umo nga atila
1John4:21 Ili kabili e funde lintu atupeela ilyakuti uyo uwatemwa Lesa
1John5:1 Onse uusumina ukuti Yesu e Kristu ninshi mwana wakwa Lesa wine wine. Kabili onse uwatemwa umufyashi
1John5:2 Ici eco twishibilako ukuti twalitemwa abana bakwe ico twatemwa Lesa no kukonka amafunde yakwe.
1John5:3 Ukutemwa Lesa kukonka amafunde yakwe. Kabili amafunde yakwe tayayafya.
1John5:4 Pantu umwana wakwa Lesa onse alikwata amaka yakucimfya icalo. Neco tucimfishako icalo cisumino cesu.
1John5:5 Uwingacimfya icalo nani? Ni uyo muntu uwasumina ukuti Yesu ni mwana Lesa.
1John5:6 Ni uyu wine Yesu Kristu ewaishile ku menshi na ku mulopa. Te ku menshi yeka aishile
1John5:7 Kwaba bakambone batatu
1John5:8 ni Mupashi
1John5:9 Tulasumina bukambone bwa bantu
1John5:10 Uyo onse uwasumina Mwana Lesa
1John5:11 Na bukambone ubu bwakuti
1John5:12 Onse uwaba na Mwana ninshi alikwata umweo
1John5:13 Ico namulembela ifi ni pakuti mwishibe ukuti
1John5:14 Ifwe tatumfwa mwenso pa cinso cakwa Lesa pantu alatumfwa nga twamulomba icintufye conse ukulingana no bufwayo bwakwe.
1John5:15 Twalishiba ukuti alatumfwa lyonse nga twamulomba. Kanshi twalishiba nokuti alatupeela conse ico tumulomba.
1John5:16 Umo nga alemona munyina alecita ububifi ubushitwala ku mfwa
1John5:17 Ukucita icabipa conse bubifi
1John5:18 Twalishiba ukuti umwana wakwa Lesa wine wine tekalilila mukubifya
1John5:19 Twalishiba ukuti tuli bana bakwa Lesa
1John5:20 Twalishiba ukuti Mwana Lesa alisa
1John5:21 Mwe bana bandi muletalukako ku tulubi.
2John1:1 Ine ne Mukalamba nakulembela kalata iwe we wasalwa na Lesa
2John1:2 Ico twamutemenwa nico muli ifwe mwaliba icishinka kabili twakulaba naco pe na pe.
2John1:3 Lesa Tata na Yesu Kristu
2John1:4 Nasansamwike nganshi pakusanga ukuti abana bobe bamo balanakila icishinka nga filya Lesa Tata atukonkomesha.
2John1:5 Eico ine nomba ndekupapata Mayo wesu ukuti ala bonse natuletemwana. Ici te cebo cipya nakulembela iyoo
2John1:6 Icitemwiko ndelandapo calola mukuti tufwile ukulanakila ifyebo fyakwa Lesa. Icebo mwaumfwa ukutulafye ku citendekelo cakuti
2John1:7 Ababufi abengi balisalangana isonde lyonse. Aba bantu tabasumina ukuti Yesu aishile yaluka umuntu. Onse uwaba nga aba bantu ninshi wabufi
2John1:8 Eico kanshi mulecenjela pakuti mwikalufya ifyo twabomba
2John1:9 Onse uushitwalilila ukusunga amafunde yakwa Kristu
2John1:10 Umo nga aisa kuli imwe alefunda ifyaibela
2John1:11 Pantu onse uwamuposha
2John1:12 Ndi ne fyakumweba ifingi
2John1:13 Bamwana nkashi mbiyo uwasalwa bakuposha.
3John1:1 Ine ne Mukalamba nakulembela kalata iwe we mutemwikwa wandi Gayo
3John1:2 We mutemwikwa wandi ndakupepelako ukuti uleenda umutende
3John1:3 Nasansamwike nganshi ilyo naumfwile kuli bamunyinefwe bamo abaishile tushimikilako ifyo wanakila icishinka
3John1:4 Takuli cintu nangu cimo icinsansamusha nganshi
3John1:5 We mutemwikwa wandi waliba uwacishinka nganshi pa milimo intu ubombela bamunyinefwe nangufye abeni.
3John1:6 Abantu balisa shimika ku lukuta pa mulandu wa citemwiko cobe. Kanshi ndekupapata
3John1:7 Pantu baima ubulendo pa mulandu wa mulimo wakwa Yesu
3John1:8 Kanshi tufwile ukwafwilishako abantu ba uyu musango
3John1:9 Nalembele kalata ku lukuta
3John1:10 Kanshi nga naisa elyo nkesa mweba ifyo acita ne fintu ifibi ifingi alanda ifyakutubepesha. Elyo teifi fyeka
3John1:11 We mutemwikwa wilakonkelela aba abacita ifyabipa
3John1:12 Bonse balatasha nganshi Demetrio
3John1:13 Ndi ne fyakukweba ifingi
3John1:14 Ndesubila ukwisa bwangu kukukumona
3John1:15 Umutende ube na iwe. Bacibusa bonse bakuposha. Uposhepo bacibusa bandi bonse umo umo.
Jude1:1 Ine Yuda ne musha wakwa Yesu Kristu kabili munyina Yakobo
Jude1:2 Lesa engamukwatila uluse ulwingi
Jude1:3 Mwe batemwikwa bandi! Ala nalefwaisha nganshi ukumulembelako pepusukilo twashukila bonse. Nasangile ukuti cilefwaikwa ukumukoselesha pakuti mulelwila icisumino ico Lesa apeela umupwilapo ku bantu bamushilo.
Jude1:4 Pantu abantu bamo abashapetamina Lesa baisa pakati kesu mu bumfisolo. Aba bantu bafulunganya amashiwi aya pa cikuuku cakwa Lesa no kuyalosha ku bulalelale. Elyo basuula na Yesu Kristu Imfumu yesu kabili Shikulwifwe uwabafye umo. Aba bantu ebo ukupingulwa kwabo kwalembelwepo na kalefye.
Jude1:5 Pantu nangu kwena mwaishiba ifi fintu fyonse kale
Jude1:6 Ibukisheni bamalaika balya abashasungile amaka yabo ayakuteeka
Jude1:7 Ibukisheni Sodoma na Gomora
Jude1:8 Kabili mu musango umo wine
Jude1:9 Nangu ni malaika Mikaeli umukalamba wa bamalaika
Jude1:10 Nomba aba bantu bena balanda no musaalula pa fintu ifyo bashumfwile umo filolele. Elyo ifintu baishiba mu musango inama ishabula amano shishibilamo ifintu
Jude1:11 Aba bantu bakacimona! Pantu bakonka imisango yakwa Kaini. Pa mulandufye wa ndalama
Jude1:12 Aba bantu baba kwati matoni ya fiko pa nsalu
Jude1:13 Baba kwati matamba ya pali bemba
Jude1:14 Enoki uwa mu nkulo yalengele cine lubali ukufuma pali Adamu
Jude1:15 Ikesa kukupingula abantu bonse. Ikesa kanda ababifya pa fibi fyonse ifyo bacita mu kubifya kwabo. Ikesa kanda ababifya bonse pa mashiwi yonse ayabi balandile pali Lesa!”
Jude1:16 Aba bantu bailishanyafye lyonse no kwebaula abantu bambi. Bakonkelelafye ulunkumbwa lwabo. Baishibafye ukuitakisha no kusembeleka abantu pakuti bamwenemo ifyo balefwaya.
Jude1:17 Lelo imwe mwe bacibusa bandi muleibukisha ifyo abasole ba Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu bamwebele kale.
Jude1:18 Bamwebele ukuti
Jude1:19 Abantu ba uyu musango abaleta ukupatulukana
Jude1:20 Lelo imwe
Jude1:21 Muleikala mu citemwiko cakwa Lesa
Jude1:22 Mulelangulukila abo abacili baletwishika.
Jude1:23 Mulepusushako bamo mukubasompola ukufuma mu mulilo. Bambi bena mulebakwatila uluse no mwensopo. Lelo muletaluka ku fyakufwala fyabo ifyakowela ku bubifi bwabo ubwa lunkumbwa lubi.
Jude1:24 Lesa nacindikwe uwaba na maka yakumubaka pakuti mwiwila mu fibi. Kabili aba na maka yakumuleta pa cinso cakwe icacindama ababula akabi nangu kamo
Jude1:25 Lesa uwabafye umo mpo
Revelation1:1 Ifili muli ici citabo e fintu Lesa asokolwelele Yesu Kristu. Afisokolwele pakuti Yesu Kristu alange abasha bakwe ifintu ifyali nokucitikafye bwangu bwangu. Kristu nao atumine malaika kukwisa ishibisha ifi fintu kuli Yoani umusha wakwe.
Revelation1:2 Yoani nao alishimika fyonse ifyo amwene. Kabili ni kambone pa mashiwi yakwa Lesa na pa cishinka Kristu aisa sokolola.
Revelation1:3 Alishuka uubelengela abantu amashiwi yafuma kuli Lesa aya muli ici citabo. Balishuka na bantu abomfwako ayo mashiwi no kukonka ifyalembwamo. Pantu inshita naipalama ilyo fyonse ifi fikacitika.
Revelation1:4 Ine Yoani
Revelation1:5 Icikuuku no mutende fibe na imwe ukufuma na kuli Yesu Kristu
Revelation1:6 Kabili alitwalula ukuba ababufumu kabili bashimapepo abakutumika Lesa wakwe kabili Wishi. Kuli Yesu Kristu kube amalumbo na maka yakubelelela pe! Ameni.

Revelation2:21 Nalimupeela inshita yakulapila no kupilibuka. Lelo tafwaya kulapila pa bulalelale bwakwe.
Revelation2:22 Eico kanshi nkamulenga ukuti alwale

Revelation4:1 Ilyo ifi fyapita nati ndoleshe
Revelation4:2 Awe apopene Mupashi Wamushilo anjikata
Revelation4:3 Impumi ya waikele pa cipuna yalebengeshima kwati ni filya fibeka amabwe ya yasipeli na kanelia. Icipuna ca Mfumu cashingulwikwe no mukolamfula uwalemoneka kwati libwe lya emeradi.
Revelation4:4 Ukushinguluka icipuna ca Mfumu kwaliko ifipuna fyabufumu amakumi yabili na fine. Pali ifi fipuna pena paikele abakalamba amakumi yabili na bane bafwele insalu ishabuuta ne fisote fyabufumu ku mitwe ifya golide.
Revelation4:5 Mu cipuna ca Mfumu mwalefuma ukubyata kwa myele ya nkuba no kubulukuta no kupanta kwa mfula. Kabili pantanshi ya cipuna ca Mfumu pali ifisaniko cine lubali fileyaka. Ifi fisaniko e mipashi yakwa Lesa cine lubali.
Revelation4:6 Pantanshi ya cipuna ca Mfumu palemoneka nga bemba uwaba kwati mulolani uwabeka kwati libwe lya kilistali. Kabili ukushinguluka icipuna mu mbali shonse
Revelation4:7 Icamweo icakubalilapo cali kwati ni nkalamo
Revelation4:8 Ifyamweo fyonse fine
Revelation4:9 Ifyamweo fine fimba inyimbo shakulumbanya no kucindika no kutasha uwaikala pa cipuna ca Mfumu
Revelation4:10 abakalamba amakumi yabili na bane balafukamina uwaikala pa cipuna ca Mfumu
Revelation4:11 “We Mfumu yesu kabili we Lesa wesu! Iwe walilinga ukukulumbanya no kukucindika kabili walilinga no kuba na maka. Pantu niwe wabumbile ifintu fyonse. Ni ku kufwayafye kobe eco ifintu fyonse fyabumbilwa no kuba eco fyabelako.”
Revelation5:1 Elyo namwene icitabo icapombwa mu minwe ya kuboko kwa kulyo kwa waikele pa cipuna ca Mfumu. Ico citabo calembelwe mukati na kunse. Kabili pakucifunga cakambatikilwepo inamba cine lubali.
Revelation5:2 Elyo namwene malaika uwamaka alebilikisha ne shiwi ilikalamba aleti
Revelation5:3 Lelo tapali nelyo umo mu mulu nangu ni pa calo
Revelation5:4 Awe na ine nalila icibi ico pashali nelyo umo uwakuti alinga ukukupukula icitabo nangu ukulolesha mukati.
Revelation5:5 Elyo umo pa bakalamba anjeba ati
Revelation5:6 Elyo namona pakati ka cipuna ca Mfumu
Revelation5:7 Elyo Umwana wa Mpanga aya poka icitabo icali mu minwe ya kuboko kwa kulyo kwa waikele pa cipuna ca Mfumu.
Revelation5:8 Cilya apoka icitabo
Revelation5:9 Elyo ifyamweo na bakalamba balaimba ulwimbo lupya abati
Revelation5:10 Wabacita ukuba ubufumu kabili bashimapepo abakutumika Lesa wesu. Kabili ebakalateeka pano calo.”
Revelation5:11 Kabili nati ndoleshe
Revelation5:12 Balepunda pakwimba abati
Revelation5:13 Elyo naumfwa ifibumbwa fyonse ifya mu mulu
Revelation5:14 Ifyamweo fine filya fyasosa afiti
Revelation6:1 Elyo namona Umwana wa Mpanga akakatulapo inamba yapakubala pa namba cine lubali isho icitabo cafungilweko. Naumfwa icamweo cimo pali filya ifyamweo fine casosa ne shiwi ilyaumfwikike kwati kubulukuta kwa mfula aliti
Revelation6:2 Awe nati ndoleshe
Revelation6:3 Elyo Umwana wa Mpanga akakatulapo inamba yabubili iyo icitabo cafungilweko. Naumfwa icamweo icalenga fibili casosa aciti
Revelation6:4 Awe kabalwe na umbi
Revelation6:5 Elyo Umwana wa Mpanga akakatulapo inamba yabutatu iyo icitabo cafungilweko. Naumfwa icamweo icalenga fitatu casosa aciti
Revelation6:6 Elyo naumfwa icongo icapala kwati lishiwi lyafuma pakati ka fyamweo fine aliti
Revelation6:7 Elyo Umwana wa Mpanga akakatulapo inamba yalenga shine iyo icitabo cafungilweko. Naumfwa icamweo icalenga fine casosa aciti
Revelation6:8 Awe nati ndoleshe
Revelation6:9 Elyo kabili Umwana wa Mpanga akakatulapo inamba yalenga busano. Namona mwisamba lya bulambo imipashi ya bantu abo baipeye pa mulandu wa mashiwi yakwa Lesa na pali ico baiminine bukambone.
Revelation6:10 Balepunda na mashiwi ayakalamba baleti
Revelation6:11 Elyo cila muntu apeelwa umwingila uwabuuta. Elyo babeba ukutuushako akashita kanono mpaka impendwa yonse iya babomfi banabo na bamunyinabo bakabepaye nga filya nabo baipaiwe.
Revelation6:12 Kabili namona Umwana wa Mpanga akakatulapo inamba yalenga mutanda iyo icitabo cafungilweko. Awe kwapona ne cinkukuma icikalamba
Revelation6:13 Intanda mu mulu nasho elyo shalaponena pa calo
Revelation6:14 Umulu nao wafumapo kwati ni filya bapomba ubutanda pakubufumyapo. Impili ne fishi nafyo fyasela ukufuma pa ncende fyalipo.
Revelation6:15 Elyo ishamfumu sha pano isonde
Revelation6:16 Elyo balabilikisha ku mpili na ku fimabwe ifikulu abati
Revelation6:17 Pantu ubushiku bwabo ubwakukalipa nabwisa

Revelation8:1 Ilyo Umwana wa Mpanga akakatulapo inamba yalenga cine lubali iyo icitabo cafungilweko
Revelation8:2 Elyo namona bamalaika cine lubali beminine pa cinso cakwa Lesa
Revelation8:3 Awe paisa malaika umbi ali ne cakubikamo ububani ica golide
Revelation8:4 Elyo icushi ca bubani pamo na mapepo ya bantu bamushilo fyanina ukuya pa cinso cakwa Lesa ukufuma ku minwe yakwa malaika.
Revelation8:5 Elyo malaika abula icakubikamo ububani acisushamo umulilo ukufuma pa bulambo
Revelation8:6 Elyo bamailaka cine lubali abali na mapenga cine lubali balaipekanya ukuyalisha.
Revelation8:7 Malaika uwakubalilapo alisha ipenga lyakwe. Imfula ya mabwe no mulilo ifyasakanamo no mulopa fyaposwa pa calo. Icipande cimo pa fipande fitatu ifya calo ne ca miti
Revelation8:8 Elyo malaika wabubili nao alisha ipenga lyakwe. Elyo icintu cimo icapala ulupili ulukalamba cilebilima no mulilo caposwa muli bemba. Elyo icipande cimo pa fipande fitatu ifya bemba cayaluka umulopa.
Revelation8:9 Elyo pa mabumba yonse yatatu aya fibumbwa ifipema ifikala muli bemba
Revelation8:10 Elyo malaika wabutatu nao alisha ipenga lyakwe. Ku mulu kwapona ulutanda ulukalamba
Revelation8:11 Ishina lya ulo lutanda ni “Kulula.” Ne cipande cimo ica menshi pa fipande fitatu ifya menshi cayaluka amenshi ayalula. Awe na bantu abengi bafwa ico banwene ayo menshi
Revelation8:12 Elyo malaika walenga bane alisha ipenga lyakwe. Awe icipande cimo ica pa fipande fitatu ifya kasuba ne ca mweshi
Revelation8:13 Kabili nati ndoleshe
Revelation9:1 Elyo malaika walenga basano alisha ipenga lyakwe. Namona ulutanda ulwacipona ukufuma mu mulu
Revelation9:2 Lwaisula ne cilindi icalola ku muyenge. Awe mwafuma icushi kwati cushi cifuma mwilungu lya mulilo. Akasuba na mu mulu mwafiitafye fititi ku cushi cilefuma mu muyenge.
Revelation9:3 Elyo mu cushi mwafuma bamakanta baisa pa calo
Revelation9:4 Babalesha ukonaula icani
Revelation9:5 Kwena bamakanta tababasuminishe ukwipaya abo bantu
Revelation9:6 Muli iyo myeshi isano
Revelation9:7 Bamakanta balemoneka kwati ni bakabalwe abo bateyenye ukuya ku bulwi. Pa mitwe yabo pena pali ifyapala kwati fisote fyabufumu ifya golide
Revelation9:8 Imishishi yabo nayo kwati mishishi ya banakashi
Revelation9:9 Pa fifuba fyabo pali ifintu ifyapala kwati cela bafwala pakucingilila icifuba. Elyo icongo calepanga amapindo yabo cali kwati congo cipanga amaceleta ayo bakabalwe baletinta ilyo balebutukila ku bulwi.

Revelation21:7 Uwacimfya eo nkapeela ifi
Revelation21:8 Lelo abo abashashipa
Revelation21:9 Elyo malaika umo pali bamalaika balya cine lubali
Revelation21:10 Elyo malaika ansenda ku lupili ulukulu kabili ulutali
Revelation21:11 Ulebengeshima no bucindami bwakwa Lesa. Umusumba wabengeshima kwati tumabwe twamutengo utwapala ilibwe lya yasipeli
Revelation21:12 Uyu musumba waba ne linga ilikalamba
Revelation21:13 Ku kabanga kwaba impongolo shitatu
Revelation21:14 Ilinga lya musumba lyakuulwa pa mabwe ikumi limo na yabili aya mu mufula. Elyo pali ayo mabwe palembelwe amashina ya basole ba Mwana wa Mpanga ikumi limo na babili.
Revelation21:15 Malaika uo nalelanda nankwe akwete inkonto yakupiminako iya golide
Revelation21:16 Umusumba waba na matungi yane
Revelation21:17 Kabili malaika apima icibumba ca musumba ukufuma panshi ukuya mu mulu asanga ukuti cili amakubiti umwanda umo na makumi yane na yane ukulingana no kupenda kwabo (144). Malaika alekonka ifyo abantu bapima.
Revelation21:18 Ilinga lyena lyakuulilwe na mabwe ya yasipeli. Elyo umusumba wena wakuulilwe na golide eka eka
Revelation21:19 Pa mabwe ya mu mufula apakuulilwe ilinga lya musumba mwali no tumabwe utwamutengo utwalekana lekana. Ilibwe lyakubalilapo ilya mufula
Revelation21:20 Ilya busano libwe lya onikisi
Revelation21:21 Elyo impongolo ikumi limo na shibili
Revelation21:22 Mu musumba nshimwenemo itempele. Pantu Lesa umwine wa maka yonse no Mwana wa Mpanga e tempele.
Revelation21:23 Umusumba taukabila ulubuuto lwa kasuba nangu ulwa mweshi. Pantu ubucindami bwakwa Lesa e lubuuto lwauko
Revelation21:24 Imishobo ya pano isonde yakulaenda mu lubuuto lwauko. Kabili bashamfumu ba pano calo emo bakaleta ubucindami bwabo.
Revelation21:25 Impongolo sha musumba akasuba konse shikalaba ishacenama
Revelation21:26 Abantu ba mishobo yonse bakaletamo ubucindami ne fyuma fyabo.
Revelation21:27 Icakowela conse tacakengile mu musumba
Revelation22:1 Elyo malaika ananga umumana uwa menshi ayapeela umweo. Uyu mumana untu wabengeshima kwati tumabwe twa kilistali
Revelation22:2 Elyo kabili wapita pakati ka musebo ukalamba uwa mu musumba. Cila bushilya bwa mumana
Revelation22:3 Muli uyu musumba tamwakasangwe nelyo cimo ico Lesa alapisha. Lelo icipuna cakwa Lesa no Mwana wa Mpanga cikaba mu musumba na babomfi bakwe bakalamutumika.
Revelation22:4 Bakalatamba icinso cakwe
Revelation22:5 Tabwakaleila
Revelation22:6 Malaika elyo anjeba ati
Revelation22:7 Yesu aleti
Revelation22:8 Nine Yoani naumfwile no kumona ifi fintu. Ilyo napwile ukumfwa no kumona ifi fintu
Revelation22:9 Lelo anjeba ati
Revelation22:10 Kabili anjeba ati
Revelation22:11 Lekeni uubifya akonkanyepo ukubifya
Revelation22:12 Yesu aleti
Revelation22:13 Nine Alfa kabili nine Omega
Revelation22:14 Balishuka abasamba imingila yabo
Revelation22:15 Lelo abashala kunse ya musumba bantu abolungana nge mbwa
Revelation22:16 “Nine Yesu ne utumine malaika wandi ku kwisa sokolola ifi fintu ku nkunta shonse. Ine ndi wa mu lupwa lwakwa Davidi
Revelation22:17 Mupashi na nabwinga balesosa abati
Revelation22:18 Ine Yoani
Revelation22:19 Elyo umo nga afumyapo fimo pa mashiwi yasesemwa muli ici citabo
Revelation22:20 Uyu uwasokolola fyonse ifi asosa ati
